authors_text: Wonwoo Cho,Jaegul Choo
title: Towards Accurate Open-Set Recognition via Background-Class Regularization
title_zh: 通过背景类正则化实现准确的开集识别
abstract: In open-set recognition (OSR), classifiers should be able to reject unknown-class samples while maintaining high closed-set classification accuracy. To effectively solve the OSR problem, previous studies attempted to limit latent feature space and reject data located outside the limited space via offline analyses, e.g., distance-based feature analyses, or complicated network architectures. To conduct OSR via a simple inference process (without offline analyses) in standard classifier architectures, we use distance-based classifiers instead of conventional Softmax classifiers. Afterwards, we design a background-class regularization strategy, which uses background-class data as surrogates of unknown-class ones during training phase. Specifically, we formulate a novel regularization loss suitable for distance-based classifiers, which reserves sufficiently large class-wise latent feature spaces for known classes and forces background-class samples to be located far away from the limited spaces. Through our extensive experiments, we show that the proposed method provides robust OSR results, while maintaining high closed-set classification accuracy.
summary: In open-set recognition (OSR), classifiers should be able to reject unknown-class samples while maintaining high closed-set classification accuracy. To effectively solve the OSR problem, previous studies attempted to limit latent feature space and reject data located outside the limited space via offline analyses, e.g., distance-based feature analyses, or complicated network architectures. To conduct OSR via a simple inference process (without offline analyses) in standard classifier architectures, we use distance-based classifiers instead of conventional Softmax classifiers. Afterwards, we design a background-class regularization strategy, which uses background-class data as surrogates of unknown-class ones during training phase. Specifically, we formulate a novel regularization loss suitable for distance-based classifiers, which reserves sufficiently large class-wise latent feature spaces for known classes and forces background-class samples to be located far away from the limited spaces. Through our extensive experiments, we show that the proposed method provides robust OSR results, while maintaining high closed-set classification accuracy.
abstract_zh: 在开集识别（OSR）中，分类器应该能够拒绝未知类样本，同时保持较高的闭集分类精度。为了有效解决OSR问题，之前的研究尝试通过离线分析（例如基于距离的特征分析或复杂的网络架构）来限制潜在特征空间并拒绝位于有限空间之外的数据。为了通过标准分类器架构中的简单推理过程（无需离线分析）进行 OSR，我们使用基于距离的分类器而不是传统的 Softmax 分类器。然后，我们设计了一种背景类正则化策略，该策略在训练阶段使用背景类数据作为未知类数据的替代。具体来说，我们制定了一种适用于基于距离的分类器的新颖的正则化损失，它为已知类保留足够大的类潜在特征空间，并迫使背景类样本位于远离有限空间的位置。通过我们广泛的实验，我们表明所提出的方法提供了稳健的 OSR 结果，同时保持了较高的闭集分类精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过背景类正则化策略提升开放集识别的准确性，同时保持高闭集分类精度。
AI.motivation: 传统开放集识别方法依赖复杂网络结构或离线分析，难以在标准分类器中实现简单高效的推理过程。
AI.method: 采用基于距离的分类器替代Softmax，并设计背景类正则化策略，通过新型损失函数扩大已知类特征空间并驱使背景类样本远离该空间。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持高闭集分类准确率的同时，显著提升了开放集识别的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 背景类正则化策略有效平衡了开放集识别的准确性与未知类拒绝能力，为OSR任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yongqi Dong,Kejia Chen,Yinxuan Peng,Zhiyuan Ma
title: Comparative Study on Supervised versus Semi-supervised Machine Learning for Anomaly Detection of In-vehicle CAN Network
title_zh: 用于车载 CAN 网络异常检测的监督与半监督机器学习的比较研究
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, accepted by the 25th IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (IEEE ITSC 2022)
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures, accepted by the 25th IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (IEEE ITSC 2022)
abstract: As the central nerve of the intelligent vehicle control system, the in-vehicle network bus is crucial to the security of vehicle driving. One of the best standards for the in-vehicle network is the Controller Area Network (CAN bus) protocol. However, the CAN bus is designed to be vulnerable to various attacks due to its lack of security mechanisms. To enhance the security of in-vehicle networks and promote the research in this area, based upon a large scale of CAN network traffic data with the extracted valuable features, this study comprehensively compared fully-supervised machine learning with semi-supervised machine learning methods for CAN message anomaly detection. Both traditional machine learning models (including single classifier and ensemble models) and neural network based deep learning models are evaluated. Furthermore, this study proposed a deep autoencoder based semi-supervised learning method applied for CAN message anomaly detection and verified its superiority over other semi-supervised methods. Extensive experiments show that the fully-supervised methods generally outperform semi-supervised ones as they are using more information as inputs. Typically the developed XGBoost based model obtained state-of-the-art performance with the best accuracy (98.65%), precision (0.9853), and ROC AUC (0.9585) beating other methods reported in the literature.
summary: As the central nerve of the intelligent vehicle control system, the in-vehicle network bus is crucial to the security of vehicle driving. One of the best standards for the in-vehicle network is the Controller Area Network (CAN bus) protocol. However, the CAN bus is designed to be vulnerable to various attacks due to its lack of security mechanisms. To enhance the security of in-vehicle networks and promote the research in this area, based upon a large scale of CAN network traffic data with the extracted valuable features, this study comprehensively compared fully-supervised machine learning with semi-supervised machine learning methods for CAN message anomaly detection. Both traditional machine learning models (including single classifier and ensemble models) and neural network based deep learning models are evaluated. Furthermore, this study proposed a deep autoencoder based semi-supervised learning method applied for CAN message anomaly detection and verified its superiority over other semi-supervised methods. Extensive experiments show that the fully-supervised methods generally outperform semi-supervised ones as they are using more information as inputs. Typically the developed XGBoost based model obtained state-of-the-art performance with the best accuracy (98.65%), precision (0.9853), and ROC AUC (0.9585) beating other methods reported in the literature.
abstract_zh: 车载网络总线作为智能车辆控制系统的中枢神经，对于车辆行驶的安全至关重要。车载网络的最佳标准之一是控制器局域网（CAN 总线）协议。然而，由于缺乏安全机制，CAN总线被设计为容易受到各种攻击。为了增强车载网络的安全性并推动该领域的研究，本研究基于大规模CAN网络流量数据并提取有价值的特征，全面比较了用于CAN报文异常检测的全监督机器学习和半监督机器学习方法。评估了传统的机器学习模型（包括单分类器和集成模型）和基于神经网络的深度学习模型。此外，本研究提出了一种基于深度自编码器的半监督学习方法应用于CAN报文异常检测，并验证了其相对于其他半监督方法的优越性。大量实验表明，完全监督方法通常优于半监督方法，因为它们使用更多信息作为输入。通常，开发的基于 XGBoost 的模型获得了最先进的性能，其最佳准确度 (98.65%)、精确度 (0.9853) 和 ROC AUC (0.9585) 击败了文献中报道的其他方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了监督学习与半监督学习在车载CAN网络异常检测中的应用效果。
AI.motivation: 车载CAN网络是智能车辆控制系统的核心，但其缺乏安全机制，容易受到攻击。因此，需要提升车载网络的安全性，并探索有效的异常检测方法。
AI.method: 该研究基于大规模CAN网络流量数据提取特征，全面比较了传统监督学习和半监督学习方法，包括单分类器、集成模型和深度学习模型，并提出了一种基于深度自编码器的半监督学习方法。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，监督学习方法在使用更多信息的情况下表现更优，其中基于XGBoost的模型在准确率、精确率和ROC AUC等指标上均达到最优。
AI.conclusion: 监督学习方法在车载CAN网络异常检测中优于半监督学习方法，而XGBoost模型在性能上表现出色，为相关研究提供了参考。

authors_text: Seonwoo Min,Nokyung Park,Siwon Kim,Seunghyun Park,Jinkyu Kim
title: Grounding Visual Representations with Texts for Domain Generalization
title_zh: 用文本进行视觉表示以进行领域泛化
comment: ECCV 2022; 25 pages (including Supplementary Materials); Updated related works
comments: ECCV 2022; 25 pages (including Supplementary Materials); Updated related works
abstract: Reducing the representational discrepancy between source and target domains is a key component to maximize the model generalization. In this work, we advocate for leveraging natural language supervision for the domain generalization task. We introduce two modules to ground visual representations with texts containing typical reasoning of humans: (1) Visual and Textual Joint Embedder and (2) Textual Explanation Generator. The former learns the image-text joint embedding space where we can ground high-level class-discriminative information into the model. The latter leverages an explainable model and generates explanations justifying the rationale behind its decision. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to leverage the vision-and-language cross-modality approach for the domain generalization task. Our experiments with a newly created CUB-DG benchmark dataset demonstrate that cross-modality supervision can be successfully used to ground domain-invariant visual representations and improve the model generalization. Furthermore, in the large-scale DomainBed benchmark, our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results and ranks 1st in average performance for five multi-domain datasets. The dataset and codes are available at https://github.com/mswzeus/GVRT.
summary: Reducing the representational discrepancy between source and target domains is a key component to maximize the model generalization. In this work, we advocate for leveraging natural language supervision for the domain generalization task. We introduce two modules to ground visual representations with texts containing typical reasoning of humans: (1) Visual and Textual Joint Embedder and (2) Textual Explanation Generator. The former learns the image-text joint embedding space where we can ground high-level class-discriminative information into the model. The latter leverages an explainable model and generates explanations justifying the rationale behind its decision. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to leverage the vision-and-language cross-modality approach for the domain generalization task. Our experiments with a newly created CUB-DG benchmark dataset demonstrate that cross-modality supervision can be successfully used to ground domain-invariant visual representations and improve the model generalization. Furthermore, in the large-scale DomainBed benchmark, our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results and ranks 1st in average performance for five multi-domain datasets. The dataset and codes are available at https://github.com/mswzeus/GVRT.
abstract_zh: 减少源域和目标域之间的表征差异是最大化模型泛化的关键组成部分。在这项工作中，我们主张利用自然语言监督来完成领域泛化任务。我们引入了两个模块来使用包含人类典型推理的文本来构建视觉表示：（1）视觉和文本联合嵌入器和（2）文本解释生成器。前者学习图像-文本联合嵌入空间，我们可以将高级类别区分信息融入模型中。后者利用可解释的模型并生成解释来证明其决策背后的基本原理。据我们所知，这是第一个利用视觉和语言跨模态方法来完成领域泛化任务的工作。我们使用新创建的 CUB-DG 基准数据集进行的实验表明，跨模态监督可以成功用于基础领域不变的视觉表示并提高模型泛化能力。此外，在大规模 DomainBed 基准测试中，我们提出的方法取得了最先进的结果，并且在五个多域数据集的平均性能方面排名第一。数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/mswzeus/GVRT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出通过文本引导视觉表示以提升领域泛化能力，利用跨模态监督解决源域与目标域间的表示差异问题。
AI.motivation: 领域泛化中源域与目标域的表示差异导致模型性能下降，传统方法依赖图像数据难以捕捉跨领域不变特征，而自然语言能提供更丰富的语义信息辅助模型学习领域不变表示。
AI.method: 设计两个核心模块：1) 视觉-文本联合嵌入器，构建图像与文本的联合嵌入空间以注入高层类别判别信息；2) 文本解释生成器，通过可解释模型生成决策依据的文本解释，强化跨模态对齐。
AI.result: 在自建CUB-DG数据集及DomainBed基准测试中，方法均取得SOTA结果，在五个多领域数据集上平均性能排名第一，代码与数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态监督有效引导视觉表示学习领域不变特征，显著提升模型泛化能力，为领域泛化任务提供新思路与实用工具。

search_text: Grounding Visual Representations with Texts for Domain Generalization 用文本进行视觉表示以进行领域泛化 Reducing the representational discrepancy between source and target domains is a key component to maximize the model generalization. In this work, we advocate for leveraging natural language supervision for the domain generalization task. We introduce two modules to ground visual representations with texts containing typical reasoning of humans: (1) Visual and Textual Joint Embedder and (2) Textual Explanation Generator. The former learns the image-text joint embedding space where we can ground high-level class-discriminative information into the model. The latter leverages an explainable model and generates explanations justifying the rationale behind its decision. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to leverage the vision-and-language cross-modality approach for the domain generalization task. Our experiments with a newly created CUB-DG benchmark dataset demonstrate that cross-modality supervision can be successfully used to ground domain-invariant visual representations and improve the model generalization. Furthermore, in the large-scale DomainBed benchmark, our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results and ranks 1st in average performance for five multi-domain datasets. The dataset and codes are available at https://github.com/mswzeus/GVRT. 减少源域和目标域之间的表征差异是最大化模型泛化的关键组成部分。在这项工作中，我们主张利用自然语言监督来完成领域泛化任务。我们引入了两个模块来使用包含人类典型推理的文本来构建视觉表示：（1）视觉和文本联合嵌入器和（2）文本解释生成器。前者学习图像-文本联合嵌入空间，我们可以将高级类别区分信息融入模型中。后者利用可解释的模型并生成解释来证明其决策背后的基本原理。据我们所知，这是第一个利用视觉和语言跨模态方法来完成领域泛化任务的工作。我们使用新创建的 CUB-DG 基准数据集进行的实验表明，跨模态监督可以成功用于基础领域不变的视觉表示并提高模型泛化能力。此外，在大规模 DomainBed 基准测试中，我们提出的方法取得了最先进的结果，并且在五个多域数据集的平均性能方面排名第一。数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/mswzeus/GVRT 获取。 本论文提出通过文本引导视觉表示以提升领域泛化能力，利用跨模态监督解决源域与目标域间的表示差异问题。 Seonwoo Min,Nokyung Park,Siwon Kim,Seunghyun Park,Jinkyu Kim cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Sekitoshi Kanai,Shin'ya Yamaguchi,Masanori Yamada,Hiroshi Takahashi,Kentaro Ohno,Yasutoshi Ida
title: One-vs-the-Rest Loss to Focus on Important Samples in Adversarial Training
title_zh: 一对一损失关注对抗训练中的重要样本
abstract: This paper proposes a new loss function for adversarial training. Since adversarial training has difficulties, e.g., necessity of high model capacity, focusing on important data points by weighting cross-entropy loss has attracted much attention. However, they are vulnerable to sophisticated attacks, e.g., Auto-Attack. This paper experimentally reveals that the cause of their vulnerability is their small margins between logits for the true label and the other labels. Since neural networks classify the data points based on the logits, logit margins should be large enough to avoid flipping the largest logit by the attacks. Importance-aware methods do not increase logit margins of important samples but decrease those of less-important samples compared with cross-entropy loss. To increase logit margins of important samples, we propose switching one-vs-the-rest loss (SOVR), which switches from cross-entropy to one-vs-the-rest loss for important samples that have small logit margins. We prove that one-vs-the-rest loss increases logit margins two times larger than the weighted cross-entropy loss for a simple problem. We experimentally confirm that SOVR increases logit margins of important samples unlike existing methods and achieves better robustness against Auto-Attack than importance-aware methods.
summary: This paper proposes a new loss function for adversarial training. Since adversarial training has difficulties, e.g., necessity of high model capacity, focusing on important data points by weighting cross-entropy loss has attracted much attention. However, they are vulnerable to sophisticated attacks, e.g., Auto-Attack. This paper experimentally reveals that the cause of their vulnerability is their small margins between logits for the true label and the other labels. Since neural networks classify the data points based on the logits, logit margins should be large enough to avoid flipping the largest logit by the attacks. Importance-aware methods do not increase logit margins of important samples but decrease those of less-important samples compared with cross-entropy loss. To increase logit margins of important samples, we propose switching one-vs-the-rest loss (SOVR), which switches from cross-entropy to one-vs-the-rest loss for important samples that have small logit margins. We prove that one-vs-the-rest loss increases logit margins two times larger than the weighted cross-entropy loss for a simple problem. We experimentally confirm that SOVR increases logit margins of important samples unlike existing methods and achieves better robustness against Auto-Attack than importance-aware methods.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的对抗训练损失函数。由于对抗性训练存在困难，例如需要高模型容量，因此通过加权交叉熵损失来关注重要数据点引起了广泛关注。然而，它们很容易受到复杂的攻击，例如自动攻击。本文通过实验揭示了它们脆弱性的原因是真实标签和其他标签的逻辑之间的差距很小。由于神经网络根据 Logit 对数据点进行分类，因此 Logit 边距应该足够大，以避免攻击导致最大 Logit 翻转。与交叉熵损失相比，重要性感知方法不会增加重要样本的 Logit 边际，但会减少不太重要样本的 Logit 边际。为了增加重要样本的对数裕度，我们建议切换一对一损失（SOVR），即对于具有较小对数裕度的重要样本，从交叉熵切换为一对多损失。我们证明，对于一个简单的问题，一对一损失增加的逻辑裕度是加权交叉熵损失的两倍。我们通过实验证实，与现有方法不同，SOVR 增加了重要样本的 logit 裕度，并且比重要性感知方法实现了更好的针对自动攻击的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的损失函数SOVR，用于对抗训练中增强重要样本的logit边距以提高鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有重要性感知方法在对抗攻击下表现脆弱，因其未能有效扩大重要样本的logit边距，反而缩小了非重要样本的边距。
AI.method: 设计SOVR方法，对logit边距较小的重要样本切换使用one-vs-the-rest损失，理论证明其可使边距扩大至加权交叉熵损失的两倍。
AI.result: 实验表明SOVR显著提升重要样本的logit边距，在Auto-Attack攻击下优于现有重要性感知方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对性增强重要样本的logit边距，SOVR有效提升了对抗训练的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Liu Yang,Yinzhi Lu,Simon X. Yang,Yuanchang Zhong,Tan Guo,Zhifang Liang
title: An Evolutionary Game based Secure Clustering Protocol with Fuzzy Trust Evaluation and Outlier Detection for Wireless Sensor Networks
title_zh: 一种基于演化博弈的无线传感器网络安全聚类协议，具有模糊信任评估和离群点检测功能
abstract: Trustworthy and reliable data delivery is a challenging task in Wireless Sensor Networks (WSNs) due to unique characteristics and constraints. To acquire secured data delivery and address the conflict between security and energy, in this paper we present an evolutionary game based secure clustering protocol with fuzzy trust evaluation and outlier detection for WSNs. Firstly, a fuzzy trust evaluation method is presented to transform the transmission evidences into trust values while effectively alleviating the trust uncertainty. And then, a K-Means based outlier detection scheme is proposed to further analyze plenty of trust values obtained via fuzzy trust evaluation or trust recommendation. It can discover the commonalities and differences among sensor nodes while improving the accuracy of outlier detection. Finally, we present an evolutionary game based secure clustering protocol to achieve a trade-off between security assurance and energy saving for sensor nodes when electing for the cluster heads. A sensor node which failed to be the cluster head can securely choose its own head by isolating the suspicious nodes. Simulation results verify that our secure clustering protocol can effectively defend the network against the attacks from internal selfish or compromised nodes. Correspondingly, the timely data transfer rate can be improved significantly.
summary: Trustworthy and reliable data delivery is a challenging task in Wireless Sensor Networks (WSNs) due to unique characteristics and constraints. To acquire secured data delivery and address the conflict between security and energy, in this paper we present an evolutionary game based secure clustering protocol with fuzzy trust evaluation and outlier detection for WSNs. Firstly, a fuzzy trust evaluation method is presented to transform the transmission evidences into trust values while effectively alleviating the trust uncertainty. And then, a K-Means based outlier detection scheme is proposed to further analyze plenty of trust values obtained via fuzzy trust evaluation or trust recommendation. It can discover the commonalities and differences among sensor nodes while improving the accuracy of outlier detection. Finally, we present an evolutionary game based secure clustering protocol to achieve a trade-off between security assurance and energy saving for sensor nodes when electing for the cluster heads. A sensor node which failed to be the cluster head can securely choose its own head by isolating the suspicious nodes. Simulation results verify that our secure clustering protocol can effectively defend the network against the attacks from internal selfish or compromised nodes. Correspondingly, the timely data transfer rate can be improved significantly.
abstract_zh: 由于独特的特性和限制，可信且可靠的数据传输是无线传感器网络 (WSN) 中的一项具有挑战性的任务。为了获得安全的数据传输并解决安全与能源之间的冲突，在本文中，我们提出了一种基于进化博弈的安全集群协议，具有模糊信任评估和无线传感器网络异常检测功能。首先，提出一种模糊信任评估方法，将传输证据转化为信任值，同时有效缓解信任的不确定性。然后，提出了一种基于K-Means的异常值检测方案，以进一步分析通过模糊信任评估或信任推荐获得的大量信任值。它可以发现传感器节点之间的共性和差异，同时提高异常值检测的准确性。最后，我们提出了一种基于进化博弈的安全集群协议，以在选举簇头时实现传感器节点的安全保证和节能之间的权衡。未能成为簇头的传感器节点可以通过隔离可疑节点来安全地选择自己的簇头。仿真结果验证了我们的安全集群协议可以有效地保护网络免受内部自私或受损节点的攻击。相应地，数据传输的及时率可以显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于进化博弈的无线传感器网络安全聚类协议，结合模糊信任评估和异常检测技术，以解决数据传输安全与能耗之间的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 无线传感器网络中数据传输面临信任不确定性、内部恶意节点攻击及安全与能耗平衡的挑战，需设计兼顾安全性与能效的聚类机制。
AI.method: 提出模糊信任评估方法量化节点信任值，结合K-Means异常检测识别可疑节点，并设计进化博弈模型优化聚类头选举过程以实现安全与能耗的动态平衡。
AI.result: 仿真验证该协议能有效抵御内部自私或被攻破节点的攻击，同时显著提升数据传输及时率。
AI.conclusion: 所提协议通过融合模糊信任、异常检测与进化博弈机制，成功在无线传感器网络中实现了安全传输与能量效率的协同优化。

search_text: An Evolutionary Game based Secure Clustering Protocol with Fuzzy Trust Evaluation and Outlier Detection for Wireless Sensor Networks 一种基于演化博弈的无线传感器网络安全聚类协议，具有模糊信任评估和离群点检测功能 Trustworthy and reliable data delivery is a challenging task in Wireless Sensor Networks (WSNs) due to unique characteristics and constraints. To acquire secured data delivery and address the conflict between security and energy, in this paper we present an evolutionary game based secure clustering protocol with fuzzy trust evaluation and outlier detection for WSNs. Firstly, a fuzzy trust evaluation method is presented to transform the transmission evidences into trust values while effectively alleviating the trust uncertainty. And then, a K-Means based outlier detection scheme is proposed to further analyze plenty of trust values obtained via fuzzy trust evaluation or trust recommendation. It can discover the commonalities and differences among sensor nodes while improving the accuracy of outlier detection. Finally, we present an evolutionary game based secure clustering protocol to achieve a trade-off between security assurance and energy saving for sensor nodes when electing for the cluster heads. A sensor node which failed to be the cluster head can securely choose its own head by isolating the suspicious nodes. Simulation results verify that our secure clustering protocol can effectively defend the network against the attacks from internal selfish or compromised nodes. Correspondingly, the timely data transfer rate can be improved significantly. 由于独特的特性和限制，可信且可靠的数据传输是无线传感器网络 (WSN) 中的一项具有挑战性的任务。为了获得安全的数据传输并解决安全与能源之间的冲突，在本文中，我们提出了一种基于进化博弈的安全集群协议，具有模糊信任评估和无线传感器网络异常检测功能。首先，提出一种模糊信任评估方法，将传输证据转化为信任值，同时有效缓解信任的不确定性。然后，提出了一种基于K-Means的异常值检测方案，以进一步分析通过模糊信任评估或信任推荐获得的大量信任值。它可以发现传感器节点之间的共性和差异，同时提高异常值检测的准确性。最后，我们提出了一种基于进化博弈的安全集群协议，以在选举簇头时实现传感器节点的安全保证和节能之间的权衡。未能成为簇头的传感器节点可以通过隔离可疑节点来安全地选择自己的簇头。仿真结果验证了我们的安全集群协议可以有效地保护网络免受内部自私或受损节点的攻击。相应地，数据传输的及时率可以显着提高。 本文提出一种基于进化博弈的无线传感器网络安全聚类协议，结合模糊信任评估和异常检测技术，以解决数据传输安全与能耗之间的矛盾。 Liu Yang,Yinzhi Lu,Simon X. Yang,Yuanchang Zhong,Tan Guo,Zhifang Liang cs.NI,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Tian-Xing Xu,Yuan-Chen Guo,Yong-Liang Yang,Song-Hai Zhang
title: Gradient-based Point Cloud Denoising with Uniformity
title_zh: 基于梯度的点云均匀去噪
abstract: Point clouds captured by depth sensors are often contaminated by noises, obstructing further analysis and applications. In this paper, we emphasize the importance of point distribution uniformity to downstream tasks. We demonstrate that point clouds produced by existing gradient-based denoisers lack uniformity despite having achieved promising quantitative results. To this end, we propose GPCD++, a gradient-based denoiser with an ultra-lightweight network named UniNet to address uniformity. Compared with previous state-of-the-art methods, our approach not only generates competitive or even better denoising results, but also significantly improves uniformity which largely benefits applications such as surface reconstruction.
summary: Point clouds captured by depth sensors are often contaminated by noises, obstructing further analysis and applications. In this paper, we emphasize the importance of point distribution uniformity to downstream tasks. We demonstrate that point clouds produced by existing gradient-based denoisers lack uniformity despite having achieved promising quantitative results. To this end, we propose GPCD++, a gradient-based denoiser with an ultra-lightweight network named UniNet to address uniformity. Compared with previous state-of-the-art methods, our approach not only generates competitive or even better denoising results, but also significantly improves uniformity which largely benefits applications such as surface reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 深度传感器捕获的点云经常受到噪声污染，阻碍进一步的分析和应用。在本文中，我们强调点分布均匀性对下游任务的重要性。我们证明了现有的基于梯度的降噪器产生的点云缺乏均匀性，尽管取得了有希望的定量结果。为此，我们提出了 GPCD++，一种基于梯度的降噪器，具有名为 UniNet 的超轻量级网络来解决均匀性问题。与以前最先进的方法相比，我们的方法不仅产生有竞争力甚至更好的去噪结果，而且显着提高了均匀性，这在很大程度上有利于表面重建等应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于梯度的点云去噪方法GPCD++，通过引入轻量级网络UniNet提升点云分布的均匀性以优化下游任务。
AI.motivation: 现有梯度去噪方法虽取得良好定量结果，但生成的点云分布不均匀，影响表面重建等应用效果。
AI.method: 设计超轻量网络UniNet作为GPCD++的核心模块，在梯度下降框架中引入均匀性约束优化点云分布。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，该方法在保持去噪效果的同时显著提升点云均匀性，表面重建质量优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一优化去噪与均匀性目标，所提方法在保持高去噪精度的同时有效提升了点云数据的实用价值。

authors_text: Yongqiang Mao,Kaiqiang Chen,Wenhui Diao,Xian Sun,Xiaonan Lu,Kun Fu,Martin Weinmann
title: Beyond single receptive field: A receptive field fusion-and-stratification network for airborne laser scanning point cloud classification
title_zh: 超越单一感受野：用于机载激光扫描点云分类的感受野融合分层网络
abstract: The classification of airborne laser scanning (ALS) point clouds is a critical task of remote sensing and photogrammetry fields. Although recent deep learning-based methods have achieved satisfactory performance, they have ignored the unicity of the receptive field, which makes the ALS point cloud classification remain challenging for the distinguishment of the areas with complex structures and extreme scale variations. In this article, for the objective of configuring multi-receptive field features, we propose a novel receptive field fusion-and-stratification network (RFFS-Net). With a novel dilated graph convolution (DGConv) and its extension annular dilated convolution (ADConv) as basic building blocks, the receptive field fusion process is implemented with the dilated and annular graph fusion (DAGFusion) module, which obtains multi-receptive field feature representation through capturing dilated and annular graphs with various receptive regions. The stratification of the receptive fields with point sets of different resolutions as the calculation bases is performed with Multi-level Decoders nested in RFFS-Net and driven by the multi-level receptive field aggregation loss (MRFALoss) to drive the network to learn in the direction of the supervision labels with different resolutions. With receptive field fusion-and-stratification, RFFS-Net is more adaptable to the classification of regions with complex structures and extreme scale variations in large-scale ALS point clouds. Evaluated on the ISPRS Vaihingen 3D dataset, our RFFS-Net significantly outperforms the baseline approach by 5.3% on mF1 and 5.4% on mIoU, accomplishing an overall accuracy of 82.1%, an mF1 of 71.6%, and an mIoU of 58.2%. Furthermore, experiments on the LASDU dataset and the 2019 IEEE-GRSS Data Fusion Contest dataset show that RFFS-Net achieves a new state-of-the-art classification performance.
summary: The classification of airborne laser scanning (ALS) point clouds is a critical task of remote sensing and photogrammetry fields. Although recent deep learning-based methods have achieved satisfactory performance, they have ignored the unicity of the receptive field, which makes the ALS point cloud classification remain challenging for the distinguishment of the areas with complex structures and extreme scale variations. In this article, for the objective of configuring multi-receptive field features, we propose a novel receptive field fusion-and-stratification network (RFFS-Net). With a novel dilated graph convolution (DGConv) and its extension annular dilated convolution (ADConv) as basic building blocks, the receptive field fusion process is implemented with the dilated and annular graph fusion (DAGFusion) module, which obtains multi-receptive field feature representation through capturing dilated and annular graphs with various receptive regions. The stratification of the receptive fields with point sets of different resolutions as the calculation bases is performed with Multi-level Decoders nested in RFFS-Net and driven by the multi-level receptive field aggregation loss (MRFALoss) to drive the network to learn in the direction of the supervision labels with different resolutions. With receptive field fusion-and-stratification, RFFS-Net is more adaptable to the classification of regions with complex structures and extreme scale variations in large-scale ALS point clouds. Evaluated on the ISPRS Vaihingen 3D dataset, our RFFS-Net significantly outperforms the baseline approach by 5.3% on mF1 and 5.4% on mIoU, accomplishing an overall accuracy of 82.1%, an mF1 of 71.6%, and an mIoU of 58.2%. Furthermore, experiments on the LASDU dataset and the 2019 IEEE-GRSS Data Fusion Contest dataset show that RFFS-Net achieves a new state-of-the-art classification performance.
abstract_zh: 机载激光扫描（ALS）点云的分类是遥感和摄影测量领域的一项关键任务。尽管最近基于深度学习的方法取得了令人满意的性能，但它们忽略了感受野的唯一性，这使得ALS点云分类对于区分具有复杂结构和极端尺度变化的区域仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，为了配置多感受野特征，我们提出了一种新颖的感受野融合分层网络（RFFS-Net）。以新颖的扩张图卷积（DGConv）及其扩展环形扩张卷积（ADConv）为基本构建块，通过扩张和环形图融合（DAGFusion）模块实现感受野融合过程，该模块通过捕获具有各种感受区域的扩张和环形图来获得多感受野特征表示。以不同分辨率的点集为计算基础的感受野分层是通过嵌套在RFFS-Net中的多级解码器进行的，并由多级感受野聚合损失（MRFALoss）驱动，驱动网络向不同分辨率的监督标签的方向学习。通过感受野融合和分层，RFFS-Net更适应大规模ALS点云中结构复杂和尺度变化极大的区域的分类。在 ISPRS Vaihingen 3D 数据集上进行评估，我们的 RFFS-Net 在 mF1 上显着优于基线方法 5.3%，在 mIoU 上显着优于基线方法 5.4%，总体准确度为 82.1%，mF1 为 71.6%，mIoU 为 58.2%。此外，在 LASDU 数据集和 2019 IEEE-GRSS Data Fusion Contest 数据集上的实验表明，RFFS-Net 实现了新的最先进的分类性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型网络RFFS-Net，通过融合多尺度感受野解决机载激光扫描点云分类中的复杂结构和尺度变化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法因忽略感受野的独特性，在处理复杂结构和极端尺度变化区域时分类效果受限，需通过多感受野特征提升模型适应性。
AI.method: 设计扩张图卷积（DGConv）和环形扩张卷积（ADConv）作为基础模块，结合DAGFusion模块实现多感受野特征融合，并通过多级解码器与多级感受野聚合损失（MRFALoss）实现分层特征学习。
AI.result: 在ISPRS Vaihingen 3D数据集上，mF1提升5.3%、mIoU提升5.4%，整体准确率达82.1%；在LASDU和IEEE-GRSS数据集上均达到最新性能。
AI.conclusion: RFFS-Net通过感受野融合与分层机制有效解决了大规模ALS点云分类难题，验证了其在复杂场景下的优越性。

With a novel dilated graph convolution (DGConv) and its extension annular dilated convolution (ADConv) as basic building blocks, the receptive field fusion process is implemented with the dilated and annular graph fusion (DAGFusion) module, which obtains multi-receptive field feature representation through capturing dilated and annular graphs with various receptive regions. The stratification of the receptive fields with point sets of different resolutions as the calculation bases is performed with Multi-level Decoders nested in RFFS-Net and driven by the multi-level receptive field aggregation loss (MRFALoss) to drive the network to learn in the direction of the supervision labels with different resolutions. With receptive field fusion-and-stratification, RFFS-Net is more adaptable to the classification of regions with complex structures and extreme scale variations in large-scale ALS point clouds. Evaluated on the ISPRS Vaihingen 3D dataset, our RFFS-Net significantly outperforms the baseline approach by 5.3% on mF1 and 5.4% on mIoU, accomplishing an overall accuracy of 82.1%, an mF1 of 71.6%, and an mIoU of 58.2%. Furthermore, experiments on the LASDU dataset and the 2019 IEEE-GRSS Data Fusion Contest dataset show that RFFS-Net achieves a new state-of-the-art classification performance. 机载激光扫描（ALS）点云的分类是遥感和摄影测量领域的一项关键任务。尽管最近基于深度学习的方法取得了令人满意的性能，但它们忽略了感受野的唯一性，这使得ALS点云分类对于区分具有复杂结构和极端尺度变化的区域仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，为了配置多感受野特征，我们提出了一种新颖的感受野融合分层网络（RFFS-Net）。以新颖的扩张图卷积（DGConv）及其扩展环形扩张卷积（ADConv）为基本构建块，通过扩张和环形图融合（DAGFusion）模块实现感受野融合过程，该模块通过捕获具有各种感受区域的扩张和环形图来获得多感受野特征表示。以不同分辨率的点集为计算基础的感受野分层是通过嵌套在RFFS-Net中的多级解码器进行的，并由多级感受野聚合损失（MRFALoss）驱动，驱动网络向不同分辨率的监督标签的方向学习。通过感受野融合和分层，RFFS-Net更适应大规模ALS点云中结构复杂和尺度变化极大的区域的分类。在 ISPRS Vaihingen 3D 数据集上进行评估，我们的 RFFS-Net 在 mF1 上显着优于基线方法 5.3%，在 mIoU 上显着优于基线方法 5.4%，总体准确度为 82.1%，mF1 为 71.6%，mIoU 为 58.2%。此外，在 LASDU 数据集和 2019 IEEE-GRSS Data Fusion Contest 数据集上的实验表明，RFFS-Net 实现了新的最先进的分类性能。 本文提出一种新型网络RFFS-Net，通过融合多尺度感受野解决机载激光扫描点云分类中的复杂结构和尺度变化问题。 Yongqiang Mao,Kaiqiang Chen,Wenhui Diao,Xian Sun,Xiaonan Lu,Kun Fu,Martin Weinmann cs.CV

authors_text: Chongyu Liu,Lianwen Jin,Yuliang Liu,Canjie Luo,Bangdong Chen,Fengjun Guo,Kai Ding
title: Don't Forget Me: Accurate Background Recovery for Text Removal via Modeling Local-Global Context
title_zh: 不要忘记我：通过本地-全局上下文建模进行准确的背景恢复以进行文本删除
abstract: Text removal has attracted increasingly attention due to its various applications on privacy protection, document restoration, and text editing. It has shown significant progress with deep neural network. However, most of the existing methods often generate inconsistent results for complex background. To address this issue, we propose a Contextual-guided Text Removal Network, termed as CTRNet. CTRNet explores both low-level structure and high-level discriminative context feature as prior knowledge to guide the process of background restoration. We further propose a Local-global Content Modeling (LGCM) block with CNNs and Transformer-Encoder to capture local features and establish the long-term relationship among pixels globally. Finally, we incorporate LGCM with context guidance for feature modeling and decoding. Experiments on benchmark datasets, SCUT-EnsText and SCUT-Syn show that CTRNet significantly outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, a qualitative experiment on examination papers also demonstrates the generalization ability of our method. The codes and supplement materials are available at https://github.com/lcy0604/CTRNet.
summary: Text removal has attracted increasingly attention due to its various applications on privacy protection, document restoration, and text editing. It has shown significant progress with deep neural network. However, most of the existing methods often generate inconsistent results for complex background. To address this issue, we propose a Contextual-guided Text Removal Network, termed as CTRNet. CTRNet explores both low-level structure and high-level discriminative context feature as prior knowledge to guide the process of background restoration. We further propose a Local-global Content Modeling (LGCM) block with CNNs and Transformer-Encoder to capture local features and establish the long-term relationship among pixels globally. Finally, we incorporate LGCM with context guidance for feature modeling and decoding. Experiments on benchmark datasets, SCUT-EnsText and SCUT-Syn show that CTRNet significantly outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, a qualitative experiment on examination papers also demonstrates the generalization ability of our method. The codes and supplement materials are available at https://github.com/lcy0604/CTRNet.
abstract_zh: 文本删除因其在隐私保护、文档恢复、文本编辑等方面的多种应用而受到越来越多的关注。它在深度神经网络方面取得了重大进展。然而，大多数现有方法对于复杂背景经常产生不一致的结果。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种上下文引导的文本删除网络，称为 CTRNet。 CTRNet 探索低层结构和高层判别上下文特征作为先验知识来指导背景恢复过程。我们进一步提出了一个带有 CNN 和 Transformer-Encoder 的局部全局内容建模（LGCM）块，以捕获局部特征并在全局像素之间建立长期关系。最后，我们将 LGCM 与特征建模和解码的上下文指导结合起来。在基准数据集 SCUT-EnsText 和 SCUT-Syn 上的实验表明，CTRNet 显着优于现有的最先进方法。此外，对试卷的定性实验也证明了我们方法的泛化能力。代码和补充材料可在 https://github.com/lcy0604/CTRNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部-全局上下文建模的文本去除方法CTRNet，旨在解决复杂背景下文本移除时的背景恢复不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文本去除方法在处理复杂背景时容易产生不一致结果，难以准确恢复背景细节，影响隐私保护和文档修复等应用效果。
AI.method: 设计包含CNN与Transformer-Encoder的Local-global Content Modeling（LGCM）模块，联合提取局部结构特征与全局语义关系，并结合上下文引导进行特征建模与解码。
AI.result: 在SCUT-EnsText和SCUT-Syn基准数据集上显著优于现有SOTA方法，在试卷等实际场景中也表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模局部-全局上下文关系，CTRNet有效提升了复杂背景下文本移除的准确性，验证了上下文引导机制的有效性。

authors_text: Yan Hong,Li Niu,Jianfu Zhang,Liqing Zhang
title: DeltaGAN: Towards Diverse Few-shot Image Generation with Sample-Specific Delta
title_zh: DeltaGAN：通过样本特定的 Delta 实现多样化的少样本图像生成
comment: I want to withdraw this version and use it to update the previous version at arXiv:2009.08753
comments: I want to withdraw this version and use it to update the previous version at arXiv:2009.08753
abstract: Learning to generate new images for a novel category based on only a few images, named as few-shot image generation, has attracted increasing research interest. Several state-of-the-art works have yielded impressive results, but the diversity is still limited. In this work, we propose a novel Delta Generative Adversarial Network (DeltaGAN), which consists of a reconstruction subnetwork and a generation subnetwork. The reconstruction subnetwork captures intra-category transformation, i.e., delta, between same-category pairs. The generation subnetwork generates sample-specific delta for an input image, which is combined with this input image to generate a new image within the same category. Besides, an adversarial delta matching loss is designed to link the above two subnetworks together. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method. Our code is available at https://github.com/bcmi/DeltaGAN-Few-Shot-Image-Generation.
summary: Learning to generate new images for a novel category based on only a few images, named as few-shot image generation, has attracted increasing research interest. Several state-of-the-art works have yielded impressive results, but the diversity is still limited. In this work, we propose a novel Delta Generative Adversarial Network (DeltaGAN), which consists of a reconstruction subnetwork and a generation subnetwork. The reconstruction subnetwork captures intra-category transformation, i.e., delta, between same-category pairs. The generation subnetwork generates sample-specific delta for an input image, which is combined with this input image to generate a new image within the same category. Besides, an adversarial delta matching loss is designed to link the above two subnetworks together. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method. Our code is available at https://github.com/bcmi/DeltaGAN-Few-Shot-Image-Generation.
abstract_zh: 学习仅基于少量图像为新类别生成新图像（称为少镜头图像生成）已吸引了越来越多的研究兴趣。一些最先进的作品已经取得了令人印象深刻的成果，但多样性仍然有限。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的Delta生成对抗网络（DeltaGAN），它由重建子网络和生成子网络组成。重建子网络捕获相同类别对之间的类别内变换，即增量。生成子网络为输入图像生成特定于样本的增量，该增量与该输入图像组合以生成同一类别内的新图像。此外，还设计了对抗性增量匹配损失来将上述两个子网络连接在一起。对六个基准数据集的广泛实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/bcmi/DeltaGAN-Few-Shot-Image-Generation 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeltaGAN，通过样本特定的delta变换提升少样本图像生成的多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本图像生成方法生成结果多样性不足，难以充分捕捉类别内部变化规律。
AI.method: 构建包含重建子网络（学习类内变换delta）和生成子网络（生成样本特定delta）的DeltaGAN，结合对抗性delta匹配损失实现网络协同训练。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上实验表明，DeltaGAN在生成多样性指标上优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: DeltaGAN通过显式建模样本特定delta变换，有效提升了少样本图像生成的多样性，为相关研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Bo Zhang,Li Niu,Xing Zhao,Liqing Zhang
title: Human-centric Image Cropping with Partition-aware and Content-preserving Features
title_zh: 具有分区感知和内容保留功能的以人为中心的图像裁剪
abstract: Image cropping aims to find visually appealing crops in an image, which is an important yet challenging task. In this paper, we consider a specific and practical application: human-centric image cropping, which focuses on the depiction of a person. To this end, we propose a human-centric image cropping method with two novel feature designs for the candidate crop: partition-aware feature and content-preserving feature. For partition-aware feature, we divide the whole image into nine partitions based on the human bounding box and treat different partitions in a candidate crop differently conditioned on the human information. For content-preserving feature, we predict a heatmap indicating the important content to be included in a good crop, and extract the geometric relation between the heatmap and a candidate crop. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can perform favorably against state-of-the-art image cropping methods on human-centric image cropping task. Code is available at https://github.com/bcmi/Human-Centric-Image-Cropping.
summary: Image cropping aims to find visually appealing crops in an image, which is an important yet challenging task. In this paper, we consider a specific and practical application: human-centric image cropping, which focuses on the depiction of a person. To this end, we propose a human-centric image cropping method with two novel feature designs for the candidate crop: partition-aware feature and content-preserving feature. For partition-aware feature, we divide the whole image into nine partitions based on the human bounding box and treat different partitions in a candidate crop differently conditioned on the human information. For content-preserving feature, we predict a heatmap indicating the important content to be included in a good crop, and extract the geometric relation between the heatmap and a candidate crop. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can perform favorably against state-of-the-art image cropping methods on human-centric image cropping task. Code is available at https://github.com/bcmi/Human-Centric-Image-Cropping.
abstract_zh: 图像裁剪的目的是在图像中找到具有视觉吸引力的裁剪，这是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们考虑一个具体且实际的应用：以人为中心的图像裁剪，其重点是对人的描绘。为此，我们提出了一种以人为中心的图像裁剪方法，该方法对候选裁剪具有两种新颖的特征设计：分区感知特征和内容保留特征。对于分区感知特征，我们根据人体边界框将整个图像分为九个分区，并根据人体信息以不同的方式处理候选作物中的不同分区。对于内容保留特征，我们预测一个热图，该热图指示良好裁剪中要包含的重要内容，并提取热图和候选裁剪之间的几何关系。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在以人为中心的图像裁剪任务中可以比最先进的图像裁剪方法表现得更好。代码可在 https://github.com/bcmi/Human-Centric-Image-Cropping 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种以人类为中心的图像裁剪方法，通过分区感知和内容保留特征优化裁剪结果
AI.motivation: 传统图像裁剪方法未充分考虑人类主体的重要性，需设计特定于人类的特征以提升裁剪效果

search_text: Human-centric Image Cropping with Partition-aware and Content-preserving Features 具有分区感知和内容保留功能的以人为中心的图像裁剪 Image cropping aims to find visually appealing crops in an image, which is an important yet challenging task. In this paper, we consider a specific and practical application: human-centric image cropping, which focuses on the depiction of a person. To this end, we propose a human-centric image cropping method with two novel feature designs for the candidate crop: partition-aware feature and content-preserving feature. For partition-aware feature, we divide the whole image into nine partitions based on the human bounding box and treat different partitions in a candidate crop differently conditioned on the human information. For content-preserving feature, we predict a heatmap indicating the important content to be included in a good crop, and extract the geometric relation between the heatmap and a candidate crop. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can perform favorably against state-of-the-art image cropping methods on human-centric image cropping task. Code is available at https://github.com/bcmi/Human-Centric-Image-Cropping. 图像裁剪的目的是在图像中找到具有视觉吸引力的裁剪，这是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们考虑一个具体且实际的应用：以人为中心的图像裁剪，其重点是对人的描绘。为此，我们提出了一种以人为中心的图像裁剪方法，该方法对候选裁剪具有两种新颖的特征设计：分区感知特征和内容保留特征。对于分区感知特征，我们根据人体边界框将整个图像分为九个分区，并根据人体信息以不同的方式处理候选作物中的不同分区。对于内容保留特征，我们预测一个热图，该热图指示良好裁剪中要包含的重要内容，并提取热图和候选裁剪之间的几何关系。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在以人为中心的图像裁剪任务中可以比最先进的图像裁剪方法表现得更好。代码可在 https://github.com/bcmi/Human-Centric-Image-Cropping 获取。 提出一种以人类为中心的图像裁剪方法，通过分区感知和内容保留特征优化裁剪结果 Bo Zhang,Li Niu,Xing Zhao,Liqing Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Bo Miao,Mohammed Bennamoun,Yongsheng Gao,Ajmal Mian
title: Region Aware Video Object Segmentation with Deep Motion Modeling
title_zh: 通过深度运动建模进行区域感知视频对象分割
abstract: Current semi-supervised video object segmentation (VOS) methods usually leverage the entire features of one frame to predict object masks and update memory. This introduces significant redundant computations. To reduce redundancy, we present a Region Aware Video Object Segmentation (RAVOS) approach that predicts regions of interest (ROIs) for efficient object segmentation and memory storage. RAVOS includes a fast object motion tracker to predict their ROIs in the next frame. For efficient segmentation, object features are extracted according to the ROIs, and an object decoder is designed for object-level segmentation. For efficient memory storage, we propose motion path memory to filter out redundant context by memorizing the features within the motion path of objects between two frames. Besides RAVOS, we also propose a large-scale dataset, dubbed OVOS, to benchmark the performance of VOS models under occlusions. Evaluation on DAVIS and YouTube-VOS benchmarks and our new OVOS dataset show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance with significantly faster inference time, e.g., 86.1 J&F at 42 FPS on DAVIS and 84.4 J&F at 23 FPS on YouTube-VOS.
summary: Current semi-supervised video object segmentation (VOS) methods usually leverage the entire features of one frame to predict object masks and update memory. This introduces significant redundant computations. To reduce redundancy, we present a Region Aware Video Object Segmentation (RAVOS) approach that predicts regions of interest (ROIs) for efficient object segmentation and memory storage. RAVOS includes a fast object motion tracker to predict their ROIs in the next frame. For efficient segmentation, object features are extracted according to the ROIs, and an object decoder is designed for object-level segmentation. For efficient memory storage, we propose motion path memory to filter out redundant context by memorizing the features within the motion path of objects between two frames. Besides RAVOS, we also propose a large-scale dataset, dubbed OVOS, to benchmark the performance of VOS models under occlusions. Evaluation on DAVIS and YouTube-VOS benchmarks and our new OVOS dataset show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance with significantly faster inference time, e.g., 86.1 J&F at 42 FPS on DAVIS and 84.4 J&F at 23 FPS on YouTube-VOS.
abstract_zh: 当前的半监督视频对象分割（VOS）方法通常利用一帧的全部特征来预测对象掩模并更新内存。这引入了显着的冗余计算。为了减少冗余，我们提出了一种区域感知视频对象分割（RAVOS）方法，该方法可以预测感兴趣区域（ROI），以实现高效的对象分割和内存存储。 RAVOS 包括一个快速对象运动跟踪器，用于预测下一帧中的 ROI。为了有效分割，根据 ROI 提取对象特征，并设计对象解码器用于对象级分割。为了高效的内存存储，我们提出运动路径内存通过记住两帧之间对象的运动路径内的特征来过滤掉冗余上下文。除了 RAVOS 之外，我们还提出了一个名为 OVOS 的大规模数据集，用于对遮挡下 VOS 模型的性能进行基准测试。对 DAVIS 和 YouTube-VOS 基准以及我们新的 OVOS 数据集的评估表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能，推理时间显着加快，例如，DAVIS 上 42 FPS 的 86.1 J&F 和 YouTube-VOS 上 23 FPS 的 84.4 J&F。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区域感知和深度运动建模的视频对象分割方法RAVOS，并构建了大规模遮挡数据集OVOS。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督视频分割方法存在特征冗余计算问题，通过全帧特征预测导致效率低下，需提升分割效率并减少内存冗余。
AI.method: 设计快速运动跟踪器预测ROI区域，基于ROI提取对象特征并采用对象级解码器进行分割；提出运动路径内存机制过滤帧间冗余上下文。
AI.result: 在DAVIS基准实现86.1 J&F@42FPS，在YouTube-VOS达84.4 J&F@23FPS，OVOS数据集验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: RAVOS通过区域感知机制和运动路径内存显著提升分割效率，在保持精度的同时实现更优推理速度。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区域感知和深度运动建模的视频对象分割方法RAVOS，并构建了大规模遮挡数据集OVOS。

authors_text: Jeong-gi Kwak,Yuanming Li,Dongsik Yoon,Donghyeon Kim,David Han,Hanseok Ko
title: Injecting 3D Perception of Controllable NeRF-GAN into StyleGAN for Editable Portrait Image Synthesis
title_zh: 将可控 NeRF-GAN 的 3D 感知注入 StyleGAN 以进行可编辑肖像图像合成
abstract: Over the years, 2D GANs have achieved great successes in photorealistic portrait generation. However, they lack 3D understanding in the generation process, thus they suffer from multi-view inconsistency problem. To alleviate the issue, many 3D-aware GANs have been proposed and shown notable results, but 3D GANs struggle with editing semantic attributes. The controllability and interpretability of 3D GANs have not been much explored. In this work, we propose two solutions to overcome these weaknesses of 2D GANs and 3D-aware GANs. We first introduce a novel 3D-aware GAN, SURF-GAN, which is capable of discovering semantic attributes during training and controlling them in an unsupervised manner. After that, we inject the prior of SURF-GAN into StyleGAN to obtain a high-fidelity 3D-controllable generator. Unlike existing latent-based methods allowing implicit pose control, the proposed 3D-controllable StyleGAN enables explicit pose control over portrait generation. This distillation allows direct compatibility between 3D control and many StyleGAN-based techniques (e.g., inversion and stylization), and also brings an advantage in terms of computational resources. Our codes are available at https://github.com/jgkwak95/SURF-GAN.
summary: Over the years, 2D GANs have achieved great successes in photorealistic portrait generation. However, they lack 3D understanding in the generation process, thus they suffer from multi-view inconsistency problem. To alleviate the issue, many 3D-aware GANs have been proposed and shown notable results, but 3D GANs struggle with editing semantic attributes. The controllability and interpretability of 3D GANs have not been much explored. In this work, we propose two solutions to overcome these weaknesses of 2D GANs and 3D-aware GANs. We first introduce a novel 3D-aware GAN, SURF-GAN, which is capable of discovering semantic attributes during training and controlling them in an unsupervised manner. After that, we inject the prior of SURF-GAN into StyleGAN to obtain a high-fidelity 3D-controllable generator. Unlike existing latent-based methods allowing implicit pose control, the proposed 3D-controllable StyleGAN enables explicit pose control over portrait generation. This distillation allows direct compatibility between 3D control and many StyleGAN-based techniques (e.g., inversion and stylization), and also brings an advantage in terms of computational resources. Our codes are available at https://github.com/jgkwak95/SURF-GAN.
abstract_zh: 多年来，2D GAN 在逼真肖像生成方面取得了巨大成功。然而，他们在生成过程中缺乏 3D 理解，因此面临多视图不一致问题。为了缓解这个问题，许多 3D 感知的 GAN 被提出并显示出显着的结果，但 3D GAN 在编辑语义属性方面遇到了困难。 3D GAN 的可控性和可解释性尚未得到太多探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了两种解决方案来克服 2D GAN 和 3D 感知 GAN 的这些弱点。我们首先介绍一种新颖的 3D 感知 GAN，SURF-GAN，它能够在训练过程中发现语义属性并以无监督的方式控制它们。之后，我们将SURF-GAN的先验注入StyleGAN以获得高保真3D可控生成器。与允许隐式姿势控制的现有基于潜在的方法不同，所提出的 3D 可控 StyleGAN 可以对肖像生成进行显式姿势控制。这种蒸馏允许 3D 控制和许多基于 StyleGAN 的技术（例如反转和风格化）之间的直接兼容性，并且还带来了计算资源方面的优势。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/jgkwak95/SURF-GAN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将可控制的3D感知模型SURF-GAN与StyleGAN结合，解决传统2D/3D GAN在人像生成中的多视角不一致与语义编辑难题，实现高保真可编辑的3D可控人像合成。
AI.motivation: 传统2D GAN缺乏3D理解导致多视角不一致，现有3D GAN难以实现语义编辑，亟需提升生成器的3D可控性与编辑能力。
AI.method: 设计SURF-GAN实现无监督语义属性发现与控制，并将其先验知识注入StyleGAN，构建显式姿态控制的3D可控生成器，兼容StyleGAN的逆向映射与风格化技术。
AI.result: 生成器在保持高保真度的同时实现显式姿态控制，多视角一致性显著提升，计算资源消耗低于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合3D感知与StyleGAN优势，有效解决了语义可控性与生成质量的矛盾，为可编辑人像合成提供了新思路。

The controllability and interpretability of 3D GANs have not been much explored. In this work, we propose two solutions to overcome these weaknesses of 2D GANs and 3D-aware GANs. We first introduce a novel 3D-aware GAN, SURF-GAN, which is capable of discovering semantic attributes during training and controlling them in an unsupervised manner. After that, we inject the prior of SURF-GAN into StyleGAN to obtain a high-fidelity 3D-controllable generator. Unlike existing latent-based methods allowing implicit pose control, the proposed 3D-controllable StyleGAN enables explicit pose control over portrait generation. This distillation allows direct compatibility between 3D control and many StyleGAN-based techniques (e.g., inversion and stylization), and also brings an advantage in terms of computational resources. Our codes are available at https://github.com/jgkwak95/SURF-GAN. 多年来，2D GAN 在逼真肖像生成方面取得了巨大成功。然而，他们在生成过程中缺乏 3D 理解，因此面临多视图不一致问题。为了缓解这个问题，许多 3D 感知的 GAN 被提出并显示出显着的结果，但 3D GAN 在编辑语义属性方面遇到了困难。 3D GAN 的可控性和可解释性尚未得到太多探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了两种解决方案来克服 2D GAN 和 3D 感知 GAN 的这些弱点。我们首先介绍一种新颖的 3D 感知 GAN，SURF-GAN，它能够在训练过程中发现语义属性并以无监督的方式控制它们。之后，我们将SURF-GAN的先验注入StyleGAN以获得高保真3D可控生成器。与允许隐式姿势控制的现有基于潜在的方法不同，所提出的 3D 可控 StyleGAN 可以对肖像生成进行显式姿势控制。这种蒸馏允许 3D 控制和许多基于 StyleGAN 的技术（例如反转和风格化）之间的直接兼容性，并且还带来了计算资源方面的优势。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/jgkwak95/SURF-GAN 获取。 本文提出将可控制的3D感知模型SURF-GAN与StyleGAN结合，解决传统2D/3D GAN在人像生成中的多视角不一致与语义编辑难题，实现高保真可编辑的3D可控人像合成。 Jeong-gi Kwak,Yuanming Li,Dongsik Yoon,Donghyeon Kim,David Han,Hanseok Ko cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Dajian Zhong,Shujing Lyu,Palaiahnakote Shivakumara,Bing Yin,Jiajia Wu,Umapada Pal,Yue Lu
title: SGBANet: Semantic GAN and Balanced Attention Network for Arbitrarily Oriented Scene Text Recognition
title_zh: SGBANet：用于任意方向场景文本识别的语义 GAN 和平衡注意力网络
abstract: Scene text recognition is a challenging task due to the complex backgrounds and diverse variations of text instances. In this paper, we propose a novel Semantic GAN and Balanced Attention Network (SGBANet) to recognize the texts in scene images. The proposed method first generates the simple semantic feature using Semantic GAN and then recognizes the scene text with the Balanced Attention Module. The Semantic GAN aims to align the semantic feature distribution between the support domain and target domain. Different from the conventional image-to-image translation methods that perform at the image level, the Semantic GAN performs the generation and discrimination on the semantic level with the Semantic Generator Module (SGM) and Semantic Discriminator Module (SDM). For target images (scene text images), the Semantic Generator Module generates simple semantic features that share the same feature distribution with support images (clear text images). The Semantic Discriminator Module is used to distinguish the semantic features between the support domain and target domain. In addition, a Balanced Attention Module is designed to alleviate the problem of attention drift. The Balanced Attention Module first learns a balancing parameter based on the visual glimpse vector and semantic glimpse vector, and then performs the balancing operation for obtaining a balanced glimpse vector. Experiments on six benchmarks, including regular datasets, i.e., IIIT5K, SVT, ICDAR2013, and irregular datasets, i.e., ICDAR2015, SVTP, CUTE80, validate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: Scene text recognition is a challenging task due to the complex backgrounds and diverse variations of text instances. In this paper, we propose a novel Semantic GAN and Balanced Attention Network (SGBANet) to recognize the texts in scene images. The proposed method first generates the simple semantic feature using Semantic GAN and then recognizes the scene text with the Balanced Attention Module. The Semantic GAN aims to align the semantic feature distribution between the support domain and target domain. Different from the conventional image-to-image translation methods that perform at the image level, the Semantic GAN performs the generation and discrimination on the semantic level with the Semantic Generator Module (SGM) and Semantic Discriminator Module (SDM). For target images (scene text images), the Semantic Generator Module generates simple semantic features that share the same feature distribution with support images (clear text images). The Semantic Discriminator Module is used to distinguish the semantic features between the support domain and target domain. In addition, a Balanced Attention Module is designed to alleviate the problem of attention drift. The Balanced Attention Module first learns a balancing parameter based on the visual glimpse vector and semantic glimpse vector, and then performs the balancing operation for obtaining a balanced glimpse vector. Experiments on six benchmarks, including regular datasets, i.e., IIIT5K, SVT, ICDAR2013, and irregular datasets, i.e., ICDAR2015, SVTP, CUTE80, validate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 由于复杂的背景和文本实例的多样化变化，场景文本识别是一项具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的语义 GAN 和平衡注意力网络（SGBANet）来识别场景图像中的文本。该方法首先使用语义 GAN 生成简单的语义特征，然后使用平衡注意力模块识别场景文本。语义 GAN 旨在对齐支持域和目标域之间的语义特征分布。与在图像级别执行的传统图像到图像翻译方法不同，语义GAN通过语义生成器模块（SGM）和语义判别器模块（SDM）在语义级别上执行生成和判别。对于目标图像（场景文本图像），语义生成器模块生成简单的语义特征，这些特征与支持图像（明文图像）共享相同的特征分布。语义鉴别器模块用于区分支​​持域和目标域之间的语义特征。此外，平衡注意力模块旨在缓解注意力漂移问题。平衡注意力模块首先基于视觉一瞥向量和语义一瞥向量学习平衡参数，然后执行平衡操作以获得平衡一瞥向量。在六个基准上的实验，包括常规数据集，即 IIIT5K、SVT、ICDAR2013 和不规则数据集，即 ICDAR2015、SVTP、CUTE80，验证了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SGBANet网络，用于解决复杂背景下任意方向场景文本识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在跨域文本识别中存在语义特征分布差异大、注意力漂移等问题，影响识别准确率。
AI.method: 结合语义生成对抗网络（Semantic GAN）与平衡注意力模块（Balanced Attention Module），通过语义级特征对齐和注意力平衡机制提升识别效果。
AI.result: 在IIIT5K、ICDAR2015等6个基准数据集上验证，相比现有方法显著提升识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: SGBANet通过语义特征对齐和注意力平衡机制，有效解决了场景文本识别中的域差异和注意力漂移问题。

authors_text: Ali Borji,Sikun Lin
title: SplitMixer: Fat Trimmed From MLP-like Models
title_zh: SplitMixer：从类 MLP 模型中剔除脂肪
abstract: We present SplitMixer, a simple and lightweight isotropic MLP-like architecture, for visual recognition. It contains two types of interleaving convolutional operations to mix information across spatial locations (spatial mixing) and channels (channel mixing). The first one includes sequentially applying two depthwise 1D kernels, instead of a 2D kernel, to mix spatial information. The second one is splitting the channels into overlapping or non-overlapping segments, with or without shared parameters, and applying our proposed channel mixing approaches or 3D convolution to mix channel information. Depending on design choices, a number of SplitMixer variants can be constructed to balance accuracy, the number of parameters, and speed. We show, both theoretically and experimentally, that SplitMixer performs on par with the state-of-the-art MLP-like models while having a significantly lower number of parameters and FLOPS. For example, without strong data augmentation and optimization, SplitMixer achieves around 94% accuracy on CIFAR-10 with only 0.28M parameters, while ConvMixer achieves the same accuracy with about 0.6M parameters. The well-known MLP-Mixer achieves 85.45% with 17.1M parameters. On CIFAR-100 dataset, SplitMixer achieves around 73% accuracy, on par with ConvMixer, but with about 52% fewer parameters and FLOPS. We hope that our results spark further research towards finding more efficient vision architectures and facilitate the development of MLP-like models. Code is available at https://github.com/aliborji/splitmixer.
summary: We present SplitMixer, a simple and lightweight isotropic MLP-like architecture, for visual recognition. It contains two types of interleaving convolutional operations to mix information across spatial locations (spatial mixing) and channels (channel mixing). The first one includes sequentially applying two depthwise 1D kernels, instead of a 2D kernel, to mix spatial information. The second one is splitting the channels into overlapping or non-overlapping segments, with or without shared parameters, and applying our proposed channel mixing approaches or 3D convolution to mix channel information. Depending on design choices, a number of SplitMixer variants can be constructed to balance accuracy, the number of parameters, and speed. We show, both theoretically and experimentally, that SplitMixer performs on par with the state-of-the-art MLP-like models while having a significantly lower number of parameters and FLOPS. For example, without strong data augmentation and optimization, SplitMixer achieves around 94% accuracy on CIFAR-10 with only 0.28M parameters, while ConvMixer achieves the same accuracy with about 0.6M parameters. The well-known MLP-Mixer achieves 85.45% with 17.1M parameters. On CIFAR-100 dataset, SplitMixer achieves around 73% accuracy, on par with ConvMixer, but with about 52% fewer parameters and FLOPS. We hope that our results spark further research towards finding more efficient vision architectures and facilitate the development of MLP-like models. Code is available at https://github.com/aliborji/splitmixer.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 SplitMixer，一种简单且轻量级的各向同性 MLP 式架构，用于视觉识别。它包含两种类型的交织卷积运算，用于跨空间位置（空间混合）和通道（通道混合）混合信息。第一个包括顺序应用两个深度方向的 1D 内核（而不是 2D 内核）来混合空间信息。第二个是将通道分割成重叠或不重叠的片段，有或没有共享参数，并应用我们提出的通道混合方法或 3D 卷积来混合通道信息。根据设计选择，可以构建许多 SplitMixer 变体来平衡精度、参数数量和速度。我们从理论上和实验上证明，SplitMixer 的性能与最先进的 MLP 类模型相当，同时参数数量和 FLOPS 显着减少。例如，在没有强大的数据增强和优化的情况下，SplitMixer 仅使用 0.28M 参数就在 CIFAR-10 上实现了约 94% 的精度，而 ConvMixer 使用约 0.6M 参数实现了相同的精度。著名的 MLP-Mixer 在 1710 万个参数下达到了 85.45%。在 CIFAR-100 数据集上，SplitMixer 的准确率约为 73%，与 ConvMixer 相当，但参数和 FLOPS 减少了约 52%。我们希望我们的结果能够激发进一步的研究，以寻找更高效的视觉架构，并促进类 MLP 模型的开发。代码可在 https://github.com/aliborji/splitmixer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SplitMixer，一种轻量级的MLP-like视觉识别架构，通过空间和通道混合操作提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有MLP-like模型参数量大、计算成本高，需设计更高效的架构以平衡精度与效率。
AI.method: 采用交错卷积操作：用两个深度可分离1D卷核替代2D卷核实现空间混合，通过分段通道（带/不带共享参数）结合3D卷积实现通道混合，构建多种变体。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上以0.28M参数达94%准确率（ConvMixer需0.6M），CIFAR-100上参数和FLOPS减少52%仍保持同等精度。
AI.conclusion: SplitMixer验证了轻量化MLP-like模型的可行性，为高效视觉架构研究提供新方向。

Code is available at https://github.com/aliborji/splitmixer. 我们提出了 SplitMixer，一种简单且轻量级的各向同性 MLP 式架构，用于视觉识别。它包含两种类型的交织卷积运算，用于跨空间位置（空间混合）和通道（通道混合）混合信息。第一个包括顺序应用两个深度方向的 1D 内核（而不是 2D 内核）来混合空间信息。第二个是将通道分割成重叠或不重叠的片段，有或没有共享参数，并应用我们提出的通道混合方法或 3D 卷积来混合通道信息。根据设计选择，可以构建许多 SplitMixer 变体来平衡精度、参数数量和速度。我们从理论上和实验上证明，SplitMixer 的性能与最先进的 MLP 类模型相当，同时参数数量和 FLOPS 显着减少。例如，在没有强大的数据增强和优化的情况下，SplitMixer 仅使用 0.28M 参数就在 CIFAR-10 上实现了约 94% 的精度，而 ConvMixer 使用约 0.6M 参数实现了相同的精度。著名的 MLP-Mixer 在 1710 万个参数下达到了 85.45%。在 CIFAR-100 数据集上，SplitMixer 的准确率约为 73%，与 ConvMixer 相当，但参数和 FLOPS 减少了约 52%。我们希望我们的结果能够激发进一步的研究，以寻找更高效的视觉架构，并促进类 MLP 模型的开发。代码可在 https://github.com/aliborji/splitmixer 获取。 本文提出SplitMixer，一种轻量级的MLP-like视觉识别架构，通过空间和通道混合操作提升效率。 Ali Borji,Sikun Lin cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Samuel C. Gutekunst,Billy Jin,David P. Williamson
title: The Two-Stripe Symmetric Circulant TSP is in P
title_zh: 两带对称循环 TSP 位于 P 中
comment: 72 pages, 26 figures. A preliminary version appeared in IPCO 2022
comments: 72 pages, 26 figures. A preliminary version appeared in IPCO 2022
abstract: The symmetric circulant TSP is a special case of the traveling salesman problem in which edge costs are symmetric and obey circulant symmetry. Despite the substantial symmetry of the input, remarkably little is known about the symmetric circulant TSP, and the complexity of the problem has been an often-cited open question. Considerable effort has been made to understand the case in which only edges of two lengths are allowed to have finite cost: the two-stripe symmetric circulant TSP. In this paper, we resolve the complexity of the two-stripe symmetric circulant TSP. To do so, we reduce two-stripe symmetric circulant TSP to the problem of finding certain minimum-cost Hamiltonian paths on cylindrical graphs. We then solve this Hamiltonian path problem. Our results show that the two-stripe symmetric circulant TSP is in P. Note that a two-stripe symmetric circulant TSP instance consists of a constant number of inputs (including $n$, the number of cities), so that a polynomial-time algorithm for the decision problem must run in time polylogarithmic in $n$, and a polynomial-time algorithm for the optimization problem cannot output the tour. We address this latter difficulty by showing that the optimal tour must fall into one of two parameterized classes of tours, and that we can output the class and the parameters in polynomial time. Thus we make a substantial contribution to the set of polynomial-time solvable special cases of the TSP, and take an important step towards resolving the complexity of the general symmetric circulant TSP.

Note that a two-stripe symmetric circulant TSP instance consists of a constant number of inputs (including $n$, the number of cities), so that a polynomial-time algorithm for the decision problem must run in time polylogarithmic in $n$, and a polynomial-time algorithm for the optimization problem cannot output the tour. We address this latter difficulty by showing that the optimal tour must fall into one of two parameterized classes of tours, and that we can output the class and the parameters in polynomial time. abstract_zh: 对称循环 TSP 是旅行商问题的一个特例，其中边成本是对称的并服从循环对称。尽管输入基本上是对称的，但人们对对称循环 TSP 知之甚少，而且问题的复杂性一直是一个经常被引用的开放性问题。为了理解仅允许两个长度的边具有有限成本的情况，我们付出了相当大的努力：双条对称循环 TSP。在本文中，我们解决了双条对称循环 TSP 的复杂性。为此，我们将两带对称循环 TSP 简化为在圆柱图上找到某些最小成本哈密顿路径的问题。然后我们解决这个哈密顿路径问题。我们的结果表明，两带对称循环 TSP 位于 P 中。请注意，两带对称循环 TSP 实例由恒定数量的输入组成（包括 $n$，城市数量），因此决策问题的多项式时间算法必须在 $n$ 中的多对数时间上运行，而优化问题的多项式时间算法无法输出路径。我们通过证明最佳游览必须属于两个参数化游览类别之一来解决后一个困难，并且我们可以在多项式时间内输出类别和参数。因此，我们对 TSP 的多项式时间可解特例集做出了重大贡献，并朝着解决一般对称循环 TSP 的复杂性迈出了重要的一步。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了两带对称循环TSP问题属于P类，通过将其转化为圆柱图上的最小费用哈密顿路径问题并解决该问题。
AI.motivation: 对称循环TSP的复杂性长期未解，而两带情况作为特殊子问题，其复杂性是重要的开放性问题，需探索其多项式时间解法。
AI.method: 将两带对称循环TSP问题约简为圆柱图上的最小费用哈密顿路径问题，并通过参数化分类解决输出难题。
AI.result: 证明两带对称循环TSP属于P类，决策问题可在对数多项式时间内解决，优化问题可通过参数化类输出最优路径。
AI.conclusion: 本文扩展了多项式时间可解的TSP特殊情形，为一般对称循环TSP的复杂性研究提供了关键进展。

authors_text: Aakash Varma Nadimpalli,Ajita Rattani
title: GBDF: Gender Balanced DeepFake Dataset Towards Fair DeepFake Detection
title_zh: GBDF：性别平衡的 DeepFake 数据集，实现公平的 DeepFake 检测
comment: 26th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2022| Montreal, Canada
comments: 26th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2022| Montreal, Canada
abstract: Facial forgery by deepfakes has raised severe societal concerns. Several solutions have been proposed by the vision community to effectively combat the misinformation on the internet via automated deepfake detection systems. Recent studies have demonstrated that facial analysis-based deep learning models can discriminate based on protected attributes. For the commercial adoption and massive roll-out of the deepfake detection technology, it is vital to evaluate and understand the fairness (the absence of any prejudice or favoritism) of deepfake detectors across demographic variations such as gender and race. As the performance differential of deepfake detectors between demographic subgroups would impact millions of people of the deprived sub-group. This paper aims to evaluate the fairness of the deepfake detectors across males and females. However, existing deepfake datasets are not annotated with demographic labels to facilitate fairness analysis. To this aim, we manually annotated existing popular deepfake datasets with gender labels and evaluated the performance differential of current deepfake detectors across gender. Our analysis on the gender-labeled version of the datasets suggests (a) current deepfake datasets have skewed distribution across gender, and (b) commonly adopted deepfake detectors obtain unequal performance across gender with mostly males outperforming females. Finally, we contributed a gender-balanced and annotated deepfake dataset, GBDF, to mitigate the performance differential and to promote research and development towards fairness-aware deep fake detectors. The GBDF dataset is publicly available at: https://github.com/aakash4305/GBDF
summary: Facial forgery by deepfakes has raised severe societal concerns. Several solutions have been proposed by the vision community to effectively combat the misinformation on the internet via automated deepfake detection systems. Recent studies have demonstrated that facial analysis-based deep learning models can discriminate based on protected attributes. For the commercial adoption and massive roll-out of the deepfake detection technology, it is vital to evaluate and understand the fairness (the absence of any prejudice or favoritism) of deepfake detectors across demographic variations such as gender and race. As the performance differential of deepfake detectors between demographic subgroups would impact millions of people of the deprived sub-group. This paper aims to evaluate the fairness of the deepfake detectors across males and females. However, existing deepfake datasets are not annotated with demographic labels to facilitate fairness analysis. To this aim, we manually annotated existing popular deepfake datasets with gender labels and evaluated the performance differential of current deepfake detectors across gender. Our analysis on the gender-labeled version of the datasets suggests (a) current deepfake datasets have skewed distribution across gender, and (b) commonly adopted deepfake detectors obtain unequal performance across gender with mostly males outperforming females. Finally, we contributed a gender-balanced and annotated deepfake dataset, GBDF, to mitigate the performance differential and to promote research and development towards fairness-aware deep fake detectors. The GBDF dataset is publicly available at: https://github.com/aakash4305/GBDF
abstract_zh: 深度造假的面部伪造引起了严重的社会关注。视觉社区提出了几种解决方案，通过自动深度伪造检测系统有效打击互联网上的错误信息。最近的研究表明，基于面部分析的深度学习模型可以根据受保护的属性进行区分。对于深度换脸检测技术的商业采用和大规模推广，评估和理解深度换脸检测器在性别和种族等人口变化中的公平性（不存在任何偏见或偏袒）至关重要。由于深度伪造探测器在不同人口群体之间的性能差异将影响数百万贫困群体。本文旨在评估 Deepfake 检测器在男性和女性中的公平性。然而，现有的深度伪造数据集没有用人口统计标签来注释以方便公平性分析。为此，我们用性别标签手动注释了现有的流行 Deepfake 数据集，并评估了当前 Deepfake 检测器跨性别的性能差异。我们对数据集的性别标记版本的分析表明（a）当前的 Deepfake 数据集在性别之间分布存在偏差，以及（b）普遍采用的 Deepfake 检测器在性别之间获得了不平等的性能，其中大多数男性优于女性。最后，我们贡献了一个性别平衡且带注释的深度伪造数据集 GBDF，以减轻性能差异并促进对公平感知深度伪造检测器的研究和开发。 GBDF 数据集可公开获取：https://github.com/aakash4305/GBDF

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估深度伪造检测器在性别上的公平性，并构建性别平衡的深度伪造数据集GBDF以促进公平检测技术的发展。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造数据集缺乏人口统计标签，导致检测器在不同性别群体间存在性能差异，可能加剧社会偏见。为推动公平检测技术的商业化应用，需解决这一问题。
AI.method: 手动标注主流深度伪造数据集的性别标签，分析检测器在性别维度上的性能差异，并构建性别均衡的GBDF数据集。
AI.result: 发现现有数据集性别分布失衡，主流检测器对男性表现优于女性；GBDF数据集有效缓解了这一性能差异。
AI.conclusion: GBDF数据集为公平性导向的深度伪造检测研究提供了基础，有助于减少检测技术中的性别偏见。

Our analysis on the gender-labeled version of the datasets suggests (a) current deepfake datasets have skewed distribution across gender, and (b) commonly adopted deepfake detectors obtain unequal performance across gender with mostly males outperforming females. Finally, we contributed a gender-balanced and annotated deepfake dataset, GBDF, to mitigate the performance differential and to promote research and development towards fairness-aware deep fake detectors. The GBDF dataset is publicly available at: https://github.com/aakash4305/GBDF 深度造假的面部伪造引起了严重的社会关注。视觉社区提出了几种解决方案，通过自动深度伪造检测系统有效打击互联网上的错误信息。最近的研究表明，基于面部分析的深度学习模型可以根据受保护的属性进行区分。对于深度换脸检测技术的商业采用和大规模推广，评估和理解深度换脸检测器在性别和种族等人口变化中的公平性（不存在任何偏见或偏袒）至关重要。由于深度伪造探测器在不同人口群体之间的性能差异将影响数百万贫困群体。本文旨在评估 Deepfake 检测器在男性和女性中的公平性。然而，现有的深度伪造数据集没有用人口统计标签来注释以方便公平性分析。为此，我们用性别标签手动注释了现有的流行 Deepfake 数据集，并评估了当前 Deepfake 检测器跨性别的性能差异。我们对数据集的性别标记版本的分析表明（a）当前的 Deepfake 数据集在性别之间分布存在偏差，以及（b）普遍采用的 Deepfake 检测器在性别之间获得了不平等的性能，其中大多数男性优于女性。最后，我们贡献了一个性别平衡且带注释的深度伪造数据集 GBDF，以减轻性能差异并促进对公平感知深度伪造检测器的研究和开发。 GBDF 数据集可公开获取：https://github.com/aakash4305/GBDF 本文旨在评估深度伪造检测器在性别上的公平性，并构建性别平衡的深度伪造数据集GBDF以促进公平检测技术的发展。 Aakash Varma Nadimpalli,Ajita Rattani cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Oskar van der Wal,Jaap Jumelet,Katrin Schulz,Willem Zuidema
title: The Birth of Bias: A case study on the evolution of gender bias in an English language model
title_zh: 偏见的诞生：英语语言模型中性别偏见演变的案例研究
comment: Accepted at the 4th Workshop on Gender Bias in Natural Language Processing (NAACL, 2022)
comments: Accepted at the 4th Workshop on Gender Bias in Natural Language Processing (NAACL, 2022)
abstract: Detecting and mitigating harmful biases in modern language models are widely recognized as crucial, open problems. In this paper, we take a step back and investigate how language models come to be biased in the first place. We use a relatively small language model, using the LSTM architecture trained on an English Wikipedia corpus. With full access to the data and to the model parameters as they change during every step while training, we can map in detail how the representation of gender develops, what patterns in the dataset drive this, and how the model's internal state relates to the bias in a downstream task (semantic textual similarity). We find that the representation of gender is dynamic and identify different phases during training. Furthermore, we show that gender information is represented increasingly locally in the input embeddings of the model and that, as a consequence, debiasing these can be effective in reducing the downstream bias. Monitoring the training dynamics, allows us to detect an asymmetry in how the female and male gender are represented in the input embeddings. This is important, as it may cause naive mitigation strategies to introduce new undesirable biases. We discuss the relevance of the findings for mitigation strategies more generally and the prospects of generalizing our methods to larger language models, the Transformer architecture, other languages and other undesirable biases.
summary: Detecting and mitigating harmful biases in modern language models are widely recognized as crucial, open problems. In this paper, we take a step back and investigate how language models come to be biased in the first place. We use a relatively small language model, using the LSTM architecture trained on an English Wikipedia corpus. With full access to the data and to the model parameters as they change during every step while training, we can map in detail how the representation of gender develops, what patterns in the dataset drive this, and how the model's internal state relates to the bias in a downstream task (semantic textual similarity). We find that the representation of gender is dynamic and identify different phases during training. Furthermore, we show that gender information is represented increasingly locally in the input embeddings of the model and that, as a consequence, debiasing these can be effective in reducing the downstream bias. Monitoring the training dynamics, allows us to detect an asymmetry in how the female and male gender are represented in the input embeddings. This is important, as it may cause naive mitigation strategies to introduce new undesirable biases. We discuss the relevance of the findings for mitigation strategies more generally and the prospects of generalizing our methods to larger language models, the Transformer architecture, other languages and other undesirable biases.
abstract_zh: 检测和减轻现代语言模型中的有害偏见被广泛认为是至关重要的开放性问题。在本文中，我们退后一步，首先研究语言模型是如何产生偏见的。我们使用相对较小的语言模型，使用在英语维基百科语料库上训练的 LSTM 架构。通过完全访问数据和模型参数（当它们在训练时的每个步骤中发生变化），我们可以详细映射性别表示如何发展、数据集中的哪些模式驱动这一点，以及模型的内部状态与下游任务中的偏差（语义文本相似性）如何相关。我们发现性别的表征是动态的，并且在训练过程中确定不同的阶段。此外，我们表明，性别信息在模型的输入嵌入中越来越本地化，因此，消除这些信息可以有效减少下游偏差。监控训练动态使我们能够检测输入嵌入中女性和男性性别表现的不对称性。这很重要，因为它可能会导致幼稚的缓解策略引入新的不良偏差。我们更广泛地讨论了研究结果与缓解策略的相关性，以及将我们的方法推广到更大的语言模型、Transformer 架构、其他语言和其他不良偏差的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析小型LSTM语言模型的训练过程，研究性别偏见在语言模型中的形成机制，并探讨去偏策略的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管检测和缓解语言模型中的有害偏见已被广泛认为是重要问题，但偏见最初如何形成仍缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 使用LSTM架构在英文维基百科语料上训练模型，全程追踪参数变化，分析性别表征动态过程及输入嵌入中的偏见模式。
AI.result: 发现性别表征存在动态阶段，偏见信息逐渐局部化于输入嵌入，且女性与男性表征存在不对称性，直接影响下游任务的偏见程度。
AI.conclusion: 监控训练动态可有效识别偏见根源，局部嵌入去偏策略可行，但需警惕简单方法引入新偏见，研究方法可扩展至更大模型和其他偏见类型。

authors_text: George Z. Li,Dung Nguyen,Anil Vullikanti
title: Differentially Private Partial Set Cover with Applications to Facility Location
title_zh: 差分隐私部分集覆盖及其在设施位置上的应用
comment: 11 pages, 2 figures. Full version of IJCAI 2023 publication
comments: 11 pages, 2 figures. Full version of IJCAI 2023 publication
abstract: It was observed in \citet{gupta2009differentially} that the Set Cover problem has strong impossibility results under differential privacy. In our work, we observe that these hardness results dissolve when we turn to the Partial Set Cover problem, where we only need to cover a $ρ$-fraction of the elements in the universe, for some $ρ\in(0,1)$. We show that this relaxation enables us to avoid the impossibility results: under loose conditions on the input set system, we give differentially private algorithms which output an explicit set cover with non-trivial approximation guarantees. In particular, this is the first differentially private algorithm which outputs an explicit set cover. Using our algorithm for Partial Set Cover as a subroutine, we give a differentially private (bicriteria) approximation algorithm for a facility location problem which generalizes $k$-center/$k$-supplier with outliers. Like with the Set Cover problem, no algorithm has been able to give non-trivial guarantees for $k$-center/$k$-supplier-type facility location problems due to the high sensitivity and impossibility results. Our algorithm shows that relaxing the covering requirement to serving only a $ρ$-fraction of the population, for $ρ\in(0,1)$, enables us to circumvent the inherent hardness. Overall, our work is an important step in tackling and understanding impossibility results in private combinatorial optimization.
summary: It was observed in \citet{gupta2009differentially} that the Set Cover problem has strong impossibility results under differential privacy. In our work, we observe that these hardness results dissolve when we turn to the Partial Set Cover problem, where we only need to cover a $ρ$-fraction of the elements in the universe, for some $ρ\in(0,1)$. We show that this relaxation enables us to avoid the impossibility results: under loose conditions on the input set system, we give differentially private algorithms which output an explicit set cover with non-trivial approximation guarantees. In particular, this is the first differentially private algorithm which outputs an explicit set cover. Using our algorithm for Partial Set Cover as a subroutine, we give a differentially private (bicriteria) approximation algorithm for a facility location problem which generalizes $k$-center/$k$-supplier with outliers. Like with the Set Cover problem, no algorithm has been able to give non-trivial guarantees for $k$-center/$k$-supplier-type facility location problems due to the high sensitivity and impossibility results. Our algorithm shows that relaxing the covering requirement to serving only a $ρ$-fraction of the population, for $ρ\in(0,1)$, enables us to circumvent the inherent hardness. Overall, our work is an important step in tackling and understanding impossibility results in private combinatorial optimization.
abstract_zh: 在 \citet{gupta2009 Differentially} 中观察到，集合覆盖问题在差分隐私下具有很强的不可能性结果。在我们的工作中，我们观察到，当我们转向部分集覆盖问题时，这些硬度结果就会消失，其中我们只需要覆盖宇宙中元素的 $ρ$ 部分，对于某些 $ρ\in(0,1)$ 。我们证明，这种松弛使我们能够避免不可能的结果：在输入集系统的宽松条件下，我们给出了差分私有算法，该算法输出具有非平凡近似保证的显式集覆盖。特别是，这是第一个输出显式集合覆盖的差分隐私算法。使用我们的部分集覆盖算法作为子例程，我们给出了针对设施位置问题的差分私有（bicriteria）近似算法，该算法概括了具有异常值的 $k$-center/$k$-supplier。与 Set Cover 问题一样，由于高敏感性和不可能的结果，没有算法能够为 $k$-center/$k$-supplier-type 设施位置问题提供重要的保证。我们的算法表明，对于 $ρ\in(0,1)$，放宽覆盖要求以仅服务人口的 $ρ$ 部分，使我们能够规避固有的困难。总的来说，我们的工作是解决和理解私人组合优化中不可能结果的重要一步。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在差分隐私框架下解决部分集合覆盖问题，并将其应用于设施选址问题，突破传统集合覆盖问题的不可行性结果。
AI.motivation: 传统集合覆盖问题在差分隐私下存在强不可行性结果，而部分集合覆盖通过仅覆盖元素的ρ-分数（ρ∈(0,1)）可能规避这一限制，从而为隐私保护下的组合优化提供新思路。
AI.method: 设计差分隐私算法解决部分集合覆盖问题，在输入集系统满足宽松条件时输出显式集合覆盖方案，并基于该算法构建设施选址问题的双标准近似算法。
AI.result: 首次提出差分隐私下的显式集合覆盖算法，实现非平凡近似保证；并为广义k-center/k-supplier问题（含异常值）提供差分隐私近似解法。
AI.conclusion: 通过放松覆盖要求至ρ-分数，可绕过差分隐私的固有困难，为隐私保护组合优化问题提供重要理论突破与实用算法框架。
