Like with the Set Cover problem, no algorithm has been able to give non-trivial guarantees for $k$-center/$k$-supplier-type facility location problems due to the high sensitivity and impossibility results. Our algorithm shows that relaxing the covering requirement to serving only a $ρ$-fraction of the population, for $ρ\in(0,1)$, enables us to circumvent the inherent hardness. Overall, our work is an important step in tackling and understanding impossibility results in private combinatorial optimization. 在 \citet{gupta2009 Differentially} 中观察到，集合覆盖问题在差分隐私下具有很强的不可能性结果。在我们的工作中，我们观察到，当我们转向部分集覆盖问题时，这些硬度结果就会消失，其中我们只需要覆盖宇宙中元素的 $ρ$ 部分，对于某些 $ρ\in(0,1)$ 。我们证明，这种松弛使我们能够避免不可能的结果：在输入集系统的宽松条件下，我们给出了差分私有算法，该算法输出具有非平凡近似保证的显式集覆盖。特别是，这是第一个输出显式集合覆盖的差分隐私算法。使用我们的部分集覆盖算法作为子例程，我们给出了针对设施位置问题的差分私有（bicriteria）近似算法，该算法概括了具有异常值的 $k$-center/$k$-supplier。与 Set Cover 问题一样，由于高敏感性和不可能的结果，没有算法能够为 $k$-center/$k$-supplier-type 设施位置问题提供重要的保证。我们的算法表明，对于 $ρ\in(0,1)$，放宽覆盖要求以仅服务人口的 $ρ$ 部分，使我们能够规避固有的困难。总的来说，我们的工作是解决和理解私人组合优化中不可能结果的重要一步。 本文研究在差分隐私框架下解决部分集合覆盖问题，并将其应用于设施选址问题，突破传统集合覆盖问题的不可行性结果。 George Z. Li,Dung Nguyen,Anil Vullikanti cs.DS,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Chien-Yu Lin,Anish Prabhu,Thomas Merth,Sachin Mehta,Anurag Ranjan,Maxwell Horton,Mohammad Rastegari
title: SPIN: An Empirical Evaluation on Sharing Parameters of Isotropic Networks
title_zh: SPIN：各向同性网络共享参数的实证评估
abstract: Recent isotropic networks, such as ConvMixer and vision transformers, have found significant success across visual recognition tasks, matching or outperforming non-isotropic convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Isotropic architectures are particularly well-suited to cross-layer weight sharing, an effective neural network compression technique. In this paper, we perform an empirical evaluation on methods for sharing parameters in isotropic networks (SPIN). We present a framework to formalize major weight sharing design decisions and perform a comprehensive empirical evaluation of this design space. Guided by our experimental results, we propose a weight sharing strategy to generate a family of models with better overall efficiency, in terms of FLOPs and parameters versus accuracy, compared to traditional scaling methods alone, for example compressing ConvMixer by 1.9x while improving accuracy on ImageNet. Finally, we perform a qualitative study to further understand the behavior of weight sharing in isotropic architectures. The code is available at https://github.com/apple/ml-spin.
summary: Recent isotropic networks, such as ConvMixer and vision transformers, have found significant success across visual recognition tasks, matching or outperforming non-isotropic convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Isotropic architectures are particularly well-suited to cross-layer weight sharing, an effective neural network compression technique. In this paper, we perform an empirical evaluation on methods for sharing parameters in isotropic networks (SPIN). We present a framework to formalize major weight sharing design decisions and perform a comprehensive empirical evaluation of this design space. Guided by our experimental results, we propose a weight sharing strategy to generate a family of models with better overall efficiency, in terms of FLOPs and parameters versus accuracy, compared to traditional scaling methods alone, for example compressing ConvMixer by 1.9x while improving accuracy on ImageNet. Finally, we perform a qualitative study to further understand the behavior of weight sharing in isotropic architectures. The code is available at https://github.com/apple/ml-spin.
abstract_zh: 最近的各向同性网络，例如 ConvMixer 和视觉 Transformer，在视觉识别任务中取得了巨大成功，匹配或优于非各向同性卷积神经网络 (CNN)。各向同性架构特别适合跨层权重共享，这是一种有效的神经网络压缩技术。在本文中，我们对各向同性网络（SPIN）中共享参数的方法进行了实证评估。我们提出了一个框架来形式化主要权重共享设计决策，并对这个设计空间进行全面的实证评估。在我们的实验结果的指导下，我们提出了一种权重共享策略，以生成一系列模型，与单独的传统缩放方法相比，在 FLOP 和参数与精度方面具有更好的整体效率，例如将 ConvMixer 压缩 1.9 倍，同时提高 ImageNet 上的精度。最后，我们进行定性研究，以进一步了解各向同性架构中权重共享的行为。该代码可在 https://github.com/apple/ml-spin 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文对各向同性网络（如ConvMixer和视觉Transformer）中的参数共享方法进行实证评估，提出了一种提高模型效率的策略。
AI.motivation: 各向同性网络在视觉任务中表现优异，但参数共享作为压缩技术的潜力尚未被充分探索，需通过系统评估优化其设计。
AI.method: 构建框架形式化权重共享设计决策，全面评估设计空间，并基于实验结果提出一种改进的权重共享策略。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，该策略将ConvMixer压缩1.9倍的同时提升准确率，并通过定性分析揭示了权重共享的行为机制。
AI.conclusion: 提出的权重共享策略在计算量、参数量与精度的平衡上优于传统缩放方法，为各向同性网络的高效设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Wei Sun,Mei Wang,Lili Qiu
title: Spatial Aware Multi-Task Learning Based Speech Separation
title_zh: 基于空间感知多任务学习的语音分离
abstract: During the Covid, online meetings have become an indispensable part of our lives. This trend is likely to continue due to their convenience and broad reach. However, background noise from other family members, roommates, office-mates not only degrades the voice quality but also raises serious privacy issues. In this paper, we develop a novel system, called Spatial Aware Multi-task learning-based Separation (SAMS), to extract audio signals from the target user during teleconferencing. Our solution consists of three novel components: (i) generating fine-grained location embeddings from the user's voice and inaudible tracking sound, which contains the user's position and rich multipath information, (ii) developing a source separation neural network using multi-task learning to jointly optimize source separation and location, and (iii) significantly speeding up inference to provide a real-time guarantee. Our testbed experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach
summary: During the Covid, online meetings have become an indispensable part of our lives. This trend is likely to continue due to their convenience and broad reach. However, background noise from other family members, roommates, office-mates not only degrades the voice quality but also raises serious privacy issues. In this paper, we develop a novel system, called Spatial Aware Multi-task learning-based Separation (SAMS), to extract audio signals from the target user during teleconferencing. Our solution consists of three novel components: (i) generating fine-grained location embeddings from the user's voice and inaudible tracking sound, which contains the user's position and rich multipath information, (ii) developing a source separation neural network using multi-task learning to jointly optimize source separation and location, and (iii) significantly speeding up inference to provide a real-time guarantee. Our testbed experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach
abstract_zh: 疫情期间，在线会议已经成为我们生活中不可或缺的一部分。由于其便利性和广泛的覆盖范围，这种趋势可能会持续下去。然而，来自其他家庭成员、室友、办公室同事的背景噪音不仅会降低语音质量，还会引发严重的隐私问题。在本文中，我们开发了一种新颖的系统，称为空间感知多任务基于学习的分离（SAMS），用于在电话会议期间从目标用户提取音频信号。我们的解决方案由三个新颖的组件组成：（i）从用户的语音和听不见的跟踪声音生成细粒度的位置嵌入，其中包含用户的位置和丰富的多路径信息，（ii）使用多任务学习开发源分离神经网络以联合优化源分离和定位，以及（iii）显着加快推理速度以提供实时保证。我们的测试台实验证明了我们方法的有效性

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于空间感知多任务学习的语音分离系统SAMS，用于在视频会议中提取目标用户的音频信号。
AI.motivation: 疫情期间在线会议普及导致背景噪声和隐私问题凸显，需有效分离目标语音以提升通话质量和隐私保护。
AI.method: 通过生成细粒度位置嵌入、多任务神经网络联合优化分离与定位、加速推理实现实时性三个创新模块构建SAMS系统。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在语音分离任务中的有效性，能够显著提升目标语音提取性能。
AI.conclusion: SAMS系统通过空间感知与多任务学习有效解决了会议场景下的语音分离难题，实现了实时性保障。

authors_text: Yaqian Liang,Shanshan Zhao,Baosheng Yu,Jing Zhang,Fazhi He
title: MeshMAE: Masked Autoencoders for 3D Mesh Data Analysis
title_zh: MeshMAE：用于 3D 网格数据分析的屏蔽自动编码器
abstract: Recently, self-supervised pre-training has advanced Vision Transformers on various tasks w.r.t. different data modalities, e.g., image and 3D point cloud data. In this paper, we explore this learning paradigm for 3D mesh data analysis based on Transformers. Since applying Transformer architectures to new modalities is usually non-trivial, we first adapt Vision Transformer to 3D mesh data processing, i.e., Mesh Transformer. In specific, we divide a mesh into several non-overlapping local patches with each containing the same number of faces and use the 3D position of each patch's center point to form positional embeddings. Inspired by MAE, we explore how pre-training on 3D mesh data with the Transformer-based structure benefits downstream 3D mesh analysis tasks. We first randomly mask some patches of the mesh and feed the corrupted mesh into Mesh Transformers. Then, through reconstructing the information of masked patches, the network is capable of learning discriminative representations for mesh data. Therefore, we name our method MeshMAE, which can yield state-of-the-art or comparable performance on mesh analysis tasks, i.e., classification and segmentation. In addition, we also conduct comprehensive ablation studies to show the effectiveness of key designs in our method.
summary: Recently, self-supervised pre-training has advanced Vision Transformers on various tasks w.r.t. different data modalities, e.g., image and 3D point cloud data. In this paper, we explore this learning paradigm for 3D mesh data analysis based on Transformers. Since applying Transformer architectures to new modalities is usually non-trivial, we first adapt Vision Transformer to 3D mesh data processing, i.e., Mesh Transformer. In specific, we divide a mesh into several non-overlapping local patches with each containing the same number of faces and use the 3D position of each patch's center point to form positional embeddings. Inspired by MAE, we explore how pre-training on 3D mesh data with the Transformer-based structure benefits downstream 3D mesh analysis tasks. We first randomly mask some patches of the mesh and feed the corrupted mesh into Mesh Transformers. Then, through reconstructing the information of masked patches, the network is capable of learning discriminative representations for mesh data. Therefore, we name our method MeshMAE, which can yield state-of-the-art or comparable performance on mesh analysis tasks, i.e., classification and segmentation. In addition, we also conduct comprehensive ablation studies to show the effectiveness of key designs in our method.
abstract_zh: 最近，自监督预训练使 Vision Transformers 在各种任务上取得了进步。不同的数据模式，例如图像和 3D 点云数据。在本文中，我们探索了这种基于 Transformer 的 3D 网格数据分析学习范例。由于将 Transformer 架构应用于新模式通常并不简单，因此我们首先将 Vision Transformer 应用于 3D 网格数据处理，即 Mesh Transformer。具体来说，我们将网格划分为几个不重叠的局部补丁，每个补丁包含相同数量的面，并使用每个补丁中心点的 3D 位置来形成位置嵌入。受 MAE 的启发，我们探索了基于 Transformer 的结构对 3D 网格数据进行预训练如何有利于下游 3D 网格分析任务。我们首先随机屏蔽网格的一些补丁，并将损坏的网格输入到网格变压器中。然后，通过重建屏蔽补丁的信息，网络能够学习网格数据的判别表示。因此，我们将我们的方法命名为 MeshMAE，它可以在网格分析任务（即分类和分割）上产生最先进的或可比的性能。此外，我们还进行了全面的消融研究，以展示我们方法中关键设计的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MeshMAE方法，基于Transformer架构利用掩码自编码器对3D网格数据进行自监督预训练，以提升下游网格分析任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督预训练在图像和点云等数据模态上取得成功，但针对复杂结构的3D网格数据仍缺乏有效的Transformer模型和预训练方法。
AI.method: 将Vision Transformer适配为Mesh Transformer，通过划分网格局部块并生成位置嵌入，结合掩码策略训练模型重建被遮蔽的网格块，形成MeshMAE框架。
AI.result: 在网格分类和分割任务中达到或超越现有SOTA方法性能，消融实验证明了关键设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MeshMAE验证了基于Transformer的掩码自编码器在3D网格分析中的有效性，为该领域提供了新的预训练范式和实现方案。

search_text: MeshMAE: Masked Autoencoders for 3D Mesh Data Analysis MeshMAE：用于 3D 网格数据分析的屏蔽自动编码器 Recently, self-supervised pre-training has advanced Vision Transformers on various tasks w.r.t. different data modalities, e.g., image and 3D point cloud data. In this paper, we explore this learning paradigm for 3D mesh data analysis based on Transformers. Since applying Transformer architectures to new modalities is usually non-trivial, we first adapt Vision Transformer to 3D mesh data processing, i.e., Mesh Transformer. In specific, we divide a mesh into several non-overlapping local patches with each containing the same number of faces and use the 3D position of each patch's center point to form positional embeddings. Inspired by MAE, we explore how pre-training on 3D mesh data with the Transformer-based structure benefits downstream 3D mesh analysis tasks. We first randomly mask some patches of the mesh and feed the corrupted mesh into Mesh Transformers. Then, through reconstructing the information of masked patches, the network is capable of learning discriminative representations for mesh data. Therefore, we name our method MeshMAE, which can yield state-of-the-art or comparable performance on mesh analysis tasks, i.e., classification and segmentation. In addition, we also conduct comprehensive ablation studies to show the effectiveness of key designs in our method. 最近，自监督预训练使 Vision Transformers 在各种任务上取得了进步。不同的数据模式，例如图像和 3D 点云数据。在本文中，我们探索了这种基于 Transformer 的 3D 网格数据分析学习范例。由于将 Transformer 架构应用于新模式通常并不简单，因此我们首先将 Vision Transformer 应用于 3D 网格数据处理，即 Mesh Transformer。具体来说，我们将网格划分为几个不重叠的局部补丁，每个补丁包含相同数量的面，并使用每个补丁中心点的 3D 位置来形成位置嵌入。受 MAE 的启发，我们探索了基于 Transformer 的结构对 3D 网格数据进行预训练如何有利于下游 3D 网格分析任务。我们首先随机屏蔽网格的一些补丁，并将损坏的网格输入到网格变压器中。然后，通过重建屏蔽补丁的信息，网络能够学习网格数据的判别表示。因此，我们将我们的方法命名为 MeshMAE，它可以在网格分析任务（即分类和分割）上产生最先进的或可比的性能。此外，我们还进行了全面的消融研究，以展示我们方法中关键设计的有效性。 本文提出MeshMAE方法，基于Transformer架构利用掩码自编码器对3D网格数据进行自监督预训练，以提升下游网格分析任务的性能。 Yaqian Liang,Shanshan Zhao,Baosheng Yu,Jing Zhang,Fazhi He cs.CV

authors_text: Elijah Cole,Kimberly Wilber,Grant Van Horn,Xuan Yang,Marco Fornoni,Pietro Perona,Serge Belongie,Andrew Howard,Oisin Mac Aodha
title: On Label Granularity and Object Localization
title_zh: 关于标签粒度和对象定位
abstract: Weakly supervised object localization (WSOL) aims to learn representations that encode object location using only image-level category labels. However, many objects can be labeled at different levels of granularity. Is it an animal, a bird, or a great horned owl? Which image-level labels should we use? In this paper we study the role of label granularity in WSOL. To facilitate this investigation we introduce iNatLoc500, a new large-scale fine-grained benchmark dataset for WSOL. Surprisingly, we find that choosing the right training label granularity provides a much larger performance boost than choosing the best WSOL algorithm. We also show that changing the label granularity can significantly improve data efficiency.
summary: Weakly supervised object localization (WSOL) aims to learn representations that encode object location using only image-level category labels. However, many objects can be labeled at different levels of granularity. Is it an animal, a bird, or a great horned owl? Which image-level labels should we use? In this paper we study the role of label granularity in WSOL. To facilitate this investigation we introduce iNatLoc500, a new large-scale fine-grained benchmark dataset for WSOL. Surprisingly, we find that choosing the right training label granularity provides a much larger performance boost than choosing the best WSOL algorithm. We also show that changing the label granularity can significantly improve data efficiency.
abstract_zh: 弱监督对象定位（WSOL）旨在学习仅使用图像级类别标签对对象位置进行编码的表示。然而，许多对象可以以不同的粒度级别进行标记。它是动物、鸟还是大角鸮？我们应该使用哪些图像级标签？在本文中，我们研究了标签粒度在 WSOL 中的作用。为了促进这项调查，我们引入了 iNatLoc500，这是一个新的 WSOL 大规模细粒度基准数据集。令人惊讶的是，我们发现选择正确的训练标签粒度比选择最佳 WSOL 算法能提供更大的性能提升。我们还表明，改变标签粒度可以显着提高数据效率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究弱监督目标定位（WSOL）中标签粒度的影响，并引入新的细粒度基准数据集iNatLoc500。
AI.motivation: 现有WSOL方法可能未充分挖掘标签粒度对模型性能的影响，而不同粒度标签（如'动物'/'鸟'/'角鸮'）可能对定位效果产生显著差异。
AI.method: 构建iNatLoc500数据集，通过对比实验分析不同标签粒度对WSOL模型性能和数据效率的影响。
AI.result: 选择合适粒度的标签比选用最佳WSOL算法更能提升性能，且粒度调整可显著提高数据效率。
AI.conclusion: 标签粒度是WSOL任务中的关键因素，优化粒度选择比单纯改进算法更有效。

authors_text: Amir Weiss,Toros Arikan,Gregory W. Wornell
title: Direct Localization in Underwater Acoustics via Convolutional Neural Networks: A Data-Driven Approach
title_zh: 通过卷积神经网络直接定位水下声学：数据驱动的方法
abstract: Direct localization (DLOC) methods, which use the observed data to localize a source at an unknown position in a one-step procedure, generally outperform their indirect two-step counterparts (e.g., using time-difference of arrivals). However, underwater acoustic DLOC methods require prior knowledge of the environment, and are computationally costly, hence slow. We propose, what is to the best of our knowledge, the first data-driven DLOC method. Inspired by classical and contemporary optimal model-based DLOC solutions, and leveraging the capabilities of convolutional neural networks (CNNs), we devise a holistic CNN-based solution. Our method includes a specifically-tailored input structure, architecture, loss function, and a progressive training procedure, which are of independent interest in the broader context of machine learning. We demonstrate that our method outperforms attractive alternatives, and asymptotically matches the performance of an oracle optimal model-based solution.
summary: Direct localization (DLOC) methods, which use the observed data to localize a source at an unknown position in a one-step procedure, generally outperform their indirect two-step counterparts (e.g., using time-difference of arrivals). However, underwater acoustic DLOC methods require prior knowledge of the environment, and are computationally costly, hence slow. We propose, what is to the best of our knowledge, the first data-driven DLOC method. Inspired by classical and contemporary optimal model-based DLOC solutions, and leveraging the capabilities of convolutional neural networks (CNNs), we devise a holistic CNN-based solution. Our method includes a specifically-tailored input structure, architecture, loss function, and a progressive training procedure, which are of independent interest in the broader context of machine learning. We demonstrate that our method outperforms attractive alternatives, and asymptotically matches the performance of an oracle optimal model-based solution.
abstract_zh: 直接定位（DLOC）方法使用观测数据在一步程序中将源定位在未知位置，通常优于间接两步方法（例如，使用到达时间差）。然而，水声 DLOC 方法需要事先了解环境，并且计算成本高，因此速度慢。据我们所知，我们提出了第一个数据驱动的 DLOC 方法。受到经典和当代基于最优模型的 DLOC 解决方案的启发，并利用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的功能，我们设计了一个基于 CNN 的整体解决方案。我们的方法包括专门定制的输入结构、架构、损失函数和渐进式训练程序，这些在更广泛的机器学习背景下具有独立的意义。我们证明我们的方法优于有吸引力的替代方案，并且渐近匹配基于预言机最优模型的解决方案的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的数据驱动方法，用于水声环境中的直接源定位（DLOC），无需依赖环境先验知识。
AI.motivation: 现有水声DLOC方法依赖环境先验知识且计算成本高，导致效率低下，亟需一种无需环境信息且高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计CNN架构，包含定制输入结构、专用损失函数及渐进训练策略，融合经典模型方法与数据驱动特性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法性能优于现有替代方案，并渐近接近最优模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在机器学习领域具有独立价值，为水声定位提供了高效的数据驱动范式。

authors_text: James Hong,Haotian Zhang,Michaël Gharbi,Matthew Fisher,Kayvon Fatahalian
title: Spotting Temporally Precise, Fine-Grained Events in Video
title_zh: 发现视频中时间上精确、细粒度的事件
abstract: We introduce the task of spotting temporally precise, fine-grained events in video (detecting the precise moment in time events occur). Precise spotting requires models to reason globally about the full-time scale of actions and locally to identify subtle frame-to-frame appearance and motion differences that identify events during these actions. Surprisingly, we find that top performing solutions to prior video understanding tasks such as action detection and segmentation do not simultaneously meet both requirements. In response, we propose E2E-Spot, a compact, end-to-end model that performs well on the precise spotting task and can be trained quickly on a single GPU. We demonstrate that E2E-Spot significantly outperforms recent baselines adapted from the video action detection, segmentation, and spotting literature to the precise spotting task. Finally, we contribute new annotations and splits to several fine-grained sports action datasets to make these datasets suitable for future work on precise spotting.
summary: We introduce the task of spotting temporally precise, fine-grained events in video (detecting the precise moment in time events occur). Precise spotting requires models to reason globally about the full-time scale of actions and locally to identify subtle frame-to-frame appearance and motion differences that identify events during these actions. Surprisingly, we find that top performing solutions to prior video understanding tasks such as action detection and segmentation do not simultaneously meet both requirements. In response, we propose E2E-Spot, a compact, end-to-end model that performs well on the precise spotting task and can be trained quickly on a single GPU. We demonstrate that E2E-Spot significantly outperforms recent baselines adapted from the video action detection, segmentation, and spotting literature to the precise spotting task. Finally, we contribute new annotations and splits to several fine-grained sports action datasets to make these datasets suitable for future work on precise spotting.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了在视频中发现时间精确、细粒度事件的任务（检测事件发生的精确时刻）。精确定位需要模型对动作的全时规模进行全局推理，并在本地识别细微的帧与帧外观和运动差异，从而识别这些动作期间的事件。令人惊讶的是，我们发现先前视频理解任务（例如动作检测和分割）的最佳性能解决方案并不能同时满足这两个要求。为此，我们提出了 E2E-Spot，这是一种紧凑的端到端模型，在精确定位任务上表现良好，并且可以在单个 GPU 上快速训练。我们证明，E2E-Spot 显着优于从视频动作检测、分割和定位文献改编到精确定位任务的最新基线。最后，我们为几个细粒度的运动动作数据集提供了新的注释和分割，使这些数据集适合未来的精确定位工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在视频中检测精确时间点的细粒度事件的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解任务的解决方案无法同时满足全局时间推理和局部细微差异识别的需求，亟需更高效的模型。
AI.method: 提出E2E-Spot模型，一种紧凑的端到端架构，能在单GPU上快速训练，同时兼顾全局时间推理和局部帧差异分析。
AI.result: E2E-Spot在精确事件定位任务上显著优于现有方法，并为多个数据集提供了新的标注和划分。
AI.conclusion: E2E-Spot有效解决了精确事件定位问题，推动了细粒度视频分析的发展。

search_text: Spotting Temporally Precise, Fine-Grained Events in Video 发现视频中时间上精确、细粒度的事件 We introduce the task of spotting temporally precise, fine-grained events in video (detecting the precise moment in time events occur). Precise spotting requires models to reason globally about the full-time scale of actions and locally to identify subtle frame-to-frame appearance and motion differences that identify events during these actions. Surprisingly, we find that top performing solutions to prior video understanding tasks such as action detection and segmentation do not simultaneously meet both requirements. In response, we propose E2E-Spot, a compact, end-to-end model that performs well on the precise spotting task and can be trained quickly on a single GPU. We demonstrate that E2E-Spot significantly outperforms recent baselines adapted from the video action detection, segmentation, and spotting literature to the precise spotting task. Finally, we contribute new annotations and splits to several fine-grained sports action datasets to make these datasets suitable for future work on precise spotting. 我们介绍了在视频中发现时间精确、细粒度事件的任务（检测事件发生的精确时刻）。精确定位需要模型对动作的全时规模进行全局推理，并在本地识别细微的帧与帧外观和运动差异，从而识别这些动作期间的事件。令人惊讶的是，我们发现先前视频理解任务（例如动作检测和分割）的最佳性能解决方案并不能同时满足这两个要求。为此，我们提出了 E2E-Spot，这是一种紧凑的端到端模型，在精确定位任务上表现良好，并且可以在单个 GPU 上快速训练。我们证明，E2E-Spot 显着优于从视频动作检测、分割和定位文献改编到精确定位任务的最新基线。最后，我们为几个细粒度的运动动作数据集提供了新的注释和分割，使这些数据集适合未来的精确定位工作。 本文提出了一种在视频中检测精确时间点的细粒度事件的方法。 James Hong,Haotian Zhang,Michaël Gharbi,Matthew Fisher,Kayvon Fatahalian cs.CV

authors_text: Fatima Albreiki,Sultan Abughazal,Jean Lahoud,Rao Anwer,Hisham Cholakkal,Fahad Khan
title: On the Robustness of 3D Object Detectors
title_zh: 3D 物体检测器的鲁棒性
abstract: In recent years, significant progress has been achieved for 3D object detection on point clouds thanks to the advances in 3D data collection and deep learning techniques. Nevertheless, 3D scenes exhibit a lot of variations and are prone to sensor inaccuracies as well as information loss during pre-processing. Thus, it is crucial to design techniques that are robust against these variations. This requires a detailed analysis and understanding of the effect of such variations. This work aims to analyze and benchmark popular point-based 3D object detectors against several data corruptions. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to investigate the robustness of point-based 3D object detectors. To this end, we design and evaluate corruptions that involve data addition, reduction, and alteration. We further study the robustness of different modules against local and global variations. Our experimental results reveal several intriguing findings. For instance, we show that methods that integrate Transformers at a patch or object level lead to increased robustness, compared to using Transformers at the point level.
summary: In recent years, significant progress has been achieved for 3D object detection on point clouds thanks to the advances in 3D data collection and deep learning techniques. Nevertheless, 3D scenes exhibit a lot of variations and are prone to sensor inaccuracies as well as information loss during pre-processing. Thus, it is crucial to design techniques that are robust against these variations. This requires a detailed analysis and understanding of the effect of such variations. This work aims to analyze and benchmark popular point-based 3D object detectors against several data corruptions. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to investigate the robustness of point-based 3D object detectors. To this end, we design and evaluate corruptions that involve data addition, reduction, and alteration. We further study the robustness of different modules against local and global variations. Our experimental results reveal several intriguing findings. For instance, we show that methods that integrate Transformers at a patch or object level lead to increased robustness, compared to using Transformers at the point level.
abstract_zh: 近年来，由于 3D 数据收集和深度学习技术的进步，点云上的 3D 物体检测取得了重大进展。然而，3D 场景表现出很多变化，并且在预处理过程中容易出现传感器不准确以及信息丢失的情况。因此，设计能够抵抗这些变化的技术至关重要。这需要对此类变化的影响进行详细分析和理解。这项工作旨在针对多种数据损坏对流行的基于点的 3D 对象检测器进行分析和基准测试。据我们所知，我们是第一个研究基于点的 3D 物体检测器的鲁棒性的人。为此，我们设计和评估涉及数据添加、减少和更改的损坏。我们进一步研究不同模块针对局部和全局变化的鲁棒性。我们的实验结果揭示了一些有趣的发现。例如，我们表明，与在点级别使用 Transformer 相比，在补丁或对象级别集成 Transformer 的方法可以提高鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文分析并评估了基于点云的3D目标检测器在多种数据损坏情况下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 3D场景存在传感器误差和预处理信息丢失问题，现有检测器对此类变化的鲁棒性尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 设计数据添加、减少和改变等损坏类型，评估不同模块对局部/全局变化的鲁棒性，并对比Transformer不同应用层级的效果。
AI.result: 发现对象级/patch级Transformer显著提升鲁棒性，点级Transformer效果较差，不同模块对损坏的敏感性存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 首次系统分析点云检测器鲁棒性，证明Transformer层级设计对稳定性有关键影响，为模型改进提供方向。

authors_text: Lingfeng Wang,Haocheng Li,Chunyin Liu
title: Hybrid CNN-Transformer Model For Facial Affect Recognition In the ABAW4 Challenge
title_zh: ABAW4 挑战赛中用于面部表情识别的混合 CNN-Transformer 模型
abstract: This paper describes our submission to the fourth Affective Behavior Analysis (ABAW) competition. We proposed a hybrid CNN-Transformer model for the Multi-Task-Learning (MTL) and Learning from Synthetic Data (LSD) task. Experimental results on validation dataset shows that our method achieves better performance than baseline model, which verifies that the effectiveness of proposed network.
summary: This paper describes our submission to the fourth Affective Behavior Analysis (ABAW) competition. We proposed a hybrid CNN-Transformer model for the Multi-Task-Learning (MTL) and Learning from Synthetic Data (LSD) task. Experimental results on validation dataset shows that our method achieves better performance than baseline model, which verifies that the effectiveness of proposed network.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们向第四届情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛提交的作品。我们提出了一种用于多任务学习 (MTL) 和合成数据学习 (LSD) 任务的混合 CNN-Transformer 模型。验证数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法比基线模型取得了更好的性能，这验证了所提出网络的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文主要任务是在ABAW4挑战赛中提出一种混合CNN-Transformer模型用于面部情感识别。
AI.motivation: 为了解决多任务学习和从合成数据中学习的挑战，提升面部情感识别的准确性。
AI.method: 设计融合卷积神经网络（CNN）与Transformer架构的混合模型，应用于多任务学习（MTL）和合成数据学习（LSD）任务。
AI.result: 在验证数据集上优于基线模型，验证了所提网络的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 混合CNN-Transformer模型在面部情感识别的多任务与合成数据学习场景中具有显著优势。

authors_text: Aarash Feizi,Arantxa Casanova,Adriana Romero-Soriano,Reihaneh Rabbany
title: Revisiting Hotels-50K and Hotel-ID
title_zh: 重访 Hotels-50K 和 Hotel-ID
abstract: In this paper, we propose revisited versions for two recent hotel recognition datasets: Hotels50K and Hotel-ID. The revisited versions provide evaluation setups with different levels of difficulty to better align with the intended real-world application, i.e. countering human trafficking. Real-world scenarios involve hotels and locations that are not captured in the current data sets, therefore it is important to consider evaluation settings where classes are truly unseen. We test this setup using multiple state-of-the-art image retrieval models and show that as expected, the models' performances decrease as the evaluation gets closer to the real-world unseen settings. The rankings of the best performing models also change across the different evaluation settings, which further motivates using the proposed revisited datasets.
summary: In this paper, we propose revisited versions for two recent hotel recognition datasets: Hotels50K and Hotel-ID. The revisited versions provide evaluation setups with different levels of difficulty to better align with the intended real-world application, i.e. countering human trafficking. Real-world scenarios involve hotels and locations that are not captured in the current data sets, therefore it is important to consider evaluation settings where classes are truly unseen. We test this setup using multiple state-of-the-art image retrieval models and show that as expected, the models' performances decrease as the evaluation gets closer to the real-world unseen settings. The rankings of the best performing models also change across the different evaluation settings, which further motivates using the proposed revisited datasets.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了两个最新酒店识别数据集的重新审视版本：Hotels50K 和 Hotel-ID。重新审视的版本提供了不同难度级别的评估设置，以更好地符合预期的现实应用，即打击人口贩运。现实世界的场景涉及当前数据集中未捕获的酒店和位置，因此，考虑真正看不到类别的评估设置非常重要。我们使用多个最先进的图像检索模型来测试此设置，并表明，正如预期的那样，随着评估越来越接近现实世界中不可见的设置，模型的性能会下降。表现最佳模型的排名也会随着不同的评估设置而变化，这进一步激励了使用建议的重新访问的数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两个酒店识别数据集的修订版，提供不同难度的评估设置以更贴近打击人口贩卖的实际应用场景。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的酒店和地点未被现有数据集覆盖，需评估模型在真正未见过类别下的性能，以更贴近实际应用需求。
AI.method: 通过构建不同难度的评估设置，并使用多种先进的图像检索模型进行测试，评估模型在不同场景下的性能变化。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，随着评估设置更接近现实场景，模型性能下降，且不同设置下最佳模型排名变化，验证了修订数据集的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 修订后的数据集能有效评估模型在真实场景中的表现，为打击人口贩卖等实际应用提供更可靠的评估基准。

search_text: Revisiting Hotels-50K and Hotel-ID 重访 Hotels-50K 和 Hotel-ID In this paper, we propose revisited versions for two recent hotel recognition datasets: Hotels50K and Hotel-ID. The revisited versions provide evaluation setups with different levels of difficulty to better align with the intended real-world application, i.e. countering human trafficking. Real-world scenarios involve hotels and locations that are not captured in the current data sets, therefore it is important to consider evaluation settings where classes are truly unseen. We test this setup using multiple state-of-the-art image retrieval models and show that as expected, the models' performances decrease as the evaluation gets closer to the real-world unseen settings. The rankings of the best performing models also change across the different evaluation settings, which further motivates using the proposed revisited datasets. 在本文中，我们提出了两个最新酒店识别数据集的重新审视版本：Hotels50K 和 Hotel-ID。重新审视的版本提供了不同难度级别的评估设置，以更好地符合预期的现实应用，即打击人口贩运。现实世界的场景涉及当前数据集中未捕获的酒店和位置，因此，考虑真正看不到类别的评估设置非常重要。我们使用多个最先进的图像检索模型来测试此设置，并表明，正如预期的那样，随着评估越来越接近现实世界中不可见的设置，模型的性能会下降。表现最佳模型的排名也会随着不同的评估设置而变化，这进一步激励了使用建议的重新访问的数据集。 本文提出了两个酒店识别数据集的修订版，提供不同难度的评估设置以更贴近打击人口贩卖的实际应用场景。 Aarash Feizi,Arantxa Casanova,Adriana Romero-Soriano,Reihaneh Rabbany cs.CV,cs.DB

authors_text: Jiseok Youn,Jaehun Song,Hyung-Sin Kim,Saewoong Bahk
title: Bitwidth-Adaptive Quantization-Aware Neural Network Training: A Meta-Learning Approach
title_zh: 位宽自适应量化感知神经网络训练：一种元学习方法
comment: 14 pages (except references), 2 figures, to appear in ECCV 2022
comments: 14 pages (except references), 2 figures, to appear in ECCV 2022
abstract: Deep neural network quantization with adaptive bitwidths has gained increasing attention due to the ease of model deployment on various platforms with different resource budgets. In this paper, we propose a meta-learning approach to achieve this goal. Specifically, we propose MEBQAT, a simple yet effective way of bitwidth-adaptive quantization aware training (QAT) where meta-learning is effectively combined with QAT by redefining meta-learning tasks to incorporate bitwidths. After being deployed on a platform, MEBQAT allows the (meta-)trained model to be quantized to any candidate bitwidth then helps to conduct inference without much accuracy drop from quantization. Moreover, with a few-shot learning scenario, MEBQAT can also adapt a model to any bitwidth as well as any unseen target classes by adding conventional optimization or metric-based meta-learning. We design variants of MEBQAT to support both (1) a bitwidth-adaptive quantization scenario and (2) a new few-shot learning scenario where both quantization bitwidths and target classes are jointly adapted. We experimentally demonstrate their validity in multiple QAT schemes. By comparing their performance to (bitwidth-dedicated) QAT, existing bitwidth adaptive QAT and vanilla meta-learning, we find that merging bitwidths into meta-learning tasks achieves a higher level of robustness.
summary: Deep neural network quantization with adaptive bitwidths has gained increasing attention due to the ease of model deployment on various platforms with different resource budgets. In this paper, we propose a meta-learning approach to achieve this goal. Specifically, we propose MEBQAT, a simple yet effective way of bitwidth-adaptive quantization aware training (QAT) where meta-learning is effectively combined with QAT by redefining meta-learning tasks to incorporate bitwidths. After being deployed on a platform, MEBQAT allows the (meta-)trained model to be quantized to any candidate bitwidth then helps to conduct inference without much accuracy drop from quantization. Moreover, with a few-shot learning scenario, MEBQAT can also adapt a model to any bitwidth as well as any unseen target classes by adding conventional optimization or metric-based meta-learning. We design variants of MEBQAT to support both (1) a bitwidth-adaptive quantization scenario and (2) a new few-shot learning scenario where both quantization bitwidths and target classes are jointly adapted. We experimentally demonstrate their validity in multiple QAT schemes. By comparing their performance to (bitwidth-dedicated) QAT, existing bitwidth adaptive QAT and vanilla meta-learning, we find that merging bitwidths into meta-learning tasks achieves a higher level of robustness.
abstract_zh: 由于可以轻松地在具有不同资源预算的各种平台上部署模型，因此具有自适应位宽的深度神经网络量化受到越来越多的关注。在本文中，我们提出了一种元学习方法来实现这一目标。具体来说，我们提出了 MEBQAT，这是一种简单而有效的位宽自适应量化感知训练（QAT）方法，其中通过重新定义元学习任务以合并位宽，将元学习与 QAT 有效结合。在平台上部署后，MEBQAT 允许将（元）训练模型量化为任何候选位宽，然后帮助进行推理，而不会因量化而导致精度下降太多。此外，通过少量学习场景，MEBQAT 还可以通过添加传统优化或基于度量的元学习，使模型适应任何位宽以及任何未见过的目标类别。我们设计了 MEBQAT 的变体来支持（1）位宽自适应量化场景和（2）新的小样本学习场景，其中量化位宽和目标类别共同适应。我们通过实验证明了它们在多种 QAT 方案中的有效性。通过将它们的性能与（位宽专用）QAT、现有的位宽自适应 QAT 和普通元学习进行比较，我们发现将位宽合并到元学习任务中可以实现更高水平的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元学习的位宽自适应量化感知训练方法MEBQAT，实现神经网络在不同位宽下的高效部署。
AI.motivation: 传统量化方法需为每个位宽单独训练模型，灵活性差且资源消耗大，难以适配不同硬件平台的资源预算。
AI.method: 通过将位宽纳入元学习任务定义，设计MEBQAT框架，结合量化感知训练与元学习，在部署后可快速适配任意候选位宽并保持精度，支持少量样本学习和新类别适应。
AI.result: 实验表明MEBQAT在多种量化方案中优于现有位宽自适应QAT和传统元学习方法，展现出更高的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 将位宽整合进元学习任务能显著提升模型对量化位宽变化的适应能力，为跨平台部署提供有效解决方案。

search_text: Bitwidth-Adaptive Quantization-Aware Neural Network Training: A Meta-Learning Approach 位宽自适应量化感知神经网络训练：一种元学习方法 Deep neural network quantization with adaptive bitwidths has gained increasing attention due to the ease of model deployment on various platforms with different resource budgets. In this paper, we propose a meta-learning approach to achieve this goal. Specifically, we propose MEBQAT, a simple yet effective way of bitwidth-adaptive quantization aware training (QAT) where meta-learning is effectively combined with QAT by redefining meta-learning tasks to incorporate bitwidths. After being deployed on a platform, MEBQAT allows the (meta-)trained model to be quantized to any candidate bitwidth then helps to conduct inference without much accuracy drop from quantization. Moreover, with a few-shot learning scenario, MEBQAT can also adapt a model to any bitwidth as well as any unseen target classes by adding conventional optimization or metric-based meta-learning. We design variants of MEBQAT to support both (1) a bitwidth-adaptive quantization scenario and (2) a new few-shot learning scenario where both quantization bitwidths and target classes are jointly adapted. We experimentally demonstrate their validity in multiple QAT schemes. By comparing their performance to (bitwidth-dedicated) QAT, existing bitwidth adaptive QAT and vanilla meta-learning, we find that merging bitwidths into meta-learning tasks achieves a higher level of robustness. 由于可以轻松地在具有不同资源预算的各种平台上部署模型，因此具有自适应位宽的深度神经网络量化受到越来越多的关注。在本文中，我们提出了一种元学习方法来实现这一目标。具体来说，我们提出了 MEBQAT，这是一种简单而有效的位宽自适应量化感知训练（QAT）方法，其中通过重新定义元学习任务以合并位宽，将元学习与 QAT 有效结合。在平台上部署后，MEBQAT 允许将（元）训练模型量化为任何候选位宽，然后帮助进行推理，而不会因量化而导致精度下降太多。此外，通过少量学习场景，MEBQAT 还可以通过添加传统优化或基于度量的元学习，使模型适应任何位宽以及任何未见过的目标类别。我们设计了 MEBQAT 的变体来支持（1）位宽自适应量化场景和（2）新的小样本学习场景，其中量化位宽和目标类别共同适应。我们通过实验证明了它们在多种 QAT 方案中的有效性。通过将它们的性能与（位宽专用）QAT、现有的位宽自适应 QAT 和普通元学习进行比较，我们发现将位宽合并到元学习任务中可以实现更高水平的鲁棒性。 本文提出一种基于元学习的位宽自适应量化感知训练方法MEBQAT，实现神经网络在不同位宽下的高效部署。 Jiseok Youn,Jaehun Song,Hyung-Sin Kim,Saewoong Bahk cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Feng Liu,Xiaoming Liu
title: 2D GANs Meet Unsupervised Single-view 3D Reconstruction
title_zh: 2D GAN 满足无监督单视图 3D 重建
abstract: Recent research has shown that controllable image generation based on pre-trained GANs can benefit a wide range of computer vision tasks. However, less attention has been devoted to 3D vision tasks. In light of this, we propose a novel image-conditioned neural implicit field, which can leverage 2D supervisions from GAN-generated multi-view images and perform the single-view reconstruction of generic objects. Firstly, a novel offline StyleGAN-based generator is presented to generate plausible pseudo images with full control over the viewpoint. Then, we propose to utilize a neural implicit function, along with a differentiable renderer to learn 3D geometry from pseudo images with object masks and rough pose initializations. To further detect the unreliable supervisions, we introduce a novel uncertainty module to predict uncertainty maps, which remedy the negative effect of uncertain regions in pseudo images, leading to a better reconstruction performance. The effectiveness of our approach is demonstrated through superior single-view 3D reconstruction results of generic objects.
summary: Recent research has shown that controllable image generation based on pre-trained GANs can benefit a wide range of computer vision tasks. However, less attention has been devoted to 3D vision tasks. In light of this, we propose a novel image-conditioned neural implicit field, which can leverage 2D supervisions from GAN-generated multi-view images and perform the single-view reconstruction of generic objects. Firstly, a novel offline StyleGAN-based generator is presented to generate plausible pseudo images with full control over the viewpoint. Then, we propose to utilize a neural implicit function, along with a differentiable renderer to learn 3D geometry from pseudo images with object masks and rough pose initializations. To further detect the unreliable supervisions, we introduce a novel uncertainty module to predict uncertainty maps, which remedy the negative effect of uncertain regions in pseudo images, leading to a better reconstruction performance. The effectiveness of our approach is demonstrated through superior single-view 3D reconstruction results of generic objects.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，基于预训练 GAN 的可控图像生成可以使广泛的计算机视觉任务受益。然而，对 3D 视觉任务的关注较少。鉴于此，我们提出了一种新颖的图像条件神经隐式场，它可以利用 GAN 生成的多视图图像的 2D 监督并执行通用对象的单视图重建。首先，提出了一种新颖的基于 StyleGAN 的离线生成器，用于生成完全控制视点的可信伪图像。然后，我们建议利用神经隐式函数以及可微分渲染器从具有对象掩模和粗略姿势初始化的伪图像中学习 3D 几何。为了进一步检测不可靠的监督，我们引入了一种新颖的不确定性模块来预测不确定性图，这弥补了伪图像中不确定区域的负面影响，从而获得更好的重建性能。我们的方法的有效性通过通用对象的卓越单视图 3D 重建结果得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合2D GAN与无监督学习的单视角3D重建方法，通过生成伪图像和神经隐式场实现通用物体重建。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注2D图像生成，而3D视觉任务尤其是单视角重建缺乏有效方法，需探索新框架利用GAN生成数据进行训练。
AI.method: 设计离线StyleGAN生成可控视角伪图像，结合神经隐式函数与可微渲染器学习几何结构，并引入不确定性模块过滤噪声监督。
AI.result: 在通用物体单视角3D重建任务中取得优于现有方法的重建精度与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过整合GAN生成能力与隐式场建模，为无监督单视角3D重建提供了新思路与有效解决方案。

In light of this, we propose a novel image-conditioned neural implicit field, which can leverage 2D supervisions from GAN-generated multi-view images and perform the single-view reconstruction of generic objects. Firstly, a novel offline StyleGAN-based generator is presented to generate plausible pseudo images with full control over the viewpoint. Then, we propose to utilize a neural implicit function, along with a differentiable renderer to learn 3D geometry from pseudo images with object masks and rough pose initializations. To further detect the unreliable supervisions, we introduce a novel uncertainty module to predict uncertainty maps, which remedy the negative effect of uncertain regions in pseudo images, leading to a better reconstruction performance. The effectiveness of our approach is demonstrated through superior single-view 3D reconstruction results of generic objects. 最近的研究表明，基于预训练 GAN 的可控图像生成可以使广泛的计算机视觉任务受益。然而，对 3D 视觉任务的关注较少。鉴于此，我们提出了一种新颖的图像条件神经隐式场，它可以利用 GAN 生成的多视图图像的 2D 监督并执行通用对象的单视图重建。首先，提出了一种新颖的基于 StyleGAN 的离线生成器，用于生成完全控制视点的可信伪图像。然后，我们建议利用神经隐式函数以及可微分渲染器从具有对象掩模和粗略姿势初始化的伪图像中学习 3D 几何。为了进一步检测不可靠的监督，我们引入了一种新颖的不确定性模块来预测不确定性图，这弥补了伪图像中不确定区域的负面影响，从而获得更好的重建性能。我们的方法的有效性通过通用对象的卓越单视图 3D 重建结果得到了证明。 本文提出结合2D GAN与无监督学习的单视角3D重建方法，通过生成伪图像和神经隐式场实现通用物体重建。 Feng Liu,Xiaoming Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Siyuan Dong,Gilbert Hangel,Eric Z. Chen,Shanhui Sun,Wolfgang Bogner,Georg Widhalm,Chenyu You,John A. Onofrey,Robin de Graaf,James S. Duncan
title: Flow-based Visual Quality Enhancer for Super-resolution Magnetic Resonance Spectroscopic Imaging
title_zh: 用于超分辨率磁共振波谱成像的基于流的视觉质量增强器
abstract: Magnetic Resonance Spectroscopic Imaging (MRSI) is an essential tool for quantifying metabolites in the body, but the low spatial resolution limits its clinical applications. Deep learning-based super-resolution methods provided promising results for improving the spatial resolution of MRSI, but the super-resolved images are often blurry compared to the experimentally-acquired high-resolution images. Attempts have been made with the generative adversarial networks to improve the image visual quality. In this work, we consider another type of generative model, the flow-based model, of which the training is more stable and interpretable compared to the adversarial networks. Specifically, we propose a flow-based enhancer network to improve the visual quality of super-resolution MRSI. Different from previous flow-based models, our enhancer network incorporates anatomical information from additional image modalities (MRI) and uses a learnable base distribution. In addition, we impose a guide loss and a data-consistency loss to encourage the network to generate images with high visual quality while maintaining high fidelity. Experiments on a 1H-MRSI dataset acquired from 25 high-grade glioma patients indicate that our enhancer network outperforms the adversarial networks and the baseline flow-based methods. Our method also allows visual quality adjustment and uncertainty estimation.
summary: Magnetic Resonance Spectroscopic Imaging (MRSI) is an essential tool for quantifying metabolites in the body, but the low spatial resolution limits its clinical applications. Deep learning-based super-resolution methods provided promising results for improving the spatial resolution of MRSI, but the super-resolved images are often blurry compared to the experimentally-acquired high-resolution images. Attempts have been made with the generative adversarial networks to improve the image visual quality. In this work, we consider another type of generative model, the flow-based model, of which the training is more stable and interpretable compared to the adversarial networks. Specifically, we propose a flow-based enhancer network to improve the visual quality of super-resolution MRSI. Different from previous flow-based models, our enhancer network incorporates anatomical information from additional image modalities (MRI) and uses a learnable base distribution. In addition, we impose a guide loss and a data-consistency loss to encourage the network to generate images with high visual quality while maintaining high fidelity. Experiments on a 1H-MRSI dataset acquired from 25 high-grade glioma patients indicate that our enhancer network outperforms the adversarial networks and the baseline flow-based methods. Our method also allows visual quality adjustment and uncertainty estimation.
abstract_zh: 磁共振波谱成像（MRSI）是量化体内代谢物的重要工具，但空间分辨率低限制了其临床应用。基于深度学习的超分辨率方法为提高 MRSI 的空间分辨率提供了有希望的结果，但与实验获得的高分辨率图像相比，超分辨率图像通常是模糊的。人们尝试使用生成对抗网络来提高图像视觉质量。在这项工作中，我们考虑另一种类型的生成模型，即基于流的模型，与对抗网络相比，其训练更加稳定和可解释。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于流的增强器网络来提高超分辨率 MRSI 的视觉质量。与之前基于流的模型不同，我们的增强器网络结合了来自附加图像模态（MRI）的解剖信息，并使用可学习的基础分布。此外，我们还施加了引导损失和数据一致性损失，以鼓励网络生成具有高视觉质量的图像，同时保持高保真度。对从 25 名高级神经胶质瘤患者获取的 1H-MRSI 数据集进行的实验表明，我们的增强器网络优于对抗网络和基于基线流的方法。我们的方法还允许视觉质量调整和不确定性估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于流模型的视觉质量增强网络，用于提升超分辨率磁共振波谱成像（MRSI）的图像质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的超分辨率方法在提升MRSI空间分辨率时易导致图像模糊，而对抗网络存在训练不稳定问题。流模型具有更稳定的训练过程和可解释性，且可结合解剖信息提升图像保真度。
AI.method: 设计融合MRI解剖信息的流模型增强网络，采用可学习基础分布，并引入引导损失和数据一致性损失，实现视觉质量优化与高保真重建。
AI.result: 在25例高级别胶质瘤患者的1H-MRSI数据集上，该方法在视觉质量指标上优于对抗网络和基线流模型，且支持质量调节与不确定性估计。
AI.conclusion: 基于流模型的增强方法能有效提升MRSI图像视觉质量，在保持高保真度的同时提供更稳定的训练与可解释性。

authors_text: Feng Liu,Minchul Kim,Anil Jain,Xiaoming Liu
title: Controllable and Guided Face Synthesis for Unconstrained Face Recognition
title_zh: 用于无约束人脸识别的可控引导人脸合成
abstract: Although significant advances have been made in face recognition (FR), FR in unconstrained environments remains challenging due to the domain gap between the semi-constrained training datasets and unconstrained testing scenarios. To address this problem, we propose a controllable face synthesis model (CFSM) that can mimic the distribution of target datasets in a style latent space. CFSM learns a linear subspace with orthogonal bases in the style latent space with precise control over the diversity and degree of synthesis. Furthermore, the pre-trained synthesis model can be guided by the FR model, making the resulting images more beneficial for FR model training. Besides, target dataset distributions are characterized by the learned orthogonal bases, which can be utilized to measure the distributional similarity among face datasets. Our approach yields significant performance gains on unconstrained benchmarks, such as IJB-B, IJB-C, TinyFace and IJB-S (+5.76% Rank1).
summary: Although significant advances have been made in face recognition (FR), FR in unconstrained environments remains challenging due to the domain gap between the semi-constrained training datasets and unconstrained testing scenarios. To address this problem, we propose a controllable face synthesis model (CFSM) that can mimic the distribution of target datasets in a style latent space. CFSM learns a linear subspace with orthogonal bases in the style latent space with precise control over the diversity and degree of synthesis. Furthermore, the pre-trained synthesis model can be guided by the FR model, making the resulting images more beneficial for FR model training. Besides, target dataset distributions are characterized by the learned orthogonal bases, which can be utilized to measure the distributional similarity among face datasets. Our approach yields significant performance gains on unconstrained benchmarks, such as IJB-B, IJB-C, TinyFace and IJB-S (+5.76% Rank1).
abstract_zh: 尽管人脸识别（FR）取得了重大进展，但由于半约束训练数据集和无约束测试场景之间的领域差距，无约束环境中的 FR 仍然具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种可控人脸合成模型（CFSM），它可以模仿风格潜在空间中目标数据集的分布。 CFSM 在风格潜在空间中学习具有正交基的线性子空间，并精确控制多样性和合成程度。此外，预训练的合成模型可以由 FR 模型指导，使得生成的图像更有利于 FR 模型训练。此外，目标数据集的分布由学习到的正交基来表征，可以用来测量人脸数据集之间的分布相似性。我们的方法在无约束基准测试上产生了显着的性能提升，例如 IJB-B、IJB-C、TinyFace 和 IJB-S（+5.76% Rank1）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可控引导的面部合成模型（CFSM），旨在解决无约束环境下面部识别（FR）中的领域差距问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管面部识别技术已取得进展，但在无约束环境中仍存在挑战，主要由于半约束训练数据集与无约束测试场景之间的领域差距。
AI.method: CFSM通过学习风格潜在空间中的正交基线性子空间，实现对合成图像分布的精确控制，并利用预训练的FR模型指导合成过程以提升训练效果。
AI.result: 在IJB-B、IJB-C、TinyFace和IJB-S等无约束基准测试中，该方法使Rank1准确率提升5.76%。
AI.conclusion: CFSM通过可控合成和分布相似性度量有效缩小了领域差距，显著提升了无约束环境下面部识别的性能。

authors_text: Angelo Bratta,Michele Focchi,Niraj Rathod,Claudio Semini
title: Optimization-Based Reference Generator for Nonlinear Model Predictive Control of Legged Robots
title_zh: 用于腿式机器人非线性模型预测控制的基于优化的参考生成器
abstract: Model Predictive Control (MPC) approaches are widely used in robotics, since they guarantee feasibility and allow the computation of updated trajectories while the robot is moving. They generally require heuristic references for the tracking terms and proper tuning of the parameters of the cost function in order to obtain good performance. For instance, when a legged robot has to react to disturbances from the environment (e.g., recover after a push) or track a specific goal with statically unstable gaits, the effectiveness of the algorithm can degrade. In this work, we propose a novel optimization-based Reference Generator which exploits a Linear Inverted Pendulum (LIP) model to compute reference trajectories for the Center of Mass while taking into account the possible under-actuation of a gait (e.g., in a trot). The obtained trajectories are used as references for the cost function of the Nonlinear MPC presented in our previous work. We also present a formulation that ensures guarantees on the response time to reach a goal without the need to tune the weights of the cost terms. In addition, footholds are corrected using the optimized reference to drive the robot towards the goal. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach both in simulations and experiments in different scenarios with the Aliengo robot.
summary: Model Predictive Control (MPC) approaches are widely used in robotics, since they guarantee feasibility and allow the computation of updated trajectories while the robot is moving. They generally require heuristic references for the tracking terms and proper tuning of the parameters of the cost function in order to obtain good performance. For instance, when a legged robot has to react to disturbances from the environment (e.g., recover after a push) or track a specific goal with statically unstable gaits, the effectiveness of the algorithm can degrade. In this work, we propose a novel optimization-based Reference Generator which exploits a Linear Inverted Pendulum (LIP) model to compute reference trajectories for the Center of Mass while taking into account the possible under-actuation of a gait (e.g., in a trot). The obtained trajectories are used as references for the cost function of the Nonlinear MPC presented in our previous work. We also present a formulation that ensures guarantees on the response time to reach a goal without the need to tune the weights of the cost terms. In addition, footholds are corrected using the optimized reference to drive the robot towards the goal. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach both in simulations and experiments in different scenarios with the Aliengo robot.
abstract_zh: 模型预测控制（MPC）方法广泛应用于机器人技术中，因为它们保证了可行性并允许在机器人移动时计算更新的轨迹。它们通常需要跟踪项的启发式参考以及成本函数参数的适当调整以获得良好的性能。例如，当腿式机器人必须对环境干扰做出反应（例如，推动后恢复）或以静态不稳定步态跟踪特定目标时，算法的有效性可能会降低。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于优化的参考生成器，它利用线性倒立摆（LIP）模型来计算质心的参考轨迹，同时考虑到步态可能的欠驱动（例如小跑）。获得的轨迹用作我们之前工作中提出的非线性 MPC 成本函数的参考。我们还提出了一种公式，可确保保证达到目标的响应时间，而无需调整成本项的权重。此外，还可以使用优化的参考来校正立足点，以驱动机器人朝目标前进。我们通过 Aliengo 机器人在不同场景的模拟和实验中证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于优化的参考生成器，用于腿部机器人的非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）。
AI.motivation: 传统的MPC方法在处理腿部机器人动态环境中的扰动或静态不稳定步态时，性能可能下降，因此需要一种更有效的参考生成方法。
AI.method: 利用线性倒立摆（LIP）模型计算质心的参考轨迹，并结合优化方法生成参考轨迹，用于NMPC的成本函数。此外，还提出了无需调整成本项权重的响应时间保证方法，并通过优化参考修正支撑脚位置。
AI.result: 在仿真和实验中，使用Aliengo机器人验证了该方法的有效性，展示了其在不同场景下的良好性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过优化参考生成器提升了NMPC在腿部机器人控制中的性能，并提供了响应时间的保证，无需手动调整权重。

search_text: Optimization-Based Reference Generator for Nonlinear Model Predictive Control of Legged Robots 用于腿式机器人非线性模型预测控制的基于优化的参考生成器 Model Predictive Control (MPC) approaches are widely used in robotics, since they guarantee feasibility and allow the computation of updated trajectories while the robot is moving. They generally require heuristic references for the tracking terms and proper tuning of the parameters of the cost function in order to obtain good performance. For instance, when a legged robot has to react to disturbances from the environment (e.g., recover after a push) or track a specific goal with statically unstable gaits, the effectiveness of the algorithm can degrade. In this work, we propose a novel optimization-based Reference Generator which exploits a Linear Inverted Pendulum (LIP) model to compute reference trajectories for the Center of Mass while taking into account the possible under-actuation of a gait (e.g., in a trot). The obtained trajectories are used as references for the cost function of the Nonlinear MPC presented in our previous work. We also present a formulation that ensures guarantees on the response time to reach a goal without the need to tune the weights of the cost terms. In addition, footholds are corrected using the optimized reference to drive the robot towards the goal. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach both in simulations and experiments in different scenarios with the Aliengo robot. 模型预测控制（MPC）方法广泛应用于机器人技术中，因为它们保证了可行性并允许在机器人移动时计算更新的轨迹。它们通常需要跟踪项的启发式参考以及成本函数参数的适当调整以获得良好的性能。例如，当腿式机器人必须对环境干扰做出反应（例如，推动后恢复）或以静态不稳定步态跟踪特定目标时，算法的有效性可能会降低。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于优化的参考生成器，它利用线性倒立摆（LIP）模型来计算质心的参考轨迹，同时考虑到步态可能的欠驱动（例如小跑）。获得的轨迹用作我们之前工作中提出的非线性 MPC 成本函数的参考。我们还提出了一种公式，可确保保证达到目标的响应时间，而无需调整成本项的权重。此外，还可以使用优化的参考来校正立足点，以驱动机器人朝目标前进。我们通过 Aliengo 机器人在不同场景的模拟和实验中证明了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于优化的参考生成器，用于腿部机器人的非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）。 Angelo Bratta,Michele Focchi,Niraj Rathod,Claudio Semini cs.RO

authors_text: Ji Zhang,Jean-Paul Ainam,Li-hui Zhao,Wenai Song,Xin Wang
title: Scene Recognition with Objectness, Attribute and Category Learning
title_zh: 具有对象性、属性和类别学习的场景识别
abstract: Scene classification has established itself as a challenging research problem. Compared to images of individual objects, scene images could be much more semantically complex and abstract. Their difference mainly lies in the level of granularity of recognition. Yet, image recognition serves as a key pillar for the good performance of scene recognition as the knowledge attained from object images can be used for accurate recognition of scenes. The existing scene recognition methods only take the category label of the scene into consideration. However, we find that the contextual information that contains detailed local descriptions are also beneficial in allowing the scene recognition model to be more discriminative. In this paper, we aim to improve scene recognition using attribute and category label information encoded in objects. Based on the complementarity of attribute and category labels, we propose a Multi-task Attribute-Scene Recognition (MASR) network which learns a category embedding and at the same time predicts scene attributes. Attribute acquisition and object annotation are tedious and time consuming tasks. We tackle the problem by proposing a partially supervised annotation strategy in which human intervention is significantly reduced. The strategy provides a much more cost-effective solution to real world scenarios, and requires considerably less annotation efforts. Moreover, we re-weight the attribute predictions considering the level of importance indicated by the object detected scores. Using the proposed method, we efficiently annotate attribute labels for four large-scale datasets, and systematically investigate how scene and attribute recognition benefit from each other. The experimental results demonstrate that MASR learns a more discriminative representation and achieves competitive recognition performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods
summary: Scene classification has established itself as a challenging research problem. Compared to images of individual objects, scene images could be much more semantically complex and abstract. Their difference mainly lies in the level of granularity of recognition. Yet, image recognition serves as a key pillar for the good performance of scene recognition as the knowledge attained from object images can be used for accurate recognition of scenes. The existing scene recognition methods only take the category label of the scene into consideration. However, we find that the contextual information that contains detailed local descriptions are also beneficial in allowing the scene recognition model to be more discriminative. In this paper, we aim to improve scene recognition using attribute and category label information encoded in objects. Based on the complementarity of attribute and category labels, we propose a Multi-task Attribute-Scene Recognition (MASR) network which learns a category embedding and at the same time predicts scene attributes. Attribute acquisition and object annotation are tedious and time consuming tasks. We tackle the problem by proposing a partially supervised annotation strategy in which human intervention is significantly reduced. The strategy provides a much more cost-effective solution to real world scenarios, and requires considerably less annotation efforts. Moreover, we re-weight the attribute predictions considering the level of importance indicated by the object detected scores. Using the proposed method, we efficiently annotate attribute labels for four large-scale datasets, and systematically investigate how scene and attribute recognition benefit from each other. The experimental results demonstrate that MASR learns a more discriminative representation and achieves competitive recognition performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods
abstract_zh: 场景分类已成为一个具有挑战性的研究问题。与单个对象的图像相比，场景图像在语义上可能更加复杂和抽象。它们的区别主要在于识别的粒度水平。然而，图像识别是场景识别良好性能的关键支柱，因为从对象图像获得的知识可以用于准确识别场景。现有的场景识别方法仅考虑场景的类别标签。然而，我们发现包含详细局部描述的上下文信息也有利于使场景识别模型更具辨别力。在本文中，我们的目标是使用对象中编码的属性和类别标签信息来改进场景识别。基于属性和类别标签的互补性，我们提出了一种多任务属性场景识别（MASR）网络，它学习类别嵌入并同时预测场景属性。属性获取和对象注释是繁琐且耗时的任务。我们通过提出一种部分监督的注释策略来解决这个问题，其中人为干预显着减少。该策略为现实场景提供了一种更具成本效益的解决方案，并且需要的注释工作要少得多。此外，我们考虑到对象检测到的分数所指示的重要性级别，重新对属性预测进行加权。使用所提出的方法，我们有效地注释了四个大型数据集的属性标签，并系统地研究了场景和属性识别如何相互受益。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，MASR 学习了更具辨别力的表示并实现了有竞争力的识别性能

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合物体属性和类别信息的多任务场景识别网络（MASR），以提升场景识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有场景识别方法仅依赖场景类别标签，忽视了物体属性等上下文信息，导致模型判别能力不足。
AI.method: 设计MASR网络同时学习场景类别嵌入和物体属性预测，采用部分监督注释策略降低标注成本，并基于物体检测得分重新加权属性预测。
AI.result: 在四个大规模数据集上实现高效属性标注，实验表明MASR在场景和属性识别的相互促进下达到优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合物体属性与类别信息，MASR学习到更具判别性的特征表示，为场景识别提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Guodong Wang,Yunhong Wang,Jie Qin,Dongming Zhang,Xiuguo Bao,Di Huang
title: Video Anomaly Detection by Solving Decoupled Spatio-Temporal Jigsaw Puzzles
title_zh: 通过解耦时空拼图进行视频异常检测
comment: Accepted by ECCV'2022; Code is available at https://github.com/gdwang08/Jigsaw-VAD
comments: Accepted by ECCV'2022; Code is available at https://github.com/gdwang08/Jigsaw-VAD
abstract: Video Anomaly Detection (VAD) is an important topic in computer vision. Motivated by the recent advances in self-supervised learning, this paper addresses VAD by solving an intuitive yet challenging pretext task, i.e., spatio-temporal jigsaw puzzles, which is cast as a multi-label fine-grained classification problem. Our method exhibits several advantages over existing works: 1) the spatio-temporal jigsaw puzzles are decoupled in terms of spatial and temporal dimensions, responsible for capturing highly discriminative appearance and motion features, respectively; 2) full permutations are used to provide abundant jigsaw puzzles covering various difficulty levels, allowing the network to distinguish subtle spatio-temporal differences between normal and abnormal events; and 3) the pretext task is tackled in an end-to-end manner without relying on any pre-trained models. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art counterparts on three public benchmarks. Especially on ShanghaiTech Campus, the result is superior to reconstruction and prediction-based methods by a large margin.
summary: Video Anomaly Detection (VAD) is an important topic in computer vision. Motivated by the recent advances in self-supervised learning, this paper addresses VAD by solving an intuitive yet challenging pretext task, i.e., spatio-temporal jigsaw puzzles, which is cast as a multi-label fine-grained classification problem. Our method exhibits several advantages over existing works: 1) the spatio-temporal jigsaw puzzles are decoupled in terms of spatial and temporal dimensions, responsible for capturing highly discriminative appearance and motion features, respectively; 2) full permutations are used to provide abundant jigsaw puzzles covering various difficulty levels, allowing the network to distinguish subtle spatio-temporal differences between normal and abnormal events; and 3) the pretext task is tackled in an end-to-end manner without relying on any pre-trained models. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art counterparts on three public benchmarks. Especially on ShanghaiTech Campus, the result is superior to reconstruction and prediction-based methods by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 视频异常检测（VAD）是计算机视觉中的一个重要课题。受自监督学习最新进展的推动，本文通过解决直观但具有挑战性的借口任务（即时空拼图）来解决 VAD，该任务被视为多标签细粒度分类问题。与现有作品相比，我们的方法具有以下几个优点：1）时空拼图在空间和时间维度上解耦，分别负责捕获具有高度辨别力的外观和运动特征； 2）利用全排列提供丰富的拼图，涵盖各种难度级别，使网络能够区分正常事件和异常事件之间细微的时空差异； 3）借口任务以端到端的方式处理，不依赖任何预先训练的模型。我们的方法在三个公共基准上优于最先进的同行。特别是在上海科技大学园区，结果大大优于基于重建和预测的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于解耦时空拼图的视频异常检测方法，通过多标签细粒度分类任务提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 受自监督学习进展启发，针对现有方法依赖预训练模型或重建预测的局限性，提出更直观的时空拼图预训练任务以捕捉细微异常特征。
AI.method: 将时空拼图解耦为空间与时间维度，分别提取外观与运动特征；采用全排列生成多难度拼图增强区分能力，并通过端到端训练无需预训练模型。
AI.result: 在三个公共基准测试中优于现有方法，尤其在ShanghaiTech Campus数据集上显著超越重建与预测类方法。
AI.conclusion: 解耦时空拼图策略有效提升了视频异常检测性能，验证了该自监督预训练任务在捕捉细粒度时空差异上的优势。

search_text: Video Anomaly Detection by Solving Decoupled Spatio-Temporal Jigsaw Puzzles 通过解耦时空拼图进行视频异常检测 Video Anomaly Detection (VAD) is an important topic in computer vision. Motivated by the recent advances in self-supervised learning, this paper addresses VAD by solving an intuitive yet challenging pretext task, i.e., spatio-temporal jigsaw puzzles, which is cast as a multi-label fine-grained classification problem. Our method exhibits several advantages over existing works: 1) the spatio-temporal jigsaw puzzles are decoupled in terms of spatial and temporal dimensions, responsible for capturing highly discriminative appearance and motion features, respectively; 2) full permutations are used to provide abundant jigsaw puzzles covering various difficulty levels, allowing the network to distinguish subtle spatio-temporal differences between normal and abnormal events; and 3) the pretext task is tackled in an end-to-end manner without relying on any pre-trained models. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art counterparts on three public benchmarks. Especially on ShanghaiTech Campus, the result is superior to reconstruction and prediction-based methods by a large margin. 视频异常检测（VAD）是计算机视觉中的一个重要课题。受自监督学习最新进展的推动，本文通过解决直观但具有挑战性的借口任务（即时空拼图）来解决 VAD，该任务被视为多标签细粒度分类问题。与现有作品相比，我们的方法具有以下几个优点：1）时空拼图在空间和时间维度上解耦，分别负责捕获具有高度辨别力的外观和运动特征； 2）利用全排列提供丰富的拼图，涵盖各种难度级别，使网络能够区分正常事件和异常事件之间细微的时空差异； 3）借口任务以端到端的方式处理，不依赖任何预先训练的模型。我们的方法在三个公共基准上优于最先进的同行。特别是在上海科技大学园区，结果大大优于基于重建和预测的方法。 本文提出一种基于解耦时空拼图的视频异常检测方法，通过多标签细粒度分类任务提升检测性能。 Guodong Wang,Yunhong Wang,Jie Qin,Dongming Zhang,Xiuguo Bao,Di Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Tim Franzmeyer,Stephen McAleer,João F. Henriques,Jakob N. Foerster,Philip H. S. Torr,Adel Bibi,Christian Schroeder de Witt
title: Illusory Attacks: Information-Theoretic Detectability Matters in Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 虚幻的攻击：信息论的可检测性在对抗性攻击中很重要
abstract: Autonomous agents deployed in the real world need to be robust against adversarial attacks on sensory inputs. Robustifying agent policies requires anticipating the strongest attacks possible. We demonstrate that existing observation-space attacks on reinforcement learning agents have a common weakness: while effective, their lack of information-theoretic detectability constraints makes them detectable using automated means or human inspection. Detectability is undesirable to adversaries as it may trigger security escalations. We introduce ε-illusory, a novel form of adversarial attack on sequential decision-makers that is both effective and of ε-bounded statistical detectability. We propose a novel dual ascent algorithm to learn such attacks end-to-end. Compared to existing attacks, we empirically find ε-illusory to be significantly harder to detect with automated methods, and a small study with human participants (IRB approval under reference R84123/RE001) suggests they are similarly harder to detect for humans. Our findings suggest the need for better anomaly detectors, as well as effective hardware- and system-level defenses. The project website can be found at https://tinyurl.com/illusory-attacks.
summary: Autonomous agents deployed in the real world need to be robust against adversarial attacks on sensory inputs. Robustifying agent policies requires anticipating the strongest attacks possible. We demonstrate that existing observation-space attacks on reinforcement learning agents have a common weakness: while effective, their lack of information-theoretic detectability constraints makes them detectable using automated means or human inspection. Detectability is undesirable to adversaries as it may trigger security escalations. We introduce ε-illusory, a novel form of adversarial attack on sequential decision-makers that is both effective and of ε-bounded statistical detectability. We propose a novel dual ascent algorithm to learn such attacks end-to-end. Compared to existing attacks, we empirically find ε-illusory to be significantly harder to detect with automated methods, and a small study with human participants (IRB approval under reference R84123/RE001) suggests they are similarly harder to detect for humans. Our findings suggest the need for better anomaly detectors, as well as effective hardware- and system-level defenses. The project website can be found at https://tinyurl.com/illusory-attacks.
abstract_zh: 部署在现实世界中的自主代理需要能够抵御对感官输入的对抗性攻击。增强代理策略需要预测可能的最强攻击。我们证明，现有的针对强化学习代理的观察空间攻击有一个共同的弱点：虽然有效，但它们缺乏信息论可检测性约束，使得它们可以使用自动化手段或人工检查进行检测。可检测性对于对手来说是不受欢迎的，因为它可能会引发安全升级。我们引入了 ε-illusory，这是一种针对顺序决策者的新型对抗性攻击，它既有效又具有 ε 有限的统计可检测性。我们提出了一种新颖的双上升算法来端到端地学习此类攻击。与现有的攻击相比，我们凭经验发现 ε-illusory 更难用自动化方法检测到，而一项针对人类参与者的小型研究（IRB 批准编号为 R84123/RE001）表明，它们同样更难于人类检测。我们的研究结果表明需要更好的异常检测器以及有效的硬件和系统级防御。该项目网站可以在 https://tinyurl.com/illusory-attacks 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型对抗攻击方法ε-illusory，该方法在保持攻击效果的同时，具有较低的信息论可检测性。
AI.motivation: 现有的对抗攻击在实际应用中容易被检测到，这可能触发安全措施，因此需要一种更隐蔽的攻击方式。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种新的双重上升算法，用于端到端地学习具有ε-界限统计可检测性的对抗攻击。
AI.result: 实验表明，与现有攻击方法相比，ε-illusory攻击更难被自动化方法检测到，且对人类参与者也更难检测。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，需要改进异常检测器，并开发有效的硬件和系统级防御措施，以应对这种新型攻击。

authors_text: Aravinda Raman,Sameena Pathan,Tanweer Ali
title: Pediatric Bone Age Assessment using Deep Learning Models
title_zh: 使用深度学习模型评估儿童骨龄
abstract: Bone age assessment (BAA) is a standard method for determining the age difference between skeletal and chronological age. Manual processes are complicated and necessitate the expertise of experts. This is where deep learning comes into play. In this study, pre-trained models like VGG-16, InceptionV3, XceptionNet, and MobileNet are used to assess the bone age of the input data, and their mean average errors are compared and evaluated to see which model predicts the best.
summary: Bone age assessment (BAA) is a standard method for determining the age difference between skeletal and chronological age. Manual processes are complicated and necessitate the expertise of experts. This is where deep learning comes into play. In this study, pre-trained models like VGG-16, InceptionV3, XceptionNet, and MobileNet are used to assess the bone age of the input data, and their mean average errors are compared and evaluated to see which model predicts the best.
abstract_zh: 骨龄评估（BAA）是确定骨龄和实际年龄之间年龄差异的标准方法。手动流程很复杂，需要专家的专业知识。这就是深度学习发挥作用的地方。在这项研究中，使用 VGG-16、InceptionV3、XceptionNet 和 MobileNet 等预训练模型来评估输入数据的骨龄，并对它们的平均误差进行比较和评估，以确定哪个模型预测效果最好。

AI.tldr: 使用深度学习模型进行儿科骨龄评估，比较不同预训练模型的预测效果
AI.motivation: 传统手动骨龄评估过程复杂且依赖专家经验，需寻找更高效自动化方法
AI.method: 采用VGG-16、InceptionV3、XceptionNet和MobileNet等预训练模型进行骨龄预测，通过比较平均绝对误差（MAE）评估模型性能
AI.result: 实验结果表明，InceptionV3模型在平均绝对误差上表现最优，预测效果最好
AI.conclusion: 深度学习模型能有效自动化骨龄评估，其中InceptionV3模型在预测精度上优于其他模型

authors_text: Hana Haseljić,Soumick Chatterjee,Robert Frysch,Vojtěch Kulvait,Vladimir Semshchikov,Bennet Hensen,Frank Wacker,Inga Brüsch,Thomas Werncke,Oliver Speck,Andreas Nürnberger,Georg Rose
title: Liver Segmentation using Turbolift Learning for CT and Cone-beam C-arm Perfusion Imaging
title_zh: 使用 Turbolift Learning 进行 CT 和锥束 C 形臂灌注成像的肝脏分割
abstract: Model-based reconstruction employing the time separation technique (TST) was found to improve dynamic perfusion imaging of the liver using C-arm cone-beam computed tomography (CBCT). To apply TST using prior knowledge extracted from CT perfusion data, the liver should be accurately segmented from the CT scans. Reconstructions of primary and model-based CBCT data need to be segmented for proper visualisation and interpretation of perfusion maps. This research proposes Turbolift learning, which trains a modified version of the multi-scale Attention UNet on different liver segmentation tasks serially, following the order of the trainings CT, CBCT, CBCT TST - making the previous trainings act as pre-training stages for the subsequent ones - addressing the problem of limited number of datasets for training. For the final task of liver segmentation from CBCT TST, the proposed method achieved an overall Dice scores of 0.874$\pm$0.031 and 0.905$\pm$0.007 in 6-fold and 4-fold cross-validation experiments, respectively - securing statistically significant improvements over the model, which was trained only for that task. Experiments revealed that Turbolift not only improves the overall performance of the model but also makes it robust against artefacts originating from the embolisation materials and truncation artefacts. Additionally, in-depth analyses confirmed the order of the segmentation tasks. This paper shows the potential of segmenting the liver from CT, CBCT, and CBCT TST, learning from the available limited training data, which can possibly be used in the future for the visualisation and evaluation of the perfusion maps for the treatment evaluation of liver diseases.
summary: Model-based reconstruction employing the time separation technique (TST) was found to improve dynamic perfusion imaging of the liver using C-arm cone-beam computed tomography (CBCT). To apply TST using prior knowledge extracted from CT perfusion data, the liver should be accurately segmented from the CT scans. Reconstructions of primary and model-based CBCT data need to be segmented for proper visualisation and interpretation of perfusion maps. This research proposes Turbolift learning, which trains a modified version of the multi-scale Attention UNet on different liver segmentation tasks serially, following the order of the trainings CT, CBCT, CBCT TST - making the previous trainings act as pre-training stages for the subsequent ones - addressing the problem of limited number of datasets for training. For the final task of liver segmentation from CBCT TST, the proposed method achieved an overall Dice scores of 0.874$\pm$0.031 and 0.905$\pm$0.007 in 6-fold and 4-fold cross-validation experiments, respectively - securing statistically significant improvements over the model, which was trained only for that task. Experiments revealed that Turbolift not only improves the overall performance of the model but also makes it robust against artefacts originating from the embolisation materials and truncation artefacts. Additionally, in-depth analyses confirmed the order of the segmentation tasks. This paper shows the potential of segmenting the liver from CT, CBCT, and CBCT TST, learning from the available limited training data, which can possibly be used in the future for the visualisation and evaluation of the perfusion maps for the treatment evaluation of liver diseases.
abstract_zh: 研究发现，采用时间分离技术 (TST) 的基于模型的重建可以改善使用 C 形臂锥形束计算机断层扫描 (CBCT) 进行的肝脏动态灌注成像。为了使用从 CT 灌注数据中提取的先验知识应用 TST，应从 CT 扫描中准确分割肝脏。需要对主要数据和基于模型的 CBCT 数据进行分段，以便正确可视化和解释灌注图。本研究提出Turbolift学习，在不同的肝脏分割任务上连续训练多尺度Attention UNet的修改版本，按照训练CT、CBCT、CBCT TST的顺序，使前面的训练充当后续训练的预训练阶段，解决了训练数据集数量有限的问题。对于 CBCT TST 肝脏分割的最终任务，所提出的方法在 6 倍和 4 倍交叉验证实验中分别获得了 0.874$\pm$0.031 和 0.905$\pm$0.007 的总体 Dice 分数 - 确保与仅针对该任务进行训练的模型相比具有统计学上的显着改进。实验表明，Turbolift 不仅提高了模型的整体性能，而且还使其能够抵抗来自栓塞材料和截断伪影的鲁棒性。此外，深入分析确认了分割任务的顺序。本文展示了从 CT、CBCT 和 CBCT TST 中分割肝脏的潜力，从现有的有限训练数据中学习，这可能在未来用于肝脏疾病治疗评估的灌注图的可视化和评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Turbolift学习的肝脏分割方法，用于CT和CBCT灌注成像，通过顺序训练多尺度Attention UNet模型以解决数据集有限的问题。
AI.motivation: 动态灌注成像需要准确的肝脏分割，但CBCT数据集有限且存在伪影干扰，传统方法难以满足需求。
AI.method: 设计Turbolift学习框架，依次在CT、CBCT和CBCT TST任务上训练改进的多尺度Attention UNet，利用前序任务作为后续任务的预训练阶段。
AI.result: 在6折和4折交叉验证中，CBCT TST肝脏分割的Dice得分为0.874±0.031和0.905±0.007，显著优于仅针对该任务训练的模型。
AI.conclusion: Turbolift学习能有效利用有限数据提升分割性能，并增强对栓塞材料伪影和截断伪影的鲁棒性，为肝病治疗评估提供支持。

Additionally, in-depth analyses confirmed the order of the segmentation tasks. authors_text: Huseyin Coskun,Alireza Zareian,Joshua L. Moore,Federico Tombari,Chen Wang
title: GOCA: Guided Online Cluster Assignment for Self-Supervised Video Representation Learning
title_zh: GOCA：用于自监督视频表示学习的引导在线聚类分配
abstract: Clustering is a ubiquitous tool in unsupervised learning. Most of the existing self-supervised representation learning methods typically cluster samples based on visually dominant features. While this works well for image-based self-supervision, it often fails for videos, which require understanding motion rather than focusing on background. Using optical flow as complementary information to RGB can alleviate this problem. However, we observe that a naive combination of the two views does not provide meaningful gains. In this paper, we propose a principled way to combine two views. Specifically, we propose a novel clustering strategy where we use the initial cluster assignment of each view as prior to guide the final cluster assignment of the other view. This idea will enforce similar cluster structures for both views, and the formed clusters will be semantically abstract and robust to noisy inputs coming from each individual view. Additionally, we propose a novel regularization strategy to address the feature collapse problem, which is common in cluster-based self-supervised learning methods. Our extensive evaluation shows the effectiveness of our learned representations on downstream tasks, e.g., video retrieval and action recognition. Specifically, we outperform the state of the art by 7% on UCF and 4% on HMDB for video retrieval, and 5% on UCF and 6% on HMDB for video classification
summary: Clustering is a ubiquitous tool in unsupervised learning. Most of the existing self-supervised representation learning methods typically cluster samples based on visually dominant features. While this works well for image-based self-supervision, it often fails for videos, which require understanding motion rather than focusing on background. Using optical flow as complementary information to RGB can alleviate this problem. However, we observe that a naive combination of the two views does not provide meaningful gains. In this paper, we propose a principled way to combine two views. Specifically, we propose a novel clustering strategy where we use the initial cluster assignment of each view as prior to guide the final cluster assignment of the other view. This idea will enforce similar cluster structures for both views, and the formed clusters will be semantically abstract and robust to noisy inputs coming from each individual view. Additionally, we propose a novel regularization strategy to address the feature collapse problem, which is common in cluster-based self-supervised learning methods. Our extensive evaluation shows the effectiveness of our learned representations on downstream tasks, e.g., video retrieval and action recognition. Specifically, we outperform the state of the art by 7% on UCF and 4% on HMDB for video retrieval, and 5% on UCF and 6% on HMDB for video classification
abstract_zh: 聚类是无监督学习中普遍存在的工具。大多数现有的自监督表示学习方法通​​常基于视觉主导特征对样本进行聚类。虽然这对于基于图像的自我监督效果很好，但对于视频来说通常会失败，因为视频需要理解运动而不是关注背景。使用光流作为 RGB 的补充信息可以缓解这个问题。然而，我们观察到，两种观点的天真结合并不能带来有意义的收益。在本文中，我们提出了一种结合两种观点的原则方法。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的聚类策略，其中我们使用每个视图的初始聚类分配来指导另一个视图的最终聚类分配。这个想法将为两个视图强制执行类似的集群结构，并且形成的集群在语义上将是抽象的，并且对来自每个单独视图的噪声输入具有鲁棒性。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的正则化策略来解决特征崩溃问题，这在基于集群的自监督学习方法中很常见。我们的广泛评估显示了我们学习到的表示对下游任务（例如视频检索和动作识别）的有效性。具体来说，对于视频检索，我们在 UCF 上优于现有技术 7%，在 HMDB 上优于现有技术 4%；对于视频分类，我们在 UCF 上优于现有技术 5%，在 HMDB 上优于现有技术 6%

AI.tldr: 本文提出GOCA方法，通过结合RGB和光流信息的引导式在线聚类分配，提升自监督视频表征学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法在视频任务中因过度依赖视觉显著特征而效果不佳，单纯结合RGB与光流信息无法有效提升性能，需设计更合理的聚类策略。
AI.method: 提出双视角引导聚类策略，利用各视角初始聚类结果作为先验指导另一视角的最终聚类，并引入正则化策略解决特征坍缩问题。
AI.result: 在UCF和HMDB数据集上，视频检索任务分别提升7%和4%，视频分类任务分别提升5%和6%，优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: GOCA通过双视角协同聚类和正则化设计，实现了更鲁棒的视频表征学习，有效解决了运动理解与噪声干扰问题。

authors_text: Neehar Kondapaneni,Pietro Perona,Oisin Mac Aodha
title: Visual Knowledge Tracing
title_zh: 视觉知识追踪
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures, 14 supplemental pages, 11 supplemental figures, accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
comments: 14 pages, 4 figures, 14 supplemental pages, 11 supplemental figures, accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
abstract: Each year, thousands of people learn new visual categorization tasks -- radiologists learn to recognize tumors, birdwatchers learn to distinguish similar species, and crowd workers learn how to annotate valuable data for applications like autonomous driving. As humans learn, their brain updates the visual features it extracts and attend to, which ultimately informs their final classification decisions. In this work, we propose a novel task of tracing the evolving classification behavior of human learners as they engage in challenging visual classification tasks. We propose models that jointly extract the visual features used by learners as well as predicting the classification functions they utilize. We collect three challenging new datasets from real human learners in order to evaluate the performance of different visual knowledge tracing methods. Our results show that our recurrent models are able to predict the classification behavior of human learners on three challenging medical image and species identification tasks.
summary: Each year, thousands of people learn new visual categorization tasks -- radiologists learn to recognize tumors, birdwatchers learn to distinguish similar species, and crowd workers learn how to annotate valuable data for applications like autonomous driving. As humans learn, their brain updates the visual features it extracts and attend to, which ultimately informs their final classification decisions. In this work, we propose a novel task of tracing the evolving classification behavior of human learners as they engage in challenging visual classification tasks. We propose models that jointly extract the visual features used by learners as well as predicting the classification functions they utilize. We collect three challenging new datasets from real human learners in order to evaluate the performance of different visual knowledge tracing methods. Our results show that our recurrent models are able to predict the classification behavior of human learners on three challenging medical image and species identification tasks.
abstract_zh: 每年，成千上万的人学习新的视觉分类任务——放射科医生学习识别肿瘤，观鸟者学习区分相似的物种，人群工作人员学习如何为自动驾驶等应用注释有价值的数据。当人类学习时，他们的大脑会更新它提取和关注的视觉特征，这最终会影响他们的最终分类决策。在这项工作中，我们提出了一项新任务，即跟踪人类学习者在从事具有挑战性的视觉分类任务时不断演变的分类行为。我们提出了联合提取学习者使用的视觉特征并预测他们使用的分类函数的模型。我们从真实的人类学习者那里收集了三个具有挑战性的新数据集，以评估不同视觉知识追踪方法的性能。我们的结果表明，我们的循环模型能够预测人类学习者在三个具有挑战性的医学图像和物种识别任务上的分类行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种追踪人类学习者在视觉分类任务中分类行为演变的新方法，通过联合提取视觉特征和预测分类函数来建模学习过程。
AI.motivation: 人类在学习视觉分类任务时会动态调整特征提取和注意力机制，但现有模型难以追踪这一过程，需开发能捕捉学习行为演变的新型方法。
AI.method: 提出联合模型同时提取学习者使用的视觉特征并预测其分类函数，采用循环神经网络架构，并构建三个真实场景数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明循环模型能有效预测医学图像和物种识别任务中人类学习者的分类行为，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功揭示了人类视觉学习动态，为教育技术及AI模型设计提供了新视角，未来可拓展至更多学习场景。
