search_text: Visual Knowledge Tracing 视觉知识追踪 Each year, thousands of people learn new visual categorization tasks -- radiologists learn to recognize tumors, birdwatchers learn to distinguish similar species, and crowd workers learn how to annotate valuable data for applications like autonomous driving. As humans learn, their brain updates the visual features it extracts and attend to, which ultimately informs their final classification decisions. In this work, we propose a novel task of tracing the evolving classification behavior of human learners as they engage in challenging visual classification tasks. We propose models that jointly extract the visual features used by learners as well as predicting the classification functions they utilize. We collect three challenging new datasets from real human learners in order to evaluate the performance of different visual knowledge tracing methods. Our results show that our recurrent models are able to predict the classification behavior of human learners on three challenging medical image and species identification tasks. 每年，成千上万的人学习新的视觉分类任务——放射科医生学习识别肿瘤，观鸟者学习区分相似的物种，人群工作人员学习如何为自动驾驶等应用注释有价值的数据。当人类学习时，他们的大脑会更新它提取和关注的视觉特征，这最终会影响他们的最终分类决策。在这项工作中，我们提出了一项新任务，即跟踪人类学习者在从事具有挑战性的视觉分类任务时不断演变的分类行为。我们提出了联合提取学习者使用的视觉特征并预测他们使用的分类函数的模型。我们从真实的人类学习者那里收集了三个具有挑战性的新数据集，以评估不同视觉知识追踪方法的性能。我们的结果表明，我们的循环模型能够预测人类学习者在三个具有挑战性的医学图像和物种识别任务上的分类行为。 本文提出了一种追踪人类学习者在视觉分类任务中分类行为演变的新方法，通过联合提取视觉特征和预测分类函数来建模学习过程。 Neehar Kondapaneni,Pietro Perona,Oisin Mac Aodha cs.CV,cs.HC

authors_text: Weiyang Liu,Zhen Liu,Liam Paull,Adrian Weller,Bernhard Schölkopf
title: Structural Causal 3D Reconstruction
title_zh: 结构因果 3D 重建
abstract: This paper considers the problem of unsupervised 3D object reconstruction from in-the-wild single-view images. Due to ambiguity and intrinsic ill-posedness, this problem is inherently difficult to solve and therefore requires strong regularization to achieve disentanglement of different latent factors. Unlike existing works that introduce explicit regularizations into objective functions, we look into a different space for implicit regularization -- the structure of latent space. Specifically, we restrict the structure of latent space to capture a topological causal ordering of latent factors (i.e., representing causal dependency as a directed acyclic graph). We first show that different causal orderings matter for 3D reconstruction, and then explore several approaches to find a task-dependent causal factor ordering. Our experiments demonstrate that the latent space structure indeed serves as an implicit regularization and introduces an inductive bias beneficial for reconstruction.
summary: This paper considers the problem of unsupervised 3D object reconstruction from in-the-wild single-view images. Due to ambiguity and intrinsic ill-posedness, this problem is inherently difficult to solve and therefore requires strong regularization to achieve disentanglement of different latent factors. Unlike existing works that introduce explicit regularizations into objective functions, we look into a different space for implicit regularization -- the structure of latent space. Specifically, we restrict the structure of latent space to capture a topological causal ordering of latent factors (i.e., representing causal dependency as a directed acyclic graph). We first show that different causal orderings matter for 3D reconstruction, and then explore several approaches to find a task-dependent causal factor ordering. Our experiments demonstrate that the latent space structure indeed serves as an implicit regularization and introduces an inductive bias beneficial for reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑从野外单视图图像进行无监督 3D 对象重建的问题。由于模糊性和内在的不适定性，这个问题本质上很难解决，因此需要强大的正则化来实现不同潜在因素的解开。与将显式正则化引入目标函数的现有工作不同，我们研究了隐式正则化的不同空间——潜在空间的结构。具体来说，我们限制潜在空间的结构以捕获潜在因素的拓扑因果排序（即，将因果依赖性表示为有向无环图）。我们首先证明不同的因果顺序对于 3D 重建很重要，然后探索几种方法来寻找任务相关的因果因素顺序。我们的实验表明，潜在空间结构确实可以作为隐式正则化，并引入有利于重建的归纳偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过单视角图像进行无监督3D物体重建，提出利用潜在空间结构进行隐式正则化的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖显式正则化但效果有限，而潜在空间的结构特性未被充分挖掘，需探索新的隐式正则化途径以解决重建中的歧义问题。
AI.method: 通过构建潜在空间的拓扑因果顺序（有向无环图），将因果依赖关系编码到潜在因子中，并探索任务相关的因果因子排序方法。
AI.result: 实验表明潜在空间结构可作为隐式正则化手段，引入有利于重建的归纳偏置，提升3D重建效果。
AI.conclusion: 结构化潜在空间的因果建模为无监督3D重建提供了有效的新思路，验证了隐式正则化的可行性与优势。

authors_text: Arian Bakhtiarnia,Błażej Leporowski,Lukas Esterle,Alexandros Iosifidis
title: Analysis of the Effect of Low-Overhead Lossy Image Compression on the Performance of Visual Crowd Counting for Smart City Applications
title_zh: 低开销有损图像压缩对智能城市应用视觉人群计数性能的影响分析
abstract: Images and video frames captured by cameras placed throughout smart cities are often transmitted over the network to a server to be processed by deep neural networks for various tasks. Transmission of raw images, i.e., without any form of compression, requires high bandwidth and can lead to congestion issues and delays in transmission. The use of lossy image compression techniques can reduce the quality of the images, leading to accuracy degradation. In this paper, we analyze the effect of applying low-overhead lossy image compression methods on the accuracy of visual crowd counting, and measure the trade-off between bandwidth reduction and the obtained accuracy.
summary: Images and video frames captured by cameras placed throughout smart cities are often transmitted over the network to a server to be processed by deep neural networks for various tasks. Transmission of raw images, i.e., without any form of compression, requires high bandwidth and can lead to congestion issues and delays in transmission. The use of lossy image compression techniques can reduce the quality of the images, leading to accuracy degradation. In this paper, we analyze the effect of applying low-overhead lossy image compression methods on the accuracy of visual crowd counting, and measure the trade-off between bandwidth reduction and the obtained accuracy.
abstract_zh: 放置在智能城市各处的摄像机捕获的图像和视频帧通常通过网络传输到服务器，由深度神经网络处理以执行各种任务。原始图像的传输（即没有任何形式的压缩）需要高带宽，并且可能导致传输拥塞问题和延迟。使用有损图像压缩技术会降低图像质量，导致精度下降。在本文中，我们分析了应用低开销有损图像压缩方法对视觉人群计数准确性的影响，并衡量了带宽减少和所获得的准确性之间的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文分析低开销有损图像压缩对智能城市视觉人群计数任务准确性的影响，并评估带宽缩减与精度损失的权衡关系。
AI.motivation: 智能城市中海量图像传输导致带宽压力与延迟问题，而有损压缩虽能降低带宽需求但可能损害计数精度，需量化二者权衡关系以指导实际部署。
AI.method: 通过实验测试多种低开销有损压缩算法在人群计数模型中的表现，测量不同压缩率下的精度下降幅度与带宽节省比例。
AI.result: 部分压缩方法在保持较高计数精度的同时实现显著带宽缩减，存在压缩率与精度的非线性关系临界点。
AI.conclusion: 合理选择低开销压缩参数可在智能城市应用中实现传输效率与计数精度的平衡，为资源受限场景提供优化方案。

In this paper, we analyze the effect of applying low-overhead lossy image compression methods on the accuracy of visual crowd counting, and measure the trade-off between bandwidth reduction and the obtained accuracy. 放置在智能城市各处的摄像机捕获的图像和视频帧通常通过网络传输到服务器，由深度神经网络处理以执行各种任务。原始图像的传输（即没有任何形式的压缩）需要高带宽，并且可能导致传输拥塞问题和延迟。使用有损图像压缩技术会降低图像质量，导致精度下降。在本文中，我们分析了应用低开销有损图像压缩方法对视觉人群计数准确性的影响，并衡量了带宽减少和所获得的准确性之间的权衡。 本文分析低开销有损图像压缩对智能城市视觉人群计数任务准确性的影响，并评估带宽缩减与精度损失的权衡关系。 Arian Bakhtiarnia,Błażej Leporowski,Lukas Esterle,Alexandros Iosifidis cs.CV

authors_text: Lavanya Singh
title: Automated Kantian Ethics: A Faithful Implementation
title_zh: 自动化的康德伦理学：忠实的实施
comment: 20 pages, 8 figures, to appear in KI: 45th German Conference on Artificial Intelligence
comments: 20 pages, 8 figures, to appear in KI: 45th German Conference on Artificial Intelligence
abstract: As we grant artificial intelligence increasing power and independence in contexts like healthcare, policing, and driving, AI faces moral dilemmas but lacks the tools to solve them. Warnings from regulators, philosophers, and computer scientists about the dangers of unethical artificial intelligence have spurred interest in automated ethics-i.e., the development of machines that can perform ethical reasoning. However, prior work in automated ethics rarely engages with philosophical literature. Philosophers have spent centuries debating moral dilemmas so automated ethics will be most nuanced, consistent, and reliable when it draws on philosophical literature. In this paper, I present an implementation of automated Kantian ethics that is faithful to the Kantian philosophical tradition. I formalize Kant's categorical imperative in Dyadic Deontic Logic, implement this formalization in the Isabelle theorem prover, and develop a testing framework to evaluate how well my implementation coheres with expected properties of Kantian ethic. My system is an early step towards philosophically mature ethical AI agents and it can make nuanced judgements in complex ethical dilemmas because it is grounded in philosophical literature. Because I use an interactive theorem prover, my system's judgements are explainable.
summary: As we grant artificial intelligence increasing power and independence in contexts like healthcare, policing, and driving, AI faces moral dilemmas but lacks the tools to solve them. Warnings from regulators, philosophers, and computer scientists about the dangers of unethical artificial intelligence have spurred interest in automated ethics-i.e., the development of machines that can perform ethical reasoning. However, prior work in automated ethics rarely engages with philosophical literature. Philosophers have spent centuries debating moral dilemmas so automated ethics will be most nuanced, consistent, and reliable when it draws on philosophical literature. In this paper, I present an implementation of automated Kantian ethics that is faithful to the Kantian philosophical tradition. I formalize Kant's categorical imperative in Dyadic Deontic Logic, implement this formalization in the Isabelle theorem prover, and develop a testing framework to evaluate how well my implementation coheres with expected properties of Kantian ethic. My system is an early step towards philosophically mature ethical AI agents and it can make nuanced judgements in complex ethical dilemmas because it is grounded in philosophical literature. Because I use an interactive theorem prover, my system's judgements are explainable.
abstract_zh: 当我们在医疗保健、治安和驾驶等环境中赋予人工智能越来越大的力量和独立性时，人工智能面临着道德困境，但缺乏解决这些问题的工具。监管机构、哲学家和计算机科学家对不道德人工智能危险的警告激发了人们对自动化伦理的兴趣，即开发能够进行伦理推理的机器。然而，自动化伦理学的先前工作很少涉及哲学文献。哲学家们花了几个世纪的时间争论道德困境，因此当自动化伦理学借鉴哲学文献时，它会是最细致、一致和可靠的。在本文中，我提出了一种忠实于康德哲学传统的自动化康德伦理学的实现。我在二元道义逻辑中形式化了康德的绝对命令，在伊莎贝尔定理证明器中实现了这种形式化，并开发了一个测试框架来评估我的实现与康德伦理的预期属性的一致性。我的系统是迈向哲学上成熟的道德人工智能代理的早期一步，它可以在复杂的道德困境中做出细致入微的判断，因为它基于哲学文献。因为我使用交互式定理证明器，所以我的系统的判断是可以解释的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种忠实于康德哲学传统的自动化康德伦理实现方法，通过形式化康德的绝对命令并利用定理证明工具进行验证。
AI.motivation: 随着AI在关键领域应用的增加，其面临的道德困境需要更可靠的伦理决策工具，而现有自动化伦理研究缺乏对哲学文献的深度整合。
AI.method: 将康德的绝对命令形式化为二元道义逻辑，使用Isabelle定理证明器实现，并构建测试框架验证系统与康德伦理特性的契合度。
AI.result: 开发出能够基于哲学文献进行复杂伦理判断的可解释AI系统，实现了对康德伦理原则的忠实呈现。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为哲学驱动的伦理AI提供了早期范例，证明了通过形式化哲学理论可构建出可靠且可解释的伦理决策系统。

authors_text: Xiao Gu,Yao Guo,Zeju Li,Jianing Qiu,Qi Dou,Yuxuan Liu,Benny Lo,Guang-Zhong Yang
title: Tackling Long-Tailed Category Distribution Under Domain Shifts
title_zh: 解决领域转移下的长尾类别分布问题
abstract: Machine learning models fail to perform well on real-world applications when 1) the category distribution P(Y) of the training dataset suffers from long-tailed distribution and 2) the test data is drawn from different conditional distributions P(X|Y). Existing approaches cannot handle the scenario where both issues exist, which however is common for real-world applications. In this study, we took a step forward and looked into the problem of long-tailed classification under domain shifts. We designed three novel core functional blocks including Distribution Calibrated Classification Loss, Visual-Semantic Mapping and Semantic-Similarity Guided Augmentation. Furthermore, we adopted a meta-learning framework which integrates these three blocks to improve domain generalization on unseen target domains. Two new datasets were proposed for this problem, named AWA2-LTS and ImageNet-LTS. We evaluated our method on the two datasets and extensive experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method can achieve superior performance over state-of-the-art long-tailed/domain generalization approaches and the combinations. Source codes and datasets can be found at our project page https://xiaogu.site/LTDS.
summary: Machine learning models fail to perform well on real-world applications when 1) the category distribution P(Y) of the training dataset suffers from long-tailed distribution and 2) the test data is drawn from different conditional distributions P(X|Y). Existing approaches cannot handle the scenario where both issues exist, which however is common for real-world applications. In this study, we took a step forward and looked into the problem of long-tailed classification under domain shifts. We designed three novel core functional blocks including Distribution Calibrated Classification Loss, Visual-Semantic Mapping and Semantic-Similarity Guided Augmentation. Furthermore, we adopted a meta-learning framework which integrates these three blocks to improve domain generalization on unseen target domains. Two new datasets were proposed for this problem, named AWA2-LTS and ImageNet-LTS. We evaluated our method on the two datasets and extensive experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method can achieve superior performance over state-of-the-art long-tailed/domain generalization approaches and the combinations. Source codes and datasets can be found at our project page https://xiaogu.site/LTDS.
abstract_zh: 当 1) 训练数据集的类别分布 P(Y) 存在长尾分布以及 2) 测试数据来自不同的条件分布 P(X|Y) 时，机器学习模型无法在实际应用中表现良好。现有方法无法处理同时存在这两个问题的情况，但这对于实际应用程序来说很常见。在这项研究中，我们向前迈出了一步，研究了领域转移下的长尾分类问题。我们设计了三个新颖的核心功能块，包括分布校准分类损失、视觉语义映射和语义相似性引导增强。此外，我们采用了一个元学习框架，该框架集成了这三个模块，以提高对未见过的目标领域的领域泛化。针对这个问题提出了两个新的数据集，名为 AWA2-LTS 和 ImageNet-LTS。我们在两个数据集上评估了我们的方法，广泛的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以实现优于最先进的长尾/域泛化方法及其组合的性能。源代码和数据集可以在我们的项目页面 https://xiaogu.site/LTDS 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在领域迁移情况下解决长尾类别分布分类问题，提出新方法和数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法同时处理训练数据长尾分布和测试数据领域偏移的现实场景，需改进模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计分布校准分类损失、视觉-语义映射和语义相似性引导增强三个模块，结合元学习框架提升领域适应性。
AI.result: 在自建的AWA2-LTS和ImageNet-LTS数据集上，优于现有长尾及领域泛化方法的组合性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多模块元学习框架有效解决了长尾分布与领域偏移共存场景下的分类难题。

authors_text: Gautam Salhotra,I-Chun Arthur Liu,Marcus Dominguez-Kuhne,Gaurav S. Sukhatme
title: Learning Deformable Object Manipulation from Expert Demonstrations
title_zh: 从专家演示中学习可变形物体的操作
comment: Accepted to IEEE Robotics & Automation Letters (RA-L) and IEEE IROS 2022. Project website: https://uscresl.github.io/dmfd
comments: Accepted to IEEE Robotics & Automation Letters (RA-L) and IEEE IROS 2022. Project website: https://uscresl.github.io/dmfd
abstract: We present a novel Learning from Demonstration (LfD) method, Deformable Manipulation from Demonstrations (DMfD), to solve deformable manipulation tasks using states or images as inputs, given expert demonstrations. Our method uses demonstrations in three different ways, and balances the trade-off between exploring the environment online and using guidance from experts to explore high dimensional spaces effectively. We test DMfD on a set of representative manipulation tasks for a 1-dimensional rope and a 2-dimensional cloth from the SoftGym suite of tasks, each with state and image observations. Our method exceeds baseline performance by up to 12.9% for state-based tasks and up to 33.44% on image-based tasks, with comparable or better robustness to randomness. Additionally, we create two challenging environments for folding a 2D cloth using image-based observations, and set a performance benchmark for them. We deploy DMfD on a real robot with a minimal loss in normalized performance during real-world execution compared to simulation (~6%). Source code is on github.com/uscresl/dmfd
summary: We present a novel Learning from Demonstration (LfD) method, Deformable Manipulation from Demonstrations (DMfD), to solve deformable manipulation tasks using states or images as inputs, given expert demonstrations. Our method uses demonstrations in three different ways, and balances the trade-off between exploring the environment online and using guidance from experts to explore high dimensional spaces effectively. We test DMfD on a set of representative manipulation tasks for a 1-dimensional rope and a 2-dimensional cloth from the SoftGym suite of tasks, each with state and image observations. Our method exceeds baseline performance by up to 12.9% for state-based tasks and up to 33.44% on image-based tasks, with comparable or better robustness to randomness. Additionally, we create two challenging environments for folding a 2D cloth using image-based observations, and set a performance benchmark for them. We deploy DMfD on a real robot with a minimal loss in normalized performance during real-world execution compared to simulation (~6%). Source code is on github.com/uscresl/dmfd
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的演示学习（LfD）方法，即演示变形操纵（DMfD），在专家演示的情况下，使用状态或图像作为输入来解决变形操纵任务。我们的方法以三种不同的方式使用演示，并平衡在线探索环境和使用专家指导有效探索高维空间之间的权衡。我们在 SoftGym 任务套件中针对一维绳子和二维布料的一组代表性操作任务测试 DMfD，每个任务都有状态和图像观察。我们的方法对于基于状态的任务超出基线性能高达 12.9%，对于基于图像的任务超出基线性能高达 33.44%，并且对随机性具有相当或更好的鲁棒性。此外，我们使用基于图像的观察创建了两个具有挑战性的环境来折叠 2D 布料，并为其设置了性能基准。我们在真实机器人上部署 DMfD，与模拟相比，在实际执行过程中标准化性能损失最小 (~6%)。源代码位于 github.com/uscresl/dmfd

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从专家演示中学习可变形物体操作的新方法DMfD，通过状态或图像输入解决可变形操作任务。
AI.motivation: 可变形物体操作因高维状态空间和复杂形变而具有挑战性，传统方法难以有效平衡在线探索与专家指导。
AI.method: DMfD通过三种方式利用专家演示，在线探索与专家指导间进行平衡，适用于SoftGym中的绳索和布料操作任务。
AI.result: 在状态输入任务中优于基线12.9%，图像输入任务中提升33.44%，并创建了两个图像基准环境，实际机器人部署性能损失仅6%。
AI.conclusion: DMfD有效解决了可变形操作难题，展示了对随机性的鲁棒性，并为未来研究提供了性能基准。

search_text: Learning Deformable Object Manipulation from Expert Demonstrations 从专家演示中学习可变形物体的操作 We present a novel Learning from Demonstration (LfD) method, Deformable Manipulation from Demonstrations (DMfD), to solve deformable manipulation tasks using states or images as inputs, given expert demonstrations. Our method uses demonstrations in three different ways, and balances the trade-off between exploring the environment online and using guidance from experts to explore high dimensional spaces effectively. We test DMfD on a set of representative manipulation tasks for a 1-dimensional rope and a 2-dimensional cloth from the SoftGym suite of tasks, each with state and image observations. Our method exceeds baseline performance by up to 12.9% for state-based tasks and up to 33.44% on image-based tasks, with comparable or better robustness to randomness. Additionally, we create two challenging environments for folding a 2D cloth using image-based observations, and set a performance benchmark for them. We deploy DMfD on a real robot with a minimal loss in normalized performance during real-world execution compared to simulation (~6%). Source code is on github.com/uscresl/dmfd 我们提出了一种新颖的演示学习（LfD）方法，即演示变形操纵（DMfD），在专家演示的情况下，使用状态或图像作为输入来解决变形操纵任务。我们的方法以三种不同的方式使用演示，并平衡在线探索环境和使用专家指导有效探索高维空间之间的权衡。我们在 SoftGym 任务套件中针对一维绳子和二维布料的一组代表性操作任务测试 DMfD，每个任务都有状态和图像观察。我们的方法对于基于状态的任务超出基线性能高达 12.9%，对于基于图像的任务超出基线性能高达 33.44%，并且对随机性具有相当或更好的鲁棒性。此外，我们使用基于图像的观察创建了两个具有挑战性的环境来折叠 2D 布料，并为其设置了性能基准。我们在真实机器人上部署 DMfD，与模拟相比，在实际执行过程中标准化性能损失最小 (~6%)。源代码位于 github.com/uscresl/dmfd 本文提出一种从专家演示中学习可变形物体操作的新方法DMfD，通过状态或图像输入解决可变形操作任务。 Gautam Salhotra,I-Chun Arthur Liu,Marcus Dominguez-Kuhne,Gaurav S. authors_text: Efthymios Tzinis,Scott Wisdom,Tal Remez,John R. Hershey
title: AudioScopeV2: Audio-Visual Attention Architectures for Calibrated Open-Domain On-Screen Sound Separation
title_zh: AudioScopeV2：用于校准开放域屏幕声音分离的视听注意力架构
abstract: We introduce AudioScopeV2, a state-of-the-art universal audio-visual on-screen sound separation system which is capable of learning to separate sounds and associate them with on-screen objects by looking at in-the-wild videos. We identify several limitations of previous work on audio-visual on-screen sound separation, including the coarse resolution of spatio-temporal attention, poor convergence of the audio separation model, limited variety in training and evaluation data, and failure to account for the trade off between preservation of on-screen sounds and suppression of off-screen sounds. We provide solutions to all of these issues. Our proposed cross-modal and self-attention network architectures capture audio-visual dependencies at a finer resolution over time, and we also propose efficient separable variants that are capable of scaling to longer videos without sacrificing much performance. We also find that pre-training the separation model only on audio greatly improves results. For training and evaluation, we collected new human annotations of onscreen sounds from a large database of in-the-wild videos (YFCC100M). This new dataset is more diverse and challenging. Finally, we propose a calibration procedure that allows exact tuning of on-screen reconstruction versus off-screen suppression, which greatly simplifies comparing performance between models with different operating points. Overall, our experimental results show marked improvements in on-screen separation performance under much more general conditions than previous methods with minimal additional computational complexity.
summary: We introduce AudioScopeV2, a state-of-the-art universal audio-visual on-screen sound separation system which is capable of learning to separate sounds and associate them with on-screen objects by looking at in-the-wild videos. We identify several limitations of previous work on audio-visual on-screen sound separation, including the coarse resolution of spatio-temporal attention, poor convergence of the audio separation model, limited variety in training and evaluation data, and failure to account for the trade off between preservation of on-screen sounds and suppression of off-screen sounds. We provide solutions to all of these issues. Our proposed cross-modal and self-attention network architectures capture audio-visual dependencies at a finer resolution over time, and we also propose efficient separable variants that are capable of scaling to longer videos without sacrificing much performance. We also find that pre-training the separation model only on audio greatly improves results. For training and evaluation, we collected new human annotations of onscreen sounds from a large database of in-the-wild videos (YFCC100M). This new dataset is more diverse and challenging. Finally, we propose a calibration procedure that allows exact tuning of on-screen reconstruction versus off-screen suppression, which greatly simplifies comparing performance between models with different operating points. Overall, our experimental results show marked improvements in on-screen separation performance under much more general conditions than previous methods with minimal additional computational complexity.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 AudioScopeV2，这是一种最先进的通用视听屏幕声音分离系统，能够学习分离声音并通过观看野外视频将声音与屏幕上的对象关联起来。我们发现了先前关于视听屏幕声音分离工作的一些局限性，包括时空注意力的粗分辨率、音频分离模型的收敛性差、训练和评估数据的多样性有限，以及未能考虑屏幕上声音的保留和屏幕外声音的抑制之间的权衡。我们为所有这些问题提供解决方案。我们提出的跨模态和自注意力网络架构随着时间的推移以更精细的分辨率捕获视听依赖性，并且我们还提出了有效的可分离变体，能够在不牺牲太多性能的情况下扩展到更长的视频。我们还发现仅在音频上预训练分离模型可以大大改善结果。为了进行训练和评估，我们从大型野外视频数据库 (YFCC100M) 中收集了屏幕声音的新人类注释。这个新的数据集更加多样化且更具挑战性。最后，我们提出了一种校准程序，允许精确调整屏幕上重建与屏幕外抑制，这大大简化了具有不同操作点的模型之间的性能比较。总体而言，我们的实验结果表明，与以前的方法相比，在更通用的条件下，屏幕上的分离性能有了显着的提高，并且附加的计算复杂性最小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AudioScopeV2系统，通过音频-视觉注意力机制实现对真实场景视频中屏幕内声音的校准分离。
AI.motivation: 针对现有音频-视觉屏幕内声音分离方法存在时空注意力分辨率粗糙、模型收敛性差、训练数据多样性不足及无法平衡屏幕内声音保留与屏幕外声音抑制的矛盾等问题，提出改进方案。
AI.method: 设计跨模态与自注意力网络架构提升时序分辨率，提出高效可扩展的分离变体；仅通过音频预训练分离模型；构建基于YFCC100M数据集的新型标注数据；引入校准机制精确调节屏幕内重建与屏幕外抑制的权衡。
AI.result: 实验表明在更通用场景下屏幕内分离性能显著提升，且计算复杂度增加有限。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过多维度优化实现了更精准的开放域屏幕内声音分离，并提供了模型性能对比的标准化校准方案。

authors_text: Rahul Rahaman,Dipika Singhania,Alexandre Thiery,Angela Yao
title: A Generalized & Robust Framework For Timestamp Supervision in Temporal Action Segmentation
title_zh: 时间动作分割中时间戳监督的通用且稳健的框架
abstract: In temporal action segmentation, Timestamp supervision requires only a handful of labelled frames per video sequence. For unlabelled frames, previous works rely on assigning hard labels, and performance rapidly collapses under subtle violations of the annotation assumptions. We propose a novel Expectation-Maximization (EM) based approach that leverages the label uncertainty of unlabelled frames and is robust enough to accommodate possible annotation errors. With accurate timestamp annotations, our proposed method produces SOTA results and even exceeds the fully-supervised setup in several metrics and datasets. When applied to timestamp annotations with missing action segments, our method presents stable performance. To further test our formulation's robustness, we introduce the new challenging annotation setup of Skip-tag supervision. This setup relaxes constraints and requires annotations of any fixed number of random frames in a video, making it more flexible than Timestamp supervision while remaining competitive.
summary: In temporal action segmentation, Timestamp supervision requires only a handful of labelled frames per video sequence. For unlabelled frames, previous works rely on assigning hard labels, and performance rapidly collapses under subtle violations of the annotation assumptions. We propose a novel Expectation-Maximization (EM) based approach that leverages the label uncertainty of unlabelled frames and is robust enough to accommodate possible annotation errors. With accurate timestamp annotations, our proposed method produces SOTA results and even exceeds the fully-supervised setup in several metrics and datasets. When applied to timestamp annotations with missing action segments, our method presents stable performance. To further test our formulation's robustness, we introduce the new challenging annotation setup of Skip-tag supervision. This setup relaxes constraints and requires annotations of any fixed number of random frames in a video, making it more flexible than Timestamp supervision while remaining competitive.
abstract_zh: 在时间动作分割中，时间戳监督每个视频序列只需要少量标记帧。对于未标记的帧，以前的工作依赖于分配硬标签，并且在轻微违反注释假设的情况下性能会迅速崩溃。我们提出了一种基于期望最大化（EM）的新颖方法，该方法利用未标记帧的标签不确定性，并且足够鲁棒以适应可能的注释错误。通过准确的时间戳注释，我们提出的方法可以产生 SOTA 结果，甚至在多个指标和数据集中超过了完全监督的设置。当应用于缺少动作段的时间戳注释时，我们的方法表现出稳定的性能。为了进一步测试我们的公式的稳健性，我们引入了新的具有挑战性的跳跃标签监督注释设置。这种设置放宽了限制，并且需要对视频中任意固定数量的随机帧进行注释，使其比时间戳监督更加灵活，同时保持竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种鲁棒的时间戳监督框架，用于解决时间动作分割中未标记帧标签不确定性和注释误差的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过硬标签处理未标记帧，但对注释假设的微小偏差敏感，导致性能下降，需提升方法鲁棒性以适应真实场景的注释误差和缺失。
AI.method: 基于期望最大化（EM）算法，利用未标记帧的标签不确定性建模，并引入跳过标签监督新设置以增强灵活性和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在准确时间戳注释下达到SOTA性能，超越全监督方法；在缺失动作片段和跳过标签监督设置下均保持稳定表现。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了时间戳监督的鲁棒性，适用于不同注释场景，为弱监督时间动作分割提供了新思路。

search_text: A Generalized & Robust Framework For Timestamp Supervision in Temporal Action Segmentation 时间动作分割中时间戳监督的通用且稳健的框架 In temporal action segmentation, Timestamp supervision requires only a handful of labelled frames per video sequence. For unlabelled frames, previous works rely on assigning hard labels, and performance rapidly collapses under subtle violations of the annotation assumptions. We propose a novel Expectation-Maximization (EM) based approach that leverages the label uncertainty of unlabelled frames and is robust enough to accommodate possible annotation errors. With accurate timestamp annotations, our proposed method produces SOTA results and even exceeds the fully-supervised setup in several metrics and datasets. When applied to timestamp annotations with missing action segments, our method presents stable performance. To further test our formulation's robustness, we introduce the new challenging annotation setup of Skip-tag supervision. This setup relaxes constraints and requires annotations of any fixed number of random frames in a video, making it more flexible than Timestamp supervision while remaining competitive. 在时间动作分割中，时间戳监督每个视频序列只需要少量标记帧。对于未标记的帧，以前的工作依赖于分配硬标签，并且在轻微违反注释假设的情况下性能会迅速崩溃。我们提出了一种基于期望最大化（EM）的新颖方法，该方法利用未标记帧的标签不确定性，并且足够鲁棒以适应可能的注释错误。通过准确的时间戳注释，我们提出的方法可以产生 SOTA 结果，甚至在多个指标和数据集中超过了完全监督的设置。当应用于缺少动作段的时间戳注释时，我们的方法表现出稳定的性能。为了进一步测试我们的公式的稳健性，我们引入了新的具有挑战性的跳跃标签监督注释设置。这种设置放宽了限制，并且需要对视频中任意固定数量的随机帧进行注释，使其比时间戳监督更加灵活，同时保持竞争力。 本文提出一种鲁棒的时间戳监督框架，用于解决时间动作分割中未标记帧标签不确定性和注释误差的问题。 Rahul Rahaman,Dipika Singhania,Alexandre Thiery,Angela Yao cs.CV

authors_text: Fei Ye,Adrian G. Bors
title: Continual Variational Autoencoder Learning via Online Cooperative Memorization
title_zh: 通过在线合作记忆进行持续变分自编码器学习
comment: Accepted by European Conference on Computer Vision 2022 (ECCV 2022)
comments: Accepted by European Conference on Computer Vision 2022 (ECCV 2022)
abstract: Due to their inference, data representation and reconstruction properties, Variational Autoencoders (VAE) have been successfully used in continual learning classification tasks. However, their ability to generate images with specifications corresponding to the classes and databases learned during Continual Learning (CL) is not well understood and catastrophic forgetting remains a significant challenge. In this paper, we firstly analyze the forgetting behaviour of VAEs by developing a new theoretical framework that formulates CL as a dynamic optimal transport problem. This framework proves approximate bounds to the data likelihood without requiring the task information and explains how the prior knowledge is lost during the training process. We then propose a novel memory buffering approach, namely the Online Cooperative Memorization (OCM) framework, which consists of a Short-Term Memory (STM) that continually stores recent samples to provide future information for the model, and a Long-Term Memory (LTM) aiming to preserve a wide diversity of samples. The proposed OCM transfers certain samples from STM to LTM according to the information diversity selection criterion without requiring any supervised signals. The OCM framework is then combined with a dynamic VAE expansion mixture network for further enhancing its performance.
summary: Due to their inference, data representation and reconstruction properties, Variational Autoencoders (VAE) have been successfully used in continual learning classification tasks. However, their ability to generate images with specifications corresponding to the classes and databases learned during Continual Learning (CL) is not well understood and catastrophic forgetting remains a significant challenge. In this paper, we firstly analyze the forgetting behaviour of VAEs by developing a new theoretical framework that formulates CL as a dynamic optimal transport problem. This framework proves approximate bounds to the data likelihood without requiring the task information and explains how the prior knowledge is lost during the training process. We then propose a novel memory buffering approach, namely the Online Cooperative Memorization (OCM) framework, which consists of a Short-Term Memory (STM) that continually stores recent samples to provide future information for the model, and a Long-Term Memory (LTM) aiming to preserve a wide diversity of samples. The proposed OCM transfers certain samples from STM to LTM according to the information diversity selection criterion without requiring any supervised signals. The OCM framework is then combined with a dynamic VAE expansion mixture network for further enhancing its performance.
abstract_zh: 由于其推理、数据表示和重建特性，变分自编码器（VAE）已成功用于持续学习分类任务。然而，它们生成具有与持续学习（CL）期间学习的类别和数据库相对应的规格的图像的能力尚未得到很好的理解，灾难性遗忘仍然是一个重大挑战。在本文中，我们首先通过开发一个新的理论框架来分析 VAE 的遗忘行为，该框架将 CL 表述为动态最优传输问题。该框架在不需要任务信息的情况下证明了数据可能性的近似界限，并解释了先验知识在训练过程中如何丢失。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的内存缓冲方法，即在线合作记忆（OCM）框架，它由持续存储最近样本以为模型提供未来信息的短期记忆（STM）和旨在保留样本的广泛多样性的长期记忆（LTM）组成。所提出的 OCM 根据信息多样性选择标准将某些样本从 STM 传输到 LTM，而不需要任何监督信号。然后将 OCM 框架与动态 VAE 扩展混合网络相结合，以进一步增强其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于在线协作记忆机制的连续变分自编码器学习方法，以解决连续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 变分自编码器（VAE）在连续学习分类任务中表现良好，但其在生成符合已学习类别和数据库的图像方面的能力不足，且存在显著的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 构建动态最优运输理论框架分析遗忘行为，并提出在线协作记忆（OCM）框架，包含短期记忆（STM）和长期记忆（LTM），通过信息多样性准则无需监督信号即可转移样本。
AI.result: OCM框架结合动态VAE混合网络显著提升了连续学习任务中的性能，有效缓解了灾难性遗忘。
AI.conclusion: OCM方法通过无监督的记忆机制有效解决了VAE在连续学习中的遗忘问题，为持续生成任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Gianni Franchi,Xuanlong Yu,Andrei Bursuc,Emanuel Aldea,Severine Dubuisson,David Filliat
title: Latent Discriminant deterministic Uncertainty
title_zh: 潜在判别确定性不确定性
abstract: Predictive uncertainty estimation is essential for deploying Deep Neural Networks in real-world autonomous systems. However, most successful approaches are computationally intensive. In this work, we attempt to address these challenges in the context of autonomous driving perception tasks. Recently proposed Deterministic Uncertainty Methods (DUM) can only partially meet such requirements as their scalability to complex computer vision tasks is not obvious. In this work we advance a scalable and effective DUM for high-resolution semantic segmentation, that relaxes the Lipschitz constraint typically hindering practicality of such architectures. We learn a discriminant latent space by leveraging a distinction maximization layer over an arbitrarily-sized set of trainable prototypes. Our approach achieves competitive results over Deep Ensembles, the state-of-the-art for uncertainty prediction, on image classification, segmentation and monocular depth estimation tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/ENSTA-U2IS/LDU
summary: Predictive uncertainty estimation is essential for deploying Deep Neural Networks in real-world autonomous systems. However, most successful approaches are computationally intensive. In this work, we attempt to address these challenges in the context of autonomous driving perception tasks. Recently proposed Deterministic Uncertainty Methods (DUM) can only partially meet such requirements as their scalability to complex computer vision tasks is not obvious. In this work we advance a scalable and effective DUM for high-resolution semantic segmentation, that relaxes the Lipschitz constraint typically hindering practicality of such architectures. We learn a discriminant latent space by leveraging a distinction maximization layer over an arbitrarily-sized set of trainable prototypes. Our approach achieves competitive results over Deep Ensembles, the state-of-the-art for uncertainty prediction, on image classification, segmentation and monocular depth estimation tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/ENSTA-U2IS/LDU
abstract_zh: 预测不确定性估计对于在现实世界的自治系统中部署深度神经网络至关重要。然而，大多数成功的方法都是计算密集型的。在这项工作中，我们试图在自动驾驶感知任务的背景下解决这些挑战。最近提出的确定性不确定性方法（DUM）只能部分满足此类要求，因为它们对复杂计算机视觉任务的可扩展性并不明显。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于高分辨率语义分割的可扩展且有效的 DUM，它放松了通常阻碍此类架构实用性的 Lipschitz 约束。我们通过在任意大小的可训练原型集上利用区别最大化层来学习判别潜在空间。我们的方法在图像分类、分割和单目深度估计任务上取得了优于深度集成（最先进的不确定性预测）的竞争结果。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/ENSTA-U2IS/LDU

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可扩展的确定性不确定性方法（DUM），用于自动驾驶感知任务中的高分辨率语义分割，通过放松Lipschitz约束并学习判别性潜在空间以提升模型实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有确定性不确定性方法（DUM）在复杂计算机视觉任务中可扩展性不足，且计算成本较高，难以满足自动驾驶等实时系统需求。
AI.method: 通过引入区分最大化层和可训练原型集，放松Lipschitz约束，学习判别性潜在空间，实现高效且可扩展的不确定性估计。
AI.result: 在图像分类、分割和单目深度估计任务中，该方法性能优于Deep Ensembles等现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的LDU方法有效解决了DUM的可扩展性问题，在保持计算效率的同时提升了不确定性估计的准确性，适用于自动驾驶等实际场景。

conclusion: 本文提出的LDU方法有效解决了DUM的可扩展性问题，在保持计算效率的同时提升了不确定性估计的准确性，适用于自动驾驶等实际场景。
search_text: Latent Discriminant deterministic Uncertainty 潜在判别确定性不确定性 Predictive uncertainty estimation is essential for deploying Deep Neural Networks in real-world autonomous systems. However, most successful approaches are computationally intensive. In this work, we attempt to address these challenges in the context of autonomous driving perception tasks. Recently proposed Deterministic Uncertainty Methods (DUM) can only partially meet such requirements as their scalability to complex computer vision tasks is not obvious. In this work we advance a scalable and effective DUM for high-resolution semantic segmentation, that relaxes the Lipschitz constraint typically hindering practicality of such architectures. We learn a discriminant latent space by leveraging a distinction maximization layer over an arbitrarily-sized set of trainable prototypes. Our approach achieves competitive results over Deep Ensembles, the state-of-the-art for uncertainty prediction, on image classification, segmentation and monocular depth estimation tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/ENSTA-U2IS/LDU 预测不确定性估计对于在现实世界的自治系统中部署深度神经网络至关重要。然而，大多数成功的方法都是计算密集型的。在这项工作中，我们试图在自动驾驶感知任务的背景下解决这些挑战。最近提出的确定性不确定性方法（DUM）只能部分满足此类要求，因为它们对复杂计算机视觉任务的可扩展性并不明显。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于高分辨率语义分割的可扩展且有效的 DUM，它放松了通常阻碍此类架构实用性的 Lipschitz 约束。我们通过在任意大小的可训练原型集上利用区别最大化层来学习判别潜在空间。我们的方法在图像分类、分割和单目深度估计任务上取得了优于深度集成（最先进的不确定性预测）的竞争结果。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/ENSTA-U2IS/LDU 本文提出一种可扩展的确定性不确定性方法（DUM），用于自动驾驶感知任务中的高分辨率语义分割，通过放松Lipschitz约束并学习判别性潜在空间以提升模型实用性。 Gianni Franchi,Xuanlong Yu,Andrei Bursuc,Emanuel Aldea,Severine Dubuisson,David Filliat cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhihang Zhong,Xiao Sun,Zhirong Wu,Yinqiang Zheng,Stephen Lin,Imari Sato
title: Animation from Blur: Multi-modal Blur Decomposition with Motion Guidance
title_zh: 模糊动画：具有运动引导的多模态模糊分解
abstract: We study the challenging problem of recovering detailed motion from a single motion-blurred image. Existing solutions to this problem estimate a single image sequence without considering the motion ambiguity for each region. Therefore, the results tend to converge to the mean of the multi-modal possibilities. In this paper, we explicitly account for such motion ambiguity, allowing us to generate multiple plausible solutions all in sharp detail. The key idea is to introduce a motion guidance representation, which is a compact quantization of 2D optical flow with only four discrete motion directions. Conditioned on the motion guidance, the blur decomposition is led to a specific, unambiguous solution by using a novel two-stage decomposition network. We propose a unified framework for blur decomposition, which supports various interfaces for generating our motion guidance, including human input, motion information from adjacent video frames, and learning from a video dataset. Extensive experiments on synthesized datasets and real-world data show that the proposed framework is qualitatively and quantitatively superior to previous methods, and also offers the merit of producing physically plausible and diverse solutions. Code is available at https://github.com/zzh-tech/Animation-from-Blur.
summary: We study the challenging problem of recovering detailed motion from a single motion-blurred image. Existing solutions to this problem estimate a single image sequence without considering the motion ambiguity for each region. Therefore, the results tend to converge to the mean of the multi-modal possibilities. In this paper, we explicitly account for such motion ambiguity, allowing us to generate multiple plausible solutions all in sharp detail. The key idea is to introduce a motion guidance representation, which is a compact quantization of 2D optical flow with only four discrete motion directions. Conditioned on the motion guidance, the blur decomposition is led to a specific, unambiguous solution by using a novel two-stage decomposition network. We propose a unified framework for blur decomposition, which supports various interfaces for generating our motion guidance, including human input, motion information from adjacent video frames, and learning from a video dataset. Extensive experiments on synthesized datasets and real-world data show that the proposed framework is qualitatively and quantitatively superior to previous methods, and also offers the merit of producing physically plausible and diverse solutions. Code is available at https://github.com/zzh-tech/Animation-from-Blur.
abstract_zh: 我们研究从单个运动模糊图像中恢复详细运动的挑战性问题。该问题的现有解决方案估计单个图像序列，而不考虑每个区域的运动模糊度。因此，结果趋于收敛于多模态可能性的均值。在本文中，我们明确地解释了这种运动模糊性，使我们能够生成多个清晰细节的合理解决方案。关键思想是引入运动引导表示，它是仅具有四个离散运动方向的 2D 光流的紧凑量化。以运动引导为条件，通过使用新颖的两阶段分解网络，模糊分解得到特定的、明确的解决方案。我们提出了一个统一的模糊分解框架，它支持用于生成运动指导的各种接口，包括人类输入、来自相邻视频帧的运动信息以及从视频数据集学习。对合成数据集和真实世界数据的大量实验表明，所提出的框架在质量和数量上都优于以前的方法，并且还具有产生物理上合理且多样化的解决方案的优点。代码可在 https://github.com/zzh-tech/Animation-from-Blur 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何从单张运动模糊图像中恢复详细运动信息，提出多模态模糊分解方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未考虑图像各区域的运动模糊歧义性，导致结果趋向于多模态可能性的平均值，缺乏多样性。
AI.method: 引入四向离散运动引导表示，结合双阶段分解网络，通过人类输入、相邻帧运动信息或视频数据集学习生成运动引导。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实数据上均优于现有方法，生成物理合理且多样化的清晰运动序列。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决运动模糊歧义性问题，为单图运动恢复提供多样化高质量解决方案。

authors_text: Davide Moltisanti,Jinyi Wu,Bo Dai,Chen Change Loy
title: BRACE: The Breakdancing Competition Dataset for Dance Motion Synthesis
title_zh: BRACE：用于舞蹈动作合成的霹雳舞比赛数据集
abstract: Generative models for audio-conditioned dance motion synthesis map music features to dance movements. Models are trained to associate motion patterns to audio patterns, usually without an explicit knowledge of the human body. This approach relies on a few assumptions: strong music-dance correlation, controlled motion data and relatively simple poses and movements. These characteristics are found in all existing datasets for dance motion synthesis, and indeed recent methods can achieve good results.We introduce a new dataset aiming to challenge these common assumptions, compiling a set of dynamic dance sequences displaying complex human poses. We focus on breakdancing which features acrobatic moves and tangled postures. We source our data from the Red Bull BC One competition videos. Estimating human keypoints from these videos is difficult due to the complexity of the dance, as well as the multiple moving cameras recording setup. We adopt a hybrid labelling pipeline leveraging deep estimation models as well as manual annotations to obtain good quality keypoint sequences at a reduced cost. Our efforts produced the BRACE dataset, which contains over 3 hours and 30 minutes of densely annotated poses. We test state-of-the-art methods on BRACE, showing their limitations when evaluated on complex sequences. Our dataset can readily foster advance in dance motion synthesis. With intricate poses and swift movements, models are forced to go beyond learning a mapping between modalities and reason more effectively about body structure and movements.
summary: Generative models for audio-conditioned dance motion synthesis map music features to dance movements. Models are trained to associate motion patterns to audio patterns, usually without an explicit knowledge of the human body. This approach relies on a few assumptions: strong music-dance correlation, controlled motion data and relatively simple poses and movements. These characteristics are found in all existing datasets for dance motion synthesis, and indeed recent methods can achieve good results.We introduce a new dataset aiming to challenge these common assumptions, compiling a set of dynamic dance sequences displaying complex human poses. We focus on breakdancing which features acrobatic moves and tangled postures. We source our data from the Red Bull BC One competition videos. Estimating human keypoints from these videos is difficult due to the complexity of the dance, as well as the multiple moving cameras recording setup. We adopt a hybrid labelling pipeline leveraging deep estimation models as well as manual annotations to obtain good quality keypoint sequences at a reduced cost. Our efforts produced the BRACE dataset, which contains over 3 hours and 30 minutes of densely annotated poses. We test state-of-the-art methods on BRACE, showing their limitations when evaluated on complex sequences. Our dataset can readily foster advance in dance motion synthesis. With intricate poses and swift movements, models are forced to go beyond learning a mapping between modalities and reason more effectively about body structure and movements.
abstract_zh: 音频调节舞蹈动作合成的生成模型将音乐特征映射到舞蹈动作。模型经过训练将运动模式与音频模式关联起来，通常不需要对人体有明确的了解。这种方法依赖于一些假设：强大的音乐-舞蹈相关性、受控的运动数据以及相对简单的姿势和动作。这些特征在所有现有的舞蹈动作合成数据集中都可以找到，而且最近的方法确实可以取得良好的结果。我们引入了一个新的数据集，旨在挑战这些常见假设，编译一组显示复杂人体姿势的动态舞蹈序列。我们专注于霹雳舞，其特点是杂技般的动作和纠结的姿势。我们的数据来源于 Red Bull BC One 比赛视频。由于舞蹈的复杂性以及多个移动摄像机录制设置，从这些视频中估计人体关键点很困难。我们采用混合标记管道，利用深度估计模型和手动注释，以较低的成本获得高质量的关键点序列。我们的努力产生了 BRACE 数据集，其中包含超过 3 小时 30 分钟的密集注释姿势。我们在 BRACE 上测试了最先进的方法，显示了它们在复杂序列上评估时的局限性。我们的数据集可以轻松促进舞蹈动作合成的进步。由于复杂的姿势和快速的动作，模型被迫超越学习模态之间的映射，并更有效地推理身体结构和动作。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为BRACE的新数据集，用于挑战现有舞蹈动作合成模型的假设，专注于包含复杂人体姿势的破舞动作。
AI.motivation: 现有舞蹈动作合成数据集存在动作简单、音乐与舞蹈强关联等局限，难以推动模型深入理解人体结构。破舞的高难度动作和复杂姿态可突破这些限制。
AI.method: 从Red Bull BC One比赛视频中采集数据，采用深度估计模型与人工标注结合的混合标注流程，克服多摄像头拍摄和复杂动作带来的关键点估计难题。
AI.result: 构建了包含3小时30分钟密集标注姿态的BRACE数据集，实验表明现有先进方法在处理复杂序列时存在明显局限。
AI.conclusion: BRACE数据集通过复杂姿态和快速动作推动模型超越模态映射，更深入理解人体结构与运动规律，有望促进舞蹈动作合成领域的发展。

We test state-of-the-art methods on BRACE, showing their limitations when evaluated on complex sequences. Our dataset can readily foster advance in dance motion synthesis. With intricate poses and swift movements, models are forced to go beyond learning a mapping between modalities and reason more effectively about body structure and movements. 音频调节舞蹈动作合成的生成模型将音乐特征映射到舞蹈动作。模型经过训练将运动模式与音频模式关联起来，通常不需要对人体有明确的了解。这种方法依赖于一些假设：强大的音乐-舞蹈相关性、受控的运动数据以及相对简单的姿势和动作。这些特征在所有现有的舞蹈动作合成数据集中都可以找到，而且最近的方法确实可以取得良好的结果。我们引入了一个新的数据集，旨在挑战这些常见假设，编译一组显示复杂人体姿势的动态舞蹈序列。我们专注于霹雳舞，其特点是杂技般的动作和纠结的姿势。我们的数据来源于 Red Bull BC One 比赛视频。由于舞蹈的复杂性以及多个移动摄像机录制设置，从这些视频中估计人体关键点很困难。我们采用混合标记管道，利用深度估计模型和手动注释，以较低的成本获得高质量的关键点序列。我们的努力产生了 BRACE 数据集，其中包含超过 3 小时 30 分钟的密集注释姿势。我们在 BRACE 上测试了最先进的方法，显示了它们在复杂序列上评估时的局限性。我们的数据集可以轻松促进舞蹈动作合成的进步。由于复杂的姿势和快速的动作，模型被迫超越学习模态之间的映射，并更有效地推理身体结构和动作。 本文介绍了一个名为BRACE的新数据集，用于挑战现有舞蹈动作合成模型的假设，专注于包含复杂人体姿势的破舞动作。 Davide Moltisanti,Jinyi Wu,Bo Dai,Chen Change Loy cs.CV

authors_text: Tatsuya Matsushima,Yuki Noguchi,Jumpei Arima,Toshiki Aoki,Yuki Okita,Yuya Ikeda,Koki Ishimoto,Shohei Taniguchi,Yuki Yamashita,Shoichi Seto,Shixiang Shane Gu,Yusuke Iwasawa,Yutaka Matsuo
title: World Robot Challenge 2020 -- Partner Robot: A Data-Driven Approach for Room Tidying with Mobile Manipulator
title_zh: 2020 世界机器人挑战赛——伙伴机器人：利用移动机械手进行房间整理的数据驱动方法
abstract: Tidying up a household environment using a mobile manipulator poses various challenges in robotics, such as adaptation to large real-world environmental variations, and safe and robust deployment in the presence of humans.The Partner Robot Challenge in World Robot Challenge (WRC) 2020, a global competition held in September 2021, benchmarked tidying tasks in the real home environments, and importantly, tested for full system performances.For this challenge, we developed an entire household service robot system, which leverages a data-driven approach to adapt to numerous edge cases that occur during the execution, instead of classical manual pre-programmed solutions. In this paper, we describe the core ingredients of the proposed robot system, including visual recognition, object manipulation, and motion planning. Our robot system won the second prize, verifying the effectiveness and potential of data-driven robot systems for mobile manipulation in home environments.
summary: Tidying up a household environment using a mobile manipulator poses various challenges in robotics, such as adaptation to large real-world environmental variations, and safe and robust deployment in the presence of humans.The Partner Robot Challenge in World Robot Challenge (WRC) 2020, a global competition held in September 2021, benchmarked tidying tasks in the real home environments, and importantly, tested for full system performances.For this challenge, we developed an entire household service robot system, which leverages a data-driven approach to adapt to numerous edge cases that occur during the execution, instead of classical manual pre-programmed solutions. In this paper, we describe the core ingredients of the proposed robot system, including visual recognition, object manipulation, and motion planning. Our robot system won the second prize, verifying the effectiveness and potential of data-driven robot systems for mobile manipulation in home environments.
abstract_zh: 使用移动机械手整理家庭环境对机器人技术提出了各种挑战，例如适应巨大的现实世界环境变化，以及在人类存在的情况下安全可靠的部署。2021年9月举行的全球性竞赛世界机器人挑战赛（WRC）2020中的合作伙伴机器人挑战赛，对真实家庭环境中的整理任务进行了基准测试，重要的是，对整个系统性能进行了测试。针对这项挑战，我们开发了整个家庭服务机器人系统，该系统利用数据驱动的方法适应执行过程中出现的大量边缘情况，而不是传统的手动预编程解决方案。在本文中，我们描述了所提出的机器人系统的核心要素，包括视觉识别、物体操纵和运动规划。我们的机器人系统获得了二等奖，验证了数据驱动的机器人系统在家庭环境中移动操控的有效性和潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数据驱动方法的移动机械臂系统，用于解决家庭环境中的房间整理任务，并在World Robot Challenge 2020中获得二等奖。
AI.motivation: 传统预编程方案难以应对家庭环境的复杂性和动态变化，需验证数据驱动方法在安全、鲁棒的家庭服务机器人系统中的有效性。
AI.method: 系统整合了视觉识别、物体操作和运动规划模块，通过数据驱动方式适应大量边缘案例，而非依赖人工预编程规则。
AI.result: 所开发的机器人系统在WRC 2020竞赛中获得第二名，证明了数据驱动方法在家庭场景移动机械臂任务中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动方法为家庭服务机器人提供了适应复杂环境的有效途径，展示了其在移动机械臂任务中的应用潜力。

search_text: World Robot Challenge 2020 -- Partner Robot: A Data-Driven Approach for Room Tidying with Mobile Manipulator 2020 世界机器人挑战赛——伙伴机器人：利用移动机械手进行房间整理的数据驱动方法 Tidying up a household environment using a mobile manipulator poses various challenges in robotics, such as adaptation to large real-world environmental variations, and safe and robust deployment in the presence of humans.The Partner Robot Challenge in World Robot Challenge (WRC) 2020, a global competition held in September 2021, benchmarked tidying tasks in the real home environments, and importantly, tested for full system performances.For this challenge, we developed an entire household service robot system, which leverages a data-driven approach to adapt to numerous edge cases that occur during the execution, instead of classical manual pre-programmed solutions. authors_text: Timotheos Souroulla,Alberto Hata,Ahmad Terra,Özer Özkahraman,Rafia Inam
title: Model Compression for Resource-Constrained Mobile Robots
title_zh: 资源受限移动机器人的模型压缩
abstract: The number of mobile robots with constrained computing resources that need to execute complex machine learning models has been increasing during the past decade. Commonly, these robots rely on edge infrastructure accessible over wireless communication to execute heavy computational complex tasks. However, the edge might become unavailable and, consequently, oblige the execution of the tasks on the robot. This work focuses on making it possible to execute the tasks on the robots by reducing the complexity and the total number of parameters of pre-trained computer vision models. This is achieved by using model compression techniques such as Pruning and Knowledge Distillation. These compression techniques have strong theoretical and practical foundations, but their combined usage has not been widely explored in the literature. Therefore, this work especially focuses on investigating the effects of combining these two compression techniques. The results of this work reveal that up to 90% of the total number of parameters of a computer vision model can be removed without any considerable reduction in the model's accuracy.
summary: The number of mobile robots with constrained computing resources that need to execute complex machine learning models has been increasing during the past decade. Commonly, these robots rely on edge infrastructure accessible over wireless communication to execute heavy computational complex tasks. However, the edge might become unavailable and, consequently, oblige the execution of the tasks on the robot. This work focuses on making it possible to execute the tasks on the robots by reducing the complexity and the total number of parameters of pre-trained computer vision models. This is achieved by using model compression techniques such as Pruning and Knowledge Distillation. These compression techniques have strong theoretical and practical foundations, but their combined usage has not been widely explored in the literature. Therefore, this work especially focuses on investigating the effects of combining these two compression techniques. The results of this work reveal that up to 90% of the total number of parameters of a computer vision model can be removed without any considerable reduction in the model's accuracy.
abstract_zh: 在过去十年中，需要执行复杂机器学习模型的计算资源有限的移动机器人数量不断增加。通常，这些机器人依靠可通过无线通信访问的边缘基础设施来执行繁重的计算复杂任务。然而，边缘可能变得不可用，从而迫使机器人执行任务。这项工作的重点是通过降低预训练计算机视觉模型的复杂性和参数总数，使机器人执行任务成为可能。这是通过使用模型压缩技术（例如修剪和知识蒸馏）来实现的。这些压缩技术具有坚实的理论和实践基础，但它们的组合使用尚未在文献中得到广泛探索。因此，这项工作特别关注研究结合这两种压缩技术的效果。这项工作的结果表明，可以删除计算机视觉模型中高达 90% 的参数总数，而不会显着降低模型的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过模型压缩技术使资源受限的移动机器人能够在本地执行复杂任务。
AI.motivation: 随着移动机器人数量增加，其计算资源有限，依赖边缘计算的方案在边缘不可用时存在风险，需在本地高效执行任务。
AI.method: 结合模型剪枝和知识蒸馏两种压缩技术，减少预训练计算机视觉模型的参数量和复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明，可去除高达90%的模型参数且准确率无明显下降。
AI.conclusion: 联合使用剪枝与知识蒸馏能有效压缩模型，在保证性能的同时适应移动机器人的资源限制。

authors_text: Ravid Shwartz-Ziv,Randall Balestriero,Yann LeCun
title: What Do We Maximize in Self-Supervised Learning?
title_zh: 我们在自我监督学习中最大化什么？
abstract: In this paper, we examine self-supervised learning methods, particularly VICReg, to provide an information-theoretical understanding of their construction. As a first step, we demonstrate how information-theoretic quantities can be obtained for a deterministic network, offering a possible alternative to prior work that relies on stochastic models. This enables us to demonstrate how VICReg can be (re)discovered from first principles and its assumptions about data distribution. Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate the validity of our assumptions, confirming our novel understanding of VICReg. Finally, we believe that the derivation and insights we obtain can be generalized to many other SSL methods, opening new avenues for theoretical and practical understanding of SSL and transfer learning.
summary: In this paper, we examine self-supervised learning methods, particularly VICReg, to provide an information-theoretical understanding of their construction. As a first step, we demonstrate how information-theoretic quantities can be obtained for a deterministic network, offering a possible alternative to prior work that relies on stochastic models. This enables us to demonstrate how VICReg can be (re)discovered from first principles and its assumptions about data distribution. Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate the validity of our assumptions, confirming our novel understanding of VICReg. Finally, we believe that the derivation and insights we obtain can be generalized to many other SSL methods, opening new avenues for theoretical and practical understanding of SSL and transfer learning.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了自我监督学习方法，特别是 VICReg，以提供对其构造的信息理论理解。作为第一步，我们演示了如何获得确定性网络的信息论量，为依赖随机模型的先前工作提供了可能的替代方案。这使我们能够演示如何从第一原则及其关于数据分布的假设中（重新）发现 VICReg。此外，我们凭经验证明了我们假设的有效性，证实了我们对 VICReg 的新颖理解。最后，我们相信我们获得的推导和见解可以推广到许多其他 SSL 方法，为 SSL 和迁移学习的理论和实践理解开辟新途径。

AI.tldr: 本文通过信息论角度分析自监督学习方法VICReg的构建原理，探讨其最大化目标。
AI.motivation: 现有研究依赖随机模型，本文旨在提供确定性网络的信息论分析方法，以更清晰理解自监督学习机制。
AI.method: 通过信息论量化确定性网络，从第一性原理推导VICReg，并验证其数据分布假设。
AI.result: 实证验证了假设，确认了VICReg的信息论解释，并展示了其在其他SSL方法中的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 信息论分析为SSL方法提供了理论基础，有助于未来研究和应用的改进。

ai_content.motivation: 现有研究依赖随机模型，本文旨在提供确定性网络的信息论分析方法，以更清晰理解自监督学习机制。
ai_content.method: 通过信息论量化确定性网络，从第一性原理推导VICReg，并验证其数据分布假设。

search_text: What Do We Maximize in Self-Supervised Learning? 我们在自我监督学习中最大化什么？ In this paper, we examine self-supervised learning methods, particularly VICReg, to provide an information-theoretical understanding of their construction. As a first step, we demonstrate how information-theoretic quantities can be obtained for a deterministic network, offering a possible alternative to prior work that relies on stochastic models. This enables us to demonstrate how VICReg can be (re)discovered from first principles and its assumptions about data distribution. Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate the validity of our assumptions, confirming our novel understanding of VICReg. Finally, we believe that the derivation and insights we obtain can be generalized to many other SSL methods, opening new avenues for theoretical and practical understanding of SSL and transfer learning. 在本文中，我们研究了自我监督学习方法，特别是 VICReg，以提供对其构造的信息理论理解。作为第一步，我们演示了如何获得确定性网络的信息论量，为依赖随机模型的先前工作提供了可能的替代方案。这使我们能够演示如何从第一原则及其关于数据分布的假设中（重新）发现 VICReg。此外，我们凭经验证明了我们假设的有效性，证实了我们对 VICReg 的新颖理解。最后，我们相信我们获得的推导和见解可以推广到许多其他 SSL 方法，为 SSL 和迁移学习的理论和实践理解开辟新途径。 本文通过信息论角度分析自监督学习方法VICReg的构建原理，探讨其最大化目标。 Ravid Shwartz-Ziv,Randall Balestriero,Yann LeCun cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Siyuan Cheng,Xiaozhuan Liang,Zhen Bi,Huajun Chen,Ningyu Zhang
title: Multi-modal Protein Knowledge Graph Construction and Applications
title_zh: 多模态蛋白质知识图谱构建及应用
comment: Accepted by AAAI 2023 (Student Abstract). Dataset available in https://zjunlp.github.io/project/ProteinKG65/
comments: Accepted by AAAI 2023 (Student Abstract). Dataset available in https://zjunlp.github.io/project/ProteinKG65/
abstract: Existing data-centric methods for protein science generally cannot sufficiently capture and leverage biology knowledge, which may be crucial for many protein tasks. To facilitate research in this field, we create ProteinKG65, a knowledge graph for protein science. Using gene ontology and Uniprot knowledge base as a basis, we transform and integrate various kinds of knowledge with aligned descriptions and protein sequences, respectively, to GO terms and protein entities. ProteinKG65 is mainly dedicated to providing a specialized protein knowledge graph, bringing the knowledge of Gene Ontology to protein function and structure prediction. We also illustrate the potential applications of ProteinKG65 with a prototype. Our dataset can be downloaded at https://w3id.org/proteinkg65.
summary: Existing data-centric methods for protein science generally cannot sufficiently capture and leverage biology knowledge, which may be crucial for many protein tasks. To facilitate research in this field, we create ProteinKG65, a knowledge graph for protein science. Using gene ontology and Uniprot knowledge base as a basis, we transform and integrate various kinds of knowledge with aligned descriptions and protein sequences, respectively, to GO terms and protein entities. ProteinKG65 is mainly dedicated to providing a specialized protein knowledge graph, bringing the knowledge of Gene Ontology to protein function and structure prediction. We also illustrate the potential applications of ProteinKG65 with a prototype. Our dataset can be downloaded at https://w3id.org/proteinkg65.
abstract_zh: 现有的以数据为中心的蛋白质科学方法通常无法充分捕获和利用生物学知识，而这对于许多蛋白质任务可能至关重要。为了促进该领域的研究，我们创建了 ProteinKG65，这是蛋白质科学的知识图谱。以基因本体论和Uniprot知识库为基础，我们将各种知识与对齐的描述和蛋白质序列分别转化和整合为GO术语和蛋白质实体。 ProteinKG65主要致力于提供专门的蛋白质知识图谱，将基因本体的知识带入蛋白质功能和结构预测。我们还通过原型说明 ProteinKG65 的潜在应用。我们的数据集可以在 https://w3id.org/ Proteinkg65 下载。

AI.tldr: 构建名为ProteinKG65的多模态蛋白质知识图谱，用于蛋白质功能和结构预测。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动方法无法充分捕捉生物学知识，而这些知识对蛋白质任务至关重要，需构建专门知识图谱以促进研究。
AI.method: 基于Gene Ontology和Uniprot知识库，整合多源知识并对其描述与蛋白质序列进行对齐，构建ProteinKG65知识图谱。
AI.result: 构建了ProteinKG65知识图谱，并展示了其在蛋白质功能和结构预测中的应用潜力，数据集可公开下载。
AI.conclusion: ProteinKG65为蛋白质科学提供了专用知识图谱，促进了多模态数据与生物学知识的整合应用。

authors_text: Zhiheng Li,Anthony Hoogs,Chenliang Xu
title: Discover and Mitigate Unknown Biases with Debiasing Alternate Networks
title_zh: 通过消除备用网络的偏差来发现和减轻未知偏差
abstract: Deep image classifiers have been found to learn biases from datasets. To mitigate the biases, most previous methods require labels of protected attributes (e.g., age, skin tone) as full-supervision, which has two limitations: 1) it is infeasible when the labels are unavailable; 2) they are incapable of mitigating unknown biases -- biases that humans do not preconceive. To resolve those problems, we propose Debiasing Alternate Networks (DebiAN), which comprises two networks -- a Discoverer and a Classifier. By training in an alternate manner, the discoverer tries to find multiple unknown biases of the classifier without any annotations of biases, and the classifier aims at unlearning the biases identified by the discoverer. While previous works evaluate debiasing results in terms of a single bias, we create Multi-Color MNIST dataset to better benchmark mitigation of multiple biases in a multi-bias setting, which not only reveals the problems in previous methods but also demonstrates the advantage of DebiAN in identifying and mitigating multiple biases simultaneously. We further conduct extensive experiments on real-world datasets, showing that the discoverer in DebiAN can identify unknown biases that may be hard to be found by humans. Regarding debiasing, DebiAN achieves strong bias mitigation performance.
summary: Deep image classifiers have been found to learn biases from datasets. To mitigate the biases, most previous methods require labels of protected attributes (e.g., age, skin tone) as full-supervision, which has two limitations: 1) it is infeasible when the labels are unavailable; 2) they are incapable of mitigating unknown biases -- biases that humans do not preconceive. To resolve those problems, we propose Debiasing Alternate Networks (DebiAN), which comprises two networks -- a Discoverer and a Classifier. By training in an alternate manner, the discoverer tries to find multiple unknown biases of the classifier without any annotations of biases, and the classifier aims at unlearning the biases identified by the discoverer. While previous works evaluate debiasing results in terms of a single bias, we create Multi-Color MNIST dataset to better benchmark mitigation of multiple biases in a multi-bias setting, which not only reveals the problems in previous methods but also demonstrates the advantage of DebiAN in identifying and mitigating multiple biases simultaneously. We further conduct extensive experiments on real-world datasets, showing that the discoverer in DebiAN can identify unknown biases that may be hard to be found by humans. Regarding debiasing, DebiAN achieves strong bias mitigation performance.
abstract_zh: 人们发现深度图像分类器可以从数据集中学习偏差。为了减轻偏差，大多数以前的方法都需要受保护属性（例如年龄、肤色）的标签作为完全监督，这有两个限制：1）当标签不可用时，这是不可行的； 2）它们无法减轻未知的偏见——人类不会先入为主的偏见。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了去偏替代网络（DebiAN），它包含两个网络——发现器和分类器。通过以替代方式进行训练，发现者尝试在没有任何偏差注释的情况下找到分类器的多个未知偏差，并且分类器旨在忘却发现者识别的偏差。虽然之前的工作是根据单个偏差来评估去偏差结果，但我们创建了多色 MNIST 数据集，以更好地对多偏差设置中多个偏差的缓解进行基准测试，这不仅揭示了以前方法中的问题，而且还展示了 Debian 在同时识别和减轻多个偏差方面的优势。我们进一步对现实世界的数据集进行了广泛的实验，表明 Debian 的发现者可以识别人类可能难以发现的未知偏差。在去偏差方面，Debian 实现了强大的偏差缓解性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DebiAN方法，通过两个交替训练的网络发现并缓解深度图像分类器中的未知偏差，无需依赖保护属性标签。
AI.motivation: 现有去偏方法依赖保护属性标签，存在标签不可用和无法处理未知偏差的局限，需新方法应对实际场景中的隐蔽偏差。
AI.method: 构建Discoverer与Classifier双网络结构，Discoverer无监督发现Classifier的未知偏差，Classifier据此迭代去偏；设计Multi-Color MNIST数据集评估多偏差场景。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上验证DebiAN可识别人类难以发现的未知偏差，显著优于现有方法，实现多偏差同时缓解。
AI.conclusion: DebiAN通过网络对抗机制有效应对未知偏差问题，为无监督偏差检测与缓解提供了新思路和基准工具。

authors_text: Chuhan Zhang,Ankush Gupta,Andrew Zisserman
title: Is an Object-Centric Video Representation Beneficial for Transfer?
title_zh: 以对象为中心的视频表示有利于传输吗？
abstract: The objective of this work is to learn an object-centric video representation, with the aim of improving transferability to novel tasks, i.e., tasks different from the pre-training task of action classification. To this end, we introduce a new object-centric video recognition model based on a transformer architecture. The model learns a set of object-centric summary vectors for the video, and uses these vectors to fuse the visual and spatio-temporal trajectory 'modalities' of the video clip. We also introduce a novel trajectory contrast loss to further enhance objectness in these summary vectors. With experiments on four datasets -- SomethingSomething-V2, SomethingElse, Action Genome and EpicKitchens -- we show that the object-centric model outperforms prior video representations (both object-agnostic and object-aware), when: (1) classifying actions on unseen objects and unseen environments; (2) low-shot learning of novel classes; (3) linear probe to other downstream tasks; as well as (4) for standard action classification.
summary: The objective of this work is to learn an object-centric video representation, with the aim of improving transferability to novel tasks, i.e., tasks different from the pre-training task of action classification. To this end, we introduce a new object-centric video recognition model based on a transformer architecture. The model learns a set of object-centric summary vectors for the video, and uses these vectors to fuse the visual and spatio-temporal trajectory 'modalities' of the video clip. We also introduce a novel trajectory contrast loss to further enhance objectness in these summary vectors. With experiments on four datasets -- SomethingSomething-V2, SomethingElse, Action Genome and EpicKitchens -- we show that the object-centric model outperforms prior video representations (both object-agnostic and object-aware), when: (1) classifying actions on unseen objects and unseen environments; (2) low-shot learning of novel classes; (3) linear probe to other downstream tasks; as well as (4) for standard action classification.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目的是学习以对象为中心的视频表示，目的是提高对新任务的可迁移性，即与动作分类的预训练任务不同的任务。为此，我们引入了一种基于变压器架构的新的以对象为中心的视频识别模型。该模型学习视频的一组以对象为中心的摘要向量，并使用这些向量融合视频剪辑的视觉和时空轨迹“模态”。我们还引入了一种新颖的轨迹对比度损失，以进一步增强这些摘要向量的客观性。通过对四个数据集（SomethingSomething-V2、SomethingElse、Action Genome 和 EpicKitchens）的实验，我们表明，在以下情况下，以对象为中心的模型优于先前的视频表示（对象不可知和对象感知）：（1）对未见对象和未见环境的动作进行分类； (2)小说类的low-shot学习； (3)对其他下游任务的线性探测；以及（4）标准动作分类。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在学习一种以物体为中心的视频表征，以提升模型在新型任务中的迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频表征在迁移至新任务时表现不足，尤其在处理未见过的物体或环境时，因此需要更关注物体本身的表征方法。
AI.method: 提出基于Transformer架构的物体中心视频识别模型，通过学习物体中心的摘要向量融合视觉与时空轨迹模态，并引入轨迹对比损失增强摘要向量的物体感知能力。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上验证，该模型在未见过的物体/环境分类、少样本学习、线性探针下游任务及标准动作分类中均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 以物体为中心的视频表征能有效提升模型迁移性能，为跨任务适应提供更鲁棒的特征表示。

search_text: Is an Object-Centric Video Representation Beneficial for Transfer? 以对象为中心的视频表示有利于传输吗？ The objective of this work is to learn an object-centric video representation, with the aim of improving transferability to novel tasks, i.e., tasks different from the pre-training task of action classification. To this end, we introduce a new object-centric video recognition model based on a transformer architecture. The model learns a set of object-centric summary vectors for the video, and uses these vectors to fuse the visual and spatio-temporal trajectory 'modalities' of the video clip. We also introduce a novel trajectory contrast loss to further enhance objectness in these summary vectors. With experiments on four datasets -- SomethingSomething-V2, SomethingElse, Action Genome and EpicKitchens -- we show that the object-centric model outperforms prior video representations (both object-agnostic and object-aware), when: (1) classifying actions on unseen objects and unseen environments; (2) low-shot learning of novel classes; (3) linear probe to other downstream tasks; as well as (4) for standard action classification. 这项工作的目的是学习以对象为中心的视频表示，目的是提高对新任务的可迁移性，即与动作分类的预训练任务不同的任务。为此，我们引入了一种基于变压器架构的新的以对象为中心的视频识别模型。该模型学习视频的一组以对象为中心的摘要向量，并使用这些向量融合视频剪辑的视觉和时空轨迹“模态”。我们还引入了一种新颖的轨迹对比度损失，以进一步增强这些摘要向量的客观性。通过对四个数据集（SomethingSomething-V2、SomethingElse、Action Genome 和 EpicKitchens）的实验，我们表明，在以下情况下，以对象为中心的模型优于先前的视频表示（对象不可知和对象感知）：（1）对未见对象和未见环境的动作进行分类； (2)小说类的low-shot学习； (3)对其他下游任务的线性探测；以及（4）标准动作分类。 本文旨在学习一种以物体为中心的视频表征，以提升模型在新型任务中的迁移能力。 Chuhan Zhang,Ankush Gupta,Andrew Zisserman cs.CV

authors_text: Swami Sankaranarayanan,Anastasios N. Angelopoulos,Stephen Bates,Yaniv Romano,Phillip Isola
title: Semantic uncertainty intervals for disentangled latent spaces
title_zh: 解纠缠潜在空间的语义不确定区间
abstract: Meaningful uncertainty quantification in computer vision requires reasoning about semantic information -- say, the hair color of the person in a photo or the location of a car on the street. To this end, recent breakthroughs in generative modeling allow us to represent semantic information in disentangled latent spaces, but providing uncertainties on the semantic latent variables has remained challenging. In this work, we provide principled uncertainty intervals that are guaranteed to contain the true semantic factors for any underlying generative model. The method does the following: (1) it uses quantile regression to output a heuristic uncertainty interval for each element in the latent space (2) calibrates these uncertainties such that they contain the true value of the latent for a new, unseen input. The endpoints of these calibrated intervals can then be propagated through the generator to produce interpretable uncertainty visualizations for each semantic factor. This technique reliably communicates semantically meaningful, principled, and instance-adaptive uncertainty in inverse problems like image super-resolution and image completion.
summary: Meaningful uncertainty quantification in computer vision requires reasoning about semantic information -- say, the hair color of the person in a photo or the location of a car on the street. To this end, recent breakthroughs in generative modeling allow us to represent semantic information in disentangled latent spaces, but providing uncertainties on the semantic latent variables has remained challenging. In this work, we provide principled uncertainty intervals that are guaranteed to contain the true semantic factors for any underlying generative model. The method does the following: (1) it uses quantile regression to output a heuristic uncertainty interval for each element in the latent space (2) calibrates these uncertainties such that they contain the true value of the latent for a new, unseen input. The endpoints of these calibrated intervals can then be propagated through the generator to produce interpretable uncertainty visualizations for each semantic factor. This technique reliably communicates semantically meaningful, principled, and instance-adaptive uncertainty in inverse problems like image super-resolution and image completion.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉中有意义的不确定性量化需要对语义信息进行推理，例如照片中人的头发颜色或街道上汽车的位置。为此，生成模型的最新突破使我们能够在解开的潜在空间中表示语义信息，但提供语义潜在变量的不确定性仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提供了有原则的不确定性区间，保证包含任何底层生成模型的真实语义因素。该方法执行以下操作：（1）它使用分位数回归为潜在空间中的每个元素输出启发式不确定性区间（2）校准这些不确定性，以便它们包含新的、看不见的输入的潜在真实值。然后，这些校准间隔的端点可以通过生成器传播，为每个语义因素生成可解释的不确定性可视化。该技术可靠地传达了图像超分辨率和图像补全等逆问题中语义上有意义的、有原则的和实例自适应的不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在解耦潜在空间中为语义因素生成可解释不确定性区间的方法，用于图像超分辨率等逆问题中的不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型难以准确量化语义潜在变量的不确定性，导致不确定性估计缺乏语义可解释性且无法适应具体实例。
AI.method: 结合分位数回归与不确定性校准：1) 通过分位数回归为潜在空间每个维度生成启发式区间 2) 校准区间使其包含真实潜在值，再通过生成器传播至图像域生成可视化不确定性。
AI.result: 在图像超分辨率和补全任务中，该方法能生成语义相关且实例自适应的不确定性区间，校准后区间覆盖真实潜在值的准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次实现解耦潜在空间中语义因素的不确定性区间估计，为逆问题提供了兼具可解释性与统计保证的不确定性量化新范式。

authors_text: Jun-Cheng Chen,Cong-Xiao Chen,Li-Juan Duan,Zhi Cai
title: DDPG based on multi-scale strokes for financial time series trading strategy
title_zh: 基于多尺度笔划的DDPG金融时间序列交易策略
comment: 10 pages,5 figures,to be published in 2022 8th International Conference on Computer Technology Applications conference
comments: 10 pages,5 figures,to be published in 2022 8th International Conference on Computer Technology Applications conference
abstract: With the development of artificial intelligence,more and more financial practitioners apply deep reinforcement learning to financial trading strategies.However,It is difficult to extract accurate features due to the characteristics of considerable noise,highly non-stationary,and non-linearity of single-scale time series,which makes it hard to obtain high returns.In this paper,we extract a multi-scale feature matrix on multiple time scales of financial time series,according to the classic financial theory-Chan Theory,and put forward to an approach of multi-scale stroke deep deterministic policy gradient reinforcement learning model(MSSDDPG)to search for the optimal trading strategy.We carried out experiments on the datasets of the Dow Jones,S&P 500 of U.S. stocks, and China's CSI 300,SSE Composite,evaluate the performance of our approach compared with turtle trading strategy, Deep Q-learning(DQN)reinforcement learning strategy,and deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) reinforcement learning strategy.The result shows that our approach gets the best performance in China CSI 300,SSE Composite,and get an outstanding result in Dow Jones,S&P 500 of U.S.
summary: With the development of artificial intelligence,more and more financial practitioners apply deep reinforcement learning to financial trading strategies.However,It is difficult to extract accurate features due to the characteristics of considerable noise,highly non-stationary,and non-linearity of single-scale time series,which makes it hard to obtain high returns.In this paper,we extract a multi-scale feature matrix on multiple time scales of financial time series,according to the classic financial theory-Chan Theory,and put forward to an approach of multi-scale stroke deep deterministic policy gradient reinforcement learning model(MSSDDPG)to search for the optimal trading strategy.We carried out experiments on the datasets of the Dow Jones,S&P 500 of U.S. stocks, and China's CSI 300,SSE Composite,evaluate the performance of our approach compared with turtle trading strategy, Deep Q-learning(DQN)reinforcement learning strategy,and deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) reinforcement learning strategy.The result shows that our approach gets the best performance in China CSI 300,SSE Composite,and get an outstanding result in Dow Jones,S&P 500 of U.S.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能的发展，越来越多的金融从业者将深度强化学习应用于金融交易策略中。然而，由于单尺度时间序列噪声较大、非平稳性强、非线性等特点，难以提取准确的特征，难以获得高回报。本文根据经典金融理论——陈氏理论，在金融时间序列的多个时间尺度上提取多尺度特征矩阵，提出了一种多尺度描边深度学习的方法。确定性策略梯度强化学习模型（MSSDDPG）来搜索最优交易策略。我们在道琼斯、标普500美股、沪深300、上证综指的数据集上进行了实验，与海龟交易策略、深度Q学习（DQN）强化学习策略、深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）强化学习策略相比，评估了我们的方法的性能。结果表明，我们的方法得到在中证300、上证综指中表现最佳，在道琼斯、美国标普500中取得优异成绩

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于多尺度特征的深度确定性策略梯度算法（MSSDDPG），用于改进金融时间序列交易策略。
AI.motivation: 金融时间序列具有高噪声、非平稳性和非线性特征，单一尺度特征提取困难，导致传统方法难以获得高收益。
AI.method: 根据Chan理论构建多尺度特征矩阵，结合深度强化学习提出多尺度笔画DDPG模型（MSSDDPG），通过多时间尺度特征捕捉市场动态。
AI.result: 在沪深300、上证综指等中国股指数据集上表现最优，在道琼斯、标普500等美国股指上亦取得显著成果，优于龟交易策略、DQN和DDPG等基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度特征融合有效提升了模型对复杂金融时序的适应性，MSSDDPG在多市场环境下均展现出优越的交易策略搜索能力。

ai_content_json.method: 根据Chan理论构建多尺度特征矩阵，结合深度强化学习提出多尺度笔画DDPG模型（MSSDDPG），通过多时间尺度特征捕捉市场动态。
ai_content_json.result: 在沪深300、上证综指等中国股指数据集上表现最优，在道琼斯、标普500等美国股指上亦取得显著成果，优于龟交易策略、DQN和DDPG等基准方法。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 多尺度特征融合有效提升了模型对复杂金融时序的适应性，MSSDDPG在多市场环境下均展现出优越的交易策略搜索能力。

motivation: 金融时间序列具有高噪声、非平稳性和非线性特征，单一尺度特征提取困难，导致传统方法难以获得高收益。
method: 根据Chan理论构建多尺度特征矩阵，结合深度强化学习提出多尺度笔画DDPG模型（MSSDDPG），通过多时间尺度特征捕捉市场动态。
result: 在沪深300、上证综指等中国股指数据集上表现最优，在道琼斯、标普500等美国股指上亦取得显著成果，优于龟交易策略、DQN和DDPG等基准方法。
conclusion: 多尺度特征融合有效提升了模型对复杂金融时序的适应性，MSSDDPG在多市场环境下均展现出优越的交易策略搜索能力。
search_text: DDPG based on multi-scale strokes for financial time series trading strategy 基于多尺度笔划的DDPG金融时间序列交易策略 With the development of artificial intelligence,more and more financial practitioners apply deep reinforcement learning to financial trading strategies.However,It is difficult to extract accurate features due to the characteristics of considerable noise,highly non-stationary,and non-linearity of single-scale time series,which makes it hard to obtain high returns.In this paper,we extract a multi-scale feature matrix on multiple time scales of financial time series,according to the classic financial theory-Chan Theory,and put forward to an approach of multi-scale stroke deep deterministic policy gradient reinforcement learning model(MSSDDPG)to search for the optimal trading strategy.We carried out experiments on the datasets of the Dow Jones,S&P 500 of U.S. stocks, and China's CSI 300,SSE Composite,evaluate the performance of our approach compared with turtle trading strategy, Deep Q-learning(DQN)reinforcement learning strategy,and deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) reinforcement learning strategy.The result shows that our approach gets the best performance in China CSI 300,SSE Composite,and get an outstanding result in Dow Jones,S&P 500 of U.S. 随着人工智能的发展，越来越多的金融从业者将深度强化学习应用于金融交易策略中。然而，由于单尺度时间序列噪声较大、非平稳性强、非线性等特点，难以提取准确的特征，难以获得高回报。本文根据经典金融理论——陈氏理论，在金融时间序列的多个时间尺度上提取多尺度特征矩阵，提出了一种多尺度描边深度学习的方法。确定性策略梯度强化学习模型（MSSDDPG）来搜索最优交易策略。我们在道琼斯、标普500美股、沪深300、上证综指的数据集上进行了实验，与海龟交易策略、深度Q学习（DQN）强化学习策略、深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）强化学习策略相比，评估了我们的方法的性能。结果表明，我们的方法得到在中证300、上证综指中表现最佳，在道琼斯、美国标普500中取得优异成绩 本文提出基于多尺度特征的深度确定性策略梯度算法（MSSDDPG），用于改进金融时间序列交易策略。 Jun-Cheng Chen,Cong-Xiao Chen,Li-Juan Duan,Zhi Cai q-fin.TR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Junzhe Zhang,Daxuan Ren,Zhongang Cai,Chai Kiat Yeo,Bo Dai,Chen Change Loy
title: Monocular 3D Object Reconstruction with GAN Inversion
title_zh: 使用 GAN 反转进行单目 3D 对象重建
abstract: Recovering a textured 3D mesh from a monocular image is highly challenging, particularly for in-the-wild objects that lack 3D ground truths. In this work, we present MeshInversion, a novel framework to improve the reconstruction by exploiting the generative prior of a 3D GAN pre-trained for 3D textured mesh synthesis. Reconstruction is achieved by searching for a latent space in the 3D GAN that best resembles the target mesh in accordance with the single view observation. Since the pre-trained GAN encapsulates rich 3D semantics in terms of mesh geometry and texture, searching within the GAN manifold thus naturally regularizes the realness and fidelity of the reconstruction. Importantly, such regularization is directly applied in the 3D space, providing crucial guidance of mesh parts that are unobserved in the 2D space. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that our framework obtains faithful 3D reconstructions with consistent geometry and texture across both observed and unobserved parts. Moreover, it generalizes well to meshes that are less commonly seen, such as the extended articulation of deformable objects. Code is released at https://github.com/junzhezhang/mesh-inversion
summary: Recovering a textured 3D mesh from a monocular image is highly challenging, particularly for in-the-wild objects that lack 3D ground truths. In this work, we present MeshInversion, a novel framework to improve the reconstruction by exploiting the generative prior of a 3D GAN pre-trained for 3D textured mesh synthesis. Reconstruction is achieved by searching for a latent space in the 3D GAN that best resembles the target mesh in accordance with the single view observation. Since the pre-trained GAN encapsulates rich 3D semantics in terms of mesh geometry and texture, searching within the GAN manifold thus naturally regularizes the realness and fidelity of the reconstruction. Importantly, such regularization is directly applied in the 3D space, providing crucial guidance of mesh parts that are unobserved in the 2D space. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that our framework obtains faithful 3D reconstructions with consistent geometry and texture across both observed and unobserved parts. Moreover, it generalizes well to meshes that are less commonly seen, such as the extended articulation of deformable objects. Code is released at https://github.com/junzhezhang/mesh-inversion
abstract_zh: 从单目图像中恢复纹理 3D 网格非常具有挑战性，特别是对于缺乏 3D 地面事实的野外物体。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MeshInversion，这是一种新颖的框架，通过利用针对 3D 纹理网格合成预训练的 3D GAN 的生成先验来改进重建。重建是通过根据单视图观察在 3D GAN 中搜索与目标网格最相似的潜在空间来实现的。由于预训练的 GAN 在网格几何和纹理方面封装了丰富的 3D 语义，因此在 GAN 流形内进行搜索自然会规范重建的真实性和保真度。重要的是，这种正则化直接应用于 3D 空间，为 2D 空间中未观察到的网格部分提供重要指导。标准基准测试表明，我们的框架在观察到的和未观察到的部分上获得了具有一致几何形状和纹理的忠实 3D 重建。此外，它还可以很好地推广到不太常见的网格，例如可变形物体的扩展关节。代码发布于https://github.com/junzezhang/mesh-inversion

AI.tldr: 本文提出MeshInversion框架，利用预训练3D GAN的生成先验，从单目图像中重建带纹理的3D网格模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以从单目图像中重建真实感强且几何纹理一致的3D模型，尤其对无3D标注的复杂物体效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过在预训练3D GAN的潜在空间中搜索与目标网格最匹配的表示，利用GAN的生成先验实现3D重建，直接在3D空间进行正则化约束。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上实现几何与纹理一致的高质量重建，尤其对变形物体的未观测部分具有良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于GAN潜在空间搜索的3D重建方法能有效提升复杂物体的几何保真度与纹理一致性。
