authors_text: Gyeongsik Moon,Hyeongjin Nam,Takaaki Shiratori,Kyoung Mu Lee
title: 3D Clothed Human Reconstruction in the Wild
title_zh: 野外 3D 穿着衣服的人体重建
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022, 25 pages including the supplementary material
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022, 25 pages including the supplementary material
abstract: Although much progress has been made in 3D clothed human reconstruction, most of the existing methods fail to produce robust results from in-the-wild images, which contain diverse human poses and appearances. This is mainly due to the large domain gap between training datasets and in-the-wild datasets. The training datasets are usually synthetic ones, which contain rendered images from GT 3D scans. However, such datasets contain simple human poses and less natural image appearances compared to those of real in-the-wild datasets, which makes generalization of it to in-the-wild images extremely challenging. To resolve this issue, in this work, we propose ClothWild, a 3D clothed human reconstruction framework that firstly addresses the robustness on in-thewild images. First, for the robustness to the domain gap, we propose a weakly supervised pipeline that is trainable with 2D supervision targets of in-the-wild datasets. Second, we design a DensePose-based loss function to reduce ambiguities of the weak supervision. Extensive empirical tests on several public in-the-wild datasets demonstrate that our proposed ClothWild produces much more accurate and robust results than the state-of-the-art methods. The codes are available in here: https://github.com/hygenie1228/ClothWild_RELEASE.
summary: Although much progress has been made in 3D clothed human reconstruction, most of the existing methods fail to produce robust results from in-the-wild images, which contain diverse human poses and appearances. This is mainly due to the large domain gap between training datasets and in-the-wild datasets. The training datasets are usually synthetic ones, which contain rendered images from GT 3D scans. However, such datasets contain simple human poses and less natural image appearances compared to those of real in-the-wild datasets, which makes generalization of it to in-the-wild images extremely challenging. To resolve this issue, in this work, we propose ClothWild, a 3D clothed human reconstruction framework that firstly addresses the robustness on in-thewild images. First, for the robustness to the domain gap, we propose a weakly supervised pipeline that is trainable with 2D supervision targets of in-the-wild datasets. Second, we design a DensePose-based loss function to reduce ambiguities of the weak supervision. Extensive empirical tests on several public in-the-wild datasets demonstrate that our proposed ClothWild produces much more accurate and robust results than the state-of-the-art methods. The codes are available in here: https://github.com/hygenie1228/ClothWild_RELEASE.
abstract_zh: 尽管 3D 服装人体重建已经取得了很大进展，但大多数现有方法无法从包含不同人体姿势和外观的野外图像中产生可靠的结果。这主要是由于训练数据集和野外数据集之间存在巨大的领域差距。训练数据集通常是合成数据集，其中包含来自 GT 3D 扫描的渲染图像。然而，与真实的野外数据集相比，此类数据集包含简单的人体姿势和不太自然的图像外观，这使得将其推广到野外图像极具挑战性。为了解决这个问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了 ClothWild，一种 3D 服装人体重建框架，它首先解决了野外图像的鲁棒性问题。首先，为了对域差距的鲁棒性，我们提出了一种弱监督管道，可以使用野外数据集的 2D 监督目标进行训练。其次，我们设计了一个基于 DensePose 的损失函数来减少弱监督的模糊性。对几个公共野外数据集的广泛实证测试表明，我们提出的 ClothWild 比最先进的方法产生更准确和稳健的结果。代码可在此处获取：https://github.com/hygenie1228/ClothWild_RELEASE。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ClothWild的3D着装人体重建框架，旨在解决真实场景下人体姿态和外观多样性带来的重建鲁棒性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因训练数据集与真实场景数据集之间存在显著领域差异，难以在复杂多变的真实图像中生成准确的3D着装人体模型。
AI.method: 设计弱监督训练流程结合2D监督目标，并引入基于DensePose的损失函数以减少弱监督的歧义性，提升模型对真实场景的适应能力。
AI.result: 在多个公开真实场景数据集上实验表明，ClothWild在重建精度和鲁棒性方面优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: ClothWild通过弱监督学习和领域适应技术，有效缓解了合成数据与真实场景间的差异，为复杂真实场景下的3D人体重建提供了新思路。

search_text: 3D Clothed Human Reconstruction in the Wild 野外 3D 穿着衣服的人体重建 Although much progress has been made in 3D clothed human reconstruction, most of the existing methods fail to produce robust results from in-the-wild images, which contain diverse human poses and appearances. This is mainly due to the large domain gap between training datasets and in-the-wild datasets. The training datasets are usually synthetic ones, which contain rendered images from GT 3D scans. However, such datasets contain simple human poses and less natural image appearances compared to those of real in-the-wild datasets, which makes generalization of it to in-the-wild images extremely challenging. To resolve this issue, in this work, we propose ClothWild, a 3D clothed human reconstruction framework that firstly addresses the robustness on in-thewild images. First, for the robustness to the domain gap, we propose a weakly supervised pipeline that is trainable with 2D supervision targets of in-the-wild datasets. Second, we design a DensePose-based loss function to reduce ambiguities of the weak supervision. Extensive empirical tests on several public in-the-wild datasets demonstrate that our proposed ClothWild produces much more accurate and robust results than the state-of-the-art methods. The codes are available in here: https://github.com/hygenie1228/ClothWild_RELEASE. 尽管 3D 服装人体重建已经取得了很大进展，但大多数现有方法无法从包含不同人体姿势和外观的野外图像中产生可靠的结果。这主要是由于训练数据集和野外数据集之间存在巨大的领域差距。训练数据集通常是合成数据集，其中包含来自 GT 3D 扫描的渲染图像。然而，与真实的野外数据集相比，此类数据集包含简单的人体姿势和不太自然的图像外观，这使得将其推广到野外图像极具挑战性。为了解决这个问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了 ClothWild，一种 3D 服装人体重建框架，它首先解决了野外图像的鲁棒性问题。首先，为了对域差距的鲁棒性，我们提出了一种弱监督管道，可以使用野外数据集的 2D 监督目标进行训练。其次，我们设计了一个基于 DensePose 的损失函数来减少弱监督的模糊性。对几个公共野外数据集的广泛实证测试表明，我们提出的 ClothWild 比最先进的方法产生更准确和稳健的结果。代码可在此处获取：https://github.com/hygenie1228/ClothWild_RELEASE。 本文提出一种名为ClothWild的3D着装人体重建框架，旨在解决真实场景下人体姿态和外观多样性带来的重建鲁棒性问题。 Gyeongsik Moon,Hyeongjin Nam,Takaaki Shiratori,Kyoung Mu Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Haoran Xu,Xianyuan Zhan,Honglei Yin,Huiling Qin
title: Discriminator-Weighted Offline Imitation Learning from Suboptimal Demonstrations
title_zh: 从次优演示中进行判别器加权离线模仿学习
abstract: We study the problem of offline Imitation Learning (IL) where an agent aims to learn an optimal expert behavior policy without additional online environment interactions. Instead, the agent is provided with a supplementary offline dataset from suboptimal behaviors. Prior works that address this problem either require that expert data occupies the majority proportion of the offline dataset, or need to learn a reward function and perform offline reinforcement learning (RL) afterwards. In this paper, we aim to address the problem without additional steps of reward learning and offline RL training for the case when demonstrations contain a large proportion of suboptimal data. Built upon behavioral cloning (BC), we introduce an additional discriminator to distinguish expert and non-expert data. We propose a cooperation framework to boost the learning of both tasks, Based on this framework, we design a new IL algorithm, where the outputs of discriminator serve as the weights of the BC loss. Experimental results show that our proposed algorithm achieves higher returns and faster training speed compared to baseline algorithms.
summary: We study the problem of offline Imitation Learning (IL) where an agent aims to learn an optimal expert behavior policy without additional online environment interactions. Instead, the agent is provided with a supplementary offline dataset from suboptimal behaviors. Prior works that address this problem either require that expert data occupies the majority proportion of the offline dataset, or need to learn a reward function and perform offline reinforcement learning (RL) afterwards. In this paper, we aim to address the problem without additional steps of reward learning and offline RL training for the case when demonstrations contain a large proportion of suboptimal data. Built upon behavioral cloning (BC), we introduce an additional discriminator to distinguish expert and non-expert data. We propose a cooperation framework to boost the learning of both tasks, Based on this framework, we design a new IL algorithm, where the outputs of discriminator serve as the weights of the BC loss. Experimental results show that our proposed algorithm achieves higher returns and faster training speed compared to baseline algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们研究离线模仿学习（IL）问题，其中代理旨在学习最佳专家行为策略，而无需额外的在线环境交互。相反，代理会获得来自次优行为的补充离线数据集。之前解决这个问题的工作要么需要专家数据占据离线数据集的大部分比例，要么需要学习奖励函数并随后执行离线强化学习（RL）。在本文中，我们的目标是在演示包含大量次优数据的情况下解决该问题，而无需额外的奖励学习和离线 RL 训练步骤。基于行为克隆（BC），我们引入了一个额外的鉴别器来区分专家和非专家数据。我们提出了一个合作框架来促进这两个任务的学习，基于这个框架，我们设计了一种新的IL算法，其中判别器的输出作为BC损失的权重。实验结果表明，与基线算法相比，我们提出的算法实现了更高的回报和更快的训练速度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在离线模仿学习中，如何从包含大量次优演示数据的离线数据集中学习最优专家策略，无需额外奖励函数学习和离线强化学习步骤。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或要求专家数据占多数，或需额外奖励学习步骤，限制了在次优数据占优场景下的应用。本文旨在提出无需额外步骤的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于行为克隆（BC），引入判别器区分专家与非专家数据，设计合作框架将判别器输出作为BC损失权重，提升学习效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在回报值和训练速度上均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 判别器加权方法有效提升了离线模仿学习在次优数据场景下的性能，无需额外训练步骤。

authors_text: Boris Knyazev
title: Pretraining a Neural Network before Knowing Its Architecture
title_zh: 在了解神经网络的架构之前对其进行预训练
comment: Accepted at ICML 2022 Workshop on Pre-training: Perspectives, Pitfalls, and Paths Forward, source code is available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/ppuda
comments: Accepted at ICML 2022 Workshop on Pre-training: Perspectives, Pitfalls, and Paths Forward, source code is available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/ppuda
abstract: Training large neural networks is possible by training a smaller hypernetwork that predicts parameters for the large ones. A recently released Graph HyperNetwork (GHN) trained this way on one million smaller ImageNet architectures is able to predict parameters for large unseen networks such as ResNet-50. While networks with predicted parameters lose performance on the source task, the predicted parameters have been found useful for fine-tuning on other tasks. We study if fine-tuning based on the same GHN is still useful on novel strong architectures that were published after the GHN had been trained. We found that for recent architectures such as ConvNeXt, GHN initialization becomes less useful than for ResNet-50. One potential reason is the increased distribution shift of novel architectures from those used to train the GHN. We also found that the predicted parameters lack the diversity necessary to successfully fine-tune parameters with gradient descent. We alleviate this limitation by applying simple post-processing techniques to predicted parameters before fine-tuning them on a target task and improve fine-tuning of ResNet-50 and ConvNeXt.
summary: Training large neural networks is possible by training a smaller hypernetwork that predicts parameters for the large ones. A recently released Graph HyperNetwork (GHN) trained this way on one million smaller ImageNet architectures is able to predict parameters for large unseen networks such as ResNet-50. While networks with predicted parameters lose performance on the source task, the predicted parameters have been found useful for fine-tuning on other tasks. We study if fine-tuning based on the same GHN is still useful on novel strong architectures that were published after the GHN had been trained. We found that for recent architectures such as ConvNeXt, GHN initialization becomes less useful than for ResNet-50. One potential reason is the increased distribution shift of novel architectures from those used to train the GHN. We also found that the predicted parameters lack the diversity necessary to successfully fine-tune parameters with gradient descent. We alleviate this limitation by applying simple post-processing techniques to predicted parameters before fine-tuning them on a target task and improve fine-tuning of ResNet-50 and ConvNeXt.
abstract_zh: 通过训练一个较小的超网络来预测大型神经网络的参数，可以训练大型神经网络。最近发布的图超网络 (GHN) 在 100 万个较小的 ImageNet 架构上以这种方式进行训练，能够预测 ResNet-50 等大型不可见网络的参数。虽然具有预测参数的网络在源任务上会损失性能，但已发现预测参数对于其他任务的微调很有用。我们研究基于相同 GHN 的微调对于 GHN 训练后发布的新颖的强架构是否仍然有用。我们发现，对于 ConvNeXt 等最新架构，GHN 初始化的用处不如 ResNet-50。一个潜在的原因是用于训练 GHN 的新型架构的分布转移增加。我们还发现，预测参数缺乏通过梯度下降成功微调参数所需的多样性。我们通过在目标任务上微调预测参数之前对预测参数应用简单的后处理技术来缓解这一限制，并改进 ResNet-50 和 ConvNeXt 的微调。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在未知目标网络架构的情况下，通过预训练超网络（GHN）生成参数以加速大模型微调的方法。
AI.motivation: 训练大模型耗时耗力，而超网络可通过预测参数实现高效初始化，但现有方法在新型架构上效果下降，需探索原因及改进方案。
AI.method: 基于已训练的GHN生成大模型参数，测试其在新型架构（如ConvNeXt）上的微调效果，并通过后处理技术优化预测参数的多样性。
AI.result: GHN在ResNet-50上有效，但对新型架构效果减弱；参数多样性不足导致梯度下降微调困难，后处理技术可提升ConvNeXt的微调性能。
AI.conclusion: 超网络初始化对新型架构需适配性改进，参数多样性与分布偏移是关键限制因素，后处理可缓解问题。

authors_text: Yingyan Li,Yuntao Chen,Jiawei He,Zhaoxiang Zhang
title: Densely Constrained Depth Estimator for Monocular 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 用于单目 3D 物体检测的密集约束深度估计器
abstract: Estimating accurate 3D locations of objects from monocular images is a challenging problem because of lacking depth. Previous work shows that utilizing the object's keypoint projection constraints to estimate multiple depth candidates boosts the detection performance. However, the existing methods can only utilize vertical edges as projection constraints for depth estimation. So these methods only use a small number of projection constraints and produce insufficient depth candidates, leading to inaccurate depth estimation. In this paper, we propose a method that utilizes dense projection constraints from edges of any direction. In this way, we employ much more projection constraints and produce considerable depth candidates. Besides, we present a graph matching weighting module to merge the depth candidates. The proposed method DCD (Densely Constrained Detector) achieves state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI and WOD benchmarks. Code is released at https://github.com/BraveGroup/DCD.
summary: Estimating accurate 3D locations of objects from monocular images is a challenging problem because of lacking depth. Previous work shows that utilizing the object's keypoint projection constraints to estimate multiple depth candidates boosts the detection performance. However, the existing methods can only utilize vertical edges as projection constraints for depth estimation. So these methods only use a small number of projection constraints and produce insufficient depth candidates, leading to inaccurate depth estimation. In this paper, we propose a method that utilizes dense projection constraints from edges of any direction. In this way, we employ much more projection constraints and produce considerable depth candidates. Besides, we present a graph matching weighting module to merge the depth candidates. The proposed method DCD (Densely Constrained Detector) achieves state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI and WOD benchmarks. Code is released at https://github.com/BraveGroup/DCD.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏深度，从单目图像中估计物体的准确 3D 位置是一个具有挑战性的问题。先前的工作表明，利用对象的关键点投影约束来估计多个候选深度可以提高检测性能。然而，现有方法只能利用垂直边缘作为深度估计的投影约束。因此这些方法仅使用少量的投影约束并产生不足的深度候选，导致深度估计不准确。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用来自任何方向边缘的密集投影约束的方法。通过这种方式，我们采用了更多的投影约束并产生了相当多的深度候选。此外，我们提出了一个图匹配加权模块来合并深度候选。所提出的方法 DCD（密集约束检测器）在 KITTI 和 WOD 基准上实现了最先进的性能。代码发布于 https://github.com/BraveGroup/DCD。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于密集投影约束的单目3D目标检测深度估计方法DCD，通过利用多方向边缘信息提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有单目3D检测方法仅利用垂直边缘作为投影约束，导致深度候选不足，难以准确估计物体深度。
AI.method: 提出密集投影约束机制，利用任意方向边缘生成更多深度候选，并设计图匹配加权模块融合多候选深度信息。
AI.result: DCD方法在KITTI和WOD基准测试中达到当时最先进的检测性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过密集投影约束与多候选融合策略，有效提升了单目3D目标检测的深度估计准确性。

search_text: Densely Constrained Depth Estimator for Monocular 3D Object Detection 用于单目 3D 物体检测的密集约束深度估计器 Estimating accurate 3D locations of objects from monocular images is a challenging problem because of lacking depth. Previous work shows that utilizing the object's keypoint projection constraints to estimate multiple depth candidates boosts the detection performance. However, the existing methods can only utilize vertical edges as projection constraints for depth estimation. So these methods only use a small number of projection constraints and produce insufficient depth candidates, leading to inaccurate depth estimation. In this paper, we propose a method that utilizes dense projection constraints from edges of any direction. In this way, we employ much more projection constraints and produce considerable depth candidates. Besides, we present a graph matching weighting module to merge the depth candidates. The proposed method DCD (Densely Constrained Detector) achieves state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI and WOD benchmarks. Code is released at https://github.com/BraveGroup/DCD. 由于缺乏深度，从单目图像中估计物体的准确 3D 位置是一个具有挑战性的问题。先前的工作表明，利用对象的关键点投影约束来估计多个候选深度可以提高检测性能。然而，现有方法只能利用垂直边缘作为深度估计的投影约束。因此这些方法仅使用少量的投影约束并产生不足的深度候选，导致深度估计不准确。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用来自任何方向边缘的密集投影约束的方法。通过这种方式，我们采用了更多的投影约束并产生了相当多的深度候选。此外，我们提出了一个图匹配加权模块来合并深度候选。所提出的方法 DCD（密集约束检测器）在 KITTI 和 WOD 基准上实现了最先进的性能。代码发布于 https://github.com/BraveGroup/DCD。 本文提出一种基于密集投影约束的单目3D目标检测深度估计方法DCD，通过利用多方向边缘信息提升检测精度。 Yingyan Li,Yuntao Chen,Jiawei He,Zhaoxiang Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Zhiyuan Mao,Ajay Jaiswal,Zhangyang Wang,Stanley H. Chan
title: Single Frame Atmospheric Turbulence Mitigation: A Benchmark Study and A New Physics-Inspired Transformer Model
title_zh: 单帧大气湍流缓解：基准研究和新的物理启发变压器模型
comment: This paper is accepted as a poster at ECCV 2022
comments: This paper is accepted as a poster at ECCV 2022
abstract: Image restoration algorithms for atmospheric turbulence are known to be much more challenging to design than traditional ones such as blur or noise because the distortion caused by the turbulence is an entanglement of spatially varying blur, geometric distortion, and sensor noise. Existing CNN-based restoration methods built upon convolutional kernels with static weights are insufficient to handle the spatially dynamical atmospheric turbulence effect. To address this problem, in this paper, we propose a physics-inspired transformer model for imaging through atmospheric turbulence. The proposed network utilizes the power of transformer blocks to jointly extract a dynamical turbulence distortion map and restore a turbulence-free image. In addition, recognizing the lack of a comprehensive dataset, we collect and present two new real-world turbulence datasets that allow for evaluation with both classical objective metrics (e.g., PSNR and SSIM) and a new task-driven metric using text recognition accuracy. Both real testing sets and all related code will be made publicly available.
summary: Image restoration algorithms for atmospheric turbulence are known to be much more challenging to design than traditional ones such as blur or noise because the distortion caused by the turbulence is an entanglement of spatially varying blur, geometric distortion, and sensor noise. Existing CNN-based restoration methods built upon convolutional kernels with static weights are insufficient to handle the spatially dynamical atmospheric turbulence effect. To address this problem, in this paper, we propose a physics-inspired transformer model for imaging through atmospheric turbulence. The proposed network utilizes the power of transformer blocks to jointly extract a dynamical turbulence distortion map and restore a turbulence-free image. In addition, recognizing the lack of a comprehensive dataset, we collect and present two new real-world turbulence datasets that allow for evaluation with both classical objective metrics (e.g., PSNR and SSIM) and a new task-driven metric using text recognition accuracy. Both real testing sets and all related code will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，大气湍流的图像恢复算法的设计比模糊或噪声等传统算法更具挑战性，因为湍流引起的失真是空间变化的模糊、几何失真和传感器噪声的纠缠。现有的基于 CNN 的恢复方法基于具有静态权重的卷积核，不足以处理空间动态大气湍流效应。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种受物理启发的变压器模型，用于通过大气湍流进行成像。所提出的网络利用变压器块的力量来联合提取动态湍流失真图并恢复无湍流图像。此外，认识到缺乏全面的数据集，我们收集并呈现了两个新的现实世界湍流数据集，允许使用经典客观指标（例如 PSNR 和 SSIM）和使用文本识别准确性的新任务驱动指标进行评估。真实的测试集和所有相关代码都将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理启发的Transformer模型，用于解决单帧大气湍流成像中的图像复原问题，并构建了两个新的真实世界湍流数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN方法因卷积核权重静态，难以处理大气湍流引起的时空动态失真（包括空间变化模糊、几何畸变和传感器噪声）。
AI.method: 设计物理启发的Transformer模型，通过Transformer模块联合提取动态湍流失真图并恢复无湍流图像，同时构建包含文本识别准确率任务驱动指标的新型评估体系。
AI.result: 提出两个真实湍流数据集并开源代码，实验表明新模型在PSNR/SSIM指标及文本识别任务中均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 物理启发的Transformer架构有效捕捉湍流动态特性，新型数据集和评估指标为后续研究提供基准，推动大气湍流成像复原技术发展。

authors_text: Lue Fan,Feng Wang,Naiyan Wang,Zhaoxiang Zhang
title: Fully Sparse 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 完全稀疏 3D 物体检测
abstract: As the perception range of LiDAR increases, LiDAR-based 3D object detection becomes a dominant task in the long-range perception task of autonomous driving. The mainstream 3D object detectors usually build dense feature maps in the network backbone and prediction head. However, the computational and spatial costs on the dense feature map are quadratic to the perception range, which makes them hardly scale up to the long-range setting. To enable efficient long-range LiDAR-based object detection, we build a fully sparse 3D object detector (FSD). The computational and spatial cost of FSD is roughly linear to the number of points and independent of the perception range. FSD is built upon the general sparse voxel encoder and a novel sparse instance recognition (SIR) module. SIR first groups the points into instances and then applies instance-wise feature extraction and prediction. In this way, SIR resolves the issue of center feature missing, which hinders the design of the fully sparse architecture for all center-based or anchor-based detectors. Moreover, SIR avoids the time-consuming neighbor queries in previous point-based methods by grouping points into instances. We conduct extensive experiments on the large-scale Waymo Open Dataset to reveal the working mechanism of FSD, and state-of-the-art performance is reported. To demonstrate the superiority of FSD in long-range detection, we also conduct experiments on Argoverse 2 Dataset, which has a much larger perception range ($200m$) than Waymo Open Dataset ($75m$). On such a large perception range, FSD achieves state-of-the-art performance and is 2.4$\times$ faster than the dense counterpart. Codes will be released at https://github.com/TuSimple/SST.
summary: As the perception range of LiDAR increases, LiDAR-based 3D object detection becomes a dominant task in the long-range perception task of autonomous driving. The mainstream 3D object detectors usually build dense feature maps in the network backbone and prediction head. However, the computational and spatial costs on the dense feature map are quadratic to the perception range, which makes them hardly scale up to the long-range setting. To enable efficient long-range LiDAR-based object detection, we build a fully sparse 3D object detector (FSD). The computational and spatial cost of FSD is roughly linear to the number of points and independent of the perception range. FSD is built upon the general sparse voxel encoder and a novel sparse instance recognition (SIR) module. SIR first groups the points into instances and then applies instance-wise feature extraction and prediction. In this way, SIR resolves the issue of center feature missing, which hinders the design of the fully sparse architecture for all center-based or anchor-based detectors. Moreover, SIR avoids the time-consuming neighbor queries in previous point-based methods by grouping points into instances. We conduct extensive experiments on the large-scale Waymo Open Dataset to reveal the working mechanism of FSD, and state-of-the-art performance is reported. To demonstrate the superiority of FSD in long-range detection, we also conduct experiments on Argoverse 2 Dataset, which has a much larger perception range ($200m$) than Waymo Open Dataset ($75m$). On such a large perception range, FSD achieves state-of-the-art performance and is 2.4$\times$ faster than the dense counterpart. Codes will be released at https://github.com/TuSimple/SST.
abstract_zh: 随着LiDAR感知范围的增加，基于LiDAR的3D物体检测成为自动驾驶远程感知任务中的主导任务。主流的 3D 物体检测器通常在网络主干和预测头中构建密集的特征图。然而，密集特征图上的计算和空间成本与感知范围成二次方，这使得它们很难扩展到远程设置。为了实现基于 LiDAR 的高效远程物体检测，我们构建了完全稀疏的 3D 物体检测器 (FSD)。 FSD 的计算和空间成本与点数大致呈线性关系，并且与感知范围无关。 FSD 建立在通用稀疏体素编码器和新颖的稀疏实例识别（SIR）模块的基础上。 SIR 首先将点分组为实例，然后应用实例特征提取和预测。通过这种方式，SIR解决了中心特征缺失的问题，该问题阻碍了所有基于中心或基于锚的检测器的完全稀疏架构的设计。此外，SIR 通过将点分组到实例中，避免了以前基于点的方法中耗时的邻居查询。我们在大规模 Waymo 开放数据集上进行了广泛的实验，以揭示 FSD 的工作机制，并报告了最先进的性能。为了证明 FSD 在远程检测方面的优越性，我们还在 Argoverse 2 数据集上进行了实验，该数据集的感知范围（2 亿美元）比 Waymo 开放数据集（7500 万美元）大得多。在如此大的感知范围内，FSD 实现了最先进的性能，并且比密集对应物快 2.4$\times$。代码将在 https://github.com/TuSimple/SST 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种全稀疏3D目标检测方法FSD，解决长距离LiDAR感知中的计算和空间成本问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D检测器因密集特征图导致计算成本随感知范围二次增长，难以适应长距离自动驾驶需求。
AI.method: 基于稀疏体素编码器和稀疏实例识别模块SIR，通过实例级特征提取和预测实现线性计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在Waymo和Argoverse 2数据集上达到SOTA性能，长距离检测速度较密集方法提升2.4倍。
AI.conclusion: FSD通过稀疏架构有效解决了长距离3D检测的效率瓶颈，为自动驾驶感知提供新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种全稀疏3D目标检测方法FSD，解决长距离LiDAR感知中的计算和空间成本问题。
motivation: 现有3D检测器因密集特征图导致计算成本随感知范围二次增长，难以适应长距离自动驾驶需求。
method: 基于稀疏体素编码器和稀疏实例识别模块SIR，通过实例级特征提取和预测实现线性计算复杂度。
result: 在Waymo和Argoverse 2数据集上达到SOTA性能，长距离检测速度较密集方法提升2.4倍。
conclusion: FSD通过稀疏架构有效解决了长距离3D检测的效率瓶颈，为自动驾驶感知提供新思路。
search_text: Fully Sparse 3D Object Detection 完全稀疏 3D 物体检测 As the perception range of LiDAR increases, LiDAR-based 3D object detection becomes a dominant task in the long-range perception task of autonomous driving. The mainstream 3D object detectors usually build dense feature maps in the network backbone and prediction head. However, the computational and spatial costs on the dense feature map are quadratic to the perception range, which makes them hardly scale up to the long-range setting. To enable efficient long-range LiDAR-based object detection, we build a fully sparse 3D object detector (FSD). The computational and spatial cost of FSD is roughly linear to the number of points and independent of the perception range. FSD is built upon the general sparse voxel encoder and a novel sparse instance recognition (SIR) module. SIR first groups the points into instances and then applies instance-wise feature extraction and prediction. In this way, SIR resolves the issue of center feature missing, which hinders the design of the fully sparse architecture for all center-based or anchor-based detectors. Moreover, SIR avoids the time-consuming neighbor queries in previous point-based methods by grouping points into instances. We conduct extensive experiments on the large-scale Waymo Open Dataset to reveal the working mechanism of FSD, and state-of-the-art performance is reported. To demonstrate the superiority of FSD in long-range detection, we also conduct experiments on Argoverse 2 Dataset, which has a much larger perception range ($200m$) than Waymo Open Dataset ($75m$). On such a large perception range, FSD achieves state-of-the-art performance and is 2.4$\times$ faster than the dense counterpart. Codes will be released at https://github.com/TuSimple/SST. 随着LiDAR感知范围的增加，基于LiDAR的3D物体检测成为自动驾驶远程感知任务中的主导任务。主流的 3D 物体检测器通常在网络主干和预测头中构建密集的特征图。然而，密集特征图上的计算和空间成本与感知范围成二次方，这使得它们很难扩展到远程设置。为了实现基于 LiDAR 的高效远程物体检测，我们构建了完全稀疏的 3D 物体检测器 (FSD)。 FSD 的计算和空间成本与点数大致呈线性关系，并且与感知范围无关。 FSD 建立在通用稀疏体素编码器和新颖的稀疏实例识别（SIR）模块的基础上。 SIR 首先将点分组为实例，然后应用实例特征提取和预测。通过这种方式，SIR解决了中心特征缺失的问题，该问题阻碍了所有基于中心或基于锚的检测器的完全稀疏架构的设计。此外，SIR 通过将点分组到实例中，避免了以前基于点的方法中耗时的邻居查询。我们在大规模 Waymo 开放数据集上进行了广泛的实验，以揭示 FSD 的工作机制，并报告了最先进的性能。为了证明 FSD 在远程检测方面的优越性，我们还在 Argoverse 2 数据集上进行了实验，该数据集的感知范围（2 亿美元）比 Waymo 开放数据集（7500 万美元）大得多。在如此大的感知范围内，FSD 实现了最先进的性能，并且比密集对应物快 2.4$\times$。代码将在 https://github.com/TuSimple/SST 发布。 本文提出一种全稀疏3D目标检测方法FSD，解决长距离LiDAR感知中的计算和空间成本问题。 Lue Fan,Feng Wang,Naiyan Wang,Zhaoxiang Zhang cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Malte Pedersen,Joakim Bruslund Haurum,Patrick Dendorfer,Thomas B. Moeslund
title: MOTCOM: The Multi-Object Tracking Dataset Complexity Metric
title_zh: MOTCOM：多对象跟踪数据集复杂性指标
abstract: There exists no comprehensive metric for describing the complexity of Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) sequences. This lack of metrics decreases explainability, complicates comparison of datasets, and reduces the conversation on tracker performance to a matter of leader board position. As a remedy, we present the novel MOT dataset complexity metric (MOTCOM), which is a combination of three sub-metrics inspired by key problems in MOT: occlusion, erratic motion, and visual similarity. The insights of MOTCOM can open nuanced discussions on tracker performance and may lead to a wider acknowledgement of novel contributions developed for either less known datasets or those aimed at solving sub-problems. We evaluate MOTCOM on the comprehensive MOT17, MOT20, and MOTSynth datasets and show that MOTCOM is far better at describing the complexity of MOT sequences compared to the conventional density and number of tracks. Project page at https://vap.aau.dk/motcom
summary: There exists no comprehensive metric for describing the complexity of Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) sequences. This lack of metrics decreases explainability, complicates comparison of datasets, and reduces the conversation on tracker performance to a matter of leader board position. As a remedy, we present the novel MOT dataset complexity metric (MOTCOM), which is a combination of three sub-metrics inspired by key problems in MOT: occlusion, erratic motion, and visual similarity. The insights of MOTCOM can open nuanced discussions on tracker performance and may lead to a wider acknowledgement of novel contributions developed for either less known datasets or those aimed at solving sub-problems. We evaluate MOTCOM on the comprehensive MOT17, MOT20, and MOTSynth datasets and show that MOTCOM is far better at describing the complexity of MOT sequences compared to the conventional density and number of tracks. Project page at https://vap.aau.dk/motcom
abstract_zh: 不存在用于描述多目标跟踪（MOT）序列的复杂性的综合度量。缺乏指标会降低可解释性，使数据集的比较变得复杂，并将有关跟踪器性能的讨论减少到排行榜位置的问题。作为一种补救措施，我们提出了新颖的 MOT 数据集复杂性度量（MOTCOM），它是受 MOT 中关键问题启发的三个子度量的组合：遮挡、不稳定运动和视觉相似性。 MOTCOM 的见解可以开启关于跟踪器性能的细致讨论，并可能导致对为鲜为人知的数据集或旨在解决子问题的数据集开发的新颖贡献获得更广泛的认可。我们在综合 MOT17、MOT20 和 MOTSynth 数据集上评估 MOTCOM，结果表明，与传统密度和轨道数量相比，MOTCOM 在描述 MOT 序列的复杂性方面要好得多。项目页面：https://vap.aau.dk/motcom

AI.tldr: 提出名为MOTCOM的多目标跟踪数据集复杂度度量指标，用于更准确地描述MOT序列的复杂性。
AI.motivation: 现有缺乏全面的MOT序列复杂度度量指标，导致数据集比较困难且跟踪器性能讨论仅依赖排行榜排名，需更细致的评估标准。
AI.method: 结合遮挡、运动不规则性和视觉相似性三个子指标，构建MOTCOM度量体系，并在多个数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，MOTCOM在MOT17、MOT20和MOTSynth数据集上比传统密度和跟踪数量指标更有效描述MOT序列复杂度。
AI.conclusion: MOTCOM为跟踪器性能讨论提供更细致的依据，促进对未知数据集或子问题解决方案的认可。

authors_text: Kehan Li,Runyi Yu,Zhennan Wang,Li Yuan,Guoli Song,Jie Chen
title: Locality Guidance for Improving Vision Transformers on Tiny Datasets
title_zh: 改进小型数据集上的视觉转换器的局部性指南
abstract: While the Vision Transformer (VT) architecture is becoming trendy in computer vision, pure VT models perform poorly on tiny datasets. To address this issue, this paper proposes the locality guidance for improving the performance of VTs on tiny datasets. We first analyze that the local information, which is of great importance for understanding images, is hard to be learned with limited data due to the high flexibility and intrinsic globality of the self-attention mechanism in VTs. To facilitate local information, we realize the locality guidance for VTs by imitating the features of an already trained convolutional neural network (CNN), inspired by the built-in local-to-global hierarchy of CNN. Under our dual-task learning paradigm, the locality guidance provided by a lightweight CNN trained on low-resolution images is adequate to accelerate the convergence and improve the performance of VTs to a large extent. Therefore, our locality guidance approach is very simple and efficient, and can serve as a basic performance enhancement method for VTs on tiny datasets. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can significantly improve VTs when training from scratch on tiny datasets and is compatible with different kinds of VTs and datasets. For example, our proposed method can boost the performance of various VTs on tiny datasets (e.g., 13.07% for DeiT, 8.98% for T2T and 7.85% for PVT), and enhance even stronger baseline PVTv2 by 1.86% to 79.30%, showing the potential of VTs on tiny datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/lkhl/tiny-transformers.
summary: While the Vision Transformer (VT) architecture is becoming trendy in computer vision, pure VT models perform poorly on tiny datasets. To address this issue, this paper proposes the locality guidance for improving the performance of VTs on tiny datasets. We first analyze that the local information, which is of great importance for understanding images, is hard to be learned with limited data due to the high flexibility and intrinsic globality of the self-attention mechanism in VTs. To facilitate local information, we realize the locality guidance for VTs by imitating the features of an already trained convolutional neural network (CNN), inspired by the built-in local-to-global hierarchy of CNN. Under our dual-task learning paradigm, the locality guidance provided by a lightweight CNN trained on low-resolution images is adequate to accelerate the convergence and improve the performance of VTs to a large extent. Therefore, our locality guidance approach is very simple and efficient, and can serve as a basic performance enhancement method for VTs on tiny datasets. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can significantly improve VTs when training from scratch on tiny datasets and is compatible with different kinds of VTs and datasets. For example, our proposed method can boost the performance of various VTs on tiny datasets (e.g., 13.07% for DeiT, 8.98% for T2T and 7.85% for PVT), and enhance even stronger baseline PVTv2 by 1.86% to 79.30%, showing the potential of VTs on tiny datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/lkhl/tiny-transformers.
abstract_zh: 虽然视觉变换器 (VT) 架构在计算机视觉领域变得越来越流行，但纯 VT 模型在小型数据集上表现不佳。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了提高 VT 在小型数据集上性能的局部指导。我们首先分析，由于 VT 中自注意力机制的高度灵活性和内在全局性，对于理解图像非常重要的局部信息很难用有限的数据来学习。为了促进局部信息，受 CNN 内置局部到全局层次结构的启发，我们通过模仿已经训练好的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的特征来实现 VT 的局部性指导。在我们的双任务学习范式下，在低分辨率图像上训练的轻量级 CNN 提供的局部性指导足以加速收敛并在很大程度上提高 VT 的性能。因此，我们的局部引导方法非常简单有效，可以作为小型数据集上 VT 的基本性能增强方法。大量实验表明，我们的方法在小型数据集上从头开始训练时可以显着提高 VT，并且与不同类型的 VT 和数据集兼容。例如，我们提出的方法可以提高各种 VT 在微小数据集上的性能（例如，DeiT 提高 13.07%，T2T 提高 8.98%，PVT 提高 7.85%），并将更强的基线 PVTv2 提高 1.86% 至 79.30%，显示了 VT 在微小数据集上的潜力。代码可在 https://github.com/lkhl/tiny-transformers 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种局部性引导方法，通过模仿卷积神经网络（CNN）的特征，提升视觉Transformer（VT）在小数据集上的性能。
AI.motivation: 纯VT模型在小数据集上表现不佳，因其自注意力机制的全局性难以有效学习局部信息，而局部信息对图像理解至关重要。
AI.method: 设计一种双任务学习框架，利用轻量级CNN在低分辨率图像上训练得到的局部特征引导VT学习，加速收敛并提升性能。
AI.result: 在多个小数据集上显著提升VT性能（如DeiT提升13.07%、PVTv2提升1.86%-79.30%），且兼容不同VT模型和数据集。
AI.conclusion: 局部性引导方法简单高效，为VT在小数据场景下的性能优化提供了有效基础方案。

search_text: Locality Guidance for Improving Vision Transformers on Tiny Datasets 改进小型数据集上的视觉转换器的局部性指南 While the Vision Transformer (VT) architecture is becoming trendy in computer vision, pure VT models perform poorly on tiny datasets. To address this issue, this paper proposes the locality guidance for improving the performance of VTs on tiny datasets. We first analyze that the local information, which is of great importance for understanding images, is hard to be learned with limited data due to the high flexibility and intrinsic globality of the self-attention mechanism in VTs. To facilitate local information, we realize the locality guidance for VTs by imitating the features of an already trained convolutional neural network (CNN), inspired by the built-in local-to-global hierarchy of CNN. Under our dual-task learning paradigm, the locality guidance provided by a lightweight CNN trained on low-resolution images is adequate to accelerate the convergence and improve the performance of VTs to a large extent. Therefore, our locality guidance approach is very simple and efficient, and can serve as a basic performance enhancement method for VTs on tiny datasets. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can significantly improve VTs when training from scratch on tiny datasets and is compatible with different kinds of VTs and datasets. For example, our proposed method can boost the performance of various VTs on tiny datasets (e.g., 13.07% for DeiT, 8.98% for T2T and 7.85% for PVT), and enhance even stronger baseline PVTv2 by 1.86% to 79.30%, showing the potential of VTs on tiny datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/lkhl/tiny-transformers. 虽然视觉变换器 (VT) 架构在计算机视觉领域变得越来越流行，但纯 VT 模型在小型数据集上表现不佳。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了提高 VT 在小型数据集上性能的局部指导。我们首先分析，由于 VT 中自注意力机制的高度灵活性和内在全局性，对于理解图像非常重要的局部信息很难用有限的数据来学习。为了促进局部信息，受 CNN 内置局部到全局层次结构的启发，我们通过模仿已经训练好的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的特征来实现 VT 的局部性指导。在我们的双任务学习范式下，在低分辨率图像上训练的轻量级 CNN 提供的局部性指导足以加速收敛并在很大程度上提高 VT 的性能。因此，我们的局部引导方法非常简单有效，可以作为小型数据集上 VT 的基本性能增强方法。大量实验表明，我们的方法在小型数据集上从头开始训练时可以显着提高 VT，并且与不同类型的 VT 和数据集兼容。例如，我们提出的方法可以提高各种 VT 在微小数据集上的性能（例如，DeiT 提高 13.07%，T2T 提高 8.98%，PVT 提高 7.85%），并将更强的基线 PVTv2 提高 1.86% 至 79.30%，显示了 VT 在微小数据集上的潜力。代码可在 https://github.com/lkhl/tiny-transformers 获取。 本文提出一种局部性引导方法，通过模仿卷积神经网络（CNN）的特征，提升视觉Transformer（VT）在小数据集上的性能。 Kehan Li,Runyi Yu,Zhennan Wang,Li Yuan,Guoli Song,Jie Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Jae-Yeop Jeong,Yeong-Gi Hong,JiYeon Oh,Sumin Hong,Jin-Woo Jeong,Yuchul Jung
title: Learning from Synthetic Data: Facial Expression Classification based on Ensemble of Multi-task Networks
title_zh: 从合成数据中学习：基于多任务网络集成的面部表情分类
abstract: Facial expression in-the-wild is essential for various interactive computing domains. Especially, "Learning from Synthetic Data" (LSD) is an important topic in the facial expression recognition task. In this paper, we propose a multi-task learning-based facial expression recognition approach which consists of emotion and appearance learning branches that can share all face information, and present preliminary results for the LSD challenge introduced in the 4th affective behavior analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition. Our method achieved the mean F1 score of 0.71.
summary: Facial expression in-the-wild is essential for various interactive computing domains. Especially, "Learning from Synthetic Data" (LSD) is an important topic in the facial expression recognition task. In this paper, we propose a multi-task learning-based facial expression recognition approach which consists of emotion and appearance learning branches that can share all face information, and present preliminary results for the LSD challenge introduced in the 4th affective behavior analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition. Our method achieved the mean F1 score of 0.71.
abstract_zh: 野外面部表情对于各种交互式计算领域至关重要。特别是，“从合成数据中学习”（LSD）是面部表情识别任务中的一个重要课题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于多任务学习的面部表情识别方法，该方法由可以共享所有面部信息的情感和外观学习分支组成，并为第四届野外情感行为分析（ABAW）竞赛中引入的 LSD 挑战提供了初步结果。我们的方法取得了 0.71 的平均 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多任务学习的面部表情识别方法，通过共享面部信息的两个分支网络解决真实环境下的表情分类问题，并在ABAW竞赛中取得初步成果。
AI.motivation: 真实场景中面部表情识别面临数据获取困难和环境复杂性挑战，合成数据学习（LSD）能有效补充数据并提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建包含情感学习和外观学习两个分支的多任务网络，共享所有面部特征信息，通过集成学习策略提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在第四届ABAW竞赛的LSD挑战中，该方法达到0.71的平均F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习框架有效利用合成数据提升表情识别性能，验证了该方法在真实场景中的可行性，为后续研究提供参考。

authors_text: WonJun Moon,Junho Park,Hyun Seok Seong,Cheol-Ho Cho,Jae-Pil Heo
title: Difficulty-Aware Simulator for Open Set Recognition
title_zh: 用于开集识别的难度感知模拟器
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Code is available at github.com/wjun0830/Difficulty-Aware-Simulator
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Code is available at github.com/wjun0830/Difficulty-Aware-Simulator
abstract: Open set recognition (OSR) assumes unknown instances appear out of the blue at the inference time. The main challenge of OSR is that the response of models for unknowns is totally unpredictable. Furthermore, the diversity of open set makes it harder since instances have different difficulty levels. Therefore, we present a novel framework, DIfficulty-Aware Simulator (DIAS), that generates fakes with diverse difficulty levels to simulate the real world. We first investigate fakes from generative adversarial network (GAN) in the classifier's viewpoint and observe that these are not severely challenging. This leads us to define the criteria for difficulty by regarding samples generated with GANs having moderate-difficulty. To produce hard-difficulty examples, we introduce Copycat, imitating the behavior of the classifier. Furthermore, moderate- and easy-difficulty samples are also yielded by our modified GAN and Copycat, respectively. As a result, DIAS outperforms state-of-the-art methods with both metrics of AUROC and F-score. Our code is available at https://github.com/wjun0830/Difficulty-Aware-Simulator.
summary: Open set recognition (OSR) assumes unknown instances appear out of the blue at the inference time. The main challenge of OSR is that the response of models for unknowns is totally unpredictable. Furthermore, the diversity of open set makes it harder since instances have different difficulty levels. Therefore, we present a novel framework, DIfficulty-Aware Simulator (DIAS), that generates fakes with diverse difficulty levels to simulate the real world. We first investigate fakes from generative adversarial network (GAN) in the classifier's viewpoint and observe that these are not severely challenging. This leads us to define the criteria for difficulty by regarding samples generated with GANs having moderate-difficulty. To produce hard-difficulty examples, we introduce Copycat, imitating the behavior of the classifier. Furthermore, moderate- and easy-difficulty samples are also yielded by our modified GAN and Copycat, respectively. As a result, DIAS outperforms state-of-the-art methods with both metrics of AUROC and F-score. Our code is available at https://github.com/wjun0830/Difficulty-Aware-Simulator.
abstract_zh: 开放集识别（OSR）假设未知实例在推理时突然出现。 OSR 的主要挑战是模型对未知数的响应是完全不可预测的。此外，开放集的多样性使其变得更加困难，因为实例具有不同的难度级别。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，即 DIfficulty-Aware Simulator (DIAS)，它可以生成不同难度级别的赝品来模拟现实世界。我们首先从分类器的角度研究生成对抗网络（GAN）的假货，并观察到这些假货并不具有严峻的挑战性。这导致我们通过考虑具有中等难度的 GAN 生成的样本来定义难度标准。为了生成困难的示例，我们引入了 Copycat，模仿分类器的行为。此外，我们修改后的 GAN 和 Copycat 还分别生成了中等难度和简单难度的样本。因此，DIAS 在 AUROC 和 F-score 指标上都优于最先进的方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/wjun0830/Difficulty-Aware-Simulator 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DIAS的难度感知模拟器，用于生成不同难度级别的假样本以提升开放集识别（OSR）的性能。
AI.motivation: 开放集识别面临未知实例难以预测且难度多样的挑战，现有方法生成的假样本难度单一，无法有效模拟真实场景。
AI.method: 通过改进生成对抗网络（GAN）生成中等难度样本，并引入模仿分类器行为的Copycat方法生成高难度样本，结合两者实现多难度样本生成。
AI.result: DIAS在AUROC和F-score指标上优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: DIAS通过模拟真实世界中不同难度的未知实例，显著提升了开放集识别的性能，代码已开源。

The main challenge of OSR is that the response of models for unknowns is totally unpredictable. Furthermore, the diversity of open set makes it harder since instances have different difficulty levels. Therefore, we present a novel framework, DIfficulty-Aware Simulator (DIAS), that generates fakes with diverse difficulty levels to simulate the real world. We first investigate fakes from generative adversarial network (GAN) in the classifier's viewpoint and observe that these are not severely challenging. This leads us to define the criteria for difficulty by regarding samples generated with GANs having moderate-difficulty. To produce hard-difficulty examples, we introduce Copycat, imitating the behavior of the classifier. Furthermore, moderate- and easy-difficulty samples are also yielded by our modified GAN and Copycat, respectively. As a result, DIAS outperforms state-of-the-art methods with both metrics of AUROC and F-score. authors_text: WonJun Moon,Ji-Hwan Kim,Jae-Pil Heo
title: Tailoring Self-Supervision for Supervised Learning
title_zh: 为监督学习定制自我监督
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Code is available at github.com/wjun0830/Localizable-Rotation
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Code is available at github.com/wjun0830/Localizable-Rotation
abstract: Recently, it is shown that deploying a proper self-supervision is a prospective way to enhance the performance of supervised learning. Yet, the benefits of self-supervision are not fully exploited as previous pretext tasks are specialized for unsupervised representation learning. To this end, we begin by presenting three desirable properties for such auxiliary tasks to assist the supervised objective. First, the tasks need to guide the model to learn rich features. Second, the transformations involved in the self-supervision should not significantly alter the training distribution. Third, the tasks are preferred to be light and generic for high applicability to prior arts. Subsequently, to show how existing pretext tasks can fulfill these and be tailored for supervised learning, we propose a simple auxiliary self-supervision task, predicting localizable rotation (LoRot). Our exhaustive experiments validate the merits of LoRot as a pretext task tailored for supervised learning in terms of robustness and generalization capability. Our code is available at https://github.com/wjun0830/Localizable-Rotation.
summary: Recently, it is shown that deploying a proper self-supervision is a prospective way to enhance the performance of supervised learning. Yet, the benefits of self-supervision are not fully exploited as previous pretext tasks are specialized for unsupervised representation learning. To this end, we begin by presenting three desirable properties for such auxiliary tasks to assist the supervised objective. First, the tasks need to guide the model to learn rich features. Second, the transformations involved in the self-supervision should not significantly alter the training distribution. Third, the tasks are preferred to be light and generic for high applicability to prior arts. Subsequently, to show how existing pretext tasks can fulfill these and be tailored for supervised learning, we propose a simple auxiliary self-supervision task, predicting localizable rotation (LoRot). Our exhaustive experiments validate the merits of LoRot as a pretext task tailored for supervised learning in terms of robustness and generalization capability. Our code is available at https://github.com/wjun0830/Localizable-Rotation.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，部署适当的自我监督是提高监督学习性能的一种有前景的方法。然而，自我监督的好处并未得到充分利用，因为以前的借口任务专门用于无监督表示学习。为此，我们首先提出此类辅助任务的三个理想属性，以协助实现监督目标。首先，任务需要引导模型学习丰富的特征。其次，自我监督中涉及的转变不应显着改变培训分布。第三，这些任务优选是简单且通用的，以便对现有技术具有较高的适用性。随后，为了展示现有的借口任务如何实现这些目标并针对监督学习进行定制，我们提出了一个简单的辅助自我监督任务，预测可定位旋转（LoRot）。我们详尽的实验验证了 LoRot 作为为监督学习量身定制的借口任务在鲁棒性和泛化能力方面的优点。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/wjun0830/Localized-Rotation 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LoRot的自监督辅助任务，通过预测局部可定位旋转角度，优化监督学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督预训练任务多针对无监督表征学习，未充分适配监督学习需求，需设计符合监督目标的辅助任务。
AI.method: 提出LoRot任务，要求旋转预测不显著改变数据分布，且保持轻量通用性，通过大量实验验证其有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明LoRot在鲁棒性和泛化能力上优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: LoRot验证了为监督学习定制自监督任务的可行性，为后续研究提供新方向。

search_text: Tailoring Self-Supervision for Supervised Learning 为监督学习定制自我监督 Recently, it is shown that deploying a proper self-supervision is a prospective way to enhance the performance of supervised learning. Yet, the benefits of self-supervision are not fully exploited as previous pretext tasks are specialized for unsupervised representation learning. To this end, we begin by presenting three desirable properties for such auxiliary tasks to assist the supervised objective. First, the tasks need to guide the model to learn rich features. Second, the transformations involved in the self-supervision should not significantly alter the training distribution. Third, the tasks are preferred to be light and generic for high applicability to prior arts. Subsequently, to show how existing pretext tasks can fulfill these and be tailored for supervised learning, we propose a simple auxiliary self-supervision task, predicting localizable rotation (LoRot). Our exhaustive experiments validate the merits of LoRot as a pretext task tailored for supervised learning in terms of robustness and generalization capability. Our code is available at https://github.com/wjun0830/Localizable-Rotation. 最近的研究表明，部署适当的自我监督是提高监督学习性能的一种有前景的方法。然而，自我监督的好处并未得到充分利用，因为以前的借口任务专门用于无监督表示学习。为此，我们首先提出此类辅助任务的三个理想属性，以协助实现监督目标。首先，任务需要引导模型学习丰富的特征。其次，自我监督中涉及的转变不应显着改变培训分布。第三，这些任务优选是简单且通用的，以便对现有技术具有较高的适用性。随后，为了展示现有的借口任务如何实现这些目标并针对监督学习进行定制，我们提出了一个简单的辅助自我监督任务，预测可定位旋转（LoRot）。我们详尽的实验验证了 LoRot 作为为监督学习量身定制的借口任务在鲁棒性和泛化能力方面的优点。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/wjun0830/Localized-Rotation 获取。 本文提出一种名为LoRot的自监督辅助任务，通过预测局部可定位旋转角度，优化监督学习的性能。 WonJun Moon,Ji-Hwan Kim,Jae-Pil Heo cs.CV

authors_text: Shintaro Shiba,Yoshimitsu Aoki,Guillermo Gallego
title: Secrets of Event-Based Optical Flow
title_zh: 基于事件的光流的秘密
abstract: Event cameras respond to scene dynamics and offer advantages to estimate motion. Following recent image-based deep-learning achievements, optical flow estimation methods for event cameras have rushed to combine those image-based methods with event data. However, it requires several adaptations (data conversion, loss function, etc.) as they have very different properties. We develop a principled method to extend the Contrast Maximization framework to estimate optical flow from events alone. We investigate key elements: how to design the objective function to prevent overfitting, how to warp events to deal better with occlusions, and how to improve convergence with multi-scale raw events. With these key elements, our method ranks first among unsupervised methods on the MVSEC benchmark, and is competitive on the DSEC benchmark. Moreover, our method allows us to expose the issues of the ground truth flow in those benchmarks, and produces remarkable results when it is transferred to unsupervised learning settings. Our code is available at https://github.com/tub-rip/event_based_optical_flow
summary: Event cameras respond to scene dynamics and offer advantages to estimate motion. Following recent image-based deep-learning achievements, optical flow estimation methods for event cameras have rushed to combine those image-based methods with event data. However, it requires several adaptations (data conversion, loss function, etc.) as they have very different properties. We develop a principled method to extend the Contrast Maximization framework to estimate optical flow from events alone. We investigate key elements: how to design the objective function to prevent overfitting, how to warp events to deal better with occlusions, and how to improve convergence with multi-scale raw events. With these key elements, our method ranks first among unsupervised methods on the MVSEC benchmark, and is competitive on the DSEC benchmark. Moreover, our method allows us to expose the issues of the ground truth flow in those benchmarks, and produces remarkable results when it is transferred to unsupervised learning settings. Our code is available at https://github.com/tub-rip/event_based_optical_flow
abstract_zh: 事件摄像机响应场景动态并提供估计运动的优势。随着最近基于图像的深度学习取得的成就，事件相机的光流估计方法迅速将这些基于图像的方法与事件数据相结合。然而，它需要进行一些调整（数据转换、损失函数等），因为它们具有非常不同的属性。我们开发了一种原则性方法来扩展对比度最大化框架，以仅根据事件估计光流。我们研究关键要素：如何设计目标函数以防止过度拟合，如何扭曲事件以更好地处理遮挡，以及如何提高多尺度原始事件的收敛性。凭借这些关键要素，我们的方法在 MVSEC 基准上的无监督方法中排名第一，并且在 DSEC 基准上具有竞争力。此外，我们的方法使我们能够暴露这些基准中的真实流问题，并在转移到无监督学习环境时产生显着的结果。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/tub-rip/event_based_optical_flow

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件相机的光学流估计方法，通过改进对比度最大化框架实现事件数据的光学流计算。
AI.motivation: 事件相机在动态场景感知中具有优势，但现有图像基深度学习方法需大量适配才能应用于事件数据，亟需一种原生的事件光学流估计框架。
AI.method: 扩展对比度最大化框架，设计防止过拟合的目标函数，引入事件扭曲处理遮挡，并采用多尺度原始事件提升收敛效率。
AI.result: 在MVSEC基准测试中位列无监督方法第一，在DSEC中表现优异，同时揭示了基准数据集中光流真值的问题，并适用于无监督学习场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为事件光学流估计提供了有效解决方案，凸显了基准数据局限性，并验证了其在无监督学习中的迁移能力。

authors_text: Guanchu Wang,Mengnan Du,Ninghao Liu,Na Zou,Xia Hu
title: Mitigating Algorithmic Bias with Limited Annotations
title_zh: 通过有限的注释减轻算法偏差
abstract: Existing work on fairness modeling commonly assumes that sensitive attributes for all instances are fully available, which may not be true in many real-world applications due to the high cost of acquiring sensitive information. When sensitive attributes are not disclosed or available, it is needed to manually annotate a small part of the training data to mitigate bias. However, the skewed distribution across different sensitive groups preserves the skewness of the original dataset in the annotated subset, which leads to non-optimal bias mitigation. To tackle this challenge, we propose Active Penalization Of Discrimination (APOD), an interactive framework to guide the limited annotations towards maximally eliminating the effect of algorithmic bias. The proposed APOD integrates discrimination penalization with active instance selection to efficiently utilize the limited annotation budget, and it is theoretically proved to be capable of bounding the algorithmic bias. According to the evaluation on five benchmark datasets, APOD outperforms the state-of-the-arts baseline methods under the limited annotation budget, and shows comparable performance to fully annotated bias mitigation, which demonstrates that APOD could benefit real-world applications when sensitive information is limited.
summary: Existing work on fairness modeling commonly assumes that sensitive attributes for all instances are fully available, which may not be true in many real-world applications due to the high cost of acquiring sensitive information. When sensitive attributes are not disclosed or available, it is needed to manually annotate a small part of the training data to mitigate bias. However, the skewed distribution across different sensitive groups preserves the skewness of the original dataset in the annotated subset, which leads to non-optimal bias mitigation. To tackle this challenge, we propose Active Penalization Of Discrimination (APOD), an interactive framework to guide the limited annotations towards maximally eliminating the effect of algorithmic bias. The proposed APOD integrates discrimination penalization with active instance selection to efficiently utilize the limited annotation budget, and it is theoretically proved to be capable of bounding the algorithmic bias. According to the evaluation on five benchmark datasets, APOD outperforms the state-of-the-arts baseline methods under the limited annotation budget, and shows comparable performance to fully annotated bias mitigation, which demonstrates that APOD could benefit real-world applications when sensitive information is limited.
abstract_zh: 现有的公平建模工作通常假设所有实例的敏感属性都是完全可用的，但由于获取敏感信息的成本很高，这在许多现实应用程序中可能并非如此。当敏感属性未公开或不可用时，需要手动注释一小部分训练数据以减轻偏差。然而，不同敏感群体之间的偏态分布保留了带注释的子集中原始数据集的偏态，这导致非最佳的偏差缓解。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了主动歧视惩罚（APOD），这是一个交互式框架，用于指导有限的注释最大限度地消除算法偏差的影响。所提出的 APOD 将歧视惩罚与主动实例选择相结合，以有效地利用有限的注释预算，并且理论上证明它能够限制算法偏差。根据对五个基准数据集的评估，APOD 在有限的注释预算下优于最先进的基线方法，并显示出与完全注释的偏差缓解相当的性能，这表明当敏感信息有限时，APOD 可以使现实世界的应用程序受益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为APOD的交互式框架，用于在有限标注预算下有效减少算法偏见。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性模型假设所有实例的敏感属性均可获取，但现实中因敏感信息获取成本高，标注数据分布可能不均衡，导致偏见缓解效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出主动惩罚歧视（APOD）框架，结合歧视惩罚与主动实例选择，优化有限标注资源的使用效率。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上，APOD在有限标注预算下优于现有方法，且性能接近完全标注的偏见缓解效果。
AI.conclusion: APOD能在敏感信息有限的现实场景中有效降低算法偏见，具有实际应用价值。

authors: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
authors_json: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
authors_text: Timo Rohrer,Anahita Farhang Ghahfarokhi,Mohamed Behery,Gerhard Lakemeyer,Wil M. P. van der Aalst
title: Predictive Object-Centric Process Monitoring
title_zh: 以对象为中心的预测性过程监控
abstract: The automation and digitalization of business processes has resulted in large amounts of data captured in information systems, which can aid businesses in understanding their processes better, improve workflows, or provide operational support. By making predictions about ongoing processes, bottlenecks can be identified and resources reallocated, as well as insights gained into the state of a process instance (case). Traditionally, data is extracted from systems in the form of an event log with a single identifying case notion, such as an order id for an Order to Cash (O2C) process. However, real processes often have multiple object types, for example, order, item, and package, so a format that forces the use of a single case notion does not reflect the underlying relations in the data. The Object-Centric Event Log (OCEL) format was introduced to correctly capture this information. The state-of-the-art predictive methods have been tailored to only traditional event logs. This thesis shows that a prediction method utilizing Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN), Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) architectures, and Sequence to Sequence models (Seq2seq), can be augmented with the rich data contained in OCEL. Objects in OCEL can have attributes that are useful in predicting the next event and timestamp, such as a priority class attribute for an object type package indicating slower or faster processing. In the metrics of sequence similarity of predicted remaining events and mean absolute error (MAE) of the timestamp, the approach in this thesis matches or exceeds previous research, depending on whether selected object attributes are useful features for the model. Additionally, this thesis provides a web interface to predict the next sequence of activities from user input.
summary: The automation and digitalization of business processes has resulted in large amounts of data captured in information systems, which can aid businesses in understanding their processes better, improve workflows, or provide operational support. By making predictions about ongoing processes, bottlenecks can be identified and resources reallocated, as well as insights gained into the state of a process instance (case). Traditionally, data is extracted from systems in the form of an event log with a single identifying case notion, such as an order id for an Order to Cash (O2C) process. However, real processes often have multiple object types, for example, order, item, and package, so a format that forces the use of a single case notion does not reflect the underlying relations in the data. The Object-Centric Event Log (OCEL) format was introduced to correctly capture this information. The state-of-the-art predictive methods have been tailored to only traditional event logs. This thesis shows that a prediction method utilizing Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN), Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) architectures, and Sequence to Sequence models (Seq2seq), can be augmented with the rich data contained in OCEL. Objects in OCEL can have attributes that are useful in predicting the next event and timestamp, such as a priority class attribute for an object type package indicating slower or faster processing. In the metrics of sequence similarity of predicted remaining events and mean absolute error (MAE) of the timestamp, the approach in this thesis matches or exceeds previous research, depending on whether selected object attributes are useful features for the model. Additionally, this thesis provides a web interface to predict the next sequence of activities from user input.
abstract_zh: 业务流程的自动化和数字化导致信息系统中捕获了大量数据，这可以帮助企业更好地理解其流程、改进工作流程或提供运营支持。通过对正在进行的流程进行预测，可以识别瓶颈并重新分配资源，并深入了解流程实例（案例）的状态。传统上，数据以事件日志的形式从系统中提取，具有单个识别案例概念，例如订单到现金 (O2C) 流程的订单 ID。然而，实际流程通常具有多种对象类型，例如订单、项目和包，因此强制使用单例概念的格式不能反映数据中的底层关系。引入以对象为中心的事件日志 (OCEL) 格式是为了正确捕获此信息。最先进的预测方法仅适用于传统事件日志。本论文表明，利用生成对抗网络 (GAN)、长短期记忆 (LSTM) 架构和序列到序列模型 (Seq2seq) 的预测方法可以通过 OCEL 中包含的丰富数据进行增强。 OCEL 中的对象可以具有可用于预测下一个事件和时间戳的属性，例如指示较慢或较快处理的对象类型包的优先级属性。在预测剩余事件的序列相似性和时间戳的平均绝对误差（MAE）指标中，本文的方法匹配或超过了先前的研究，具体取决于所选对象属性是否对模型有用。此外，本文提供了一个网络界面来根据用户输入预测下一个活动序列。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对象中心事件日志（OCEL）的预测性流程监控方法，结合生成对抗网络（GAN）、长短期记忆网络（LSTM）和序列到序列模型（Seq2seq）进行流程预测。
AI.motivation: 传统事件日志仅用单一案例标识符无法反映实际流程中多对象类型（如订单、物品、包裹）的复杂关系，而OCEL格式能更准确描述此类数据，但现有预测方法未充分利用其特性。
AI.method: 利用OCEL中对象属性（如包裹优先级）增强GAN、LSTM和Seq2seq模型，通过序列相似性度量和时间戳平均绝对误差（MAE）评估预测效果，并开发了预测活动序列的网络接口。
AI.result: 在序列相似性和时间戳预测精度上，该方法在部分对象属性有效的情况下达到或超越现有研究水平，且提供了用户交互的预测接口。
AI.conclusion: 结合OCEL数据与深度学习模型能有效提升流程预测性能，为业务流程优化提供支持，同时验证了对象中心视角在预测性流程分析中的价值。

search_text: Predictive Object-Centric Process Monitoring 以对象为中心的预测性过程监控 The automation and digitalization of business processes has resulted in large amounts of data captured in information systems, which can aid businesses in understanding their processes better, improve workflows, or provide operational support. By making predictions about ongoing processes, bottlenecks can be identified and resources reallocated, as well as insights gained into the state of a process instance (case). Traditionally, data is extracted from systems in the form of an event log with a single identifying case notion, such as an order id for an Order to Cash (O2C) process. In the metrics of sequence similarity of predicted remaining events and mean absolute error (MAE) of the timestamp, the approach in this thesis matches or exceeds previous research, depending on whether selected object attributes are useful features for the model. authors_text: Qianyu Zhou,Ke-Yue Zhang,Taiping Yao,Ran Yi,Kekai Sheng,Shouhong Ding,Lizhuang Ma
title: Generative Domain Adaptation for Face Anti-Spoofing
title_zh: 用于人脸反欺骗的生成域适应
comment: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV), 2022
comments: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV), 2022
abstract: Face anti-spoofing (FAS) approaches based on unsupervised domain adaption (UDA) have drawn growing attention due to promising performances for target scenarios. Most existing UDA FAS methods typically fit the trained models to the target domain via aligning the distribution of semantic high-level features. However, insufficient supervision of unlabeled target domains and neglect of low-level feature alignment degrade the performances of existing methods. To address these issues, we propose a novel perspective of UDA FAS that directly fits the target data to the models, i.e., stylizes the target data to the source-domain style via image translation, and further feeds the stylized data into the well-trained source model for classification. The proposed Generative Domain Adaptation (GDA) framework combines two carefully designed consistency constraints: 1) Inter-domain neural statistic consistency guides the generator in narrowing the inter-domain gap. 2) Dual-level semantic consistency ensures the semantic quality of stylized images. Besides, we propose intra-domain spectrum mixup to further expand target data distributions to ensure generalization and reduce the intra-domain gap. Extensive experiments and visualizations demonstrate the effectiveness of our method against the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Face anti-spoofing (FAS) approaches based on unsupervised domain adaption (UDA) have drawn growing attention due to promising performances for target scenarios. Most existing UDA FAS methods typically fit the trained models to the target domain via aligning the distribution of semantic high-level features. However, insufficient supervision of unlabeled target domains and neglect of low-level feature alignment degrade the performances of existing methods. To address these issues, we propose a novel perspective of UDA FAS that directly fits the target data to the models, i.e., stylizes the target data to the source-domain style via image translation, and further feeds the stylized data into the well-trained source model for classification. The proposed Generative Domain Adaptation (GDA) framework combines two carefully designed consistency constraints: 1) Inter-domain neural statistic consistency guides the generator in narrowing the inter-domain gap. 2) Dual-level semantic consistency ensures the semantic quality of stylized images. Besides, we propose intra-domain spectrum mixup to further expand target data distributions to ensure generalization and reduce the intra-domain gap. Extensive experiments and visualizations demonstrate the effectiveness of our method against the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 基于无监督域适应（UDA）的人脸反欺骗（FAS）方法由于在目标场景中的良好性能而引起了越来越多的关注。大多数现有的 UDA FAS 方法通常通过对齐语义高级特征的分布来将训练后的模型拟合到目标域。然而，对未标记目标域的监督不足和忽视低级特征对齐会降低现有方法的性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 UDA FAS 的一种新颖视角，将目标数据直接拟合到模型中，即通过图像转换将目标数据风格化为源域风格，并进一步将风格化数据输入训练有素的源模型进行分类。所提出的生成域适应（GDA）框架结合了两个精心设计的一致性约束：1）域间神经统计一致性指导生成器缩小域间差距。 2）双层语义一致性保证了风格化图像的语义质量。此外，我们提出域内频谱混合以进一步扩展目标数据分布，以确保泛化并减少域内差距。大量的实验和可视化证明了我们的方法相对于最先进的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成领域自适应框架（GDA），通过图像翻译和一致性约束提升无监督领域自适应的活体检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督领域自适应活体检测方法因未充分监督目标领域数据且忽略低层特征对齐，导致性能不足。
AI.method: 设计GDA框架，包含跨领域神经统计一致性约束、双层级语义一致性约束及域内频谱Mixup技术，通过图像翻译将目标数据风格化后输入源模型进行分类。
AI.result: 实验和可视化结果表明，该方法在多个基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过直接适配目标数据并强化多层级特征对齐，所提方法有效解决了领域自适应活体检测中的关键问题。

authors_text: Yanyan Li,Federico Tombari
title: E-Graph: Minimal Solution for Rigid Rotation with Extensibility Graphs
title_zh: E-Graph：具有可扩展性图的刚性旋转的最小解决方案
abstract: Minimal solutions for relative rotation and translation estimation tasks have been explored in different scenarios, typically relying on the so-called co-visibility graph. However, how to build direct rotation relationships between two frames without overlap is still an open topic, which, if solved, could greatly improve the accuracy of visual odometry. In this paper, a new minimal solution is proposed to solve relative rotation estimation between two images without overlapping areas by exploiting a new graph structure, which we call Extensibility Graph (E-Graph). Differently from a co-visibility graph, high-level landmarks, including vanishing directions and plane normals, are stored in our E-Graph, which are geometrically extensible. Based on E-Graph, the rotation estimation problem becomes simpler and more elegant, as it can deal with pure rotational motion and requires fewer assumptions, e.g. Manhattan/Atlanta World, planar/vertical motion. Finally, we embed our rotation estimation strategy into a complete camera tracking and mapping system which obtains 6-DoF camera poses and a dense 3D mesh model. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art tracking performance.
summary: Minimal solutions for relative rotation and translation estimation tasks have been explored in different scenarios, typically relying on the so-called co-visibility graph. However, how to build direct rotation relationships between two frames without overlap is still an open topic, which, if solved, could greatly improve the accuracy of visual odometry. In this paper, a new minimal solution is proposed to solve relative rotation estimation between two images without overlapping areas by exploiting a new graph structure, which we call Extensibility Graph (E-Graph). Differently from a co-visibility graph, high-level landmarks, including vanishing directions and plane normals, are stored in our E-Graph, which are geometrically extensible. Based on E-Graph, the rotation estimation problem becomes simpler and more elegant, as it can deal with pure rotational motion and requires fewer assumptions, e.g. Manhattan/Atlanta World, planar/vertical motion. Finally, we embed our rotation estimation strategy into a complete camera tracking and mapping system which obtains 6-DoF camera poses and a dense 3D mesh model. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art tracking performance.
abstract_zh: 人们已经在不同的场景中探索了相对旋转和平移估计任务的最小解决方案，通常依赖于所谓的共同可见性图。然而，如何在两个帧之间建立不重叠的直接旋转关系仍然是一个开放的话题，如果解决这个问题，可以大大提高视觉里程计的准确性。在本文中，提出了一种新的最小解决方案，通过利用新的图结构（我们称之为可扩展性图（E-Graph））来解决两个图像之间没有重叠区域的相对旋转估计。与共同可见性图不同，高级地标（包括消失方向和平面法线）存储在我们的 E-Graph 中，它们在几何上是可扩展的。基于E-Graph，旋转估计问题变得更简单、更优雅，因为它可以处理纯旋转运动并且需要更少的假设，例如曼哈顿/亚特兰大世界，平面/垂直运动。最后，我们将旋转估计策略嵌入到完整的相机跟踪和映射系统中，该系统获得 6-DoF 相机姿态和密集的 3D 网格模型。对公共基准的大量实验表明，所提出的方法实现了最先进的跟踪性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可扩展图结构（E-Graph）的最小解法，用于在无重叠区域的两幅图像间估计相对旋转。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖共可见性图，但难以处理无重叠帧的旋转关系，影响视觉里程计精度。解决此问题可显著提升性能。
AI.method: 构建包含消失方向和平面法线等高阶几何特征的E-Graph，通过该图结构简化旋转估计，无需假设曼哈顿/亚特兰大世界或平面/垂直运动。
AI.result: 将方法嵌入完整相机跟踪系统，实现6自由度相机位姿与稠密3D网格重建，在公开基准测试中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: E-Graph提供了一种更简洁灵活的旋转估计方案，无需环境假设即可提升视觉里程计精度。

search_text: E-Graph: Minimal Solution for Rigid Rotation with Extensibility Graphs E-Graph：具有可扩展性图的刚性旋转的最小解决方案 Minimal solutions for relative rotation and translation estimation tasks have been explored in different scenarios, typically relying on the so-called co-visibility graph. However, how to build direct rotation relationships between two frames without overlap is still an open topic, which, if solved, could greatly improve the accuracy of visual odometry. In this paper, a new minimal solution is proposed to solve relative rotation estimation between two images without overlapping areas by exploiting a new graph structure, which we call Extensibility Graph (E-Graph). Differently from a co-visibility graph, high-level landmarks, including vanishing directions and plane normals, are stored in our E-Graph, which are geometrically extensible. Based on E-Graph, the rotation estimation problem becomes simpler and more elegant, as it can deal with pure rotational motion and requires fewer assumptions, e.g. Manhattan/Atlanta World, planar/vertical motion. Finally, we embed our rotation estimation strategy into a complete camera tracking and mapping system which obtains 6-DoF camera poses and a dense 3D mesh model. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art tracking performance. 人们已经在不同的场景中探索了相对旋转和平移估计任务的最小解决方案，通常依赖于所谓的共同可见性图。然而，如何在两个帧之间建立不重叠的直接旋转关系仍然是一个开放的话题，如果解决这个问题，可以大大提高视觉里程计的准确性。在本文中，提出了一种新的最小解决方案，通过利用新的图结构（我们称之为可扩展性图（E-Graph））来解决两个图像之间没有重叠区域的相对旋转估计。与共同可见性图不同，高级地标（包括消失方向和平面法线）存储在我们的 E-Graph 中，它们在几何上是可扩展的。基于E-Graph，旋转估计问题变得更简单、更优雅，因为它可以处理纯旋转运动并且需要更少的假设，例如曼哈顿/亚特兰大世界，平面/垂直运动。最后，我们将旋转估计策略嵌入到完整的相机跟踪和映射系统中，该系统获得 6-DoF 相机姿态和密集的 3D 网格模型。对公共基准的大量实验表明，所提出的方法实现了最先进的跟踪性能。 本文提出一种基于可扩展图结构（E-Graph）的最小解法，用于在无重叠区域的两幅图像间估计相对旋转。 Yanyan Li,Federico Tombari cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Amirhossein Hajavi,Ali Etemad
title: Fine-grained Early Frequency Attention for Deep Speaker Recognition
title_zh: 用于深度说话人识别的细粒度早期频率注意力
abstract: Attention mechanisms have emerged as important tools that boost the performance of deep models by allowing them to focus on key parts of learned embeddings. However, current attention mechanisms used in speaker recognition tasks fail to consider fine-grained information items such as frequency bins in input spectral representations used by the deep networks. To address this issue, we propose the novel Fine-grained Early Frequency Attention (FEFA) for speaker recognition in-the-wild. Once integrated into a deep neural network, our proposed mechanism works by obtaining queries from early layers of the network and generating learnable weights to attend to information items as small as the frequency bins in the input spectral representations. To evaluate the performance of FEFA, we use several well-known deep models as backbone networks and integrate our attention module in their pipelines. The overall performance of these networks (with and without FEFA) are evaluated on the VoxCeleb1 dataset, where we observe considerable improvements when FEFA is used.
summary: Attention mechanisms have emerged as important tools that boost the performance of deep models by allowing them to focus on key parts of learned embeddings. However, current attention mechanisms used in speaker recognition tasks fail to consider fine-grained information items such as frequency bins in input spectral representations used by the deep networks. To address this issue, we propose the novel Fine-grained Early Frequency Attention (FEFA) for speaker recognition in-the-wild. Once integrated into a deep neural network, our proposed mechanism works by obtaining queries from early layers of the network and generating learnable weights to attend to information items as small as the frequency bins in the input spectral representations. To evaluate the performance of FEFA, we use several well-known deep models as backbone networks and integrate our attention module in their pipelines. The overall performance of these networks (with and without FEFA) are evaluated on the VoxCeleb1 dataset, where we observe considerable improvements when FEFA is used.
abstract_zh: 注意力机制已经成为重要的工具，可以让深度模型专注于学习嵌入的关键部分，从而提高深度模型的性能。然而，当前说话人识别任务中使用的注意力机制未能考虑细粒度的信息项，例如深度网络使用的输入频谱表示中的频率仓。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了用于野外说话人识别的新颖的细粒度早期频率注意（FEFA）。一旦集成到深度神经网络中，我们提出的机制就可以通过从网络的早期层获取查询并生成可学习的权重来处理与输入频谱表示中的频率仓一样小的信息项。为了评估 FEFA 的性能，我们使用几个著名的深度模型作为主干网络，并将我们的注意力模块集成到它们的管道中。这些网络的整体性能（使用和不使用 FEFA）在 VoxCeleb1 数据集上进行评估，我们观察到使用 FEFA 时有相当大的改进。

AI.tldr: 提出一种细粒度早期频率注意力机制（FEFA），用于提升深度说话人识别模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力机制未有效利用频谱表示中的细粒度频率信息，限制了说话人识别性能的进一步提升。
AI.method: 设计细粒度早期频率注意力模块（FEFA），从网络早期层提取查询，生成可学习权重以关注输入频谱的频率bins级信息，并将其集成到主流深度模型中。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb1数据集上，集成FEFA的模型相比原始模型取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: FEFA通过捕捉细粒度频率信息有效提升说话人识别性能，验证了注意力机制在频谱特征利用中的重要性，为后续研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Hyungjun Lee,Hwangyu Lim,Sejoon Lim
title: BYEL : Bootstrap Your Emotion Latent
title_zh: BYEL：引导你的潜在情绪
abstract: With the improved performance of deep learning, the number of studies trying to apply deep learning to human emotion analysis is increasing rapidly. But even with this trend going on, it is still difficult to obtain high-quality images and annotations. For this reason, the Learning from Synthetic Data (LSD) Challenge, which learns from synthetic images and infers from real images, is one of the most interesting areas. In general, Domain Adaptation methods are widely used to address LSD challenges, but there is a limitation that target domains (real images) are still needed. Focusing on these limitations, we propose a framework Bootstrap Your Emotion Latent (BYEL), which uses only synthetic images in training. BYEL is implemented by adding Emotion Classifiers and Emotion Vector Subtraction to the BYOL framework that performs well in Self-Supervised Representation Learning. We train our framework using synthetic images generated from the Aff-wild2 dataset and evaluate it using real images from the Aff-wild2 dataset. The result shows that our framework (0.3084) performs 2.8% higher than the baseline (0.3) on the macro F1 score metric.
summary: With the improved performance of deep learning, the number of studies trying to apply deep learning to human emotion analysis is increasing rapidly. But even with this trend going on, it is still difficult to obtain high-quality images and annotations. For this reason, the Learning from Synthetic Data (LSD) Challenge, which learns from synthetic images and infers from real images, is one of the most interesting areas. In general, Domain Adaptation methods are widely used to address LSD challenges, but there is a limitation that target domains (real images) are still needed. Focusing on these limitations, we propose a framework Bootstrap Your Emotion Latent (BYEL), which uses only synthetic images in training. BYEL is implemented by adding Emotion Classifiers and Emotion Vector Subtraction to the BYOL framework that performs well in Self-Supervised Representation Learning. We train our framework using synthetic images generated from the Aff-wild2 dataset and evaluate it using real images from the Aff-wild2 dataset. The result shows that our framework (0.3084) performs 2.8% higher than the baseline (0.3) on the macro F1 score metric.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习性能的提高，尝试将深度学习应用于人类情感分析的研究数量正在迅速增加。但即使这种趋势持续下去，获得高质量的图像和注释仍然很困难。因此，从合成数据学习（LSD）挑战赛是最有趣的领域之一，该挑战赛从合成图像中学习并从真实图像中进行推断。一般来说，域适应方法被广泛用于解决 LSD 挑战，但仍然存在需要目标域（真实图像）的限制。针对这些限制，我们提出了一个框架 Bootstrap Your Emotion Latent (BYEL)，它在训练中仅使用合成图像。 BYEL 是通过在 BYOL 框架中添加情感分类器和情感向量减法来实现的，该框架在自监督表示学习中表现良好。我们使用 Aff-wild2 数据集生成的合成图像训练我们的框架，并使用 Aff-wild2 数据集的真实图像对其进行评估。结果显示，我们的框架 (0.3084) 在宏观 F1 分数指标上的表现比基线 (0.3) 高 2.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BYEL的框架，用于在无需真实图像的情况下，仅通过合成图像进行情绪分析。
AI.motivation: 高质量情绪标注图像获取困难，且现有领域自适应方法仍需真实图像。为解决此问题，本文提出仅依赖合成图像训练的框架。
AI.method: 基于BYOL自监督学习框架，添加情绪分类器和情绪向量减法模块，利用Aff-wild2数据集生成的合成图像进行训练，并在真实图像上评估。
AI.result: 在宏F1分数指标上，BYEL框架相较基线模型提升了2.8%（0.3084 vs. 0.3）。
AI.conclusion: BYEL通过合成图像有效学习情绪表征，在无需真实图像的情况下实现了优于基线的性能，为LSD挑战提供了新思路。
