result: 在宏F1分数指标上，BYEL框架相较基线模型提升了2.8%（0.3084 vs. 0.3）。
conclusion: BYEL通过合成图像有效学习情绪表征，在无需真实图像的情况下实现了优于基线的性能，为LSD挑战提供了新思路。
search_text: BYEL : Bootstrap Your Emotion Latent BYEL：引导你的潜在情绪 With the improved performance of deep learning, the number of studies trying to apply deep learning to human emotion analysis is increasing rapidly. But even with this trend going on, it is still difficult to obtain high-quality images and annotations. For this reason, the Learning from Synthetic Data (LSD) Challenge, which learns from synthetic images and infers from real images, is one of the most interesting areas. In general, Domain Adaptation methods are widely used to address LSD challenges, but there is a limitation that target domains (real images) are still needed. Focusing on these limitations, we propose a framework Bootstrap Your Emotion Latent (BYEL), which uses only synthetic images in training. BYEL is implemented by adding Emotion Classifiers and Emotion Vector Subtraction to the BYOL framework that performs well in Self-Supervised Representation Learning. We train our framework using synthetic images generated from the Aff-wild2 dataset and evaluate it using real images from the Aff-wild2 dataset. The result shows that our framework (0.3084) performs 2.8% higher than the baseline (0.3) on the macro F1 score metric. 随着深度学习性能的提高，尝试将深度学习应用于人类情感分析的研究数量正在迅速增加。但即使这种趋势持续下去，获得高质量的图像和注释仍然很困难。因此，从合成数据学习（LSD）挑战赛是最有趣的领域之一，该挑战赛从合成图像中学习并从真实图像中进行推断。一般来说，域适应方法被广泛用于解决 LSD 挑战，但仍然存在需要目标域（真实图像）的限制。针对这些限制，我们提出了一个框架 Bootstrap Your Emotion Latent (BYEL)，它在训练中仅使用合成图像。 BYEL 是通过在 BYOL 框架中添加情感分类器和情感向量减法来实现的，该框架在自监督表示学习中表现良好。我们使用 Aff-wild2 数据集生成的合成图像训练我们的框架，并使用 Aff-wild2 数据集的真实图像对其进行评估。结果显示，我们的框架 (0.3084) 在宏观 F1 分数指标上的表现比基线 (0.3) 高 2.8%。 本文提出了一种名为BYEL的框架，用于在无需真实图像的情况下，仅通过合成图像进行情绪分析。 Hyungjun Lee,Hwangyu Lim,Sejoon Lim cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Piyapat Saranrittichai,Chaithanya Kumar Mummadi,Claudia Blaiotta,Mauricio Munoz,Volker Fischer
title: Overcoming Shortcut Learning in a Target Domain by Generalizing Basic Visual Factors from a Source Domain
title_zh: 通过概括源域中的基本视觉因素来克服目标域中的捷径学习
comment: Accepted for publication at European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
comments: Accepted for publication at European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
abstract: Shortcut learning occurs when a deep neural network overly relies on spurious correlations in the training dataset in order to solve downstream tasks. Prior works have shown how this impairs the compositional generalization capability of deep learning models. To address this problem, we propose a novel approach to mitigate shortcut learning in uncontrolled target domains. Our approach extends the training set with an additional dataset (the source domain), which is specifically designed to facilitate learning independent representations of basic visual factors. We benchmark our idea on synthetic target domains where we explicitly control shortcut opportunities as well as real-world target domains. Furthermore, we analyze the effect of different specifications of the source domain and the network architecture on compositional generalization. Our main finding is that leveraging data from a source domain is an effective way to mitigate shortcut learning. By promoting independence across different factors of variation in the learned representations, networks can learn to consider only predictive factors and ignore potential shortcut factors during inference.
summary: Shortcut learning occurs when a deep neural network overly relies on spurious correlations in the training dataset in order to solve downstream tasks. Prior works have shown how this impairs the compositional generalization capability of deep learning models. To address this problem, we propose a novel approach to mitigate shortcut learning in uncontrolled target domains. Our approach extends the training set with an additional dataset (the source domain), which is specifically designed to facilitate learning independent representations of basic visual factors. We benchmark our idea on synthetic target domains where we explicitly control shortcut opportunities as well as real-world target domains. Furthermore, we analyze the effect of different specifications of the source domain and the network architecture on compositional generalization. Our main finding is that leveraging data from a source domain is an effective way to mitigate shortcut learning. By promoting independence across different factors of variation in the learned representations, networks can learn to consider only predictive factors and ignore potential shortcut factors during inference.
abstract_zh: 当深度神经网络过度依赖训练数据集中的虚假相关性来解决下游任务时，就会发生捷径学习。先前的工作已经表明这如何损害深度学习模型的组合泛化能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新方法来减轻不受控制的目标域中的快捷学习。我们的方法使用额外的数据集（源域）扩展了训练集，该数据集是专门为促进学习基本视觉因素的独立表示而设计的。我们在合成目标域上对我们的想法进行基准测试，在这些域中我们明确控制捷径机会以及现实世界的目标域。此外，我们分析了源域和网络架构的不同规范对组合泛化的影响。我们的主要发现是，利用源域的数据是减少捷径学习的有效方法。通过促进学习表征中不同变异因素的独立性，网络可以学会仅考虑预测因素，并在推理过程中忽略潜在的捷径因素。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过从源域泛化基本视觉因素来克服目标域中的捷径学习的方法。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在训练中过度依赖虚假相关性，导致组合泛化能力下降，需有效缓解捷径学习以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 扩展训练集并引入源域数据集，促进学习独立的基本视觉因素表示，通过合成与真实目标域测试及分析源域与网络架构影响。
AI.result: 源域数据有效缓解捷径学习，促进表示中不同因素独立性，使网络在推理时关注预测因素而非捷径因素。
AI.conclusion: 利用源域数据促进独立表示可有效缓解捷径学习，提升模型在目标域的组合泛化能力。

authors_text: Andreas Bärtschi,Stephan Eidenbenz
title: Short-Depth Circuits for Dicke State Preparation
title_zh: 迪克州准备的短深度电路
comment: IEEE International Conference on Quantum Computing and Engineering, QCE'22, to appear, 2022
comments: IEEE International Conference on Quantum Computing and Engineering, QCE'22, to appear, 2022
abstract: We present short-depth circuits to deterministically prepare any Dicke state |Dn,k>, which is the equal-amplitude superposition of all n-qubit computational basis states with Hamming Weight k. Dicke states are an important class of entangled quantum states with a large variety of applications, and a long history of experimental creation in physical systems. On the other hand, not much is known regarding efficient scalable quantum circuits for Dicke state preparation on realistic quantum computing hardware connectivities. Here we present preparation circuits for Dicke states |Dn,k> with (i) a depth of O(k log(n/k)) for All-to-All connectivity (such as on current ion trap devices); (ii) a depth of O(k sqrt(n/k)) = O(sqrt(nk) for Grid connectivity on grids of size Omega(sqrt(n/s)) x O(sqrt(ns)) with s<=k (such as on current superconducting qubit devices). Both approaches have a total gate count of O(kn), need no ancilla qubits, and generalize to both the preparation and compression of symmetric pure states in which all non-zero amplitudes correspond to states with Hamming weight at most k. Thus our work significantly improves and expands previous state-of-the art circuits which had depth O(n) on a Linear Nearest Neighbor connectivity for arbitrary k (Fundamentals of Computation Theory 2019) and depth O(log n) on All-to-All connectivity for k=1 (Advanced Quantum Technologies 2019).
summary: We present short-depth circuits to deterministically prepare any Dicke state |Dn,k>, which is the equal-amplitude superposition of all n-qubit computational basis states with Hamming Weight k. Dicke states are an important class of entangled quantum states with a large variety of applications, and a long history of experimental creation in physical systems. On the other hand, not much is known regarding efficient scalable quantum circuits for Dicke state preparation on realistic quantum computing hardware connectivities. Here we present preparation circuits for Dicke states |Dn,k> with (i) a depth of O(k log(n/k)) for All-to-All connectivity (such as on current ion trap devices); (ii) a depth of O(k sqrt(n/k)) = O(sqrt(nk) for Grid connectivity on grids of size Omega(sqrt(n/s)) x O(sqrt(ns)) with s<=k (such as on current superconducting qubit devices). Both approaches have a total gate count of O(kn), need no ancilla qubits, and generalize to both the preparation and compression of symmetric pure states in which all non-zero amplitudes correspond to states with Hamming weight at most k. Thus our work significantly improves and expands previous state-of-the art circuits which had depth O(n) on a Linear Nearest Neighbor connectivity for arbitrary k (Fundamentals of Computation Theory 2019) and depth O(log n) on All-to-All connectivity for k=1 (Advanced Quantum Technologies 2019).
abstract_zh: 我们提出了短深度电路来确定性地准备任何迪克状态 |Dn,k>，它是具有汉明权重 k 的所有 n 量子位计算基础状态的等幅叠加。迪克态是一类重要的纠缠量子态，具有广泛的应用，并且在物理系统中的实验创造有着悠久的历史。另一方面，对于在现实量子计算硬件连接上进行迪克态准备的高效可扩展量子电路知之甚少。在这里，我们提出了 Dicke 态 |Dn,k> 的准备电路，其深度为 O(k log(n/k))，用于 All-to-All 连接（例如在当前的离子阱设备上）； (ii) 深度为 O(k sqrt(n/k)) = O(sqrt(nk)，用于大小为 Omega(sqrt(n/s)) x O(sqrt(ns)) 且 s<=k 的网格上的网格连接（例如在当前的超导量子位设备上）。两种方法的总门数为 O(kn)，不需要辅助量子位，并可推广到对称纯态的准备和压缩其中所有非零振幅对应于汉明权重最大为 k 的状态。因此，我们的工作显着改进和扩展了先前最先进的电路，该电路在任意 k 的线性最近邻连接上具有深度 O(n)（计算理论基础 2019），在 k=1 的全对全连接上具有深度 O(log n)（高级量子技术 2019）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于确定性制备任何Dicke态的短深度量子电路。
AI.motivation: Dicke态是一类重要的纠缠量子态，具有广泛的应用前景，但在实际量子计算硬件上缺乏高效的可扩展制备方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了两种制备Dicke态的电路方法：一种适用于全连接架构，深度为O(k log(n/k))；另一种适用于网格连接架构，深度为O(k sqrt(n/k))。
AI.result: 这两种方法都具有O(kn)的总门数，不需要辅助量子比特，并且可以推广到制备和压缩对称纯态。
AI.conclusion: 本文显著改进并扩展了先前的最优电路，为在实际量子计算硬件上高效制备Dicke态提供了新方法。

authors_text: Clément Dallard,Fedor V. Fomin,Petr A. Golovach,Tuukka Korhonen,Martin Milanič
title: Computing Tree Decompositions with Small Independence Number
title_zh: 计算具有小独立数的树分解
abstract: The independence number of a tree decomposition is the maximum of the independence numbers of the subgraphs induced by its bags. The tree-independence number of a graph is the minimum independence number of a tree decomposition of it. Several NP-hard graph problems, like maximum weight independent set, can be solved in time n^{O(k)} if the input n-vertex graph is given together with a tree decomposition of independence number k. Yolov, in [SODA 2018], gave an algorithm that, given an n-vertex graph G and an integer k, in time n^{O(k^3)} either constructs a tree decomposition of G whose independence number is O(k^3) or correctly reports that the tree-independence number of G is larger than k. In this paper, we first give an algorithm for computing the tree-independence number with a better approximation ratio and running time and then prove that our algorithm is, in some sense, the best one can hope for. More precisely, our algorithm runs in time 2^{O(k^2)} n^{O(k)} and either outputs a tree decomposition of G with independence number at most $8k$, or determines that the tree-independence number of G is larger than k. This implies 2^{O(k^2)} n^{O(k)}-time algorithms for various problems, like maximum weight independent set, parameterized by the tree-independence number k without needing the decomposition as an input. Assuming Gap-ETH, an n^{Ω(k)} factor in the running time is unavoidable for any approximation algorithm for the tree-independence number. Our second result is that the exact computation of the tree-independence number is para-NP-hard: We show that for every constant k \ge 4 it is NP-hard to decide if a given graph has the tree-independence number at most k.
summary: The independence number of a tree decomposition is the maximum of the independence numbers of the subgraphs induced by its bags. The tree-independence number of a graph is the minimum independence number of a tree decomposition of it. Several NP-hard graph problems, like maximum weight independent set, can be solved in time n^{O(k)} if the input n-vertex graph is given together with a tree decomposition of independence number k. Yolov, in [SODA 2018], gave an algorithm that, given an n-vertex graph G and an integer k, in time n^{O(k^3)} either constructs a tree decomposition of G whose independence number is O(k^3) or correctly reports that the tree-independence number of G is larger than k. In this paper, we first give an algorithm for computing the tree-independence number with a better approximation ratio and running time and then prove that our algorithm is, in some sense, the best one can hope for. More precisely, our algorithm runs in time 2^{O(k^2)} n^{O(k)} and either outputs a tree decomposition of G with independence number at most $8k$, or determines that the tree-independence number of G is larger than k. This implies 2^{O(k^2)} n^{O(k)}-time algorithms for various problems, like maximum weight independent set, parameterized by the tree-independence number k without needing the decomposition as an input. Assuming Gap-ETH, an n^{Ω(k)} factor in the running time is unavoidable for any approximation algorithm for the tree-independence number. Our second result is that the exact computation of the tree-independence number is para-NP-hard: We show that for every constant k \ge 4 it is NP-hard to decide if a given graph has the tree-independence number at most k.
abstract_zh: 树分解的独立数是由其袋导出的子图的独立数的最大值。图的树独立数是其树分解的最小独立数。如果输入 n 顶点图与独立数 k 的树分解一起给出，则可以在 n^{O(k)} 时间内解决一些 NP 难图问题，例如最大权独立集。 Yolov 在 [SODA 2018] 中给出了一种算法，给定一个 n 顶点图 G 和一个整数 k，在 n^{O(k^3)} 时间内，要么构造独立数为 O(k^3) 的 G 的树分解，要么正确报告 G 的树独立数大于 k。在本文中，我们首先给出了一种具有更好的逼近率和运行时间的计算树独立数的算法，然后证明我们的算法在某种意义上是可以期望的最好的算法。更准确地说，我们的算法在时间 2^{O(k^2)} n^{O(k)} 中运行，并且输出 G 的树分解，其独立数最多为 $8k$，或者确定 G 的树独立数大于 k。这意味着各种问题的 2^{O(k^2)} n^{O(k)} 次算法，例如最大权重独立集，由树独立数 k 参数化，而不需要分解作为输入。假设 Gap-ETH，对于树独立数的任何近似算法来说，运行时间中的 n^{Ω(k)} 因子是不可避免的。我们的第二个结果是，树独立数的精确计算是准 NP 困难的：我们表明，对于每个常数 k \ge 4 ，决定给定图是否具有最多 k 的树独立数是 NP 困难的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种更高效的算法来计算图的树分解独立数，并证明了该问题的近似最优性和精确计算的困难性。
AI.motivation: 树分解的独立数是解决多个NP难问题（如最大权独立集）的关键参数，但现有算法的近似比和时间复杂度存在改进空间。
AI.method: 改进Yolov的算法，设计时间复杂度为2^{O(k²)}n^{O(k)}的近似算法，并通过Gap-ETH假设证明时间复杂度下界；同时证明精确计算的para-NP难性。
AI.result: 提出近似比为8k的算法，将时间复杂度从n^{O(k³)}降至2^{O(k²)}n^{O(k)}；证明在Gap-ETH假设下无法进一步优化，并展示精确计算的NP难性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在近似比和时间复杂度上达到理论最优，且精确计算树独立数具有固有计算难度，为相关参数化问题提供了新的理论边界。

authors_text: Xin Lai,Zhuotao Tian,Xiaogang Xu,Yingcong Chen,Shu Liu,Hengshuang Zhao,Liwei Wang,Jiaya Jia
title: DecoupleNet: Decoupled Network for Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: DepairNet：用于域自适应语义分割的解耦网络
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/dvlab-research/DecoupleNet
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/dvlab-research/DecoupleNet
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation in semantic segmentation has been raised to alleviate the reliance on expensive pixel-wise annotations. It leverages a labeled source domain dataset as well as unlabeled target domain images to learn a segmentation network. In this paper, we observe two main issues of the existing domain-invariant learning framework. (1) Being distracted by the feature distribution alignment, the network cannot focus on the segmentation task. (2) Fitting source domain data well would compromise the target domain performance. To address these issues, we propose DecoupleNet that alleviates source domain overfitting and enables the final model to focus more on the segmentation task. Furthermore, we put forward Self-Discrimination (SD) and introduce an auxiliary classifier to learn more discriminative target domain features with pseudo labels. Finally, we propose Online Enhanced Self-Training (OEST) to contextually enhance the quality of pseudo labels in an online manner. Experiments show our method outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, and extensive ablation studies verify the effectiveness of each component. Code is available at https://github.com/dvlab-research/DecoupleNet.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation in semantic segmentation has been raised to alleviate the reliance on expensive pixel-wise annotations. It leverages a labeled source domain dataset as well as unlabeled target domain images to learn a segmentation network. In this paper, we observe two main issues of the existing domain-invariant learning framework. (1) Being distracted by the feature distribution alignment, the network cannot focus on the segmentation task. (2) Fitting source domain data well would compromise the target domain performance. To address these issues, we propose DecoupleNet that alleviates source domain overfitting and enables the final model to focus more on the segmentation task. Furthermore, we put forward Self-Discrimination (SD) and introduce an auxiliary classifier to learn more discriminative target domain features with pseudo labels. Finally, we propose Online Enhanced Self-Training (OEST) to contextually enhance the quality of pseudo labels in an online manner. Experiments show our method outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, and extensive ablation studies verify the effectiveness of each component. Code is available at https://github.com/dvlab-research/DecoupleNet.
abstract_zh: 语义分割中的无监督域适应已经被提出，以减轻对昂贵的像素级注释的依赖。它利用标记的源域数据集以及未标记的目标域图像来学习分割网络。在本文中，我们观察了现有领域不变学习框架的两个主要问题。 （1）由于特征分布对齐的干扰，网络无法专注于分割任务。 (2) 很好地拟合源域数据会损害目标域的性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 De CoupleNet，它可以缓解源域过度拟合，并使最终模型能够更多地关注分割任务。此外，我们提出了自歧视（SD）并引入了辅助分类器来通过伪标签学习更具辨别力的目标域特征。最后，我们提出在线增强自我训练（OEST），以在线方式根据上下文增强伪标签的质量。实验表明我们的方法优于现有的最先进的方法，并且广泛的消融研究验证了每个组件的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/dvlab-research/De CoupleNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DecoupleNet，用于解决领域自适应语义分割中的源域过拟合和特征分布对齐分散注意力的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有领域不变学习框架存在两问题：1) 特征分布对齐使网络无法专注分割任务；2) 源域拟合良好会损害目标域性能。需设计新方法缓解过拟合并提升分割专注度。
AI.method: 提出DecoupleNet，包含Self-Discrimination（SD）模块、辅助分类器及在线增强自训练（OEST），通过伪标签优化目标域特征并提升伪标签质量。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法优于现有最先进方法，消融实验证实各组件有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: DecoupleNet有效解决了领域自适应分割中的过拟合与任务专注度问题，显著提升目标域分割性能。

authors_text: Dongchao Yang,Jianwei Yu,Helin Wang,Wen Wang,Chao Weng,Yuexian Zou,Dong Yu
title: Diffsound: Discrete Diffusion Model for Text-to-sound Generation
title_zh: Diffsound：用于文本到声音生成的离散扩散模型
abstract: Generating sound effects that humans want is an important topic. However, there are few studies in this area for sound generation. In this study, we investigate generating sound conditioned on a text prompt and propose a novel text-to-sound generation framework that consists of a text encoder, a Vector Quantized Variational Autoencoder (VQ-VAE), a decoder, and a vocoder. The framework first uses the decoder to transfer the text features extracted from the text encoder to a mel-spectrogram with the help of VQ-VAE, and then the vocoder is used to transform the generated mel-spectrogram into a waveform. We found that the decoder significantly influences the generation performance. Thus, we focus on designing a good decoder in this study. We begin with the traditional autoregressive decoder, which has been proved as a state-of-the-art method in previous sound generation works. However, the AR decoder always predicts the mel-spectrogram tokens one by one in order, which introduces the unidirectional bias and accumulation of errors problems. Moreover, with the AR decoder, the sound generation time increases linearly with the sound duration. To overcome the shortcomings introduced by AR decoders, we propose a non-autoregressive decoder based on the discrete diffusion model, named Diffsound. Specifically, the Diffsound predicts all of the mel-spectrogram tokens in one step and then refines the predicted tokens in the next step, so the best-predicted results can be obtained after several steps. Our experiments show that our proposed Diffsound not only produces better text-to-sound generation results when compared with the AR decoder but also has a faster generation speed, e.g., MOS: 3.56 \textit{v.s} 2.786, and the generation speed is five times faster than the AR decoder.
summary: Generating sound effects that humans want is an important topic. However, there are few studies in this area for sound generation. In this study, we investigate generating sound conditioned on a text prompt and propose a novel text-to-sound generation framework that consists of a text encoder, a Vector Quantized Variational Autoencoder (VQ-VAE), a decoder, and a vocoder. The framework first uses the decoder to transfer the text features extracted from the text encoder to a mel-spectrogram with the help of VQ-VAE, and then the vocoder is used to transform the generated mel-spectrogram into a waveform. We found that the decoder significantly influences the generation performance. Thus, we focus on designing a good decoder in this study. We begin with the traditional autoregressive decoder, which has been proved as a state-of-the-art method in previous sound generation works. However, the AR decoder always predicts the mel-spectrogram tokens one by one in order, which introduces the unidirectional bias and accumulation of errors problems. Moreover, with the AR decoder, the sound generation time increases linearly with the sound duration. To overcome the shortcomings introduced by AR decoders, we propose a non-autoregressive decoder based on the discrete diffusion model, named Diffsound. Specifically, the Diffsound predicts all of the mel-spectrogram tokens in one step and then refines the predicted tokens in the next step, so the best-predicted results can be obtained after several steps. Our experiments show that our proposed Diffsound not only produces better text-to-sound generation results when compared with the AR decoder but also has a faster generation speed, e.g., MOS: 3.56 \textit{v.s} 2.786, and the generation speed is five times faster than the AR decoder.
abstract_zh: 产生人类想要的声音效果是一个重要的课题。然而，这方面的声音产生研究还很少。在本研究中，我们研究了根据文本提示生成声音，并提出了一种新颖的文本到声音生成框架，该框架由文本编码器、矢量量化变分自动编码器（VQ-VAE）、解码器和声码器组成。该框架首先使用解码器在 VQ-VAE 的帮助下将从文本编码器提取的文本特征传输到梅尔频谱图，然后使用声码器将生成的梅尔频谱图转换为波形。我们发现解码器显着影响生成性能。因此，我们在本研究中专注于设计一个好的解码器。我们从传统的自回归解码器开始，它已在之前的声音生成工作中被证明是最先进的方法。然而，AR解码器总是按顺序一一预测梅尔谱图标记，这引入了单向偏差和错误累积问题。此外，通过AR解码器，声音生成时间随着声音持续时间线性增加。为了克服 AR 解码器的缺点，我们提出了一种基于离散扩散模型的非自回归解码器，称为 Diffsound。具体来说，Diffsound 在一步中预测所有梅尔谱图标记，然后在下一步中细化预测的标记，因此可以在几个步骤后获得最佳预测结果。我们的实验表明，与 AR 解码器相比，我们提出的 Diffsound 不仅能产生更好的文本到声音生成结果，而且具有更快的生成速度，例如 MOS：3.56 \textit{v.s} 2.786，生成速度比 AR 解码器快五倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Diffsound框架，利用离散扩散模型解决文本到声音生成中的自回归解码器局限性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统自回归解码器存在单向偏差、误差累积和生成速度慢的问题，限制了文本到声音生成的效果与效率。
AI.method: 设计包含文本编码器、VQ-VAE、非自回归扩散解码器和声码器的框架，通过扩散模型一次性预测所有频谱token并迭代优化。
AI.result: Diffsound在MOS评分上达到3.56（对比AR解码器的2.786），生成速度提升5倍。
AI.conclusion: 离散扩散解码器有效解决了自回归方法的缺陷，在生成质量与速度上均取得显著提升。

search_text: Diffsound: Discrete Diffusion Model for Text-to-sound Generation Diffsound：用于文本到声音生成的离散扩散模型 Generating sound effects that humans want is an important topic. However, there are few studies in this area for sound generation. Moreover, with the AR decoder, the sound generation time increases linearly with the sound duration. To overcome the shortcomings introduced by AR decoders, we propose a non-autoregressive decoder based on the discrete diffusion model, named Diffsound. Specifically, the Diffsound predicts all of the mel-spectrogram tokens in one step and then refines the predicted tokens in the next step, so the best-predicted results can be obtained after several steps. Our experiments show that our proposed Diffsound not only produces better text-to-sound generation results when compared with the AR decoder but also has a faster generation speed, e.g., MOS: 3.56 \textit{v.s} 2.786, and the generation speed is five times faster than the AR decoder. 产生人类想要的声音效果是一个重要的课题。然而，这方面的声音产生研究还很少。在本研究中，我们研究了根据文本提示生成声音，并提出了一种新颖的文本到声音生成框架，该框架由文本编码器、矢量量化变分自动编码器（VQ-VAE）、解码器和声码器组成。该框架首先使用解码器在 VQ-VAE 的帮助下将从文本编码器提取的文本特征传输到梅尔频谱图，然后使用声码器将生成的梅尔频谱图转换为波形。我们发现解码器显着影响生成性能。因此，我们在本研究中专注于设计一个好的解码器。我们从传统的自回归解码器开始，它已在之前的声音生成工作中被证明是最先进的方法。然而，AR解码器总是按顺序一一预测梅尔谱图标记，这引入了单向偏差和错误累积问题。此外，通过AR解码器，声音生成时间随着声音持续时间线性增加。为了克服 AR 解码器的缺点，我们提出了一种基于离散扩散模型的非自回归解码器，称为 Diffsound。具体来说，Diffsound 在一步中预测所有梅尔谱图标记，然后在下一步中细化预测的标记，因此可以在几个步骤后获得最佳预测结果。我们的实验表明，与 AR 解码器相比，我们提出的 Diffsound 不仅能产生更好的文本到声音生成结果，而且具有更快的生成速度，例如 MOS：3.56 \textit{v.s} 2.786，生成速度比 AR 解码器快五倍。 本文提出Diffsound框架，利用离散扩散模型解决文本到声音生成中的自回归解码器局限性问题。 Dongchao Yang,Jianwei Yu,Helin Wang,Wen Wang,Chao Weng,Yuexian Zou,Dong Yu cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Yihong Chen,Pushkar Mishra,Luca Franceschi,Pasquale Minervini,Pontus Stenetorp,Sebastian Riedel
title: ReFactor GNNs: Revisiting Factorisation-based Models from a Message-Passing Perspective
title_zh: ReFactor GNN：从消息传递的角度重新审视基于因式分解的模型
comment: 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Factorisation-based Models (FMs), such as DistMult, have enjoyed enduring success for Knowledge Graph Completion (KGC) tasks, often outperforming Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). However, unlike GNNs, FMs struggle to incorporate node features and generalise to unseen nodes in inductive settings. Our work bridges the gap between FMs and GNNs by proposing ReFactor GNNs. This new architecture draws upon both modelling paradigms, which previously were largely thought of as disjoint. Concretely, using a message-passing formalism, we show how FMs can be cast as GNNs by reformulating the gradient descent procedure as message-passing operations, which forms the basis of our ReFactor GNNs. Across a multitude of well-established KGC benchmarks, our ReFactor GNNs achieve comparable transductive performance to FMs, and state-of-the-art inductive performance while using an order of magnitude fewer parameters.
summary: Factorisation-based Models (FMs), such as DistMult, have enjoyed enduring success for Knowledge Graph Completion (KGC) tasks, often outperforming Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). However, unlike GNNs, FMs struggle to incorporate node features and generalise to unseen nodes in inductive settings. Our work bridges the gap between FMs and GNNs by proposing ReFactor GNNs. This new architecture draws upon both modelling paradigms, which previously were largely thought of as disjoint. Concretely, using a message-passing formalism, we show how FMs can be cast as GNNs by reformulating the gradient descent procedure as message-passing operations, which forms the basis of our ReFactor GNNs. Across a multitude of well-established KGC benchmarks, our ReFactor GNNs achieve comparable transductive performance to FMs, and state-of-the-art inductive performance while using an order of magnitude fewer parameters.
abstract_zh: 基于因式分解的模型 (FM)，例如 DistMult，在知识图补全 (KGC) 任务方面取得了持久的成功，通常表现优于图神经网络 (GNN)。然而，与 GNN 不同，FM 很难整合节点特征并泛化到归纳设置中看不见的节点。我们的工作通过提出 ReFactor GNN 来弥合 FM 和 GNN 之间的差距。这种新的架构借鉴了两种建模范式，而以前这两种范式在很大程度上被认为是不相交的。具体来说，我们使用消息传递形式，展示了如何通过将梯度下降过程重新表述为消息传递操作，将 FM 转换为 GNN，这构成了 ReFactor GNN 的基础。在众多完善的 KGC 基准测试中，我们的 ReFactor GNN 实现了与 FM 相当的传导性能，以及最先进的归纳性能，同时使用的参数少了一个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReFactor GNNs，通过消息传递视角将因子分解模型与图神经网络结合，解决知识图谱补全任务中归纳设置的挑战。
AI.motivation: 因子分解模型（FMs）在知识图谱补全中表现优异，但难以处理节点特征和归纳设置；图神经网络（GNNs）虽具泛化能力，但参数冗余。需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 将FMs的梯度下降过程重构为消息传递操作，建立统一框架，设计参数高效的ReFactor GNNs架构。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，ReFactor GNNs达到与FMs相当的归纳性能，且参数量减少一个数量级，实现SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: 成功弥合FMs与GNNs的理论鸿沟，证明两者可兼容，为高效知识图谱学习提供新方向。

authors_text: Weiwei Sun,Daniel Rebain,Renjie Liao,Vladimir Tankovich,Soroosh Yazdani,Kwang Moo Yi,Andrea Tagliasacchi
title: NeuralBF: Neural Bilateral Filtering for Top-down Instance Segmentation on Point Clouds
title_zh: NeuralBF：用于点云上自上而下实例分割的神经双边过滤
abstract: We introduce a method for instance proposal generation for 3D point clouds. Existing techniques typically directly regress proposals in a single feed-forward step, leading to inaccurate estimation. We show that this serves as a critical bottleneck, and propose a method based on iterative bilateral filtering with learned kernels. Following the spirit of bilateral filtering, we consider both the deep feature embeddings of each point, as well as their locations in the 3D space. We show via synthetic experiments that our method brings drastic improvements when generating instance proposals for a given point of interest. We further validate our method on the challenging ScanNet benchmark, achieving the best instance segmentation performance amongst the sub-category of top-down methods.
summary: We introduce a method for instance proposal generation for 3D point clouds. Existing techniques typically directly regress proposals in a single feed-forward step, leading to inaccurate estimation. We show that this serves as a critical bottleneck, and propose a method based on iterative bilateral filtering with learned kernels. Following the spirit of bilateral filtering, we consider both the deep feature embeddings of each point, as well as their locations in the 3D space. We show via synthetic experiments that our method brings drastic improvements when generating instance proposals for a given point of interest. We further validate our method on the challenging ScanNet benchmark, achieving the best instance segmentation performance amongst the sub-category of top-down methods.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了一种用于 3D 点云提案生成的方法。现有技术通常在单个前馈步骤中直接回归提案，从而导致估计不准确。我们证明这是一个关键瓶颈，并提出了一种基于具有学习内核的迭代双边过滤的方法。遵循双边过滤的精神，我们考虑每个点的深度特征嵌入，以及它们在 3D 空间中的位置。我们通过综合实验表明，我们的方法在为给定兴趣点生成实例建议时带来了巨大的改进。我们在具有挑战性的 ScanNet 基准测试上进一步验证了我们的方法，在自上而下方法的子类别中实现了最佳的实例分割性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于神经双边滤波的自上而下实例分割方法，用于3D点云的实例提案生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接通过单次前馈步骤回归提案导致估计不准确，存在关键瓶颈。
AI.method: 采用迭代双边滤波与学习核，结合点的深度特征嵌入及3D空间位置信息。
AI.result: 在合成实验和ScanNet基准测试中均取得最优实例分割性能，尤其在top-down方法中表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了提案生成不准确问题，在多个测试场景中验证了优越性。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了提案生成不准确问题，在多个测试场景中验证了优越性。

tldr: 提出一种基于神经双边滤波的自上而下实例分割方法，用于3D点云的实例提案生成。
motivation: 现有方法直接通过单次前馈步骤回归提案导致估计不准确，存在关键瓶颈。
method: 采用迭代双边滤波与学习核，结合点的深度特征嵌入及3D空间位置信息。
result: 在合成实验和ScanNet基准测试中均取得最优实例分割性能，尤其在top-down方法中表现最佳。
conclusion: 该方法有效解决了提案生成不准确问题，在多个测试场景中验证了优越性。
search_text: NeuralBF: Neural Bilateral Filtering for Top-down Instance Segmentation on Point Clouds NeuralBF：用于点云上自上而下实例分割的神经双边过滤 We introduce a method for instance proposal generation for 3D point clouds. Existing techniques typically directly regress proposals in a single feed-forward step, leading to inaccurate estimation. We show that this serves as a critical bottleneck, and propose a method based on iterative bilateral filtering with learned kernels. Following the spirit of bilateral filtering, we consider both the deep feature embeddings of each point, as well as their locations in the 3D space. We show via synthetic experiments that our method brings drastic improvements when generating instance proposals for a given point of interest. We further validate our method on the challenging ScanNet benchmark, achieving the best instance segmentation performance amongst the sub-category of top-down methods. 我们介绍了一种用于 3D 点云提案生成的方法。现有技术通常在单个前馈步骤中直接回归提案，从而导致估计不准确。我们证明这是一个关键瓶颈，并提出了一种基于具有学习内核的迭代双边过滤的方法。遵循双边过滤的精神，我们考虑每个点的深度特征嵌入，以及它们在 3D 空间中的位置。我们通过综合实验表明，我们的方法在为给定兴趣点生成实例建议时带来了巨大的改进。我们在具有挑战性的 ScanNet 基准测试上进一步验证了我们的方法，在自上而下方法的子类别中实现了最佳的实例分割性能。 提出一种基于神经双边滤波的自上而下实例分割方法，用于3D点云的实例提案生成。 Weiwei Sun,Daniel Rebain,Renjie Liao,Vladimir Tankovich,Soroosh Yazdani,Kwang Moo Yi,Andrea Tagliasacchi cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Otniel-Bogdan Mercea,Thomas Hummel,A. Sophia Koepke,Zeynep Akata
title: Temporal and cross-modal attention for audio-visual zero-shot learning
title_zh: 视听零样本学习的时间和跨模态注意力
abstract: Audio-visual generalised zero-shot learning for video classification requires understanding the relations between the audio and visual information in order to be able to recognise samples from novel, previously unseen classes at test time. The natural semantic and temporal alignment between audio and visual data in video data can be exploited to learn powerful representations that generalise to unseen classes at test time. We propose a multi-modal and Temporal Cross-attention Framework (\modelName) for audio-visual generalised zero-shot learning. Its inputs are temporally aligned audio and visual features that are obtained from pre-trained networks. Encouraging the framework to focus on cross-modal correspondence across time instead of self-attention within the modalities boosts the performance significantly. We show that our proposed framework that ingests temporal features yields state-of-the-art performance on the \ucf, \vgg, and \activity benchmarks for (generalised) zero-shot learning. Code for reproducing all results is available at \url{https://github.com/ExplainableML/TCAF-GZSL}.
summary: Audio-visual generalised zero-shot learning for video classification requires understanding the relations between the audio and visual information in order to be able to recognise samples from novel, previously unseen classes at test time. The natural semantic and temporal alignment between audio and visual data in video data can be exploited to learn powerful representations that generalise to unseen classes at test time. We propose a multi-modal and Temporal Cross-attention Framework (\modelName) for audio-visual generalised zero-shot learning. Its inputs are temporally aligned audio and visual features that are obtained from pre-trained networks. Encouraging the framework to focus on cross-modal correspondence across time instead of self-attention within the modalities boosts the performance significantly. We show that our proposed framework that ingests temporal features yields state-of-the-art performance on the \ucf, \vgg, and \activity benchmarks for (generalised) zero-shot learning. Code for reproducing all results is available at \url{https://github.com/ExplainableML/TCAF-GZSL}.
abstract_zh: 用于视频分类的视听广义零样本学习需要理解音频和视觉信息之间的关系，以便能够在测试时识别来自新的、以前未见过的类的样本。可以利用视频数据中的音频和视觉数据之间的自然语义和时间对齐来学习强大的表示，这些表示可以泛化到测试时未见过的类。我们提出了一种用于视听广义零样本学习的多模态和时间交叉注意框架（\modelName）。其输入是从预先训练的网络获得的时间对齐的音频和视觉特征。鼓励框架专注于跨时间的跨模式对应，而不是模式内的自我关注，可以显着提高性能。我们表明，我们提出的提取时间特征的框架在（广义）零样本学习的 \ucf、\vgg 和 \activity 基准上产生了最先进的性能。用于重现所有结果的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/ExplainableML/TCAF-GZSL} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态和时间注意力框架（TCAF-GZSL），用于音频-视觉零样本学习，通过利用音频与视觉信息的语义和时间对齐关系，提升视频分类中对未见过类别的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有音频-视觉零样本学习方法未能充分挖掘跨模态的时间对应关系，导致模型泛化能力不足。视频中音频与视觉信息存在天然的语义和时序关联，可借此学习更通用的表征。
AI.method: 设计多模态时间跨注意力框架，输入为预训练网络提取的时序对齐音频/视觉特征，通过强制模型关注跨模态时间对应关系而非单模态自注意力，实现更有效的特征融合。
AI.result: 在UCF、VGG和Activity等基准测试中，TCAF-GZSL在（广义）零样本学习任务中达到最先进性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态时间注意力机制能有效捕捉音频-视觉关联，为音频-视觉零样本学习提供新思路，验证了时序对齐特征在未见过类别识别中的价值。

authors_text: Zhaoyangfan Huang,Kun Hu,Xingjun Wang
title: M2-Net: Multi-stages Specular Highlight Detection and Removal in Multi-scenes
title_zh: M2-Net：多场景中的多阶段镜面高光检测和去除
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel uniformity framework for highlight detection and removal in multi-scenes, including synthetic images, face images, natural images, and text images. The framework consists of three main components, highlight feature extractor module, highlight coarse removal module, and highlight refine removal module. Firstly, the highlight feature extractor module can directly separate the highlight feature and non-highlight feature from the original highlight image. Then highlight removal image is obtained using a coarse highlight removal network. To further improve the highlight removal effect, the refined highlight removal image is finally obtained using refine highlight removal module based on contextual highlight attention mechanisms. Extensive experimental results in multiple scenes indicate that the proposed framework can obtain excellent visual effects of highlight removal and achieve state-of-the-art results in several quantitative evaluation metrics. Our algorithm is applied for the first time in video highlight removal with promising results.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel uniformity framework for highlight detection and removal in multi-scenes, including synthetic images, face images, natural images, and text images. The framework consists of three main components, highlight feature extractor module, highlight coarse removal module, and highlight refine removal module. Firstly, the highlight feature extractor module can directly separate the highlight feature and non-highlight feature from the original highlight image. Then highlight removal image is obtained using a coarse highlight removal network. To further improve the highlight removal effect, the refined highlight removal image is finally obtained using refine highlight removal module based on contextual highlight attention mechanisms. Extensive experimental results in multiple scenes indicate that the proposed framework can obtain excellent visual effects of highlight removal and achieve state-of-the-art results in several quantitative evaluation metrics. Our algorithm is applied for the first time in video highlight removal with promising results.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的均匀性框架，用于多场景中的高光检测和去除，包括合成图像、人脸图像、自然图像和文本图像。该框架由三个主要组件组成，高光特征提取模块、高光粗略去除模块和高光细化去除模块。首先，高光特征提取器模块可以直接从原始高光图像中分离出高光特征和非高光特征。然后使用粗略高光去除网络获得高光去除图像。为了进一步提高高光去除效果，使用基于上下文高光注意机制的细化高光去除模块最终获得细化高光去除图像。多个场景下的大量实验结果表明，所提出的框架可以获得出色的高光去除视觉效果，并在多个定量评估指标中取得了state-of-the-art的结果。我们的算法首次应用于视频亮点去除，并取得了可喜的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多阶段统一框架，用于多场景（合成图像、人脸图像、自然图像和文本图像）中的高光检测与去除。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多场景高光去除任务中存在性能不足，缺乏统一解决方案，需提升视觉效果与定量指标。
AI.method: 采用多阶段架构，包含高光特征提取模块、粗略去除网络和基于上下文注意力机制的精细化去除模块，实现高光分离与去除。
AI.result: 在多个场景中取得优秀视觉效果，多项定量指标达SOTA水平，并首次成功应用于视频高光去除任务。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过多阶段模块化设计有效解决多场景高光问题，验证了方法的普适性与先进性，为视频处理提供新思路。

authors_text: Franz Krause,Tobias Weller,Heiko Paulheim
title: On a Generalized Framework for Time-Aware Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 时间感知知识图的通用框架
abstract: Knowledge graphs have emerged as an effective tool for managing and standardizing semistructured domain knowledge in a human- and machine-interpretable way. In terms of graph-based domain applications, such as embeddings and graph neural networks, current research is increasingly taking into account the time-related evolution of the information encoded within a graph. Algorithms and models for stationary and static knowledge graphs are extended to make them accessible for time-aware domains, where time-awareness can be interpreted in different ways. In particular, a distinction needs to be made between the validity period and the traceability of facts as objectives of time-related knowledge graph extensions. In this context, terms and definitions such as dynamic and temporal are often used inconsistently or interchangeably in the literature. Therefore, with this paper we aim to provide a short but well-defined overview of time-aware knowledge graph extensions and thus faciliate future research in this field as well.
summary: Knowledge graphs have emerged as an effective tool for managing and standardizing semistructured domain knowledge in a human- and machine-interpretable way. In terms of graph-based domain applications, such as embeddings and graph neural networks, current research is increasingly taking into account the time-related evolution of the information encoded within a graph. Algorithms and models for stationary and static knowledge graphs are extended to make them accessible for time-aware domains, where time-awareness can be interpreted in different ways. In particular, a distinction needs to be made between the validity period and the traceability of facts as objectives of time-related knowledge graph extensions. In this context, terms and definitions such as dynamic and temporal are often used inconsistently or interchangeably in the literature. Therefore, with this paper we aim to provide a short but well-defined overview of time-aware knowledge graph extensions and thus faciliate future research in this field as well.
abstract_zh: 知识图已成为以人类和机器可解释的方式管理和标准化半结构化领域知识的有效工具。在基于图的领域应用（例如嵌入和图神经网络）方面，当前的研究越来越多地考虑图内编码信息的时间相关演化。静态和静态知识图的算法和模型经过扩展，使其可用于时间感知领域，其中时间感知可以以不同的方式解释。特别是，作为时间相关知识图谱扩展的目标，需要区分事实的有效期和可追溯性。在这种情况下，动态和时间等术语和定义在文献中经常不一致或互换使用。因此，通过本文，我们的目标是提供时间感知知识图扩展的简短但明确的概述，从而促进该领域的未来研究。

AI.motivation: 现有研究在时间感知知识图谱领域存在术语使用不一致、定义模糊的问题，阻碍了领域发展。
AI.method: 通过文献综述与分类，梳理时间感知知识图谱的核心概念、目标差异及技术扩展方向。
AI.result: 明确了有效性周期与事实可追溯性两类目标，区分了动态与时间相关术语的使用场景。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为未来研究提供了标准化术语和方法论指导，同时指出现有技术的局限性与改进方向。

search_text: On a Generalized Framework for Time-Aware Knowledge Graphs 时间感知知识图的通用框架 Knowledge graphs have emerged as an effective tool for managing and standardizing semistructured domain knowledge in a human- and machine-interpretable way. In terms of graph-based domain applications, such as embeddings and graph neural networks, current research is increasingly taking into account the time-related evolution of the information encoded within a graph. Algorithms and models for stationary and static knowledge graphs are extended to make them accessible for time-aware domains, where time-awareness can be interpreted in different ways. In particular, a distinction needs to be made between the validity period and the traceability of facts as objectives of time-related knowledge graph extensions. In this context, terms and definitions such as dynamic and temporal are often used inconsistently or interchangeably in the literature. Therefore, with this paper we aim to provide a short but well-defined overview of time-aware knowledge graph extensions and thus faciliate future research in this field as well. 知识图已成为以人类和机器可解释的方式管理和标准化半结构化领域知识的有效工具。在基于图的领域应用（例如嵌入和图神经网络）方面，当前的研究越来越多地考虑图内编码信息的时间相关演化。静态和静态知识图的算法和模型经过扩展，使其可用于时间感知领域，其中时间感知可以以不同的方式解释。特别是，作为时间相关知识图谱扩展的目标，需要区分事实的有效期和可追溯性。在这种情况下，动态和时间等术语和定义在文献中经常不一致或互换使用。因此，通过本文，我们的目标是提供时间感知知识图扩展的简短但明确的概述，从而促进该领域的未来研究。 本文旨在为时间感知知识图谱的扩展提供一个清晰且结构化的综述框架。 Franz Krause,Tobias Weller,Heiko Paulheim cs.AI

authors_text: Yawen Cui,Zitong Yu,Wei Peng,Li Liu
title: Rethinking Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning with Open-Set Hypothesis in Hyperbolic Geometry
title_zh: 用双曲几何中的开集假设重新思考少样本类增量学习
comment: submitted to IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics
comments: submitted to IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics
abstract: Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning (FSCIL) aims at incrementally learning novel classes from a few labeled samples by avoiding the overfitting and catastrophic forgetting simultaneously. The current protocol of FSCIL is built by mimicking the general class-incremental learning setting, while it is not totally appropriate due to the different data configuration, i.e., novel classes are all in the limited data regime. In this paper, we rethink the configuration of FSCIL with the open-set hypothesis by reserving the possibility in the first session for incoming categories. To assign better performances on both close-set and open-set recognition to the model, Hyperbolic Reciprocal Point Learning module (Hyper-RPL) is built on Reciprocal Point Learning (RPL) with hyperbolic neural networks. Besides, for learning novel categories from limited labeled data, we incorporate a hyperbolic metric learning (Hyper-Metric) module into the distillation-based framework to alleviate the overfitting issue and better handle the trade-off issue between the preservation of old knowledge and the acquisition of new knowledge. The comprehensive assessments of the proposed configuration and modules on three benchmark datasets are executed to validate the effectiveness concerning three evaluation indicators.
summary: Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning (FSCIL) aims at incrementally learning novel classes from a few labeled samples by avoiding the overfitting and catastrophic forgetting simultaneously. The current protocol of FSCIL is built by mimicking the general class-incremental learning setting, while it is not totally appropriate due to the different data configuration, i.e., novel classes are all in the limited data regime. In this paper, we rethink the configuration of FSCIL with the open-set hypothesis by reserving the possibility in the first session for incoming categories. To assign better performances on both close-set and open-set recognition to the model, Hyperbolic Reciprocal Point Learning module (Hyper-RPL) is built on Reciprocal Point Learning (RPL) with hyperbolic neural networks. Besides, for learning novel categories from limited labeled data, we incorporate a hyperbolic metric learning (Hyper-Metric) module into the distillation-based framework to alleviate the overfitting issue and better handle the trade-off issue between the preservation of old knowledge and the acquisition of new knowledge. The comprehensive assessments of the proposed configuration and modules on three benchmark datasets are executed to validate the effectiveness concerning three evaluation indicators.
abstract_zh: 少样本类增量学习（FSCIL）旨在通过同时避免过度拟合和灾难性遗忘，从一些标记样本中增量学习新类。当前的 FSCIL 协议是通过模仿一般的类增量学习设置而构建的，但由于数据配置不同，即新类都在有限的数据范围内，因此并不完全合适。在本文中，我们通过在第一个会话中保留传入类别的可能性，重新思考具有开放集假设的 FSCIL 的配置。为了让模型在闭集和开集识别上获得更好的性能，双曲倒数点学习模块 (Hyper-RPL) 是在倒数点学习 (RPL) 和双曲神经网络的基础上构建的。此外，为了从有限的标记数据中学习新类别，我们将双曲度量学习（Hyper-Metric）模块合并到基于蒸馏的框架中，以减轻过度拟合问题并更好地处理旧知识的保存和新知识的获取之间的权衡问题。在三个基准数据集上对所提出的配置和模块进行综合评估，以验证三个评估指标的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双曲几何和开放集假设的少样本类别增量学习方法，通过引入Hyper-RPL和Hyper-Metric模块解决过拟合和灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有FSCIL方法因未考虑新类别数据量有限的特性，导致在开放集场景下表现不足，需重新设计学习框架以平衡新旧知识的保持与获取。
AI.method: 构建Hyperbolic Reciprocal Point Learning模块（Hyper-RPL）结合双曲神经网络，并引入Hyper-Metric模块进行度量学习，通过蒸馏框架缓解过拟合问题。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上验证了所提方法在三个评估指标上的有效性，证明其在闭集和开集识别任务中的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 通过双曲几何建模和开放集假设的结合，提出的框架有效解决了FSCIL中的过拟合与知识保留矛盾，为少样本增量学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zeju Li,Konstantinos Kamnitsas,Mobarakol Islam,Chen Chen,Ben Glocker
title: Estimating Model Performance under Domain Shifts with Class-Specific Confidence Scores
title_zh: 使用特定于类别的置信度分数估计域转移下的模型性能
abstract: Machine learning models are typically deployed in a test setting that differs from the training setting, potentially leading to decreased model performance because of domain shift. If we could estimate the performance that a pre-trained model would achieve on data from a specific deployment setting, for example a certain clinic, we could judge whether the model could safely be deployed or if its performance degrades unacceptably on the specific data. Existing approaches estimate this based on the confidence of predictions made on unlabeled test data from the deployment's domain. We find existing methods struggle with data that present class imbalance, because the methods used to calibrate confidence do not account for bias induced by class imbalance, consequently failing to estimate class-wise accuracy. Here, we introduce class-wise calibration within the framework of performance estimation for imbalanced datasets. Specifically, we derive class-specific modifications of state-of-the-art confidence-based model evaluation methods including temperature scaling (TS), difference of confidences (DoC), and average thresholded confidence (ATC). We also extend the methods to estimate Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) in image segmentation. We conduct experiments on four tasks and find the proposed modifications consistently improve the estimation accuracy for imbalanced datasets. Our methods improve accuracy estimation by 18\% in classification under natural domain shifts, and double the estimation accuracy on segmentation tasks, when compared with prior methods.
summary: Machine learning models are typically deployed in a test setting that differs from the training setting, potentially leading to decreased model performance because of domain shift. If we could estimate the performance that a pre-trained model would achieve on data from a specific deployment setting, for example a certain clinic, we could judge whether the model could safely be deployed or if its performance degrades unacceptably on the specific data. Existing approaches estimate this based on the confidence of predictions made on unlabeled test data from the deployment's domain. We find existing methods struggle with data that present class imbalance, because the methods used to calibrate confidence do not account for bias induced by class imbalance, consequently failing to estimate class-wise accuracy. Here, we introduce class-wise calibration within the framework of performance estimation for imbalanced datasets. Specifically, we derive class-specific modifications of state-of-the-art confidence-based model evaluation methods including temperature scaling (TS), difference of confidences (DoC), and average thresholded confidence (ATC). We also extend the methods to estimate Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) in image segmentation. We conduct experiments on four tasks and find the proposed modifications consistently improve the estimation accuracy for imbalanced datasets. Our methods improve accuracy estimation by 18\% in classification under natural domain shifts, and double the estimation accuracy on segmentation tasks, when compared with prior methods.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型通常部署在与训练设置不同的测试设置中，可能会因域转移而导致模型性能下降。如果我们能够估计预训练模型在特定部署环境（例如某个诊所）的数据上实现的性能，我们就可以判断该模型是否可以安全部署，或者其性能在特定数据上是否会出现不可接受的下降。现有方法根据对来自部署域的未标记测试数据进行的预测的置信度来估计这一点。我们发现现有的方法很难处理呈现类别不平衡的数据，因为用于校准置信度的方法没有考虑类别不平衡引起的偏差，因此无法估计类别的准确性。在这里，我们在不平衡数据集的性能估计框架内引入了逐类校准。具体来说，我们对最先进的基于置信度的模型评估方法进行了特定于类别的修改，包括温度缩放（TS）、置信度差异（DoC）和平均阈值置信度（A​​TC）。我们还扩展了图像分割中估计 Dice 相似系数 (DSC) 的方法。我们对四个任务进行了实验，发现所提出的修改持续提高了不平衡数据集的估计精度。与之前的方法相比，我们的方法将自然域转移下的分类准确度估计提高了 18%，并将分割任务的估计准确度提高了一倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对类别不平衡数据集的模型性能估计方法，用于解决领域迁移下的模型性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于置信度的模型性能估计方法在处理类别不平衡数据时表现不佳，因为它们未能考虑类别不平衡带来的偏差，导致无法准确估计类别的准确率。
AI.method: 本文在温度缩放（TS）、置信度差（DoC）和平均阈值置信度（ATC）等现有方法的基础上，引入了类别特定的校准方法，并扩展到图像分割任务中的Dice相似系数（DSC）估计。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在四个任务中均能显著提高类别不平衡数据集的性能估计准确性，在分类任务下提升了18%，在分割任务下估计准确性翻倍。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的类别特定校准方法能够有效提升在领域迁移和类别不平衡情况下的模型性能估计准确性，具有较高的实用价值。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，所提方法在四个任务中均能显著提高类别不平衡数据集的性能估计准确性，在分类任务下提升了18%，在分割任务下估计准确性翻倍。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 本文提出的类别特定校准方法能够有效提升在领域迁移和类别不平衡情况下的模型性能估计准确性，具有较高的实用价值。

tldr: 本文提出了一种针对类别不平衡数据集的模型性能估计方法，用于解决领域迁移下的模型性能下降问题。
motivation: 现有的基于置信度的模型性能估计方法在处理类别不平衡数据时表现不佳，因为它们未能考虑类别不平衡带来的偏差，导致无法准确估计类别的准确率。
method: 本文在温度缩放（TS）、置信度差（DoC）和平均阈值置信度（ATC）等现有方法的基础上，引入了类别特定的校准方法，并扩展到图像分割任务中的Dice相似系数（DSC）估计。

conclusion: 本文提出的类别特定校准方法能够有效提升在领域迁移和类别不平衡情况下的模型性能估计准确性，具有较高的实用价值。
search_text: Estimating Model Performance under Domain Shifts with Class-Specific Confidence Scores 使用特定于类别的置信度分数估计域转移下的模型性能 Machine learning models are typically deployed in a test setting that differs from the training setting, potentially leading to decreased model performance because of domain shift. If we could estimate the performance that a pre-trained model would achieve on data from a specific deployment setting, for example a certain clinic, we could judge whether the model could safely be deployed or if its performance degrades unacceptably on the specific data. Existing approaches estimate this based on the confidence of predictions made on unlabeled test data from the deployment's domain. We find existing methods struggle with data that present class imbalance, because the methods used to calibrate confidence do not account for bias induced by class imbalance, consequently failing to estimate class-wise accuracy. Here, we introduce class-wise calibration within the framework of performance estimation for imbalanced datasets. Specifically, we derive class-specific modifications of state-of-the-art confidence-based model evaluation methods including temperature scaling (TS), difference of confidences (DoC), and average thresholded confidence (ATC). We also extend the methods to estimate Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) in image segmentation. We conduct experiments on four tasks and find the proposed modifications consistently improve the estimation accuracy for imbalanced datasets. Our methods improve accuracy estimation by 18\% in classification under natural domain shifts, and double the estimation accuracy on segmentation tasks, when compared with prior methods. 机器学习模型通常部署在与训练设置不同的测试设置中，可能会因域转移而导致模型性能下降。如果我们能够估计预训练模型在特定部署环境（例如某个诊所）的数据上实现的性能，我们就可以判断该模型是否可以安全部署，或者其性能在特定数据上是否会出现不可接受的下降。现有方法根据对来自部署域的未标记测试数据进行的预测的置信度来估计这一点。我们发现现有的方法很难处理呈现类别不平衡的数据，因为用于校准置信度的方法没有考虑类别不平衡引起的偏差，因此无法估计类别的准确性。在这里，我们在不平衡数据集的性能估计框架内引入了逐类校准。具体来说，我们对最先进的基于置信度的模型评估方法进行了特定于类别的修改，包括温度缩放（TS）、置信度差异（DoC）和平均阈值置信度（A​​TC）。我们还扩展了图像分割中估计 Dice 相似系数 (DSC) 的方法。我们对四个任务进行了实验，发现所提出的修改持续提高了不平衡数据集的估计精度。与之前的方法相比，我们的方法将自然域转移下的分类准确度估计提高了 18%，并将分割任务的估计准确度提高了一倍。 本文提出了一种针对类别不平衡数据集的模型性能估计方法，用于解决领域迁移下的模型性能下降问题。 Zeju Li,Konstantinos Kamnitsas,Mobarakol Islam,Chen Chen,Ben Glocker cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhenqiang Ying,Deepti Ghadiyaram,Alan Bovik
title: Telepresence Video Quality Assessment
title_zh: 网真视频质量评估
abstract: Video conferencing, which includes both video and audio content, has contributed to dramatic increases in Internet traffic, as the COVID-19 pandemic forced millions of people to work and learn from home. Global Internet traffic of video conferencing has dramatically increased Because of this, efficient and accurate video quality tools are needed to monitor and perceptually optimize telepresence traffic streamed via Zoom, Webex, Meet, etc. However, existing models are limited in their prediction capabilities on multi-modal, live streaming telepresence content. Here we address the significant challenges of Telepresence Video Quality Assessment (TVQA) in several ways. First, we mitigated the dearth of subjectively labeled data by collecting ~2k telepresence videos from different countries, on which we crowdsourced ~80k subjective quality labels. Using this new resource, we created a first-of-a-kind online video quality prediction framework for live streaming, using a multi-modal learning framework with separate pathways to compute visual and audio quality predictions. Our all-in-one model is able to provide accurate quality predictions at the patch, frame, clip, and audiovisual levels. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on both existing quality databases and our new TVQA database, at a considerably lower computational expense, making it an attractive solution for mobile and embedded systems.
summary: Video conferencing, which includes both video and audio content, has contributed to dramatic increases in Internet traffic, as the COVID-19 pandemic forced millions of people to work and learn from home. Global Internet traffic of video conferencing has dramatically increased Because of this, efficient and accurate video quality tools are needed to monitor and perceptually optimize telepresence traffic streamed via Zoom, Webex, Meet, etc. However, existing models are limited in their prediction capabilities on multi-modal, live streaming telepresence content. Here we address the significant challenges of Telepresence Video Quality Assessment (TVQA) in several ways. First, we mitigated the dearth of subjectively labeled data by collecting ~2k telepresence videos from different countries, on which we crowdsourced ~80k subjective quality labels. Using this new resource, we created a first-of-a-kind online video quality prediction framework for live streaming, using a multi-modal learning framework with separate pathways to compute visual and audio quality predictions. Our all-in-one model is able to provide accurate quality predictions at the patch, frame, clip, and audiovisual levels. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on both existing quality databases and our new TVQA database, at a considerably lower computational expense, making it an attractive solution for mobile and embedded systems.
abstract_zh: 由于 COVID-19 大流行迫使数百万人在家工作和学习，包括视频和音频内容的视频会议导致互联网流量急剧增加。全球视频会议互联网流量急剧增加，因此需要高效、准确的视频质量工具来监控和感知优化通过 Zoom、Webex、Meet 等传输的网真流量。然而，现有模型对多模态、直播网真内容的预测能力有限。在这里，我们通过多种方式解决网真视频质量评估 (TVQA) 的重大挑战。首先，我们通过收集来自不同国家的约 2000 个远程呈现视频，并在这些视频上众包了约 80k 个主观质量标签，从而缓解了主观标记数据的缺乏。利用这一新资源，我们创建了首个用于直播的在线视频质量预测框架，使用具有独立路径的多模式学习框架来计算视觉和音频质量预测。我们的一体化模型能够在补丁、帧、剪辑和视听级别提供准确的质量预测。我们的模型在现有质量数据库和新的 TVQA 数据库上实现了最先进的性能，并且计算费用显着降低，使其成为移动和嵌入式系统有吸引力的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对远程呈现视频质量评估（TVQA）的新框架，通过多模态学习处理实时视频和音频流的质量预测。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情导致视频会议流量激增，现有模型在多模态实时流质量预测上存在局限，亟需高效准确的评估工具。
AI.method: 收集来自不同国家的约2000个视频及8万条主观质量标签，构建多模态学习框架，分别计算视觉和音频质量，并支持多层级（块、帧、片段、视听）预测。
AI.result: 模型在现有数据库和新构建的TVQA数据库中均达到最先进水平，且计算成本显著降低，适用于移动端和嵌入式系统。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了远程呈现视频质量评估的挑战，为实时流优化提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Ryien Hosseini,Filippo Simini,Venkatram Vishwanath
title: Operation-Level Performance Benchmarking of Graph Neural Networks for Scientific Applications
title_zh: 用于科学应用的图神经网络的操作级性能基准测试
comment: Published as workshop paper at MLSys 2022 (MLBench)
comments: Published as workshop paper at MLSys 2022 (MLBench)
abstract: As Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) increase in popularity for scientific machine learning, their training and inference efficiency is becoming increasingly critical. Additionally, the deep learning field as a whole is trending towards wider and deeper networks, and ever increasing data sizes, to the point where hard hardware bottlenecks are often encountered. Emerging specialty hardware platforms provide an exciting solution to this problem. In this paper, we systematically profile and select low-level operations pertinent to GNNs for scientific computing implemented in the Pytorch Geometric software framework. These are then rigorously benchmarked on NVIDIA A100 GPUs for several various combinations of input values, including tensor sparsity. We then analyze these results for each operation. At a high level, we conclude that on NVIDIA systems: (1) confounding bottlenecks such as memory inefficiency often dominate runtime costs moreso than data sparsity alone, (2) native Pytorch operations are often as or more competitive than their Pytorch Geometric equivalents, especially at low to moderate levels of input data sparsity, and (3) many operations central to state-of-the-art GNN architectures have little to no optimization for sparsity. We hope that these results serve as a baseline for those developing these operations on specialized hardware and that our subsequent analysis helps to facilitate future software and hardware based optimizations of these operations and thus scalable GNN performance as a whole.
summary: As Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) increase in popularity for scientific machine learning, their training and inference efficiency is becoming increasingly critical. Additionally, the deep learning field as a whole is trending towards wider and deeper networks, and ever increasing data sizes, to the point where hard hardware bottlenecks are often encountered. Emerging specialty hardware platforms provide an exciting solution to this problem. In this paper, we systematically profile and select low-level operations pertinent to GNNs for scientific computing implemented in the Pytorch Geometric software framework. These are then rigorously benchmarked on NVIDIA A100 GPUs for several various combinations of input values, including tensor sparsity. We then analyze these results for each operation. At a high level, we conclude that on NVIDIA systems: (1) confounding bottlenecks such as memory inefficiency often dominate runtime costs moreso than data sparsity alone, (2) native Pytorch operations are often as or more competitive than their Pytorch Geometric equivalents, especially at low to moderate levels of input data sparsity, and (3) many operations central to state-of-the-art GNN architectures have little to no optimization for sparsity. We hope that these results serve as a baseline for those developing these operations on specialized hardware and that our subsequent analysis helps to facilitate future software and hardware based optimizations of these operations and thus scalable GNN performance as a whole.
abstract_zh: 随着图神经网络（GNN）在科学机器学习中越来越受欢迎，它们的训练和推理效率变得越来越重要。此外，整个深度学习领域正朝着更宽、更深的网络发展，数据规模不断增大，以至于经常遇到硬硬件瓶颈。新兴的专业硬件平台为这个问题提供了令人兴奋的解决方案。在本文中，我们系统地分析和选择与 GNN 相关的低级操作，以在 Pytorch Geometric 软件框架中实现科学计算。然后在 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上针对多种不同的输入值组合（包括张量稀疏性）对它们进行严格的基准测试。然后我们分析每个操作的这些结果。在较高层面上，我们得出的结论是，在 NVIDIA 系统上：(1) 内存效率低下等混杂瓶颈往往比单独的数据稀疏性更能主导运行时成本，(2) 原生 Pytorch 操作通常比 Pytorch Geometric 操作具有相同或更强的竞争力，尤其是在低到中等水平的输入数据稀疏性情况下，以及 (3) 许多最先进的 GNN 架构的核心操作几乎没有针对稀疏性进行优化。我们希望这些结果能够作为在专用硬件上开发这些操作的人员的基线，并且我们的后续分析有助于促进未来基于软件和硬件的这些操作的优化，从而整体上扩展 GNN 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文对科学计算中图神经网络（GNN）的低级操作在NVIDIA A100 GPU上的性能进行了系统性基准测试，分析了不同输入条件下的运行效率。
AI.motivation: 随着GNN在科学机器学习中的广泛应用，其训练和推理效率成为关键问题。大规模网络和数据导致硬件瓶颈，需通过专用硬件优化解决。
AI.method: 基于PyTorch Geometric框架，选取与科学计算相关的GNN低级操作，针对不同输入参数（包括张量稀疏性）在NVIDIA A100 GPU上进行严格基准测试与分析。
AI.result: 发现内存效率问题比数据稀疏性更显著影响运行时间；原生PyTorch操作在低至中等稀疏度下性能优于PyTorch Geometric；主流GNN操作缺乏稀疏性优化。
AI.conclusion: 研究为专用硬件上的GNN操作优化提供基准，未来需通过软硬件协同优化提升GNN整体可扩展性。

tldr: 本文对科学计算中图神经网络（GNN）的低级操作在NVIDIA A100 GPU上的性能进行了系统性基准测试，分析了不同输入条件下的运行效率。
motivation: 随着GNN在科学机器学习中的广泛应用，其训练和推理效率成为关键问题。大规模网络和数据导致硬件瓶颈，需通过专用硬件优化解决。
method: 基于PyTorch Geometric框架，选取与科学计算相关的GNN低级操作，针对不同输入参数（包括张量稀疏性）在NVIDIA A100 GPU上进行严格基准测试与分析。
result: 发现内存效率问题比数据稀疏性更显著影响运行时间；原生PyTorch操作在低至中等稀疏度下性能优于PyTorch Geometric；主流GNN操作缺乏稀疏性优化。
conclusion: 研究为专用硬件上的GNN操作优化提供基准，未来需通过软硬件协同优化提升GNN整体可扩展性。
search_text: Operation-Level Performance Benchmarking of Graph Neural Networks for Scientific Applications 用于科学应用的图神经网络的操作级性能基准测试 As Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) increase in popularity for scientific machine learning, their training and inference efficiency is becoming increasingly critical. Additionally, the deep learning field as a whole is trending towards wider and deeper networks, and ever increasing data sizes, to the point where hard hardware bottlenecks are often encountered. Emerging specialty hardware platforms provide an exciting solution to this problem. In this paper, we systematically profile and select low-level operations pertinent to GNNs for scientific computing implemented in the Pytorch Geometric software framework. These are then rigorously benchmarked on NVIDIA A100 GPUs for several various combinations of input values, including tensor sparsity. We then analyze these results for each operation. At a high level, we conclude that on NVIDIA systems: (1) confounding bottlenecks such as memory inefficiency often dominate runtime costs moreso than data sparsity alone, (2) native Pytorch operations are often as or more competitive than their Pytorch Geometric equivalents, especially at low to moderate levels of input data sparsity, and (3) many operations central to state-of-the-art GNN architectures have little to no optimization for sparsity. We hope that these results serve as a baseline for those developing these operations on specialized hardware and that our subsequent analysis helps to facilitate future software and hardware based optimizations of these operations and thus scalable GNN performance as a whole. 随着图神经网络（GNN）在科学机器学习中越来越受欢迎，它们的训练和推理效率变得越来越重要。此外，整个深度学习领域正朝着更宽、更深的网络发展，数据规模不断增大，以至于经常遇到硬硬件瓶颈。新兴的专业硬件平台为这个问题提供了令人兴奋的解决方案。在本文中，我们系统地分析和选择与 GNN 相关的低级操作，以在 Pytorch Geometric 软件框架中实现科学计算。然后在 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上针对多种不同的输入值组合（包括张量稀疏性）对它们进行严格的基准测试。然后我们分析每个操作的这些结果。在较高层面上，我们得出的结论是，在 NVIDIA 系统上：(1) 内存效率低下等混杂瓶颈往往比单独的数据稀疏性更能主导运行时成本，(2) 原生 Pytorch 操作通常比 Pytorch Geometric 操作具有相同或更强的竞争力，尤其是在低到中等水平的输入数据稀疏性情况下，以及 (3) 许多最先进的 GNN 架构的核心操作几乎没有针对稀疏性进行优化。我们希望这些结果能够作为在专用硬件上开发这些操作的人员的基线，并且我们的后续分析有助于促进未来基于软件和硬件的这些操作的优化，从而整体上扩展 GNN 性能。 本文对科学计算中图神经网络（GNN）的低级操作在NVIDIA A100 GPU上的性能进行了系统性基准测试，分析了不同输入条件下的运行效率。 Ryien Hosseini,Filippo Simini,Venkatram Vishwanath cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.AR,cs.PF

authors_text: Inhwan Bae,Jin-Hwi Park,Hae-Gon Jeon
title: Learning Pedestrian Group Representations for Multi-modal Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: 学习多模态轨迹预测的行人群体表示
abstract: Modeling the dynamics of people walking is a problem of long-standing interest in computer vision. Many previous works involving pedestrian trajectory prediction define a particular set of individual actions to implicitly model group actions. In this paper, we present a novel architecture named GP-Graph which has collective group representations for effective pedestrian trajectory prediction in crowded environments, and is compatible with all types of existing approaches. A key idea of GP-Graph is to model both individual-wise and group-wise relations as graph representations. To do this, GP-Graph first learns to assign each pedestrian into the most likely behavior group. Using this assignment information, GP-Graph then forms both intra- and inter-group interactions as graphs, accounting for human-human relations within a group and group-group relations, respectively. To be specific, for the intra-group interaction, we mask pedestrian graph edges out of an associated group. We also propose group pooling&unpooling operations to represent a group with multiple pedestrians as one graph node. Lastly, GP-Graph infers a probability map for socially-acceptable future trajectories from the integrated features of both group interactions. Moreover, we introduce a group-level latent vector sampling to ensure collective inferences over a set of possible future trajectories. Extensive experiments are conducted to validate the effectiveness of our architecture, which demonstrates consistent performance improvements with publicly available benchmarks. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/inhwanbae/GPGraph.
summary: Modeling the dynamics of people walking is a problem of long-standing interest in computer vision. Many previous works involving pedestrian trajectory prediction define a particular set of individual actions to implicitly model group actions. In this paper, we present a novel architecture named GP-Graph which has collective group representations for effective pedestrian trajectory prediction in crowded environments, and is compatible with all types of existing approaches. A key idea of GP-Graph is to model both individual-wise and group-wise relations as graph representations. To do this, GP-Graph first learns to assign each pedestrian into the most likely behavior group. Using this assignment information, GP-Graph then forms both intra- and inter-group interactions as graphs, accounting for human-human relations within a group and group-group relations, respectively. To be specific, for the intra-group interaction, we mask pedestrian graph edges out of an associated group. We also propose group pooling&unpooling operations to represent a group with multiple pedestrians as one graph node. Lastly, GP-Graph infers a probability map for socially-acceptable future trajectories from the integrated features of both group interactions. Moreover, we introduce a group-level latent vector sampling to ensure collective inferences over a set of possible future trajectories. Extensive experiments are conducted to validate the effectiveness of our architecture, which demonstrates consistent performance improvements with publicly available benchmarks. abstract_zh: 对人行走的动态进行建模是计算机视觉领域长期以来关注的一个问题。许多先前涉及行人轨迹预测的工作定义了一组特定的个体动作来隐式地模拟群体动作。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 GP-Graph 的新颖架构，它具有集体组表示，可在拥挤的环境中进行有效的行人轨迹预测，并且与所有类型的现有方法兼容。 GP-Graph 的一个关键思想是将个体关系和群体关系建模为图表示。为此，GP-Graph 首先学习将每个行人分配到最可能的行为组中。使用此分配信息，GP-Graph 然后将组内和组间交互形成为图，分别说明组内人与人的关系以及组与组之间的关系。具体来说，对于组内交互，我们将行人图边缘屏蔽到关联组之外。我们还提出了组池化和非池化操作，以将具有多个行人的一组表示为一个图节点。最后，GP-Graph 根据两个群体互动的综合特征推断出社会可接受的未来轨迹的概率图。此外，我们引入了组级潜在向量采样，以确保对一组可能的未来轨迹进行集体推断。我们进行了大量的实验来验证我们架构的有效性，这证明了与公开可用的基准测试一致的性能改进。代码可在 https://github.com/inhwanbae/GPGraph 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GP-Graph的新型架构，通过建模行人群体关系实现多模态轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过定义个体行为隐式建模群体行为，难以有效捕捉复杂人群交互关系，导致拥挤场景下轨迹预测精度不足。
AI.method: 构建图神经网络同时建模个体与群体关系，通过行为分组形成组内/组间交互图，结合掩码机制与组池化操作，引入群体级潜在向量进行多模态轨迹预测。
AI.result: 在公开基准测试中实现性能提升，代码已开源验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: GP-Graph通过显式建模群体交互显著提升轨迹预测效果，为拥挤场景下的多模态预测提供新思路。

authors_text: Jiajun Su,Chunyu Wang,Xiaoxuan Ma,Wenjun Zeng,Yizhou Wang
title: VirtualPose: Learning Generalizable 3D Human Pose Models from Virtual Data
title_zh: VirtualPose：从虚拟数据中学习可推广的 3D 人体姿势模型
abstract: While monocular 3D pose estimation seems to have achieved very accurate results on the public datasets, their generalization ability is largely overlooked. In this work, we perform a systematic evaluation of the existing methods and find that they get notably larger errors when tested on different cameras, human poses and appearance. To address the problem, we introduce VirtualPose, a two-stage learning framework to exploit the hidden "free lunch" specific to this task, i.e. generating infinite number of poses and cameras for training models at no cost. To that end, the first stage transforms images to abstract geometry representations (AGR), and then the second maps them to 3D poses. It addresses the generalization issue from two aspects: (1) the first stage can be trained on diverse 2D datasets to reduce the risk of over-fitting to limited appearance; (2) the second stage can be trained on diverse AGR synthesized from a large number of virtual cameras and poses. It outperforms the SOTA methods without using any paired images and 3D poses from the benchmarks, which paves the way for practical applications. Code is available at https://github.com/wkom/VirtualPose.
summary: While monocular 3D pose estimation seems to have achieved very accurate results on the public datasets, their generalization ability is largely overlooked. In this work, we perform a systematic evaluation of the existing methods and find that they get notably larger errors when tested on different cameras, human poses and appearance. To address the problem, we introduce VirtualPose, a two-stage learning framework to exploit the hidden "free lunch" specific to this task, i.e. generating infinite number of poses and cameras for training models at no cost. To that end, the first stage transforms images to abstract geometry representations (AGR), and then the second maps them to 3D poses. It addresses the generalization issue from two aspects: (1) the first stage can be trained on diverse 2D datasets to reduce the risk of over-fitting to limited appearance; (2) the second stage can be trained on diverse AGR synthesized from a large number of virtual cameras and poses. It outperforms the SOTA methods without using any paired images and 3D poses from the benchmarks, which paves the way for practical applications. Code is available at https://github.com/wkom/VirtualPose.
abstract_zh: 虽然单目 3D 姿态估计似乎在公共数据集上取得了非常准确的结果，但它们的泛化能力在很大程度上被忽视了。在这项工作中，我们对现有方法进行了系统评估，发现在不同相机、人体姿势和外观上进行测试时，它们的误差明显更大。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 VirtualPose，这是一个两阶段学习框架，用于利用特定于该任务的隐藏“免费午餐”，即免费生成无限数量的姿势和相机来训练模型。为此，第一阶段将图像转换为抽象几何表示 (AGR)，然后第二阶段将它们映射到 3D 姿势。它从两个方面解决了泛化问题：（1）第一阶段可以在不同的2D数据集上进行训练，以减少过度拟合有限外观的风险； (2) 第二阶段可以训练由大量虚拟相机和姿势合成的各种 AGR。它在不使用基准测试中的任何配对图像和 3D 姿势的情况下优于 SOTA 方法，这为实际应用铺平了道路。代码可在 https://github.com/wkom/VirtualPose 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VirtualPose框架，通过虚拟数据训练通用3D人体姿态模型，解决现有方法在不同场景下的泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单目3D姿态估计方法在公开数据集表现优异，但面对不同摄像头、姿态和外观时泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 采用两阶段学习框架：第一阶段将图像转换为抽象几何表示（AGR），第二阶段将AGR映射为3D姿态，通过虚拟数据增强模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 无需使用基准数据集配对图像和3D姿态，模型性能超越现有最优方法，适用于实际场景。
AI.conclusion: VirtualPose通过虚拟数据训练有效提升模型泛化能力，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

It addresses the generalization issue from two aspects: (1) the first stage can be trained on diverse 2D datasets to reduce the risk of over-fitting to limited appearance; (2) the second stage can be trained on diverse AGR synthesized from a large number of virtual cameras and poses. It outperforms the SOTA methods without using any paired images and 3D poses from the benchmarks, which paves the way for practical applications. Code is available at https://github.com/wkom/VirtualPose. 虽然单目 3D 姿态估计似乎在公共数据集上取得了非常准确的结果，但它们的泛化能力在很大程度上被忽视了。在这项工作中，我们对现有方法进行了系统评估，发现在不同相机、人体姿势和外观上进行测试时，它们的误差明显更大。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 VirtualPose，这是一个两阶段学习框架，用于利用特定于该任务的隐藏“免费午餐”，即免费生成无限数量的姿势和相机来训练模型。为此，第一阶段将图像转换为抽象几何表示 (AGR)，然后第二阶段将它们映射到 3D 姿势。它从两个方面解决了泛化问题：（1）第一阶段可以在不同的2D数据集上进行训练，以减少过度拟合有限外观的风险； (2) 第二阶段可以训练由大量虚拟相机和姿势合成的各种 AGR。它在不使用基准测试中的任何配对图像和 3D 姿势的情况下优于 SOTA 方法，这为实际应用铺平了道路。代码可在 https://github.com/wkom/VirtualPose 获取。 本文提出VirtualPose框架，通过虚拟数据训练通用3D人体姿态模型，解决现有方法在不同场景下的泛化问题。 Jiajun Su,Chunyu Wang,Xiaoxuan Ma,Wenjun Zeng,Yizhou Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Cian Eastwood,Alexander Robey,Shashank Singh,Julius von Kügelgen,Hamed Hassani,George J. Pappas,Bernhard Schölkopf
title: Probable Domain Generalization via Quantile Risk Minimization
title_zh: 通过分位数风险最小化的概率域概括
abstract: Domain generalization (DG) seeks predictors which perform well on unseen test distributions by leveraging data drawn from multiple related training distributions or domains. To achieve this, DG is commonly formulated as an average- or worst-case problem over the set of possible domains. However, predictors that perform well on average lack robustness while predictors that perform well in the worst case tend to be overly-conservative. To address this, we propose a new probabilistic framework for DG where the goal is to learn predictors that perform well with high probability. Our key idea is that distribution shifts seen during training should inform us of probable shifts at test time, which we realize by explicitly relating training and test domains as draws from the same underlying meta-distribution. To achieve probable DG, we propose a new optimization problem called Quantile Risk Minimization (QRM). By minimizing the $α$-quantile of predictor's risk distribution over domains, QRM seeks predictors that perform well with probability $α$. To solve QRM in practice, we propose the Empirical QRM (EQRM) algorithm and provide: (i) a generalization bound for EQRM; and (ii) the conditions under which EQRM recovers the causal predictor as $α\to 1$. In our experiments, we introduce a more holistic quantile-focused evaluation protocol for DG and demonstrate that EQRM outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on datasets from WILDS and DomainBed.
summary: Domain generalization (DG) seeks predictors which perform well on unseen test distributions by leveraging data drawn from multiple related training distributions or domains. To achieve this, DG is commonly formulated as an average- or worst-case problem over the set of possible domains. However, predictors that perform well on average lack robustness while predictors that perform well in the worst case tend to be overly-conservative. To address this, we propose a new probabilistic framework for DG where the goal is to learn predictors that perform well with high probability. Our key idea is that distribution shifts seen during training should inform us of probable shifts at test time, which we realize by explicitly relating training and test domains as draws from the same underlying meta-distribution. To achieve probable DG, we propose a new optimization problem called Quantile Risk Minimization (QRM). By minimizing the $α$-quantile of predictor's risk distribution over domains, QRM seeks predictors that perform well with probability $α$. To solve QRM in practice, we propose the Empirical QRM (EQRM) algorithm and provide: (i) a generalization bound for EQRM; and (ii) the conditions under which EQRM recovers the causal predictor as $α\to 1$. In our experiments, we introduce a more holistic quantile-focused evaluation protocol for DG and demonstrate that EQRM outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on datasets from WILDS and DomainBed.
abstract_zh: 域泛化（DG）通过利用从多个相关训练分布或域中提取的数据来寻找在未见过的测试分布上表现良好的预测器。为了实现这一目标，DG 通常被表述为一组可能域上的平均或最坏情况问题。然而，平均表现良好的预测器缺乏鲁棒性，而在最坏情况下表现良好的预测器往往过于保守。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的 DG 概率框架，其目标是学习以高概率表现良好的预测器。我们的关键想法是，训练期间看到的分布变化应该告诉我们测试时可能发生的变化，这是通过将训练和测试领域明确关联起来来实现的，这些领域来自相同的底层元分布。为了实现可能的 DG，我们提出了一个新的优化问题，称为分位数风险最小化 (QRM)。通过最小化域上预测变量风险分布的 $α$ 分位数，QRM 寻找以 $α$ 概率表现良好的预测变量。为了在实践中解决 QRM，我们提出了经验 QRM（EQRM）算法并提供：（i）EQRM 的泛化界限； (ii) EQRM 将因果预测变量恢复为 $α\to 1$ 的条件。在我们的实验中，我们为 DG 引入了一种更全面的以分位数为中心的评估协议，并证明 EQRM 在 WILDS 和 DomainBed 数据集上的性能优于最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过分位数风险最小化实现领域泛化的概率框架。
AI.motivation: 现有的领域泛化方法在平均或最坏情况下表现不佳，缺乏鲁棒性或过于保守，因此需要一种新的方法来学习在测试时能以高概率表现良好的预测器。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的优化问题——分位数风险最小化（QRM），通过最小化预测器风险分布的α分位数，同时提出了一种经验QRM（EQRM）算法，并提供了泛化界和因果预测器恢复条件。
AI.result: 实验表明，EQRM在WILDS和DomainBed数据集上优于现有的最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分位数风险最小化提供了一种新的领域泛化框架，并在实验中验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Liu Yang,Yinzhi Lu,Simon X. Yang,Tan Guo,Zhifang Liang
title: A Secure Clustering Protocol with Fuzzy Trust Evaluation and Outlier Detection for Industrial Wireless Sensor Networks
title_zh: 用于工业无线传感器网络的具有模糊信任评估和异常值检测的安全集群协议
abstract: Security is one of the major concerns in Industrial Wireless Sensor Networks (IWSNs). To assure the security in clustered IWSNs, this paper presents a secure clustering protocol with fuzzy trust evaluation and outlier detection (SCFTO). Firstly, to deal with the transmission uncertainty in an open wireless medium, an interval type-2 fuzzy logic controller is adopted to estimate the trusts. And then a density based outlier detection mechanism is introduced to acquire an adaptive trust threshold used to isolate the malicious nodes from being cluster heads. Finally, a fuzzy based cluster heads election method is proposed to achieve a balance between energy saving and security assurance, so that a normal sensor node with more residual energy or less confidence on other nodes has higher probability to be the cluster head. Extensive experiments verify that our secure clustering protocol can effectively defend the network against attacks from internal malicious or compromised nodes.
summary: Security is one of the major concerns in Industrial Wireless Sensor Networks (IWSNs). To assure the security in clustered IWSNs, this paper presents a secure clustering protocol with fuzzy trust evaluation and outlier detection (SCFTO). Firstly, to deal with the transmission uncertainty in an open wireless medium, an interval type-2 fuzzy logic controller is adopted to estimate the trusts. And then a density based outlier detection mechanism is introduced to acquire an adaptive trust threshold used to isolate the malicious nodes from being cluster heads. Finally, a fuzzy based cluster heads election method is proposed to achieve a balance between energy saving and security assurance, so that a normal sensor node with more residual energy or less confidence on other nodes has higher probability to be the cluster head. Extensive experiments verify that our secure clustering protocol can effectively defend the network against attacks from internal malicious or compromised nodes.
abstract_zh: 安全性是工业无线传感器网络 (IWSN) 的主要关注点之一。为了保证集群IWSN的安全性，本文提出了一种具有模糊信任评估和异常检测（SCFTO）的安全集群协议。首先，为了处理开放无线介质中的传输不确定性，采用区间2型模糊逻辑控制器来估计信任度。然后引入基于密度的异常值检测机制来获取自适应信任阈值，用于隔离恶意节点作为簇头。最后，提出一种基于模糊的簇头选举方法，以实现节能和安全保证之间的平衡，使得剩余能量较多或对其他节点置信度较低的正常传感器节点有较高的概率成为簇头。大量的实验验证了我们的安全集群协议可以有效地保护网络免受内部恶意或受损节点的攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合模糊信任评估和异常检测的安全聚类协议（SCFTO），以提高工业无线传感器网络（IWSN）的安全性。
AI.motivation: 工业无线传感器网络面临内部恶意节点攻击的威胁，传统聚类协议难以有效识别恶意节点并保障网络安全性。
AI.method: 采用区间二型模糊逻辑控制器估计节点信任值，结合基于密度的异常检测机制动态调整信任阈值，并提出模糊聚类头选举方法平衡能耗与安全。
AI.result: 实验验证表明，SCFTO协议能有效防御内部恶意节点攻击，提升网络整体安全性与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: SCFTO协议通过模糊信任评估与异常检测机制，为工业无线传感器网络提供了更安全的聚类解决方案。
