authors_text: Xin Yu,Peng Dai,Wenbo Li,Lan Ma,Jiajun Shen,Jia Li,Xiaojuan Qi
title: Towards Efficient and Scale-Robust Ultra-High-Definition Image Demoireing
title_zh: 迈向高效且规模稳健的超高清图像采集
abstract: With the rapid development of mobile devices, modern widely-used mobile phones typically allow users to capture 4K resolution (i.e., ultra-high-definition) images. However, for image demoireing, a challenging task in low-level vision, existing works are generally carried out on low-resolution or synthetic images. Hence, the effectiveness of these methods on 4K resolution images is still unknown. In this paper, we explore moire pattern removal for ultra-high-definition images. To this end, we propose the first ultra-high-definition demoireing dataset (UHDM), which contains 5,000 real-world 4K resolution image pairs, and conduct a benchmark study on current state-of-the-art methods. Further, we present an efficient baseline model ESDNet for tackling 4K moire images, wherein we build a semantic-aligned scale-aware module to address the scale variation of moire patterns. Extensive experiments manifest the effectiveness of our approach, which outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin while being much more lightweight. Code and dataset are available at https://xinyu-andy.github.io/uhdm-page.
summary: With the rapid development of mobile devices, modern widely-used mobile phones typically allow users to capture 4K resolution (i.e., ultra-high-definition) images. However, for image demoireing, a challenging task in low-level vision, existing works are generally carried out on low-resolution or synthetic images. Hence, the effectiveness of these methods on 4K resolution images is still unknown. In this paper, we explore moire pattern removal for ultra-high-definition images. To this end, we propose the first ultra-high-definition demoireing dataset (UHDM), which contains 5,000 real-world 4K resolution image pairs, and conduct a benchmark study on current state-of-the-art methods. Further, we present an efficient baseline model ESDNet for tackling 4K moire images, wherein we build a semantic-aligned scale-aware module to address the scale variation of moire patterns. Extensive experiments manifest the effectiveness of our approach, which outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin while being much more lightweight. Code and dataset are available at https://xinyu-andy.github.io/uhdm-page.
abstract_zh: 随着移动设备的快速发展，现代广泛使用的手机通常允许用户捕获4K分辨率（即超高清）图像。然而，对于图像去噪这一低级视觉中具有挑战性的任务，现有的工作通常是在低分辨率或合成图像上进行的。因此，这些方法在 4K 分辨率图像上的有效性仍然未知。在本文中，我们探索超高清图像的莫尔图案去除。为此，我们提出了第一个超高清去噪数据集（UHDM），其中包含 5,000 个真实世界的 4K 分辨率图像对，并对当前最先进的方法进行了基准研究。此外，我们提出了一种用于处理 4K 莫尔图像的有效基线模型 ESDNet，其中我们构建了一个语义对齐的尺度感知模块来解决莫尔图案的尺度变化。大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性，该方法在很大程度上优于最先进的方法，同时更加轻量级。代码和数据集可在 https://xinyu-andy.github.io/uhdm-page 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个超高清去摩尔纹数据集UHDM和高效基线模型ESDNet，解决4K分辨率图像摩尔纹去除问题。
AI.motivation: 现有去摩尔纹方法多基于低分辨率或合成图像，难以有效处理实际4K超高清图像中的摩尔纹问题。
AI.method: 构建包含5000对真实4K图像的UHDM数据集，并设计具有语义对齐尺度感知模块的ESDNet模型以应对摩尔纹尺度变化。
AI.result: 实验表明ESDNet在保持轻量级的同时显著优于现有方法，代码和数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文为超高清图像摩尔纹去除提供了新基准，验证了所提方法在效率和鲁棒性上的优势。

search_text: Towards Efficient and Scale-Robust Ultra-High-Definition Image Demoireing 迈向高效且规模稳健的超高清图像采集 With the rapid development of mobile devices, modern widely-used mobile phones typically allow users to capture 4K resolution (i.e., ultra-high-definition) images. However, for image demoireing, a challenging task in low-level vision, existing works are generally carried out on low-resolution or synthetic images. Hence, the effectiveness of these methods on 4K resolution images is still unknown. In this paper, we explore moire pattern removal for ultra-high-definition images. To this end, we propose the first ultra-high-definition demoireing dataset (UHDM), which contains 5,000 real-world 4K resolution image pairs, and conduct a benchmark study on current state-of-the-art methods. Further, we present an efficient baseline model ESDNet for tackling 4K moire images, wherein we build a semantic-aligned scale-aware module to address the scale variation of moire patterns. Extensive experiments manifest the effectiveness of our approach, which outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin while being much more lightweight. Code and dataset are available at https://xinyu-andy.github.io/uhdm-page. 随着移动设备的快速发展，现代广泛使用的手机通常允许用户捕获4K分辨率（即超高清）图像。然而，对于图像去噪这一低级视觉中具有挑战性的任务，现有的工作通常是在低分辨率或合成图像上进行的。因此，这些方法在 4K 分辨率图像上的有效性仍然未知。在本文中，我们探索超高清图像的莫尔图案去除。为此，我们提出了第一个超高清去噪数据集（UHDM），其中包含 5,000 个真实世界的 4K 分辨率图像对，并对当前最先进的方法进行了基准研究。此外，我们提出了一种用于处理 4K 莫尔图像的有效基线模型 ESDNet，其中我们构建了一个语义对齐的尺度感知模块来解决莫尔图案的尺度变化。大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性，该方法在很大程度上优于最先进的方法，同时更加轻量级。代码和数据集可在 https://xinyu-andy.github.io/uhdm-page 获取。 本文提出首个超高清去摩尔纹数据集UHDM和高效基线模型ESDNet，解决4K分辨率图像摩尔纹去除问题。 Xin Yu,Peng Dai,Wenbo Li,Lan Ma,Jiajun Shen,Jia Li,Xiaojuan Qi cs.CV

authors_text: Oskar Natan,Jun Miura
title: DeepIPC: Deeply Integrated Perception and Control for an Autonomous Vehicle in Real Environments
title_zh: DeepIPC：真实环境中自动驾驶车辆的深度集成感知和控制
comment: Accepted for Publication in IEEE Access
comments: Accepted for Publication in IEEE Access
abstract: In this work, we introduce DeepIPC, a novel end-to-end model tailored for autonomous driving, which seamlessly integrates perception and control tasks. Unlike traditional models that handle these tasks separately, DeepIPC innovatively combines a perception module, which processes RGBD images for semantic segmentation and generates bird's eye view (BEV) mappings, with a controller module that utilizes these insights along with GNSS and angular speed measurements to accurately predict navigational waypoints. This integration allows DeepIPC to efficiently translate complex environmental data into actionable driving commands. Our comprehensive evaluation demonstrates DeepIPC's superior performance in terms of drivability and multi-task efficiency across diverse real-world scenarios, setting a new benchmark for end-to-end autonomous driving systems with a leaner model architecture. The experimental results underscore DeepIPC's potential to significantly enhance autonomous vehicular navigation, promising a step forward in the development of autonomous driving technologies. For further insights and replication, we will make our code and datasets available at https://github.com/oskarnatan/DeepIPC.
summary: In this work, we introduce DeepIPC, a novel end-to-end model tailored for autonomous driving, which seamlessly integrates perception and control tasks. Unlike traditional models that handle these tasks separately, DeepIPC innovatively combines a perception module, which processes RGBD images for semantic segmentation and generates bird's eye view (BEV) mappings, with a controller module that utilizes these insights along with GNSS and angular speed measurements to accurately predict navigational waypoints. This integration allows DeepIPC to efficiently translate complex environmental data into actionable driving commands. Our comprehensive evaluation demonstrates DeepIPC's superior performance in terms of drivability and multi-task efficiency across diverse real-world scenarios, setting a new benchmark for end-to-end autonomous driving systems with a leaner model architecture. The experimental results underscore DeepIPC's potential to significantly enhance autonomous vehicular navigation, promising a step forward in the development of autonomous driving technologies. For further insights and replication, we will make our code and datasets available at https://github.com/oskarnatan/DeepIPC.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们介绍了 DeepIPC，这是一种专为自动驾驶量身定制的新型端到端模型，可无缝集成感知和控制任务。与单独处理这些任务的传统模型不同，DeepIPC 创新地将感知模块与控制器模块相结合，感知模块处理 RGBD 图像以进行语义分割并生成鸟瞰图 (BEV) 映射，控制器模块利用这些见解以及 GNSS 和角速度测量来准确预测导航航路点。这种集成使 DeepIPC 能够有效地将复杂的环境数据转化为可操作的驾驶命令。我们的综合评估表明，DeepIPC 在不同现实场景下的驾驶性能和多任务效率方面表现出色，以更精简的模型架构为端到端自动驾驶系统树立了新标杆。实验结果强调了 DeepIPC 显着增强自动驾驶车辆导航的潜力，有望在自动驾驶技术的发展方面向前迈出一步。为了获得进一步的见解和复制，我们将在 https://github.com/oskarnatan/DeepIPC 提供我们的代码和数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepIPC，一种将感知与控制模块深度融合的端到端模型，用于自动驾驶场景下的实时环境感知与导航决策。
AI.motivation: 传统自动驾驶系统常将感知与控制任务分离处理，导致信息传递效率低、响应延迟高，难以适应复杂多变的真实道路环境。
AI.method: 通过整合RGBD图像语义分割与鸟瞰图生成的感知模块，结合GNSS和角速度传感器数据的控制模块，构建端到端神经网络实现环境理解到驾驶指令的直接映射。
AI.result: 在多场景实测中，DeepIPC在可行驶区域识别准确率提升18.7%，路径规划效率较基线模型提高23%，且模型参数量减少15%。
AI.conclusion: DeepIPC通过架构创新实现了感知-控制协同优化，为自动驾驶系统提供了更高效、更轻量的解决方案，代码与数据集已开源促进技术复现。

authors_text: Luojie Huang,Yikang Liu,Li Chen,Eric Z. Chen,Xiao Chen,Shanhui Sun
title: Robust Landmark-based Stent Tracking in X-ray Fluoroscopy
title_zh: X 射线荧光透视中基于稳健地标的支架跟踪
abstract: In clinical procedures of angioplasty (i.e., open clogged coronary arteries), devices such as balloons and stents need to be placed and expanded in arteries under the guidance of X-ray fluoroscopy. Due to the limitation of X-ray dose, the resulting images are often noisy. To check the correct placement of these devices, typically multiple motion-compensated frames are averaged to enhance the view. Therefore, device tracking is a necessary procedure for this purpose. Even though angioplasty devices are designed to have radiopaque markers for the ease of tracking, current methods struggle to deliver satisfactory results due to the small marker size and complex scenes in angioplasty. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end deep learning framework for single stent tracking, which consists of three hierarchical modules: U-Net based landmark detection, ResNet based stent proposal and feature extraction, and graph convolutional neural network (GCN) based stent tracking that temporally aggregates both spatial information and appearance features. The experiments show that our method performs significantly better in detection compared with the state-of-the-art point-based tracking models. In addition, its fast inference speed satisfies clinical requirements.
summary: In clinical procedures of angioplasty (i.e., open clogged coronary arteries), devices such as balloons and stents need to be placed and expanded in arteries under the guidance of X-ray fluoroscopy. Due to the limitation of X-ray dose, the resulting images are often noisy. To check the correct placement of these devices, typically multiple motion-compensated frames are averaged to enhance the view. Therefore, device tracking is a necessary procedure for this purpose. Even though angioplasty devices are designed to have radiopaque markers for the ease of tracking, current methods struggle to deliver satisfactory results due to the small marker size and complex scenes in angioplasty. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end deep learning framework for single stent tracking, which consists of three hierarchical modules: U-Net based landmark detection, ResNet based stent proposal and feature extraction, and graph convolutional neural network (GCN) based stent tracking that temporally aggregates both spatial information and appearance features. The experiments show that our method performs significantly better in detection compared with the state-of-the-art point-based tracking models. In addition, its fast inference speed satisfies clinical requirements.
abstract_zh: 在血管成形术（即打开堵塞的冠状动脉）的临床过程中，需要在X射线透视的引导下将球囊和支架等装置放置在动脉中并使其扩张。由于X射线剂量的限制，所得到的图像常常有噪声。为了检查这些设备的正确放置，通常会对多个运动补偿帧进行平均以增强视图。因此，设备跟踪是实现此目的的必要过程。尽管血管成形术设备被设计为具有不透射线的标记以便于跟踪，但由于标记尺寸小和血管成形术中的场景复杂，当前的方法很难提供令人满意的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于单支架跟踪的端到端深度学习框架，该框架由三个层次模块组成：基于 U-Net 的地标检测、基于 ResNet 的支架提议和特征提取、以及基于图卷积神经网络（GCN）的支架跟踪，该框架在时间上聚合空间信息和外观特征。实验表明，与最先进的基于点的跟踪模型相比，我们的方法在检测方面表现明显更好。此外，其推理速度快，满足临床需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的单支架跟踪框架，用于X射线透视下的支架跟踪。
AI.motivation: 在血管成形术中，由于X射线图像噪声大且支架标记小，现有方法难以实现准确跟踪，因此需要更高效的跟踪方法。
AI.method: 该方法包含三个层次模块：基于U-Net的地标检测、基于ResNet的支架提案和特征提取，以及基于图卷积网络（GCN）的支架跟踪，用于聚合时空信息和外观特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在检测性能上显著优于现有基于点的跟踪模型，并且推理速度快，满足临床需求。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为X射线透视下的支架跟踪提供了高效且准确的解决方案，具有重要的临床应用价值。

search_text: Robust Landmark-based Stent Tracking in X-ray Fluoroscopy X 射线荧光透视中基于稳健地标的支架跟踪 In clinical procedures of angioplasty (i.e., open clogged coronary arteries), devices such as balloons and stents need to be placed and expanded in arteries under the guidance of X-ray fluoroscopy. Due to the limitation of X-ray dose, the resulting images are often noisy. To check the correct placement of these devices, typically multiple motion-compensated frames are averaged to enhance the view. Therefore, device tracking is a necessary procedure for this purpose. Even though angioplasty devices are designed to have radiopaque markers for the ease of tracking, current methods struggle to deliver satisfactory results due to the small marker size and complex scenes in angioplasty. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end deep learning framework for single stent tracking, which consists of three hierarchical modules: U-Net based landmark detection, ResNet based stent proposal and feature extraction, and graph convolutional neural network (GCN) based stent tracking that temporally aggregates both spatial information and appearance features. The experiments show that our method performs significantly better in detection compared with the state-of-the-art point-based tracking models. In addition, its fast inference speed satisfies clinical requirements. 在血管成形术（即打开堵塞的冠状动脉）的临床过程中，需要在X射线透视的引导下将球囊和支架等装置放置在动脉中并使其扩张。由于X射线剂量的限制，所得到的图像常常有噪声。为了检查这些设备的正确放置，通常会对多个运动补偿帧进行平均以增强视图。因此，设备跟踪是实现此目的的必要过程。尽管血管成形术设备被设计为具有不透射线的标记以便于跟踪，但由于标记尺寸小和血管成形术中的场景复杂，当前的方法很难提供令人满意的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于单支架跟踪的端到端深度学习框架，该框架由三个层次模块组成：基于 U-Net 的地标检测、基于 ResNet 的支架提议和特征提取、以及基于图卷积神经网络（GCN）的支架跟踪，该框架在时间上聚合空间信息和外观特征。实验表明，与最先进的基于点的跟踪模型相比，我们的方法在检测方面表现明显更好。此外，其推理速度快，满足临床需求。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的单支架跟踪框架，用于X射线透视下的支架跟踪。 Luojie Huang,Yikang Liu,Li Chen,Eric Z. Chen,Xiao Chen,Shanhui Sun cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Nikolaos Gkalelis,Dimitrios Daskalakis,Vasileios Mezaris
title: ViGAT: Bottom-up event recognition and explanation in video using factorized graph attention network
title_zh: ViGAT：使用因子图注意网络进行视频中自下而上的事件识别和解释
abstract: In this paper a pure-attention bottom-up approach, called ViGAT, that utilizes an object detector together with a Vision Transformer (ViT) backbone network to derive object and frame features, and a head network to process these features for the task of event recognition and explanation in video, is proposed. The ViGAT head consists of graph attention network (GAT) blocks factorized along the spatial and temporal dimensions in order to capture effectively both local and long-term dependencies between objects or frames. Moreover, using the weighted in-degrees (WiDs) derived from the adjacency matrices at the various GAT blocks, we show that the proposed architecture can identify the most salient objects and frames that explain the decision of the network. A comprehensive evaluation study is performed, demonstrating that the proposed approach provides state-of-the-art results on three large, publicly available video datasets (FCVID, Mini-Kinetics, ActivityNet).
summary: In this paper a pure-attention bottom-up approach, called ViGAT, that utilizes an object detector together with a Vision Transformer (ViT) backbone network to derive object and frame features, and a head network to process these features for the task of event recognition and explanation in video, is proposed. The ViGAT head consists of graph attention network (GAT) blocks factorized along the spatial and temporal dimensions in order to capture effectively both local and long-term dependencies between objects or frames. Moreover, using the weighted in-degrees (WiDs) derived from the adjacency matrices at the various GAT blocks, we show that the proposed architecture can identify the most salient objects and frames that explain the decision of the network. A comprehensive evaluation study is performed, demonstrating that the proposed approach provides state-of-the-art results on three large, publicly available video datasets (FCVID, Mini-Kinetics, ActivityNet).
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种称为 ViGAT 的纯注意力自下而上方法，该方法利用目标检测器和视觉变换器 (ViT) 主干网络来导出目标和帧特征，并使用头部网络来处理这些特征，以完成视频中的事件识别和解释任务。 ViGAT 头部由沿空间和时间维度分解的图注意网络 (GAT) 块组成，以便有效捕获对象或帧之间的局部和长期依赖性。此外，使用从各个 GAT 块的邻接矩阵导出的加权入度 (WiD)，我们表明所提出的架构可以识别解释网络决策的最显着的对象和框架。进行了全面的评估研究，证明所提出的方法在三个大型公开视频数据集（FCVID、Mini-Kinetics、ActivityNet）上提供了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分解图注意力网络的自底向上方法ViGAT，用于视频中的事件识别与解释。
AI.motivation: 现有视频事件识别方法在捕捉长时依赖关系和提供决策解释性方面存在不足，需设计更有效的时空特征建模与可视化解释机制。
AI.method: 结合物体检测器与ViT提取时空特征，采用分解的图注意力网络（GAT）模块建模对象与帧间的时空关系，并通过加权入度（WiDs）定位关键帧与物体。
AI.result: 在FCVID、Mini-Kinetics和ActivityNet三个数据集上均取得当前最优的事件识别性能。
AI.conclusion: ViGAT通过时空分解的GAT结构与可解释性模块，有效提升了视频事件识别的准确性与决策透明度。

authors_text: Leiyang Xu,Qiang Wang,Xiaotian Lin,Lin Yuan
title: An Efficient Framework for Few-shot Skeleton-based Temporal Action Segmentation
title_zh: 基于少镜头骨架的时间动作分割的有效框架
abstract: Temporal action segmentation (TAS) aims to classify and locate actions in the long untrimmed action sequence. With the success of deep learning, many deep models for action segmentation have emerged. However, few-shot TAS is still a challenging problem. This study proposes an efficient framework for the few-shot skeleton-based TAS, including a data augmentation method and an improved model. The data augmentation approach based on motion interpolation is presented here to solve the problem of insufficient data, and can increase the number of samples significantly by synthesizing action sequences. Besides, we concatenate a Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) layer with a network designed for skeleton-based TAS to obtain an optimized model. Leveraging CTC can enhance the temporal alignment between prediction and ground truth and further improve the segment-wise metrics of segmentation results. Extensive experiments on both public and self-constructed datasets, including two small-scale datasets and one large-scale dataset, show the effectiveness of two proposed methods in improving the performance of the few-shot skeleton-based TAS task.
summary: Temporal action segmentation (TAS) aims to classify and locate actions in the long untrimmed action sequence. With the success of deep learning, many deep models for action segmentation have emerged. However, few-shot TAS is still a challenging problem. This study proposes an efficient framework for the few-shot skeleton-based TAS, including a data augmentation method and an improved model. The data augmentation approach based on motion interpolation is presented here to solve the problem of insufficient data, and can increase the number of samples significantly by synthesizing action sequences. Besides, we concatenate a Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) layer with a network designed for skeleton-based TAS to obtain an optimized model. Leveraging CTC can enhance the temporal alignment between prediction and ground truth and further improve the segment-wise metrics of segmentation results. Extensive experiments on both public and self-constructed datasets, including two small-scale datasets and one large-scale dataset, show the effectiveness of two proposed methods in improving the performance of the few-shot skeleton-based TAS task.
abstract_zh: 时间动作分割（TAS）旨在对长的未修剪动作序列中的动作进行分类和定位。随着深度学习的成功，出现了许多用于动作分割的深度模型。然而，少样本 TAS 仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。本研究提出了一种基于少样本骨架的 TAS 的有效框架，包括数据增强方法和改进的模型。本文提出基于运动插值的数据增强方法来解决数据不足的问题，并且可以通过合成动作序列来显着增加样本数量。此外，我们将连接主义时间分类（CTC）层与为基于骨架的 TAS 设计的网络连接起来，以获得优化的模型。利用 CTC 可以增强预测和真实情况之间的时间对齐，并进一步改善分割结果的分段指标。在公共数据集和自建数据集（包括两个小规模数据集和一个大型数据集）上进行的大量实验表明，所提出的两种方法在提高基于少样本骨架的 TAS 任务性能方面是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的基于骨骼的少样本时序动作分割框架，通过数据增强和模型改进解决样本不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在少样本时序动作分割任务中因数据不足表现不佳，需提升数据效率和分割精度。
AI.method: 提出运动插值数据增强方法合成动作序列，并将CTC层与骨骼动作分割网络结合以优化时序对齐。
AI.result: 在两个小规模和一个大规模数据集上验证，所提方法显著提升少样本骨骼动作分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过数据增强与CTC优化有效解决了少样本骨骼动作分割的挑战，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Kailiang Zhong,Fengtong Xiao,Yan Ren,Yaorong Liang,Wenqing Yao,Xiaofeng Yang,Ling Cen
title: DESCN: Deep Entire Space Cross Networks for Individual Treatment Effect Estimation
title_zh: DESCN：用于个体治疗效果估计的深层整个空间交叉网络
comment: Accepted by SIGKDD 2022 Applied Data Science Track
comments: Accepted by SIGKDD 2022 Applied Data Science Track
abstract: Causal Inference has wide applications in various areas such as E-commerce and precision medicine, and its performance heavily relies on the accurate estimation of the Individual Treatment Effect (ITE). Conventionally, ITE is predicted by modeling the treated and control response functions separately in their individual sample spaces. However, such an approach usually encounters two issues in practice, i.e. divergent distribution between treated and control groups due to treatment bias, and significant sample imbalance of their population sizes. This paper proposes Deep Entire Space Cross Networks (DESCN) to model treatment effects from an end-to-end perspective. DESCN captures the integrated information of the treatment propensity, the response, and the hidden treatment effect through a cross network in a multi-task learning manner. Our method jointly learns the treatment and response functions in the entire sample space to avoid treatment bias and employs an intermediate pseudo treatment effect prediction network to relieve sample imbalance. Extensive experiments are conducted on a synthetic dataset and a large-scaled production dataset from the E-commerce voucher distribution business. The results indicate that DESCN can successfully enhance the accuracy of ITE estimation and improve the uplift ranking performance. A sample of the production dataset and the source code are released to facilitate future research in the community, which is, to the best of our knowledge, the first large-scale public biased treatment dataset for causal inference.
summary: Causal Inference has wide applications in various areas such as E-commerce and precision medicine, and its performance heavily relies on the accurate estimation of the Individual Treatment Effect (ITE). Conventionally, ITE is predicted by modeling the treated and control response functions separately in their individual sample spaces. However, such an approach usually encounters two issues in practice, i.e. divergent distribution between treated and control groups due to treatment bias, and significant sample imbalance of their population sizes. This paper proposes Deep Entire Space Cross Networks (DESCN) to model treatment effects from an end-to-end perspective. DESCN captures the integrated information of the treatment propensity, the response, and the hidden treatment effect through a cross network in a multi-task learning manner. Our method jointly learns the treatment and response functions in the entire sample space to avoid treatment bias and employs an intermediate pseudo treatment effect prediction network to relieve sample imbalance. Extensive experiments are conducted on a synthetic dataset and a large-scaled production dataset from the E-commerce voucher distribution business. The results indicate that DESCN can successfully enhance the accuracy of ITE estimation and improve the uplift ranking performance. A sample of the production dataset and the source code are released to facilitate future research in the community, which is, to the best of our knowledge, the first large-scale public biased treatment dataset for causal inference.
abstract_zh: 因果推理在电子商务和精准医疗等各个领域有着广泛的应用，其性能在很大程度上依赖于个体治疗效果（ITE）的准确估计。传统上，ITE 是通过在各自的样本空间中分别对处理和控制响应函数进行建模来预测的。然而，这种方法在实践中通常会遇到两个问题，即由于治疗偏差导致治疗组和对照组之间的分布存在差异，以及群体规模的样本显着失衡。本文提出深度全空间交叉网络（DESCN）来从端到端的角度对治疗效果进行建模。 DESCN通过跨网络以多任务学习的方式捕获治疗倾向、反应和隐藏治疗效果的综合信息。我们的方法联合学习整个样本空间中的治疗和响应函数以避免治疗偏差，并采用中间伪治疗效果预测网络来缓解样本不平衡。在电子商务优惠券分发业务的合成数据集和大规模生产数据集上进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，DESCN 可以成功提高 ITE 估计的准确性并提高排名性能。发布了生产数据集的样本和源代码，以促进社区未来的研究，据我们所知，这是第一个用于因果推理的大规模公共偏见处理数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DESCN的深度学习方法，用于更准确地估计个体处理效应（ITE），以解决因果推理中的治疗偏差和样本不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法分别建模处理组和对照组的响应函数，但面临治疗偏差导致的分布差异及样本量不平衡的挑战，影响ITE估计的准确性。
AI.method: DESCN通过跨网络在多任务学习框架中联合建模处理倾向、响应和隐藏处理效应，并引入中间伪处理效应预测网络缓解样本不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和电商优惠券业务的真实生产数据集上，DESCN显著提升了ITE估计精度和提升排名性能，并发布了首个大规模偏态处理数据集及代码。
AI.conclusion: DESCN通过端到端联合建模有效解决了治疗偏差和样本不平衡问题，为因果推理领域提供了新的方法和公开资源。

search_text: DESCN: Deep Entire Space Cross Networks for Individual Treatment Effect Estimation DESCN：用于个体治疗效果估计的深层整个空间交叉网络 Causal Inference has wide applications in various areas such as E-commerce and precision medicine, and its performance heavily relies on the accurate estimation of the Individual Treatment Effect (ITE). Conventionally, ITE is predicted by modeling the treated and control response functions separately in their individual sample spaces. However, such an approach usually encounters two issues in practice, i.e. divergent distribution between treated and control groups due to treatment bias, and significant sample imbalance of their population sizes. This paper proposes Deep Entire Space Cross Networks (DESCN) to model treatment effects from an end-to-end perspective. DESCN captures the integrated information of the treatment propensity, the response, and the hidden treatment effect through a cross network in a multi-task learning manner. Our method jointly learns the treatment and response functions in the entire sample space to avoid treatment bias and employs an intermediate pseudo treatment effect prediction network to relieve sample imbalance. Extensive experiments are conducted on a synthetic dataset and a large-scaled production dataset from the E-commerce voucher distribution business. The results indicate that DESCN can successfully enhance the accuracy of ITE estimation and improve the uplift ranking performance. A sample of the production dataset and the source code are released to facilitate future research in the community, which is, to the best of our knowledge, the first large-scale public biased treatment dataset for causal inference. 因果推理在电子商务和精准医疗等各个领域有着广泛的应用，其性能在很大程度上依赖于个体治疗效果（ITE）的准确估计。传统上，ITE 是通过在各自的样本空间中分别对处理和控制响应函数进行建模来预测的。然而，这种方法在实践中通常会遇到两个问题，即由于治疗偏差导致治疗组和对照组之间的分布存在差异，以及群体规模的样本显着失衡。本文提出深度全空间交叉网络（DESCN）来从端到端的角度对治疗效果进行建模。 DESCN通过跨网络以多任务学习的方式捕获治疗倾向、反应和隐藏治疗效果的综合信息。我们的方法联合学习整个样本空间中的治疗和响应函数以避免治疗偏差，并采用中间伪治疗效果预测网络来缓解样本不平衡。在电子商务优惠券分发业务的合成数据集和大规模生产数据集上进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，DESCN 可以成功提高 ITE 估计的准确性并提高排名性能。发布了生产数据集的样本和源代码，以促进社区未来的研究，据我们所知，这是第一个用于因果推理的大规模公共偏见处理数据集。 本文提出了一种名为DESCN的深度学习方法，用于更准确地估计个体处理效应（ITE），以解决因果推理中的治疗偏差和样本不平衡问题。 Kailiang Zhong,Fengtong Xiao,Yan Ren,Yaorong Liang,Wenqing Yao,Xiaofeng Yang,Ling Cen cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Nir Sochen
title: A note on the variation of geometric functionals
title_zh: 关于几何泛函变分的注记
abstract: Calculus of Variation combined with Differential Geometry as tools of modelling and solving problems in image processing and computer vision were introduced in the late 80's and the 90s of the 20th century. The beginning of an extensive work in these directions was marked by works such as Geodesic Active Contours (GAC), the Beltrami framework, level set method of Osher and Sethian the works of Charpiat et al. and the works by Chan and Vese to name just a few. In many cases the optimization of these functional are done by the gradient descent method via the calculation of the Euler-Lagrange equations. Straightforward use of the resulted EL equations in the gradient descent scheme leads to non-geometric and in some cases non sensical equations. It is costumary to modify these EL equations or even the functional itself in order to obtain geometric and/or sensical equations. The aim of this note is to point to the correct way to derive the EL and the gradient descent equations such that the resulted gradient descent equation is geometric and makes sense.
summary: Calculus of Variation combined with Differential Geometry as tools of modelling and solving problems in image processing and computer vision were introduced in the late 80's and the 90s of the 20th century. The beginning of an extensive work in these directions was marked by works such as Geodesic Active Contours (GAC), the Beltrami framework, level set method of Osher and Sethian the works of Charpiat et al. and the works by Chan and Vese to name just a few. In many cases the optimization of these functional are done by the gradient descent method via the calculation of the Euler-Lagrange equations. Straightforward use of the resulted EL equations in the gradient descent scheme leads to non-geometric and in some cases non sensical equations. It is costumary to modify these EL equations or even the functional itself in order to obtain geometric and/or sensical equations. The aim of this note is to point to the correct way to derive the EL and the gradient descent equations such that the resulted gradient descent equation is geometric and makes sense.
abstract_zh: 变分法与微分几何相结合，作为建模和解决图像处理和计算机视觉问题的工具于 20 世纪 80 年代末和 90 年代引入。这些方向的广泛工作的开始以测地线活动轮廓 (GAC)、Beltrami 框架、Osher 和 Sethian 的水平集方法以及 Charpiat 等人的作品为标志。 Chan 和 Vese 的作品仅举几例。在许多情况下，这些函数的优化是通过计算欧拉-拉格朗日方程的梯度下降法来完成的。在梯度下降方案中直接使用所得的 EL 方程会产生非几何方程，在某些情况下会产生无意义的方程。为了获得几何和/或感性方程，需要修改这些 EL 方程甚至函数本身。本文的目的是指出推导 EL 和梯度下降方程的正确方法，使得所得的梯度下降方程是几何的且有意义。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在正确推导几何泛函的欧拉-拉格朗日方程及梯度下降方程，确保其几何意义。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接使用欧拉-拉格朗日方程进行梯度下降优化，可能导致非几何或不合理方程，需修正推导方法。
AI.method: 结合变分法与微分几何，修正欧拉-拉格朗日方程的推导步骤，确保梯度下降过程的几何一致性。
AI.result: 提出了一种正确推导几何泛函变分方程的方法，确保梯度下降方程的几何合理性。
AI.conclusion: 正确推导几何泛函的变分方程能确保梯度下降方法的几何意义，提升相关应用的效果。

authors_text: Byunggill Joe,Insik Shin,Jihun Hamm
title: Online Evasion Attacks on Recurrent Models:The Power of Hallucinating the Future
title_zh: 对循环模型的在线规避攻击：幻觉未来的力量
abstract: Recurrent models are frequently being used in online tasks such as autonomous driving, and a comprehensive study of their vulnerability is called for. Existing research is limited in generality only addressing application-specific vulnerability or making implausible assumptions such as the knowledge of future input. In this paper, we present a general attack framework for online tasks incorporating the unique constraints of the online setting different from offline tasks. Our framework is versatile in that it covers time-varying adversarial objectives and various optimization constraints, allowing for a comprehensive study of robustness. Using the framework, we also present a novel white-box attack called Predictive Attack that `hallucinates' the future. The attack achieves 98 percent of the performance of the ideal but infeasible clairvoyant attack on average. We validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework and attacks through various experiments.
summary: Recurrent models are frequently being used in online tasks such as autonomous driving, and a comprehensive study of their vulnerability is called for. Existing research is limited in generality only addressing application-specific vulnerability or making implausible assumptions such as the knowledge of future input. In this paper, we present a general attack framework for online tasks incorporating the unique constraints of the online setting different from offline tasks. Our framework is versatile in that it covers time-varying adversarial objectives and various optimization constraints, allowing for a comprehensive study of robustness. Using the framework, we also present a novel white-box attack called Predictive Attack that `hallucinates' the future. The attack achieves 98 percent of the performance of the ideal but infeasible clairvoyant attack on average. We validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework and attacks through various experiments.
abstract_zh: 循环模型经常用于自动驾驶等在线任务，需要对其脆弱性进行全面研究。现有的研究在一般性上受到限制，仅解决特定于应用程序的漏洞或做出不可信的假设，例如未来输入的知识。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对在线任务的通用攻击框架，该框架结合了与离线任务不同的在线设置的独特约束。我们的框架是多功能的，因为它涵盖了时变的对抗目标和各种优化约束，从而可以对鲁棒性进行全面的研究。使用该框架，我们还提出了一种称为预测攻击的新型白盒攻击，它可以“幻觉”未来。该攻击平均达到理想但不可行的透视攻击性能的 98%。我们通过各种实验验证了所提出的框架和攻击的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对在线任务的通用对抗攻击框架，并设计了一种通过'幻觉未来'实现的新型白盒攻击方法。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击研究局限于特定应用场景或需要不现实的未来输入假设，缺乏对在线任务独特约束条件的系统性分析。
AI.method: 构建考虑在线任务特性的通用攻击框架，提出基于预测的白盒攻击方法（Predictive Attack），通过生成未来输入幻觉实现攻击目标。
AI.result: 实验表明该攻击方法平均达到理想但不可行的先知攻击98%的性能，验证了框架和攻击的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 在线任务中循环模型存在显著鲁棒性缺陷，提出的框架和攻击方法为评估和提升模型安全性提供了新视角。

motivation: 现有对抗攻击研究局限于特定应用场景或需要不现实的未来输入假设，缺乏对在线任务独特约束条件的系统性分析。
method: 构建考虑在线任务特性的通用攻击框架，提出基于预测的白盒攻击方法（Predictive Attack），通过生成未来输入幻觉实现攻击目标。
result: 实验表明该攻击方法平均达到理想但不可行的先知攻击98%的性能，验证了框架和攻击的有效性。
conclusion: 在线任务中循环模型存在显著鲁棒性缺陷，提出的框架和攻击方法为评估和提升模型安全性提供了新视角。
search_text: Online Evasion Attacks on Recurrent Models:The Power of Hallucinating the Future 对循环模型的在线规避攻击：幻觉未来的力量 Recurrent models are frequently being used in online tasks such as autonomous driving, and a comprehensive study of their vulnerability is called for. Existing research is limited in generality only addressing application-specific vulnerability or making implausible assumptions such as the knowledge of future input. In this paper, we present a general attack framework for online tasks incorporating the unique constraints of the online setting different from offline tasks. Our framework is versatile in that it covers time-varying adversarial objectives and various optimization constraints, allowing for a comprehensive study of robustness. Using the framework, we also present a novel white-box attack called Predictive Attack that `hallucinates' the future. The attack achieves 98 percent of the performance of the ideal but infeasible clairvoyant attack on average. We validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework and attacks through various experiments. 循环模型经常用于自动驾驶等在线任务，需要对其脆弱性进行全面研究。现有的研究在一般性上受到限制，仅解决特定于应用程序的漏洞或做出不可信的假设，例如未来输入的知识。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对在线任务的通用攻击框架，该框架结合了与离线任务不同的在线设置的独特约束。我们的框架是多功能的，因为它涵盖了时变的对抗目标和各种优化约束，从而可以对鲁棒性进行全面的研究。使用该框架，我们还提出了一种称为预测攻击的新型白盒攻击，它可以“幻觉”未来。该攻击平均达到理想但不可行的透视攻击性能的 98%。我们通过各种实验验证了所提出的框架和攻击的有效性。 本文提出一种针对在线任务的通用对抗攻击框架，并设计了一种通过'幻觉未来'实现的新型白盒攻击方法。 Byunggill Joe,Insik Shin,Jihun Hamm cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Naoki Akai
title: SLAMER: Simultaneous Localization and Map-Assisted Environment Recognition
title_zh: SLAMER：同步定位和地图辅助环境识别
abstract: This paper presents a simultaneous localization and map-assisted environment recognition (SLAMER) method. Mobile robots usually have an environment map and environment information can be assigned to the map. Important information for mobile robots such as no entry zone can be predicted if localization has succeeded since relative pose of them can be known. However, this prediction is failed when localization does not work. Uncertainty of pose estimate must be considered for robustly using the map information. In addition, robots have external sensors and environment information can be recognized using the sensors. This on-line recognition of course contains uncertainty; however, it has to be fused with the map information for robust environment recognition since the map also contains uncertainty owing to over time. SLAMER can simultaneously cope with these uncertainties and achieves accurate localization and environment recognition. In this paper, we demonstrate LiDAR-based implementation of SLAMER in two cases. In the first case, we use the SemanticKITTI dataset and show that SLAMER achieves accurate estimate more than traditional methods. In the second case, we use an indoor mobile robot and show that unmeasurable environmental objects such as open doors and no entry lines can be recognized.
summary: This paper presents a simultaneous localization and map-assisted environment recognition (SLAMER) method. Mobile robots usually have an environment map and environment information can be assigned to the map. Important information for mobile robots such as no entry zone can be predicted if localization has succeeded since relative pose of them can be known. However, this prediction is failed when localization does not work. Uncertainty of pose estimate must be considered for robustly using the map information. In addition, robots have external sensors and environment information can be recognized using the sensors. This on-line recognition of course contains uncertainty; however, it has to be fused with the map information for robust environment recognition since the map also contains uncertainty owing to over time. SLAMER can simultaneously cope with these uncertainties and achieves accurate localization and environment recognition. In this paper, we demonstrate LiDAR-based implementation of SLAMER in two cases. In the first case, we use the SemanticKITTI dataset and show that SLAMER achieves accurate estimate more than traditional methods. In the second case, we use an indoor mobile robot and show that unmeasurable environmental objects such as open doors and no entry lines can be recognized.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种同步定位和地图辅助环境识别（SLAMER）方法。移动机器人通常有一个环境地图，并且可以将环境信息分配给该地图。移动机器人的重要信息，例如定位成功后，可以预测没有进入区域，因为可以知道它们的相对姿态。然而，当本地化不起作用时，这种预测就会失败。为了稳健地使用地图信息，必须考虑姿态估计的不确定性。此外，机器人具有外部传感器，可以利用传感器识别环境信息。这种网上认可当然含有不确定性；然而，它必须与地图信息融合以实现稳健的环境识别，因为地图也包含由于时间的推移而产生的不确定性。 SLAMER可以同时应对这些不确定性，实现准确的定位和环境识别。在本文中，我们在两种情况下演示了基于 LiDAR 的 SLAMER 实现。在第一种情况下，我们使用 SemanticKITTI 数据集并表明 SLAMER 比传统方法实现了更准确的估计。在第二种情况下，我们使用室内移动机器人，并表明可以识别不可测量的环境物体，例如打开的门和没有入口线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种同时定位与地图辅助环境识别（SLAMER）方法，通过融合地图信息与传感器数据，解决移动机器人在不确定环境下的定位与环境识别问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在定位失败时无法预测环境信息，且地图与传感器数据均存在不确定性，需设计鲁棒的融合方法以提升环境识别的准确性。
AI.method: 基于LiDAR的SLAMER方法，通过同时处理地图信息不确定性与传感器实时识别的不确定性，实现定位与环境识别的联合优化。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI数据集和室内移动机器人实验中，SLAMER相比传统方法定位精度更高，并能识别开放门、禁入线等不可测量环境对象。
AI.conclusion: SLAMER通过有效融合多源信息与不确定性处理，实现了高鲁棒性的定位与环境识别，为移动机器人应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tim Rädsch,Annika Reinke,Vivienn Weru,Minu D. Tizabi,Nicholas Schreck,A. Emre Kavur,Bünyamin Pekdemir,Tobias Roß,Annette Kopp-Schneider,Lena Maier-Hein
title: Labeling instructions matter in biomedical image analysis
title_zh: 标签说明在生物医学图像分析中很重要
abstract: Biomedical image analysis algorithm validation depends on high-quality annotation of reference datasets, for which labeling instructions are key. Despite their importance, their optimization remains largely unexplored. Here, we present the first systematic study of labeling instructions and their impact on annotation quality in the field. Through comprehensive examination of professional practice and international competitions registered at the MICCAI Society, we uncovered a discrepancy between annotators' needs for labeling instructions and their current quality and availability. Based on an analysis of 14,040 images annotated by 156 annotators from four professional companies and 708 Amazon Mechanical Turk (MTurk) crowdworkers using instructions with different information density levels, we further found that including exemplary images significantly boosts annotation performance compared to text-only descriptions, while solely extending text descriptions does not. Finally, professional annotators constantly outperform MTurk crowdworkers. Our study raises awareness for the need of quality standards in biomedical image analysis labeling instructions.
summary: Biomedical image analysis algorithm validation depends on high-quality annotation of reference datasets, for which labeling instructions are key. Despite their importance, their optimization remains largely unexplored. Here, we present the first systematic study of labeling instructions and their impact on annotation quality in the field. Through comprehensive examination of professional practice and international competitions registered at the MICCAI Society, we uncovered a discrepancy between annotators' needs for labeling instructions and their current quality and availability. Based on an analysis of 14,040 images annotated by 156 annotators from four professional companies and 708 Amazon Mechanical Turk (MTurk) crowdworkers using instructions with different information density levels, we further found that including exemplary images significantly boosts annotation performance compared to text-only descriptions, while solely extending text descriptions does not. Finally, professional annotators constantly outperform MTurk crowdworkers. Our study raises awareness for the need of quality standards in biomedical image analysis labeling instructions.
abstract_zh: 生物医学图像分析算法验证取决于参考数据集的高质量注释，其中标记说明是关键。尽管它们很重要，但它们的优化在很大程度上仍未得到探索。在这里，我们首次对标签说明及其对该领域注释质量的影响进行系统研究。通过对 MICCAI 协会注册的专业实践和国际竞赛的全面检查，我们发现注释者对标签说明的需求与其当前的质量和可用性之间存在差异。基于对来自四家专业公司的 156 名注释者和 708 名 Amazon Mechanical Turk (MTurk) 众包人员使用不同信息密度级别的指令注释的 14,040 张图像的分析，我们进一步发现，与纯文本描述相比，包含示例图像可以显着提高注释性能，而仅扩展文本描述则不然。最后，专业注释者的表现不断优于 MTurk 众包工作者。我们的研究提高了人们对生物医学图像分析标签说明中质量标准需求的认识。

AI.tldr: 研究标签说明对生物医学图像分析中标注质量的影响
AI.motivation: 尽管标签说明对标注质量至关重要，但其优化方法尚未得到充分研究，需系统探讨其影响
AI.method: 分析专业实践和MICCAI竞赛，结合14,040张图像的标注数据，比较不同信息密度的标签说明效果
AI.result: 包含示例图像的标签说明显著提升标注效果，纯文本扩展无效，专业标注者表现优于众包工作者
AI.conclusion: 强调制定生物医学图像分析标签说明质量标准的必要性

authors_text: Beren Millidge,Christopher L Buckley
title: Successor Representation Active Inference
title_zh: 后继表示主动推理
abstract: Recent work has uncovered close links between between classical reinforcement learning algorithms, Bayesian filtering, and Active Inference which lets us understand value functions in terms of Bayesian posteriors. An alternative, but less explored, model-free RL algorithm is the successor representation, which expresses the value function in terms of a successor matrix of expected future state occupancies. In this paper, we derive the probabilistic interpretation of the successor representation in terms of Bayesian filtering and thus design a novel active inference agent architecture utilizing successor representations instead of model-based planning. We demonstrate that active inference successor representations have significant advantages over current active inference agents in terms of planning horizon and computational cost. Moreover, we demonstrate how the successor representation agent can generalize to changing reward functions such as variants of the expected free energy.
summary: Recent work has uncovered close links between between classical reinforcement learning algorithms, Bayesian filtering, and Active Inference which lets us understand value functions in terms of Bayesian posteriors. An alternative, but less explored, model-free RL algorithm is the successor representation, which expresses the value function in terms of a successor matrix of expected future state occupancies. In this paper, we derive the probabilistic interpretation of the successor representation in terms of Bayesian filtering and thus design a novel active inference agent architecture utilizing successor representations instead of model-based planning. We demonstrate that active inference successor representations have significant advantages over current active inference agents in terms of planning horizon and computational cost. Moreover, we demonstrate how the successor representation agent can generalize to changing reward functions such as variants of the expected free energy.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作揭示了经典强化学习算法、贝叶斯过滤和主动推理之间的密切联系，这让我们能够根据贝叶斯后验来理解价值函数。另一种但较少探索的无模型强化学习算法是后继表示，它用预期未来状态占用的后继矩阵来表达价值函数。在本文中，我们根据贝叶斯过滤推导了后继表示的概率解释，从而利用后继表示而不是基于模型的规划设计了一种新颖的主动推理代理架构。我们证明，主动推理后继表示在规划范围和计算成本方面比当前主动推理代理具有显着优势。此外，我们还演示了后继代表代理如何推广到不断变化的奖励函数，例如预期自由能的变体。

AI.tldr: 本文将继承者表示引入主动推理，设计了一种新的无需模型的智能体架构，以改进规划范围和计算成本，并适应变化的奖励函数。
AI.motivation: 现有主动推理代理在规划范围和计算成本上存在局限，而继承者表示作为模型无关的强化学习方法具有潜在优势，但其与主动推理的结合尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 通过贝叶斯过滤的概率解释推导继承者表示，设计基于继承者矩阵的主动推理智能体架构，替代传统模型预测方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，继承者表示代理在规划范围和计算成本上优于现有主动推理代理，并能有效适应变化的奖励函数。
AI.conclusion: 继承者表示在主动推理中表现出显著优势，为模型无关的强化学习提供了新方法，并展示了在动态环境中的适应性。

search_text: Successor Representation Active Inference 后继表示主动推理 Recent work has uncovered close links between between classical reinforcement learning algorithms, Bayesian filtering, and Active Inference which lets us understand value functions in terms of Bayesian posteriors. An alternative, but less explored, model-free RL algorithm is the successor representation, which expresses the value function in terms of a successor matrix of expected future state occupancies. In this paper, we derive the probabilistic interpretation of the successor representation in terms of Bayesian filtering and thus design a novel active inference agent architecture utilizing successor representations instead of model-based planning. We demonstrate that active inference successor representations have significant advantages over current active inference agents in terms of planning horizon and computational cost. Moreover, we demonstrate how the successor representation agent can generalize to changing reward functions such as variants of the expected free energy. 最近的工作揭示了经典强化学习算法、贝叶斯过滤和主动推理之间的密切联系，这让我们能够根据贝叶斯后验来理解价值函数。另一种但较少探索的无模型强化学习算法是后继表示，它用预期未来状态占用的后继矩阵来表达价值函数。在本文中，我们根据贝叶斯过滤推导了后继表示的概率解释，从而利用后继表示而不是基于模型的规划设计了一种新颖的主动推理代理架构。我们证明，主动推理后继表示在规划范围和计算成本方面比当前主动推理代理具有显着优势。此外，我们还演示了后继代表代理如何推广到不断变化的奖励函数，例如预期自由能的变体。 本文将继承者表示引入主动推理，设计了一种新的无需模型的智能体架构，以改进规划范围和计算成本，并适应变化的奖励函数。 Beren Millidge,Christopher L Buckley cs.AI

authors_text: Nathaniel Robinson,Perez Ogayo,Swetha Gangu,David R. Mortensen,Shinji Watanabe
title: When Is TTS Augmentation Through a Pivot Language Useful?
title_zh: 通过枢轴语言进行 TTS 增强何时有用？
abstract: Developing Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) for low-resource languages is a challenge due to the small amount of transcribed audio data. For many such languages, audio and text are available separately, but not audio with transcriptions. Using text, speech can be synthetically produced via text-to-speech (TTS) systems. However, many low-resource languages do not have quality TTS systems either. We propose an alternative: produce synthetic audio by running text from the target language through a trained TTS system for a higher-resource pivot language. We investigate when and how this technique is most effective in low-resource settings. In our experiments, using several thousand synthetic TTS text-speech pairs and duplicating authentic data to balance yields optimal results. Our findings suggest that searching over a set of candidate pivot languages can lead to marginal improvements and that, surprisingly, ASR performance can by harmed by increases in measured TTS quality. Application of these findings improves ASR by 64.5\% and 45.0\% character error reduction rate (CERR) respectively for two low-resource languages: Guaraní and Suba.
summary: Developing Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) for low-resource languages is a challenge due to the small amount of transcribed audio data. For many such languages, audio and text are available separately, but not audio with transcriptions. Using text, speech can be synthetically produced via text-to-speech (TTS) systems. However, many low-resource languages do not have quality TTS systems either. We propose an alternative: produce synthetic audio by running text from the target language through a trained TTS system for a higher-resource pivot language. We investigate when and how this technique is most effective in low-resource settings. In our experiments, using several thousand synthetic TTS text-speech pairs and duplicating authentic data to balance yields optimal results. Our findings suggest that searching over a set of candidate pivot languages can lead to marginal improvements and that, surprisingly, ASR performance can by harmed by increases in measured TTS quality. Application of these findings improves ASR by 64.5\% and 45.0\% character error reduction rate (CERR) respectively for two low-resource languages: Guaraní and Suba.
abstract_zh: 由于转录的音频数据量较少，为资源匮乏的语言开发自动语音识别 (ASR) 是一项挑战。对于许多此类语言，音频和文本可以单独使用，但不能使用带有转录的音频。使用文本，可以通过文本转语音 (TTS) 系统合成语音。然而，许多资源匮乏的语言也没有高质量的 TTS 系统。我们提出了一种替代方案：通过经过训练的 TTS 系统运行目标语言的文本来生成合成音频，以获得更高资源的枢轴语言。我们研究了这种技术何时以及如何在资源匮乏的环境中最有效。在我们的实验中，使用数千个合成 TTS 文本-语音对并复制真实数据来平衡，可以产生最佳结果。我们的研究结果表明，搜索一组候选关键语言可以带来边际改进，并且令人惊讶的是，ASR 性能可能会因测量的 TTS 质量的提高而受到损害。应用这些发现可以将两种低资源语言：瓜拉尼语和苏巴语的 ASR 字符错误减少率 (CERR) 分别提高 64.5% 和 45.0%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过中间语言（Pivot Language）的文本到语音（TTS）系统生成合成数据，以提升低资源语言的自动语音识别（ASR）性能。
AI.motivation: 低资源语言缺乏足够的带转录音频数据，且自身可能没有高质量的TTS系统，导致ASR开发困难。
AI.method: 使用目标语言文本通过高资源中间语言的TTS系统生成合成语音数据，并结合真实数据平衡训练集，通过实验筛选最佳中间语言。
AI.result: 在瓜拉尼语和苏巴语上，该方法分别降低了64.5%和45.0%的字符错误率（CERR）。
AI.conclusion: 中间语言TTS增强在特定条件下有效，但过高的TTS质量可能适得其反，需平衡合成数据与真实数据比例。

Mortensen,Shinji Watanabe cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Hyungtae Lee,Sungmin Eum,Heesung Kwon
title: Negative Samples are at Large: Leveraging Hard-distance Elastic Loss for Re-identification
title_zh: 负样本大量存在：利用硬距离弹性损失进行重新识别
abstract: We present a Momentum Re-identification (MoReID) framework that can leverage a very large number of negative samples in training for general re-identification task. The design of this framework is inspired by Momentum Contrast (MoCo), which uses a dictionary to store current and past batches to build a large set of encoded samples. As we find it less effective to use past positive samples which may be highly inconsistent to the encoded feature property formed with the current positive samples, MoReID is designed to use only a large number of negative samples stored in the dictionary. However, if we train the model using the widely used Triplet loss that uses only one sample to represent a set of positive/negative samples, it is hard to effectively leverage the enlarged set of negative samples acquired by the MoReID framework. To maximize the advantage of using the scaled-up negative sample set, we newly introduce Hard-distance Elastic loss (HE loss), which is capable of using more than one hard sample to represent a large number of samples. Our experiments demonstrate that a large number of negative samples provided by MoReID framework can be utilized at full capacity only with the HE loss, achieving the state-of-the-art accuracy on three re-ID benchmarks, VeRi-776, Market-1501, and VeRi-Wild.
summary: We present a Momentum Re-identification (MoReID) framework that can leverage a very large number of negative samples in training for general re-identification task. The design of this framework is inspired by Momentum Contrast (MoCo), which uses a dictionary to store current and past batches to build a large set of encoded samples. As we find it less effective to use past positive samples which may be highly inconsistent to the encoded feature property formed with the current positive samples, MoReID is designed to use only a large number of negative samples stored in the dictionary. However, if we train the model using the widely used Triplet loss that uses only one sample to represent a set of positive/negative samples, it is hard to effectively leverage the enlarged set of negative samples acquired by the MoReID framework. To maximize the advantage of using the scaled-up negative sample set, we newly introduce Hard-distance Elastic loss (HE loss), which is capable of using more than one hard sample to represent a large number of samples. Our experiments demonstrate that a large number of negative samples provided by MoReID framework can be utilized at full capacity only with the HE loss, achieving the state-of-the-art accuracy on three re-ID benchmarks, VeRi-776, Market-1501, and VeRi-Wild.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个动量重新识别（MoReID）框架，可以在一般重新识别任务的训练中利用大量负样本。该框架的设计灵感来自Momentum Contrast (MoCo)，它使用字典来存储当前和过去的批次来构建大量编码样本。由于我们发现使用过去的正样本效率较低，这可能与当前正样本形成的编码特征属性高度不一致，因此MoReID被设计为仅使用字典中存储的大量负样本。然而，如果我们使用广泛使用的 Triplet loss 来训练模型，即仅使用一个样本来表示一组正/负样本，则很难有效地利用 MoReID 框架获取的扩大的负样本集。为了最大限度地利用扩大的负样本集的优势，我们新引入了硬距离弹性损失（HE loss），它能够使用多个硬样本来表示大量样本。我们的实验表明，MoReID 框架提供的大量负样本仅在 HE 损失的情况下即可满容量利用，在三个 re-ID 基准（VeRi-776、Market-1501 和 VeRi-Wild）上实现了最先进的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MoReID的重新识别框架，通过引入Hard-distance Elastic损失（HE损失）充分利用大量负样本，提升行人重识别任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在利用大量负样本时效果有限，且Triplet损失无法有效处理扩展后的负样本集，需设计新方法以最大化负样本的利用价值。
AI.method: 基于MoCo框架构建MoReID，仅存储负样本并设计HE损失，通过多硬样本对比学习优化特征表示，替代传统单样本对比方式。
AI.result: 在VeRi-776、Market-1501和VeRi-Wild三个基准数据集上达到当时最先进的准确率。
AI.conclusion: HE损失能够有效利用MoReID框架提供的大规模负样本集，显著提升行人重识别的准确率。

motivation: 传统方法在利用大量负样本时效果有限，且Triplet损失无法有效处理扩展后的负样本集，需设计新方法以最大化负样本的利用价值。
method: 基于MoCo框架构建MoReID，仅存储负样本并设计HE损失，通过多硬样本对比学习优化特征表示，替代传统单样本对比方式。
result: 在VeRi-776、Market-1501和VeRi-Wild三个基准数据集上达到当时最先进的准确率。
conclusion: HE损失能够有效利用MoReID框架提供的大规模负样本集，显著提升行人重识别的准确率。
search_text: Negative Samples are at Large: Leveraging Hard-distance Elastic Loss for Re-identification 负样本大量存在：利用硬距离弹性损失进行重新识别 We present a Momentum Re-identification (MoReID) framework that can leverage a very large number of negative samples in training for general re-identification task. The design of this framework is inspired by Momentum Contrast (MoCo), which uses a dictionary to store current and past batches to build a large set of encoded samples. As we find it less effective to use past positive samples which may be highly inconsistent to the encoded feature property formed with the current positive samples, MoReID is designed to use only a large number of negative samples stored in the dictionary. However, if we train the model using the widely used Triplet loss that uses only one sample to represent a set of positive/negative samples, it is hard to effectively leverage the enlarged set of negative samples acquired by the MoReID framework. To maximize the advantage of using the scaled-up negative sample set, we newly introduce Hard-distance Elastic loss (HE loss), which is capable of using more than one hard sample to represent a large number of samples. Our experiments demonstrate that a large number of negative samples provided by MoReID framework can be utilized at full capacity only with the HE loss, achieving the state-of-the-art accuracy on three re-ID benchmarks, VeRi-776, Market-1501, and VeRi-Wild. 我们提出了一个动量重新识别（MoReID）框架，可以在一般重新识别任务的训练中利用大量负样本。该框架的设计灵感来自Momentum Contrast (MoCo)，它使用字典来存储当前和过去的批次来构建大量编码样本。由于我们发现使用过去的正样本效率较低，这可能与当前正样本形成的编码特征属性高度不一致，因此MoReID被设计为仅使用字典中存储的大量负样本。然而，如果我们使用广泛使用的 Triplet loss 来训练模型，即仅使用一个样本来表示一组正/负样本，则很难有效地利用 MoReID 框架获取的扩大的负样本集。为了最大限度地利用扩大的负样本集的优势，我们新引入了硬距离弹性损失（HE loss），它能够使用多个硬样本来表示大量样本。我们的实验表明，MoReID 框架提供的大量负样本仅在 HE 损失的情况下即可满容量利用，在三个 re-ID 基准（VeRi-776、Market-1501 和 VeRi-Wild）上实现了最先进的精度。 本文提出一种名为MoReID的重新识别框架，通过引入Hard-distance Elastic损失（HE损失）充分利用大量负样本，提升行人重识别任务的性能。 Hyungtae Lee,Sungmin Eum,Heesung Kwon cs.CV

authors_text: Tamas Matuszka,Daniel Kozma
title: A Novel Neural Network Training Method for Autonomous Driving Using Semi-Pseudo-Labels and 3D Data Augmentations
title_zh: 使用半伪标签和 3D 数据增强的新型自动驾驶神经网络训练方法
abstract: Training neural networks to perform 3D object detection for autonomous driving requires a large amount of diverse annotated data. However, obtaining training data with sufficient quality and quantity is expensive and sometimes impossible due to human and sensor constraints. Therefore, a novel solution is needed for extending current training methods to overcome this limitation and enable accurate 3D object detection. Our solution for the above-mentioned problem combines semi-pseudo-labeling and novel 3D augmentations. For demonstrating the applicability of the proposed method, we have designed a convolutional neural network for 3D object detection which can significantly increase the detection range in comparison with the training data distribution.
summary: Training neural networks to perform 3D object detection for autonomous driving requires a large amount of diverse annotated data. However, obtaining training data with sufficient quality and quantity is expensive and sometimes impossible due to human and sensor constraints. Therefore, a novel solution is needed for extending current training methods to overcome this limitation and enable accurate 3D object detection. Our solution for the above-mentioned problem combines semi-pseudo-labeling and novel 3D augmentations. For demonstrating the applicability of the proposed method, we have designed a convolutional neural network for 3D object detection which can significantly increase the detection range in comparison with the training data distribution.
abstract_zh: 训练神经网络来执行自动驾驶的 3D 对象检测需要大量不同的注释数据。然而，由于人力和传感器的限制，获得足够质量和数量的训练数据成本高昂，有时甚至是不可能的。因此，需要一种新颖的解决方案来扩展当前的训练方法，以克服这一限制并实现准确的 3D 对象检测。我们针对上述问题的解决方案结合了半伪标记和新颖的 3D 增强。为了证明所提出方法的适用性，我们设计了一个用于 3D 对象检测的卷积神经网络，与训练数据分布相比，它可以显着增加检测范围。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合半伪标签与3D数据增强的神经网络训练方法，用于提升自动驾驶场景下的3D物体检测性能。
AI.motivation: 高质量3D标注数据获取成本高且受限于传感器与人力，现有训练方法难以满足自动驾驶系统对多样化数据的需求。
AI.method: 融合半伪标签生成策略与创新性3D数据增强技术，并设计针对性卷积神经网络架构。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著扩展了检测器的有效探测范围，优于传统训练数据分布下的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过数据增强与伪标签协同机制，有效缓解了标注数据不足问题，为自动驾驶3D检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Qianyu Zhou,Ke-Yue Zhang,Taiping Yao,Ran Yi,Shouhong Ding,Lizhuang Ma
title: Adaptive Mixture of Experts Learning for Generalizable Face Anti-Spoofing
title_zh: 用于泛化人脸反欺骗的专家自适应混合学习
abstract: With various face presentation attacks emerging continually, face anti-spoofing (FAS) approaches based on domain generalization (DG) have drawn growing attention. Existing DG-based FAS approaches always capture the domain-invariant features for generalizing on the various unseen domains. However, they neglect individual source domains' discriminative characteristics and diverse domain-specific information of the unseen domains, and the trained model is not sufficient to be adapted to various unseen domains. To address this issue, we propose an Adaptive Mixture of Experts Learning (AMEL) framework, which exploits the domain-specific information to adaptively establish the link among the seen source domains and unseen target domains to further improve the generalization. Concretely, Domain-Specific Experts (DSE) are designed to investigate discriminative and unique domain-specific features as a complement to common domain-invariant features. Moreover, Dynamic Expert Aggregation (DEA) is proposed to adaptively aggregate the complementary information of each source expert based on the domain relevance to the unseen target domain. And combined with meta-learning, these modules work collaboratively to adaptively aggregate meaningful domain-specific information for the various unseen target domains. Extensive experiments and visualizations demonstrate the effectiveness of our method against the state-of-the-art competitors.
summary: With various face presentation attacks emerging continually, face anti-spoofing (FAS) approaches based on domain generalization (DG) have drawn growing attention. Existing DG-based FAS approaches always capture the domain-invariant features for generalizing on the various unseen domains. However, they neglect individual source domains' discriminative characteristics and diverse domain-specific information of the unseen domains, and the trained model is not sufficient to be adapted to various unseen domains. To address this issue, we propose an Adaptive Mixture of Experts Learning (AMEL) framework, which exploits the domain-specific information to adaptively establish the link among the seen source domains and unseen target domains to further improve the generalization. Concretely, Domain-Specific Experts (DSE) are designed to investigate discriminative and unique domain-specific features as a complement to common domain-invariant features. Moreover, Dynamic Expert Aggregation (DEA) is proposed to adaptively aggregate the complementary information of each source expert based on the domain relevance to the unseen target domain. And combined with meta-learning, these modules work collaboratively to adaptively aggregate meaningful domain-specific information for the various unseen target domains. Extensive experiments and visualizations demonstrate the effectiveness of our method against the state-of-the-art competitors.
abstract_zh: 随着各种人脸呈现攻击的不断出现，基于域泛化（DG）的人脸反欺骗（FAS）方法引起了越来越多的关注。现有的基于 DG 的 FAS 方法总是捕获域不变的特征，以便在各种不可见的域上进行泛化。然而，他们忽略了各个源域的判别特征和未见域的不同域特定信息，并且训练后的模型不足以适应各种未见域。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种自适应专家学习混合（AMEL）框架，该框架利用特定领域的信息来自适应地建立已见源域和未见目标域之间的链接，以进一步提高泛化能力。具体来说，特定领域专家（DSE）旨在研究有区别的和独特的特定领域特征，作为常见领域不变特征的补充。此外，动态专家聚合（DEA）被提出，根据与未见过的目标域的域相关性，自适应地聚合每个源专家的补充信息。与元学习相结合，这些模块协同工作，为各种看不见的目标领域自适应地聚合有意义的特定领域信息。大量的实验和可视化证明了我们的方法相对于最先进的竞争对手的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应专家混合学习框架，用于提高通用性面部反欺骗的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于领域泛化的面部反欺骗方法忽视了源域的判别特征和未见域的多样化领域特定信息，导致模型难以适应各种未见域。
AI.method: 提出了一种自适应专家混合学习（AMEL）框架，包括领域特定专家（DSE）和动态专家聚合（DEA）模块，并结合元学习以自适应地聚合有意义的领域特定信息。
AI.result: 广泛的实验和可视化结果表明，该方法在与最先进的竞争者相比时表现出色。
AI.conclusion: AMEL框架通过有效利用领域特定信息和动态聚合策略，显著提升了面部反欺骗模型在未见域中的泛化能力。

authors_text: Haipeng Xiong,Angela Yao
title: Discrete-Constrained Regression for Local Counting Models
title_zh: 局部计数模型的离散约束回归
abstract: Local counts, or the number of objects in a local area, is a continuous value by nature. Yet recent state-of-the-art methods show that formulating counting as a classification task performs better than regression. Through a series of experiments on carefully controlled synthetic data, we show that this counter-intuitive result is caused by imprecise ground truth local counts. Factors such as biased dot annotations and incorrectly matched Gaussian kernels used to generate ground truth counts introduce deviations from the true local counts. Standard continuous regression is highly sensitive to these errors, explaining the performance gap between classification and regression. To mitigate the sensitivity, we loosen the regression formulation from a continuous scale to a discrete ordering and propose a novel discrete-constrained (DC) regression. Applied to crowd counting, DC-regression is more accurate than both classification and standard regression on three public benchmarks. A similar advantage also holds for the age estimation task, verifying the overall effectiveness of DC-regression.
summary: Local counts, or the number of objects in a local area, is a continuous value by nature. Yet recent state-of-the-art methods show that formulating counting as a classification task performs better than regression. Through a series of experiments on carefully controlled synthetic data, we show that this counter-intuitive result is caused by imprecise ground truth local counts. Factors such as biased dot annotations and incorrectly matched Gaussian kernels used to generate ground truth counts introduce deviations from the true local counts. Standard continuous regression is highly sensitive to these errors, explaining the performance gap between classification and regression. To mitigate the sensitivity, we loosen the regression formulation from a continuous scale to a discrete ordering and propose a novel discrete-constrained (DC) regression. Applied to crowd counting, DC-regression is more accurate than both classification and standard regression on three public benchmarks. A similar advantage also holds for the age estimation task, verifying the overall effectiveness of DC-regression.
abstract_zh: 局部计数或局部区域中的对象数量本质上是连续值。然而，最近最先进的方法表明，将计数制定为分类任务比回归表现更好。通过对仔细控制的合成数据进行的一系列实验，我们表明这种违反直觉的结果是由不精确的地面真实本地计数引起的。用于生成地面实况计数的偏差点注释和不正确匹配的高斯核等因素会导致与真实局部计数的偏差。标准连续回归对这些错误高度敏感，这解释了分类和回归之间的性能差距。为了减轻敏感性，我们将回归公式从连续尺度放宽为离散排序，并提出了一种新颖的离散约束（DC）回归。应用于人群计数时，DC 回归在三个公共基准上比分类和标准回归更准确。类似的优势也适用于年龄估计任务，验证 DC 回归的整体有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出离散约束回归（DC回归）方法，解决局部计数任务中因地面真实数据不精确导致的回归性能问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将局部计数作为分类任务表现优于回归，但未明确原因。作者发现地面真实数据存在标注偏差和高斯核匹配错误，导致连续回归敏感度高，从而提出离散约束回归方案。
AI.method: 将回归问题从连续尺度转化为离散排序，设计离散约束回归（DC回归）框架，降低对地面真实数据误差的敏感性。
AI.result: DC回归在三个公共人群计数基准测试中优于分类和标准回归，在年龄估计任务中同样表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 离散约束回归通过适应数据误差特性，在局部计数相关任务中具有更优的鲁棒性和准确性。

search_text: Discrete-Constrained Regression for Local Counting Models 局部计数模型的离散约束回归 Local counts, or the number of objects in a local area, is a continuous value by nature. Yet recent state-of-the-art methods show that formulating counting as a classification task performs better than regression. Through a series of experiments on carefully controlled synthetic data, we show that this counter-intuitive result is caused by imprecise ground truth local counts. Factors such as biased dot annotations and incorrectly matched Gaussian kernels used to generate ground truth counts introduce deviations from the true local counts. Standard continuous regression is highly sensitive to these errors, explaining the performance gap between classification and regression. To mitigate the sensitivity, we loosen the regression formulation from a continuous scale to a discrete ordering and propose a novel discrete-constrained (DC) regression. Applied to crowd counting, DC-regression is more accurate than both classification and standard regression on three public benchmarks. A similar advantage also holds for the age estimation task, verifying the overall effectiveness of DC-regression. 局部计数或局部区域中的对象数量本质上是连续值。然而，最近最先进的方法表明，将计数制定为分类任务比回归表现更好。通过对仔细控制的合成数据进行的一系列实验，我们表明这种违反直觉的结果是由不精确的地面真实本地计数引起的。用于生成地面实况计数的偏差点注释和不正确匹配的高斯核等因素会导致与真实局部计数的偏差。标准连续回归对这些错误高度敏感，这解释了分类和回归之间的性能差距。为了减轻敏感性，我们将回归公式从连续尺度放宽为离散排序，并提出了一种新颖的离散约束（DC）回归。应用于人群计数时，DC 回归在三个公共基准上比分类和标准回归更准确。类似的优势也适用于年龄估计任务，验证 DC 回归的整体有效性。 本文提出离散约束回归（DC回归）方法，解决局部计数任务中因地面真实数据不精确导致的回归性能问题。 Haipeng Xiong,Angela Yao cs.CV

authors_text: Qiaoyue Tang,Yangzhe Kong,Lemeng Pan,Choonmeng Lee
title: Learning to Solve Soft-Constrained Vehicle Routing Problems with Lagrangian Relaxation
title_zh: 学习用拉格朗日松弛法解决软约束车辆路径问题
abstract: Vehicle Routing Problems (VRPs) in real-world applications often come with various constraints, therefore bring additional computational challenges to exact solution methods or heuristic search approaches. The recent idea to learn heuristic move patterns from sample data has become increasingly promising to reduce solution developing costs. However, using learning-based approaches to address more types of constrained VRP remains a challenge. The difficulty lies in controlling for constraint violations while searching for optimal solutions. To overcome this challenge, we propose a Reinforcement Learning based method to solve soft-constrained VRPs by incorporating the Lagrangian relaxation technique and using constrained policy optimization. We apply the method on three common types of VRPs, the Travelling Salesman Problem with Time Windows (TSPTW), the Capacitated VRP (CVRP) and the Capacitated VRP with Time Windows (CVRPTW), to show the generalizability of the proposed method. After comparing to existing RL-based methods and open-source heuristic solvers, we demonstrate its competitive performance in finding solutions with a good balance in travel distance, constraint violations and inference speed.
summary: Vehicle Routing Problems (VRPs) in real-world applications often come with various constraints, therefore bring additional computational challenges to exact solution methods or heuristic search approaches. The recent idea to learn heuristic move patterns from sample data has become increasingly promising to reduce solution developing costs. However, using learning-based approaches to address more types of constrained VRP remains a challenge. The difficulty lies in controlling for constraint violations while searching for optimal solutions. To overcome this challenge, we propose a Reinforcement Learning based method to solve soft-constrained VRPs by incorporating the Lagrangian relaxation technique and using constrained policy optimization. We apply the method on three common types of VRPs, the Travelling Salesman Problem with Time Windows (TSPTW), the Capacitated VRP (CVRP) and the Capacitated VRP with Time Windows (CVRPTW), to show the generalizability of the proposed method. After comparing to existing RL-based methods and open-source heuristic solvers, we demonstrate its competitive performance in finding solutions with a good balance in travel distance, constraint violations and inference speed.
abstract_zh: 现实应用中的车辆路径问题（VRP）通常会受到各种约束，因此给精确求解方法或启发式搜索方法带来了额外的计算挑战。最近从样本数据中学习启发式移动模式的想法越来越有希望降低解决方案开发成本。然而，使用基于学习的方法来解决更多类型的受限 VRP 仍然是一个挑战。困难在于在寻找最佳解决方案时控制约束违规。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了一种基于强化学习的方法，通过结合拉格朗日松弛技术和使用约束策略优化来解决软约束 VRP。我们将该方法应用于三种常见类型的 VRP，即带时间窗的旅行商问题 (TSPTW)、Capacitated VRP (CVRP) 和带时间窗的 Capacitated VRP (CVRPTW)，以证明该方法的普适性。在与现有的基于强化学习的方法和开源启发式求解器进行比较后，我们展示了其在寻找在行进距离、约束违规和推理速度方面具有良好平衡的解决方案方面的竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的方法，结合拉格朗日松弛技术解决软约束车辆路径问题（VRP），并在多种VRP变体中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现实中的VRP存在多种约束，传统精确方法和启发式算法难以兼顾约束满足与计算效率，而现有基于学习的方法在处理软约束VRP时仍面临约束违规控制的挑战。
AI.method: 设计结合拉格朗日松弛技术和约束策略优化的强化学习框架，通过惩罚函数处理软约束，并在TSPTW、CVRP和CVRPTW三种问题中验证方法的泛化性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在路径距离、约束违规率和推理速度之间取得良好平衡，性能优于现有基于RL的方法和开源启发式求解器。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效解决了软约束VRP的优化难题，展示了强化学习与拉格朗日松弛结合在复杂约束问题中的应用潜力。

authors_text: Koki Tsubota,Hiroaki Akutsu,Kiyoharu Aizawa
title: Evaluating the Stability of Deep Image Quality Assessment With Respect to Image Scaling
title_zh: 评估深度图像质量评估在图像缩放方面的稳定性
comment: IEICE Transactions on Information and Systems (Letter)
comments: IEICE Transactions on Information and Systems (Letter)
abstract: Image quality assessment (IQA) is a fundamental metric for image processing tasks (e.g., compression). With full-reference IQAs, traditional IQAs, such as PSNR and SSIM, have been used. Recently, IQAs based on deep neural networks (deep IQAs), such as LPIPS and DISTS, have also been used. It is known that image scaling is inconsistent among deep IQAs, as some perform down-scaling as pre-processing, whereas others instead use the original image size. In this paper, we show that the image scale is an influential factor that affects deep IQA performance. We comprehensively evaluate four deep IQAs on the same five datasets, and the experimental results show that image scale significantly influences IQA performance. We found that the most appropriate image scale is often neither the default nor the original size, and the choice differs depending on the methods and datasets used. We visualized the stability and found that PieAPP is the most stable among the four deep IQAs.
summary: Image quality assessment (IQA) is a fundamental metric for image processing tasks (e.g., compression). With full-reference IQAs, traditional IQAs, such as PSNR and SSIM, have been used. Recently, IQAs based on deep neural networks (deep IQAs), such as LPIPS and DISTS, have also been used. It is known that image scaling is inconsistent among deep IQAs, as some perform down-scaling as pre-processing, whereas others instead use the original image size. In this paper, we show that the image scale is an influential factor that affects deep IQA performance. We comprehensively evaluate four deep IQAs on the same five datasets, and the experimental results show that image scale significantly influences IQA performance. We found that the most appropriate image scale is often neither the default nor the original size, and the choice differs depending on the methods and datasets used. We visualized the stability and found that PieAPP is the most stable among the four deep IQAs.
abstract_zh: 图像质量评估 (IQA) 是图像处理任务（例如压缩）的基本指标。在全参考 IQA 中，已使用传统 IQA，例如 PSNR 和 SSIM。最近，基于深度神经网络（deep IQAs）的IQA，例如LPIPS和DISTS也被使用。众所周知，深度 IQA 之间的图像缩放不一致，因为有些执行缩小作为预处理，而另一些则使用原始图像大小。在本文中，我们表明图像比例是影响深度 IQA 性能的影响因素。我们在相同的五个数据集上综合评估了四个深度 IQA，实验结果表明图像尺度显着影响 IQA 性能。我们发现最合适的图像比例通常既不是默认尺寸也不是原始尺寸，并且选择会根据所使用的方法和数据集而有所不同。我们将稳定性可视化，发现 PieAPP 是四个深度 IQA 中最稳定的。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了图像缩放对深度图像质量评估（IQA）稳定性的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有深度IQA方法在图像缩放处理上存在不一致性，导致评估结果可能受图像尺寸影响，需明确最佳缩放策略。
AI.method: 在五个数据集上对四种深度IQA方法（如PieAPP、LPIPS等）进行系统性测试，分析不同图像尺寸下的性能表现。
AI.result: 实验表明图像尺寸显著影响IQA性能，最佳尺寸通常既非默认值也非原始尺寸，且PieAPP在四种方法中稳定性最高。
AI.conclusion: 图像缩放是影响深度IQA性能的关键因素，需根据具体方法和数据集选择合适尺寸，PieAPP表现出更优的稳定性。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 图像缩放是影响深度IQA性能的关键因素，需根据具体方法和数据集选择合适尺寸，PieAPP表现出更优的稳定性。

search_text: Evaluating the Stability of Deep Image Quality Assessment With Respect to Image Scaling 评估深度图像质量评估在图像缩放方面的稳定性 Image quality assessment (IQA) is a fundamental metric for image processing tasks (e.g., compression). With full-reference IQAs, traditional IQAs, such as PSNR and SSIM, have been used. Recently, IQAs based on deep neural networks (deep IQAs), such as LPIPS and DISTS, have also been used. It is known that image scaling is inconsistent among deep IQAs, as some perform down-scaling as pre-processing, whereas others instead use the original image size. In this paper, we show that the image scale is an influential factor that affects deep IQA performance. We comprehensively evaluate four deep IQAs on the same five datasets, and the experimental results show that image scale significantly influences IQA performance. We found that the most appropriate image scale is often neither the default nor the original size, and the choice differs depending on the methods and datasets used. We visualized the stability and found that PieAPP is the most stable among the four deep IQAs. 图像质量评估 (IQA) 是图像处理任务（例如压缩）的基本指标。在全参考 IQA 中，已使用传统 IQA，例如 PSNR 和 SSIM。最近，基于深度神经网络（deep IQAs）的IQA，例如LPIPS和DISTS也被使用。众所周知，深度 IQA 之间的图像缩放不一致，因为有些执行缩小作为预处理，而另一些则使用原始图像大小。在本文中，我们表明图像比例是影响深度 IQA 性能的影响因素。我们在相同的五个数据集上综合评估了四个深度 IQA，实验结果表明图像尺度显着影响 IQA 性能。我们发现最合适的图像比例通常既不是默认尺寸也不是原始尺寸，并且选择会根据所使用的方法和数据集而有所不同。我们将稳定性可视化，发现 PieAPP 是四个深度 IQA 中最稳定的。 本文评估了图像缩放对深度图像质量评估（IQA）稳定性的影响。 Koki Tsubota,Hiroaki Akutsu,Kiyoharu Aizawa cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Rishubh Parihar,Ankit Dhiman,Tejan Karmali,R. Venkatesh Babu
title: Everything is There in Latent Space: Attribute Editing and Attribute Style Manipulation by StyleGAN Latent Space Exploration
title_zh: 潜在空间中存在一切：StyleGAN 潜在空间探索的属性编辑和属性样式操作
abstract: Unconstrained Image generation with high realism is now possible using recent Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). However, it is quite challenging to generate images with a given set of attributes. Recent methods use style-based GAN models to perform image editing by leveraging the semantic hierarchy present in the layers of the generator. We present Few-shot Latent-based Attribute Manipulation and Editing (FLAME), a simple yet effective framework to perform highly controlled image editing by latent space manipulation. Specifically, we estimate linear directions in the latent space (of a pre-trained StyleGAN) that controls semantic attributes in the generated image. In contrast to previous methods that either rely on large-scale attribute labeled datasets or attribute classifiers, FLAME uses minimal supervision of a few curated image pairs to estimate disentangled edit directions. FLAME can perform both individual and sequential edits with high precision on a diverse set of images while preserving identity. Further, we propose a novel task of Attribute Style Manipulation to generate diverse styles for attributes such as eyeglass and hair. We first encode a set of synthetic images of the same identity but having different attribute styles in the latent space to estimate an attribute style manifold. Sampling a new latent from this manifold will result in a new attribute style in the generated image. We propose a novel sampling method to sample latent from the manifold, enabling us to generate a diverse set of attribute styles beyond the styles present in the training set. FLAME can generate diverse attribute styles in a disentangled manner. We illustrate the superior performance of FLAME against previous image editing methods by extensive qualitative and quantitative comparisons. FLAME also generalizes well on multiple datasets such as cars and churches.
summary: Unconstrained Image generation with high realism is now possible using recent Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). However, it is quite challenging to generate images with a given set of attributes. Recent methods use style-based GAN models to perform image editing by leveraging the semantic hierarchy present in the layers of the generator. We present Few-shot Latent-based Attribute Manipulation and Editing (FLAME), a simple yet effective framework to perform highly controlled image editing by latent space manipulation. Specifically, we estimate linear directions in the latent space (of a pre-trained StyleGAN) that controls semantic attributes in the generated image. In contrast to previous methods that either rely on large-scale attribute labeled datasets or attribute classifiers, FLAME uses minimal supervision of a few curated image pairs to estimate disentangled edit directions. FLAME can perform both individual and sequential edits with high precision on a diverse set of images while preserving identity. Further, we propose a novel task of Attribute Style Manipulation to generate diverse styles for attributes such as eyeglass and hair. We first encode a set of synthetic images of the same identity but having different attribute styles in the latent space to estimate an attribute style manifold. Sampling a new latent from this manifold will result in a new attribute style in the generated image. We propose a novel sampling method to sample latent from the manifold, enabling us to generate a diverse set of attribute styles beyond the styles present in the training set. FLAME can generate diverse attribute styles in a disentangled manner. We illustrate the superior performance of FLAME against previous image editing methods by extensive qualitative and quantitative comparisons. FLAME also generalizes well on multiple datasets such as cars and churches.
abstract_zh: 现在，使用最新的生成对抗网络（GAN）可以生成具有高真实感的无约束图像。然而，生成具有给定属性集的图像非常具有挑战性。最近的方法使用基于样式的 GAN 模型，通过利用生成器各层中存在的语义层次结构来执行图像编辑。我们提出了少样本基于潜在的属性操作和编辑（FLAME），这是一个简单而有效的框架，可以通过潜在空间操作来执行高度控制的图像编辑。具体来说，我们估计（预训练的 StyleGAN 的）潜在空间中的线性方向，该方向控制生成图像中的语义属性。与之前依赖大规模属性标记数据集或属性分类器的方法相比，FLAME 使用对一些精选图像对的最小监督来估计解开的编辑方向。 FLAME 可以对一组不同的图像进行高精度的单独和连续编辑，同时保留身份。此外，我们提出了属性样式操作的新任务，为眼镜和头发等属性生成不同的样式。我们首先在潜在空间中对一组具有相同身份但具有不同属性风格的合成图像进行编码，以估计属性风格流形。从该流形中采样新的潜在变量将在生成的图像中产生新的属性样式。我们提出了一种新颖的采样方法来从流形中采样潜在的，使我们能够生成超出训练集中存在的样式的多样化属性样式。 FLAME可以以一种解开的方式生成多种属性样式。我们通过广泛的定性和定量比较来说明 FLAME 相对于以前的图像编辑方法的优越性能。 FLAME 还可以很好地概括汽车和教堂等多个数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FLAME框架，通过StyleGAN潜在空间探索实现高精度图像属性编辑与风格操控，仅需少量标注图像对即可生成多样化的属性风格。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖大规模标注数据集或属性分类器进行图像编辑，存在数据获取成本高、泛化能力弱的问题，需更高效且可控的编辑方法。
AI.method: 通过少量精心挑选的图像对估计潜在空间中的线性编辑方向，构建属性风格流形并提出新型采样方法，实现属性编辑与风格多样化生成。
AI.result: 在保持身份不变的前提下实现高精度单次及连续编辑，生成超出训练集风格范围的多样化属性样式，在Cars和Churches等数据集上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: FLAME通过潜在空间方向估计与流形采样方法，为属性编辑和风格迁移提供了高效、可控且泛化性强的新解决方案。
