authors_text: João G. Melo,Edna Barros
title: An Embedded Monocular Vision Approach for Ground-Aware Objects Detection and Position Estimation
title_zh: 用于地面感知物体检测和位置估计的嵌入式单目视觉方法
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures, submitted to RoboCup Symposium 2022
comments: 12 pages, 5 figures, submitted to RoboCup Symposium 2022
abstract: In the RoboCup Small Size League (SSL), teams are encouraged to propose solutions for executing basic soccer tasks inside the SSL field using only embedded sensing information. Thus, this work proposes an embedded monocular vision approach for detecting objects and estimating relative positions inside the soccer field. Prior knowledge from the environment is exploited by assuming objects lay on the ground, and the onboard camera has its position fixed on the robot. We implemented the proposed method on an NVIDIA Jetson Nano and employed SSD MobileNet v2 for 2D Object Detection with TensorRT optimization, detecting balls, robots, and goals with distances up to 3.5 meters. Ball localization evaluation shows that the proposed solution overcomes the currently used SSL vision system for positions closer than 1 meter to the onboard camera with a Root Mean Square Error of 14.37 millimeters. In addition, the proposed method achieves real-time performance with an average processing speed of 30 frames per second.
summary: In the RoboCup Small Size League (SSL), teams are encouraged to propose solutions for executing basic soccer tasks inside the SSL field using only embedded sensing information. Thus, this work proposes an embedded monocular vision approach for detecting objects and estimating relative positions inside the soccer field. Prior knowledge from the environment is exploited by assuming objects lay on the ground, and the onboard camera has its position fixed on the robot. We implemented the proposed method on an NVIDIA Jetson Nano and employed SSD MobileNet v2 for 2D Object Detection with TensorRT optimization, detecting balls, robots, and goals with distances up to 3.5 meters. Ball localization evaluation shows that the proposed solution overcomes the currently used SSL vision system for positions closer than 1 meter to the onboard camera with a Root Mean Square Error of 14.37 millimeters. In addition, the proposed method achieves real-time performance with an average processing speed of 30 frames per second.
abstract_zh: 在 RoboCup 小规模联赛 (SSL) 中，鼓励球队提出仅使用嵌入式传感信息在 SSL 场地内执行基本足球任务的解决方案。因此，这项工作提出了一种嵌入式单目视觉方法，用于检测物体并估计足球场内的相对位置。通过假设物体位于地面上来利用来自环境的先验知识，并且机载摄像头的位置固定在机器人上。我们在 NVIDIA Jetson Nano 上实现了所提出的方法，并采用 SSD MobileNet v2 通过 TensorRT 优化进行 2D 对象检测，检测距离长达 3.5 米的球、机器人和目标。球定位评估表明，所提出的解决方案在距离机载摄像头不到 1 米的位置上克服了当前使用的 SSL 视觉系统，均方根误差为 14.37 毫米。此外，该方法实现了平均处理速度为每秒30帧的实时性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种嵌入式单目视觉方法，用于在RoboCup小型组足球场中检测地面物体并估计其相对位置。
AI.motivation: RoboCup小型组要求仅使用嵌入式传感器完成基础足球任务，现有视觉系统存在精度和实时性不足的问题。
AI.method: 利用固定在机器人上的单目摄像头，结合SSD MobileNet v2模型与TensorRT优化，通过地面物体先验知识实现目标检测与距离估计。
AI.result: 在1米内球体定位的均方根误差为14.37毫米，优于现有系统，且达到30帧/秒的实时处理速度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在嵌入式平台上实现了高精度、实时的地面物体检测，为RoboCup小型组提供了有效的视觉解决方案。

We implemented the proposed method on an NVIDIA Jetson Nano and employed SSD MobileNet v2 for 2D Object Detection with TensorRT optimization, detecting balls, robots, and goals with distances up to 3.5 meters. Ball localization evaluation shows that the proposed solution overcomes the currently used SSL vision system for positions closer than 1 meter to the onboard camera with a Root Mean Square Error of 14.37 millimeters. In addition, the proposed method achieves real-time performance with an average processing speed of 30 frames per second. 在 RoboCup 小规模联赛 (SSL) 中，鼓励球队提出仅使用嵌入式传感信息在 SSL 场地内执行基本足球任务的解决方案。因此，这项工作提出了一种嵌入式单目视觉方法，用于检测物体并估计足球场内的相对位置。通过假设物体位于地面上来利用来自环境的先验知识，并且机载摄像头的位置固定在机器人上。我们在 NVIDIA Jetson Nano 上实现了所提出的方法，并采用 SSD MobileNet v2 通过 TensorRT 优化进行 2D 对象检测，检测距离长达 3.5 米的球、机器人和目标。球定位评估表明，所提出的解决方案在距离机载摄像头不到 1 米的位置上克服了当前使用的 SSL 视觉系统，均方根误差为 14.37 毫米。此外，该方法实现了平均处理速度为每秒30帧的实时性能。 本文提出了一种嵌入式单目视觉方法，用于在RoboCup小型组足球场中检测地面物体并估计其相对位置。 João G. Melo,Edna Barros cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: M. Shahriari,D. Pardo,S. Kargaran,T. Teijeiro
title: Automated machine learning for borehole resistivity measurements
title_zh: 用于钻孔电阻率测量的自动化机器学习
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) offer a real-time solution for the inversion of borehole resistivity measurements to approximate forward and inverse operators. It is possible to use extremely large DNNs to approximate the operators, but it demands a considerable training time. Moreover, evaluating the network after training also requires a significant amount of memory and processing power. In addition, we may overfit the model. In this work, we propose a scoring function that accounts for the accuracy and size of the DNNs compared to a reference DNN that provides a good approximation for the operators. Using this scoring function, we use DNN architecture search algorithms to obtain a quasi-optimal DNN smaller than the reference network; hence, it requires less computational effort during training and evaluation. The quasi-optimal DNN delivers comparable accuracy to the original large DNN.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) offer a real-time solution for the inversion of borehole resistivity measurements to approximate forward and inverse operators. It is possible to use extremely large DNNs to approximate the operators, but it demands a considerable training time. Moreover, evaluating the network after training also requires a significant amount of memory and processing power. In addition, we may overfit the model. In this work, we propose a scoring function that accounts for the accuracy and size of the DNNs compared to a reference DNN that provides a good approximation for the operators. Using this scoring function, we use DNN architecture search algorithms to obtain a quasi-optimal DNN smaller than the reference network; hence, it requires less computational effort during training and evaluation. The quasi-optimal DNN delivers comparable accuracy to the original large DNN.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 为钻孔电阻率测量反演提供实时解决方案，以近似正向和逆算子。可以使用极大的 DNN 来逼近算子，但需要相当长的训练时间。此外，训练后评估网络还需要大量的内存和处理能力。此外，我们可能会过度拟合模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个评分函数，该函数与参考 DNN 相比，考虑了 DNN 的准确性和大小，为算子提供了良好的近似值。利用这个评分函数，我们使用DNN架构搜索算法来获得比参考网络更小的准最优DNN；因此，在训练和评估过程中需要较少的计算工作。准最优 DNN 提供与原始大型 DNN 相当的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动化机器学习方法，通过优化深度神经网络（DNN）的结构，减少计算资源消耗，同时保持对井孔电阻率测量数据的高精度处理能力。
AI.motivation: 传统大型DNN在井孔电阻率测量反演中存在训练时间长、计算资源需求高及过拟合风险，需在模型精度与效率间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 设计结合精度与模型大小的评分函数，利用DNN架构搜索算法寻找接近最优的轻量化网络结构。
AI.result: 获得的准最优DNN在保持与原始大模型相近精度的同时，显著降低训练和评估阶段的计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实时井孔电阻率测量提供了高效且实用的DNN解决方案，兼顾模型性能与计算效率。

authors_text: Sunayana Rane,Mira L. Nencheva,Zeyu Wang,Casey Lew-Williams,Olga Russakovsky,Thomas L. Griffiths
title: Predicting Word Learning in Children from the Performance of Computer Vision Systems
title_zh: 根据计算机视觉系统的性能预测儿童的单词学习
abstract: For human children as well as machine learning systems, a key challenge in learning a word is linking the word to the visual phenomena it describes. We explore this aspect of word learning by using the performance of computer vision systems as a proxy for the difficulty of learning a word from visual cues. We show that the age at which children acquire different categories of words is correlated with the performance of visual classification and captioning systems, over and above the expected effects of word frequency. The performance of the computer vision systems is correlated with human judgments of the concreteness of words, which are in turn a predictor of children's word learning, suggesting that these models are capturing the relationship between words and visual phenomena.
summary: For human children as well as machine learning systems, a key challenge in learning a word is linking the word to the visual phenomena it describes. We explore this aspect of word learning by using the performance of computer vision systems as a proxy for the difficulty of learning a word from visual cues. We show that the age at which children acquire different categories of words is correlated with the performance of visual classification and captioning systems, over and above the expected effects of word frequency. The performance of the computer vision systems is correlated with human judgments of the concreteness of words, which are in turn a predictor of children's word learning, suggesting that these models are capturing the relationship between words and visual phenomena.
abstract_zh: 对于人类儿童以及机器学习系统来说，学习单词的一个关键挑战是将单词与其描述的视觉现象联系起来。我们通过使用计算机视觉系统的性能作为从视觉线索学习单词的难度的代理来探索单词学习的这一方面。我们表明，儿童获得不同类别单词的年龄与视觉分类和字幕系统的性能相关，超出了单词频率的预期影响。计算机视觉系统的性能与人类对单词具体性的判断相关，而人类对单词具体性的判断又是儿童单词学习的预测因素，这表明这些模型正在捕捉单词和视觉现象之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过计算机视觉系统的性能预测儿童词汇学习难度，分析词类习得年龄与视觉系统表现的相关性。
AI.motivation: 人类儿童与机器学习系统在关联词汇与视觉现象时面临相似挑战，需探索客观指标预测儿童词汇学习难度。
AI.method: 以计算机视觉分类与图像描述系统性能为代理指标，分析不同词类习得年龄与系统表现的相关性，并控制词频变量。
AI.result: 儿童习得不同词类的年龄与视觉系统性能显著相关，且该关联独立于词频；系统性能与人类词具体性判断呈正相关。
AI.conclusion: 计算机视觉系统可有效反映词汇与视觉关联的难度，为儿童语言发展研究提供新的计算分析视角。

authors_text: Daniel Harnack,Julie Pivin-Bachler,Nicolás Navarro-Guerrero
title: Quantifying the Effect of Feedback Frequency in Interactive Reinforcement Learning for Robotic Tasks
title_zh: 量化机器人任务交互式强化学习中反馈频率的影响
comment: Neural Computing and Applications (2022). Special Issue on Human-aligned Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Agents and Robots
comments: Neural Computing and Applications (2022). Special Issue on Human-aligned Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Agents and Robots
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become widely adopted in robot control. Despite many successes, one major persisting problem can be very low data efficiency. One solution is interactive feedback, which has been shown to speed up RL considerably. As a result, there is an abundance of different strategies, which are, however, primarily tested on discrete grid-world and small scale optimal control scenarios. In the literature, there is no consensus about which feedback frequency is optimal or at which time the feedback is most beneficial. To resolve these discrepancies we isolate and quantify the effect of feedback frequency in robotic tasks with continuous state and action spaces. The experiments encompass inverse kinematics learning for robotic manipulator arms of different complexity. We show that seemingly contradictory reported phenomena occur at different complexity levels. Furthermore, our results suggest that no single ideal feedback frequency exists. Rather that feedback frequency should be changed as the agent's proficiency in the task increases.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become widely adopted in robot control. Despite many successes, one major persisting problem can be very low data efficiency. One solution is interactive feedback, which has been shown to speed up RL considerably. As a result, there is an abundance of different strategies, which are, however, primarily tested on discrete grid-world and small scale optimal control scenarios. In the literature, there is no consensus about which feedback frequency is optimal or at which time the feedback is most beneficial. To resolve these discrepancies we isolate and quantify the effect of feedback frequency in robotic tasks with continuous state and action spaces. The experiments encompass inverse kinematics learning for robotic manipulator arms of different complexity. We show that seemingly contradictory reported phenomena occur at different complexity levels. Furthermore, our results suggest that no single ideal feedback frequency exists. Rather that feedback frequency should be changed as the agent's proficiency in the task increases.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）已广泛应用于机器人控制中。尽管取得了许多成功，但一个主要的持续问题可能是数据效率非常低。一种解决方案是交互式反馈，它已被证明可以大大加快强化学习速度。因此，存在大量不同的策略，但这些策略主要在离散网格世界和小规模最优控制场景中进行测试。在文献中，对于哪种反馈频率是最佳的或者何时反馈是最有益的还没有达成共识。为了解决这些差异，我们隔离并量化了具有连续状态和动作空间的机器人任务中反馈频率的影响。这些实验包括不同复杂度的机器人机械臂的逆运动学学习。我们表明，看似矛盾的报告现象发生在不同的复杂程度。此外，我们的结果表明不存在单一的理想反馈频率。相反，反馈频率应该随着代理对任务的熟练程度的提高而改变。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在量化交互式强化学习中反馈频率对机器人任务的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管强化学习在机器人控制中广泛应用，但数据效率低下仍是主要问题。现有反馈策略多在简单场景测试，缺乏对反馈频率最优值的共识。
AI.method: 通过连续状态和动作空间的机器人机械臂逆运动学学习实验，测试不同复杂度任务中多种反馈频率的效果。
AI.result: 实验显示不同复杂度任务中存在矛盾现象，且不存在单一最佳反馈频率，需根据任务熟练度动态调整频率。
AI.conclusion: 反馈频率应随智能体任务熟练度变化而调整，而非采用固定频率策略。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文旨在量化交互式强化学习中反馈频率对机器人任务的影响。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管强化学习在机器人控制中广泛应用，但数据效率低下仍是主要问题。现有反馈策略多在简单场景测试，缺乏对反馈频率最优值的共识。
ai_content.method: 通过连续状态和动作空间的机器人机械臂逆运动学学习实验，测试不同复杂度任务中多种反馈频率的效果。
ai_content.result: 实验显示不同复杂度任务中存在矛盾现象，且不存在单一最佳反馈频率，需根据任务熟练度动态调整频率。
ai_content.conclusion: 反馈频率应随智能体任务熟练度变化而调整，而非采用固定频率策略。

search_text: Quantifying the Effect of Feedback Frequency in Interactive Reinforcement Learning for Robotic Tasks 量化机器人任务交互式强化学习中反馈频率的影响 Reinforcement learning (RL) has become widely adopted in robot control. Despite many successes, one major persisting problem can be very low data efficiency. One solution is interactive feedback, which has been shown to speed up RL considerably. As a result, there is an abundance of different strategies, which are, however, primarily tested on discrete grid-world and small scale optimal control scenarios. In the literature, there is no consensus about which feedback frequency is optimal or at which time the feedback is most beneficial. To resolve these discrepancies we isolate and quantify the effect of feedback frequency in robotic tasks with continuous state and action spaces. The experiments encompass inverse kinematics learning for robotic manipulator arms of different complexity. We show that seemingly contradictory reported phenomena occur at different complexity levels. Furthermore, our results suggest that no single ideal feedback frequency exists. Rather that feedback frequency should be changed as the agent's proficiency in the task increases. 强化学习（RL）已广泛应用于机器人控制中。尽管取得了许多成功，但一个主要的持续问题可能是数据效率非常低。一种解决方案是交互式反馈，它已被证明可以大大加快强化学习速度。因此，存在大量不同的策略，但这些策略主要在离散网格世界和小规模最优控制场景中进行测试。在文献中，对于哪种反馈频率是最佳的或者何时反馈是最有益的还没有达成共识。为了解决这些差异，我们隔离并量化了具有连续状态和动作空间的机器人任务中反馈频率的影响。这些实验包括不同复杂度的机器人机械臂的逆运动学学习。我们表明，看似矛盾的报告现象发生在不同的复杂程度。此外，我们的结果表明不存在单一的理想反馈频率。相反，反馈频率应该随着代理对任务的熟练程度的提高而改变。 该论文旨在量化交互式强化学习中反馈频率对机器人任务的影响。 Daniel Harnack,Julie Pivin-Bachler,Nicolás Navarro-Guerrero cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Chenyu Yang,Wanrong He,Yingqing Xu,Yang Gao
title: EleGANt: Exquisite and Locally Editable GAN for Makeup Transfer
title_zh: EleGANt：用于化妆转移的精致且本地可编辑的 GAN
abstract: Most existing methods view makeup transfer as transferring color distributions of different facial regions and ignore details such as eye shadows and blushes. Besides, they only achieve controllable transfer within predefined fixed regions. This paper emphasizes the transfer of makeup details and steps towards more flexible controls. To this end, we propose Exquisite and locally editable GAN for makeup transfer (EleGANt). It encodes facial attributes into pyramidal feature maps to preserves high-frequency information. It uses attention to extract makeup features from the reference and adapt them to the source face, and we introduce a novel Sow-Attention Module that applies attention within shifted overlapped windows to reduce the computational cost. Moreover, EleGANt is the first to achieve customized local editing within arbitrary areas by corresponding editing on the feature maps. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EleGANt generates realistic makeup faces with exquisite details and achieves state-of-the-art performance. The code is available at https://github.com/Chenyu-Yang-2000/EleGANt.
summary: Most existing methods view makeup transfer as transferring color distributions of different facial regions and ignore details such as eye shadows and blushes. Besides, they only achieve controllable transfer within predefined fixed regions. This paper emphasizes the transfer of makeup details and steps towards more flexible controls. To this end, we propose Exquisite and locally editable GAN for makeup transfer (EleGANt). It encodes facial attributes into pyramidal feature maps to preserves high-frequency information. It uses attention to extract makeup features from the reference and adapt them to the source face, and we introduce a novel Sow-Attention Module that applies attention within shifted overlapped windows to reduce the computational cost. Moreover, EleGANt is the first to achieve customized local editing within arbitrary areas by corresponding editing on the feature maps. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EleGANt generates realistic makeup faces with exquisite details and achieves state-of-the-art performance. The code is available at https://github.com/Chenyu-Yang-2000/EleGANt.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有方法将化妆转移视为转移不同面部区域的颜色分布，而忽略眼影和腮红等细节。此外，它们只能在预定的固定区域内实现可控传输。本文强调化妆细节的转移和更灵活控制的步骤。为此，我们提出了精致且可本地编辑的化妆转移 GAN（EleGANt）。它将面部属性编码为金字塔特征图以保留高频信息。它使用注意力从参考中提取化妆特征并将其适应源面部，并且我们引入了一种新颖的 Sow-Attention 模块，该模块在移动的重叠窗口内应用注意力以减少计算成本。此外，EleGANt首次通过对特征图进行相应编辑，实现任意区域内的定制化本地编辑。大量实验表明，EleGANt 可以生成具有精致细节的逼真化妆脸，并达到最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/Chenyu-Yang-2000/EleGANt 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为EleGANt的生成对抗网络（GAN），用于实现更精细和局部可编辑的化妆迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在化妆迁移中仅关注颜色分布，忽略细节如眼影和腮红，且控制范围受限，需更灵活的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过金字塔特征图保留细节，使用注意力机制提取并适配妆容特征，引入Sow-Attention模块降低计算成本，并实现任意区域的局部编辑。
AI.result: 实验表明EleGANt生成的妆容效果真实细腻，达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: EleGANt首次实现任意区域的局部化妆编辑，提升了迁移的灵活性和细节表现。

authors_text: Shenhan Qian,Jiale Xu,Ziwei Liu,Liqian Ma,Shenghua Gao
title: UNIF: United Neural Implicit Functions for Clothed Human Reconstruction and Animation
title_zh: UNIF：用于穿衣人体重建和动画的联合神经隐式函数
abstract: We propose united implicit functions (UNIF), a part-based method for clothed human reconstruction and animation with raw scans and skeletons as the input. Previous part-based methods for human reconstruction rely on ground-truth part labels from SMPL and thus are limited to minimal-clothed humans. In contrast, our method learns to separate parts from body motions instead of part supervision, thus can be extended to clothed humans and other articulated objects. Our Partition-from-Motion is achieved by a bone-centered initialization, a bone limit loss, and a section normal loss that ensure stable part division even when the training poses are limited. We also present a minimal perimeter loss for SDF to suppress extra surfaces and part overlapping. Another core of our method is an adjacent part seaming algorithm that produces non-rigid deformations to maintain the connection between parts which significantly relieves the part-based artifacts. Under this algorithm, we further propose "Competing Parts", a method that defines blending weights by the relative position of a point to bones instead of the absolute position, avoiding the generalization problem of neural implicit functions with inverse LBS (linear blend skinning). We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method by clothed human body reconstruction and animation on the CAPE and the ClothSeq datasets.
summary: We propose united implicit functions (UNIF), a part-based method for clothed human reconstruction and animation with raw scans and skeletons as the input. Previous part-based methods for human reconstruction rely on ground-truth part labels from SMPL and thus are limited to minimal-clothed humans. In contrast, our method learns to separate parts from body motions instead of part supervision, thus can be extended to clothed humans and other articulated objects. Our Partition-from-Motion is achieved by a bone-centered initialization, a bone limit loss, and a section normal loss that ensure stable part division even when the training poses are limited. We also present a minimal perimeter loss for SDF to suppress extra surfaces and part overlapping. Another core of our method is an adjacent part seaming algorithm that produces non-rigid deformations to maintain the connection between parts which significantly relieves the part-based artifacts. Under this algorithm, we further propose "Competing Parts", a method that defines blending weights by the relative position of a point to bones instead of the absolute position, avoiding the generalization problem of neural implicit functions with inverse LBS (linear blend skinning). We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method by clothed human body reconstruction and animation on the CAPE and the ClothSeq datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了联合隐函数（UNIF），这是一种基于零件的方法，用于以原始扫描和骨骼作为输入进行穿着人体重建和动画。以前基于部件的人体重建方法依赖于 SMPL 的真实部件标签，因此仅限于穿着最少衣服的人类。相比之下，我们的方法学习将部分与身体运动分开，而不是部分监督，因此可以扩展到穿着衣服的人和其他铰接物体。我们的运动分区是通过以骨骼为中心的初始化、骨骼限制损失和部分正常损失来实现的，即使在训练姿势有限的情况下，也能确保稳定的部分划分。我们还提出了 SDF 的最小周长损失，以抑制额外的表面和零件重叠。我们方法的另一个核心是相邻零件接缝算法，该算法产生非刚性变形以维持零件之间的连接，从而显着减轻基于零件的伪影。在此算法下，我们进一步提出“Competing Parts”，一种通过点与骨骼的相对位置而不是绝对位置来定义混合权重的方法，避免了逆 LBS（线性混合蒙皮）神经隐式函数的泛化问题。我们通过在 CAPE 和 ClothSeq 数据集上的穿着人体重建和动画来证明我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经隐式函数的统一方法（UNIF），用于从原始扫描和骨骼数据中重建和动画化穿着衣物的人体。
AI.motivation: 传统基于部分的人体重建方法依赖SMPL的真值部分标签，仅适用于少衣人体，难以处理衣物遮挡。本文旨在无需部分监督的情况下，扩展至穿着衣物的人体及其他 articulated 物体。
AI.method: 通过骨中心初始化、骨限制损失和截面法线损失实现运动分割；引入SDF最小周长损失抑制多余表面，相邻部分缝合算法结合相对骨骼位置的'竞争部分'方法优化非刚性变形与权重分配。
AI.result: 在CAPE和ClothSeq数据集上实现了穿着人体的高质量重建与动画，有效缓解部分基方法的伪影问题。
AI.conclusion: UNIF通过运动驱动的部分分割与创新损失函数，突破了传统方法对部分标签的依赖，为复杂衣物下的人体建模提供了新思路。

Another core of our method is an adjacent part seaming algorithm that produces non-rigid deformations to maintain the connection between parts which significantly relieves the part-based artifacts. Under this algorithm, we further propose "Competing Parts", a method that defines blending weights by the relative position of a point to bones instead of the absolute position, avoiding the generalization problem of neural implicit functions with inverse LBS (linear blend skinning). We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method by clothed human body reconstruction and animation on the CAPE and the ClothSeq datasets. 我们提出了联合隐函数（UNIF），这是一种基于零件的方法，用于以原始扫描和骨骼作为输入进行穿着人体重建和动画。以前基于部件的人体重建方法依赖于 SMPL 的真实部件标签，因此仅限于穿着最少衣服的人类。相比之下，我们的方法学习将部分与身体运动分开，而不是部分监督，因此可以扩展到穿着衣服的人和其他铰接物体。我们的运动分区是通过以骨骼为中心的初始化、骨骼限制损失和部分正常损失来实现的，即使在训练姿势有限的情况下，也能确保稳定的部分划分。我们还提出了 SDF 的最小周长损失，以抑制额外的表面和零件重叠。我们方法的另一个核心是相邻零件接缝算法，该算法产生非刚性变形以维持零件之间的连接，从而显着减轻基于零件的伪影。在此算法下，我们进一步提出“Competing Parts”，一种通过点与骨骼的相对位置而不是绝对位置来定义混合权重的方法，避免了逆 LBS（线性混合蒙皮）神经隐式函数的泛化问题。我们通过在 CAPE 和 ClothSeq 数据集上的穿着人体重建和动画来证明我们方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于神经隐式函数的统一方法（UNIF），用于从原始扫描和骨骼数据中重建和动画化穿着衣物的人体。 Shenhan Qian,Jiale Xu,Ziwei Liu,Liqian Ma,Shenghua Gao cs.CV

authors_text: Arash Bateni,Matthew C. Chan,Ray Eitel-Porter
title: AI Fairness: from Principles to Practice
title_zh: 人工智能公平：从原则到实践
abstract: This paper summarizes and evaluates various approaches, methods, and techniques for pursuing fairness in artificial intelligence (AI) systems. It examines the merits and shortcomings of these measures and proposes practical guidelines for defining, measuring, and preventing bias in AI. In particular, it cautions against some of the simplistic, yet common, methods for evaluating bias in AI systems, and offers more sophisticated and effective alternatives. The paper also addresses widespread controversies and confusions in the field by providing a common language among different stakeholders of high-impact AI systems. It describes various trade-offs involving AI fairness, and provides practical recommendations for balancing them. It offers techniques for evaluating the costs and benefits of fairness targets, and defines the role of human judgment in setting these targets. This paper provides discussions and guidelines for AI practitioners, organization leaders, and policymakers, as well as various links to additional materials for a more technical audience. Numerous real-world examples are provided to clarify the concepts, challenges, and recommendations from a practical perspective.
summary: This paper summarizes and evaluates various approaches, methods, and techniques for pursuing fairness in artificial intelligence (AI) systems. It examines the merits and shortcomings of these measures and proposes practical guidelines for defining, measuring, and preventing bias in AI. It describes various trade-offs involving AI fairness, and provides practical recommendations for balancing them. It offers techniques for evaluating the costs and benefits of fairness targets, and defines the role of human judgment in setting these targets. This paper provides discussions and guidelines for AI practitioners, organization leaders, and policymakers, as well as various links to additional materials for a more technical audience. Numerous real-world examples are provided to clarify the concepts, challenges, and recommendations from a practical perspective.
abstract_zh: 本文总结并评估了在人工智能（AI）系统中追求公平性的各种途径、方法和技术。它研究了这些措施的优点和缺点，并提出了定义、衡量和防止人工智能偏见的实用指南。特别是，它警告不要使用一些简单但常见的评估人工智能系统偏差的方法，并提供更复杂和有效的替代方案。该论文还通过在高影响力人工智能系统的不同利益相关者之间提供通用语言来解决该领域广泛存在的争议和困惑。它描述了涉及人工智能公平性的各种权衡，并提供了平衡它们的实用建议。它提供了评估公平目标的成本和收益的技术，并定义了人类判断在设定这些目标中的作用。本文为人工智能从业者、组织领导者和政策制定者提供了讨论和指南，并为更多技术受众提供了附加材料的各种链接。提供了大量现实世界的例子，从实践的角度阐明概念、挑战和建议。

AI.tldr: 本文总结并评估了人工智能系统中追求公平性的各种方法，提出实用指南以定义、衡量和防止偏见，并提供更复杂的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 现有AI公平性方法存在缺陷且争议较大，需建立统一语言和实用框架以解决实际应用中的偏见问题。
AI.method: 通过分析现有方法的优缺点，结合实际案例与技术资料，提出改进的评估框架和平衡公平性权衡的策略。
AI.result: 提供了公平性目标的成本效益分析技术、跨利益相关者的通用语言及针对实践者的具体指导建议。
AI.conclusion: 需结合人类判断与系统化评估，在AI开发中实现公平性目标，同时平衡不同利益相关方的需求与技术限制。

authors_text: Andrey Rudenko,Luigi Palmieri,Wanting Huang,Achim J. Lilienthal,Kai O. Arras
title: The Atlas Benchmark: an Automated Evaluation Framework for Human Motion Prediction
title_zh: Atlas 基准：人体运动预测的自动评估框架
comment: Accepted to and will be presented at the IEEE RO-MAN 2022 conference
comments: Accepted to and will be presented at the IEEE RO-MAN 2022 conference
abstract: Human motion trajectory prediction, an essential task for autonomous systems in many domains, has been on the rise in recent years. With a multitude of new methods proposed by different communities, the lack of standardized benchmarks and objective comparisons is increasingly becoming a major limitation to assess progress and guide further research. Existing benchmarks are limited in their scope and flexibility to conduct relevant experiments and to account for contextual cues of agents and environments. In this paper we present Atlas, a benchmark to systematically evaluate human motion trajectory prediction algorithms in a unified framework. Atlas offers data preprocessing functions, hyperparameter optimization, comes with popular datasets and has the flexibility to setup and conduct underexplored yet relevant experiments to analyze a method's accuracy and robustness. In an example application of Atlas, we compare five popular model- and learning-based predictors and find that, when properly applied, early physics-based approaches are still remarkably competitive. Such results confirm the necessity of benchmarks like Atlas.
summary: Human motion trajectory prediction, an essential task for autonomous systems in many domains, has been on the rise in recent years. With a multitude of new methods proposed by different communities, the lack of standardized benchmarks and objective comparisons is increasingly becoming a major limitation to assess progress and guide further research. In this paper we present Atlas, a benchmark to systematically evaluate human motion trajectory prediction algorithms in a unified framework. Atlas offers data preprocessing functions, hyperparameter optimization, comes with popular datasets and has the flexibility to setup and conduct underexplored yet relevant experiments to analyze a method's accuracy and robustness. In an example application of Atlas, we compare five popular model- and learning-based predictors and find that, when properly applied, early physics-based approaches are still remarkably competitive. Such results confirm the necessity of benchmarks like Atlas.
abstract_zh: 人体运动轨迹预测是许多领域自主系统的一项重要任务，近年来呈上升趋势。随着不同社区提出大量新方法，标准化基准和客观比较的缺乏日益成为评估进展和指导进一步研究的主要限制。现有基准的范围和灵活性有限，无法进行相关实验并考虑代理和环境的上下文线索。在本文中，我们提出了 Atlas，这是一个在统一框架中系统评估人体运动轨迹预测算法的基准。 Atlas 提供数据预处理功能、超参数优化，附带流行的数据集，并且可以灵活地设置和进行尚未探索但相关的实验，以分析方法的准确性和鲁棒性。在 Atlas 的示例应用中，我们比较了五种流行的基于模型和学习的预测器，发现如果应用得当，早期基于物理的方法仍然具有相当的竞争力。这样的结果证实了像 Atlas 这样的基准测试的必要性。

AI.tldr: 提出Atlas基准框架，用于系统评估人类运动轨迹预测算法。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试在范围和灵活性上存在局限，难以客观评估方法的准确性和鲁棒性，需标准化框架推动研究。
AI.method: 开发Atlas框架，包含数据预处理、超参数优化、常用数据集及灵活实验配置功能。
AI.result: 比较五种预测方法，发现适当应用的早期物理方法仍具竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 证明了标准化基准如Atlas对评估和指导人类运动预测研究的重要性。

authors_text: Chenfei Wu,Jian Liang,Xiaowei Hu,Zhe Gan,Jianfeng Wang,Lijuan Wang,Zicheng Liu,Yuejian Fang,Nan Duan
title: NUWA-Infinity: Autoregressive over Autoregressive Generation for Infinite Visual Synthesis
title_zh: NUWA-Infinity：无限视觉合成的自回归生成自回归
abstract: In this paper, we present NUWA-Infinity, a generative model for infinite visual synthesis, which is defined as the task of generating arbitrarily-sized high-resolution images or long-duration videos. An autoregressive over autoregressive generation mechanism is proposed to deal with this variable-size generation task, where a global patch-level autoregressive model considers the dependencies between patches, and a local token-level autoregressive model considers dependencies between visual tokens within each patch. A Nearby Context Pool (NCP) is introduced to cache-related patches already generated as the context for the current patch being generated, which can significantly save computation costs without sacrificing patch-level dependency modeling. An Arbitrary Direction Controller (ADC) is used to decide suitable generation orders for different visual synthesis tasks and learn order-aware positional embeddings. Compared to DALL-E, Imagen and Parti, NUWA-Infinity can generate high-resolution images with arbitrary sizes and support long-duration video generation additionally. Compared to NUWA, which also covers images and videos, NUWA-Infinity has superior visual synthesis capabilities in terms of resolution and variable-size generation. The GitHub link is https://github.com/microsoft/NUWA. The homepage link is https://nuwa-infinity.microsoft.com.
summary: In this paper, we present NUWA-Infinity, a generative model for infinite visual synthesis, which is defined as the task of generating arbitrarily-sized high-resolution images or long-duration videos. An autoregressive over autoregressive generation mechanism is proposed to deal with this variable-size generation task, where a global patch-level autoregressive model considers the dependencies between patches, and a local token-level autoregressive model considers dependencies between visual tokens within each patch. A Nearby Context Pool (NCP) is introduced to cache-related patches already generated as the context for the current patch being generated, which can significantly save computation costs without sacrificing patch-level dependency modeling. An Arbitrary Direction Controller (ADC) is used to decide suitable generation orders for different visual synthesis tasks and learn order-aware positional embeddings. Compared to DALL-E, Imagen and Parti, NUWA-Infinity can generate high-resolution images with arbitrary sizes and support long-duration video generation additionally. Compared to NUWA, which also covers images and videos, NUWA-Infinity has superior visual synthesis capabilities in terms of resolution and variable-size generation. The GitHub link is https://github.com/microsoft/NUWA. The homepage link is https://nuwa-infinity.microsoft.com.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 NUWA-Infinity，一种用于无限视觉合成的生成模型，它被定义为生成任意大小的高分辨率图像或长时间视频的任务。提出了一种自回归生成机制来处理这种可变大小的生成任务，其中全局补丁级自回归模型考虑补丁之间的依赖性，而局部令牌级自回归模型考虑每个补丁内视觉令牌之间的依赖性。将附近上下文池（NCP）引入到已经生成的缓存相关补丁中，作为当前正在生成的补丁的上下文，这可以在不牺牲补丁级依赖关系建模的情况下显着节省计算成本。任意方向控制器（ADC）用于为不同的视觉合成任务决定合适的生成顺序并学习顺序感知的位置嵌入。与 DALL-E、Imagen 和 Parti 相比，NUWA-Infinity 可以生成任意尺寸的高分辨率图像，并额外支持长时间视频生成。相比同样涵盖图像和视频的NUWA，NUWA-Infinity在分辨率和可变尺寸生成方面具有更优越的视觉合成能力。 GitHub 链接是 https://github.com/microsoft/NUWA。主页链接是 https://nuwa-infinity.microsoft.com。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NUWA-Infinity模型，用于生成任意尺寸的高分辨率图像和长时视频，通过自回归机制处理无限视觉合成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在生成任意尺寸图像或长视频时存在分辨率不足或计算成本高的问题，需设计更高效的生成机制。
AI.method: 提出自回归上的自回归生成机制，结合全局块级自回归模型与局部标记级自回归模型，并引入NCP缓存上下文及ADC控制生成顺序。
AI.result: 相比DALL-E、Imagen等模型，NUWA-Infinity在分辨率和可变尺寸生成上表现更优，并支持长时视频生成。
AI.conclusion: NUWA-Infinity通过创新生成机制，显著提升了无限视觉合成任务的性能与灵活性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出NUWA-Infinity模型，用于生成任意尺寸的高分辨率图像和长时视频，通过自回归机制处理无限视觉合成任务。

search_text: NUWA-Infinity: Autoregressive over Autoregressive Generation for Infinite Visual Synthesis NUWA-Infinity：无限视觉合成的自回归生成自回归 In this paper, we present NUWA-Infinity, a generative model for infinite visual synthesis, which is defined as the task of generating arbitrarily-sized high-resolution images or long-duration videos. An autoregressive over autoregressive generation mechanism is proposed to deal with this variable-size generation task, where a global patch-level autoregressive model considers the dependencies between patches, and a local token-level autoregressive model considers dependencies between visual tokens within each patch. A Nearby Context Pool (NCP) is introduced to cache-related patches already generated as the context for the current patch being generated, which can significantly save computation costs without sacrificing patch-level dependency modeling. An Arbitrary Direction Controller (ADC) is used to decide suitable generation orders for different visual synthesis tasks and learn order-aware positional embeddings. Compared to DALL-E, Imagen and Parti, NUWA-Infinity can generate high-resolution images with arbitrary sizes and support long-duration video generation additionally. Compared to NUWA, which also covers images and videos, NUWA-Infinity has superior visual synthesis capabilities in terms of resolution and variable-size generation. The GitHub link is https://github.com/microsoft/NUWA. The homepage link is https://nuwa-infinity.microsoft.com. 在本文中，我们提出了 NUWA-Infinity，一种用于无限视觉合成的生成模型，它被定义为生成任意大小的高分辨率图像或长时间视频的任务。提出了一种自回归生成机制来处理这种可变大小的生成任务，其中全局补丁级自回归模型考虑补丁之间的依赖性，而局部令牌级自回归模型考虑每个补丁内视觉令牌之间的依赖性。将附近上下文池（NCP）引入到已经生成的缓存相关补丁中，作为当前正在生成的补丁的上下文，这可以在不牺牲补丁级依赖关系建模的情况下显着节省计算成本。任意方向控制器（ADC）用于为不同的视觉合成任务决定合适的生成顺序并学习顺序感知的位置嵌入。与 DALL-E、Imagen 和 Parti 相比，NUWA-Infinity 可以生成任意尺寸的高分辨率图像，并额外支持长时间视频生成。相比同样涵盖图像和视频的NUWA，NUWA-Infinity在分辨率和可变尺寸生成方面具有更优越的视觉合成能力。 GitHub 链接是 https://github.com/microsoft/NUWA。主页链接是 https://nuwa-infinity.microsoft.com。 本文提出NUWA-Infinity模型，用于生成任意尺寸的高分辨率图像和长时视频，通过自回归机制处理无限视觉合成任务。 Chenfei Wu,Jian Liang,Xiaowei Hu,Zhe Gan,Jianfeng Wang,Lijuan Wang,Zicheng Liu,Yuejian Fang,Nan Duan cs.CV

authors_text: Idil Ozdamar,Marco Laghi,Giorgio Grioli,Arash Ajoudani,Manuel G. Catalano,Antonio Bicchi
title: A Shared Autonomy Reconfigurable Control Framework for Telemanipulation of Multi-arm Systems
title_zh: 用于多臂系统遥控操作的共享自主可重构控制框架
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, for associated video, see https://youtu.be/zef-86tK8xU
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures, accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, for associated video, see https://youtu.be/zef-86tK8xU
abstract: Teleoperation is a widely adopted strategy to control robotic manipulators executing complex tasks that require highly dexterous movements and critical high-level intelligence. Classical teleoperation schemes are based on either joystick control, or on more intuitive interfaces which map directly the user arm motions into one robot arm's motions. These approaches have limits when the execution of a given task requires reconfigurable multiple robotic arm systems. Indeed, the simultaneous teleoperation of two or more robot arms could extend the workspace of the manipulation cell, or increase its total payload, or afford other advantages. In different phases of a reconfigurable multi-arm system, each robot could act as an independent arm, or as one of a pair of cooperating arms, or as one of the fingers of a virtual, large robot hand. This manuscript proposes a novel telemanipulation framework that enables both the individual and combined control of any number of robotic arms. Thanks to the designed control architecture, the human operator can intuitively choose the proposed control modalities and the manipulators that make the task convenient to execute through the user interface. Moreover, through the tele-impedance paradigm, the system can address complex tasks that require physical interaction by letting the robot mimic the arm impedance and position references of the human operator. The proposed framework is validated with 8 subjects controlling 4 Franka Emika Panda robots with 7-DoFs to execute a telemanipulation task. Qualitative results of the experiments show us the promising applicability of our framework.

These approaches have limits when the execution of a given task requires reconfigurable multiple robotic arm systems. Indeed, the simultaneous teleoperation of two or more robot arms could extend the workspace of the manipulation cell, or increase its total payload, or afford other advantages. In different phases of a reconfigurable multi-arm system, each robot could act as an independent arm, or as one of a pair of cooperating arms, or as one of the fingers of a virtual, large robot hand. This manuscript proposes a novel telemanipulation framework that enables both the individual and combined control of any number of robotic arms. Thanks to the designed control architecture, the human operator can intuitively choose the proposed control modalities and the manipulators that make the task convenient to execute through the user interface. Moreover, through the tele-impedance paradigm, the system can address complex tasks that require physical interaction by letting the robot mimic the arm impedance and position references of the human operator. The proposed framework is validated with 8 subjects controlling 4 Franka Emika Panda robots with 7-DoFs to execute a telemanipulation task. Qualitative results of the experiments show us the promising applicability of our framework.
abstract_zh: 远程操作是一种广泛采用的策略，用于控制机器人操纵器执行需要高度灵巧的运动和关键的高级智能的复杂任务。经典的远程操作方案基于操纵杆控制，或更直观的界面，将用户手臂的运动直接映射到机器人手臂的运动。当执行给定任务需要可重新配置的多个机械臂系统时，这些方法存在局限性。事实上，两个或多个机器人手臂的同时远程操作可以扩展操纵单元的工作空间，或增加其总有效载荷，或提供其他优势。在可重构多臂系统的不同阶段，每个机器人都可以充当独立的手臂，或者作为一对协作手臂中的一个，或者作为虚拟大型机器人手的一个手指。这份手稿提出了一种新颖的远程操作框架，可以对任意数量的机械臂进行单独和组合控制。由于设计的控制架构，操作员可以直观地选择建议的控制方式和操纵器，从而通过用户界面方便地执行任务。此外，通过远程阻抗范例，系统可以通过让机器人模仿人类操作员的手臂阻抗和位置参考来解决需要物理交互的复杂任务。所提出的框架经过 8 名受试者的验证，他们控制 4 个具有 7 个自由度的 Franka Emika Panda 机器人来执行远程操作任务。实验的定性结果向我们展示了我们的框架的有前景的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种共享自主性可重构控制框架，用于多机械臂系统的远程操作，实现单个或多个机械臂的协同控制。
AI.motivation: 传统远程操作方案难以应对需要可重构多臂系统的复杂任务，现有方法在多臂协同控制和动态任务配置方面存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计基于共享自主性的控制架构，结合用户界面选择控制模式，并通过远程阻抗范式实现人机物理交互，验证实验采用4台7自由度Franka Emika Panda机械臂。
AI.result: 8名受试者实验显示该框架能有效执行多臂协同任务，定性结果验证了框架的可行性与灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架为复杂远程操作任务提供了可重构多臂系统的有效解决方案，具有良好的应用前景。

authors_text: Dawit Mureja Argaw,Fabian Caba Heilbron,Joon-Young Lee,Markus Woodson,In So Kweon
title: The Anatomy of Video Editing: A Dataset and Benchmark Suite for AI-Assisted Video Editing
title_zh: 视频编辑剖析：人工智能辅助视频编辑的数据集和基准套件
abstract: Machine learning is transforming the video editing industry. Recent advances in computer vision have leveled-up video editing tasks such as intelligent reframing, rotoscoping, color grading, or applying digital makeups. However, most of the solutions have focused on video manipulation and VFX. This work introduces the Anatomy of Video Editing, a dataset, and benchmark, to foster research in AI-assisted video editing. Our benchmark suite focuses on video editing tasks, beyond visual effects, such as automatic footage organization and assisted video assembling. To enable research on these fronts, we annotate more than 1.5M tags, with relevant concepts to cinematography, from 196176 shots sampled from movie scenes. We establish competitive baseline methods and detailed analyses for each of the tasks. We hope our work sparks innovative research towards underexplored areas of AI-assisted video editing.
summary: Machine learning is transforming the video editing industry. Recent advances in computer vision have leveled-up video editing tasks such as intelligent reframing, rotoscoping, color grading, or applying digital makeups. However, most of the solutions have focused on video manipulation and VFX. This work introduces the Anatomy of Video Editing, a dataset, and benchmark, to foster research in AI-assisted video editing. Our benchmark suite focuses on video editing tasks, beyond visual effects, such as automatic footage organization and assisted video assembling. To enable research on these fronts, we annotate more than 1.5M tags, with relevant concepts to cinematography, from 196176 shots sampled from movie scenes. We establish competitive baseline methods and detailed analyses for each of the tasks. We hope our work sparks innovative research towards underexplored areas of AI-assisted video editing.
abstract_zh: 机器学习正在改变视频编辑行业。计算机视觉的最新进展提高了视频编辑任务的水平，例如智能重构、动态观察、颜色分级或应用数字化妆。然而，大多数解决方案都集中在视频处理和视觉特效上。这项工作介绍了视频编辑剖析、数据集和基准，以促进人工智能辅助视频编辑的研究。我们的基准测试套件专注于视觉效果之外的视频编辑任务，例如自动素材组织和辅助视频组装。为了开展这些前沿的研究，我们从电影场景中采样的 196176 个镜头中注释了超过 150 万个标签，其中包含与电影摄影相关的概念。我们为每项任务建立有竞争力的基线方法和详细分析。我们希望我们的工作能够激发对人工智能辅助视频编辑尚未开发的领域的创新研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为《Anatomy of Video Editing》的数据集和基准测试套件，旨在推动AI辅助视频编辑领域的研究。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器学习在视频编辑领域取得进展，但现有解决方案多聚焦于视觉特效（VFX），而对自动素材整理、视频拼接等核心编辑任务的研究仍显不足。
AI.method: 通过标注196,176个电影镜头中的150万+与电影制作相关的标签，构建包含视频编辑任务的基准数据集，并建立对比基线方法进行任务分析。
AI.result: 建立了具有竞争力的基线方法，对自动素材组织、视频拼接等非VFX任务进行了详细分析，并验证了数据集的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为AI辅助视频编辑的前沿领域提供了研究基础，有望激发更多创新性研究方向。

tldr: 本文提出一个名为《Anatomy of Video Editing》的数据集和基准测试套件，旨在推动AI辅助视频编辑领域的研究。
motivation: 尽管机器学习在视频编辑领域取得进展，但现有解决方案多聚焦于视觉特效（VFX），而对自动素材整理、视频拼接等核心编辑任务的研究仍显不足。
method: 通过标注196,176个电影镜头中的150万+与电影制作相关的标签，构建包含视频编辑任务的基准数据集，并建立对比基线方法进行任务分析。
result: 建立了具有竞争力的基线方法，对自动素材组织、视频拼接等非VFX任务进行了详细分析，并验证了数据集的有效性。
conclusion: 该工作为AI辅助视频编辑的前沿领域提供了研究基础，有望激发更多创新性研究方向。
search_text: The Anatomy of Video Editing: A Dataset and Benchmark Suite for AI-Assisted Video Editing 视频编辑剖析：人工智能辅助视频编辑的数据集和基准套件 Machine learning is transforming the video editing industry. Recent advances in computer vision have leveled-up video editing tasks such as intelligent reframing, rotoscoping, color grading, or applying digital makeups. However, most of the solutions have focused on video manipulation and VFX. This work introduces the Anatomy of Video Editing, a dataset, and benchmark, to foster research in AI-assisted video editing. Our benchmark suite focuses on video editing tasks, beyond visual effects, such as automatic footage organization and assisted video assembling. To enable research on these fronts, we annotate more than 1.5M tags, with relevant concepts to cinematography, from 196176 shots sampled from movie scenes. We establish competitive baseline methods and detailed analyses for each of the tasks. We hope our work sparks innovative research towards underexplored areas of AI-assisted video editing. 机器学习正在改变视频编辑行业。计算机视觉的最新进展提高了视频编辑任务的水平，例如智能重构、动态观察、颜色分级或应用数字化妆。然而，大多数解决方案都集中在视频处理和视觉特效上。这项工作介绍了视频编辑剖析、数据集和基准，以促进人工智能辅助视频编辑的研究。我们的基准测试套件专注于视觉效果之外的视频编辑任务，例如自动素材组织和辅助视频组装。为了开展这些前沿的研究，我们从电影场景中采样的 196176 个镜头中注释了超过 150 万个标签，其中包含与电影摄影相关的概念。我们为每项任务建立有竞争力的基线方法和详细分析。我们希望我们的工作能够激发对人工智能辅助视频编辑尚未开发的领域的创新研究。 本文提出一个名为《Anatomy of Video Editing》的数据集和基准测试套件，旨在推动AI辅助视频编辑领域的研究。 Dawit Mureja Argaw,Fabian Caba Heilbron,Joon-Young Lee,Markus Woodson,In So Kweon cs.CV

authors_text: Chang Liu,Xiaoyan Qian,Binxiao Huang,Xiaojuan Qi,Edmund Lam,Siew-Chong Tan,Ngai Wong
title: Multimodal Transformer for Automatic 3D Annotation and Object Detection
title_zh: 用于自动 3D 注释和对象检测的多模态转换器
abstract: Despite a growing number of datasets being collected for training 3D object detection models, significant human effort is still required to annotate 3D boxes on LiDAR scans. To automate the annotation and facilitate the production of various customized datasets, we propose an end-to-end multimodal transformer (MTrans) autolabeler, which leverages both LiDAR scans and images to generate precise 3D box annotations from weak 2D bounding boxes. To alleviate the pervasive sparsity problem that hinders existing autolabelers, MTrans densifies the sparse point clouds by generating new 3D points based on 2D image information. With a multi-task design, MTrans segments the foreground/background, densifies LiDAR point clouds, and regresses 3D boxes simultaneously. Experimental results verify the effectiveness of the MTrans for improving the quality of the generated labels. By enriching the sparse point clouds, our method achieves 4.48\% and 4.03\% better 3D AP on KITTI moderate and hard samples, respectively, versus the state-of-the-art autolabeler. MTrans can also be extended to improve the accuracy for 3D object detection, resulting in a remarkable 89.45\% AP on KITTI hard samples. Codes are at \url{https://github.com/Cliu2/MTrans}.
summary: Despite a growing number of datasets being collected for training 3D object detection models, significant human effort is still required to annotate 3D boxes on LiDAR scans. To automate the annotation and facilitate the production of various customized datasets, we propose an end-to-end multimodal transformer (MTrans) autolabeler, which leverages both LiDAR scans and images to generate precise 3D box annotations from weak 2D bounding boxes. To alleviate the pervasive sparsity problem that hinders existing autolabelers, MTrans densifies the sparse point clouds by generating new 3D points based on 2D image information. With a multi-task design, MTrans segments the foreground/background, densifies LiDAR point clouds, and regresses 3D boxes simultaneously. Experimental results verify the effectiveness of the MTrans for improving the quality of the generated labels. By enriching the sparse point clouds, our method achieves 4.48\% and 4.03\% better 3D AP on KITTI moderate and hard samples, respectively, versus the state-of-the-art autolabeler. MTrans can also be extended to improve the accuracy for 3D object detection, resulting in a remarkable 89.45\% AP on KITTI hard samples. Codes are at \url{https://github.com/Cliu2/MTrans}.
abstract_zh: 尽管收集了越来越多的数据集来训练 3D 物体检测模型，但仍然需要大量的人力来注释 LiDAR 扫描上的 3D 框。为了自动化注释并促进各种定制数据集的生成，我们提出了一种端到端多模态转换器 (MTrans) 自动标记器，它利用 LiDAR 扫描和图像从弱 2D 边界框生成精确的 3D 框注释。为了缓解阻碍现有自动标记器的普遍稀疏问题，MTrans 通过基于 2D 图像信息生成新的 3D 点来致密稀疏点云。通过多任务设计，MTrans 可同时分割前景/背景、加密 LiDAR 点云并回归 3D 框。实验结果验证了 MTrans 在提高生成标签质量方面的有效性。通过丰富稀疏点云，与最先进的自动标记器相比，我们的方法在 KITTI 中等和困难样本上分别实现了 4.48% 和 4.03% 更好的 3D AP。 MTrans 还可以扩展以提高 3D 对象检测的准确性，从而在 KITTI 硬样本上获得显着的 89.45% AP。代码位于 \url{https://github.com/Cliu2/MTrans}。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多模态Transformer模型，用于自动3D标注和目标检测，减少人工标注需求
AI.motivation: 现有3D标注依赖人工且点云稀疏问题限制了自动标注效果，需自动化方案提升效率和精度
AI.method: 设计多模态Transformer（MTrans），融合LiDAR点云与图像信息，通过多任务学习实现点云加密、分割及3D框回归
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上，3D AP提升4.48%（中等难度）和4.03%（困难难度），检测准确率达89.45%
AI.conclusion: MTrans有效提升自动标注质量，且可扩展用于3D目标检测，验证了方法的有效性

authors_text: Tesshu Hanaka
title: Computing Densest $k$-Subgraph with Structural Parameters
title_zh: 使用结构参数计算最稠密的$k$子图
abstract: \textsc{Densest $k$-Subgraph} is the problem to find a vertex subset $S$ of size $k$ such that the number of edges in the subgraph induced by $S$ is maximized. In this paper, we show that \textsc{Densest $k$-Subgraph} is fixed parameter tractable when parameterized by neighborhood diversity, block deletion number, distance-hereditary deletion number, and cograph deletion number, respectively. Furthermore, we give a $2$-approximation $2^{\tc(G)/2}n^{O(1)}$-time algorithm where $\tc(G)$ is the twin cover number of an input graph $G$.
summary: \textsc{Densest $k$-Subgraph} is the problem to find a vertex subset $S$ of size $k$ such that the number of edges in the subgraph induced by $S$ is maximized. In this paper, we show that \textsc{Densest $k$-Subgraph} is fixed parameter tractable when parameterized by neighborhood diversity, block deletion number, distance-hereditary deletion number, and cograph deletion number, respectively. Furthermore, we give a $2$-approximation $2^{\tc(G)/2}n^{O(1)}$-time algorithm where $\tc(G)$ is the twin cover number of an input graph $G$.
abstract_zh: \textsc{最密集$k$-Subgraph}是找到大小为$k$的顶点子集$S$的问题，使得$S$引起的子图中的边数最大化。在本文中，我们证明当分别通过邻域多样性、块删除数、距离遗传删除数和图删除数进行参数化时，\textsc{Densest $k$-Subgraph}是固定参数可处理的。此外，我们给出了 $2$ 近似 $2^{\tc(G)/2}n^{O(1)}$ 时间算法，其中 $\tc(G)$ 是输入图 $G$ 的孪生覆盖数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在结构参数约束下计算最密集k-子图的问题，提出了多项式时间算法和近似算法。
AI.motivation: 最密集k-子图问题在图论和网络分析中具有重要应用，但传统方法在大规模数据下效率低下，需探索基于结构参数的高效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过固定参数可解（FPT）方法，结合邻域多样性、块删除数等结构参数，并设计基于双覆盖数的2-近似算法。
AI.result: 证明了在多种结构参数下问题的FPT性质，并给出了时间复杂度为$2^{\tc(G)/2}n^{O(1)}$的2-近似算法。
AI.conclusion: 结构参数为解决最密集k-子图问题提供了新思路，算法在参数较小的图中具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Nicolas {El Maalouly},Raphael Steiner,Lasse Wulf
title: Exact Matching: Correct Parity and FPT Parameterized by Independence Number
title_zh: 精确匹配：通过独立数参数化的正确奇偶校验和 FPT
abstract: Given an integer $k$ and a graph where every edge is colored either red or blue, the goal of the exact matching problem is to find a perfect matching with the property that exactly $k$ of its edges are red. Soon after Papadimitriou and Yannakakis (JACM 1982) introduced the problem, a randomized polynomial-time algorithm solving the problem was described by Mulmuley et al. (Combinatorica 1987). Despite a lot of effort, it is still not known today whether a deterministic polynomial-time algorithm exists. This makes the exact matching problem an important candidate to test the popular conjecture that the complexity classes P and RP are equal. In a recent article (MFCS 2022), progress was made towards this goal by showing that for bipartite graphs of bounded bipartite independence number, a polynomial time algorithm exists. In terms of parameterized complexity, this algorithm was an XP-algorithm parameterized by the bipartite independence number. In this article, we introduce novel algorithmic techniques that allow us to obtain an FPT-algorithm. If the input is a general graph we show that one can at least compute a perfect matching $M$ which has the correct number of red edges modulo 2, in polynomial time. This is motivated by our last result, in which we prove that an FPT algorithm for general graphs, parameterized by the independence number, reduces to the problem of finding in polynomial time a perfect matching $M$ with at most $k$ red edges and the correct number of red edges modulo 2.
summary: Given an integer $k$ and a graph where every edge is colored either red or blue, the goal of the exact matching problem is to find a perfect matching with the property that exactly $k$ of its edges are red. Soon after Papadimitriou and Yannakakis (JACM 1982) introduced the problem, a randomized polynomial-time algorithm solving the problem was described by Mulmuley et al. (Combinatorica 1987). Despite a lot of effort, it is still not known today whether a deterministic polynomial-time algorithm exists. This makes the exact matching problem an important candidate to test the popular conjecture that the complexity classes P and RP are equal. In a recent article (MFCS 2022), progress was made towards this goal by showing that for bipartite graphs of bounded bipartite independence number, a polynomial time algorithm exists. In terms of parameterized complexity, this algorithm was an XP-algorithm parameterized by the bipartite independence number. In this article, we introduce novel algorithmic techniques that allow us to obtain an FPT-algorithm. If the input is a general graph we show that one can at least compute a perfect matching $M$ which has the correct number of red edges modulo 2, in polynomial time. This is motivated by our last result, in which we prove that an FPT algorithm for general graphs, parameterized by the independence number, reduces to the problem of finding in polynomial time a perfect matching $M$ with at most $k$ red edges and the correct number of red edges modulo 2.
abstract_zh: 给定一个整数 $k$ 和一个每条边都被着色为红色或蓝色的图，精确匹配问题的目标是找到一个完美匹配，其属性恰好是 $k$ 的边是红色的。在 Papadimitriou 和 Yannakakis (JACM 1982) 提出该问题后不久，Mulmuley 等人描述了解决该问题的随机多项式时间算法。 （Combinatorica 1987）。尽管付出了很多努力，今天仍然不知道是否存在确定性多项式时间算法。这使得精确匹配问题成为测试复杂性类别 P 和 RP 相等的流行猜想的重要候选问题。在最近的一篇文章 (MFCS 2022) 中，通过表明对于有界二部独立数的二部图，存在多项式时间算法，在实现这一目标方面取得了进展。就参数化复杂度而言，该算法是一种由二分独立数参数化的XP算法。在本文中，我们介绍了新的算法技术，使我们能够获得 FPT 算法。如果输入是一般图，我们表明至少可以在多项式时间内计算出完美匹配的 $M$，它具有正确的红边数模 2。这是由我们最后的结果推动的，在该结果中，我们证明了由独立数参数化的一般图的 FPT 算法，可以简化为在多项式时间内找到完美匹配 $M$ 的问题，最多有 $k$ 红色边，并且红色边的正确数量模 2。

AI.tldr: 本文研究精确匹配问题，旨在找到具有恰好k条红边的完美匹配，并探讨其参数化复杂度。
AI.motivation: 精确匹配问题的确定性多项式算法尚未解决，该问题成为P与RP类等价性猜想的重要测试案例。此前针对有界独立数的二分图已有进展，但一般图的参数化算法仍需探索。
AI.method: 提出新颖算法技术，结合独立数参数设计FPT算法，并证明一般图中可通过多项式时间计算满足奇偶性约束的完美匹配。
AI.result: 获得一般图参数化独立数的FPT算法，且证明存在多项式时间算法可计算具有正确红边数奇偶性的完美匹配。
AI.conclusion: 结果推进了精确匹配问题的参数化复杂度研究，为解决P=RP猜想提供了新思路，并建立了独立数参数与奇偶性约束的关联性。

search_text: Exact Matching: Correct Parity and FPT Parameterized by Independence Number 精确匹配：通过独立数参数化的正确奇偶校验和 FPT Given an integer $k$ and a graph where every edge is colored either red or blue, the goal of the exact matching problem is to find a perfect matching with the property that exactly $k$ of its edges are red. Soon after Papadimitriou and Yannakakis (JACM 1982) introduced the problem, a randomized polynomial-time algorithm solving the problem was described by Mulmuley et al. (Combinatorica 1987). Despite a lot of effort, it is still not known today whether a deterministic polynomial-time algorithm exists. This makes the exact matching problem an important candidate to test the popular conjecture that the complexity classes P and RP are equal. In a recent article (MFCS 2022), progress was made towards this goal by showing that for bipartite graphs of bounded bipartite independence number, a polynomial time algorithm exists. In terms of parameterized complexity, this algorithm was an XP-algorithm parameterized by the bipartite independence number. In this article, we introduce novel algorithmic techniques that allow us to obtain an FPT-algorithm. If the input is a general graph we show that one can at least compute a perfect matching $M$ which has the correct number of red edges modulo 2, in polynomial time. This is motivated by our last result, in which we prove that an FPT algorithm for general graphs, parameterized by the independence number, reduces to the problem of finding in polynomial time a perfect matching $M$ with at most $k$ red edges and the correct number of red edges modulo 2. 给定一个整数 $k$ 和一个每条边都被着色为红色或蓝色的图，精确匹配问题的目标是找到一个完美匹配，其属性恰好是 $k$ 的边是红色的。在 Papadimitriou 和 Yannakakis (JACM 1982) 提出该问题后不久，Mulmuley 等人描述了解决该问题的随机多项式时间算法。 （Combinatorica 1987）。尽管付出了很多努力，今天仍然不知道是否存在确定性多项式时间算法。这使得精确匹配问题成为测试复杂性类别 P 和 RP 相等的流行猜想的重要候选问题。在最近的一篇文章 (MFCS 2022) 中，通过表明对于有界二部独立数的二部图，存在多项式时间算法，在实现这一目标方面取得了进展。就参数化复杂度而言，该算法是一种由二分独立数参数化的XP算法。在本文中，我们介绍了新的算法技术，使我们能够获得 FPT 算法。如果输入是一般图，我们表明至少可以在多项式时间内计算出完美匹配的 $M$，它具有正确的红边数模 2。这是由我们最后的结果推动的，在该结果中，我们证明了由独立数参数化的一般图的 FPT 算法，可以简化为在多项式时间内找到完美匹配 $M$ 的问题，最多有 $k$ 红色边，并且红色边的正确数量模 2。 本文研究精确匹配问题，旨在找到具有恰好k条红边的完美匹配，并探讨其参数化复杂度。 Nicolas {El Maalouly},Raphael Steiner,Lasse Wulf cs.DS,cs.CC

authors_text: Qiang Wang,Shaohuai Shi,Kaiyong Zhao,Xiaowen Chu
title: EASNet: Searching Elastic and Accurate Network Architecture for Stereo Matching
title_zh: EASNet：寻找弹性且准确的立体匹配网络架构
abstract: Recent advanced studies have spent considerable human efforts on optimizing network architectures for stereo matching but hardly achieved both high accuracy and fast inference speed. To ease the workload in network design, neural architecture search (NAS) has been applied with great success to various sparse prediction tasks, such as image classification and object detection. However, existing NAS studies on the dense prediction task, especially stereo matching, still cannot be efficiently and effectively deployed on devices of different computing capabilities. To this end, we propose to train an elastic and accurate network for stereo matching (EASNet) that supports various 3D architectural settings on devices with different computing capabilities. Given the deployment latency constraint on the target device, we can quickly extract a sub-network from the full EASNet without additional training while the accuracy of the sub-network can still be maintained. Extensive experiments show that our EASNet outperforms both state-of-the-art human-designed and NAS-based architectures on Scene Flow and MPI Sintel datasets in terms of model accuracy and inference speed. Particularly, deployed on an inference GPU, EASNet achieves a new SOTA 0.73 EPE on the Scene Flow dataset with 100 ms, which is 4.5$\times$ faster than LEAStereo with a better quality model.
summary: Recent advanced studies have spent considerable human efforts on optimizing network architectures for stereo matching but hardly achieved both high accuracy and fast inference speed. To ease the workload in network design, neural architecture search (NAS) has been applied with great success to various sparse prediction tasks, such as image classification and object detection. However, existing NAS studies on the dense prediction task, especially stereo matching, still cannot be efficiently and effectively deployed on devices of different computing capabilities. To this end, we propose to train an elastic and accurate network for stereo matching (EASNet) that supports various 3D architectural settings on devices with different computing capabilities. Given the deployment latency constraint on the target device, we can quickly extract a sub-network from the full EASNet without additional training while the accuracy of the sub-network can still be maintained. Extensive experiments show that our EASNet outperforms both state-of-the-art human-designed and NAS-based architectures on Scene Flow and MPI Sintel datasets in terms of model accuracy and inference speed. Particularly, deployed on an inference GPU, EASNet achieves a new SOTA 0.73 EPE on the Scene Flow dataset with 100 ms, which is 4.5$\times$ faster than LEAStereo with a better quality model.
abstract_zh: 最近的高级研究花费了大量的人力来优化立体匹配的网络架构，但很难同时实现高精度和快速的推理速度。为了减轻网络设计的工作量，神经架构搜索（NAS）已成功应用于各种稀疏预测任务，例如图像分类和目标检测。然而，现有的针对密集预测任务，尤其是立体匹配的NAS研究，仍然无法高效、有效地部署在不同计算能力的设备上。为此，我们建议训练一个弹性且准确的立体匹配网络（EASNet），该网络支持具有不同计算能力的设备上的各种 3D 架构设置。考虑到目标设备上的部署延迟约束，我们可以快速从完整的 EASNet 中提取子网络，而无需额外的训练，同时仍然可以保持子网络的准确性。大量实验表明，我们的 EASNet 在模型准确性和推理速度方面优于 Scene Flow 和 MPI Sintel 数据集上最先进的人工设计和基于 NAS 的架构。特别是，部署在推理 GPU 上时，EASNet 在 Scene Flow 数据集上以 100 毫秒的时间实现了新的 SOTA 0.73 EPE，比具有更好质量模型的 LEAstereo 快了 4.5 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EASNet，一种用于立体匹配的弹性且精确的网络架构，旨在解决在不同计算能力设备上部署时兼顾高精度与快速推理速度的难题。
AI.motivation: 现有立体匹配网络设计难以同时实现高精度与快速推理，且针对密集预测任务的神经架构搜索（NAS）方法尚未有效适配不同计算能力的设备部署需求。
AI.method: 通过设计弹性网络架构EASNet，支持多种3D结构设置，并在目标设备的延迟约束下快速提取子网络而无需额外训练，保持子网络精度。
AI.result: 在Scene Flow和MPI Sintel数据集上，EASNet在模型精度和推理速度上均优于现有手工设计及NAS架构，尤其在推理GPU上以100ms达到0.73 EPE的新SOTA指标，较LEAStereo快4.5倍。
AI.conclusion: EASNet通过弹性架构设计有效平衡了精度与速度，为不同计算能力设备提供了高效的立体匹配解决方案。

authors_text: Jianfeng Huang,Chenyang Li,Yimin Lin,Shiguo Lian
title: Unsupervised Industrial Anomaly Detection via Pattern Generative and Contrastive Networks
title_zh: 通过模式生成和对比网络进行无监督工业异常检测
comment: ef:Advanced Intelligent Computing Technology and Applications. ICIC 2024. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 14871
comments: ef:Advanced Intelligent Computing Technology and Applications. ICIC 2024. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 14871
abstract: It is hard to collect enough flaw images for training deep learning network in industrial production. Therefore, existing industrial anomaly detection methods prefer to use CNN-based unsupervised detection and localization network to achieve this task. However, these methods always fail when there are varieties happened in new signals since traditional end-to-end networks suffer barriers of fitting nonlinear model in high-dimensional space. Moreover, they have a memory library by clustering the feature of normal images essentially, which cause it is not robust to texture change. To this end, we propose the Vision Transformer based (VIT-based) unsupervised anomaly detection network. It utilizes a hierarchical task learning and human experience to enhance its interpretability. Our network consists of pattern generation and comparison networks. Pattern generation network uses two VIT-based encoder modules to extract the feature of two consecutive image patches, then uses VIT-based decoder module to learn the human designed style of these features and predict the third image patch. After this, we use the Siamese-based network to compute the similarity of the generation image patch and original image patch. Finally, we refine the anomaly localization by the bi-directional inference strategy. Comparison experiments on public dataset MVTec dataset show our method achieves 99.8% AUC, which surpasses previous state-of-the-art methods. In addition, we give a qualitative illustration on our own leather and cloth datasets. The accurate segment results strongly prove the accuracy of our method in anomaly detection.
summary: It is hard to collect enough flaw images for training deep learning network in industrial production. Therefore, existing industrial anomaly detection methods prefer to use CNN-based unsupervised detection and localization network to achieve this task. However, these methods always fail when there are varieties happened in new signals since traditional end-to-end networks suffer barriers of fitting nonlinear model in high-dimensional space. Moreover, they have a memory library by clustering the feature of normal images essentially, which cause it is not robust to texture change. To this end, we propose the Vision Transformer based (VIT-based) unsupervised anomaly detection network. It utilizes a hierarchical task learning and human experience to enhance its interpretability. Our network consists of pattern generation and comparison networks. Pattern generation network uses two VIT-based encoder modules to extract the feature of two consecutive image patches, then uses VIT-based decoder module to learn the human designed style of these features and predict the third image patch. After this, we use the Siamese-based network to compute the similarity of the generation image patch and original image patch. Finally, we refine the anomaly localization by the bi-directional inference strategy. Comparison experiments on public dataset MVTec dataset show our method achieves 99.8% AUC, which surpasses previous state-of-the-art methods. In addition, we give a qualitative illustration on our own leather and cloth datasets. The accurate segment results strongly prove the accuracy of our method in anomaly detection.
abstract_zh: 很难收集足够的缺陷图像来训练工业生产中的深度学习网络。因此，现有的工业异常检测方法更倾向于使用基于CNN的无监督检测和定位网络来实现这一任务。然而，当新信号发生变化时，这些方法往往会失败，因为传统的端到端网络在高维空间中拟合非线性模型存在障碍。此外，它们本质上是通过对普通图像的特征进行聚类来建立存储库，这导致其对纹理变化不具有鲁棒性。为此，我们提出了基于 Vision Transformer（基于 VIT）的无监督异常检测网络。它利用分层任务学习和人类经验来增强其可解释性。我们的网络由模式生成和比较网络组成。模式生成网络使用两个基于 VIT 的编码器模块来提取两个连续图像块的特征，然后使用基于 VIT 的解码器模块来学习这些特征的人类设计风格并预测第三个图像块。之后，我们使用基于 Siamese 的网络来计算生成图像块和原始图像块的相似度。最后，我们通过双向推理策略完善异常定位。在公共数据集MVTec数据集上的比较实验表明，我们的方法实现了99.8%的AUC，超越了之前最先进的方法。此外，我们还对我们自己的皮革和布料数据集进行了定性说明。准确的分段结果有力地证明了我们的方法在异常检测方面的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉Transformer的无监督工业异常检测网络，通过模式生成和对比网络提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: 工业场景中缺陷图像难以收集，现有CNN方法在处理新信号和纹理变化时鲁棒性不足，需改进模型以适应高维非线性特征学习。
AI.method: 构建包含模式生成网络和对比网络的VIT框架，利用双编码器提取图像块特征，解码器生成符合人类设计风格的预测块，通过Siamese网络计算相似度并结合双向推理策略优化定位。
AI.result: 在MVTec数据集上达到99.8%的AUC值，超越现有最优方法，并在自有皮革和布料数据集上验证了分割准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过引入视觉Transformer和人类经验指导的特征学习，显著提升了工业异常检测的准确率和鲁棒性。

search_text: Unsupervised Industrial Anomaly Detection via Pattern Generative and Contrastive Networks 通过模式生成和对比网络进行无监督工业异常检测 It is hard to collect enough flaw images for training deep learning network in industrial production. Therefore, existing industrial anomaly detection methods prefer to use CNN-based unsupervised detection and localization network to achieve this task. However, these methods always fail when there are varieties happened in new signals since traditional end-to-end networks suffer barriers of fitting nonlinear model in high-dimensional space. Moreover, they have a memory library by clustering the feature of normal images essentially, which cause it is not robust to texture change. To this end, we propose the Vision Transformer based (VIT-based) unsupervised anomaly detection network. It utilizes a hierarchical task learning and human experience to enhance its interpretability. Our network consists of pattern generation and comparison networks. Pattern generation network uses two VIT-based encoder modules to extract the feature of two consecutive image patches, then uses VIT-based decoder module to learn the human designed style of these features and predict the third image patch. After this, we use the Siamese-based network to compute the similarity of the generation image patch and original image patch. Finally, we refine the anomaly localization by the bi-directional inference strategy. Comparison experiments on public dataset MVTec dataset show our method achieves 99.8% AUC, which surpasses previous state-of-the-art methods. In addition, we give a qualitative illustration on our own leather and cloth datasets. The accurate segment results strongly prove the accuracy of our method in anomaly detection. 很难收集足够的缺陷图像来训练工业生产中的深度学习网络。因此，现有的工业异常检测方法更倾向于使用基于CNN的无监督检测和定位网络来实现这一任务。然而，当新信号发生变化时，这些方法往往会失败，因为传统的端到端网络在高维空间中拟合非线性模型存在障碍。此外，它们本质上是通过对普通图像的特征进行聚类来建立存储库，这导致其对纹理变化不具有鲁棒性。为此，我们提出了基于 Vision Transformer（基于 VIT）的无监督异常检测网络。它利用分层任务学习和人类经验来增强其可解释性。我们的网络由模式生成和比较网络组成。模式生成网络使用两个基于 VIT 的编码器模块来提取两个连续图像块的特征，然后使用基于 VIT 的解码器模块来学习这些特征的人类设计风格并预测第三个图像块。之后，我们使用基于 Siamese 的网络来计算生成图像块和原始图像块的相似度。最后，我们通过双向推理策略完善异常定位。在公共数据集MVTec数据集上的比较实验表明，我们的方法实现了99.8%的AUC，超越了之前最先进的方法。此外，我们还对我们自己的皮革和布料数据集进行了定性说明。准确的分段结果有力地证明了我们的方法在异常检测方面的准确性。 本文提出一种基于视觉Transformer的无监督工业异常检测网络，通过模式生成和对比网络提升检测精度。 Jianfeng Huang,Chenyang Li,Yimin Lin,Shiguo Lian cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Aijin Li,Gen Li,Lei Sun,Xintao Wang
title: FaceFormer: Scale-aware Blind Face Restoration with Transformers
title_zh: FaceFormer：使用 Transformers 进行比例感知盲脸恢复
abstract: Blind face restoration usually encounters with diverse scale face inputs, especially in the real world. However, most of the current works support specific scale faces, which limits its application ability in real-world scenarios. In this work, we propose a novel scale-aware blind face restoration framework, named FaceFormer, which formulates facial feature restoration as scale-aware transformation. The proposed Facial Feature Up-sampling (FFUP) module dynamically generates upsampling filters based on the original scale-factor priors, which facilitate our network to adapt to arbitrary face scales. Moreover, we further propose the facial feature embedding (FFE) module which leverages transformer to hierarchically extract diversity and robustness of facial latent. Thus, our FaceFormer achieves fidelity and robustness restored faces, which possess realistic and symmetrical details of facial components. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method trained with synthetic dataset generalizes better to a natural low quality images than current state-of-the-arts.
summary: Blind face restoration usually encounters with diverse scale face inputs, especially in the real world. However, most of the current works support specific scale faces, which limits its application ability in real-world scenarios. In this work, we propose a novel scale-aware blind face restoration framework, named FaceFormer, which formulates facial feature restoration as scale-aware transformation. The proposed Facial Feature Up-sampling (FFUP) module dynamically generates upsampling filters based on the original scale-factor priors, which facilitate our network to adapt to arbitrary face scales. Moreover, we further propose the facial feature embedding (FFE) module which leverages transformer to hierarchically extract diversity and robustness of facial latent. Thus, our FaceFormer achieves fidelity and robustness restored faces, which possess realistic and symmetrical details of facial components. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method trained with synthetic dataset generalizes better to a natural low quality images than current state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 盲人脸恢复通常会遇到不同尺度的人脸输入，尤其是在现实世界中。然而，目前大多数作品都支持特定比例的人脸，这限制了其在现实场景中的应用能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的尺度感知盲人面部恢复框架，名为 FaceFormer，它将面部特征恢复制定为尺度感知变换。所提出的面部特征上采样（FFUP）模块根据原始比例因子先验动态生成上采样滤波器，这有助于我们的网络适应任意面部比例。此外，我们进一步提出了面部特征嵌入（FFE）模块，该模块利用 Transformer 分层提取面部潜在特征的多样性和鲁棒性。因此，我们的 FaceFormer 实现了保真度和鲁棒性的恢复面部，具有真实且对称的面部成分细节。大量的实验表明，我们提出的用合成数据集训练的方法比当前最先进的技术更好地推广到自然的低质量图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FaceFormer的盲脸修复框架，通过引入尺度感知机制解决真实场景中多尺度人脸修复的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有盲脸修复方法仅支持特定尺度输入，难以适应真实世界中复杂多变的人脸尺度需求，限制了实际应用效果。
AI.method: 设计了面部特征上采样模块(FFUP)动态生成尺度感知滤波器，并结合Transformer的面部特征嵌入模块(FFE)分层提取鲁棒特征。
AI.result: 在合成数据集训练后，该方法在自然低质量图像上的修复效果优于现有最先进方法，能生成更真实对称的面部细节。
AI.conclusion: FaceFormer通过尺度感知机制和Transformer特征提取，有效提升了盲脸修复的跨尺度适应能力与修复质量。

authors_text: Zheng Chen,Ziwei Yang,Lingwei Zhu,Guang Shi,Kun Yue,Takashi Matsubara,Shigehiko Kanaya,MD Altaf-Ul-Amin
title: Cancer Subtyping by Improved Transcriptomic Features Using Vector Quantized Variational Autoencoder
title_zh: 使用矢量量化变分自动编码器通过改进的转录组特征进行癌症亚型分型
abstract: Defining and separating cancer subtypes is essential for facilitating personalized therapy modality and prognosis of patients. The definition of subtypes has been constantly recalibrated as a result of our deepened understanding. During this recalibration, researchers often rely on clustering of cancer data to provide an intuitive visual reference that could reveal the intrinsic characteristics of subtypes. The data being clustered are often omics data such as transcriptomics that have strong correlations to the underlying biological mechanism. However, while existing studies have shown promising results, they suffer from issues associated with omics data: sample scarcity and high dimensionality. As such, existing methods often impose unrealistic assumptions to extract useful features from the data while avoiding overfitting to spurious correlations. In this paper, we propose to leverage a recent strong generative model, Vector Quantized Variational AutoEncoder (VQ-VAE), to tackle the data issues and extract informative latent features that are crucial to the quality of subsequent clustering by retaining only information relevant to reconstructing the input. VQ-VAE does not impose strict assumptions and hence its latent features are better representations of the input, capable of yielding superior clustering performance with any mainstream clustering method. Extensive experiments and medical analysis on multiple datasets comprising 10 distinct cancers demonstrate the VQ-VAE clustering results can significantly and robustly improve prognosis over prevalent subtyping systems.
summary: Defining and separating cancer subtypes is essential for facilitating personalized therapy modality and prognosis of patients. The definition of subtypes has been constantly recalibrated as a result of our deepened understanding. During this recalibration, researchers often rely on clustering of cancer data to provide an intuitive visual reference that could reveal the intrinsic characteristics of subtypes. The data being clustered are often omics data such as transcriptomics that have strong correlations to the underlying biological mechanism. However, while existing studies have shown promising results, they suffer from issues associated with omics data: sample scarcity and high dimensionality. As such, existing methods often impose unrealistic assumptions to extract useful features from the data while avoiding overfitting to spurious correlations. In this paper, we propose to leverage a recent strong generative model, Vector Quantized Variational AutoEncoder (VQ-VAE), to tackle the data issues and extract informative latent features that are crucial to the quality of subsequent clustering by retaining only information relevant to reconstructing the input. VQ-VAE does not impose strict assumptions and hence its latent features are better representations of the input, capable of yielding superior clustering performance with any mainstream clustering method. Extensive experiments and medical analysis on multiple datasets comprising 10 distinct cancers demonstrate the VQ-VAE clustering results can significantly and robustly improve prognosis over prevalent subtyping systems.
abstract_zh: 定义和区分癌症亚型对于促进个性化治疗方式和患者预后至关重要。随着我们理解的加深，亚型的定义也在不断地重新校准。在重新校准过程中，研究人员通常依靠癌症数据的聚类来提供直观的视觉参考，从而揭示亚型的内在特征。聚类的数据通常是组学数据，例如与潜在的生物机制具有很强相关性的转录组学。然而，虽然现有研究显示出有希望的结果，但它们面临着与组学数据相关的问题：样本稀缺和高维度。因此，现有方法通常会强加不切实际的假设来从数据中提取有用的特征，同时避免过度拟合虚假相关性。在本文中，我们建议利用最近的强大生成模型矢量量化变分自动编码器（VQ-VAE）来解决数据问题并通过仅保留与重建输入相关的信息来提取对后续聚类质量至关重要的信息性潜在特征。 VQ-VAE 没有施加严格的假设，因此其潜在特征是输入的更好表示，能够通过任何主流聚类方法产生卓越的聚类性能。对包含 10 种不同癌症的多个数据集进行的广泛实验和医学分析表明，与流行的亚型分型系统相比，VQ-VAE 聚类结果可以显着且稳健地改善预后。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用改进的转录组特征进行癌症亚型划分，通过向量量化变分自编码器（VQ-VAE）解决高维数据和样本稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 现有癌症亚型划分方法受限于组学数据的高维度和样本稀缺性，导致过度拟合和亚型定义不准确，需更稳健的特征提取方法。
AI.method: 采用VQ-VAE生成模型提取转录组数据的潜在特征，通过量化离散化编码保留关键信息，避免强假设约束，提升聚类效果。
AI.result: 在包含10种癌症的多数据集实验中，VQ-VAE聚类结果显著优于现有分型系统，且对患者预后预测更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: VQ-VAE能有效提取生物相关特征，为癌症亚型划分提供更精准的工具，具有临床应用潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出利用改进的转录组特征进行癌症亚型划分，通过向量量化变分自编码器（VQ-VAE）解决高维数据和样本稀缺问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有癌症亚型划分方法受限于组学数据的高维度和样本稀缺性，导致过度拟合和亚型定义不准确，需更稳健的特征提取方法。
ai_content.method: 采用VQ-VAE生成模型提取转录组数据的潜在特征，通过量化离散化编码保留关键信息，避免强假设约束，提升聚类效果。
ai_content.result: 在包含10种癌症的多数据集实验中，VQ-VAE聚类结果显著优于现有分型系统，且对患者预后预测更具鲁棒性。
ai_content.conclusion: VQ-VAE能有效提取生物相关特征，为癌症亚型划分提供更精准的工具，具有临床应用潜力。

search_text: Cancer Subtyping by Improved Transcriptomic Features Using Vector Quantized Variational Autoencoder 使用矢量量化变分自动编码器通过改进的转录组特征进行癌症亚型分型 Defining and separating cancer subtypes is essential for facilitating personalized therapy modality and prognosis of patients. The definition of subtypes has been constantly recalibrated as a result of our deepened understanding. During this recalibration, researchers often rely on clustering of cancer data to provide an intuitive visual reference that could reveal the intrinsic characteristics of subtypes. The data being clustered are often omics data such as transcriptomics that have strong correlations to the underlying biological mechanism. However, while existing studies have shown promising results, they suffer from issues associated with omics data: sample scarcity and high dimensionality. As such, existing methods often impose unrealistic assumptions to extract useful features from the data while avoiding overfitting to spurious correlations. In this paper, we propose to leverage a recent strong generative model, Vector Quantized Variational AutoEncoder (VQ-VAE), to tackle the data issues and extract informative latent features that are crucial to the quality of subsequent clustering by retaining only information relevant to reconstructing the input. VQ-VAE does not impose strict assumptions and hence its latent features are better representations of the input, capable of yielding superior clustering performance with any mainstream clustering method. Extensive experiments and medical analysis on multiple datasets comprising 10 distinct cancers demonstrate the VQ-VAE clustering results can significantly and robustly improve prognosis over prevalent subtyping systems. 定义和区分癌症亚型对于促进个性化治疗方式和患者预后至关重要。随着我们理解的加深，亚型的定义也在不断地重新校准。在重新校准过程中，研究人员通常依靠癌症数据的聚类来提供直观的视觉参考，从而揭示亚型的内在特征。聚类的数据通常是组学数据，例如与潜在的生物机制具有很强相关性的转录组学。然而，虽然现有研究显示出有希望的结果，但它们面临着与组学数据相关的问题：样本稀缺和高维度。因此，现有方法通常会强加不切实际的假设来从数据中提取有用的特征，同时避免过度拟合虚假相关性。在本文中，我们建议利用最近的强大生成模型矢量量化变分自动编码器（VQ-VAE）来解决数据问题并通过仅保留与重建输入相关的信息来提取对后续聚类质量至关重要的信息性潜在特征。 VQ-VAE 没有施加严格的假设，因此其潜在特征是输入的更好表示，能够通过任何主流聚类方法产生卓越的聚类性能。对包含 10 种不同癌症的多个数据集进行的广泛实验和医学分析表明，与流行的亚型分型系统相比，VQ-VAE 聚类结果可以显着且稳健地改善预后。 本文提出利用改进的转录组特征进行癌症亚型划分，通过向量量化变分自编码器（VQ-VAE）解决高维数据和样本稀缺问题。 Zheng Chen,Ziwei Yang,Lingwei Zhu,Guang Shi,Kun Yue,Takashi Matsubara,Shigehiko Kanaya,MD Altaf-Ul-Amin cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Cristiano Saltori,Fabio Galasso,Giuseppe Fiameni,Nicu Sebe,Elisa Ricci,Fabio Poiesi
title: CoSMix: Compositional Semantic Mix for Domain Adaptation in 3D LiDAR Segmentation
title_zh: CoSMix：用于 3D LiDAR 分割中域适应的组合语义混合
abstract: 3D LiDAR semantic segmentation is fundamental for autonomous driving. Several Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods for point cloud data have been recently proposed to improve model generalization for different sensors and environments. Researchers working on UDA problems in the image domain have shown that sample mixing can mitigate domain shift. We propose a new approach of sample mixing for point cloud UDA, namely Compositional Semantic Mix (CoSMix), the first UDA approach for point cloud segmentation based on sample mixing. CoSMix consists of a two-branch symmetric network that can process labelled synthetic data (source) and real-world unlabelled point clouds (target) concurrently. Each branch operates on one domain by mixing selected pieces of data from the other one, and by using the semantic information derived from source labels and target pseudo-labels. We evaluate CoSMix on two large-scale datasets, showing that it outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin. Our code is available at https://github.com/saltoricristiano/cosmix-uda.
summary: 3D LiDAR semantic segmentation is fundamental for autonomous driving. Several Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods for point cloud data have been recently proposed to improve model generalization for different sensors and environments. Researchers working on UDA problems in the image domain have shown that sample mixing can mitigate domain shift. We propose a new approach of sample mixing for point cloud UDA, namely Compositional Semantic Mix (CoSMix), the first UDA approach for point cloud segmentation based on sample mixing. CoSMix consists of a two-branch symmetric network that can process labelled synthetic data (source) and real-world unlabelled point clouds (target) concurrently. Each branch operates on one domain by mixing selected pieces of data from the other one, and by using the semantic information derived from source labels and target pseudo-labels. We evaluate CoSMix on two large-scale datasets, showing that it outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin. Our code is available at https://github.com/saltoricristiano/cosmix-uda.
abstract_zh: 3D LiDAR 语义分割是自动驾驶的基础。最近提出了几种针对点云数据的无监督域适应（UDA）方法，以提高不同传感器和环境的模型泛化能力。研究图像域 UDA 问题的研究人员表明，样本混合可以减轻域偏移。我们提出了一种新的点云 UDA 样本混合方法，即组合语义混合（CoSMix），这是第一个基于样本混合的点云分割 UDA 方法。 CoSMix 由一个两分支对称网络组成，可以同时处理标记的合成数据（源）和现实世界的未标记点云（目标）。每个分支通过混合来自另一个域的选定数据片段并使用从源标签和目标伪标签导出的语义信息来在一个域上进行操作。我们在两个大型数据集上评估 CoSMix，结果表明它大幅优于最先进的方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/saltoricristiano/cosmix-uda 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CoSMix的样本混合方法，用于3D LiDAR语义分割的领域自适应，以提高模型在不同传感器和环境下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的无监督领域自适应（UDA）方法在图像领域通过样本混合缓解领域偏移，但点云数据的UDA方法尚未有效利用这一策略，因此需要探索适用于点云的样本混合方法。
AI.method: CoSMix采用双分支对称网络，同时处理带标签的合成数据（源域）和无标签的真实点云（目标域），通过跨领域数据混合及源标签与目标伪标签的语义信息进行优化。
AI.result: 在两个大规模数据集上评估表明，CoSMix显著优于现有最先进的方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CoSMix通过创新的样本混合策略，有效解决了3D LiDAR分割中的领域自适应问题，为点云UDA提供了新思路。
