authors_text: Shuyi Mao,Xinpeng Li,Junyao Chen,Xiaojiang Peng
title: AU-Supervised Convolutional Vision Transformers for Synthetic Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: 用于合成面部表情识别的 AU 监督卷积视觉变换器
abstract: The paper describes our proposed methodology for the six basic expression classification track of Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) Competition 2022. In Learing from Synthetic Data(LSD) task, facial expression recognition (FER) methods aim to learn the representation of expression from the artificially generated data and generalise to real data. Because of the ambiguous of the synthetic data and the objectivity of the facial Action Unit (AU), we resort to the AU information for performance boosting, and make contributions as follows. First, to adapt the model to synthetic scenarios, we use the knowledge from pre-trained large-scale face recognition data. Second, we propose a conceptually-new framework, termed as AU-Supervised Convolutional Vision Transformers (AU-CVT), which clearly improves the performance of FER by jointly training auxiliary datasets with AU or pseudo AU labels. Our AU-CVT achieved F1 score as $0.6863$, accuracy as $0.7433$ on the validation set. The source code of our work is publicly available online: https://github.com/msy1412/ABAW4
summary: The paper describes our proposed methodology for the six basic expression classification track of Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) Competition 2022. In Learing from Synthetic Data(LSD) task, facial expression recognition (FER) methods aim to learn the representation of expression from the artificially generated data and generalise to real data. Because of the ambiguous of the synthetic data and the objectivity of the facial Action Unit (AU), we resort to the AU information for performance boosting, and make contributions as follows. First, to adapt the model to synthetic scenarios, we use the knowledge from pre-trained large-scale face recognition data. Second, we propose a conceptually-new framework, termed as AU-Supervised Convolutional Vision Transformers (AU-CVT), which clearly improves the performance of FER by jointly training auxiliary datasets with AU or pseudo AU labels. Our AU-CVT achieved F1 score as $0.6863$, accuracy as $0.7433$ on the validation set. The source code of our work is publicly available online: https://github.com/msy1412/ABAW4
abstract_zh: 本文描述了我们为 2022 年野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛的六个基本表情分类赛道提出的方法。在合成数据学习 (LSD) 任务中，面部表情识别 (FER) 方法旨在从人工生成的数据中学习表情的表示并推广到真实数据。由于合成数据的模糊性和面部动作单元（AU）的客观性，我们利用AU信息来提高性能，并做出如下贡献。首先，为了使模型适应合成场景，我们使用预先训练的大规模人脸识别数据中的知识。其次，我们提出了一个概念上新的框架，称为 AU 监督卷积视觉变换器（AU-CVT），它通过联合训练具有 AU 或伪 AU 标签的辅助数据集，明显提高了 FER 的性能。我们的 AU-CVT 在验证集上获得的 F1 分数为 0.6863 美元，准确度为 0.7433 美元。我们工作的源代码可在线公开获取：https://github.com/msy1412/ABAW4

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动作单元（AU）监督的卷积视觉Transformer（AU-CVT）框架，用于合成数据驱动的面部表情识别任务，并在ABAW 2022竞赛中取得良好效果。
AI.motivation: 合成数据存在歧义性且面部动作单元（AU）具有客观性，传统方法难以有效利用AU信息提升表情识别性能，需探索新方法增强模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 首先利用预训练大规模人脸识别模型的知识适配合成场景；其次提出AU-CVT框架，通过联合训练带有AU或伪AU标签的辅助数据集，实现表情识别与动作单元监督的协同优化。
AI.result: 在验证集上达到F1分数0.6863和准确率0.7433，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: AU-CVT通过整合动作单元监督显著提升了合成数据驱动的表情识别性能，验证了多模态联合训练的有效性。

In Learing from Synthetic Data(LSD) task, facial expression recognition (FER) methods aim to learn the representation of expression from the artificially generated data and generalise to real data. Because of the ambiguous of the synthetic data and the objectivity of the facial Action Unit (AU), we resort to the AU information for performance boosting, and make contributions as follows. First, to adapt the model to synthetic scenarios, we use the knowledge from pre-trained large-scale face recognition data. Second, we propose a conceptually-new framework, termed as AU-Supervised Convolutional Vision Transformers (AU-CVT), which clearly improves the performance of FER by jointly training auxiliary datasets with AU or pseudo AU labels. Our AU-CVT achieved F1 score as $0.6863$, accuracy as $0.7433$ on the validation set. The source code of our work is publicly available online: https://github.com/msy1412/ABAW4 本文描述了我们为 2022 年野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛的六个基本表情分类赛道提出的方法。在合成数据学习 (LSD) 任务中，面部表情识别 (FER) 方法旨在从人工生成的数据中学习表情的表示并推广到真实数据。由于合成数据的模糊性和面部动作单元（AU）的客观性，我们利用AU信息来提高性能，并做出如下贡献。首先，为了使模型适应合成场景，我们使用预先训练的大规模人脸识别数据中的知识。其次，我们提出了一个概念上新的框架，称为 AU 监督卷积视觉变换器（AU-CVT），它通过联合训练具有 AU 或伪 AU 标签的辅助数据集，明显提高了 FER 的性能。我们的 AU-CVT 在验证集上获得的 F1 分数为 0.6863 美元，准确度为 0.7433 美元。我们工作的源代码可在线公开获取：https://github.com/msy1412/ABAW4 本文提出了一种基于动作单元（AU）监督的卷积视觉Transformer（AU-CVT）框架，用于合成数据驱动的面部表情识别任务，并在ABAW 2022竞赛中取得良好效果。 Shuyi Mao,Xinpeng Li,Junyao Chen,Xiaojiang Peng cs.CV

authors_text: Yusuke Hosoya,Masanori Suganuma,Takayuki Okatani
title: Rethinking Open-Set Object Detection: Issues, a New Formulation, and Taxonomy
title_zh: 重新思考开放集目标检测：问题、新表述和分类法
abstract: Open-set object detection (OSOD), a task involving the detection of unknown objects while accurately detecting known objects, has recently gained attention. However, we identify a fundamental issue with the problem formulation employed in current OSOD studies. Inherent to object detection is knowing "what to detect," which contradicts the idea of identifying "unknown" objects. This sets OSOD apart from open-set recognition (OSR). This contradiction complicates a proper evaluation of methods' performance, a fact that previous studies have overlooked. Next, we propose a novel formulation wherein detectors are required to detect both known and unknown classes within specified super-classes of object classes. This new formulation is free from the aforementioned issues and has practical applications. Finally, we design benchmark tests utilizing existing datasets and report the experimental evaluation of existing OSOD methods. The results show that existing methods fail to accurately detect unknown objects due to misclassification of known and unknown classes rather than incorrect bounding box prediction. As a byproduct, we introduce a taxonomy of OSOD, resolving confusion prevalent in the literature. We anticipate that our study will encourage the research community to reconsider OSOD and facilitate progress in the right direction.
summary: Open-set object detection (OSOD), a task involving the detection of unknown objects while accurately detecting known objects, has recently gained attention. However, we identify a fundamental issue with the problem formulation employed in current OSOD studies. Inherent to object detection is knowing "what to detect," which contradicts the idea of identifying "unknown" objects. This sets OSOD apart from open-set recognition (OSR). This contradiction complicates a proper evaluation of methods' performance, a fact that previous studies have overlooked. Next, we propose a novel formulation wherein detectors are required to detect both known and unknown classes within specified super-classes of object classes. This new formulation is free from the aforementioned issues and has practical applications. Finally, we design benchmark tests utilizing existing datasets and report the experimental evaluation of existing OSOD methods. The results show that existing methods fail to accurately detect unknown objects due to misclassification of known and unknown classes rather than incorrect bounding box prediction. As a byproduct, we introduce a taxonomy of OSOD, resolving confusion prevalent in the literature. We anticipate that our study will encourage the research community to reconsider OSOD and facilitate progress in the right direction.
abstract_zh: 开放集对象检测（OSOD）是一项涉及检测未知对象同时准确检测已知对象的任务，最近引起了人们的关注。然而，我们发现当前 OSOD 研究中所采用的问题表述存在一个根本问题。对象检测的本质是知道“检测什么”，这与识别“未知”对象的想法相矛盾。这将 OSOD 与开放集识别 (OSR) 区分开来。这种矛盾使得对方法性能的正确评估变得复杂，这是以前的研究忽视的事实。接下来，我们提出了一种新颖的公式，其中检测器需要检测对象类的指定超类中的已知和未知类。这种新配方没有上述问题并且具有实际应用价值。最后，我们利用现有数据集设计基准测试，并报告现有 OSOD 方法的实验评估。结果表明，现有方法无法准确检测未知对象，这是由于已知和未知类的错误分类，而不是错误的边界框预测。作为副产品，我们引入了 OSOD 分类法，解决了文献中普遍存在的混乱。我们预计我们的研究将鼓励研究界重新考虑 OSOD 并促进朝着正确方向取得进展。

AI.tldr: 本文重新思考开放集目标检测（OSOD）的定义，提出新公式并设计基准测试，揭示现有方法在检测未知对象时的不足，并引入OSOD分类法。
AI.motivation: 现有OSOD研究存在根本矛盾：目标检测需明确检测内容，而识别未知对象需模糊定义，导致性能评估困难，需重新定义问题框架。
AI.method: 提出新公式要求检测器在指定超类中同时检测已知和未知类别，设计基准测试并评估现有方法，引入OSOD分类法以统一术语。
AI.result: 实验表明现有方法无法准确检测未知对象，主要因已知与未知类别的误分类，而非边界框预测错误。
AI.conclusion: 本文推动研究者重新审视OSOD定义，通过新框架和分类法促进领域正确发展。

authors_text: Edoardo Remelli,Timur Bagautdinov,Shunsuke Saito,Tomas Simon,Chenglei Wu,Shih-En Wei,Kaiwen Guo,Zhe Cao,Fabian Prada,Jason Saragih,Yaser Sheikh
title: Drivable Volumetric Avatars using Texel-Aligned Features
title_zh: 使用 Texel 对齐特征的可驾驶体积化身
abstract: Photorealistic telepresence requires both high-fidelity body modeling and faithful driving to enable dynamically synthesized appearance that is indistinguishable from reality. In this work, we propose an end-to-end framework that addresses two core challenges in modeling and driving full-body avatars of real people. One challenge is driving an avatar while staying faithful to details and dynamics that cannot be captured by a global low-dimensional parameterization such as body pose. Our approach supports driving of clothed avatars with wrinkles and motion that a real driving performer exhibits beyond the training corpus. Unlike existing global state representations or non-parametric screen-space approaches, we introduce texel-aligned features -- a localised representation which can leverage both the structural prior of a skeleton-based parametric model and observed sparse image signals at the same time. Another challenge is modeling a temporally coherent clothed avatar, which typically requires precise surface tracking. To circumvent this, we propose a novel volumetric avatar representation by extending mixtures of volumetric primitives to articulated objects. By explicitly incorporating articulation, our approach naturally generalizes to unseen poses. We also introduce a localized viewpoint conditioning, which leads to a large improvement in generalization of view-dependent appearance. The proposed volumetric representation does not require high-quality mesh tracking as a prerequisite and brings significant quality improvements compared to mesh-based counterparts. In our experiments, we carefully examine our design choices and demonstrate the efficacy of our approach, outperforming the state-of-the-art methods on challenging driving scenarios.
summary: Photorealistic telepresence requires both high-fidelity body modeling and faithful driving to enable dynamically synthesized appearance that is indistinguishable from reality. In this work, we propose an end-to-end framework that addresses two core challenges in modeling and driving full-body avatars of real people. One challenge is driving an avatar while staying faithful to details and dynamics that cannot be captured by a global low-dimensional parameterization such as body pose. Our approach supports driving of clothed avatars with wrinkles and motion that a real driving performer exhibits beyond the training corpus. Unlike existing global state representations or non-parametric screen-space approaches, we introduce texel-aligned features -- a localised representation which can leverage both the structural prior of a skeleton-based parametric model and observed sparse image signals at the same time. Another challenge is modeling a temporally coherent clothed avatar, which typically requires precise surface tracking. To circumvent this, we propose a novel volumetric avatar representation by extending mixtures of volumetric primitives to articulated objects. By explicitly incorporating articulation, our approach naturally generalizes to unseen poses. We also introduce a localized viewpoint conditioning, which leads to a large improvement in generalization of view-dependent appearance. The proposed volumetric representation does not require high-quality mesh tracking as a prerequisite and brings significant quality improvements compared to mesh-based counterparts. In our experiments, we carefully examine our design choices and demonstrate the efficacy of our approach, outperforming the state-of-the-art methods on challenging driving scenarios.
abstract_zh: 逼真的临场感需要高保真身体建模和忠实驾驶，以实现与现实无法区分的动态合成外观。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个端到端框架，解决了建模和驱动真人全身化身的两个核心挑战。其中一项挑战是驾驶化身，同时忠实于全局低维参数化（例如身体姿势）无法捕获的细节和动态。我们的方法支持驾驶带有皱纹和运动的着装化身，这是真正的驾驶表演者在训练语料库之外表现出来的。与现有的全局状态表示或非参数屏幕空间方法不同，我们引入了纹素对齐特征——一种局部表示，可以同时利用基于骨架的参数模型的结构先验和观察到的稀疏图像信号。另一个挑战是对时间连贯的穿着化身进行建模，这通常需要精确的表面跟踪。为了解决这个问题，我们通过将体积基元的混合扩展到铰接对象来提出一种新颖的体积化身表示。通过明确地结合清晰度，我们的方法自然地推广到看不见的姿势。我们还引入了局部视点调节，这使得依赖于视图的外观的泛化有了很大的改进。所提出的体积表示不需要高质量的网格跟踪作为先决条件，并且与基于网格的对应物相比带来了显着的质量改进。在我们的实验中，我们仔细检查我们的设计选择并证明我们方法的有效性，在具有挑战性的驾驶场景中优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端框架，生成高保真可驱动的全身化身，通过处理衣物皱褶和复杂运动，超越训练数据限制。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以捕捉化身细节动态，且依赖精确表面跟踪或全局参数化，无法有效处理未见姿态和视角变化。
AI.method: 引入Texel对齐特征结合骨架模型结构先验与稀疏图像信号，并提出基于体积原语混合的关节物体表示，配合局部视角条件。
AI.result: 在复杂驾驶场景中优于现有方法，显著提升未见姿态泛化能力与视角依赖外观表现，无需高质量网格跟踪。
AI.conclusion: 该方法解决了化身建模与驱动的关键挑战，提供无需网格跟踪的高质量体素表示，推动逼真远程存在技术发展。

In our experiments, we carefully examine our design choices and demonstrate the efficacy of our approach, outperforming the state-of-the-art methods on challenging driving scenarios. 逼真的临场感需要高保真身体建模和忠实驾驶，以实现与现实无法区分的动态合成外观。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个端到端框架，解决了建模和驱动真人全身化身的两个核心挑战。其中一项挑战是驾驶化身，同时忠实于全局低维参数化（例如身体姿势）无法捕获的细节和动态。我们的方法支持驾驶带有皱纹和运动的着装化身，这是真正的驾驶表演者在训练语料库之外表现出来的。与现有的全局状态表示或非参数屏幕空间方法不同，我们引入了纹素对齐特征——一种局部表示，可以同时利用基于骨架的参数模型的结构先验和观察到的稀疏图像信号。另一个挑战是对时间连贯的穿着化身进行建模，这通常需要精确的表面跟踪。为了解决这个问题，我们通过将体积基元的混合扩展到铰接对象来提出一种新颖的体积化身表示。通过明确地结合清晰度，我们的方法自然地推广到看不见的姿势。我们还引入了局部视点调节，这使得依赖于视图的外观的泛化有了很大的改进。所提出的体积表示不需要高质量的网格跟踪作为先决条件，并且与基于网格的对应物相比带来了显着的质量改进。在我们的实验中，我们仔细检查我们的设计选择并证明我们方法的有效性，在具有挑战性的驾驶场景中优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种端到端框架，生成高保真可驱动的全身化身，通过处理衣物皱褶和复杂运动，超越训练数据限制。 Edoardo Remelli,Timur Bagautdinov,Shunsuke Saito,Tomas Simon,Chenglei Wu,Shih-En Wei,Kaiwen Guo,Zhe Cao,Fabian Prada,Jason Saragih,Yaser Sheikh cs.CV

authors_text: Ricardo Bigolin Lanfredi,Joyce D. Schroeder,Tolga Tasdizen
title: Localization supervision of chest x-ray classifiers using label-specific eye-tracking annotation
title_zh: 使用特定标签的眼动追踪注释对胸部 X 射线分类器进行定位监督
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been successfully applied to chest x-ray (CXR) images. Moreover, annotated bounding boxes have been shown to improve the interpretability of a CNN in terms of localizing abnormalities. However, only a few relatively small CXR datasets containing bounding boxes are available, and collecting them is very costly. Opportunely, eye-tracking (ET) data can be collected in a non-intrusive way during the clinical workflow of a radiologist. We use ET data recorded from radiologists while dictating CXR reports to train CNNs. We extract snippets from the ET data by associating them with the dictation of keywords and use them to supervise the localization of specific abnormalities. We show that this method improves a model's interpretability without impacting its image-level classification.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been successfully applied to chest x-ray (CXR) images. Moreover, annotated bounding boxes have been shown to improve the interpretability of a CNN in terms of localizing abnormalities. However, only a few relatively small CXR datasets containing bounding boxes are available, and collecting them is very costly. Opportunely, eye-tracking (ET) data can be collected in a non-intrusive way during the clinical workflow of a radiologist. We use ET data recorded from radiologists while dictating CXR reports to train CNNs. We extract snippets from the ET data by associating them with the dictation of keywords and use them to supervise the localization of specific abnormalities. We show that this method improves a model's interpretability without impacting its image-level classification.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 已成功应用于胸部 X 射线 (CXR) 图像。此外，带注释的边界框已被证明可以提高 CNN 在定位异常方面的可解释性。然而，只有一些相对较小的包含边界框的 CXR 数据集可用，并且收集它们的成本非常高。恰巧的是，可以在放射科医生的临床工作流程中以非侵入式方式收集眼动追踪 (ET) 数据。我们使用放射科医生记录的 ET 数据，同时口述 CXR 报告来训练 CNN。我们通过将 ET 数据与关键字听写相关联来提取片段，并使用它们来监督特定异常的定位。我们证明，这种方法提高了模型的可解释性，而不影响其图像级分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用放射科医生眼动追踪数据监督胸部X光分类器的异常定位，以提高模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有胸部X光数据集的标注框稀缺且成本高昂，而眼动数据可在临床流程中非侵入式收集，为模型解释性提供新途径。
AI.method: 通过关联放射科医生口述关键词与眼动数据片段，提取特定异常关注区域作为监督信号训练CNN定位模块。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持图像分类性能的同时，显著提升了模型对异常区域的定位可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 眼动追踪数据可作为有效监督信号增强医学图像分类器的可解释性，为数据标注提供低成本替代方案。

authors_text: Samir Jain,Ayan Seal,Aparajita Ojha
title: A Hybrid Convolutional Neural Network with Meta Feature Learning for Abnormality Detection in Wireless Capsule Endoscopy Images
title_zh: 用于无线胶囊内窥镜图像异常检测的具有元特征学习的混合卷积神经网络
abstract: Wireless Capsule Endoscopy is one of the most advanced non-invasive methods for the examination of gastrointestinal tracts. An intelligent computer-aided diagnostic system for detecting gastrointestinal abnormalities like polyp, bleeding, inflammation, etc. is highly exigent in wireless capsule endoscopy image analysis. Abnormalities greatly differ in their shape, size, color, and texture, and some appear to be visually similar to normal regions. This poses a challenge in designing a binary classifier due to intra-class variations. In this study, a hybrid convolutional neural network is proposed for abnormality detection that extracts a rich pool of meaningful features from wireless capsule endoscopy images using a variety of convolution operations. It consists of three parallel convolutional neural networks, each with a distinctive feature learning capability. The first network utilizes depthwise separable convolution, while the second employs cosine normalized convolution operation. A novel meta-feature extraction mechanism is introduced in the third network, to extract patterns from the statistical information drawn over the features generated from the first and second networks and its own previous layer. The network trio effectively handles intra-class variance and efficiently detects gastrointestinal abnormalities. The proposed hybrid convolutional neural network model is trained and tested on two widely used publicly available datasets. The test results demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms six state-of-the-art methods with 97\% and 98\% classification accuracy on KID and Kvasir-Capsule datasets respectively. Cross dataset evaluation results also demonstrate the generalization performance of the proposed model.
summary: Wireless Capsule Endoscopy is one of the most advanced non-invasive methods for the examination of gastrointestinal tracts. An intelligent computer-aided diagnostic system for detecting gastrointestinal abnormalities like polyp, bleeding, inflammation, etc. is highly exigent in wireless capsule endoscopy image analysis. Abnormalities greatly differ in their shape, size, color, and texture, and some appear to be visually similar to normal regions. This poses a challenge in designing a binary classifier due to intra-class variations. In this study, a hybrid convolutional neural network is proposed for abnormality detection that extracts a rich pool of meaningful features from wireless capsule endoscopy images using a variety of convolution operations. It consists of three parallel convolutional neural networks, each with a distinctive feature learning capability. The first network utilizes depthwise separable convolution, while the second employs cosine normalized convolution operation. A novel meta-feature extraction mechanism is introduced in the third network, to extract patterns from the statistical information drawn over the features generated from the first and second networks and its own previous layer. The network trio effectively handles intra-class variance and efficiently detects gastrointestinal abnormalities. The proposed hybrid convolutional neural network model is trained and tested on two widely used publicly available datasets. The test results demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms six state-of-the-art methods with 97\% and 98\% classification accuracy on KID and Kvasir-Capsule datasets respectively. Cross dataset evaluation results also demonstrate the generalization performance of the proposed model.
abstract_zh: 无线胶囊内窥镜是最先进的非侵入性胃肠道检查方法之一。无线胶囊内窥镜图像分析非常需要一种用于检测胃肠道异常（如息肉、出血、炎症等）的智能计算机辅助诊断系统。异常区域的形状、大小、颜色和纹理有很大差异，有些异常区域在视觉上与正常区域相似。由于类内变化，这给设计二元分类器带来了挑战。在本研究中，提出了一种用于异常检测的混合卷积神经网络，该网络使用各种卷积运算从无线胶囊内窥镜图像中提取丰富的有意义的特征。它由三个并行卷积神经网络组成，每个网络都具有独特的特征学习能力。第一个网络采用深度可分离卷积，而第二个网络采用余弦归一化卷积运算。第三网络中引入了一种新颖的元特征提取机制，以从第一网络和第二网络及其前一层生成的特征上提取的统计信息中提取模式。网络三人组有效处理类内差异并有效检测胃肠道异常。所提出的混合卷积神经网络模型在两个广泛使用的公开数据集上进行训练和测试。测试结果表明，所提出的模型优于六种最先进的方法，在 KID 和 Kvasir-Capsule 数据集上的分类准确率分别为 97% 和 98%。跨数据集评估结果也证明了所提出模型的泛化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合卷积神经网络模型，用于无线胶囊内镜图像中的异常检测。
AI.motivation: 无线胶囊内镜图像中的异常表现形式多样且与正常区域视觉相似，导致传统二分类方法难以处理类内差异。
AI.method: 构建包含三个并行卷积网络的混合架构：深度可分离卷积网络、余弦归一化卷积网络及引入元特征提取机制的网络，通过统计前两网络特征信息实现跨网络特征融合。
AI.result: 在KID和Kvasir-Capsule数据集上分别达到97%和98%的分类准确率，优于六种先进方法，且具备跨数据集泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该混合模型通过多网络特征协同学习有效解决类内差异问题，为无线胶囊内镜智能诊断提供可靠方案。

authors_text: Qinying Liu,Zilei Wang
title: Collaborating Domain-shared and Target-specific Feature Clustering for Cross-domain 3D Action Recognition
title_zh: 协作域共享和特定目标特征聚类以实现跨域 3D 动作识别
abstract: In this work, we consider the problem of cross-domain 3D action recognition in the open-set setting, which has been rarely explored before. Specifically, there is a source domain and a target domain that contain the skeleton sequences with different styles and categories, and our purpose is to cluster the target data by utilizing the labeled source data and unlabeled target data. For such a challenging task, this paper presents a novel approach dubbed CoDT to collaboratively cluster the domain-shared features and target-specific features. CoDT consists of two parallel branches. One branch aims to learn domain-shared features with supervised learning in the source domain, while the other is to learn target-specific features using contrastive learning in the target domain. To cluster the features, we propose an online clustering algorithm that enables simultaneous promotion of robust pseudo label generation and feature clustering. Furthermore, to leverage the complementarity of domain-shared features and target-specific features, we propose a novel collaborative clustering strategy to enforce pair-wise relationship consistency between the two branches. We conduct extensive experiments on multiple cross-domain 3D action recognition datasets, and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
summary: In this work, we consider the problem of cross-domain 3D action recognition in the open-set setting, which has been rarely explored before. Specifically, there is a source domain and a target domain that contain the skeleton sequences with different styles and categories, and our purpose is to cluster the target data by utilizing the labeled source data and unlabeled target data. For such a challenging task, this paper presents a novel approach dubbed CoDT to collaboratively cluster the domain-shared features and target-specific features. CoDT consists of two parallel branches. One branch aims to learn domain-shared features with supervised learning in the source domain, while the other is to learn target-specific features using contrastive learning in the target domain. To cluster the features, we propose an online clustering algorithm that enables simultaneous promotion of robust pseudo label generation and feature clustering. Furthermore, to leverage the complementarity of domain-shared features and target-specific features, we propose a novel collaborative clustering strategy to enforce pair-wise relationship consistency between the two branches. We conduct extensive experiments on multiple cross-domain 3D action recognition datasets, and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们考虑了开放集环境中的跨域 3D 动作识别问题，这在以前很少被探索过。具体来说，有一个源域和一个目标域，其中包含不同风格和类别的骨架序列，我们的目的是利用标记的源数据和未标记的目标数据对目标数据进行聚类。对于这样一项具有挑战性的任务，本文提出了一种称为 CoDT 的新颖方法来协作聚类域共享特征和目标特定特征。 CoDT 由两个并行分支组成。一个分支的目标是在源域中通过监督学习来学习域共享特征，而另一个分支的目标是在目标域中使用对比学习来学习目标特定的特征。为了对特征进行聚类，我们提出了一种在线聚类算法，该算法能够同时促进鲁棒的伪标签生成和特征聚类。此外，为了利用域共享特征和目标特定特征的互补性，我们提出了一种新颖的协作聚类策略来强制两个分支之间的成对关系一致性。我们对多个跨域 3D 动作识别数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在开放集设置下，利用源域有标签数据和目标域无标签数据进行跨领域3D动作识别的聚类问题。

AI.conclusion: 该方法通过协作聚类策略有效提升了跨领域3D动作识别的性能。

search_text: Collaborating Domain-shared and Target-specific Feature Clustering for Cross-domain 3D Action Recognition 协作域共享和特定目标特征聚类以实现跨域 3D 动作识别 In this work, we consider the problem of cross-domain 3D action recognition in the open-set setting, which has been rarely explored before. Specifically, there is a source domain and a target domain that contain the skeleton sequences with different styles and categories, and our purpose is to cluster the target data by utilizing the labeled source data and unlabeled target data. For such a challenging task, this paper presents a novel approach dubbed CoDT to collaboratively cluster the domain-shared features and target-specific features. CoDT consists of two parallel branches. One branch aims to learn domain-shared features with supervised learning in the source domain, while the other is to learn target-specific features using contrastive learning in the target domain. To cluster the features, we propose an online clustering algorithm that enables simultaneous promotion of robust pseudo label generation and feature clustering. Furthermore, to leverage the complementarity of domain-shared features and target-specific features, we propose a novel collaborative clustering strategy to enforce pair-wise relationship consistency between the two branches. We conduct extensive experiments on multiple cross-domain 3D action recognition datasets, and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. 在这项工作中，我们考虑了开放集环境中的跨域 3D 动作识别问题，这在以前很少被探索过。具体来说，有一个源域和一个目标域，其中包含不同风格和类别的骨架序列，我们的目的是利用标记的源数据和未标记的目标数据对目标数据进行聚类。对于这样一项具有挑战性的任务，本文提出了一种称为 CoDT 的新颖方法来协作聚类域共享特征和目标特定特征。 CoDT 由两个并行分支组成。一个分支的目标是在源域中通过监督学习来学习域共享特征，而另一个分支的目标是在目标域中使用对比学习来学习目标特定的特征。为了对特征进行聚类，我们提出了一种在线聚类算法，该算法能够同时促进鲁棒的伪标签生成和特征聚类。此外，为了利用域共享特征和目标特定特征的互补性，我们提出了一种新颖的协作聚类策略来强制两个分支之间的成对关系一致性。我们对多个跨域 3D 动作识别数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果证明了我们方法的有效性。 本文研究在开放集设置下，利用源域有标签数据和目标域无标签数据进行跨领域3D动作识别的聚类问题。 Qinying Liu,Zilei Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Can Firtina,Kamlesh Pillai,Gurpreet S. Kalsi,Bharathwaj Suresh,Damla Senol Cali,Jeremie Kim,Taha Shahroodi,Meryem Banu Cavlak,Joel Lindegger,Mohammed Alser,Juan Gómez Luna,Sreenivas Subramoney,Onur Mutlu
title: ApHMM: Accelerating Profile Hidden Markov Models for Fast and Energy-Efficient Genome Analysis
title_zh: ApHMM：加速剖面隐马尔可夫模型，实现快速、节能的基因组分析
abstract: Profile hidden Markov models (pHMMs) are widely employed in various bioinformatics applications to identify similarities between biological sequences, such as DNA or protein sequences. In pHMMs, sequences are represented as graph structures. These probabilities are subsequently used to compute the similarity score between a sequence and a pHMM graph. The Baum-Welch algorithm, a prevalent and highly accurate method, utilizes these probabilities to optimize and compute similarity scores. However, the Baum-Welch algorithm is computationally intensive, and existing solutions offer either software-only or hardware-only approaches with fixed pHMM designs. We identify an urgent need for a flexible, high-performance, and energy-efficient HW/SW co-design to address the major inefficiencies in the Baum-Welch algorithm for pHMMs. We introduce ApHMM, the first flexible acceleration framework designed to significantly reduce both computational and energy overheads associated with the Baum-Welch algorithm for pHMMs. ApHMM tackles the major inefficiencies in the Baum-Welch algorithm by 1) designing flexible hardware to accommodate various pHMM designs, 2) exploiting predictable data dependency patterns through on-chip memory with memoization techniques, 3) rapidly filtering out negligible computations using a hardware-based filter, and 4) minimizing redundant computations. ApHMM achieves substantial speedups of 15.55x - 260.03x, 1.83x - 5.34x, and 27.97x when compared to CPU, GPU, and FPGA implementations of the Baum-Welch algorithm, respectively. ApHMM outperforms state-of-the-art CPU implementations in three key bioinformatics applications: 1) error correction, 2) protein family search, and 3) multiple sequence alignment, by 1.29x - 59.94x, 1.03x - 1.75x, and 1.03x - 1.95x, respectively, while improving their energy efficiency by 64.24x - 115.46x, 1.75x, 1.96x.
summary: Profile hidden Markov models (pHMMs) are widely employed in various bioinformatics applications to identify similarities between biological sequences, such as DNA or protein sequences. In pHMMs, sequences are represented as graph structures. These probabilities are subsequently used to compute the similarity score between a sequence and a pHMM graph. The Baum-Welch algorithm, a prevalent and highly accurate method, utilizes these probabilities to optimize and compute similarity scores. However, the Baum-Welch algorithm is computationally intensive, and existing solutions offer either software-only or hardware-only approaches with fixed pHMM designs. We identify an urgent need for a flexible, high-performance, and energy-efficient HW/SW co-design to address the major inefficiencies in the Baum-Welch algorithm for pHMMs. We introduce ApHMM, the first flexible acceleration framework designed to significantly reduce both computational and energy overheads associated with the Baum-Welch algorithm for pHMMs. ApHMM tackles the major inefficiencies in the Baum-Welch algorithm by 1) designing flexible hardware to accommodate various pHMM designs, 2) exploiting predictable data dependency patterns through on-chip memory with memoization techniques, 3) rapidly filtering out negligible computations using a hardware-based filter, and 4) minimizing redundant computations. ApHMM achieves substantial speedups of 15.55x - 260.03x, 1.83x - 5.34x, and 27.97x when compared to CPU, GPU, and FPGA implementations of the Baum-Welch algorithm, respectively. ApHMM outperforms state-of-the-art CPU implementations in three key bioinformatics applications: 1) error correction, 2) protein family search, and 3) multiple sequence alignment, by 1.29x - 59.94x, 1.03x - 1.75x, and 1.03x - 1.95x, respectively, while improving their energy efficiency by 64.24x - 115.46x, 1.75x, 1.96x.
abstract_zh: 轮廓隐马尔可夫模型 (pHMM) 广泛应用于各种生物信息学应用中，以识别生物序列（例如 DNA 或蛋白质序列）之间的相似性。在 pHMM 中，序列被表示为图形结构。这些概率随后用于计算序列和 pHMM 图之间的相似性得分。 Baum-Welch 算法是一种流行且高度准确的方法，它利用这些概率来优化和计算相似度分数。然而，Baum-Welch 算法计算量大，现有解决方案提供具有固定 pHMM 设计的纯软件或纯硬件方法。我们发现迫切需要灵活、高性能和节能的硬件/软件协同设计，以解决 pHMM 的 Baum-Welch 算法的主要低效率问题。我们推出了 ApHMM，这是第一个灵活的加速框架，旨在显着减少与 pHMM 的 Baum-Welch 算法相关的计算和能源开销。 ApHMM 通过以下方式解决 Baum-Welch 算法中主要的低效率问题：1）设计灵活的硬件以适应各种 pHMM 设计，2）通过具有记忆技术的片上存储器利用可预测的数据依赖模式，3）使用基于硬件的过滤器快速过滤掉可忽略的计算，以及 4）最小化冗余计算。与 Baum-Welch 算法的 CPU、GPU 和 FPGA 实现相比，ApHMM 分别实现了 15.55x - 260.03x、1.83x - 5.34x 和 27.97x 的显着加速。 ApHMM 在三个关键生物信息学应用中的性能优于最先进的 CPU 实现：1) 纠错、2) 蛋白质家族搜索和 3) 多重序列比对，分别提高了 1.29x - 59.94x、1.03x - 1.75x 和 1.03x - 1.95x，同时将能源效率提高了 64.24x - 115.46x， 1.75 倍、1.96 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ApHMM框架，通过硬件/软件协同设计加速Profile Hidden Markov Models（pHMM）的Baum-Welch算法，以提升基因组分析的效率和能效。
AI.motivation: 现有pHMM方法在计算Baum-Welch算法时存在效率低下问题，传统软件或硬件方案无法灵活适配不同pHMM设计，亟需高效能、低能耗的协同设计方案。
AI.method: ApHMM通过四方面优化：1) 设计可适配多种pHMM的灵活硬件；2) 利用片上内存与记忆化技术优化数据依赖；3) 硬件过滤器剔除冗余计算；4) 减少重复计算。
AI.result: 相比CPU、GPU和FPGA实现，ApHMM分别获得15.55x-260.03x、1.83x-5.34x和27.97x的加速；在三个生物信息学应用中分别提升1.29x-59.94x、1.03x-1.75x和1.03x-1.95x，能效提升最高达115.46x。
AI.conclusion: ApHMM通过硬件/软件协同设计显著优化pHMM分析性能，为生物信息学应用提供了高效且节能的解决方案。

authors_text: Cristiano Saltori,Evgeny Krivosheev,Stéphane Lathuilière,Nicu Sebe,Fabio Galasso,Giuseppe Fiameni,Elisa Ricci,Fabio Poiesi
title: GIPSO: Geometrically Informed Propagation for Online Adaptation in 3D LiDAR Segmentation
title_zh: GIPSO：3D LiDAR 分割中在线适应的几何信息传播
abstract: 3D point cloud semantic segmentation is fundamental for autonomous driving. Most approaches in the literature neglect an important aspect, i.e., how to deal with domain shift when handling dynamic scenes. This can significantly hinder the navigation capabilities of self-driving vehicles. This paper advances the state of the art in this research field. Our first contribution consists in analysing a new unexplored scenario in point cloud segmentation, namely Source-Free Online Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SF-OUDA). We experimentally show that state-of-the-art methods have a rather limited ability to adapt pre-trained deep network models to unseen domains in an online manner. Our second contribution is an approach that relies on adaptive self-training and geometric-feature propagation to adapt a pre-trained source model online without requiring either source data or target labels. Our third contribution is to study SF-OUDA in a challenging setup where source data is synthetic and target data is point clouds captured in the real world. We use the recent SynLiDAR dataset as a synthetic source and introduce two new synthetic (source) datasets, which can stimulate future synthetic-to-real autonomous driving research. Our experiments show the effectiveness of our segmentation approach on thousands of real-world point clouds. Code and synthetic datasets are available at https://github.com/saltoricristiano/gipso-sfouda.
summary: 3D point cloud semantic segmentation is fundamental for autonomous driving. Most approaches in the literature neglect an important aspect, i.e., how to deal with domain shift when handling dynamic scenes. This can significantly hinder the navigation capabilities of self-driving vehicles. This paper advances the state of the art in this research field. Our first contribution consists in analysing a new unexplored scenario in point cloud segmentation, namely Source-Free Online Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SF-OUDA). We experimentally show that state-of-the-art methods have a rather limited ability to adapt pre-trained deep network models to unseen domains in an online manner. Our second contribution is an approach that relies on adaptive self-training and geometric-feature propagation to adapt a pre-trained source model online without requiring either source data or target labels. Our third contribution is to study SF-OUDA in a challenging setup where source data is synthetic and target data is point clouds captured in the real world. We use the recent SynLiDAR dataset as a synthetic source and introduce two new synthetic (source) datasets, which can stimulate future synthetic-to-real autonomous driving research. Our experiments show the effectiveness of our segmentation approach on thousands of real-world point clouds. Code and synthetic datasets are available at https://github.com/saltoricristiano/gipso-sfouda.
abstract_zh: 3D 点云语义分割是自动驾驶的基础。文献中的大多数方法都忽略了一个重要方面，即在处理动态场景时如何处理域转移。这会严重阻碍自动驾驶车辆的导航能力。本文推进了该研究领域的最新技术水平。我们的第一个贡献在于分析点云分割中一个新的未探索的场景，即无源在线无监督域适应（SF-OUDA）。我们通过实验表明，最先进的方法以在线方式将预训练的深度网络模型适应未见过的领域的能力相当有限。我们的第二个贡献是一种依赖自适应自我训练和几何特征传播来在线调整预训练源模型的方法，而不需要源数据或目标标签。我们的第三个贡献是在具有挑战性的设置中研究 SF-OUDA，其中源数据是合成的，目标数据是在现实世界中捕获的点云。我们使用最近的 SynLiDAR 数据集作为合成源，并引入两个新的合成（源）数据集，这可以刺激未来从合成到真实的自动驾驶研究。我们的实验证明了我们的分割方法在数千个现实世界点云上的有效性。代码和合成数据集可在 https://github.com/saltoricristiano/gipso-sfouda 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GIPSO方法，在无需源数据或目标标签的情况下，通过几何特征传播和自适应自训练，实现3D LiDAR点云分割的在线域适应。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理动态场景的域偏移问题时效果有限，影响自动驾驶的导航能力。需开发无需源数据或目标标签的在线域适应方法以应对真实世界场景。
AI.method: 基于自适应自训练和几何特征传播，利用预训练源模型进行在线域适应。引入两个新合成数据集，构建合成到真实的域适应框架。
AI.result: 实验表明GIPSO在数千个真实世界点云数据集上表现优异，优于现有方法。代码和合成数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: GIPSO通过几何感知传播机制有效解决了域适应问题，为自动驾驶中的实时点云分割提供了新思路，并推动了合成到真实的域适应研究。

authors_text: Huabin Liu,Weixian Lv,John See,Weiyao Lin
title: Task-adaptive Spatial-Temporal Video Sampler for Few-shot Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于少镜头动作识别的任务自适应时空视频采样器
abstract: A primary challenge faced in few-shot action recognition is inadequate video data for training. To address this issue, current methods in this field mainly focus on devising algorithms at the feature level while little attention is paid to processing input video data. Moreover, existing frame sampling strategies may omit critical action information in temporal and spatial dimensions, which further impacts video utilization efficiency. In this paper, we propose a novel video frame sampler for few-shot action recognition to address this issue, where task-specific spatial-temporal frame sampling is achieved via a temporal selector (TS) and a spatial amplifier (SA). Specifically, our sampler first scans the whole video at a small computational cost to obtain a global perception of video frames. The TS plays its role in selecting top-T frames that contribute most significantly and subsequently. The SA emphasizes the discriminative information of each frame by amplifying critical regions with the guidance of saliency maps. We further adopt task-adaptive learning to dynamically adjust the sampling strategy according to the episode task at hand. Both the implementations of TS and SA are differentiable for end-to-end optimization, facilitating seamless integration of our proposed sampler with most few-shot action recognition methods. Extensive experiments show a significant boost in the performances on various benchmarks including long-term videos.The code is available at https://github.com/R00Kie-Liu/Sampler
summary: A primary challenge faced in few-shot action recognition is inadequate video data for training. To address this issue, current methods in this field mainly focus on devising algorithms at the feature level while little attention is paid to processing input video data. Moreover, existing frame sampling strategies may omit critical action information in temporal and spatial dimensions, which further impacts video utilization efficiency. In this paper, we propose a novel video frame sampler for few-shot action recognition to address this issue, where task-specific spatial-temporal frame sampling is achieved via a temporal selector (TS) and a spatial amplifier (SA). Specifically, our sampler first scans the whole video at a small computational cost to obtain a global perception of video frames. The TS plays its role in selecting top-T frames that contribute most significantly and subsequently. The SA emphasizes the discriminative information of each frame by amplifying critical regions with the guidance of saliency maps. We further adopt task-adaptive learning to dynamically adjust the sampling strategy according to the episode task at hand. Both the implementations of TS and SA are differentiable for end-to-end optimization, facilitating seamless integration of our proposed sampler with most few-shot action recognition methods. Extensive experiments show a significant boost in the performances on various benchmarks including long-term videos.The code is available at https://github.com/R00Kie-Liu/Sampler
abstract_zh: 少镜头动作识别面临的主要挑战是用于训练的视频数据不足。为了解决这个问题，该领域当前的方法主要集中在特征级别的算法设计，而很少关注对输入视频数据的处理。此外，现有的帧采样策略可能会忽略时间和空间维度上的关键动作信息，这进一步影响视频利用效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于少镜头动作识别的新型视频帧采样器来解决这个问题，其中通过时间选择器（TS）和空间放大器（SA）实现特定于任务的时空帧采样。具体来说，我们的采样器首先以较小的计算成本扫描整个视频，以获得视频帧的全局感知。 TS 在选择贡献最显着且随后的 top-T 帧方面发挥着作用。 SA 通过在显着图的指导下放大关键区域来强调每一帧的判别信息。我们进一步采用任务自适应学习，根据手头的情节任务动态调整采样策略。 TS 和 SA 的实现对于端到端优化都是可微的，有助于我们提出的采样器与大多数少镜头动作识别方法的无缝集成。大量实验表明，包括长期视频在内的各种基准测试的性能都有显着提升。代码可在 https://github.com/R00Kie-Liu/Sampler 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种任务自适应的时空视频采样器，用于解决少样本动作识别中视频数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在特征层面优化算法，但忽视了输入视频数据的处理，导致时序和空间关键信息丢失，影响视频利用效率。
AI.method: 设计时空选择器（TS）筛选关键帧，空间放大器（SA）通过显著性图增强帧内关键区域，并采用任务自适应学习动态调整采样策略，实现端到端优化。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中显著提升性能，包括长时视频任务，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该采样器通过自适应时空采样有效提升少样本动作识别性能，可无缝集成至现有方法中。

authors_text: Anmol Biswas,Vivek Saraswat,Udayan Ganguly
title: A temporally and spatially local spike-based backpropagation algorithm to enable training in hardware
title_zh: 一种基于时间和空间局部尖峰的反向传播算法，可在硬件中进行训练
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have emerged as a hardware efficient architecture for classification tasks. The challenge of spike-based encoding has been the lack of a universal training mechanism performed entirely using spikes. There have been several attempts to adopt the powerful backpropagation (BP) technique used in non-spiking artificial neural networks (ANN): (1) SNNs can be trained by externally computed numerical gradients. (2) A major advancement towards native spike-based learning has been the use of approximate Backpropagation using spike-time dependent plasticity (STDP) with phased forward/backward passes. However, the transfer of information between such phases for gradient and weight update calculation necessitates external memory and computational access. This is a challenge for standard neuromorphic hardware implementations. In this paper, we propose a stochastic SNN based Back-Prop (SSNN-BP) algorithm that utilizes a composite neuron to simultaneously compute the forward pass activations and backward pass gradients explicitly with spikes. Although signed gradient values are a challenge for spike-based representation, we tackle this by splitting the gradient signal into positive and negative streams. We show that our method approaches BP ANN baseline with sufficiently long spike-trains. Finally, we show that the well-performing softmax cross-entropy loss function can be implemented through inhibitory lateral connections enforcing a Winner Take All (WTA) rule. Our SNN with a 2-layer network shows excellent generalization through comparable performance to ANNs with equivalent architecture and regularization parameters on static image datasets like MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, Extended MNIST, and temporally encoded image datasets like Neuromorphic MNIST datasets. Thus, SSNN-BP enables BP compatible with purely spike-based neuromorphic hardware.

The challenge of spike-based encoding has been the lack of a universal training mechanism performed entirely using spikes. There have been several attempts to adopt the powerful backpropagation (BP) technique used in non-spiking artificial neural networks (ANN): (1) SNNs can be trained by externally computed numerical gradients. (2) A major advancement towards native spike-based learning has been the use of approximate Backpropagation using spike-time dependent plasticity (STDP) with phased forward/backward passes. However, the transfer of information between such phases for gradient and weight update calculation necessitates external memory and computational access. This is a challenge for standard neuromorphic hardware implementations. In this paper, we propose a stochastic SNN based Back-Prop (SSNN-BP) algorithm that utilizes a composite neuron to simultaneously compute the forward pass activations and backward pass gradients explicitly with spikes. Although signed gradient values are a challenge for spike-based representation, we tackle this by splitting the gradient signal into positive and negative streams. We show that our method approaches BP ANN baseline with sufficiently long spike-trains. Finally, we show that the well-performing softmax cross-entropy loss function can be implemented through inhibitory lateral connections enforcing a Winner Take All (WTA) rule. Our SNN with a 2-layer network shows excellent generalization through comparable performance to ANNs with equivalent architecture and regularization parameters on static image datasets like MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, Extended MNIST, and temporally encoded image datasets like Neuromorphic MNIST datasets. Thus, SSNN-BP enables BP compatible with purely spike-based neuromorphic hardware.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 已成为一种用于分类任务的硬件高效架构。基于脉冲的编码的挑战是缺乏完全使用脉冲执行的通用训练机制。人们已经多次尝试采用非尖峰人工神经网络 (ANN) 中使用的强大反向传播 (BP) 技术：(1) SNN 可以通过外部计算的数值梯度进行训练。 (2) 基于原生尖峰学习的一个重大进步是使用尖峰时间相关可塑性 (STDP) 和分阶段前向/后向传递的近似反向传播。然而，梯度和权重更新计算的这些阶段之间的信息传输需要外部存储器和计算访问。这对于标准神经形态硬件实现来说是一个挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于随机 SNN 的 Back-Prop (SSNN-BP) 算法，该算法利用复合神经元同时显式地使用尖峰计算前向传递激活和后向传递梯度。尽管带符号的梯度值对于基于尖峰的表示来说是一个挑战，但我们通过将梯度信号分成正流和负流来解决这个问题。我们证明我们的方法通过足够长的尖峰序列接近 BP ANN 基线。最后，我们证明了性能良好的 softmax 交叉熵损失函数可以通过强制横向连接执行赢者通吃（WTA）规则来实现。我们的具有 2 层网络的 SNN 在静态图像数据集（如 MNIST、Fashion-MNIST、扩展 MNIST）和时间编码图像数据集（如神经形态 MNIST 数据集）上具有与具有等效架构和正则化参数的 ANN 相当的性能，显示出出色的泛化能力。因此，SSNN-BP 使 BP 能够与纯粹基于尖峰的神经形态硬件兼容。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于脉冲的反向传播算法（SSNN-BP），使脉冲神经网络能在硬件上实现端到端训练。
AI.motivation: 现有脉冲神经网络训练方法依赖外部计算或需要额外内存，难以适配神经形态硬件的本地化计算需求。
AI.method: 设计复合神经元同时计算前向激活与反向梯度，通过正负梯度流分离解决符号表示问题，并利用抑制性连接实现softmax交叉熵损失函数。
AI.result: 2层SNN在MNIST等静态图像数据集及神经形态数据集上达到与等效ANN相当的性能，验证了算法有效性。
AI.conclusion: SSNN-BP算法实现了完全基于脉冲的反向传播，为神经形态硬件的端到端训练提供了可行方案。

search_text: A temporally and spatially local spike-based backpropagation algorithm to enable training in hardware 一种基于时间和空间局部尖峰的反向传播算法，可在硬件中进行训练 Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have emerged as a hardware efficient architecture for classification tasks. The challenge of spike-based encoding has been the lack of a universal training mechanism performed entirely using spikes. There have been several attempts to adopt the powerful backpropagation (BP) technique used in non-spiking artificial neural networks (ANN): (1) SNNs can be trained by externally computed numerical gradients. (2) A major advancement towards native spike-based learning has been the use of approximate Backpropagation using spike-time dependent plasticity (STDP) with phased forward/backward passes. However, the transfer of information between such phases for gradient and weight update calculation necessitates external memory and computational access. This is a challenge for standard neuromorphic hardware implementations. In this paper, we propose a stochastic SNN based Back-Prop (SSNN-BP) algorithm that utilizes a composite neuron to simultaneously compute the forward pass activations and backward pass gradients explicitly with spikes. Although signed gradient values are a challenge for spike-based representation, we tackle this by splitting the gradient signal into positive and negative streams. We show that our method approaches BP ANN baseline with sufficiently long spike-trains. Finally, we show that the well-performing softmax cross-entropy loss function can be implemented through inhibitory lateral connections enforcing a Winner Take All (WTA) rule. Our SNN with a 2-layer network shows excellent generalization through comparable performance to ANNs with equivalent architecture and regularization parameters on static image datasets like MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, Extended MNIST, and temporally encoded image datasets like Neuromorphic MNIST datasets. Thus, SSNN-BP enables BP compatible with purely spike-based neuromorphic hardware. 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 已成为一种用于分类任务的硬件高效架构。基于脉冲的编码的挑战是缺乏完全使用脉冲执行的通用训练机制。人们已经多次尝试采用非尖峰人工神经网络 (ANN) 中使用的强大反向传播 (BP) 技术：(1) SNN 可以通过外部计算的数值梯度进行训练。 (2) 基于原生尖峰学习的一个重大进步是使用尖峰时间相关可塑性 (STDP) 和分阶段前向/后向传递的近似反向传播。然而，梯度和权重更新计算的这些阶段之间的信息传输需要外部存储器和计算访问。这对于标准神经形态硬件实现来说是一个挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于随机 SNN 的 Back-Prop (SSNN-BP) 算法，该算法利用复合神经元同时显式地使用尖峰计算前向传递激活和后向传递梯度。尽管带符号的梯度值对于基于尖峰的表示来说是一个挑战，但我们通过将梯度信号分成正流和负流来解决这个问题。我们证明我们的方法通过足够长的尖峰序列接近 BP ANN 基线。最后，我们证明了性能良好的 softmax 交叉熵损失函数可以通过强制横向连接执行赢者通吃（WTA）规则来实现。我们的具有 2 层网络的 SNN 在静态图像数据集（如 MNIST、Fashion-MNIST、扩展 MNIST）和时间编码图像数据集（如神经形态 MNIST 数据集）上具有与具有等效架构和正则化参数的 ANN 相当的性能，显示出出色的泛化能力。因此，SSNN-BP 使 BP 能够与纯粹基于尖峰的神经形态硬件兼容。 本文提出一种基于脉冲的反向传播算法（SSNN-BP），使脉冲神经网络能在硬件上实现端到端训练。 Anmol Biswas,Vivek Saraswat,Udayan Ganguly cs.NE,cs.LG

authors_text: Siyang Li,Yifan Xu,Huanyu Wu,Dongrui Wu,Yingjie Yin,Jiajiong Cao,Jingting Ding
title: Facial Affect Analysis: Learning from Synthetic Data & Multi-Task Learning Challenges
title_zh: 面部影响分析：从综合数据和多任务学习挑战中学习
abstract: Facial affect analysis remains a challenging task with its setting transitioned from lab-controlled to in-the-wild situations. In this paper, we present novel frameworks to handle the two challenges in the 4th Affective Behavior Analysis In-The-Wild (ABAW) competition: i) Multi-Task-Learning (MTL) Challenge and ii) Learning from Synthetic Data (LSD) Challenge. For MTL challenge, we adopt the SMM-EmotionNet with a better ensemble strategy of feature vectors. For LSD challenge, we propose respective methods to combat the problems of single labels, imbalanced distribution, fine-tuning limitations, and choice of model architectures. Experimental results on the official validation sets from the competition demonstrated that our proposed approaches outperformed baselines by a large margin. The code is available at https://github.com/sylyoung/ABAW4-HUST-ANT.
summary: Facial affect analysis remains a challenging task with its setting transitioned from lab-controlled to in-the-wild situations. In this paper, we present novel frameworks to handle the two challenges in the 4th Affective Behavior Analysis In-The-Wild (ABAW) competition: i) Multi-Task-Learning (MTL) Challenge and ii) Learning from Synthetic Data (LSD) Challenge. For MTL challenge, we adopt the SMM-EmotionNet with a better ensemble strategy of feature vectors. For LSD challenge, we propose respective methods to combat the problems of single labels, imbalanced distribution, fine-tuning limitations, and choice of model architectures. Experimental results on the official validation sets from the competition demonstrated that our proposed approaches outperformed baselines by a large margin. The code is available at https://github.com/sylyoung/ABAW4-HUST-ANT.
abstract_zh: 面部表情分析仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，其设置从实验室控制过渡到野外环境。在本文中，我们提出了新颖的框架来应对第四届野外情感行为分析（ABAW）竞赛中的两个挑战：i）多任务学习（MTL）挑战和ii）从合成数据学习（LSD）挑战。对于 MTL 挑战，我们采用具有更好特征向量集成策略的 SMM-EmotionNet。对于LSD挑战，我们提出了相应的方法来解决单一标签、分布不平衡、微调限制和模型架构选择等问题。竞赛官方验证集的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法大大优于基线。该代码可在 https://github.com/sylyoung/ABAW4-HUST-ANT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文针对真实场景下面部情感分析的挑战，提出解决多任务学习与合成数据学习问题的新型框架。
AI.motivation: 面部情感分析从实验室环境转向真实场景面临数据分布差异、标签单一及模型泛化能力不足等挑战。
AI.method: 针对多任务学习采用改进的SMM-EmotionNet特征向量集成策略；针对合成数据学习提出解决标签单一性、分布不平衡及模型结构选择的优化方法。
AI.result: 在ABAW4竞赛官方验证集上显著优于基线方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效提升了真实场景下面部情感分析的性能，为合成数据与多任务学习提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Longshen Ou,Xiangming Gu,Ye Wang
title: Transfer Learning of wav2vec 2.0 for Automatic Lyric Transcription
title_zh: 用于自动歌词转录的 wav2vec 2.0 迁移学习
comment: Camera ready version of ISMIR 2022 submission
comments: Camera ready version of ISMIR 2022 submission
abstract: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) has progressed significantly in recent years due to the emergence of large-scale datasets and the self-supervised learning (SSL) paradigm. However, as its counterpart problem in the singing domain, the development of automatic lyric transcription (ALT) suffers from limited data and degraded intelligibility of sung lyrics. To fill in the performance gap between ALT and ASR, we attempt to exploit the similarities between speech and singing. In this work, we propose a transfer-learning-based ALT solution that takes advantage of these similarities by adapting wav2vec 2.0, an SSL ASR model, to the singing domain. We maximize the effectiveness of transfer learning by exploring the influence of different transfer starting points. We further enhance the performance by extending the original CTC model to a hybrid CTC/attention model. Our method surpasses previous approaches by a large margin on various ALT benchmark datasets. Further experiments show that, with even a tiny proportion of training data, our method still achieves competitive performance.
summary: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) has progressed significantly in recent years due to the emergence of large-scale datasets and the self-supervised learning (SSL) paradigm. However, as its counterpart problem in the singing domain, the development of automatic lyric transcription (ALT) suffers from limited data and degraded intelligibility of sung lyrics. To fill in the performance gap between ALT and ASR, we attempt to exploit the similarities between speech and singing. In this work, we propose a transfer-learning-based ALT solution that takes advantage of these similarities by adapting wav2vec 2.0, an SSL ASR model, to the singing domain. We maximize the effectiveness of transfer learning by exploring the influence of different transfer starting points. We further enhance the performance by extending the original CTC model to a hybrid CTC/attention model. Our method surpasses previous approaches by a large margin on various ALT benchmark datasets. Further experiments show that, with even a tiny proportion of training data, our method still achieves competitive performance.
abstract_zh: 近年来，由于大规模数据集和自我监督学习（SSL）范式的出现，自动语音识别（ASR）取得了显着进展。然而，作为歌唱领域的对应问题，自动歌词转录（ALT）的发展受到数据有限和歌词清晰度下降的困扰。为了填补 ALT 和 ASR 之间的性能差距，我们尝试利用语音和唱歌之间的相似性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于迁移学习的 ALT 解决方案，该解决方案通过将 wav2vec 2.0（一种 SSL ASR 模型）适应歌唱领域来利用这些相似性。我们通过探索不同迁移起点的影响来最大化迁移学习的有效性。我们通过将原始 CTC 模型扩展为混合 CTC/注意力模型来进一步提高性能。我们的方法在各种 ALT 基准数据集上大大超越了以前的方法。进一步的实验表明，即使训练数据的比例很小，我们的方法仍然可以获得有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于迁移学习的自动歌词转录方法，通过适配wav2vec 2.0模型解决歌唱领域数据不足和可理解性差的问题。
AI.motivation: 自动歌词转录（ALT）因数据有限和歌词可理解性下降导致性能落后于自动语音识别（ASR），需探索跨领域模型迁移方案。
AI.method: 采用wav2vec 2.0自监督学习模型进行迁移学习，通过不同迁移起点优化适配，并扩展CTC模型为混合CTC/注意力架构。
AI.result: 在多个ALT基准数据集上显著超越现有方法，且在少量训练数据下仍保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习有效缩小ALT与ASR的性能差距，验证了预训练模型在数据受限场景下的应用潜力。

ai_content_json.result: 在多个ALT基准数据集上显著超越现有方法，且在少量训练数据下仍保持竞争力。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 迁移学习有效缩小ALT与ASR的性能差距，验证了预训练模型在数据受限场景下的应用潜力。

tldr: 本文提出基于迁移学习的自动歌词转录方法，通过适配wav2vec 2.0模型解决歌唱领域数据不足和可理解性差的问题。

search_text: Transfer Learning of wav2vec 2.0 for Automatic Lyric Transcription 用于自动歌词转录的 wav2vec 2.0 迁移学习 Automatic speech recognition (ASR) has progressed significantly in recent years due to the emergence of large-scale datasets and the self-supervised learning (SSL) paradigm. However, as its counterpart problem in the singing domain, the development of automatic lyric transcription (ALT) suffers from limited data and degraded intelligibility of sung lyrics. To fill in the performance gap between ALT and ASR, we attempt to exploit the similarities between speech and singing. In this work, we propose a transfer-learning-based ALT solution that takes advantage of these similarities by adapting wav2vec 2.0, an SSL ASR model, to the singing domain. We maximize the effectiveness of transfer learning by exploring the influence of different transfer starting points. We further enhance the performance by extending the original CTC model to a hybrid CTC/attention model. Our method surpasses previous approaches by a large margin on various ALT benchmark datasets. Further experiments show that, with even a tiny proportion of training data, our method still achieves competitive performance. 近年来，由于大规模数据集和自我监督学习（SSL）范式的出现，自动语音识别（ASR）取得了显着进展。然而，作为歌唱领域的对应问题，自动歌词转录（ALT）的发展受到数据有限和歌词清晰度下降的困扰。为了填补 ALT 和 ASR 之间的性能差距，我们尝试利用语音和唱歌之间的相似性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于迁移学习的 ALT 解决方案，该解决方案通过将 wav2vec 2.0（一种 SSL ASR 模型）适应歌唱领域来利用这些相似性。我们通过探索不同迁移起点的影响来最大化迁移学习的有效性。我们通过将原始 CTC 模型扩展为混合 CTC/注意力模型来进一步提高性能。我们的方法在各种 ALT 基准数据集上大大超越了以前的方法。进一步的实验表明，即使训练数据的比例很小，我们的方法仍然可以获得有竞争力的性能。 本文提出基于迁移学习的自动歌词转录方法，通过适配wav2vec 2.0模型解决歌唱领域数据不足和可理解性差的问题。 Longshen Ou,Xiangming Gu,Ye Wang eess.AS,cs.SD,eess.SP

authors_text: Julian Schön,Raghavendra Selvan,Jens Petersen
title: Interpreting Latent Spaces of Generative Models for Medical Images using Unsupervised Methods
title_zh: 使用无监督方法解释医学图像生成模型的潜在空间
abstract: Generative models such as Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) and Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) play an increasingly important role in medical image analysis. The latent spaces of these models often show semantically meaningful directions corresponding to human-interpretable image transformations. However, until now, their exploration for medical images has been limited due to the requirement of supervised data. Several methods for unsupervised discovery of interpretable directions in GAN latent spaces have shown interesting results on natural images. This work explores the potential of applying these techniques on medical images by training a GAN and a VAE on thoracic CT scans and using an unsupervised method to discover interpretable directions in the resulting latent space. We find several directions corresponding to non-trivial image transformations, such as rotation or breast size. Furthermore, the directions show that the generative models capture 3D structure despite being presented only with 2D data. The results show that unsupervised methods to discover interpretable directions in GANs generalize to VAEs and can be applied to medical images. This opens a wide array of future work using these methods in medical image analysis.
summary: Generative models such as Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) and Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) play an increasingly important role in medical image analysis. The latent spaces of these models often show semantically meaningful directions corresponding to human-interpretable image transformations. However, until now, their exploration for medical images has been limited due to the requirement of supervised data. Several methods for unsupervised discovery of interpretable directions in GAN latent spaces have shown interesting results on natural images. This work explores the potential of applying these techniques on medical images by training a GAN and a VAE on thoracic CT scans and using an unsupervised method to discover interpretable directions in the resulting latent space. We find several directions corresponding to non-trivial image transformations, such as rotation or breast size. Furthermore, the directions show that the generative models capture 3D structure despite being presented only with 2D data. The results show that unsupervised methods to discover interpretable directions in GANs generalize to VAEs and can be applied to medical images. This opens a wide array of future work using these methods in medical image analysis.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）和变分自动编码器（VAE）等生成模型在医学图像分析中发挥着越来越重要的作用。这些模型的潜在空间通常显示与人类可解释的图像转换相对应的语义上有意义的方向。然而，到目前为止，由于需要监督数据，他们对医学图像的探索受到限制。在 GAN 潜在空间中无监督发现可解释方向的几种方法在自然图像上显示出了有趣的结果。这项工作通过在胸部 CT 扫描上训练 GAN 和 VAE，并使用无监督方法在生成的潜在空间中发现可解释的方向，探索了将这些技术应用于医学图像的潜力。我们找到了与重要图像变换相对应的几个方向，例如旋转或乳房大小。此外，说明表明生成模型尽管仅呈现 2D 数据，但仍捕获 3D 结构。结果表明，在 GAN 中发现可解释方向的无监督方法可以推广到 VAE，并且可以应用于医学图像。这开启了在医学图像分析中使用这些方法的广泛的未来工作。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用无监督方法解析生成模型在医学图像中的潜在空间，以发现可解释的图像变换方向。
AI.motivation: 生成模型的潜在空间通常包含语义方向，但医学图像分析因缺乏监督数据而难以探索这些方向。
AI.method: 在胸部CT扫描数据上训练GAN和VAE，并应用无监督方法挖掘潜在空间中的可解释方向。
AI.result: 发现与旋转、乳腺尺寸等非平凡变换相关的方向，证明模型能从2D数据捕捉3D结构。
AI.conclusion: 无监督方法可推广至VAE和医学图像，为医学图像分析开辟新研究方向。

authors_text: Liliang Chen,Jiaqi Li,Han Huang,Yandong Guo
title: CrossHuman: Learning Cross-Guidance from Multi-Frame Images for Human Reconstruction
title_zh: CrossHuman：从多帧图像中学习交叉指导以进行人体重建
abstract: We propose CrossHuman, a novel method that learns cross-guidance from parametric human model and multi-frame RGB images to achieve high-quality 3D human reconstruction. To recover geometry details and texture even in invisible regions, we design a reconstruction pipeline combined with tracking-based methods and tracking-free methods. Given a monocular RGB sequence, we track the parametric human model in the whole sequence, the points (voxels) corresponding to the target frame are warped to reference frames by the parametric body motion. Guided by the geometry priors of the parametric body and spatially aligned features from RGB sequence, the robust implicit surface is fused. Moreover, a multi-frame transformer (MFT) and a self-supervised warp refinement module are integrated to the framework to relax the requirements of parametric body and help to deal with very loose cloth. Compared with previous works, our CrossHuman enables high-fidelity geometry details and texture in both visible and invisible regions and improves the accuracy of the human reconstruction even under estimated inaccurate parametric human models. The experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance.
summary: We propose CrossHuman, a novel method that learns cross-guidance from parametric human model and multi-frame RGB images to achieve high-quality 3D human reconstruction. To recover geometry details and texture even in invisible regions, we design a reconstruction pipeline combined with tracking-based methods and tracking-free methods. Given a monocular RGB sequence, we track the parametric human model in the whole sequence, the points (voxels) corresponding to the target frame are warped to reference frames by the parametric body motion. Guided by the geometry priors of the parametric body and spatially aligned features from RGB sequence, the robust implicit surface is fused. Moreover, a multi-frame transformer (MFT) and a self-supervised warp refinement module are integrated to the framework to relax the requirements of parametric body and help to deal with very loose cloth. Compared with previous works, our CrossHuman enables high-fidelity geometry details and texture in both visible and invisible regions and improves the accuracy of the human reconstruction even under estimated inaccurate parametric human models. The experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 CrossHuman，这是一种从参数人体模型和多帧 RGB 图像中学习交叉指导以实现高质量 3D 人体重建的新颖方法。为了即使在不可见区域也能恢复几何细节和纹理，我们设计了一种结合基于跟踪的方法和无跟踪方法的重建管道。给定一个单目 RGB 序列，我们在整个序列中跟踪参数化人体模型，目标帧对应的点（体素）通过参数化身体运动扭曲到参考帧。在参数化主体的几何先验和 RGB 序列的空间对齐特征的指导下，融合了鲁棒的隐式表面。此外，框架中集成了多框架变压器（MFT）和自监督扭曲细化模块，以放宽参数化体的要求，并有助于处理非常松散的布料。与之前的作品相比，我们的 CrossHuman 能够在可见和不可见区域实现高保真几何细节和纹理，即使在估计不准确的参数人体模型下也提高了人体重建的准确性。实验证明我们的方法实现了最先进的（SOTA）性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CrossHuman方法，通过多帧RGB图像与参数化人体模型的跨引导学习，实现高质量的3D人体重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在人体不可见区域的几何细节和纹理恢复效果有限，且对参数化模型误差和松散衣物处理不足。
AI.method: 结合跟踪-based与跟踪-free方法，利用参数化模型运动 warp 点云至参考帧，融合几何先验与RGB特征生成隐式表面，并引入多帧Transformer和自监督warp优化模块。
AI.result: 在可见与不可见区域均实现高保真几何与纹理重建，即使参数化模型估计不准确时仍保持高精度，实验验证达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: CrossHuman通过跨帧引导与模块设计有效提升人体重建质量，尤其在复杂衣物和模型误差场景下表现优异。

authors_text: Chris Fields,Karl Friston,James F. Glazebrook,Michael Levin,Antonino Marcianò
title: The Free Energy Principle drives neuromorphic development
title_zh: 自由能原理驱动神经形态发育
abstract: We show how any system with morphological degrees of freedom and locally limited free energy will, under the constraints of the free energy principle, evolve toward a neuromorphic morphology that supports hierarchical computations in which each level of the hierarchy enacts a coarse-graining of its inputs, and dually a fine-graining of its outputs. Such hierarchies occur throughout biology, from the architectures of intracellular signal transduction pathways to the large-scale organization of perception and action cycles in the mammalian brain. Formally, the close formal connections between cone-cocone diagrams (CCCD) as models of quantum reference frames on the one hand, and between CCCDs and topological quantum field theories on the other, allow the representation of such computations in the fully-general quantum-computational framework of topological quantum neural networks.
summary: We show how any system with morphological degrees of freedom and locally limited free energy will, under the constraints of the free energy principle, evolve toward a neuromorphic morphology that supports hierarchical computations in which each level of the hierarchy enacts a coarse-graining of its inputs, and dually a fine-graining of its outputs. Such hierarchies occur throughout biology, from the architectures of intracellular signal transduction pathways to the large-scale organization of perception and action cycles in the mammalian brain. Formally, the close formal connections between cone-cocone diagrams (CCCD) as models of quantum reference frames on the one hand, and between CCCDs and topological quantum field theories on the other, allow the representation of such computations in the fully-general quantum-computational framework of topological quantum neural networks.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了任何具有形态自由度和局部有限自由能的系统，在自由能原理的约束下，将如何演化为支持分层计算的神经形态形态，其中层次结构的每个级别都制定其输入的粗粒度，以及其输出的双重细粒度。这种层次结构存在于整个生物学中，从细胞内信号转导途径的结构到哺乳动物大脑中感知和动作周期的大规模组织。形式上，一方面作为量子参考系模型的锥-可锥图 (CCCD) 之间的紧密形式联系，另一方面 CCCD 与拓扑量子场论之间的紧密形式联系，允许在拓扑量子神经网络的完全通用量子计算框架中表示此类计算。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨自由能原理如何驱动具有形态自由度的系统演化为支持分层计算的神经形态结构，并将其与量子计算框架联系起来。
AI.motivation: 生物学中广泛存在的分层结构（如细胞信号传导和大脑功能）促使研究者寻求统一的理论框架来解释其形成机制。
AI.method: 通过结合锥-共锥图（CCCD）模型、量子参考系理论及拓扑量子场论，构建拓扑量子神经网络框架进行建模与分析。
AI.result: 证明在自由能约束下，系统会演化出分层计算的神经形态结构，并在量子计算框架下实现形式化表示。
AI.conclusion: 自由能原理为生物分层结构的形成及量子计算框架下的神经形态发展提供了统一的理论基础。

search_text: The Free Energy Principle drives neuromorphic development 自由能原理驱动神经形态发育 We show how any system with morphological degrees of freedom and locally limited free energy will, under the constraints of the free energy principle, evolve toward a neuromorphic morphology that supports hierarchical computations in which each level of the hierarchy enacts a coarse-graining of its inputs, and dually a fine-graining of its outputs. Such hierarchies occur throughout biology, from the architectures of intracellular signal transduction pathways to the large-scale organization of perception and action cycles in the mammalian brain. Formally, the close formal connections between cone-cocone diagrams (CCCD) as models of quantum reference frames on the one hand, and between CCCDs and topological quantum field theories on the other, allow the representation of such computations in the fully-general quantum-computational framework of topological quantum neural networks. 我们展示了任何具有形态自由度和局部有限自由能的系统，在自由能原理的约束下，将如何演化为支持分层计算的神经形态形态，其中层次结构的每个级别都制定其输入的粗粒度，以及其输出的双重细粒度。这种层次结构存在于整个生物学中，从细胞内信号转导途径的结构到哺乳动物大脑中感知和动作周期的大规模组织。形式上，一方面作为量子参考系模型的锥-可锥图 (CCCD) 之间的紧密形式联系，另一方面 CCCD 与拓扑量子场论之间的紧密形式联系，允许在拓扑量子神经网络的完全通用量子计算框架中表示此类计算。 本文探讨自由能原理如何驱动具有形态自由度的系统演化为支持分层计算的神经形态结构，并将其与量子计算框架联系起来。 Chris Fields,Karl Friston,James F. authors_text: Thomas Deppisch,Sebastià V. Amengual Garí,Paul Calamia,Jens Ahrens
title: Direct and Residual Subspace Decomposition of Spatial Room Impulse Responses
title_zh: 空间房间脉冲响应的直接和残差子空间分解
comment: This article has been accepted for publication in the IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing. (c) 2023 IEEE
comments: This article has been accepted for publication in the IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing. (c) 2023 IEEE
abstract: Psychoacoustic experiments have shown that directional properties of the direct sound, salient reflections, and the late reverberation of an acoustic room response can have a distinct influence on the auditory perception of a given room. Spatial room impulse responses (SRIRs) capture those properties and thus are used for direction-dependent room acoustic analysis and virtual acoustic rendering. This work proposes a subspace method that decomposes SRIRs into a direct part, which comprises the direct sound and the salient reflections, and a residual, to facilitate enhanced analysis and rendering methods by providing individual access to these components. The proposed method is based on the generalized singular value decomposition and interprets the residual as noise that is to be separated from the other components of the reverberation. Large generalized singular values are attributed to the direct part, which is then obtained as a low-rank approximation of the SRIR. By advancing from the end of the SRIR toward the beginning while iteratively updating the residual estimate, the method adapts to spatio-temporal variations of the residual. The method is evaluated using a spatio-spectral error measure and simulated SRIRs of different rooms, microphone arrays, and ratios of direct sound to residual energy. The proposed method creates lower errors than existing approaches in all tested scenarios, including a scenario with two simultaneous reflections. A case study with measured SRIRs shows the applicability of the method under real-world acoustic conditions. A reference implementation is provided.
summary: Psychoacoustic experiments have shown that directional properties of the direct sound, salient reflections, and the late reverberation of an acoustic room response can have a distinct influence on the auditory perception of a given room. Spatial room impulse responses (SRIRs) capture those properties and thus are used for direction-dependent room acoustic analysis and virtual acoustic rendering. This work proposes a subspace method that decomposes SRIRs into a direct part, which comprises the direct sound and the salient reflections, and a residual, to facilitate enhanced analysis and rendering methods by providing individual access to these components. The proposed method is based on the generalized singular value decomposition and interprets the residual as noise that is to be separated from the other components of the reverberation. Large generalized singular values are attributed to the direct part, which is then obtained as a low-rank approximation of the SRIR. By advancing from the end of the SRIR toward the beginning while iteratively updating the residual estimate, the method adapts to spatio-temporal variations of the residual. The method is evaluated using a spatio-spectral error measure and simulated SRIRs of different rooms, microphone arrays, and ratios of direct sound to residual energy. The proposed method creates lower errors than existing approaches in all tested scenarios, including a scenario with two simultaneous reflections. A case study with measured SRIRs shows the applicability of the method under real-world acoustic conditions. A reference implementation is provided.
abstract_zh: 心理声学实验表明，直达声的方向特性、显着反射以及声学房间响应的后期混响会对给定房间的听觉感知产生明显的影响。空间房间脉冲响应 (SRIR) 捕获这些属性，因此可用于方向相关的房间声学分析和虚拟声学渲染。这项工作提出了一种子空间方法，将 SRIR 分解为直接部分（包括直接声音和显着反射）和残差部分，以通过提供对这些组件的单独访问来促进增强的分析和渲染方法。所提出的方法基于广义奇异值分解，并将残差解释为要与混响的其他分量分离的噪声。大的广义奇异值归因于直接部分，然后作为 SRIR 的低秩近似获得。通过从 SRIR 的末尾向开头推进，同时迭代更新残差估计，该方法可以适应残差的时空变化。该方法使用空间频谱误差测量和不同房间的模拟 SRIR、麦克风阵列以及直达声与残余能量的比率进行评估。在所有测试场景中，所提出的方法比现有方法产生的错误更低，包括具有两个同时反射的场景。测量 SRIR 的案例研究表明了该方法在现实声学条件下的适用性。提供了参考实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于广义奇异值分解的空间混响脉冲响应分解方法，将直接声与残余混响分离以提升房间声学分析与渲染效果。
AI.motivation: 方向性声学特性对听觉感知有显著影响，现有方法难以有效分离直接声与混响成分，需更精确的分解技术以支持方向依赖的声学分析。
AI.method: 采用广义奇异值分解（GSVD）对空间房间脉冲响应（SRIR）进行子空间分解，通过迭代更新残差估计实现时空自适应分离，将大奇异值对应直接声部分进行低秩近似。
AI.result: 在多种房间、麦克风阵列及直达声能量比条件下，该方法较现有技术降低误差，且在双反射同时场景及实际测量数据中均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效分离直达声与残余混响，在复杂声学环境及实际应用中具有显著优势，为声学分析与虚拟渲染提供新思路。

authors_text: Daiki Takeuchi,Yasunori Ohishi,Daisuke Niizumi,Noboru Harada,Kunio Kashino
title: Introducing Auxiliary Text Query-modifier to Content-based Audio Retrieval
title_zh: 将辅助文本查询修饰符引入基于内容的音频检索
abstract: The amount of audio data available on public websites is growing rapidly, and an efficient mechanism for accessing the desired data is necessary. We propose a content-based audio retrieval method that can retrieve a target audio that is similar to but slightly different from the query audio by introducing auxiliary textual information which describes the difference between the query and target audio. While the range of conventional content-based audio retrieval is limited to audio that is similar to the query audio, the proposed method can adjust the retrieval range by adding an embedding of the auxiliary text query-modifier to the embedding of the query sample audio in a shared latent space. To evaluate our method, we built a dataset comprising two different audio clips and the text that describes the difference. The experimental results show that the proposed method retrieves the paired audio more accurately than the baseline. We also confirmed based on visualization that the proposed method obtains the shared latent space in which the audio difference and the corresponding text are represented as similar embedding vectors.
summary: The amount of audio data available on public websites is growing rapidly, and an efficient mechanism for accessing the desired data is necessary. We propose a content-based audio retrieval method that can retrieve a target audio that is similar to but slightly different from the query audio by introducing auxiliary textual information which describes the difference between the query and target audio. While the range of conventional content-based audio retrieval is limited to audio that is similar to the query audio, the proposed method can adjust the retrieval range by adding an embedding of the auxiliary text query-modifier to the embedding of the query sample audio in a shared latent space. To evaluate our method, we built a dataset comprising two different audio clips and the text that describes the difference. The experimental results show that the proposed method retrieves the paired audio more accurately than the baseline. We also confirmed based on visualization that the proposed method obtains the shared latent space in which the audio difference and the corresponding text are represented as similar embedding vectors.
abstract_zh: 公共网站上可用的音频数据量正在快速增长，因此需要一种有效的机制来访问所需的数据。我们提出了一种基于内容的音频检索方法，通过引入描述查询和目标音频之间差异的辅助文本信息，可以检索与查询音频相似但略有不同的目标音频。虽然传统的基于内容的音频检索的范围仅限于与查询音频相似的音频，但所提出的方法可以通过将辅助文本查询修饰符的嵌入添加到共享潜在空间中的查询样本音频的嵌入来调整检索范围。为了评估我们的方法，我们构建了一个数据集，其中包含两个不同的音频剪辑和描述差异的文本。实验结果表明，所提出的方法比基线更准确地检索配对音频。我们还基于可视化确认了所提出的方法获得了共享潜在空间，其中音频差异和相应的文本被表示为相似的嵌入向量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于内容的音频检索方法，通过引入辅助文本信息来描述查询音频与目标音频的差异，以提高检索准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于内容的音频检索方法仅能检索与查询音频高度相似的音频，难以处理存在细微差异的目标音频，而实际应用中用户常需检索相似但非完全一致的音频。
AI.method: 在共享潜在空间中，将查询音频嵌入与辅助文本查询修饰符的嵌入相加，通过调整嵌入向量扩展检索范围，并构建包含音频对及差异描述文本的数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在检索配对音频的准确率上优于基线方法，可视化结果验证了音频差异与对应文本在共享潜在空间中具有相似嵌入表示。
AI.conclusion: 引入辅助文本查询修饰符有效扩展了音频检索范围，提升了检索精度，且成功实现了音频与文本差异信息的联合表征学习。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于内容的音频检索方法，通过引入辅助文本信息来描述查询音频与目标音频的差异，以提高检索准确性。

search_text: Introducing Auxiliary Text Query-modifier to Content-based Audio Retrieval 将辅助文本查询修饰符引入基于内容的音频检索 The amount of audio data available on public websites is growing rapidly, and an efficient mechanism for accessing the desired data is necessary. We propose a content-based audio retrieval method that can retrieve a target audio that is similar to but slightly different from the query audio by introducing auxiliary textual information which describes the difference between the query and target audio. While the range of conventional content-based audio retrieval is limited to audio that is similar to the query audio, the proposed method can adjust the retrieval range by adding an embedding of the auxiliary text query-modifier to the embedding of the query sample audio in a shared latent space. To evaluate our method, we built a dataset comprising two different audio clips and the text that describes the difference. The experimental results show that the proposed method retrieves the paired audio more accurately than the baseline. We also confirmed based on visualization that the proposed method obtains the shared latent space in which the audio difference and the corresponding text are represented as similar embedding vectors. 公共网站上可用的音频数据量正在快速增长，因此需要一种有效的机制来访问所需的数据。我们提出了一种基于内容的音频检索方法，通过引入描述查询和目标音频之间差异的辅助文本信息，可以检索与查询音频相似但略有不同的目标音频。虽然传统的基于内容的音频检索的范围仅限于与查询音频相似的音频，但所提出的方法可以通过将辅助文本查询修饰符的嵌入添加到共享潜在空间中的查询样本音频的嵌入来调整检索范围。为了评估我们的方法，我们构建了一个数据集，其中包含两个不同的音频剪辑和描述差异的文本。实验结果表明，所提出的方法比基线更准确地检索配对音频。我们还基于可视化确认了所提出的方法获得了共享潜在空间，其中音频差异和相应的文本被表示为相似的嵌入向量。 本文提出一种基于内容的音频检索方法，通过引入辅助文本信息来描述查询音频与目标音频的差异，以提高检索准确性。 Daiki Takeuchi,Yasunori Ohishi,Daisuke Niizumi,Noboru Harada,Kunio Kashino eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.IR,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Maryam Abdolali,Nicolas Gillis
title: Revisiting data augmentation for subspace clustering
title_zh: 重新审视子空间聚类的数据增强
abstract: Subspace clustering is the classical problem of clustering a collection of data samples that approximately lie around several low-dimensional subspaces. The current state-of-the-art approaches for this problem are based on the self-expressive model which represents the samples as linear combination of other samples. However, these approaches require sufficiently well-spread samples for accurate representation which might not be necessarily accessible in many applications. In this paper, we shed light on this commonly neglected issue and argue that data distribution within each subspace plays a critical role in the success of self-expressive models. Our proposed solution to tackle this issue is motivated by the central role of data augmentation in the generalization power of deep neural networks. We propose two subspace clustering frameworks for both unsupervised and semi-supervised settings that use augmented samples as an enlarged dictionary to improve the quality of the self-expressive representation. We present an automatic augmentation strategy using a few labeled samples for the semi-supervised problem relying on the fact that the data samples lie in the union of multiple linear subspaces. Experimental results confirm the effectiveness of data augmentation, as it significantly improves the performance of general self-expressive models.
summary: Subspace clustering is the classical problem of clustering a collection of data samples that approximately lie around several low-dimensional subspaces. The current state-of-the-art approaches for this problem are based on the self-expressive model which represents the samples as linear combination of other samples. However, these approaches require sufficiently well-spread samples for accurate representation which might not be necessarily accessible in many applications. In this paper, we shed light on this commonly neglected issue and argue that data distribution within each subspace plays a critical role in the success of self-expressive models. Our proposed solution to tackle this issue is motivated by the central role of data augmentation in the generalization power of deep neural networks. We propose two subspace clustering frameworks for both unsupervised and semi-supervised settings that use augmented samples as an enlarged dictionary to improve the quality of the self-expressive representation. We present an automatic augmentation strategy using a few labeled samples for the semi-supervised problem relying on the fact that the data samples lie in the union of multiple linear subspaces. Experimental results confirm the effectiveness of data augmentation, as it significantly improves the performance of general self-expressive models.
abstract_zh: 子空间聚类是对大约位于几个低维子空间周围的数据样本集合进行聚类的经典问题。当前解决此问题的最先进方法基于自我表达模型，该模型将样本表示为其他样本的线性组合。然而，这些方法需要充分分散的样本才能准确表示，而这在许多应用中可能不一定是可访问的。在本文中，我们阐明了这个经常被忽视的问题，并认为每个子空间内的数据分布对于自我表达模型的成功起着至关重要的作用。我们提出的解决此问题的解决方案的动机是数据增强在深度神经网络泛化能力中的核心作用。我们针对无监督和半监督设置提出了两种子空间聚类框架，它们使用增强样本作为扩大的字典来提高自我表达表示的质量。我们基于数据样本位于多个线性子空间的并集这一事实，提出了一种使用一些标记样本来解决半监督问题的自动增强策略。实验结果证实了数据增强的有效性，因为它显着提高了一般自我表达模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视数据增强在子空间聚类中的应用，提出通过增强样本改进自表达模型的框架以解决样本分布不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自表达模型依赖子空间内充分分布的样本，但实际应用中样本可能分布稀疏，导致表示质量下降。
AI.method: 提出两种框架（无监督/半监督），利用数据增强生成的样本作为扩展字典，并设计基于少量标签的自动增强策略。
AI.result: 实验表明数据增强显著提升了自表达模型在子空间聚类任务中的性能。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强能有效缓解子空间聚类中样本分布不足的问题，为后续研究提供新思路。
