authors_text: Kyung-Min Jin,Gun-Hee Lee,Seong-Whan Lee
title: OTPose: Occlusion-Aware Transformer for Pose Estimation in Sparsely-Labeled Videos
title_zh: OTPose：用于稀疏标记视频中姿势估计的遮挡感知变压器
abstract: Although many approaches for multi-human pose estimation in videos have shown profound results, they require densely annotated data which entails excessive man labor. Furthermore, there exists occlusion and motion blur that inevitably lead to poor estimation performance. To address these problems, we propose a method that leverages an attention mask for occluded joints and encodes temporal dependency between frames using transformers. First, our framework composes different combinations of sparsely annotated frames that denote the track of the overall joint movement. We propose an occlusion attention mask from these combinations that enable encoding occlusion-aware heatmaps as a semi-supervised task. Second, the proposed temporal encoder employs transformer architecture to effectively aggregate the temporal relationship and keypoint-wise attention from each time step and accurately refines the target frame's final pose estimation. We achieve state-of-the-art pose estimation results for PoseTrack2017 and PoseTrack2018 datasets and demonstrate the robustness of our approach to occlusion and motion blur in sparsely annotated video data.
summary: Although many approaches for multi-human pose estimation in videos have shown profound results, they require densely annotated data which entails excessive man labor. Furthermore, there exists occlusion and motion blur that inevitably lead to poor estimation performance. To address these problems, we propose a method that leverages an attention mask for occluded joints and encodes temporal dependency between frames using transformers. First, our framework composes different combinations of sparsely annotated frames that denote the track of the overall joint movement. We propose an occlusion attention mask from these combinations that enable encoding occlusion-aware heatmaps as a semi-supervised task. Second, the proposed temporal encoder employs transformer architecture to effectively aggregate the temporal relationship and keypoint-wise attention from each time step and accurately refines the target frame's final pose estimation. We achieve state-of-the-art pose estimation results for PoseTrack2017 and PoseTrack2018 datasets and demonstrate the robustness of our approach to occlusion and motion blur in sparsely annotated video data.
abstract_zh: 尽管视频中多人姿势估计的许多方法已经显示出深刻的结果，但它们需要密集注释的数据，这需要过多的人工劳动。此外，存在遮挡和运动模糊，不可避免地导致估计性能不佳。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种方法，该方法利用遮挡关节的注意掩模并使用变压器对帧之间的时间依赖性进行编码。首先，我们的框架由稀疏注释的帧的不同组合组成，表示整体关节运动的轨迹。我们从这些组合中提出了一个遮挡注意掩模，可以将遮挡感知热图编码为半监督任务。其次，所提出的时间编码器采用变压器架构来有效地聚合每个时间步骤的时间关系和关键点关注，并准确地细化目标帧的最终姿态估计。我们为 PoseTrack2017 和 PoseTrack2018 数据集实现了最先进的姿态估计结果，并证明了我们在稀疏注释的视频数据中处理遮挡和运动模糊的方法的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OTPose方法，通过注意力机制和时序编码器解决稀疏标注视频中多人姿态估计的遮挡和运动模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频多人姿态估计方法依赖密集标注数据且难以处理遮挡与运动模糊，导致标注成本高且性能下降。
AI.method: 框架结合稀疏标注帧生成关节运动轨迹，设计遮挡注意力掩码生成半监督热图，并采用时序Transformer编码器聚合跨帧时序关系与关键点注意力以优化姿态估计。
AI.result: 在PoseTrack2017/2018数据集上达到SOTA性能，验证了方法对遮挡和运动模糊的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: OTPose通过稀疏标注与遮挡感知机制有效降低了标注成本，同时提升了复杂场景下的姿态估计准确性。

We propose an occlusion attention mask from these combinations that enable encoding occlusion-aware heatmaps as a semi-supervised task. Second, the proposed temporal encoder employs transformer architecture to effectively aggregate the temporal relationship and keypoint-wise attention from each time step and accurately refines the target frame's final pose estimation. We achieve state-of-the-art pose estimation results for PoseTrack2017 and PoseTrack2018 datasets and demonstrate the robustness of our approach to occlusion and motion blur in sparsely annotated video data. 尽管视频中多人姿势估计的许多方法已经显示出深刻的结果，但它们需要密集注释的数据，这需要过多的人工劳动。此外，存在遮挡和运动模糊，不可避免地导致估计性能不佳。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种方法，该方法利用遮挡关节的注意掩模并使用变压器对帧之间的时间依赖性进行编码。首先，我们的框架由稀疏注释的帧的不同组合组成，表示整体关节运动的轨迹。我们从这些组合中提出了一个遮挡注意掩模，可以将遮挡感知热图编码为半监督任务。其次，所提出的时间编码器采用变压器架构来有效地聚合每个时间步骤的时间关系和关键点关注，并准确地细化目标帧的最终姿态估计。我们为 PoseTrack2017 和 PoseTrack2018 数据集实现了最先进的姿态估计结果，并证明了我们在稀疏注释的视频数据中处理遮挡和运动模糊的方法的鲁棒性。 本文提出OTPose方法，通过注意力机制和时序编码器解决稀疏标注视频中多人姿态估计的遮挡和运动模糊问题。 Kyung-Min Jin,Gun-Hee Lee,Seong-Whan Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Conghui Hu,Gim Hee Lee
title: Feature Representation Learning for Unsupervised Cross-domain Image Retrieval
title_zh: 无监督跨域图像检索的特征表示学习
abstract: Current supervised cross-domain image retrieval methods can achieve excellent performance. However, the cost of data collection and labeling imposes an intractable barrier to practical deployment in real applications. In this paper, we investigate the unsupervised cross-domain image retrieval task, where class labels and pairing annotations are no longer a prerequisite for training. This is an extremely challenging task because there is no supervision for both in-domain feature representation learning and cross-domain alignment. We address both challenges by introducing: 1) a new cluster-wise contrastive learning mechanism to help extract class semantic-aware features, and 2) a novel distance-of-distance loss to effectively measure and minimize the domain discrepancy without any external supervision. Experiments on the Office-Home and DomainNet datasets consistently show the superior image retrieval accuracies of our framework over state-of-the-art approaches. Our source code can be found at https://github.com/conghuihu/UCDIR.
summary: Current supervised cross-domain image retrieval methods can achieve excellent performance. However, the cost of data collection and labeling imposes an intractable barrier to practical deployment in real applications. In this paper, we investigate the unsupervised cross-domain image retrieval task, where class labels and pairing annotations are no longer a prerequisite for training. This is an extremely challenging task because there is no supervision for both in-domain feature representation learning and cross-domain alignment. We address both challenges by introducing: 1) a new cluster-wise contrastive learning mechanism to help extract class semantic-aware features, and 2) a novel distance-of-distance loss to effectively measure and minimize the domain discrepancy without any external supervision. Experiments on the Office-Home and DomainNet datasets consistently show the superior image retrieval accuracies of our framework over state-of-the-art approaches. Our source code can be found at https://github.com/conghuihu/UCDIR.
abstract_zh: 当前的有监督跨域图像检索方法可以取得优异的性能。然而，数据收集和标记的成本给实际应用中的实际部署带来了棘手的障碍。在本文中，我们研究了无监督的跨域图像检索任务，其中类标签和配对注释不再是训练的先决条件。这是一项极具挑战性的任务，因为域内特征表示学习和跨域对齐都没有监督。我们通过引入以下方法解决这两个挑战：1）一种新的集群对比学习机制，以帮助提取类语义感知特征；2）一种新颖的距离损失，可以在没有任何外部监督的情况下有效测量和最小化领域差异。 Office-Home 和 DomainNet 数据集上的实验一致表明，我们的框架比最先进的方法具有更高的图像检索精度。我们的源代码可以在 https://github.com/conghuihu/UCDIR 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文研究无监督跨域图像检索中的特征表示学习问题，提出无需类别标签和配对注释的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有监督跨域图像检索方法依赖昂贵的数据标注，而无监督方法在缺乏监督信号时面临特征学习和跨域对齐的双重挑战。
AI.method: 提出聚类对比学习机制提取语义特征，以及距离差损失函数度量域间差异，无需外部监督实现跨域对齐。
AI.result: 在Office-Home和DomainNet数据集上均取得优于现有方法的图像检索准确率。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效解决了无监督跨域图像检索的特征学习难题，代码已开源。

authors_text: Yanan Chang,Yi Wu,Xiangyu Miao,Jiahe Wang,Shangfei Wang
title: Multi-Task Learning for Emotion Descriptors Estimation at the fourth ABAW Challenge
title_zh: 第四届 ABAW 挑战赛中情绪描述符估计的多任务学习
abstract: Facial valence/arousal, expression and action unit are related tasks in facial affective analysis. However, the tasks only have limited performance in the wild due to the various collected conditions. The 4th competition on affective behavior analysis in the wild (ABAW) provided images with valence/arousal, expression and action unit labels. In this paper, we introduce multi-task learning framework to enhance the performance of three related tasks in the wild. Feature sharing and label fusion are used to utilize their relations. We conduct experiments on the provided training and validating data.
summary: Facial valence/arousal, expression and action unit are related tasks in facial affective analysis. However, the tasks only have limited performance in the wild due to the various collected conditions. The 4th competition on affective behavior analysis in the wild (ABAW) provided images with valence/arousal, expression and action unit labels. In this paper, we introduce multi-task learning framework to enhance the performance of three related tasks in the wild. Feature sharing and label fusion are used to utilize their relations. We conduct experiments on the provided training and validating data.
abstract_zh: 面部效价/唤醒、表情和动作单元是面部情感分析中的相关任务。然而，由于收集的条件不同，这些任务在野外的性能有限。第四届野外情感行为分析竞赛（ABAW）提供了带有效价/唤醒、表达和动作单元标签的图像。在本文中，我们引入了多任务学习框架来增强三个相关任务的性能。使用特征共享和标签融合来利用它们的关系。我们对提供的训练和验证数据进行实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多任务学习框架以提升面部情感分析中valence/arousal、表情和动作单元三个相关任务在真实环境下的性能。
AI.motivation: 由于真实场景下数据收集条件复杂，单一任务模型性能受限，需通过任务间关联性提升整体表现。
AI.method: 采用特征共享和标签融合机制的多任务学习框架，联合优化三个相关任务。
AI.result: 在ABAW提供的训练与验证数据上完成实验，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习通过挖掘任务间关联性，可有效提升面部情感分析多任务的综合性能。

authors_text: Ayush Chopra,Alexander Rodríguez,Jayakumar Subramanian,Arnau Quera-Bofarull,Balaji Krishnamurthy,B. Aditya Prakash,Ramesh Raskar
title: Differentiable Agent-based Epidemiology
title_zh: 基于可微分代理的流行病学
comment: Appears in AAMAS 2023 and ICML AI4ABM 2022 (best paper award)
comments: Appears in AAMAS 2023 and ICML AI4ABM 2022 (best paper award)
abstract: Mechanistic simulators are an indispensable tool for epidemiology to explore the behavior of complex, dynamic infections under varying conditions and navigate uncertain environments. Agent-based models (ABMs) are an increasingly popular simulation paradigm that can represent the heterogeneity of contact interactions with granular detail and agency of individual behavior. However, conventional ABM frameworks are not differentiable and present challenges in scalability; due to which it is non-trivial to connect them to auxiliary data sources. In this paper, we introduce GradABM: a scalable, differentiable design for agent-based modeling that is amenable to gradient-based learning with automatic differentiation. GradABM can quickly simulate million-size populations in few seconds on commodity hardware, integrate with deep neural networks and ingest heterogeneous data sources. This provides an array of practical benefits for calibration, forecasting, and evaluating policy interventions. We demonstrate the efficacy of GradABM via extensive experiments with real COVID-19 and influenza datasets.
summary: Mechanistic simulators are an indispensable tool for epidemiology to explore the behavior of complex, dynamic infections under varying conditions and navigate uncertain environments. Agent-based models (ABMs) are an increasingly popular simulation paradigm that can represent the heterogeneity of contact interactions with granular detail and agency of individual behavior. However, conventional ABM frameworks are not differentiable and present challenges in scalability; due to which it is non-trivial to connect them to auxiliary data sources. In this paper, we introduce GradABM: a scalable, differentiable design for agent-based modeling that is amenable to gradient-based learning with automatic differentiation. GradABM can quickly simulate million-size populations in few seconds on commodity hardware, integrate with deep neural networks and ingest heterogeneous data sources. This provides an array of practical benefits for calibration, forecasting, and evaluating policy interventions. We demonstrate the efficacy of GradABM via extensive experiments with real COVID-19 and influenza datasets.
abstract_zh: 机械模拟器是流行病学不可或缺的工具，用于探索不同条件下复杂、动态感染的行为并应对不确定的环境。基于代理的模型（ABM）是一种日益流行的模拟范例，它可以通过个体行为的细粒度细节和代理来表示接触交互的异质性。然而，传统的ABM框架是不可微分的，并且在可扩展性方面提出了挑战；因此，将它们连接到辅助数据源并不简单。在本文中，我们介绍了 GradABM：一种可扩展、可微分的基于代理建模的设计，适合基于梯度的学习和自动微分。 GradABM 可以在几秒钟内在商用硬件上快速模拟百万规模的群体，与深度神经网络集成并摄取异构数据源。这为校准、预测和评估政策干预措施提供了一系列实际好处。我们通过对真实的 COVID-19 和流感数据集进行大量实验来证明 GradABM 的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可微分的基于代理的流行病模型GradABM，解决传统ABM框架的可扩展性和数据整合难题。
AI.motivation: 传统ABM模型缺乏可微性，难以进行梯度优化且扩展性差，限制了其与深度学习和多源数据的结合能力。
AI.method: 设计支持自动微分的GradABM框架，实现百万级人口的快速模拟，并整合深度神经网络与异构数据源。
AI.result: 通过新冠和流感真实数据验证，GradABM在参数校准、疫情预测及政策评估中表现出显著优势。
AI.conclusion: GradABM为流行病学研究提供了可微分、可扩展的建模工具，推动了模拟模型与数据驱动方法的深度融合。

We demonstrate the efficacy of GradABM via extensive experiments with real COVID-19 and influenza datasets. 机械模拟器是流行病学不可或缺的工具，用于探索不同条件下复杂、动态感染的行为并应对不确定的环境。基于代理的模型（ABM）是一种日益流行的模拟范例，它可以通过个体行为的细粒度细节和代理来表示接触交互的异质性。然而，传统的ABM框架是不可微分的，并且在可扩展性方面提出了挑战；因此，将它们连接到辅助数据源并不简单。在本文中，我们介绍了 GradABM：一种可扩展、可微分的基于代理建模的设计，适合基于梯度的学习和自动微分。 GradABM 可以在几秒钟内在商用硬件上快速模拟百万规模的群体，与深度神经网络集成并摄取异构数据源。这为校准、预测和评估政策干预措施提供了一系列实际好处。我们通过对真实的 COVID-19 和流感数据集进行大量实验来证明 GradABM 的功效。 本文提出一种可微分的基于代理的流行病模型GradABM，解决传统ABM框架的可扩展性和数据整合难题。 Ayush Chopra,Alexander Rodríguez,Jayakumar Subramanian,Arnau Quera-Bofarull,Balaji Krishnamurthy,B. Aditya Prakash,Ramesh Raskar cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA,q-bio.PE,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Or Wertheim,Dan R. Suissa,Ronen I. Brafman
title: Towards Plug'n Play Task-Level Autonomy for Robotics Using POMDPs and Generative Models
title_zh: 使用 POMDP 和生成模型实现机器人的即插即用任务级自主
abstract: To enable robots to achieve high level objectives, engineers typically write scripts that apply existing specialized skills, such as navigation, object detection and manipulation to achieve these goals. Writing good scripts is challenging since they must intelligently balance the inherent stochasticity of a physical robot's actions and sensors, and the limited information it has. In principle, AI planning can be used to address this challenge and generate good behavior policies automatically. But this requires passing three hurdles. First, the AI must understand each skill's impact on the world. Second, we must bridge the gap between the more abstract level at which we understand what a skill does and the low-level state variables used within its code. Third, much integration effort is required to tie together all components. We describe an approach for integrating robot skills into a working autonomous robot controller that schedules its skills to achieve a specified task and carries four key advantages. 1) Our Generative Skill Documentation Language (GSDL) makes code documentation simpler, compact, and more expressive using ideas from probabilistic programming languages. 2) An expressive abstraction mapping (AM) bridges the gap between low-level robot code and the abstract AI planning model. 3) Any properly documented skill can be used by the controller without any additional programming effort, providing a Plug'n Play experience. 4) A POMDP solver schedules skill execution while properly balancing partial observability, stochastic behavior, and noisy sensing.
summary: To enable robots to achieve high level objectives, engineers typically write scripts that apply existing specialized skills, such as navigation, object detection and manipulation to achieve these goals. Writing good scripts is challenging since they must intelligently balance the inherent stochasticity of a physical robot's actions and sensors, and the limited information it has. In principle, AI planning can be used to address this challenge and generate good behavior policies automatically. But this requires passing three hurdles. First, the AI must understand each skill's impact on the world. Second, we must bridge the gap between the more abstract level at which we understand what a skill does and the low-level state variables used within its code. Third, much integration effort is required to tie together all components. We describe an approach for integrating robot skills into a working autonomous robot controller that schedules its skills to achieve a specified task and carries four key advantages. 1) Our Generative Skill Documentation Language (GSDL) makes code documentation simpler, compact, and more expressive using ideas from probabilistic programming languages. 2) An expressive abstraction mapping (AM) bridges the gap between low-level robot code and the abstract AI planning model. 3) Any properly documented skill can be used by the controller without any additional programming effort, providing a Plug'n Play experience. 4) A POMDP solver schedules skill execution while properly balancing partial observability, stochastic behavior, and noisy sensing.
abstract_zh: 为了使机器人能够实现高水平的目标，工程师通常会编写应用现有专业技能（例如导航、物体检测和操纵）的脚本来实现这些目标。编写好的脚本具有挑战性，因为它们必须智能地平衡物理机器人的动作和传感器固有的随机性及其所拥有的有限信息。原则上，人工智能规划可用于应对这一挑战并自动生成良好的行为策略。但这需要跨越三个障碍。首先，人工智能必须了解每种技能对世界的影响。其次，我们必须弥合我们理解技能的作用的更抽象级别与其代码中使用的低级状态变量之间的差距。第三，需要大量的集成工作才能将所有组件连接在一起。我们描述了一种将机器人技能集成到工作自主机器人控制器中的方法，该控制器可以安排其技能来完成指定的任务，并具有四个关键优势。 1) 我们的生成技能文档语言 (GSDL) 使用概率编程语言的思想使代码文档更简单、紧凑且更具表现力。 2）富有表现力的抽象映射（AM）弥合了低级机器人代码和抽象人工智能规划模型之间的差距。 3) 控制器可以使用任何正确记录的技能，无需任何额外的编程工作，从而提供即插即用体验。 4) POMDP 求解器安排技能执行，同时正确平衡部分可观测性、随机行为和噪声感知。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于POMDP和生成模型的机器人任务级自主控制框架，实现技能的即插即用。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人脚本编写需处理动作不确定性、传感器噪声和抽象概念与低级代码的映射难题，集成复杂且效率低。
AI.method: 设计生成技能文档语言(GSDL)简化文档，构建抽象映射(AM)连接低级代码与AI模型，结合POMDP求解器动态调度技能。
AI.result: 实现技能自动调度、部分可观测环境下的鲁棒执行，支持无需额外编程的即插即用特性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过GSDL、AM和POMDP有效解决机器人自主控制的三大技术障碍，提升任务执行的灵活性与可靠性。

authors_text: Stalin Muñoz Gutiérrez,Gerald Steinbauer-Wagner
title: The Need for a Meta-Architecture for Robot Autonomy
title_zh: 机器人自主性元架构的需求
abstract: Long-term autonomy of robotic systems implicitly requires dependable platforms that are able to naturally handle hardware and software faults, problems in behaviors, or lack of knowledge. Model-based dependable platforms additionally require the application of rigorous methodologies during the system development, including the use of correct-by-construction techniques to implement robot behaviors. As the level of autonomy in robots increases, so do the cost of offering guarantees about the dependability of the system. Certifiable dependability of autonomous robots, we argue, can benefit from formal models of the integration of several cognitive functions, knowledge processing, reasoning, and meta-reasoning. Here we put forward the case for a generative model of cognitive architectures for autonomous robotic agents that subscribes to the principles of model-based engineering and certifiable dependability, autonomic computing, and knowledge-enabled robotics.
summary: Long-term autonomy of robotic systems implicitly requires dependable platforms that are able to naturally handle hardware and software faults, problems in behaviors, or lack of knowledge. Model-based dependable platforms additionally require the application of rigorous methodologies during the system development, including the use of correct-by-construction techniques to implement robot behaviors. As the level of autonomy in robots increases, so do the cost of offering guarantees about the dependability of the system. Certifiable dependability of autonomous robots, we argue, can benefit from formal models of the integration of several cognitive functions, knowledge processing, reasoning, and meta-reasoning. Here we put forward the case for a generative model of cognitive architectures for autonomous robotic agents that subscribes to the principles of model-based engineering and certifiable dependability, autonomic computing, and knowledge-enabled robotics.
abstract_zh: 机器人系统的长期自主性隐含地需要可靠的平台，能够自然地处理硬件和软件故障、行为问题或知识缺乏。基于模型的可靠平台还需要在系统开发过程中应用严格的方法，包括使用构建正确技术来实现机器人行为。随着机器人自主水平的提高，保证系统可靠性的成本也随之增加。我们认为，自主机器人的可认证可靠性可以受益于多种认知功能、知识处理、推理和元推理集成的正式模型。在这里，我们提出了自主机器人代理的认知架构生成模型的案例，该模型遵循基于模型的工程和可认证的可靠性、自主计算和知识驱动的机器人技术的原则。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型驱动工程和形式化方法的元架构，以增强自主机器人的可靠性和自主性。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人自主性提升，传统方法难以有效处理复杂故障、知识不足及可靠性保证问题，亟需系统性架构支持。
AI.method: 构建整合认知功能、知识处理、推理与元推理的生成式模型，遵循模型驱动工程与可验证可靠性的原则。
AI.result: 论证了元架构在提升机器人自主性与可靠性中的潜力，并为未来研究提供了框架方向。
AI.conclusion: 元架构是实现高可靠性自主机器人的重要途径，需进一步结合形式化方法与认知科学深化研究。

authors_text: Wenjie Pei,Xin Feng,Canmiao Fu,Qiong Cao,Guangming Lu,Yu-Wing Tai
title: Learning Sequence Representations by Non-local Recurrent Neural Memory
title_zh: 通过非局部循环神经记忆学习序列表示
comment: To be appeared in International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1908.09535
comments: To be appeared in International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1908.09535
abstract: The key challenge of sequence representation learning is to capture the long-range temporal dependencies. Typical methods for supervised sequence representation learning are built upon recurrent neural networks to capture temporal dependencies. One potential limitation of these methods is that they only model one-order information interactions explicitly between adjacent time steps in a sequence, hence the high-order interactions between nonadjacent time steps are not fully exploited. It greatly limits the capability of modeling the long-range temporal dependencies since the temporal features learned by one-order interactions cannot be maintained for a long term due to temporal information dilution and gradient vanishing. To tackle this limitation, we propose the Non-local Recurrent Neural Memory (NRNM) for supervised sequence representation learning, which performs non-local operations \MR{by means of self-attention mechanism} to learn full-order interactions within a sliding temporal memory block and models global interactions between memory blocks in a gated recurrent manner. Consequently, our model is able to capture long-range dependencies. Besides, the latent high-level features contained in high-order interactions can be distilled by our model. We validate the effectiveness and generalization of our NRNM on three types of sequence applications across different modalities, including sequence classification, step-wise sequential prediction and sequence similarity learning. Our model compares favorably against other state-of-the-art methods specifically designed for each of these sequence applications.
summary: The key challenge of sequence representation learning is to capture the long-range temporal dependencies. Typical methods for supervised sequence representation learning are built upon recurrent neural networks to capture temporal dependencies. One potential limitation of these methods is that they only model one-order information interactions explicitly between adjacent time steps in a sequence, hence the high-order interactions between nonadjacent time steps are not fully exploited. It greatly limits the capability of modeling the long-range temporal dependencies since the temporal features learned by one-order interactions cannot be maintained for a long term due to temporal information dilution and gradient vanishing. To tackle this limitation, we propose the Non-local Recurrent Neural Memory (NRNM) for supervised sequence representation learning, which performs non-local operations \MR{by means of self-attention mechanism} to learn full-order interactions within a sliding temporal memory block and models global interactions between memory blocks in a gated recurrent manner. Consequently, our model is able to capture long-range dependencies. Besides, the latent high-level features contained in high-order interactions can be distilled by our model. We validate the effectiveness and generalization of our NRNM on three types of sequence applications across different modalities, including sequence classification, step-wise sequential prediction and sequence similarity learning. Our model compares favorably against other state-of-the-art methods specifically designed for each of these sequence applications.
abstract_zh: 序列表示学习的关键挑战是捕获长程时间依赖性。监督序列表示学习的典型方法建立在循环神经网络的基础上，以捕获时间依赖性。这些方法的一个潜在限制是它们仅对序列中相邻时间步之间的一阶信息交互进行显式建模，因此不相邻时间步之间的高阶交互没有得到充分利用。它极大地限制了对远程时间依赖性进行建模的能力，因为由于时间信息稀释和梯度消失，通过一阶交互学习的时间特征无法长期维持。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了用于监督序列表示学习的非局部循环神经记忆（NRNM），它执行非局部操作\MR{通过自注意力机制}来学习滑动时间记忆块内的全序交互，并以门控循环方式对记忆块之间的全局交互进行建模。因此，我们的模型能够捕获远程依赖关系。此外，我们的模型可以提取高阶交互中包含的潜在高级特征。我们验证了 NRNM 在不同模式的三种序列应用上的有效性和泛化性，包括序列分类、逐步序列预测和序列相似性学习。我们的模型与专门为这些序列应用设计的其他最先进的方法相比具有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出非局部递归神经记忆模型（NRNM），用于解决序列表示学习中长程时间依赖建模的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统循环神经网络仅建模相邻时间步的一阶交互，无法充分捕捉非相邻时间步的高阶交互，导致长程依赖建模能力受限。
AI.method: 通过自注意力机制在滑动时间记忆块内学习全阶交互，并采用门控递归方式建模记忆块间的全局交互。
AI.result: 在序列分类、步进预测和序列相似性学习三类任务中验证了NRNM的有效性和跨模态泛化能力，优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: NRNM通过非局部建模和记忆机制有效解决了长程时间依赖问题，可广泛应用于不同模态的序列任务。

search_text: Learning Sequence Representations by Non-local Recurrent Neural Memory 通过非局部循环神经记忆学习序列表示 The key challenge of sequence representation learning is to capture the long-range temporal dependencies. Typical methods for supervised sequence representation learning are built upon recurrent neural networks to capture temporal dependencies. One potential limitation of these methods is that they only model one-order information interactions explicitly between adjacent time steps in a sequence, hence the high-order interactions between nonadjacent time steps are not fully exploited. It greatly limits the capability of modeling the long-range temporal dependencies since the temporal features learned by one-order interactions cannot be maintained for a long term due to temporal information dilution and gradient vanishing. To tackle this limitation, we propose the Non-local Recurrent Neural Memory (NRNM) for supervised sequence representation learning, which performs non-local operations \MR{by means of self-attention mechanism} to learn full-order interactions within a sliding temporal memory block and models global interactions between memory blocks in a gated recurrent manner. Consequently, our model is able to capture long-range dependencies. Besides, the latent high-level features contained in high-order interactions can be distilled by our model. We validate the effectiveness and generalization of our NRNM on three types of sequence applications across different modalities, including sequence classification, step-wise sequential prediction and sequence similarity learning. Our model compares favorably against other state-of-the-art methods specifically designed for each of these sequence applications. 序列表示学习的关键挑战是捕获长程时间依赖性。监督序列表示学习的典型方法建立在循环神经网络的基础上，以捕获时间依赖性。这些方法的一个潜在限制是它们仅对序列中相邻时间步之间的一阶信息交互进行显式建模，因此不相邻时间步之间的高阶交互没有得到充分利用。它极大地限制了对远程时间依赖性进行建模的能力，因为由于时间信息稀释和梯度消失，通过一阶交互学习的时间特征无法长期维持。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了用于监督序列表示学习的非局部循环神经记忆（NRNM），它执行非局部操作\MR{通过自注意力机制}来学习滑动时间记忆块内的全序交互，并以门控循环方式对记忆块之间的全局交互进行建模。因此，我们的模型能够捕获远程依赖关系。此外，我们的模型可以提取高阶交互中包含的潜在高级特征。我们验证了 NRNM 在不同模式的三种序列应用上的有效性和泛化性，包括序列分类、逐步序列预测和序列相似性学习。我们的模型与专门为这些序列应用设计的其他最先进的方法相比具有优势。 本文提出非局部递归神经记忆模型（NRNM），用于解决序列表示学习中长程时间依赖建模的挑战。 Wenjie Pei,Xin Feng,Canmiao Fu,Qiong Cao,Guangming Lu,Yu-Wing Tai cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yaniel Carreno,Yvan Petillot,Ronald P. A. Petrick
title: Temporal Planning with Incomplete Knowledge and Perceptual Information
title_zh: 不完全知识和感知信息的时间规划
abstract: In real-world applications, the ability to reason about incomplete knowledge, sensing, temporal notions, and numeric constraints is vital. While several AI planners are capable of dealing with some of these requirements, they are mostly limited to problems with specific types of constraints. This paper presents a new planning approach that combines contingent plan construction within a temporal planning framework, offering solutions that consider numeric constraints and incomplete knowledge. We propose a small extension to the Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL) to model (i) incomplete, (ii) knowledge sensing actions that operate over unknown propositions, and (iii) possible outcomes from non-deterministic sensing effects. We also introduce a new set of planning domains to evaluate our solver, which has shown good performance on a variety of problems.
summary: In real-world applications, the ability to reason about incomplete knowledge, sensing, temporal notions, and numeric constraints is vital. While several AI planners are capable of dealing with some of these requirements, they are mostly limited to problems with specific types of constraints. This paper presents a new planning approach that combines contingent plan construction within a temporal planning framework, offering solutions that consider numeric constraints and incomplete knowledge. We propose a small extension to the Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL) to model (i) incomplete, (ii) knowledge sensing actions that operate over unknown propositions, and (iii) possible outcomes from non-deterministic sensing effects. We also introduce a new set of planning domains to evaluate our solver, which has shown good performance on a variety of problems.
abstract_zh: 在现实世界的应用中，推理不完整知识、感知、时间概念和数字约束的能力至关重要。虽然一些人工智能规划器能够处理其中一些要求，但它们大多局限于具有特定类型约束的问题。本文提出了一种新的规划方法，它将应急计划构建结合在时间规划框架内，提供考虑数字约束和不完整知识的解决方案。我们提出对规划领域定义语言（PDDL）进行小型扩展，以模型（i）不完整，（ii）对未知命题进行操作的知识感知动作，以及（iii）非确定性感知效应的可能结果。我们还引入了一组新的规划域来评估我们的求解器，该求解器在各种问题上都表现出了良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合条件计划与时间规划框架的新方法，解决包含数值约束和不完全知识的复杂规划问题。
AI.motivation: 现有AI规划器难以同时处理时间约束、数值限制及不完全知识等多维度问题，需更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 扩展PDDL语言以建模不完全知识、感知动作及非确定性效果，并设计新规划领域验证求解器性能。
AI.result: 提出的求解器在多种包含数值约束和不确定性的规划问题中表现出良好性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过语言扩展和框架创新，有效提升了复杂动态环境下的规划能力，为实际应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Debora C. Engelmann,Angelo Ferrando,Alison R. Panisson,Davide Ancona,Rafael H. Bordini,Viviana Mascardi
title: RV4JaCa -- Runtime Verification for Multi-Agent Systems
title_zh: RV4JaCa——多代理系统的运行时验证
abstract: This paper presents a Runtime Verification (RV) approach for Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) using the JaCaMo framework. Our objective is to bring a layer of security to the MAS. This layer is capable of controlling events during the execution of the system without needing a specific implementation in the behaviour of each agent to recognise the events. MAS have been used in the context of hybrid intelligence. This use requires communication between software agents and human beings. In some cases, communication takes place via natural language dialogues. However, this kind of communication brings us to a concern related to controlling the flow of dialogue so that agents can prevent any change in the topic of discussion that could impair their reasoning. We demonstrate the implementation of a monitor that aims to control this dialogue flow in a MAS that communicates with the user through natural language to aid decision-making in hospital bed allocation.
summary: This paper presents a Runtime Verification (RV) approach for Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) using the JaCaMo framework. Our objective is to bring a layer of security to the MAS. This layer is capable of controlling events during the execution of the system without needing a specific implementation in the behaviour of each agent to recognise the events. MAS have been used in the context of hybrid intelligence. This use requires communication between software agents and human beings. In some cases, communication takes place via natural language dialogues. However, this kind of communication brings us to a concern related to controlling the flow of dialogue so that agents can prevent any change in the topic of discussion that could impair their reasoning. We demonstrate the implementation of a monitor that aims to control this dialogue flow in a MAS that communicates with the user through natural language to aid decision-making in hospital bed allocation.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种使用 JaCaMo 框架的多代理系统 (MAS) 的运行时验证 (RV) 方法。我们的目标是为 MAS 带来一层安全保障。该层能够在系统执行期间控制事件，而不需要每个代理的行为中的特定实现来识别事件。 MAS 已用于混合智能的背景下。这种使用需要软件代理和人类之间的通信。在某些情况下，交流是通过自然语言对话进行的。然而，这种通信给我们带来了与控制对话流程相关的担忧，以便代理可以防止讨论主题发生任何可能损害其推理的变化。我们演示了监视器的实现，该监视器旨在控制 MAS 中的对话流，MAS 通过自然语言与用户进行通信，以帮助医院床位分配决策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于JaCaMo框架的多智能体系统运行时验证方法，旨在通过监控对话流程增强系统安全性。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统在混合智能场景中需与人类进行自然语言交互，但对话主题的失控可能影响系统推理，需在不修改智能体行为的前提下实现安全控制。
AI.method: 设计了一种运行时监控器，通过JaCaMo框架实时检测自然语言对话中的主题偏离，确保对话流程符合预设逻辑。
AI.result: 在医院床位分配决策场景中验证了监控器的有效性，成功控制了用户与系统间的对话流向，提升了决策辅助的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多智能体系统的安全交互提供了轻量级解决方案，适用于需严格对话管控的临界应用场景。

We demonstrate the implementation of a monitor that aims to control this dialogue flow in a MAS that communicates with the user through natural language to aid decision-making in hospital bed allocation. 本文提出了一种使用 JaCaMo 框架的多代理系统 (MAS) 的运行时验证 (RV) 方法。我们的目标是为 MAS 带来一层安全保障。该层能够在系统执行期间控制事件，而不需要每个代理的行为中的特定实现来识别事件。 MAS 已用于混合智能的背景下。这种使用需要软件代理和人类之间的通信。在某些情况下，交流是通过自然语言对话进行的。然而，这种通信给我们带来了与控制对话流程相关的担忧，以便代理可以防止讨论主题发生任何可能损害其推理的变化。我们演示了监视器的实现，该监视器旨在控制 MAS 中的对话流，MAS 通过自然语言与用户进行通信，以帮助医院床位分配决策。 本文提出了一种基于JaCaMo框架的多智能体系统运行时验证方法，旨在通过监控对话流程增强系统安全性。 Debora C. Engelmann,Angelo Ferrando,Alison R. Panisson,Davide Ancona,Rafael H. Bordini,Viviana Mascardi cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.SE

authors_text: Dara MacConville,Marie Farrell,Matt Luckcuck,Rosemary Monahan
title: Modelling the Turtle Python library in CSP
title_zh: 在 CSP 中对 Turtle Python 库进行建模
abstract: Software verification is an important tool in establishing the reliability of critical systems. One potential area of application is in the field of robotics, as robots take on more tasks in both day-to-day areas and highly specialised domains. Robots are usually given a plan to follow, if there are errors in this plan the robot will not perform reliably. The capability to check plans for errors in advance could prevent this. Python is a popular programming language in the robotics domain, through the use of the Robot Operating System (ROS) and various other libraries. Python's Turtle package provides a mobile agent, which we formally model here using Communicating Sequential Processes (CSP). Our interactive toolchain CSP2Turtle with CSP model and Python components, enables Turtle plans to be verified in CSP before being executed in Python. This means that certain classes of errors can be avoided, and provides a starting point for more detailed verification of Turtle programs and more complex robotic systems. We illustrate our approach with examples of robot navigation and obstacle avoidance in a 2D grid-world.
summary: Software verification is an important tool in establishing the reliability of critical systems. One potential area of application is in the field of robotics, as robots take on more tasks in both day-to-day areas and highly specialised domains. Robots are usually given a plan to follow, if there are errors in this plan the robot will not perform reliably. The capability to check plans for errors in advance could prevent this. Python is a popular programming language in the robotics domain, through the use of the Robot Operating System (ROS) and various other libraries. Python's Turtle package provides a mobile agent, which we formally model here using Communicating Sequential Processes (CSP). Our interactive toolchain CSP2Turtle with CSP model and Python components, enables Turtle plans to be verified in CSP before being executed in Python. This means that certain classes of errors can be avoided, and provides a starting point for more detailed verification of Turtle programs and more complex robotic systems. We illustrate our approach with examples of robot navigation and obstacle avoidance in a 2D grid-world.
abstract_zh: 软件验证是建立关键系统可靠性的重要工具。一个潜在的应用领域是机器人领域，因为机器人在日常领域和高度专业化的领域中承担更多任务。机器人通常有一个需要遵循的计划，如果该计划存在错误，机器人将无法可靠地执行任务。提前检查计划是否有错误的能力可以防止这种情况发生。 Python 是机器人领域流行的编程语言，通过使用机器人操作系统 (ROS) 和各种其他库。 Python 的 Turtle 包提供了一个移动代理，我们在这里使用通信顺序进程 (CSP) 对其进行正式建模。我们的交互式工具链 CSP2Turtle 具有 CSP 模型和 Python 组件，使 Turtle 计划能够在 CSP 中进行验证，然后再在 Python 中执行。这意味着可以避免某些类型的错误，并为更详细地验证 Turtle 程序和更复杂的机器人系统提供起点。我们通过二维网格世界中的机器人导航和避障示例来说明我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文将Python Turtle库形式化建模为CSP模型，开发工具链CSP2Turtle实现机器人路径规划的前期验证。
AI.motivation: 机器人计划执行可靠性需提前验证，Python在机器人领域广泛应用但缺乏形式化验证手段，需通过CSP模型实现错误预防。
AI.method: 构建CSP2Turtle工具链，将Turtle移动代理转化为CSP模型，通过CSP理论验证路径规划方案后再执行Python代码。
AI.result: 成功验证二维网格世界中的导航与避障案例，可检测出计划错误并为复杂系统验证提供基础框架。
AI.conclusion: CSP建模方法能有效预防Turtle程序错误，为机器人系统形式化验证提供可行的技术路径。

authors_text: Chia-Chi Chuang,Donglin Yang,Chuan Wen,Yang Gao
title: Resolving Copycat Problems in Visual Imitation Learning via Residual Action Prediction
title_zh: 通过残差动作预测解决视觉模仿学习中的模仿问题
abstract: Imitation learning is a widely used policy learning method that enables intelligent agents to acquire complex skills from expert demonstrations. The input to the imitation learning algorithm is usually composed of both the current observation and historical observations since the most recent observation might not contain enough information. This is especially the case with image observations, where a single image only includes one view of the scene, and it suffers from a lack of motion information and object occlusions. In theory, providing multiple observations to the imitation learning agent will lead to better performance. However, surprisingly people find that sometimes imitation from observation histories performs worse than imitation from the most recent observation. In this paper, we explain this phenomenon from the information flow within the neural network perspective. We also propose a novel imitation learning neural network architecture that does not suffer from this issue by design. Furthermore, our method scales to high-dimensional image observations. Finally, we benchmark our approach on two widely used simulators, CARLA and MuJoCo, and it successfully alleviates the copycat problem and surpasses the existing solutions.
summary: Imitation learning is a widely used policy learning method that enables intelligent agents to acquire complex skills from expert demonstrations. The input to the imitation learning algorithm is usually composed of both the current observation and historical observations since the most recent observation might not contain enough information. This is especially the case with image observations, where a single image only includes one view of the scene, and it suffers from a lack of motion information and object occlusions. In theory, providing multiple observations to the imitation learning agent will lead to better performance. However, surprisingly people find that sometimes imitation from observation histories performs worse than imitation from the most recent observation. In this paper, we explain this phenomenon from the information flow within the neural network perspective. We also propose a novel imitation learning neural network architecture that does not suffer from this issue by design. Furthermore, our method scales to high-dimensional image observations. Finally, we benchmark our approach on two widely used simulators, CARLA and MuJoCo, and it successfully alleviates the copycat problem and surpasses the existing solutions.
abstract_zh: 模仿学习是一种广泛使用的策略学习方法，使智能代理能够从专家演示中获得复杂的技能。模仿学习算法的输入通常由当前观察和历史观察组成，因为最近的观察可能不包含足够的信息。对于图像观察尤其如此，其中单个图像仅包含场景的一个视图，并且缺乏运动信息和对象遮挡。理论上，向模仿学习代理提供多个观察结果将带来更好的性能。然而，令人惊讶的是，人们发现有时模仿历史观察的效果比模仿最近观察的效果更差。在本文中，我们从神经网络角度的信息流来解释这一现象。我们还提出了一种新颖的模仿学习神经网络架构，该架构在设计上不会遇到这个问题。此外，我们的方法可以扩展到高维图像观察。最后，我们在两个广泛使用的模拟器 CARLA 和 MuJoCo 上对我们的方法进行了基准测试，它成功地缓解了模仿问题并超越了现有的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过残差动作预测解决视觉模仿学习中的'模仿者问题'，设计新型神经网络架构以提升历史观测信息的利用效果。
AI.motivation: 传统模仿学习使用历史观测时可能出现性能下降的'模仿者问题'，现有方法未能有效解决神经网络内部信息流导致的该现象。
AI.method: 设计基于残差动作预测的新型网络架构，通过分解观测信息流中的冗余与关键特征，结合高维图像观测的可扩展性改进。
AI.result: 在CARLA和MuJoCo模拟器基准测试中，该方法成功缓解模仿者问题，优于现有解决方案并实现稳定性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 提出的残差动作预测框架有效解决了历史观测信息利用中的核心问题，为视觉模仿学习提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Chengxin Liu,Kewei Wang,Hao Lu,Zhiguo Cao,Ziming Zhang
title: Robust Object Detection With Inaccurate Bounding Boxes
title_zh: 具有不准确边界框的稳健物体检测
abstract: Learning accurate object detectors often requires large-scale training data with precise object bounding boxes. However, labeling such data is expensive and time-consuming. As the crowd-sourcing labeling process and the ambiguities of the objects may raise noisy bounding box annotations, the object detectors will suffer from the degenerated training data. In this work, we aim to address the challenge of learning robust object detectors with inaccurate bounding boxes. Inspired by the fact that localization precision suffers significantly from inaccurate bounding boxes while classification accuracy is less affected, we propose leveraging classification as a guidance signal for refining localization results. Specifically, by treating an object as a bag of instances, we introduce an Object-Aware Multiple Instance Learning approach (OA-MIL), featured with object-aware instance selection and object-aware instance extension. The former aims to select accurate instances for training, instead of directly using inaccurate box annotations. The latter focuses on generating high-quality instances for selection. Extensive experiments on synthetic noisy datasets (i.e., noisy PASCAL VOC and MS-COCO) and a real noisy wheat head dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our OA-MIL. Code is available at https://github.com/cxliu0/OA-MIL.
summary: Learning accurate object detectors often requires large-scale training data with precise object bounding boxes. However, labeling such data is expensive and time-consuming. As the crowd-sourcing labeling process and the ambiguities of the objects may raise noisy bounding box annotations, the object detectors will suffer from the degenerated training data. In this work, we aim to address the challenge of learning robust object detectors with inaccurate bounding boxes. Inspired by the fact that localization precision suffers significantly from inaccurate bounding boxes while classification accuracy is less affected, we propose leveraging classification as a guidance signal for refining localization results. Specifically, by treating an object as a bag of instances, we introduce an Object-Aware Multiple Instance Learning approach (OA-MIL), featured with object-aware instance selection and object-aware instance extension. The former aims to select accurate instances for training, instead of directly using inaccurate box annotations. The latter focuses on generating high-quality instances for selection. Extensive experiments on synthetic noisy datasets (i.e., noisy PASCAL VOC and MS-COCO) and a real noisy wheat head dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our OA-MIL. Code is available at https://github.com/cxliu0/OA-MIL.
abstract_zh: 学习准确的对象检测器通常需要具有精确对象边界框的大规模训练数据。然而，标记此类数据既昂贵又耗时。由于众包标记过程和对象的模糊性可能会引起嘈杂的边界框注释，因此对象检测器将受到退化训练数据的影响。在这项工作中，我们的目标是解决学习具有不准确边界框的鲁棒目标检测器的挑战。受定位精度因边界框不准确而受到严重影响而分类精度影响较小这一事实的启发，我们建议利用分类作为指导信号来细化定位结果。具体来说，通过将对象视为实例包，我们引入了对象感知多实例学习方法（OA-MIL），其特点是对象感知实例选择和对象感知实例扩展。前者的目的是选择准确的实例进行训练，而不是直接使用不准确的框注释。后者专注于生成高质量的实例以供选择。对合成噪声数据集（即噪声 PASCAL VOC 和 MS-COCO）和真实噪声小麦头数据集的大量实验证明了 OA-MIL 的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/cxliu0/OA-MIL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在不准确边界框下实现鲁棒目标检测的方法，通过分类指导定位优化。
AI.motivation: 精确的目标检测需要高质量的边界框标注，但人工标注成本高且存在噪声，导致检测性能下降。
AI.method: 提出对象感知的多实例学习（OA-MIL），通过对象感知的实例选择与扩展，利用分类信息优化定位结果。
AI.result: 在合成噪声数据集（如PASCAL VOC、MS-COCO）和真实小麦数据集上验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: OA-MIL通过分类引导机制有效缓解了不准确边界框对检测的影响，提升了鲁棒性。

search_text: Robust Object Detection With Inaccurate Bounding Boxes 具有不准确边界框的稳健物体检测 Learning accurate object detectors often requires large-scale training data with precise object bounding boxes. However, labeling such data is expensive and time-consuming. As the crowd-sourcing labeling process and the ambiguities of the objects may raise noisy bounding box annotations, the object detectors will suffer from the degenerated training data. In this work, we aim to address the challenge of learning robust object detectors with inaccurate bounding boxes. Inspired by the fact that localization precision suffers significantly from inaccurate bounding boxes while classification accuracy is less affected, we propose leveraging classification as a guidance signal for refining localization results. Specifically, by treating an object as a bag of instances, we introduce an Object-Aware Multiple Instance Learning approach (OA-MIL), featured with object-aware instance selection and object-aware instance extension. The former aims to select accurate instances for training, instead of directly using inaccurate box annotations. The latter focuses on generating high-quality instances for selection. Extensive experiments on synthetic noisy datasets (i.e., noisy PASCAL VOC and MS-COCO) and a real noisy wheat head dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our OA-MIL. Code is available at https://github.com/cxliu0/OA-MIL. 学习准确的对象检测器通常需要具有精确对象边界框的大规模训练数据。然而，标记此类数据既昂贵又耗时。由于众包标记过程和对象的模糊性可能会引起嘈杂的边界框注释，因此对象检测器将受到退化训练数据的影响。在这项工作中，我们的目标是解决学习具有不准确边界框的鲁棒目标检测器的挑战。受定位精度因边界框不准确而受到严重影响而分类精度影响较小这一事实的启发，我们建议利用分类作为指导信号来细化定位结果。具体来说，通过将对象视为实例包，我们引入了对象感知多实例学习方法（OA-MIL），其特点是对象感知实例选择和对象感知实例扩展。前者的目的是选择准确的实例进行训练，而不是直接使用不准确的框注释。后者专注于生成高质量的实例以供选择。对合成噪声数据集（即噪声 PASCAL VOC 和 MS-COCO）和真实噪声小麦头数据集的大量实验证明了 OA-MIL 的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/cxliu0/OA-MIL 获取。 本文提出了一种在不准确边界框下实现鲁棒目标检测的方法，通过分类指导定位优化。 Chengxin Liu,Kewei Wang,Hao Lu,Zhiguo Cao,Ziming Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Clément Jailin,Pablo Milioni,Zhijin Li,Răzvan Iordache,Serge Muller
title: Lesion detection in contrast enhanced spectral mammography
title_zh: 对比增强光谱乳腺X线摄影中的病变检测
comment: ef:Sixteenth International Workshop on Breast Imaging, May 2022, Leuven, Belgium. pp.24
comments: ef:Sixteenth International Workshop on Breast Imaging, May 2022, Leuven, Belgium. pp.24
abstract: Background \& purpose: The recent emergence of neural networks models for the analysis of breast images has been a breakthrough in computer aided diagnostic. This approach was not yet developed in Contrast Enhanced Spectral Mammography (CESM) where access to large databases is complex. This work proposes a deep-learning-based Computer Aided Diagnostic development for CESM recombined images able to detect lesions and classify cases. Material \& methods: A large CESM diagnostic dataset with biopsy-proven lesions was collected from various hospitals and different acquisition systems. The annotated data were split on a patient level for the training (55%), validation (15%) and test (30%) of a deep neural network with a state-of-the-art detection architecture. Free Receiver Operating Characteristic (FROC) was used to evaluate the model for the detection of 1) all lesions, 2) biopsied lesions and 3) malignant lesions. ROC curve was used to evaluate breast cancer classification. The metrics were finally compared to clinical results. Results: For the evaluation of the malignant lesion detection, at high sensitivity (Se>0.95), the false positive rate was at 0.61 per image. For the classification of malignant cases, the model reached an Area Under the Curve (AUC) in the range of clinical CESM diagnostic results. Conclusion: This CAD is the first development of a lesion detection and classification model for CESM images. Trained on a large dataset, it has the potential to be used for helping the management of biopsy decision and for helping the radiologist detecting complex lesions that could modify the clinical treatment.

abstract_zh: 背景和目的：最近出现的用于分析乳腺图像的神经网络模型是计算机辅助诊断的突破。这种方法尚未在对比增强光谱乳腺 X 线摄影 (CESM) 中开发出来，因为访问大型数据库很复杂。这项工作提出了一种基于深度学习的计算机辅助诊断开发方法，用于 CESM 重组图像，能够检测病变并对病例进行分类。材料和方法：从各个医院和不同的采集系统收集了包含活检证实病变的大型 CESM 诊断数据集。带注释的数据按患者级别进行划分，用于具有最先进检测架构的深度神经网络的训练 (55%)、验证 (15%) 和测试 (30%)。使用自由受试者操作特征（FROC）来评估检测 1）所有病变、2）活检病变和 3）恶性病变的模型。 ROC曲线用于评估乳腺癌分类。最后将这些指标与临床结果进行比较。结果：对于恶性病变检测的评估，在高灵敏度（Se>0.95）下，每幅图像的假阳性率为0.61。对于恶性病例的分类，该模型达到了临床CESM诊断结果范围内的曲线下面积（AUC）。结论：该 CAD 是首次开发的 CESM 图像病变检测和分类模型。经过大型数据集的训练，它有可能用于帮助管理活检决策，并帮助放射科医生检测可能改变临床治疗的复杂病变。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于深度学习的计算机辅助诊断（CAD）系统，用于对比增强光谱乳腺X线摄影（CESM）图像中的病灶检测和分类。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经网络在乳腺图像分析中取得了突破，但尚未广泛应用于CESM图像，因为获取大型数据库较为复杂。因此，开发一种适用于CESM图像的CAD系统具有重要意义。
AI.method: 研究者收集了一个包含活检证实病灶的大型CESM数据集，并将其按患者水平分为训练集（55%）、验证集（15%）和测试集（30%）。使用先进的检测架构构建深度神经网络，并采用自由接收者操作特征（FROC）曲线和ROC曲线评估模型性能。
AI.result: 在高灵敏度（Se>0.95）下，模型的假阳性率为每张图像0.61。对于恶性病例分类，模型的曲线下面积（AUC）与临床CESM诊断结果相当。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个针对CESM图像开发的病灶检测和分类模型，具有辅助活检决策和帮助放射科医生检测可能改变临床治疗的复杂病灶的潜力。

authors_text: Xiaoqi Li,Jiaming Liu,Shizun Wang,Cheng Lyu,Ming Lu,Yurong Chen,Anbang Yao,Yandong Guo,Shanghang Zhang
title: Efficient Meta-Tuning for Content-aware Neural Video Delivery
title_zh: 用于内容感知神经视频传输的高效元调整
abstract: Recently, Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are utilized to reduce the bandwidth and improve the quality of Internet video delivery. Existing methods train corresponding content-aware super-resolution (SR) model for each video chunk on the server, and stream low-resolution (LR) video chunks along with SR models to the client. Although they achieve promising results, the huge computational cost of network training limits their practical applications. In this paper, we present a method named Efficient Meta-Tuning (EMT) to reduce the computational cost. Instead of training from scratch, EMT adapts a meta-learned model to the first chunk of the input video. As for the following chunks, it fine-tunes the partial parameters selected by gradient masking of previous adapted model. In order to achieve further speedup for EMT, we propose a novel sampling strategy to extract the most challenging patches from video frames. The proposed strategy is highly efficient and brings negligible additional cost. Our method significantly reduces the computational cost and achieves even better performance, paving the way for applying neural video delivery techniques to practical applications. We conduct extensive experiments based on various efficient SR architectures, including ESPCN, SRCNN, FSRCNN and EDSR-1, demonstrating the generalization ability of our work. The code is released at \url{https://github.com/Neural-video-delivery/EMT-Pytorch-ECCV2022}.
summary: Recently, Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are utilized to reduce the bandwidth and improve the quality of Internet video delivery. Existing methods train corresponding content-aware super-resolution (SR) model for each video chunk on the server, and stream low-resolution (LR) video chunks along with SR models to the client. Although they achieve promising results, the huge computational cost of network training limits their practical applications. In this paper, we present a method named Efficient Meta-Tuning (EMT) to reduce the computational cost. Instead of training from scratch, EMT adapts a meta-learned model to the first chunk of the input video. As for the following chunks, it fine-tunes the partial parameters selected by gradient masking of previous adapted model. In order to achieve further speedup for EMT, we propose a novel sampling strategy to extract the most challenging patches from video frames. We conduct extensive experiments based on various efficient SR architectures, including ESPCN, SRCNN, FSRCNN and EDSR-1, demonstrating the generalization ability of our work. The code is released at \url{https://github.com/Neural-video-delivery/EMT-Pytorch-ECCV2022}.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度神经网络（DNN）被用来减少带宽并提高互联网视频传输的质量。现有方法为服务器上的每个视频块训练相应的内容感知超分辨率 (SR) 模型，并将低分辨率 (LR) 视频块与 SR 模型一起流式传输到客户端。尽管它们取得了有希望的结果，但网络训练的巨大计算成本限制了它们的实际应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为高效元调整（EMT）的方法来降低计算成本。 EMT 不是从头开始训练，而是将元学习模型适应输入视频的第一个块。对于以下块，它对先前适应模型的梯度掩蔽选择的部分参数进行微调。为了进一步加速 EMT，我们提出了一种新颖的采样策略，从视频帧中提取最具挑战性的补丁。所提出的策略非常有效并且带来的额外成本可以忽略不计。我们的方法显着降低了计算成本并实现了更好的性能，为将神经视频传输技术应用于实际应用铺平了道路。我们基于各种高效的 SR 架构（包括 ESPCN、SRCNN、FSRCNN 和 EDSR-1）进行了广泛的实验，证明了我们工作的泛化能力。该代码发布于 \url{https://github.com/Neural-video-delivery/EMT-Pytorch-ECCV2022}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EMT的高效元调优方法，用于降低内容感知神经视频传输的计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有方法为每个视频块单独训练超分辨率模型，计算成本过高，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: EMT通过元学习初始化模型，仅对首个视频块进行适配，后续块通过梯度掩码选择性微调参数，并采用高效采样策略提取最具挑战性的视频块。
AI.result: 实验表明，EMT显著降低计算成本且性能更优，在多种高效SR架构（如ESPCN、EDSR-1等）上验证了泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: EMT为神经视频传输技术的实际应用提供了可行方案，兼顾效率与效果。

search_text: Efficient Meta-Tuning for Content-aware Neural Video Delivery 用于内容感知神经视频传输的高效元调整 Recently, Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are utilized to reduce the bandwidth and improve the quality of Internet video delivery. Existing methods train corresponding content-aware super-resolution (SR) model for each video chunk on the server, and stream low-resolution (LR) video chunks along with SR models to the client. Although they achieve promising results, the huge computational cost of network training limits their practical applications. In this paper, we present a method named Efficient Meta-Tuning (EMT) to reduce the computational cost. Instead of training from scratch, EMT adapts a meta-learned model to the first chunk of the input video. As for the following chunks, it fine-tunes the partial parameters selected by gradient masking of previous adapted model. In order to achieve further speedup for EMT, we propose a novel sampling strategy to extract the most challenging patches from video frames. The proposed strategy is highly efficient and brings negligible additional cost. Our method significantly reduces the computational cost and achieves even better performance, paving the way for applying neural video delivery techniques to practical applications. We conduct extensive experiments based on various efficient SR architectures, including ESPCN, SRCNN, FSRCNN and EDSR-1, demonstrating the generalization ability of our work. The code is released at \url{https://github.com/Neural-video-delivery/EMT-Pytorch-ECCV2022}. 最近，深度神经网络（DNN）被用来减少带宽并提高互联网视频传输的质量。现有方法为服务器上的每个视频块训练相应的内容感知超分辨率 (SR) 模型，并将低分辨率 (LR) 视频块与 SR 模型一起流式传输到客户端。尽管它们取得了有希望的结果，但网络训练的巨大计算成本限制了它们的实际应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为高效元调整（EMT）的方法来降低计算成本。 EMT 不是从头开始训练，而是将元学习模型适应输入视频的第一个块。对于以下块，它对先前适应模型的梯度掩蔽选择的部分参数进行微调。为了进一步加速 EMT，我们提出了一种新颖的采样策略，从视频帧中提取最具挑战性的补丁。所提出的策略非常有效并且带来的额外成本可以忽略不计。我们的方法显着降低了计算成本并实现了更好的性能，为将神经视频传输技术应用于实际应用铺平了道路。我们基于各种高效的 SR 架构（包括 ESPCN、SRCNN、FSRCNN 和 EDSR-1）进行了广泛的实验，证明了我们工作的泛化能力。该代码发布于 \url{https://github.com/Neural-video-delivery/EMT-Pytorch-ECCV2022}。 本文提出了一种名为EMT的高效元调优方法，用于降低内容感知神经视频传输的计算成本。 Xiaoqi Li,Jiaming Liu,Shizun Wang,Cheng Lyu,Ming Lu,Yurong Chen,Anbang Yao,Yandong Guo,Shanghang Zhang cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Zhenqi Fu,Wu Wang,Yue Huang,Xinghao Ding,Kai-Kuang Ma
title: Uncertainty Inspired Underwater Image Enhancement
title_zh: 不确定性激发水下图像增强
abstract: A main challenge faced in the deep learning-based Underwater Image Enhancement (UIE) is that the ground truth high-quality image is unavailable. Most of the existing methods first generate approximate reference maps and then train an enhancement network with certainty. This kind of method fails to handle the ambiguity of the reference map. In this paper, we resolve UIE into distribution estimation and consensus process. We present a novel probabilistic network to learn the enhancement distribution of degraded underwater images. Specifically, we combine conditional variational autoencoder with adaptive instance normalization to construct the enhancement distribution. After that, we adopt a consensus process to predict a deterministic result based on a set of samples from the distribution. By learning the enhancement distribution, our method can cope with the bias introduced in the reference map labeling to some extent. Additionally, the consensus process is useful to capture a robust and stable result. We examined the proposed method on two widely used real-world underwater image enhancement datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach enables sampling possible enhancement predictions. Meanwhile, the consensus estimate yields competitive performance compared with state-of-the-art UIE methods. Code available at https://github.com/zhenqifu/PUIE-Net.
summary: A main challenge faced in the deep learning-based Underwater Image Enhancement (UIE) is that the ground truth high-quality image is unavailable. Most of the existing methods first generate approximate reference maps and then train an enhancement network with certainty. This kind of method fails to handle the ambiguity of the reference map. In this paper, we resolve UIE into distribution estimation and consensus process. We present a novel probabilistic network to learn the enhancement distribution of degraded underwater images. Specifically, we combine conditional variational autoencoder with adaptive instance normalization to construct the enhancement distribution. After that, we adopt a consensus process to predict a deterministic result based on a set of samples from the distribution. By learning the enhancement distribution, our method can cope with the bias introduced in the reference map labeling to some extent. Additionally, the consensus process is useful to capture a robust and stable result. We examined the proposed method on two widely used real-world underwater image enhancement datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach enables sampling possible enhancement predictions. Meanwhile, the consensus estimate yields competitive performance compared with state-of-the-art UIE methods. Code available at https://github.com/zhenqifu/PUIE-Net.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的水下图像增强（UIE）面临的主要挑战是无法获得真实的高质量图像。大多数现有方法首先生成近似参考图，然后确定性地训练增强网络。这种方法无法处理参考图的模糊性。在本文中，我们将 UIE 分解为分布估计和共识过程。我们提出了一种新颖的概率网络来学习退化水下图像的增强分布。具体来说，我们将条件变分自动编码器与自适应实例归一化相结合来构造增强分布。之后，我们采用共识过程来根据分布中的一组样本来预测确定性结果。通过学习增强分布，我们的方法可以在一定程度上应对参考图标记中引入的偏差。此外，共识过程对于获得稳健且稳定的结果很有用。我们在两个广泛使用的现实世界水下图像增强数据集上检查了所提出的方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法能够对可能的增强预测进行采样。同时，与最先进的 UIE 方法相比，共识估计产生了具有竞争力的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/zhenqifu/PUIE-Net 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于概率网络的水下图像增强方法，以解决因参考图模糊性导致的深度学习方法不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 由于缺乏高质量的真实图像作为训练数据，现有水下图像增强方法在处理参考图模糊性时存在局限性，因此需要一种新的方法来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种概率网络，结合条件变分自编码器和自适应实例归一化来学习退化水下图像的增强分布，并通过共识过程从分布中预测确定性结果。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法能够生成可能的增强预测，并且在两个常用的真实世界水下图像数据集上表现优于现有最先进的水下图像增强方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过学习增强分布和共识过程，有效缓解了参考图模糊性带来的偏差，能够生成鲁棒且稳定的增强结果。

Most of the existing methods first generate approximate reference maps and then train an enhancement network with certainty. This kind of method fails to handle the ambiguity of the reference map. In this paper, we resolve UIE into distribution estimation and consensus process. We present a novel probabilistic network to learn the enhancement distribution of degraded underwater images. authors_text: Qianyi Wu,Xian Liu,Yuedong Chen,Kejie Li,Chuanxia Zheng,Jianfei Cai,Jianmin Zheng
title: Object-Compositional Neural Implicit Surfaces
title_zh: 对象组合神经隐式表面
comment: ECCV2022, Project Page: https://qianyiwu.github.io/objectsdf/ Code: https://github.com/QianyiWu/objsdf
comments: ECCV2022, Project Page: https://qianyiwu.github.io/objectsdf/ Code: https://github.com/QianyiWu/objsdf
abstract: The neural implicit representation has shown its effectiveness in novel view synthesis and high-quality 3D reconstruction from multi-view images. However, most approaches focus on holistic scene representation yet ignore individual objects inside it, thus limiting potential downstream applications. In order to learn object-compositional representation, a few works incorporate the 2D semantic map as a cue in training to grasp the difference between objects. But they neglect the strong connections between object geometry and instance semantic information, which leads to inaccurate modeling of individual instance. This paper proposes a novel framework, ObjectSDF, to build an object-compositional neural implicit representation with high fidelity in 3D reconstruction and object representation. Observing the ambiguity of conventional volume rendering pipelines, we model the scene by combining the Signed Distance Functions (SDF) of individual object to exert explicit surface constraint. The key in distinguishing different instances is to revisit the strong association between an individual object's SDF and semantic label. Particularly, we convert the semantic information to a function of object SDF and develop a unified and compact representation for scene and objects. Experimental results show the superiority of ObjectSDF framework in representing both the holistic object-compositional scene and the individual instances. Code can be found at https://qianyiwu.github.io/objectsdf/
summary: The neural implicit representation has shown its effectiveness in novel view synthesis and high-quality 3D reconstruction from multi-view images. However, most approaches focus on holistic scene representation yet ignore individual objects inside it, thus limiting potential downstream applications. In order to learn object-compositional representation, a few works incorporate the 2D semantic map as a cue in training to grasp the difference between objects. But they neglect the strong connections between object geometry and instance semantic information, which leads to inaccurate modeling of individual instance. This paper proposes a novel framework, ObjectSDF, to build an object-compositional neural implicit representation with high fidelity in 3D reconstruction and object representation. Observing the ambiguity of conventional volume rendering pipelines, we model the scene by combining the Signed Distance Functions (SDF) of individual object to exert explicit surface constraint. The key in distinguishing different instances is to revisit the strong association between an individual object's SDF and semantic label. Particularly, we convert the semantic information to a function of object SDF and develop a unified and compact representation for scene and objects. Experimental results show the superiority of ObjectSDF framework in representing both the holistic object-compositional scene and the individual instances. Code can be found at https://qianyiwu.github.io/objectsdf/
abstract_zh: 神经隐式表示在新颖的视图合成和多视图图像的高质量 3D 重建中显示了其有效性。然而，大多数方法专注于整体场景表示，但忽略了其中的单个对象，从而限制了潜在的下游应用。为了学习对象组合表示，一些作品将 2D 语义图作为训练的线索来掌握对象之间的差异。但他们忽视了对象几何形状和实例语义信息之间的紧密联系，从而导致单个实例的建模不准确。本文提出了一种新颖的框架 ObjectSDF，用于构建在 3D 重建和对象表示中具有高保真度的对象组合神经隐式表示。观察传统体积渲染管道的模糊性，我们通过组合单个对象的有符号距离函数（SDF）来对场景进行建模，以施加显式的表面约束。区分不同实例的关键是重新审视单个对象的 SDF 和语义标签之间的强关联。特别是，我们将语义信息转换为对象 SDF 的函数，并为场景和对象开发统一且紧凑的表示。实验结果表明，ObjectSDF 框架在表示整体对象组合场景和单个实例方面具有优越性。代码可以在https://qianyiwu.github.io/objectsdf/找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ObjectSDF的框架，用于构建具有高保真度的物体组合神经隐式表示，以提升三维重建和物体表示的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有神经隐式表示方法侧重于整体场景建模，忽视了场景中单个物体的表示，导致下游应用受限。现有方法虽引入语义图，但未充分结合物体几何与语义信息，导致个体物体建模不准确。
AI.method: 通过将单个物体的符号距离函数（SDF）与语义标签结合，构建显式表面约束的场景模型。将语义信息转化为SDF函数，形成统一且紧凑的场景与物体表示框架。
AI.result: 实验表明，ObjectSDF在整体场景和单个物体的表示任务中均优于现有方法，实现了更精确的三维重建与物体建模。
AI.conclusion: ObjectSDF通过整合几何与语义信息，有效解决了传统方法在物体组合建模中的不足，为高精度三维重建提供了新思路。

search_text: Object-Compositional Neural Implicit Surfaces 对象组合神经隐式表面 The neural implicit representation has shown its effectiveness in novel view synthesis and high-quality 3D reconstruction from multi-view images. However, most approaches focus on holistic scene representation yet ignore individual objects inside it, thus limiting potential downstream applications. In order to learn object-compositional representation, a few works incorporate the 2D semantic map as a cue in training to grasp the difference between objects. But they neglect the strong connections between object geometry and instance semantic information, which leads to inaccurate modeling of individual instance. This paper proposes a novel framework, ObjectSDF, to build an object-compositional neural implicit representation with high fidelity in 3D reconstruction and object representation. Observing the ambiguity of conventional volume rendering pipelines, we model the scene by combining the Signed Distance Functions (SDF) of individual object to exert explicit surface constraint. The key in distinguishing different instances is to revisit the strong association between an individual object's SDF and semantic label. Particularly, we convert the semantic information to a function of object SDF and develop a unified and compact representation for scene and objects. Experimental results show the superiority of ObjectSDF framework in representing both the holistic object-compositional scene and the individual instances. Code can be found at https://qianyiwu.github.io/objectsdf/ 神经隐式表示在新颖的视图合成和多视图图像的高质量 3D 重建中显示了其有效性。然而，大多数方法专注于整体场景表示，但忽略了其中的单个对象，从而限制了潜在的下游应用。为了学习对象组合表示，一些作品将 2D 语义图作为训练的线索来掌握对象之间的差异。但他们忽视了对象几何形状和实例语义信息之间的紧密联系，从而导致单个实例的建模不准确。本文提出了一种新颖的框架 ObjectSDF，用于构建在 3D 重建和对象表示中具有高保真度的对象组合神经隐式表示。观察传统体积渲染管道的模糊性，我们通过组合单个对象的有符号距离函数（SDF）来对场景进行建模，以施加显式的表面约束。区分不同实例的关键是重新审视单个对象的 SDF 和语义标签之间的强关联。特别是，我们将语义信息转换为对象 SDF 的函数，并为场景和对象开发统一且紧凑的表示。实验结果表明，ObjectSDF 框架在表示整体对象组合场景和单个实例方面具有优越性。代码可以在https://qianyiwu.github.io/objectsdf/找到 本文提出一种名为ObjectSDF的框架，用于构建具有高保真度的物体组合神经隐式表示，以提升三维重建和物体表示的效果。 Qianyi Wu,Xian Liu,Yuedong Chen,Kejie Li,Chuanxia Zheng,Jianfei Cai,Jianmin Zheng cs.CV

authors_text: Geonung Kim,Kyoungkook Kang,Seongtae Kim,Hwayoon Lee,Sehoon Kim,Jonghyun Kim,Seung-Hwan Baek,Sunghyun Cho
title: BigColor: Colorization using a Generative Color Prior for Natural Images
title_zh: BigColor：使用生成颜色先验对自然图像进行着色
abstract: For realistic and vivid colorization, generative priors have recently been exploited. However, such generative priors often fail for in-the-wild complex images due to their limited representation space. In this paper, we propose BigColor, a novel colorization approach that provides vivid colorization for diverse in-the-wild images with complex structures. While previous generative priors are trained to synthesize both image structures and colors, we learn a generative color prior to focus on color synthesis given the spatial structure of an image. In this way, we reduce the burden of synthesizing image structures from the generative prior and expand its representation space to cover diverse images. To this end, we propose a BigGAN-inspired encoder-generator network that uses a spatial feature map instead of a spatially-flattened BigGAN latent code, resulting in an enlarged representation space. Our method enables robust colorization for diverse inputs in a single forward pass, supports arbitrary input resolutions, and provides multi-modal colorization results. We demonstrate that BigColor significantly outperforms existing methods especially on in-the-wild images with complex structures.
summary: For realistic and vivid colorization, generative priors have recently been exploited. However, such generative priors often fail for in-the-wild complex images due to their limited representation space. In this paper, we propose BigColor, a novel colorization approach that provides vivid colorization for diverse in-the-wild images with complex structures. While previous generative priors are trained to synthesize both image structures and colors, we learn a generative color prior to focus on color synthesis given the spatial structure of an image. In this way, we reduce the burden of synthesizing image structures from the generative prior and expand its representation space to cover diverse images. To this end, we propose a BigGAN-inspired encoder-generator network that uses a spatial feature map instead of a spatially-flattened BigGAN latent code, resulting in an enlarged representation space. Our method enables robust colorization for diverse inputs in a single forward pass, supports arbitrary input resolutions, and provides multi-modal colorization results. We demonstrate that BigColor significantly outperforms existing methods especially on in-the-wild images with complex structures.
abstract_zh: 为了实现逼真和生动的着色，最近已经利用了生成先验。然而，由于表示空间有限，这种生成先验对于野外复杂图像通常会失败。在本文中，我们提出了 BigColor，这是一种新颖的着色方法，可为具有复杂结构的各种野外图像提供生动的着色。虽然之前的生成先验被训练来合成图像结构和颜色，但我们在考虑到图像的空间结构的情况下，在专注于颜色合成之前学习生成颜色。通过这种方式，我们减轻了从生成先验合成图像结构的负担，并扩展其表示空间以覆盖不同的图像。为此，我们提出了一种受 BigGAN 启发的编码器生成器网络，该网络使用空间特征图而不是空间平坦的 BigGAN 潜在代码，从而扩大了表示空间。我们的方法可以在一次前向传递中为不同的输入提供强大的着色，支持任意输入分辨率，并提供多模式着色结果。我们证明 BigColor 显着优于现有方法，尤其是在具有复杂结构的野外图像上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BigColor方法，通过生成颜色先验实现对复杂自然图像的生动着色。
AI.motivation: 现有生成先验在复杂真实图像上表现不足，因其表示空间有限且同时需生成结构与颜色，导致负担过重。
AI.method: 设计基于BigGAN的编码器-生成器网络，利用空间特征图替代扁平化潜在码，扩大表示空间并专注于颜色合成。
AI.result: BigColor在复杂结构图像上显著优于现有方法，支持任意分辨率输入并生成多模态着色结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过分离结构与颜色生成任务，BigColor扩展了表示空间，实现了对多样化复杂图像的鲁棒着色。

authors_text: Xingjian Zhen,Zihang Meng,Rudrasis Chakraborty,Vikas Singh
title: On the Versatile Uses of Partial Distance Correlation in Deep Learning
title_zh: 论部分距离相关在深度学习中的多种用途
comment: This paper has been selected as best paper award for ECCV 2022!
comments: This paper has been selected as best paper award for ECCV 2022!
abstract: Comparing the functional behavior of neural network models, whether it is a single network over time or two (or more networks) during or post-training, is an essential step in understanding what they are learning (and what they are not), and for identifying strategies for regularization or efficiency improvements. Despite recent progress, e.g., comparing vision transformers to CNNs, systematic comparison of function, especially across different networks, remains difficult and is often carried out layer by layer. Approaches such as canonical correlation analysis (CCA) are applicable in principle, but have been sparingly used so far. In this paper, we revisit a (less widely known) from statistics, called distance correlation (and its partial variant), designed to evaluate correlation between feature spaces of different dimensions. We describe the steps necessary to carry out its deployment for large scale models -- this opens the door to a surprising array of applications ranging from conditioning one deep model w.r.t. another, learning disentangled representations as well as optimizing diverse models that would directly be more robust to adversarial attacks. Our experiments suggest a versatile regularizer (or constraint) with many advantages, which avoids some of the common difficulties one faces in such analyses. Code is at https://github.com/zhenxingjian/Partial_Distance_Correlation.
summary: Comparing the functional behavior of neural network models, whether it is a single network over time or two (or more networks) during or post-training, is an essential step in understanding what they are learning (and what they are not), and for identifying strategies for regularization or efficiency improvements. Despite recent progress, e.g., comparing vision transformers to CNNs, systematic comparison of function, especially across different networks, remains difficult and is often carried out layer by layer. Approaches such as canonical correlation analysis (CCA) are applicable in principle, but have been sparingly used so far. In this paper, we revisit a (less widely known) from statistics, called distance correlation (and its partial variant), designed to evaluate correlation between feature spaces of different dimensions. We describe the steps necessary to carry out its deployment for large scale models -- this opens the door to a surprising array of applications ranging from conditioning one deep model w.r.t. another, learning disentangled representations as well as optimizing diverse models that would directly be more robust to adversarial attacks. Our experiments suggest a versatile regularizer (or constraint) with many advantages, which avoids some of the common difficulties one faces in such analyses. Code is at https://github.com/zhenxingjian/Partial_Distance_Correlation.
abstract_zh: 比较神经网络模型的功能行为，无论是训练期间或训练后的单个网络还是两个（或多个网络），都是了解它们正在学习什么（以及没有学习什么）以及确定正则化或效率改进策略的重要一步。尽管最近取得了一些进展，例如将视觉转换器与 CNN 进行比较，但功能的系统比较，尤其是跨不同网络的功能比较，仍然很困难，并且通常是逐层进行的。典型相关分析（CCA）等方法原则上是适用的，但迄今为止很少使用。在本文中，我们重新审视统计学中的一个（不太广为人知的），称为距离相关性（及其部分变体），旨在评估不同维度的特征空间之间的相关性。我们描述了对大型模型进行部署所需的步骤——这为一系列令人惊讶的应用程序打开了大门，从调节一个深度模型到一个深度模型。另一方面，学习解开的表示以及优化不同的模型，这些模型对于对抗性攻击来说更加鲁棒。我们的实验提出了一种具有许多优点的多功能正则化器（或约束），它避免了人们在此类分析中面临的一些常见困难。代码位于https://github.com/zhenxingjian/Partial_Distance_Correlation。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了部分距离相关性在深度学习中的多功能应用，用于比较神经网络模型的功能行为并优化模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如典型相关分析（CCA）在比较不同神经网络的功能时存在系统性困难，且应用较少，需更有效的工具进行模型分析与改进。
AI.method: 重新引入统计学中的距离相关性及其部分变体，用于评估不同维度特征空间的相关性，并将其扩展至大规模模型的部署。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法作为正则化工具具有多功能性，能有效避免模型分析中的常见困难，提升鲁棒性和优化效果。
AI.conclusion: 部分距离相关性为深度学习模型的比较、正则化及优化提供了新思路，具有广泛的应用潜力。

Approaches such as canonical correlation analysis (CCA) are applicable in principle, but have been sparingly used so far. In this paper, we revisit a (less widely known) from statistics, called distance correlation (and its partial variant), designed to evaluate correlation between feature spaces of different dimensions. We describe the steps necessary to carry out its deployment for large scale models -- this opens the door to a surprising array of applications ranging from conditioning one deep model w.r.t. another, learning disentangled representations as well as optimizing diverse models that would directly be more robust to adversarial attacks. Our experiments suggest a versatile regularizer (or constraint) with many advantages, which avoids some of the common difficulties one faces in such analyses. Code is at https://github.com/zhenxingjian/Partial_Distance_Correlation. 比较神经网络模型的功能行为，无论是训练期间或训练后的单个网络还是两个（或多个网络），都是了解它们正在学习什么（以及没有学习什么）以及确定正则化或效率改进策略的重要一步。尽管最近取得了一些进展，例如将视觉转换器与 CNN 进行比较，但功能的系统比较，尤其是跨不同网络的功能比较，仍然很困难，并且通常是逐层进行的。典型相关分析（CCA）等方法原则上是适用的，但迄今为止很少使用。在本文中，我们重新审视统计学中的一个（不太广为人知的），称为距离相关性（及其部分变体），旨在评估不同维度的特征空间之间的相关性。我们描述了对大型模型进行部署所需的步骤——这为一系列令人惊讶的应用程序打开了大门，从调节一个深度模型到一个深度模型。另一方面，学习解开的表示以及优化不同的模型，这些模型对于对抗性攻击来说更加鲁棒。我们的实验提出了一种具有许多优点的多功能正则化器（或约束），它避免了人们在此类分析中面临的一些常见困难。代码位于https://github.com/zhenxingjian/Partial_Distance_Correlation。 本文介绍了部分距离相关性在深度学习中的多功能应用，用于比较神经网络模型的功能行为并优化模型性能。 Xingjian Zhen,Zihang Meng,Rudrasis Chakraborty,Vikas Singh cs.CV

authors_text: Shichao Dong,Jin Wang,Jiajun Liang,Haoqiang Fan,Renhe Ji
title: Explaining Deepfake Detection by Analysing Image Matching
title_zh: 通过分析图像匹配解释 Deepfake 检测
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2022, Code is available at: https://github.com/megvii-research/FST-Matching
comments: Accepted at ECCV 2022, Code is available at: https://github.com/megvii-research/FST-Matching
abstract: This paper aims to interpret how deepfake detection models learn artifact features of images when just supervised by binary labels. To this end, three hypotheses from the perspective of image matching are proposed as follows. 1. Deepfake detection models indicate real/fake images based on visual concepts that are neither source-relevant nor target-relevant, that is, considering such visual concepts as artifact-relevant. 2. Besides the supervision of binary labels, deepfake detection models implicitly learn artifact-relevant visual concepts through the FST-Matching (i.e. the matching fake, source, target images) in the training set. 3. Implicitly learned artifact visual concepts through the FST-Matching in the raw training set are vulnerable to video compression. In experiments, the above hypotheses are verified among various DNNs. Furthermore, based on this understanding, we propose the FST-Matching Deepfake Detection Model to boost the performance of forgery detection on compressed videos. Experiment results show that our method achieves great performance, especially on highly-compressed (e.g. c40) videos.
summary: This paper aims to interpret how deepfake detection models learn artifact features of images when just supervised by binary labels. To this end, three hypotheses from the perspective of image matching are proposed as follows. 1. Deepfake detection models indicate real/fake images based on visual concepts that are neither source-relevant nor target-relevant, that is, considering such visual concepts as artifact-relevant. 2. Besides the supervision of binary labels, deepfake detection models implicitly learn artifact-relevant visual concepts through the FST-Matching (i.e. the matching fake, source, target images) in the training set. 3. Implicitly learned artifact visual concepts through the FST-Matching in the raw training set are vulnerable to video compression. In experiments, the above hypotheses are verified among various DNNs. Furthermore, based on this understanding, we propose the FST-Matching Deepfake Detection Model to boost the performance of forgery detection on compressed videos. Experiment results show that our method achieves great performance, especially on highly-compressed (e.g. c40) videos.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在解释 Deepfake 检测模型在仅受二进制标签监督时如何学习图像的伪影特征。为此，从图像匹配的角度提出以下三个假设。 1. Deepfake 检测模型基于既不与源相关也不与目标相关的视觉概念来指示真/假图像，即将此类视觉概念视为与伪影相关。 2. 除了二进制标签的监督之外，深度伪造检测模型还通过训练集中的 FST 匹配（即匹配假图像、源图像、目标图像）隐式学习与伪影相关的视觉概念。 3. 通过原始训练集中的 FST 匹配隐式学习的伪像视觉概念容易受到视频压缩的影响。在实验中，上述假设在各种 DNN 中得到了验证。此外，基于这种理解，我们提出了 FST 匹配 Deepfake 检测模型，以提高压缩视频的伪造检测性能。实验结果表明，我们的方法取得了很好的性能，特别是在高度压缩（例如 c40）视频上。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析图像匹配解释深度伪造检测模型如何学习图像的伪影特征，并提出基于FST-Matching的检测方法以提升压缩视频的伪造检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测模型在仅依赖二元标签监督时，可能学习到与源或目标无关的伪影特征，且未充分考虑视频压缩对检测性能的影响，需探索其内在机制并提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出三个假设：1）检测模型依赖伪影相关的视觉概念；2）通过训练集中的FST-Matching（假、源、目标图像匹配）隐式学习伪影特征；3）原始训练集学习的伪影特征易受视频压缩影响。基于此设计FST-Matching检测模型。
AI.result: 实验验证了假设，并表明所提方法在高度压缩视频（如c40）上表现优异，显著提升检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 深度伪造检测模型通过FST-Matching学习伪影特征，而压缩视频需针对性优化。本文方法通过显式建模FST-Matching，有效提升了压缩场景下的检测效果。

authors_text: Lin Geng Foo,Tianjiao Li,Hossein Rahmani,Qiuhong Ke,Jun Liu
title: ERA: Expert Retrieval and Assembly for Early Action Prediction
title_zh: ERA：用于早期行动预测的专家检索和组装
abstract: Early action prediction aims to successfully predict the class label of an action before it is completely performed. This is a challenging task because the beginning stages of different actions can be very similar, with only minor subtle differences for discrimination. In this paper, we propose a novel Expert Retrieval and Assembly (ERA) module that retrieves and assembles a set of experts most specialized at using discriminative subtle differences, to distinguish an input sample from other highly similar samples. To encourage our model to effectively use subtle differences for early action prediction, we push experts to discriminate exclusively between samples that are highly similar, forcing these experts to learn to use subtle differences that exist between those samples. Additionally, we design an effective Expert Learning Rate Optimization method that balances the experts' optimization and leads to better performance. We evaluate our ERA module on four public action datasets and achieve state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Early action prediction aims to successfully predict the class label of an action before it is completely performed. This is a challenging task because the beginning stages of different actions can be very similar, with only minor subtle differences for discrimination. In this paper, we propose a novel Expert Retrieval and Assembly (ERA) module that retrieves and assembles a set of experts most specialized at using discriminative subtle differences, to distinguish an input sample from other highly similar samples. To encourage our model to effectively use subtle differences for early action prediction, we push experts to discriminate exclusively between samples that are highly similar, forcing these experts to learn to use subtle differences that exist between those samples. Additionally, we design an effective Expert Learning Rate Optimization method that balances the experts' optimization and leads to better performance. We evaluate our ERA module on four public action datasets and achieve state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 早期动作预测旨在在动作完全执行之前成功预测动作的类标签。这是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为不同动作的开始阶段可能非常相似，只有细微的区别以区分。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的专家检索和组装（ERA）模块，该模块检索并组装一组最擅长使用判别性细微差异的专家，以将输入样本与其他高度相似的样本区分开来。为了鼓励我们的模型有效地利用细微差异进行早期行动预测，我们推动专家专门区分高度相似的样本，迫使这些专家学习使用这些样本之间存在的细微差异。此外，我们设计了一种有效的专家学习率优化方法，可以平衡专家的优化并带来更好的性能。我们在四个公共行动数据集上评估我们的 ERA 模块，并实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ERA模块，通过专家检索与组装实现早期动作预测。
AI.motivation: 早期动作预测因动作初始阶段相似且细微差异难以区分而具有挑战性。
AI.method: 设计ERA模块检索并组装擅长利用细微差异的专家，结合专家学习率优化方法提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在四个公开动作数据集上达到最先进的预测性能。
AI.conclusion: ERA模块通过有效利用细微差异和优化专家学习率，显著提升了早期动作预测的准确性。
