authors_text: Laxmi Pandey,Debjyoti Paul,Pooja Chitkara,Yutong Pang,Xuedong Zhang,Kjell Schubert,Mark Chou,Shu Liu,Yatharth Saraf
title: Improving Data Driven Inverse Text Normalization using Data Augmentation
title_zh: 使用数据增强改进数据驱动的反向文本规范化
abstract: Inverse text normalization (ITN) is used to convert the spoken form output of an automatic speech recognition (ASR) system to a written form. Traditional handcrafted ITN rules can be complex to transcribe and maintain. Meanwhile neural modeling approaches require quality large-scale spoken-written pair examples in the same or similar domain as the ASR system (in-domain data), to train. Both these approaches require costly and complex annotations. In this paper, we present a data augmentation technique that effectively generates rich spoken-written numeric pairs from out-of-domain textual data with minimal human annotation. We empirically demonstrate that ITN model trained using our data augmentation technique consistently outperform ITN model trained using only in-domain data across all numeric surfaces like cardinal, currency, and fraction, by an overall accuracy of 14.44%.
summary: Inverse text normalization (ITN) is used to convert the spoken form output of an automatic speech recognition (ASR) system to a written form. Traditional handcrafted ITN rules can be complex to transcribe and maintain. Meanwhile neural modeling approaches require quality large-scale spoken-written pair examples in the same or similar domain as the ASR system (in-domain data), to train. Both these approaches require costly and complex annotations. In this paper, we present a data augmentation technique that effectively generates rich spoken-written numeric pairs from out-of-domain textual data with minimal human annotation. We empirically demonstrate that ITN model trained using our data augmentation technique consistently outperform ITN model trained using only in-domain data across all numeric surfaces like cardinal, currency, and fraction, by an overall accuracy of 14.44%.
abstract_zh: 逆文本标准化 (ITN) 用于将自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的口语形式输出转换为书面形式。传统手工制定的 ITN 规则转录和维护起来可能很复杂。同时，神经建模方法需要与 ASR 系统（域内数据）相同或相似领域的高质量大规模口写配对示例进行训练。这两种方法都需要昂贵且复杂的注释。在本文中，我们提出了一种数据增强技术，该技术可以通过最少的人工注释，从域外文本数据中有效地生成丰富的口语书写数字对。我们凭经验证明，使用我们的数据增强技术训练的 ITN 模型始终优于仅使用所有数字表面（如基数、货币和分数）的域内数据训练的 ITN 模型，总体准确度为 14.44%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据增强技术，通过生成无需人工标注的跨领域语音-文本数字对，提升数据驱动的逆文本归一化（ITN）模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统ITN规则复杂且维护成本高，神经网络方法依赖昂贵的同领域数据标注，亟需更高效的数据生成方案。
AI.method: 利用跨领域文本数据自动生成语音-文本数字对，结合最小人工标注实现数据增强，训练ITN模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在基数、货币、分数等所有数字场景下，模型准确率较仅使用同领域数据的基线提升14.44%。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强技术有效降低对同领域标注数据的依赖，为ITN模型训练提供更经济高效的解决方案。

search_text: Improving Data Driven Inverse Text Normalization using Data Augmentation 使用数据增强改进数据驱动的反向文本规范化 Inverse text normalization (ITN) is used to convert the spoken form output of an automatic speech recognition (ASR) system to a written form. Traditional handcrafted ITN rules can be complex to transcribe and maintain. Meanwhile neural modeling approaches require quality large-scale spoken-written pair examples in the same or similar domain as the ASR system (in-domain data), to train. Both these approaches require costly and complex annotations. In this paper, we present a data augmentation technique that effectively generates rich spoken-written numeric pairs from out-of-domain textual data with minimal human annotation. We empirically demonstrate that ITN model trained using our data augmentation technique consistently outperform ITN model trained using only in-domain data across all numeric surfaces like cardinal, currency, and fraction, by an overall accuracy of 14.44%. 逆文本标准化 (ITN) 用于将自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的口语形式输出转换为书面形式。传统手工制定的 ITN 规则转录和维护起来可能很复杂。同时，神经建模方法需要与 ASR 系统（域内数据）相同或相似领域的高质量大规模口写配对示例进行训练。这两种方法都需要昂贵且复杂的注释。在本文中，我们提出了一种数据增强技术，该技术可以通过最少的人工注释，从域外文本数据中有效地生成丰富的口语书写数字对。我们凭经验证明，使用我们的数据增强技术训练的 ITN 模型始终优于仅使用所有数字表面（如基数、货币和分数）的域内数据训练的 ITN 模型，总体准确度为 14.44%。 本文提出一种数据增强技术，通过生成无需人工标注的跨领域语音-文本数字对，提升数据驱动的逆文本归一化（ITN）模型性能。 Laxmi Pandey,Debjyoti Paul,Pooja Chitkara,Yutong Pang,Xuedong Zhang,Kjell Schubert,Mark Chou,Shu Liu,Yatharth Saraf cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Juliette Opdenplatz,Umutcan Şimşek,Dieter Fensel
title: Duplicate Detection as a Service
title_zh: 重复检测即服务
abstract: Completeness of a knowledge graph is an important quality dimension and factor on how well an application that makes use of it performs. Completeness can be improved by performing knowledge enrichment. Duplicate detection aims to find identity links between the instances of knowledge graphs and is a fundamental subtask of knowledge enrichment. Current solutions to the problem require expert knowledge of the tool and the knowledge graph they are applied to. Users might not have this expert knowledge. We present our service-based approach to the duplicate detection task that provides an easy-to-use no-code solution that is still competitive with the state-of-the-art and has recently been adopted in an industrial context. The evaluation will be based on several frequently used test scenarios.
summary: Completeness of a knowledge graph is an important quality dimension and factor on how well an application that makes use of it performs. Completeness can be improved by performing knowledge enrichment. Duplicate detection aims to find identity links between the instances of knowledge graphs and is a fundamental subtask of knowledge enrichment. Current solutions to the problem require expert knowledge of the tool and the knowledge graph they are applied to. Users might not have this expert knowledge. We present our service-based approach to the duplicate detection task that provides an easy-to-use no-code solution that is still competitive with the state-of-the-art and has recently been adopted in an industrial context. The evaluation will be based on several frequently used test scenarios.
abstract_zh: 知识图的完整性是一个重要的质量维度，也是影响使用它的应用程序执行效果的因素。可以通过进行知识丰富来提高完整性。重复检测旨在找到知识图实例之间的身份联系，是知识丰富的基本子任务。当前该问题的解决方案需要该工具及其所应用的知识图的专业知识。用户可能不具备这些专业知识。我们提出了基于服务的重复检测任务方法，该方法提供了一种易于使用的无代码解决方案，该解决方案仍然与最先进的技术具有竞争力，并且最近已在工业环境中采用。评估将基于几个常用的测试场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需专家知识的重复检测服务，旨在提升知识图谱的完整性。
AI.motivation: 现有重复检测方法依赖专家知识，用户难以使用，需提供更简便的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于服务的无代码方法，简化操作流程并保持与先进方法的竞争性。
AI.result: 该服务已被工业界采用，并在多个测试场景中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了用户使用门槛问题，为知识图谱完整性提升提供了实用工具。

authors_text: Larry González,Alex Ivliev,Markus Krötzsch,Stephan Mennicke
title: Efficient Dependency Analysis for Rule-Based Ontologies
title_zh: 基于规则的本体的高效依赖性分析
comment: Extended report of our ISWC 2022 paper
comments: Extended report of our ISWC 2022 paper
abstract: Several types of dependencies have been proposed for the static analysis of existential rule ontologies, promising insights about computational properties and possible practical uses of a given set of rules, e.g., in ontology-based query answering. Unfortunately, these dependencies are rarely implemented, so their potential is hardly realised in practice. We focus on two kinds of rule dependencies -- positive reliances and restraints -- and design and implement optimised algorithms for their efficient computation. Experiments on real-world ontologies of up to more than 100,000 rules show the scalability of our approach, which lets us realise several previously proposed applications as practical case studies. In particular, we can analyse to what extent rule-based bottom-up approaches of reasoning can be guaranteed to yield redundancy-free "lean" knowledge graphs (so-called cores) on practical ontologies.
summary: Several types of dependencies have been proposed for the static analysis of existential rule ontologies, promising insights about computational properties and possible practical uses of a given set of rules, e.g., in ontology-based query answering. Unfortunately, these dependencies are rarely implemented, so their potential is hardly realised in practice. We focus on two kinds of rule dependencies -- positive reliances and restraints -- and design and implement optimised algorithms for their efficient computation. Experiments on real-world ontologies of up to more than 100,000 rules show the scalability of our approach, which lets us realise several previously proposed applications as practical case studies. In particular, we can analyse to what extent rule-based bottom-up approaches of reasoning can be guaranteed to yield redundancy-free "lean" knowledge graphs (so-called cores) on practical ontologies.
abstract_zh: 已经提出了几种类型的依赖关系用于存在规则本体的静态分析，有希望了解给定规则集的计算属性和可能的​​实际用途，例如在基于本体的查询应答中。不幸的是，这些依赖项很少被实现，因此它们的潜力在实践中很难发挥出来。我们专注于两种规则依赖关系——正依赖和约束——并设计和实现优化算法以实现高效计算。对多达 100,000 多个规则的现实世界本体进行的实验显示了我们方法的可扩展性，这使我们能够将之前提出的几个应用程序实现为实际案例研究。特别是，我们可以分析基于规则的自下而上的推理方法在多大程度上可以保证在实际本体上产生无冗余的“精益”知识图（所谓的核心）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对基于规则的本体进行高效依赖性分析的方法，重点优化正依赖和约束的计算算法。
AI.motivation: 现有依赖性分析方法因实现困难而难以实际应用，限制了其在本体查询优化等场景中的价值。
AI.method: 设计并实现针对正依赖和约束的优化算法，通过大规模真实本体实验验证方法可扩展性。
AI.result: 算法可处理超10万条规则的本体，成功实现知识图谱冗余消除等实际应用案例。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了依赖性分析的实用性，为基于规则的本体推理提供了可落地的优化方案。

authors_text: Shany Biton,Mohsin Aldhafeeri,Erez Marcusohn,Kenta Tsutsui,Tom Szwagier,Adi Elias,Julien Oster,Jean Marc Sellal,Mahmoud Suleiman,Joachim A. Behar
title: Generalizable and Robust Deep Learning Algorithm for Atrial Fibrillation Diagnosis Across Ethnicities, Ages and Sexes
title_zh: 用于跨种族、年龄和性别的房颤诊断的通用且稳健的深度学习算法
abstract: To drive health innovation that meets the needs of all and democratize healthcare, there is a need to assess the generalization performance of deep learning (DL) algorithms across various distribution shifts to ensure that these algorithms are robust. This retrospective study is, to the best of our knowledge, the first to develop and assess the generalization performance of a deep learning (DL) model for AF events detection from long term beat-to-beat intervals across ethnicities, ages and sexes. The new recurrent DL model, denoted ArNet2, was developed on a large retrospective dataset of 2,147 patients totaling 51,386 hours of continuous electrocardiogram (ECG). The models generalization was evaluated on manually annotated test sets from four centers (USA, Israel, Japan and China) totaling 402 patients. The model was further validated on a retrospective dataset of 1,730 consecutives Holter recordings from the Rambam Hospital Holter clinic, Haifa, Israel. The model outperformed benchmark state-of-the-art models and generalized well across ethnicities, ages and sexes. Performance was higher for female than male and young adults (less than 60 years old) and showed some differences across ethnicities. The main finding explaining these variations was an impairment in performance in groups with a higher prevalence of atrial flutter (AFL). Our findings on the relative performance of ArNet2 across groups may have clinical implications on the choice of the preferred AF examination method to use relative to the group of interest.

The main finding explaining these variations was an impairment in performance in groups with a higher prevalence of atrial flutter (AFL). Our findings on the relative performance of ArNet2 across groups may have clinical implications on the choice of the preferred AF examination method to use relative to the group of interest.
abstract_zh: 为了推动满足所有人需求的健康创新并使医疗保健民主化，需要评估深度学习 (DL) 算法在各种分布变化中的泛化性能，以确保这些算法的稳健性。据我们所知，这项回顾性研究首次开发并评估了深度学习 (DL) 模型的泛化性能，该模型用于从跨种族、年龄和性别的长期心跳间隔检测 AF 事件。新的循环 DL 模型（表示为 ArNet2）是在包含 2,147 名患者、总计 51,386 小时的连续心电图 (ECG) 的大型回顾性数据集上开发的。在来自四个中心（美国、以色列、日本和中国）总计 402 名患者的手动注释测试集上评估了模型的泛化能力。该模型在以色列海法 Rambam 医院 Holter 诊所的 1,730 个连续 Holter 记录的回顾性数据集上得到了进一步验证。该模型的表现优于最先进的基准模型，并且在种族、年龄和性别之间具有良好的普适性。女性的表现高于男性和年轻人（60 岁以下），并且在不同种族之间表现出一些差异。解释这些差异的主要发现是心房扑动（AFL）患病率较高的群体的表现受到损害。我们对 ArNet2 跨组相对性能的研究结果可能对选择相对于感兴趣组使用的首选 AF 检查方法具有临床意义。

AI.tldr: 开发一种跨种族、年龄和性别的深度学习算法ArNet2，用于心房颤动（AF）的检测，并验证其泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 确保深度学习算法在不同人群中的鲁棒性，推动医疗公平性，满足多样化人群的健康需求。
AI.method: 基于2,147名患者51,386小时ECG数据训练递归神经网络ArNet2，并在四个国家的402名患者测试集及1,730份Holter记录上验证泛化性能。
AI.result: ArNet2优于现有模型，在女性、年轻群体表现更优，但存在种族差异；高心房扑动（AFL）患病组性能下降。
AI.conclusion: ArNet2具有跨人群诊断潜力，但需注意AFL对性能的影响，临床选择AF检测方法时需考虑人群特征。

search_text: Generalizable and Robust Deep Learning Algorithm for Atrial Fibrillation Diagnosis Across Ethnicities, Ages and Sexes 用于跨种族、年龄和性别的房颤诊断的通用且稳健的深度学习算法 To drive health innovation that meets the needs of all and democratize healthcare, there is a need to assess the generalization performance of deep learning (DL) algorithms across various distribution shifts to ensure that these algorithms are robust. This retrospective study is, to the best of our knowledge, the first to develop and assess the generalization performance of a deep learning (DL) model for AF events detection from long term beat-to-beat intervals across ethnicities, ages and sexes. The new recurrent DL model, denoted ArNet2, was developed on a large retrospective dataset of 2,147 patients totaling 51,386 hours of continuous electrocardiogram (ECG). The models generalization was evaluated on manually annotated test sets from four centers (USA, Israel, Japan and China) totaling 402 patients. The model was further validated on a retrospective dataset of 1,730 consecutives Holter recordings from the Rambam Hospital Holter clinic, Haifa, Israel. The model outperformed benchmark state-of-the-art models and generalized well across ethnicities, ages and sexes. Performance was higher for female than male and young adults (less than 60 years old) and showed some differences across ethnicities. The main finding explaining these variations was an impairment in performance in groups with a higher prevalence of atrial flutter (AFL). Our findings on the relative performance of ArNet2 across groups may have clinical implications on the choice of the preferred AF examination method to use relative to the group of interest. 为了推动满足所有人需求的健康创新并使医疗保健民主化，需要评估深度学习 (DL) 算法在各种分布变化中的泛化性能，以确保这些算法的稳健性。据我们所知，这项回顾性研究首次开发并评估了深度学习 (DL) 模型的泛化性能，该模型用于从跨种族、年龄和性别的长期心跳间隔检测 AF 事件。新的循环 DL 模型（表示为 ArNet2）是在包含 2,147 名患者、总计 51,386 小时的连续心电图 (ECG) 的大型回顾性数据集上开发的。在来自四个中心（美国、以色列、日本和中国）总计 402 名患者的手动注释测试集上评估了模型的泛化能力。该模型在以色列海法 Rambam 医院 Holter 诊所的 1,730 个连续 Holter 记录的回顾性数据集上得到了进一步验证。该模型的表现优于最先进的基准模型，并且在种族、年龄和性别之间具有良好的普适性。女性的表现高于男性和年轻人（60 岁以下），并且在不同种族之间表现出一些差异。解释这些差异的主要发现是心房扑动（AFL）患病率较高的群体的表现受到损害。我们对 ArNet2 跨组相对性能的研究结果可能对选择相对于感兴趣组使用的首选 AF 检查方法具有临床意义。 开发一种跨种族、年龄和性别的深度学习算法ArNet2，用于心房颤动（AF）的检测，并验证其泛化能力。 Shany Biton,Mohsin Aldhafeeri,Erez Marcusohn,Kenta Tsutsui,Tom Szwagier,Adi Elias,Julien Oster,Jean Marc Sellal,Mahmoud Suleiman,Joachim A. authors_text: Van-Quang Nguyen,Masanori Suganuma,Takayuki Okatani
title: GRIT: Faster and Better Image captioning Transformer Using Dual Visual Features
title_zh: GRIT：使用双视觉功能更快更好的图像字幕转换器
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022; 14 pages with appendix; Code: https://github.com/davidnvq/grit
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022; 14 pages with appendix; Code: https://github.com/davidnvq/grit
abstract: Current state-of-the-art methods for image captioning employ region-based features, as they provide object-level information that is essential to describe the content of images; they are usually extracted by an object detector such as Faster R-CNN. However, they have several issues, such as lack of contextual information, the risk of inaccurate detection, and the high computational cost. The first two could be resolved by additionally using grid-based features. However, how to extract and fuse these two types of features is uncharted. This paper proposes a Transformer-only neural architecture, dubbed GRIT (Grid- and Region-based Image captioning Transformer), that effectively utilizes the two visual features to generate better captions. GRIT replaces the CNN-based detector employed in previous methods with a DETR-based one, making it computationally faster. Moreover, its monolithic design consisting only of Transformers enables end-to-end training of the model. This innovative design and the integration of the dual visual features bring about significant performance improvement. The experimental results on several image captioning benchmarks show that GRIT outperforms previous methods in inference accuracy and speed.
summary: Current state-of-the-art methods for image captioning employ region-based features, as they provide object-level information that is essential to describe the content of images; they are usually extracted by an object detector such as Faster R-CNN. However, they have several issues, such as lack of contextual information, the risk of inaccurate detection, and the high computational cost. The first two could be resolved by additionally using grid-based features. However, how to extract and fuse these two types of features is uncharted. This paper proposes a Transformer-only neural architecture, dubbed GRIT (Grid- and Region-based Image captioning Transformer), that effectively utilizes the two visual features to generate better captions. GRIT replaces the CNN-based detector employed in previous methods with a DETR-based one, making it computationally faster. Moreover, its monolithic design consisting only of Transformers enables end-to-end training of the model. This innovative design and the integration of the dual visual features bring about significant performance improvement. The experimental results on several image captioning benchmarks show that GRIT outperforms previous methods in inference accuracy and speed.
abstract_zh: 当前最先进的图像字幕方法采用基于区域的特征，因为它们提供了描述图像内容所必需的对象级信息；它们通常由 Faster R-CNN 等目标检测器提取。然而，它们存在一些问题，例如缺乏上下文信息、检测不准确的风险以及计算成本较高。前两个问题可以通过额外使用基于网格的功能来解决。然而，如何提取和融合这两类特征尚不清楚。本文提出了一种仅包含 Transformer 的神经架构，称为 GRIT（基于网格和区域的图像字幕转换器），它有效地利用这两种视觉特征来生成更好的字幕。 GRIT 将之前方法中使用的基于 CNN 的检测器替换为基于 DETR 的检测器，从而使其计算速度更快。此外，其仅由 Transformer 组成的整体设计可以实现模型的端到端训练。这种创新设计和双视觉功能的集成带来了显着的性能提升。多个图像字幕基准测试的实验结果表明，GRIT 在推理精度和速度方面优于之前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRIT模型，通过结合网格和区域两种视觉特征，利用Transformer架构提升图像字幕生成的效率和效果。
AI.motivation: 现有图像字幕方法依赖区域特征存在上下文信息不足、检测误差和计算成本高的问题，需探索更优的特征融合方案。
AI.method: 设计仅由Transformer组成的GRIT架构，采用DETR替换传统CNN检测器，融合网格与区域双视觉特征实现端到端训练。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，GRIT在推理准确率和速度上均优于现有方法，验证了双特征融合与架构创新的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GRIT通过创新性整合双视觉特征与Transformer架构，有效解决了图像字幕生成中的关键问题，提升了整体性能。

authors_text: Cicy K Agnes,Akthar Naveed V,Anitha Mary M O Chacko
title: ExoSGAN and ExoACGAN: Exoplanet Detection using Adversarial Training Algorithms
title_zh: ExoSGAN 和 ExoACGAN：使用对抗训练算法进行系外行星检测
abstract: Exoplanet detection opens the door to the discovery of new habitable worlds and helps us understand how planets were formed. With the objective of finding earth-like habitable planets, NASA launched Kepler space telescope and its follow up mission K2. The advancement of observation capabilities has increased the range of fresh data available for research, and manually handling them is both time-consuming and difficult. Machine learning and deep learning techniques can greatly assist in lowering human efforts to process the vast array of data produced by the modern instruments of these exoplanet programs in an economical and unbiased manner. However, care should be taken to detect all the exoplanets precisely while simultaneously minimizing the misclassification of non-exoplanet stars. In this paper, we utilize two variations of generative adversarial networks, namely semi-supervised generative adversarial networks and auxiliary classifier generative adversarial networks, to detect transiting exoplanets in K2 data. We find that the usage of these models can be helpful for the classification of stars with exoplanets. Both of our techniques are able to categorize the light curves with a recall and precision of 1.00 on the test data. Our semi-supervised technique is beneficial to solve the cumbersome task of creating a labeled dataset.
summary: Exoplanet detection opens the door to the discovery of new habitable worlds and helps us understand how planets were formed. With the objective of finding earth-like habitable planets, NASA launched Kepler space telescope and its follow up mission K2. The advancement of observation capabilities has increased the range of fresh data available for research, and manually handling them is both time-consuming and difficult. Machine learning and deep learning techniques can greatly assist in lowering human efforts to process the vast array of data produced by the modern instruments of these exoplanet programs in an economical and unbiased manner. However, care should be taken to detect all the exoplanets precisely while simultaneously minimizing the misclassification of non-exoplanet stars. In this paper, we utilize two variations of generative adversarial networks, namely semi-supervised generative adversarial networks and auxiliary classifier generative adversarial networks, to detect transiting exoplanets in K2 data. We find that the usage of these models can be helpful for the classification of stars with exoplanets. Both of our techniques are able to categorize the light curves with a recall and precision of 1.00 on the test data. Our semi-supervised technique is beneficial to solve the cumbersome task of creating a labeled dataset.
abstract_zh: 系外行星探测为发现新的宜居世界打开了大门，并帮助我们了解行星是如何形成的。为了寻找类地宜居行星，美国宇航局发射了开普勒太空望远镜及其后续任务K2。观测能力的进步增加了可用于研究的新数据的范围，而手动处理它们既耗时又困难。机器学习和深度学习技术可以极大地帮助降低人类以经济且公正的方式处理这些系外行星项目的现代仪器产生的大量数据的努力。然而，应注意精确探测所有系外行星，同时尽量减少对非系外行星恒星的错误分类。在本文中，我们利用生成对抗网络的两种变体，即半监督生成对抗网络和辅助分类器生成对抗网络，来检测 K2 数据中的凌日系外行星。我们发现这些模型的使用有助于对系外行星恒星进行分类。我们的两种技术都能够对光变曲线进行分类，测试数据的召回率和精度均为 1.00。我们的半监督技术有利于解决创建标记数据集的繁琐任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ExoSGAN和ExoACGAN两种对抗生成网络模型，用于在K2任务数据中检测系外行星。
AI.motivation: 传统人工处理系外行星观测数据效率低且易出错，需借助机器学习方法提高检测精度与效率，同时减少误分类和人工标注成本。
AI.method: 采用半监督生成对抗网络（ExoSGAN）和辅助分类器生成对抗网络（ExoACGAN）两种模型，对K2任务的光变曲线数据进行分类。
AI.result: 两种模型在测试数据上均达到1.00的召回率和精确率，半监督方法显著降低了标注数据集的工作量。
AI.conclusion: ExoSGAN和ExoACGAN在系外行星检测中表现出优异性能，尤其半监督方法有效解决了数据标注难题。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出ExoSGAN和ExoACGAN两种对抗生成网络模型，用于在K2任务数据中检测系外行星。
ai_content.motivation: 传统人工处理系外行星观测数据效率低且易出错，需借助机器学习方法提高检测精度与效率，同时减少误分类和人工标注成本。
ai_content.method: 采用半监督生成对抗网络（ExoSGAN）和辅助分类器生成对抗网络（ExoACGAN）两种模型，对K2任务的光变曲线数据进行分类。
ai_content.result: 两种模型在测试数据上均达到1.00的召回率和精确率，半监督方法显著降低了标注数据集的工作量。
ai_content.conclusion: ExoSGAN和ExoACGAN在系外行星检测中表现出优异性能，尤其半监督方法有效解决了数据标注难题。

search_text: ExoSGAN and ExoACGAN: Exoplanet Detection using Adversarial Training Algorithms ExoSGAN 和 ExoACGAN：使用对抗训练算法进行系外行星检测 Exoplanet detection opens the door to the discovery of new habitable worlds and helps us understand how planets were formed. With the objective of finding earth-like habitable planets, NASA launched Kepler space telescope and its follow up mission K2. The advancement of observation capabilities has increased the range of fresh data available for research, and manually handling them is both time-consuming and difficult. Machine learning and deep learning techniques can greatly assist in lowering human efforts to process the vast array of data produced by the modern instruments of these exoplanet programs in an economical and unbiased manner. However, care should be taken to detect all the exoplanets precisely while simultaneously minimizing the misclassification of non-exoplanet stars. In this paper, we utilize two variations of generative adversarial networks, namely semi-supervised generative adversarial networks and auxiliary classifier generative adversarial networks, to detect transiting exoplanets in K2 data. We find that the usage of these models can be helpful for the classification of stars with exoplanets. Both of our techniques are able to categorize the light curves with a recall and precision of 1.00 on the test data. Our semi-supervised technique is beneficial to solve the cumbersome task of creating a labeled dataset. 系外行星探测为发现新的宜居世界打开了大门，并帮助我们了解行星是如何形成的。为了寻找类地宜居行星，美国宇航局发射了开普勒太空望远镜及其后续任务K2。观测能力的进步增加了可用于研究的新数据的范围，而手动处理它们既耗时又困难。机器学习和深度学习技术可以极大地帮助降低人类以经济且公正的方式处理这些系外行星项目的现代仪器产生的大量数据的努力。然而，应注意精确探测所有系外行星，同时尽量减少对非系外行星恒星的错误分类。在本文中，我们利用生成对抗网络的两种变体，即半监督生成对抗网络和辅助分类器生成对抗网络，来检测 K2 数据中的凌日系外行星。我们发现这些模型的使用有助于对系外行星恒星进行分类。我们的两种技术都能够对光变曲线进行分类，测试数据的召回率和精度均为 1.00。我们的半监督技术有利于解决创建标记数据集的繁琐任务。 本文提出ExoSGAN和ExoACGAN两种对抗生成网络模型，用于在K2任务数据中检测系外行星。 Cicy K Agnes,Akthar Naveed V,Anitha Mary M O Chacko astro-ph.EP,astro-ph.IM,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yang Yu,Zixu Zhao,Yueming Jin,Guangyong Chen,Qi Dou,Pheng-Ann Heng
title: Pseudo-label Guided Cross-video Pixel Contrast for Robotic Surgical Scene Segmentation with Limited Annotations
title_zh: 用于具有有限注释的机器人手术场景分割的伪标签引导跨视频像素对比度
abstract: Surgical scene segmentation is fundamentally crucial for prompting cognitive assistance in robotic surgery. However, pixel-wise annotating surgical video in a frame-by-frame manner is expensive and time consuming. To greatly reduce the labeling burden, in this work, we study semi-supervised scene segmentation from robotic surgical video, which is practically essential yet rarely explored before. We consider a clinically suitable annotation situation under the equidistant sampling. We then propose PGV-CL, a novel pseudo-label guided cross-video contrast learning method to boost scene segmentation. It effectively leverages unlabeled data for a trusty and global model regularization that produces more discriminative feature representation. Concretely, for trusty representation learning, we propose to incorporate pseudo labels to instruct the pair selection, obtaining more reliable representation pairs for pixel contrast. Moreover, we expand the representation learning space from previous image-level to cross-video, which can capture the global semantics to benefit the learning process. We extensively evaluate our method on a public robotic surgery dataset EndoVis18 and a public cataract dataset CaDIS. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, consistently outperforming the state-of-the-art semi-supervised methods under different labeling ratios, and even surpassing fully supervised training on EndoVis18 with 10.1% labeling.
summary: Surgical scene segmentation is fundamentally crucial for prompting cognitive assistance in robotic surgery. However, pixel-wise annotating surgical video in a frame-by-frame manner is expensive and time consuming. To greatly reduce the labeling burden, in this work, we study semi-supervised scene segmentation from robotic surgical video, which is practically essential yet rarely explored before. We consider a clinically suitable annotation situation under the equidistant sampling. We then propose PGV-CL, a novel pseudo-label guided cross-video contrast learning method to boost scene segmentation. It effectively leverages unlabeled data for a trusty and global model regularization that produces more discriminative feature representation. Concretely, for trusty representation learning, we propose to incorporate pseudo labels to instruct the pair selection, obtaining more reliable representation pairs for pixel contrast. Moreover, we expand the representation learning space from previous image-level to cross-video, which can capture the global semantics to benefit the learning process. We extensively evaluate our method on a public robotic surgery dataset EndoVis18 and a public cataract dataset CaDIS. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, consistently outperforming the state-of-the-art semi-supervised methods under different labeling ratios, and even surpassing fully supervised training on EndoVis18 with 10.1% labeling.
abstract_zh: 手术场景分割对于促进机器人手术中的认知辅助至关重要。然而，以逐帧方式对手术视频进行像素注释既昂贵又耗时。为了大大减轻标记负担，在这项工作中，我们研究了机器人手术视频中的半监督场景分割，这实际上是必要的，但以前很少探索。我们考虑等距采样下临床上合适的注释情况。然后，我们提出了 PGV-CL，一种新颖的伪标签引导的跨视频对比学习方法，以促进场景分割。它有效地利用未标记的数据进行可信的全局模型正则化，从而产生更具辨别力的特征表示。具体来说，对于可信表示学习，我们建议结合伪标签来指导对选择，获得更可靠的像素对比度表示对。此外，我们将表示学习空间从以前的图像级扩展到跨视频，这可以捕获全局语义以有利于学习过程。我们在公共机器人手术数据集 EndoVis18 和公共白内障数据集 CaDIS 上广泛评估了我们的方法。实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性，在不同标记率下始终优于最先进的半监督方法，甚至超过了 EndoVis18 上 10.1% 标记率的完全监督训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于伪标签引导的跨视频像素对比方法（PGV-CL），用于在有限标注条件下提升机器人手术场景分割性能。
AI.motivation: 手术场景像素级标注成本高昂且耗时，现有研究缺乏针对手术视频的半监督分割方法，需开发有效利用未标注数据的模型。
AI.method: 设计PGV-CL框架，通过伪标签筛选可靠像素对进行对比学习，并扩展跨视频表征空间以捕捉全局语义特征。
AI.result: 在EndoVis18和CaDIS数据集上，该方法在不同标注比例下均优于最先进半监督方法，且在EndoVis18上10.1%标注量时超越全监督模型。
AI.conclusion: 伪标签引导的跨视频对比学习能有效提升有限标注下手术场景分割性能，为医疗影像分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Junwoo Cho,Seungtae Nam,Daniel Rho,Jong Hwan Ko,Eunbyung Park
title: Streamable Neural Fields
title_zh: 可流式神经场
abstract: Neural fields have emerged as a new data representation paradigm and have shown remarkable success in various signal representations. Since they preserve signals in their network parameters, the data transfer by sending and receiving the entire model parameters prevents this emerging technology from being used in many practical scenarios. We propose streamable neural fields, a single model that consists of executable sub-networks of various widths. The proposed architectural and training techniques enable a single network to be streamable over time and reconstruct different qualities and parts of signals. For example, a smaller sub-network produces smooth and low-frequency signals, while a larger sub-network can represent fine details. Experimental results have shown the effectiveness of our method in various domains, such as 2D images, videos, and 3D signed distance functions. Finally, we demonstrate that our proposed method improves training stability, by exploiting parameter sharing.
summary: Neural fields have emerged as a new data representation paradigm and have shown remarkable success in various signal representations. Since they preserve signals in their network parameters, the data transfer by sending and receiving the entire model parameters prevents this emerging technology from being used in many practical scenarios. We propose streamable neural fields, a single model that consists of executable sub-networks of various widths. The proposed architectural and training techniques enable a single network to be streamable over time and reconstruct different qualities and parts of signals. For example, a smaller sub-network produces smooth and low-frequency signals, while a larger sub-network can represent fine details. Experimental results have shown the effectiveness of our method in various domains, such as 2D images, videos, and 3D signed distance functions. Finally, we demonstrate that our proposed method improves training stability, by exploiting parameter sharing.
abstract_zh: 神经场已经作为一种新的数据表示范式出现，并在各种信号表示方面取得了显着的成功。由于它们在网络参数中保留信号，因此通过发送和接收整个模型参数进行的数据传输阻止了这种新兴技术在许多实际场景中的使用。我们提出了可流式神经场，这是一种由各种宽度的可执行子网络组成的单一模型。所提出的架构和训练技术使单个网络能够随着时间的推移进行流传输并重建不同质量和部分的信号。例如，较小的子网络产生平滑的低频信号，而较大的子网络可以表示精细的细节。实验结果表明了我们的方法在各个领域的有效性，例如 2D 图像、视频和 3D 有符号距离函数。最后，我们证明我们提出的方法通过利用参数共享来提高训练稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可流式传输的神经场模型，通过可执行的子网络实现信号的分阶段重建。
AI.motivation: 传统神经场需传输完整模型参数，导致实际应用受限，亟需支持流式传输的高效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含多宽度子网络的单一模型架构，结合参数共享与动态训练技术，实现信号分阶段重建与质量控制。
AI.result: 在2D图像、视频及3D符号距离函数等任务中验证了方法有效性，并提升了训练稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 流式神经场通过参数共享机制解决了传统方法的传输瓶颈，为实时应用提供了新范式。

For example, a smaller sub-network produces smooth and low-frequency signals, while a larger sub-network can represent fine details. Experimental results have shown the effectiveness of our method in various domains, such as 2D images, videos, and 3D signed distance functions. Finally, we demonstrate that our proposed method improves training stability, by exploiting parameter sharing. 神经场已经作为一种新的数据表示范式出现，并在各种信号表示方面取得了显着的成功。由于它们在网络参数中保留信号，因此通过发送和接收整个模型参数进行的数据传输阻止了这种新兴技术在许多实际场景中的使用。我们提出了可流式神经场，这是一种由各种宽度的可执行子网络组成的单一模型。所提出的架构和训练技术使单个网络能够随着时间的推移进行流传输并重建不同质量和部分的信号。例如，较小的子网络产生平滑的低频信号，而较大的子网络可以表示精细的细节。实验结果表明了我们的方法在各个领域的有效性，例如 2D 图像、视频和 3D 有符号距离函数。最后，我们证明我们提出的方法通过利用参数共享来提高训练稳定性。 本文提出了一种可流式传输的神经场模型，通过可执行的子网络实现信号的分阶段重建。 Junwoo Cho,Seungtae Nam,Daniel Rho,Jong Hwan Ko,Eunbyung Park cs.CV

authors_text: Tae-Kyung Kang,Gun-Hee Lee,Seong-Whan Lee
title: HTNet: Anchor-free Temporal Action Localization with Hierarchical Transformers
title_zh: HTNet：使用分层变压器进行无锚时间动作定位
abstract: Temporal action localization (TAL) is a task of identifying a set of actions in a video, which involves localizing the start and end frames and classifying each action instance. Existing methods have addressed this task by using predefined anchor windows or heuristic bottom-up boundary-matching strategies, which are major bottlenecks in inference time. Additionally, the main challenge is the inability to capture long-range actions due to a lack of global contextual information. In this paper, we present a novel anchor-free framework, referred to as HTNet, which predicts a set of <start time, end time, class> triplets from a video based on a Transformer architecture. After the prediction of coarse boundaries, we refine it through a background feature sampling (BFS) module and hierarchical Transformers, which enables our model to aggregate global contextual information and effectively exploit the inherent semantic relationships in a video. We demonstrate how our method localizes accurate action instances and achieves state-of-the-art performance on two TAL benchmark datasets: THUMOS14 and ActivityNet 1.3.
summary: Temporal action localization (TAL) is a task of identifying a set of actions in a video, which involves localizing the start and end frames and classifying each action instance. Existing methods have addressed this task by using predefined anchor windows or heuristic bottom-up boundary-matching strategies, which are major bottlenecks in inference time. Additionally, the main challenge is the inability to capture long-range actions due to a lack of global contextual information. In this paper, we present a novel anchor-free framework, referred to as HTNet, which predicts a set of <start time, end time, class> triplets from a video based on a Transformer architecture. After the prediction of coarse boundaries, we refine it through a background feature sampling (BFS) module and hierarchical Transformers, which enables our model to aggregate global contextual information and effectively exploit the inherent semantic relationships in a video. We demonstrate how our method localizes accurate action instances and achieves state-of-the-art performance on two TAL benchmark datasets: THUMOS14 and ActivityNet 1.3.
abstract_zh: 时间动作定位（TAL）是识别视频中一组动作的任务，其中涉及定位开始帧和结束帧并对每个动作实例进行分类。现有方法通过使用预定义的锚窗口或启发式自下而上边界匹配策略来解决此任务，这是推理时间的主要瓶颈。此外，主要挑战是由于缺乏全局上下文信息而无法捕获远程操作。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的无锚框架，称为 HTNet，它基于 Transformer 架构从视频中预测一组<开始时间，结束时间，类别>三元组。在预测粗略边界后，我们通过背景特征采样（BFS）模块和分层 Transformer 对其进行细化，这使我们的模型能够聚合全局上下文信息并有效地利用视频中固有的语义关系。我们演示了我们的方法如何定位准确的动作实例并在两个 TAL 基准数据集：THUMOS14 和 ActivityNet 1.3 上实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HTNet，一种基于分层Transformer的无锚时序动作定位框架，通过预测动作的起始时间、结束时间和类别，解决现有方法在推理时间和长时动作捕捉上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有时序动作定位方法依赖预定义锚窗口或启发式边界匹配策略，导致推理效率低且难以捕捉长时动作的全局上下文信息。
AI.method: HTNet采用Transformer架构直接预测动作三元组，结合背景特征采样模块与分层Transformer结构，通过多级特征聚合增强全局语义关联并优化边界定位。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14和ActivityNet 1.3两个基准数据集上，HTNet达到当时最先进的时序动作定位性能。
AI.conclusion: 无锚设计与分层Transformer有效解决了传统方法的局限性，为时序动作定位提供了更高效且精准的解决方案。

authors_text: Xiangyu Miao,Jiahe Wang,Yanan Chang,Yi Wu,Shangfei Wang
title: Hand-Assisted Expression Recognition Method from Synthetic Images at the Fourth ABAW Challenge
title_zh: 第四届 ABAW 挑战赛中的人工辅助合成图像表情识别方法
abstract: Learning from synthetic images plays an important role in facial expression recognition task due to the difficulties of labeling the real images, and it is challenging because of the gap between the synthetic images and real images. The fourth Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild Competition raises the challenge and provides the synthetic images generated from Aff-Wild2 dataset. In this paper, we propose a hand-assisted expression recognition method to reduce the gap between the synthetic data and real data. Our method consists of two parts: expression recognition module and hand prediction module. Expression recognition module extracts expression information and hand prediction module predicts whether the image contains hands. Decision mode is used to combine the results of two modules, and post-pruning is used to improve the result. F1 score is used to verify the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Learning from synthetic images plays an important role in facial expression recognition task due to the difficulties of labeling the real images, and it is challenging because of the gap between the synthetic images and real images. The fourth Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild Competition raises the challenge and provides the synthetic images generated from Aff-Wild2 dataset. In this paper, we propose a hand-assisted expression recognition method to reduce the gap between the synthetic data and real data. Our method consists of two parts: expression recognition module and hand prediction module. Expression recognition module extracts expression information and hand prediction module predicts whether the image contains hands. Decision mode is used to combine the results of two modules, and post-pruning is used to improve the result. F1 score is used to verify the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 由于标记真实图像的困难，从合成图像中学习在面部表情识别任务中发挥着重要作用，并且由于合成图像与真实图像之间的差距而具有挑战性。第四届情感行为分析野外竞赛提出了挑战，并提供了从 Aff-Wild2 数据集生成的合成图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种手动辅助表情识别方法，以减少合成数据与真实数据之间的差距。我们的方法由两部分组成：表情识别模块和手部预测模块。表情识别模块提取表情信息，手部预测模块预测图像是否包含手部。决策模式用于组合两个模块的结果，并使用后剪枝来改进结果。 F1分数用于验证我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种手辅助的表情识别方法，旨在缩小合成图像与真实图像之间的差距，以提升面部表情识别效果。
AI.motivation: 真实图像标注困难且成本高，合成图像虽可辅助训练但存在与真实图像分布差异的问题，需通过有效方法缩小这一差距。
AI.method: 方法包含表情识别模块（提取表情信息）和手预测模块（判断图像是否含手），通过决策模式融合两模块结果，并采用后剪枝优化性能。
AI.result: 通过F1分数验证了该方法在第四届ABAW竞赛中的有效性，成功缩小了合成数据与真实数据间的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 手辅助方法能有效提升合成图像驱动的表情识别模型在真实场景中的表现，为跨域表情识别提供新思路。

authors_text: Changyeon Won,Hae-Gon Jeon
title: Learning Depth from Focus in the Wild
title_zh: 从野外聚焦中学习深度
abstract: For better photography, most recent commercial cameras including smartphones have either adopted large-aperture lens to collect more light or used a burst mode to take multiple images within short times. These interesting features lead us to examine depth from focus/defocus. In this work, we present a convolutional neural network-based depth estimation from single focal stacks. Our method differs from relevant state-of-the-art works with three unique features. First, our method allows depth maps to be inferred in an end-to-end manner even with image alignment. Second, we propose a sharp region detection module to reduce blur ambiguities in subtle focus changes and weakly texture-less regions. Third, we design an effective downsampling module to ease flows of focal information in feature extractions. In addition, for the generalization of the proposed network, we develop a simulator to realistically reproduce the features of commercial cameras, such as changes in field of view, focal length and principal points. By effectively incorporating these three unique features, our network achieves the top rank in the DDFF 12-Scene benchmark on most metrics. We also demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on various quantitative evaluations and real-world images taken from various off-the-shelf cameras compared with state-of-the-art methods. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/wcy199705/DfFintheWild.
summary: For better photography, most recent commercial cameras including smartphones have either adopted large-aperture lens to collect more light or used a burst mode to take multiple images within short times. These interesting features lead us to examine depth from focus/defocus. In this work, we present a convolutional neural network-based depth estimation from single focal stacks. Our method differs from relevant state-of-the-art works with three unique features. First, our method allows depth maps to be inferred in an end-to-end manner even with image alignment. Second, we propose a sharp region detection module to reduce blur ambiguities in subtle focus changes and weakly texture-less regions. Third, we design an effective downsampling module to ease flows of focal information in feature extractions. In addition, for the generalization of the proposed network, we develop a simulator to realistically reproduce the features of commercial cameras, such as changes in field of view, focal length and principal points. By effectively incorporating these three unique features, our network achieves the top rank in the DDFF 12-Scene benchmark on most metrics. We also demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on various quantitative evaluations and real-world images taken from various off-the-shelf cameras compared with state-of-the-art methods. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/wcy199705/DfFintheWild.
abstract_zh: 为了获得更好的摄影效果，包括智能手机在内的大多数商用相机要么采用大光圈镜头来收集更多光线，要么使用连拍模式在短时间内拍摄多张图像。这些有趣的特征引导我们检查聚焦/散焦的深度。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于卷积神经网络的单焦点堆栈深度估计。我们的方法与相关最先进的作品不同，具有三个独特的特点。首先，我们的方法允许以端到端的方式推断深度图，即使在图像对齐的情况下也是如此。其次，我们提出了一个锐利区域检测模块，以减少微妙的焦点变化和弱纹理区域中的模糊模糊性。第三，我们设计了一个有效的下采样模块，以简化特征提取中焦点信息的流动。此外，为了推广所提出的网络，我们开发了一个模拟器来真实地再现商用相机的特征，例如视场、焦距和主点的变化。通过有效地结合这三个独特的功能，我们的网络在 DDFF 12-Scene 基准测试中的大多数指标上均名列前茅。与最先进的方法相比，我们还证明了所提出的方法在各种定量评估和从各种现成相机拍摄的真实世界图像上的有效性。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/wcy199705/DfFintheWild 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络的单焦堆栈深度估计方法，用于从单张图像中学习场景深度。
AI.motivation: 现代相机通过大光圈或连续拍摄模式实现景深控制，但现有方法在复杂场景下存在模糊歧义和纹理不足区域的深度估计难题。
AI.method: 设计端到端网络架构，包含锐利区域检测模块消除模糊歧义、有效下采样模块优化焦距信息流，并开发相机仿真器增强模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在DDFF 12-Scene基准测试中多数指标排名第一，且在多款商用相机拍摄的真实场景中验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的深度从焦点方法通过创新网络结构和仿真数据增强，在复杂真实场景中实现了领先的深度估计性能。

search_text: Learning Depth from Focus in the Wild 从野外聚焦中学习深度 For better photography, most recent commercial cameras including smartphones have either adopted large-aperture lens to collect more light or used a burst mode to take multiple images within short times. These interesting features lead us to examine depth from focus/defocus. In this work, we present a convolutional neural network-based depth estimation from single focal stacks. Our method differs from relevant state-of-the-art works with three unique features. First, our method allows depth maps to be inferred in an end-to-end manner even with image alignment. Second, we propose a sharp region detection module to reduce blur ambiguities in subtle focus changes and weakly texture-less regions. Third, we design an effective downsampling module to ease flows of focal information in feature extractions. In addition, for the generalization of the proposed network, we develop a simulator to realistically reproduce the features of commercial cameras, such as changes in field of view, focal length and principal points. By effectively incorporating these three unique features, our network achieves the top rank in the DDFF 12-Scene benchmark on most metrics. We also demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on various quantitative evaluations and real-world images taken from various off-the-shelf cameras compared with state-of-the-art methods. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/wcy199705/DfFintheWild. 为了获得更好的摄影效果，包括智能手机在内的大多数商用相机要么采用大光圈镜头来收集更多光线，要么使用连拍模式在短时间内拍摄多张图像。这些有趣的特征引导我们检查聚焦/散焦的深度。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于卷积神经网络的单焦点堆栈深度估计。我们的方法与相关最先进的作品不同，具有三个独特的特点。首先，我们的方法允许以端到端的方式推断深度图，即使在图像对齐的情况下也是如此。其次，我们提出了一个锐利区域检测模块，以减少微妙的焦点变化和弱纹理区域中的模糊模糊性。第三，我们设计了一个有效的下采样模块，以简化特征提取中焦点信息的流动。此外，为了推广所提出的网络，我们开发了一个模拟器来真实地再现商用相机的特征，例如视场、焦距和主点的变化。通过有效地结合这三个独特的功能，我们的网络在 DDFF 12-Scene 基准测试中的大多数指标上均名列前茅。与最先进的方法相比，我们还证明了所提出的方法在各种定量评估和从各种现成相机拍摄的真实世界图像上的有效性。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/wcy199705/DfFintheWild 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络的单焦堆栈深度估计方法，用于从单张图像中学习场景深度。 Changyeon Won,Hae-Gon Jeon cs.CV

authors_text: Jayeon Yoo,Inseop Chung,Nojun Kwak
title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for One-stage Object Detector using Offsets to Bounding Box
title_zh: 使用边界框偏移的单级目标检测器的无监督域适应
abstract: Most existing domain adaptive object detection methods exploit adversarial feature alignment to adapt the model to a new domain. Recent advances in adversarial feature alignment strives to reduce the negative effect of alignment, or negative transfer, that occurs because the distribution of features varies depending on the category of objects. However, by analyzing the features of the anchor-free one-stage detector, in this paper, we find that negative transfer may occur because the feature distribution varies depending on the regression value for the offset to the bounding box as well as the category. To obtain domain invariance by addressing this issue, we align the feature conditioned on the offset value, considering the modality of the feature distribution. With a very simple and effective conditioning method, we propose OADA (Offset-Aware Domain Adaptive object detector) that achieves state-of-the-art performances in various experimental settings. In addition, by analyzing through singular value decomposition, we find that our model enhances both discriminability and transferability.
summary: Most existing domain adaptive object detection methods exploit adversarial feature alignment to adapt the model to a new domain. Recent advances in adversarial feature alignment strives to reduce the negative effect of alignment, or negative transfer, that occurs because the distribution of features varies depending on the category of objects. However, by analyzing the features of the anchor-free one-stage detector, in this paper, we find that negative transfer may occur because the feature distribution varies depending on the regression value for the offset to the bounding box as well as the category. To obtain domain invariance by addressing this issue, we align the feature conditioned on the offset value, considering the modality of the feature distribution. With a very simple and effective conditioning method, we propose OADA (Offset-Aware Domain Adaptive object detector) that achieves state-of-the-art performances in various experimental settings. In addition, by analyzing through singular value decomposition, we find that our model enhances both discriminability and transferability.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的领域自适应对象检测方法利用对抗性特征对齐来使模型适应新领域。对抗性特征对齐的最新进展致力于减少对齐或负迁移的负面影响，这种影响是由于特征分布根据对象类别而变化而发生的。然而，通过分析anchor-free一级检测器的特征，在本文中，我们发现可能会发生负迁移，因为特征分布根据边界框偏移量以及类别的回归值而变化。为了通过解决这个问题来获得域不变性，我们考虑特征分布的模态，以偏移值为条件对齐特征。通过一种非常简单有效的调节方法，我们提出了 OADA（偏移感知域自适应目标检测器），它在各种实验设置中实现了最先进的性能。此外，通过奇异值分解分析，我们发现我们的模型增强了可区分性和可迁移性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于边界框偏移量的无监督领域自适应方法OADA，用于改进单阶段目标检测器的跨领域适应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应方法因特征分布随物体类别和边界框回归值变化导致负迁移问题，需通过条件特征对齐解决领域不变性问题。
AI.method: 提出OADA方法，通过基于偏移量的条件特征对齐，结合奇异值分解分析提升判别性和迁移性。
AI.result: 在多种实验设置中达到最先进性能，验证了模型在判别性和迁移性上的双重提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过考虑边界框偏移量的特征分布特性，OADA有效解决了单阶段检测器的领域自适应难题。

authors_text: Saumya Gupta,Xiaoling Hu,James Kaan,Michael Jin,Mutshipay Mpoy,Katherine Chung,Gagandeep Singh,Mary Saltz,Tahsin Kurc,Joel Saltz,Apostolos Tassiopoulos,Prateek Prasanna,Chao Chen
title: Learning Topological Interactions for Multi-Class Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 学习多类医学图像分割的拓扑交互
abstract: Deep learning methods have achieved impressive performance for multi-class medical image segmentation. However, they are limited in their ability to encode topological interactions among different classes (e.g., containment and exclusion). These constraints naturally arise in biomedical images and can be crucial in improving segmentation quality. In this paper, we introduce a novel topological interaction module to encode the topological interactions into a deep neural network. The implementation is completely convolution-based and thus can be very efficient. This empowers us to incorporate the constraints into end-to-end training and enrich the feature representation of neural networks. The efficacy of the proposed method is validated on different types of interactions. We also demonstrate the generalizability of the method on both proprietary and public challenge datasets, in both 2D and 3D settings, as well as across different modalities such as CT and Ultrasound. Code is available at: https://github.com/TopoXLab/TopoInteraction
summary: Deep learning methods have achieved impressive performance for multi-class medical image segmentation. However, they are limited in their ability to encode topological interactions among different classes (e.g., containment and exclusion). These constraints naturally arise in biomedical images and can be crucial in improving segmentation quality. In this paper, we introduce a novel topological interaction module to encode the topological interactions into a deep neural network. The implementation is completely convolution-based and thus can be very efficient. This empowers us to incorporate the constraints into end-to-end training and enrich the feature representation of neural networks. The efficacy of the proposed method is validated on different types of interactions. We also demonstrate the generalizability of the method on both proprietary and public challenge datasets, in both 2D and 3D settings, as well as across different modalities such as CT and Ultrasound. Code is available at: https://github.com/TopoXLab/TopoInteraction
abstract_zh: 深度学习方法在多类医学图像分割方面取得了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，它们编码不同类别之间的拓扑相互作用（例如包含和排除）的能力受到限制。这些限制自然出现在生物医学图像中，并且对于提高分割质量至关重要。在本文中，我们引入了一种新颖的拓扑交互模块，将拓扑交互编码到深度神经网络中。该实现完全基于卷积，因此非常高效。这使我们能够将约束纳入端到端训练并丰富神经网络的特征表示。该方法的有效性在不同类型的交互上得到了验证。我们还证明了该方法在专有和公共挑战数据集、2D 和 3D 设置以及不同模式（例如 CT 和超声）上的通用性。代码位于：https://github.com/TopoXLab/TopoInteraction

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于拓扑交互模块的深度学习方法，用于改进多类别医学图像分割中的拓扑关系建模。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法难以有效编码医学图像中不同类别间的拓扑约束（如包含与排斥关系），而这些约束对分割质量至关重要。
AI.method: 设计全卷积的拓扑交互模块，通过端到端训练将拓扑约束融入特征表示，支持2D/3D及CT、超声等多模态数据。
AI.result: 在多种交互类型、公开数据集及私有数据集上验证了方法有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过建模拓扑交互显著提升医学图像分割性能，具有跨模态和跨场景的泛化能力。

authors_text: Haris Aziz,Arindam Pal,Ali Pourmiri,Fahimeh Ramezani,Brendan Sims
title: Task Allocation using a Team of Robots
title_zh: 使用机器人团队进行任务分配
comment: Accepted for publication in the journal Current Robotics Reports
comments: Accepted for publication in the journal Current Robotics Reports
abstract: Task allocation using a team or coalition of robots is one of the most important problems in robotics, computer science, operational research, and artificial intelligence. In recent work, research has focused on handling complex objectives and feasibility constraints amongst other variations of the multi-robot task allocation problem. There are many examples of important research progress in these directions. We present a general formulation of the task allocation problem that generalizes several versions that are well-studied. Our formulation includes the states of robots, tasks, and the surrounding environment in which they operate. We describe how the problem can vary depending on the feasibility constraints, objective functions, and the level of dynamically changing information. In addition, we discuss existing solution approaches for the problem including optimization-based approaches, and market-based approaches.
summary: Task allocation using a team or coalition of robots is one of the most important problems in robotics, computer science, operational research, and artificial intelligence. In recent work, research has focused on handling complex objectives and feasibility constraints amongst other variations of the multi-robot task allocation problem. There are many examples of important research progress in these directions. We present a general formulation of the task allocation problem that generalizes several versions that are well-studied. Our formulation includes the states of robots, tasks, and the surrounding environment in which they operate. We describe how the problem can vary depending on the feasibility constraints, objective functions, and the level of dynamically changing information. In addition, we discuss existing solution approaches for the problem including optimization-based approaches, and market-based approaches.
abstract_zh: 使用机器人团队或联盟进行任务分配是机器人学、计算机科学、运筹学和人工智能中最重要的问题之一。在最近的工作中，研究重点是处理复杂的目标和可行性约束以及多机器人任务分配问题的其他变体。这些方向有许多重要研究进展的例子。我们提出了任务分配问题的一般表述，该表述概括了经过充分研究的几个版本。我们的公式包括机器人的状态、任务以及它们运行的​​周围环境。我们描述了问题如何根据可行性约束、目标函数和动态变化信息的级别而变化。此外，我们还讨论了该问题的现有解决方法，包括基于优化的方法和基于市场的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多机器人任务分配问题的通用建模方法，涵盖机器人状态、任务及环境因素，并讨论了不同约束条件和求解方法。
AI.motivation: 多机器人任务分配在多个领域具有重要意义，但现有研究缺乏统一框架以处理动态环境、复杂约束及多样化目标函数的挑战。
AI.method: 通过整合机器人状态、任务特征及环境动态信息，构建通用问题模型，并分析可行性约束、目标函数变化对问题的影响，同时综述优化方法与市场机制等求解策略。
AI.result: 建立了涵盖多维度因素的任务分配通用模型，系统梳理了现有求解方法的适用场景与局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为多机器人系统任务分配提供了理论统一性，未来研究需进一步结合动态环境适应性与计算效率优化。

authors_text: Qirui Huang,Bin Fu,Aozhong Zhang,Yu Qiao
title: GenText: Unsupervised Artistic Text Generation via Decoupled Font and Texture Manipulation
title_zh: GenText：通过解耦字体和纹理操作生成无监督艺术文本
abstract: Automatic artistic text generation is an emerging topic which receives increasing attention due to its wide applications. The artistic text can be divided into three components, content, font, and texture, respectively. Existing artistic text generation models usually focus on manipulating one aspect of the above components, which is a sub-optimal solution for controllable general artistic text generation. To remedy this issue, we propose a novel approach, namely GenText, to achieve general artistic text style transfer by separably migrating the font and texture styles from the different source images to the target images in an unsupervised manner. Specifically, our current work incorporates three different stages, stylization, destylization, and font transfer, respectively, into a unified platform with a single powerful encoder network and two separate style generator networks, one for font transfer, the other for stylization and destylization. The destylization stage first extracts the font style of the font reference image, then the font transfer stage generates the target content with the desired font style. Finally, the stylization stage renders the resulted font image with respect to the texture style in the reference image. Moreover, considering the difficult data acquisition of paired artistic text images, our model is designed under the unsupervised setting, where all stages can be effectively optimized from unpaired data. Qualitative and quantitative results are performed on artistic text benchmarks, which demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed model. The code with models will become publicly available in the future.
summary: Automatic artistic text generation is an emerging topic which receives increasing attention due to its wide applications. The artistic text can be divided into three components, content, font, and texture, respectively. Existing artistic text generation models usually focus on manipulating one aspect of the above components, which is a sub-optimal solution for controllable general artistic text generation. To remedy this issue, we propose a novel approach, namely GenText, to achieve general artistic text style transfer by separably migrating the font and texture styles from the different source images to the target images in an unsupervised manner. Specifically, our current work incorporates three different stages, stylization, destylization, and font transfer, respectively, into a unified platform with a single powerful encoder network and two separate style generator networks, one for font transfer, the other for stylization and destylization. The destylization stage first extracts the font style of the font reference image, then the font transfer stage generates the target content with the desired font style. Finally, the stylization stage renders the resulted font image with respect to the texture style in the reference image. Moreover, considering the difficult data acquisition of paired artistic text images, our model is designed under the unsupervised setting, where all stages can be effectively optimized from unpaired data. Qualitative and quantitative results are performed on artistic text benchmarks, which demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed model. The code with models will become publicly available in the future.
abstract_zh: 自动艺术文本生成是一个新兴主题，由于其广泛的应用而受到越来越多的关注。艺术文本可以分为三个组成部分，分别是内容、字体和纹理。现有的艺术文本生成模型通常侧重于操纵上述组件的一个方面，这对于可控的通用艺术文本生成来说是一种次优解决方案。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，即 GenText，通过以无监督的方式将字体和纹理样式从不同的源图像单独迁移到目标图像来实现一般艺术文本样式迁移。具体来说，我们当前的工作将三个不同的阶段（风格化、去风格化和字体传输）分别整合到一个统一的平台中，该平台具有单个强大的编码器网络和两个独立的样式生成器网络，一个用于字体传输，另一个用于风格化和去风格化。去风格化阶段首先提取字体参考图像的字体样式，然后字体转换阶段生成具有所需字体样式的目标内容。最后，风格化阶段根据参考图像中的纹理样式渲染结果字体图像。此外，考虑到配对艺术文本图像的数据获取困难，我们的模型是在无监督设置下设计的，其中所有阶段都可以根据未配对的数据进行有效优化。定性和定量结果是在艺术文本基准上执行的，这证明了我们提出的模型的卓越性能。带有模型的代码将在未来公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GenText方法，通过解耦字体和纹理操作实现无监督的艺术文本生成。
AI.motivation: 现有艺术文本生成模型通常仅操纵单一组件（内容、字体或纹理），难以实现可控的通用艺术文本生成。
AI.method: 设计包含风格化、去风格化和字体迁移三阶段的统一框架，使用单个编码器和两个分离的风格生成网络，从无配对数据中实现字体与纹理的解耦迁移。
AI.result: 在艺术文本基准测试中，定性和定量结果均显示所提模型性能优越。
AI.conclusion: GenText通过解耦字体与纹理操作，在无监督设置下实现了更灵活和高质量的艺术文本生成。

authors_text: Yiqi Zhong,Zhenyang Ni,Siheng Chen,Ulrich Neumann
title: Aware of the History: Trajectory Forecasting with the Local Behavior Data
title_zh: 了解历史：利用本地行为数据进行轨迹预测
comment: This paper has been accepted by ECCV 2022
comments: This paper has been accepted by ECCV 2022
abstract: The historical trajectories previously passing through a location may help infer the future trajectory of an agent currently at this location. Despite great improvements in trajectory forecasting with the guidance of high-definition maps, only a few works have explored such local historical information. In this work, we re-introduce this information as a new type of input data for trajectory forecasting systems: the local behavior data, which we conceptualize as a collection of location-specific historical trajectories. Local behavior data helps the systems emphasize the prediction locality and better understand the impact of static map objects on moving agents. We propose a novel local-behavior-aware (LBA) prediction framework that improves forecasting accuracy by fusing information from observed trajectories, HD maps, and local behavior data. Also, where such historical data is insufficient or unavailable, we employ a local-behavior-free (LBF) prediction framework, which adopts a knowledge-distillation-based architecture to infer the impact of missing data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that upgrading existing methods with these two frameworks significantly improves their performances. Especially, the LBA framework boosts the SOTA methods' performance on the nuScenes dataset by at least 14% for the K=1 metrics.
summary: The historical trajectories previously passing through a location may help infer the future trajectory of an agent currently at this location. Despite great improvements in trajectory forecasting with the guidance of high-definition maps, only a few works have explored such local historical information. In this work, we re-introduce this information as a new type of input data for trajectory forecasting systems: the local behavior data, which we conceptualize as a collection of location-specific historical trajectories. Local behavior data helps the systems emphasize the prediction locality and better understand the impact of static map objects on moving agents. We propose a novel local-behavior-aware (LBA) prediction framework that improves forecasting accuracy by fusing information from observed trajectories, HD maps, and local behavior data. Also, where such historical data is insufficient or unavailable, we employ a local-behavior-free (LBF) prediction framework, which adopts a knowledge-distillation-based architecture to infer the impact of missing data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that upgrading existing methods with these two frameworks significantly improves their performances. Especially, the LBA framework boosts the SOTA methods' performance on the nuScenes dataset by at least 14% for the K=1 metrics.
abstract_zh: 先前经过某个位置的历史轨迹可能有助于推断当前位于该位置的智能体的未来轨迹。尽管在高清地图的指导下轨迹预测有了很大的进步，但只有少数作品探索了此类当地的历史信息。在这项工作中，我们重新引入这些信息作为轨迹预测系统的新型输入数据：本地行为数据，我们将其概念化为特定位置历史轨迹的集合。局部行为数据有助于系统强调预测局部性，并更好地理解静态地图对象对移动代理的影响。我们提出了一种新颖的本地行为感知（LBA）预测框架，该框架通过融合来自观测轨迹、高清地图和本地行为数据的信息来提高预测准确性。此外，当此类历史数据不足或不可用时，我们采用局部行为无关（LBF）预测框架，该框架采用基于知识蒸馏的架构来推断丢失数据的影响。大量的实验表明，使用这两个框架升级现有方法可以显着提高其性能。特别是，对于 K=1 指标，LBA 框架将 nuScenes 数据集上的 SOTA 方法的性能提高了至少 14%。

AI.tldr: 提出利用本地历史行为数据提升轨迹预测准确性的方法
AI.motivation: 现有方法未充分利用本地历史轨迹信息，导致预测准确性受限
AI.method: 提出LBA框架融合多源数据，以及LBF框架通过知识蒸馏处理缺失数据
AI.result: 实验显示LBA框架提升SOTA方法性能14%，LBF在数据缺失时有效
AI.conclusion: 本地行为数据有效提升轨迹预测，尤其在数据不足时LBF框架表现良好

search_text: Aware of the History: Trajectory Forecasting with the Local Behavior Data 了解历史：利用本地行为数据进行轨迹预测 The historical trajectories previously passing through a location may help infer the future trajectory of an agent currently at this location. Despite great improvements in trajectory forecasting with the guidance of high-definition maps, only a few works have explored such local historical information. In this work, we re-introduce this information as a new type of input data for trajectory forecasting systems: the local behavior data, which we conceptualize as a collection of location-specific historical trajectories. Local behavior data helps the systems emphasize the prediction locality and better understand the impact of static map objects on moving agents. We propose a novel local-behavior-aware (LBA) prediction framework that improves forecasting accuracy by fusing information from observed trajectories, HD maps, and local behavior data. Also, where such historical data is insufficient or unavailable, we employ a local-behavior-free (LBF) prediction framework, which adopts a knowledge-distillation-based architecture to infer the impact of missing data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that upgrading existing methods with these two frameworks significantly improves their performances. Especially, the LBA framework boosts the SOTA methods' performance on the nuScenes dataset by at least 14% for the K=1 metrics. 先前经过某个位置的历史轨迹可能有助于推断当前位于该位置的智能体的未来轨迹。尽管在高清地图的指导下轨迹预测有了很大的进步，但只有少数作品探索了此类当地的历史信息。在这项工作中，我们重新引入这些信息作为轨迹预测系统的新型输入数据：本地行为数据，我们将其概念化为特定位置历史轨迹的集合。局部行为数据有助于系统强调预测局部性，并更好地理解静态地图对象对移动代理的影响。我们提出了一种新颖的本地行为感知（LBA）预测框架，该框架通过融合来自观测轨迹、高清地图和本地行为数据的信息来提高预测准确性。此外，当此类历史数据不足或不可用时，我们采用局部行为无关（LBF）预测框架，该框架采用基于知识蒸馏的架构来推断丢失数据的影响。大量的实验表明，使用这两个框架升级现有方法可以显着提高其性能。特别是，对于 K=1 指标，LBA 框架将 nuScenes 数据集上的 SOTA 方法的性能提高了至少 14%。 提出利用本地历史行为数据提升轨迹预测准确性的方法 Yiqi Zhong,Zhenyang Ni,Siheng Chen,Ulrich Neumann cs.CV

authors_text: Yao Su,Chi Chu,Meng Wang,Jiarui Li,Liu Yang,Yixin Zhu,Hangxin Liu
title: Downwash-aware Control Allocation for Over-actuated UAV Platforms
title_zh: 过驱动无人机平台的下洗感知控制分配
abstract: Tracking position and orientation independently affords more agile maneuver for over-actuated multirotor Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) while introducing undesired downwash effects; downwash flows generated by thrust generators may counteract others due to close proximity, which significantly threatens the stability of the platform. The complexity of modeling aerodynamic airflow challenges control algorithms from properly compensating for such a side effect. Leveraging the input redundancies in over-actuated UAVs, we tackle this issue with a novel control allocation framework that considers downwash effects and explores the entire allocation space for an optimal solution. This optimal solution avoids downwash effects while providing high thrust efficiency within the hardware constraints. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first formal derivation to investigate the downwash effects on over-actuated UAVs. We verify our framework on different hardware configurations in both simulation and experiment.
summary: Tracking position and orientation independently affords more agile maneuver for over-actuated multirotor Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) while introducing undesired downwash effects; downwash flows generated by thrust generators may counteract others due to close proximity, which significantly threatens the stability of the platform. The complexity of modeling aerodynamic airflow challenges control algorithms from properly compensating for such a side effect. Leveraging the input redundancies in over-actuated UAVs, we tackle this issue with a novel control allocation framework that considers downwash effects and explores the entire allocation space for an optimal solution. This optimal solution avoids downwash effects while providing high thrust efficiency within the hardware constraints. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first formal derivation to investigate the downwash effects on over-actuated UAVs. We verify our framework on different hardware configurations in both simulation and experiment.
abstract_zh: 独立跟踪位置和方向可为过驱动多旋翼无人机 (UAV) 提供更灵活的机动性，同时引入不良的下洗效应；推力发生器产生的下洗流可能会因距离太近而抵消其他流，这严重威胁平台的稳定性。空气动力气流建模的复杂性对控制算法提出了正确补偿这种副作用的挑战。利用过度驱动无人机的输入冗余，我们通过一种新颖的控制分配框架来解决这个问题，该框架考虑下洗效应并探索整个分配空间以获得最佳解决方案。这种最佳解决方案避免了下洗效应，同时在硬件限制内提供高推力效率。据我们所知，我们的研究是第一个正式的推导，用于研究过度驱动无人机的下洗效应。我们通过模拟和实验在不同的硬件配置上验证了我们的框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向过驱动无人机的下洗流感知控制分配框架，通过优化推力分配避免下洗效应并提升推力效率。
AI.motivation: 独立控制多旋翼无人机的位置和姿态虽能提高敏捷性，但近距离下洗流相互干扰会威胁平台稳定性，而现有控制算法难以有效补偿该效应。
AI.method: 利用过驱动系统的输入冗余性，构建考虑下洗效应的控制分配框架，通过探索全局分配空间求解最优推力分配方案。
AI.result: 在不同硬件配置的仿真与实验中验证了框架有效性，成功避免下洗干扰并实现高推力效率。
AI.conclusion: 首次对过驱动无人机下洗效应进行形式化推导，提出的控制分配框架在理论和实验上均证明了其可行性。

authors_text: Yuxiao Chen,Long Zhao,Jianbo Yuan,Yu Tian,Zhaoyang Xia,Shijie Geng,Ligong Han,Dimitris N. Metaxas
title: Hierarchically Self-Supervised Transformer for Human Skeleton Representation Learning
title_zh: 用于人体骨骼表示学习的分层自监督变压器
abstract: Despite the success of fully-supervised human skeleton sequence modeling, utilizing self-supervised pre-training for skeleton sequence representation learning has been an active field because acquiring task-specific skeleton annotations at large scales is difficult. Recent studies focus on learning video-level temporal and discriminative information using contrastive learning, but overlook the hierarchical spatial-temporal nature of human skeletons. Different from such superficial supervision at the video level, we propose a self-supervised hierarchical pre-training scheme incorporated into a hierarchical Transformer-based skeleton sequence encoder (Hi-TRS), to explicitly capture spatial, short-term, and long-term temporal dependencies at frame, clip, and video levels, respectively. To evaluate the proposed self-supervised pre-training scheme with Hi-TRS, we conduct extensive experiments covering three skeleton-based downstream tasks including action recognition, action detection, and motion prediction. Under both supervised and semi-supervised evaluation protocols, our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance. Additionally, we demonstrate that the prior knowledge learned by our model in the pre-training stage has strong transfer capability for different downstream tasks.
summary: Despite the success of fully-supervised human skeleton sequence modeling, utilizing self-supervised pre-training for skeleton sequence representation learning has been an active field because acquiring task-specific skeleton annotations at large scales is difficult. Recent studies focus on learning video-level temporal and discriminative information using contrastive learning, but overlook the hierarchical spatial-temporal nature of human skeletons. Different from such superficial supervision at the video level, we propose a self-supervised hierarchical pre-training scheme incorporated into a hierarchical Transformer-based skeleton sequence encoder (Hi-TRS), to explicitly capture spatial, short-term, and long-term temporal dependencies at frame, clip, and video levels, respectively. To evaluate the proposed self-supervised pre-training scheme with Hi-TRS, we conduct extensive experiments covering three skeleton-based downstream tasks including action recognition, action detection, and motion prediction. Under both supervised and semi-supervised evaluation protocols, our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance. Additionally, we demonstrate that the prior knowledge learned by our model in the pre-training stage has strong transfer capability for different downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 尽管完全监督的人体骨骼序列建模取得了成功，但利用自监督预训练进行骨骼序列表示学习一直是一个活跃的领域，因为大规模获取特定于任务的骨骼注释很困难。最近的研究重点是使用对比学习来学习视频级时间和判别信息，但忽略了人体骨骼的层次时空性质。与视频级别的这种表面监督不同，我们提出了一种自监督分层预训练方案，并将其纳入基于分层 Transformer 的骨架序列编码器（Hi-TRS）中，以分别显式捕获帧、剪辑和视频级别的空间、短期和长期时间依赖性。为了评估所提出的 Hi-TRS 自监督预训练方案，我们进行了广泛的实验，涵盖三个基于骨架的下游任务，包括动作识别、动作检测和运动预测。在监督和半监督评估协议下，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们证明了我们的模型在预训练阶段学到的先验知识对于不同的下游任务具有很强的迁移能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种层次自监督Transformer模型（Hi-TRS），用于人体骨骼序列的表示学习，解决大规模标注数据获取困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法仅关注视频级监督，忽视了骨骼序列的层次时空特性，难以有效捕捉帧级空间关系与多尺度时间依赖。
AI.method: 设计层次化Transformer编码器（Hi-TRS），通过自监督预训练在帧、片段和视频三个层级分别建模空间特征、短期时序和长期时序依赖。
AI.result: 在动作识别、检测和运动预测三个下游任务中，Hi-TRS在监督和半监督设置下均达到SOTA性能，且预训练知识具有强迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 层次化自监督预训练能有效建模骨骼序列的多尺度时空特性，提升表示学习效果并增强模型在不同任务中的泛化能力。

search_text: Hierarchically Self-Supervised Transformer for Human Skeleton Representation Learning 用于人体骨骼表示学习的分层自监督变压器 Despite the success of fully-supervised human skeleton sequence modeling, utilizing self-supervised pre-training for skeleton sequence representation learning has been an active field because acquiring task-specific skeleton annotations at large scales is difficult. Recent studies focus on learning video-level temporal and discriminative information using contrastive learning, but overlook the hierarchical spatial-temporal nature of human skeletons. Different from such superficial supervision at the video level, we propose a self-supervised hierarchical pre-training scheme incorporated into a hierarchical Transformer-based skeleton sequence encoder (Hi-TRS), to explicitly capture spatial, short-term, and long-term temporal dependencies at frame, clip, and video levels, respectively. To evaluate the proposed self-supervised pre-training scheme with Hi-TRS, we conduct extensive experiments covering three skeleton-based downstream tasks including action recognition, action detection, and motion prediction. Under both supervised and semi-supervised evaluation protocols, our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance. Additionally, we demonstrate that the prior knowledge learned by our model in the pre-training stage has strong transfer capability for different downstream tasks. 尽管完全监督的人体骨骼序列建模取得了成功，但利用自监督预训练进行骨骼序列表示学习一直是一个活跃的领域，因为大规模获取特定于任务的骨骼注释很困难。最近的研究重点是使用对比学习来学习视频级时间和判别信息，但忽略了人体骨骼的层次时空性质。与视频级别的这种表面监督不同，我们提出了一种自监督分层预训练方案，并将其纳入基于分层 Transformer 的骨架序列编码器（Hi-TRS）中，以分别显式捕获帧、剪辑和视频级别的空间、短期和长期时间依赖性。为了评估所提出的 Hi-TRS 自监督预训练方案，我们进行了广泛的实验，涵盖三个基于骨架的下游任务，包括动作识别、动作检测和运动预测。在监督和半监督评估协议下，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们证明了我们的模型在预训练阶段学到的先验知识对于不同的下游任务具有很强的迁移能力。 本文提出一种层次自监督Transformer模型（Hi-TRS），用于人体骨骼序列的表示学习，解决大规模标注数据获取困难的问题。 Yuxiao Chen,Long Zhao,Jianbo Yuan,Yu Tian,Zhaoyang Xia,Shijie Geng,Ligong Han,Dimitris N. Metaxas cs.CV
